String.Source: Tosses a Jumping Poison spider on the ground that will launch itself at nearby enemies and explode if it lands near them.
String.Dest: 将一只跳毒蜘蛛放在地上，它会向敌人弹射，如果落在附近就会爆炸。

String.Source: Tosses a Jumping Fire spider on the ground that will launch itself at nearby enemies and explode if it lands near them.
String.Dest: 将一只跳焰蜘蛛放在地上，它会向敌人弹射，如果落在附近就会爆炸。

String.Source: You know what you have to do.
Chance to paralyze the target for <dur> seconds.
Creates an Ash Guardian that guards that location until destroyed. Consumes a heart stone from your inventory, without which it will be hostile.
String.Dest: 在该处召唤一名灰烬守卫，直至被毁。消耗一颗背包中的心石，缺少则持有敌意。

String.Source: Creatures and people that this spider attaches to will fight for you for 30 seconds.
String.Dest: 被蜘蛛附着的生物或人会帮你战斗30秒。

String.Source: Tosses a dead spider on the ground which explodes when an enemy gets too close.
String.Dest: 将一只死蜘蛛扔在地上，当敌人靠近时会爆炸。

String.Source: Uses the nearby Cruxis point to flings the caster into the air.
String.Dest: 用附近的关键点让施法者飞上天。

String.Source: Opponents in melee range have a chance to be flung away.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人有几率被击退。

String.Source: Targets that fail to resist are immobilized in hardened ash for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 抵抗失败的目标将被困于硬化灰烬中，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: For <dur> seconds, opponents in melee range have a chance of being flung away.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人有几率被击退，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Creatures and people up to level <mag> will attack anything nearby for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: <mag>级以内的生物和人会攻击附近任何目标，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Cast on a nearby surface, it explodes when enemies are nearby, immobilizing them in hardened ash for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 施放于附近地面，当敌人接近时爆炸，将其困于硬化灰烬中，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: A fiery explosion for <mag> points of damage in a 15 foot radius. Targets on fire take extra damage.
String.Dest: 火焰爆炸在15尺半径范围内造成<mag>点伤害。着火目标会受到额外伤害。

String.Source: Targets up to level <20> that fail to resist are frenzied for <30> seconds.
String.Dest: 使最高<20>级以内且抵抗失败的目标将发狂<30>秒。

String.Source: Creatures and people will attack enemies nearby for 10 seconds.
String.Dest: 生物和人会攻击附近的敌人，持续10秒。

String.Source: Varona went to Raven Rock on an errand.
String.Dest: 瓦罗纳去鸦石镇采购了。

String.Source: Know anyone that might take the job?
String.Dest: 知道谁会接这份工作吗？
葛洛文·马洛里的家钥匙

String.Source: The Journal of Ralis Sedarys - Volume 20
String.Dest: 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷20

String.Source: Raven Rock Crescius Caerellius's House Faction
String.Dest: Raven Rock Crescius Caerellius's House Faction

String.Source: The Journal of Ralis Sedarys - Volume 23
String.Dest: 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷23

String.Source: I found Varona dead on the road to Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 我发现瓦罗纳死在去鸦石镇的路上。

String.Source: Tell Neloth that Varona is dead
String.Dest: 把瓦罗纳的死讯告诉内洛斯

String.Source: The Journal of Ralis Sedarys - Volume 22
String.Dest: 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷22

String.Source: Do you want to be the new steward of Tel Mithryn?
String.Dest: 你想不想成为泰尔·米斯瑞恩的新管家？

String.Source: I've found you a new steward.
The Journal of Ralis Sedarys - Volume 21
String.Dest: 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷21

String.Source: What do you have for sale?
Adril and Cindiri Arano's Shared Faction
String.Dest: Adril and Cindiri Arano's Shared Faction

String.Source: Fethis and Dreyla Alor's Shared Faction
String.Dest: Fethis and Dreyla Alor's Shared Faction

String.Source: The Journal of Ralis Sedarys - Volume 19
String.Dest: 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷19
实际上，我要晚点儿回来。

String.Source: Use the "Bend Will" Shout to tame Sahrotaar
String.Dest: 使用“意志屈服”龙吼来驯服萨洛塔尔

String.Source: Wait for Storn to read the book
What can you tell me about the Harstrad headwaters?
String.Dest: 能跟我说说哈斯垂德河源么？

String.Source: It was in Ildari Sarothril's grave.
String.Dest: 那是伊达利·萨罗希里的墓。

String.Source: This heart stone is the source of the attacks.
String.Dest: 这颗心石就是袭击的来源。
把钱还给莫古尔或者杀了他
击杀法克斯·卡里乌斯将军

String.Source: Kill the ash spawn attacking Captain Veleth
String.Dest: 击杀袭击维黎斯队长的灰烬怪

String.Source: Find the source of the attacks
Except now he expects me to pay him.
Aren't you coming to Highpoint Tower?
Why don't you do this? Why me?
String.Dest: 你自己怎么不去？为什么要我来？

String.Source: Tosses a dead spider on the ground which explodes when an enemy gets too close.
String.Dest: 将一只死蜘蛛扔在地上，当敌人靠近时会爆炸。

String.Source: Master Neloth? What did he do?
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师？他干什么了？

String.Source: I hear you know where to find Black Books.
String.Dest: 听说你知道如何找到黑暗经书。

String.Source: Talvas summoned an Ash Guardian outside.
String.Dest: 塔瓦斯在外头召唤了一头灰烬守卫。

String.Source: Did you know about the Ash Guardian outside?
String.Dest: 你知道外面有头灰烬守卫吗？

String.Source: What went wrong with the Ash Guardian spell?
String.Dest: 召唤灰烬守护者的法术出了什么问题？

String.Source: The Dwemer? What do they have to do with this?
What do you need to fix the tower?
Caster is invisible for <dur> seconds. Activating an object or attacking will break the spell.
String.Dest: 施法者隐形<dur>秒。期间任何与物体的互动及攻击行为都会打破隐形状态。

String.Source: Why don't you just pay him?
String.Dest: 你为什么不干脆还他钱呢？

String.Source: Creates an Ash Guardian that guards that location until destroyed. Consumes a heart stone from your inventory.
String.Dest: 在该处召唤一名灰烬守卫，直至被毁。消耗一颗背包中的心石。

String.Source: Learn the hidden knowledge of "Epistolary Acumen"
String.Dest: 学习《信札巧笔》的隐秘知识

String.Source: I have some right here. Take it.
I have the three soaked taproots.
String.Dest: 我有三株浸泡过的直立根了。

String.Source: Elynea said you needed these taproots.
String.Dest: 艾琳娜说你需要这些直立根。
浸泡过的直立根已经种上了。

String.Source: I have to know what Miraak knows if I want to stop him.
String.Dest: 如果我要阻止米拉克，就得知道他学到了什么。

String.Source: I don't think I can help you right now.
I'd like to book passage to Solstheim.
String.Dest: 我想买张去索瑟海姆的票。

String.Source: I can destroy it for you.
Use the "Bend Will" Shout on the Wind Stone
String.Dest: 对风石使用“意志屈服”龙吼

String.Source: I found a Black Book. I need to find more.
String.Dest: 我找到了一本黑暗经书，还得去多找几本。

String.Source: How close do I have to be?
And if I don't pay you?
There wasn't a body in the grave. Just the heart stone.
String.Dest: 坟墓里没有尸体，只有一块心石。

String.Source: Does the guild know anyone here that might?
String.Dest: 公会知道有谁能接活儿吗？

String.Source: I'm so sorry! Here, take the money.
About that money Drovas owes you...
Tosses a Flame Cloaked spider on the ground that will cause fire damage to enemies that get too close.
String.Dest: 将一只火焰斗篷蜘蛛扔在地上，对靠近的敌人造成火焰伤害。
解锁你的“意志屈服”龙吼

String.Source: Or I could just kill you now.
String.Dest: 或者我现在就把你宰了。

String.Source: Please be patient. I'll get you your money.
String.Dest: 请你耐心点，我会还你钱的。

String.Source: A cyclone that does <mag> points of damage per second and flings victims into the air.
String.Dest: 施放一阵旋风，每秒造成<mag>点伤害，并将目标抛向空中。

String.Source: Skaal Village Deor Woodcutter's House Faction
String.Dest: Skaal Village Deor Woodcutter's House Faction

String.Source: How do you know you are under attack?
String.Dest: 你怎么知道你被袭击了？

String.Source: I suppose you want me to kill them.
String.Dest: 我猜你想让我去杀了它们。

String.Source: Fires a Spectral Arrow at the target doing <mag> points of damage and staggering the target.
String.Dest: 向目标发射一支幽灵箭，造成<mag>点伤害，并使目标失衡。

String.Source: Join the assault on Thirsk Mead Hall
String.Dest: 加入对瑟斯科蜜酒大厅的进攻

String.Source: Experiment? What did you do to her?
I'm not sure the dragons are about you.
String.Dest: 我不确定龙是不是冲你来的。

String.Source: Can I help with your research?
String.Dest: 我能帮你的研究做什么？
寻找关于米拉克的信息
泰尔·米斯瑞恩药剂室钥匙

String.Source: Your spell made me weaker once I got wet!
String.Dest: 你的法术在我沾水后就把我变弱了！

String.Source: I'm looking for someone named Miraak.
String.Dest: 我在找一个叫米拉克的人。

String.Source: What kind of experiment do you want to do on me?
String.Dest: 你想在我身上做什么实验？

String.Source: Have you found any other black books?
String.Dest: 你找到其它黑暗经书了吗？

String.Source: You said you can show me my true power.
String.Dest: 你说能让我见识到我真正的力量。

String.Source: How do we get the book out of its case?
String.Dest: 我们要怎么把书从装置里拿出来？
泰尔·米斯瑞恩厨房钥匙

String.Source: Health is permanently lowered <mag> points after swimming or being in the rain.
String.Dest: 游泳或淋雨时生命值永久降低<mag>点。

String.Source: No thanks. That sounds like a bad idea.
String.Dest: 算了吧。听上去就不对劲。

String.Source: Storn sent me to find you.
I don't need your help. I'll learn Miraak's secrets on my own.
String.Dest: 用不着你的帮助，我会自己解开米拉克的秘密。

String.Source: What do you want me to do?
He wants the "secrets of the Skaal" in exchange for teaching me the third Word.
String.Dest: 他想要用第三句力量之语，来交换“斯卡尔的秘密”。
我跟赫麦尤斯·莫拉谈过了。

String.Source: Did you come here from Morrowind?
String.Dest: 你是从晨风来这儿的么？

String.Source: Targets that fail to resist take <mag> points of poison damage per second for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 抵抗失败的目标每秒受到<mag>点毒素伤害，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Summons an Ash Spawn for <dur> seconds wherever the caster is pointing.
String.Dest: 在施法者指定的位置召唤一个灰烬怪，持续 <dur> 秒。

String.Source: He must have been someone important.
I'm not really sure. I saw Miraak on a dragon.
String.Dest: 我不是很确定，我看见米拉克骑在一头龙上。

String.Source: The swords true power can only be unlocked by the Thuum of the Dohvakiin. Rage Of Ancients Active: <Global=dlc2DBDragonWeapons>
String.Dest: 只有都瓦克因的吐目才能解锁这把剑真正的力量。古人之怒：<Global=dlc2DBDragonWeapons>

String.Source: Receive an additional <mag> Health and Stamina while Bow Of The Stag Prince is equipped.
String.Dest: 当你装备鹿王弓的时候，额外获得<mag>点的生命与耐力。

String.Source: This Miraak tried to have me killed.
String.Dest: 这个叫米拉克的想杀我。
我调查了一个荆棘之心战士。

String.Source: For <dur> seconds, opponents in melee range take <mag> points fire damage per second. Targets on fire take extra damage.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人受到每秒<mag>点火焰伤害。着火目标受到额外伤害。持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Where can I find a Briarheart warrior?
String.Dest: 我可以在哪里找到荆棘之心战士？
斯卡尔村“野血”沃弗的家

String.Source: Why do you think the attacks are from the Attius Farm?
String.Dest: 你为什么认为袭击都是从阿提乌斯农场来的？
去哈洛斯蒙德的古坟见布约德

String.Source: +<mag>% resistance to fire and frost for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 增加<mag>%的对火焰和寒霜抗性，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: What do Briarhearts have to do with Heart Stones?
String.Dest: 荆棘之心和心石有什么关系？

String.Source: What are the "secrets of the Skaal"?
Are you hurt badly? Do you need healing?
String.Dest: 你受了重伤吗？需要治疗吗？

String.Source: I can't let you lead Thirsk.
String.Dest: 我不能让你领导瑟斯科了。

String.Source: The book was right where you said it would be.
Opponents in melee range take <mag> points poison damage per second.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人每秒受到<mag>点的毒素伤害。

String.Source: Spells cost no Magicka for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 施法不消耗魔力，持续 <dur>秒。

String.Source: All spells cost <75>% less to cast for <dur> seconds. Single use, then must be reacquired at the Tree Stone.
String.Dest: 所有法术消耗减少<75>%，持续<dur>秒。一次性使用，之后必须回到树石处重新获取。

String.Source: What do you want of me?
Can I help with your research?
String.Dest: 我能帮你的研究做什么？

String.Source: I could lend you a hand... for a price.
String.Dest: 我可以帮你……但你得付钱。

String.Source: I discovered this note on one of the ash spawn.
String.Dest: 我在某个灰烬怪身上找到了这个纸条。
问迪乌尔关于鲍德尔失踪的事情

String.Source: Summons a Werebear for <dur> seconds wherever the caster is pointing. Single use, then must be reacquired at the Beast Stone.
String.Dest: 在施法者指定的位置召唤一头熊人，持续<dur>秒。一次性使用，之后必须回到兽石处重新获取。

String.Source: Why don't you go on ahead.
Power attacks do <25>% more damage, +<mag> damage resistance for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 重击伤害增加<25>%，伤害抗性增加<mag>点，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: I'd be glad to lend you a hand.
Causes <mag> points of poison damage for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 造成<mag>点毒素伤害，持续<dur>秒。
检查一位荆棘之心战士

String.Source: What are you going to do now?
Tell me what you want, my lord, and I will bring it to you.
String.Dest: 您需要什么，主人，我会给你带来的。

String.Source: You take half damage for <dur> seconds from all physical attacks and most magical attacks.
String.Dest: 你所受的任何物理攻击和大部分魔法攻击伤害减半，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: That was a little more than I expected.
String.Dest: 我没想到他们数量这么多。

String.Source: No heart stones, ash guardian is uncontrolled
String.Dest: 缺少心石，灰烬守卫失控了

String.Source: Tosses a Poison Cloaked spider on the ground that will Poison enemies that get too close.
String.Dest: 将一只剧毒蜘蛛扔在地上，可以使靠近的敌人中毒。

String.Source: You were saying something about heart stones?
Caster ignores <80>% of all physical damage for <dur> seconds. Single use, then must be reacquired at the Earth Stone.
String.Dest: 施法者可无视<80>%任何形式的物理伤害，持续<dur>秒。一次性使用，之后必须回到土石处重新获取。
它们多久发起一次袭击？
斯卡尔村“塑铁者”鲍德尔的家

String.Source: How were Rieklings able to overpower you?
String.Dest: 瑞克灵是怎么击败你们的？

String.Source: I think I'll pass for now.
Search the Attius Farm for clues
String.Dest: 在阿提乌斯农场找线索
这些“灰烬怪”到底是什么？
与哈洛斯蒙德之魂交流

String.Source: What do you want of me, my lord?
What do you want of me this time?
So what's your price for the final Word of Power?
String.Dest: 那么最后一句力量之语的代价是什么？
增加<mag>点伤害抗性，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Yes, and I've brought you the map to the Stalhrim source.
String.Dest: 是的，而且我把魔冰矿源地图带来了。

String.Source: Get the Wind and Sand book
Restore the steam supply to the Dwemer reading room
String.Dest: 恢复锻莫阅览室的蒸汽供应

String.Source: How are you feeling about that?
Where can I find this Ancarion?
String.Dest: 我能在哪里找到这个安卡利昂？
我跟赫麦尤斯·莫拉谈过了。

String.Source: Yes, I came here to learn Miraak's secrets.
String.Dest: 没错，我来这里是为了解米拉克的秘密。

String.Source: Somehow, reading this book took me to where he was.
String.Dest: 不知为何，读这本书把我带到他那儿去了。

String.Source: Are you still having issues with the ash spawn?
String.Dest: 还在担心灰烬怪的袭击吗？

String.Source: I found myself in another place.
String.Dest: 我发现自己到了另一个地方。

String.Source: I don't know yet what he wanted. I left Apocrypha before I found out.
String.Dest: 我还不知道他想要什么，在那之前我就离开异典了。

String.Source: You suspect there's a motivation to their attacks?
String.Dest: 你觉得他们的袭击是出于某种动机吗？

String.Source: I will do as you command, my lord.
I learned the second Word of the Bend Will Shout.
String.Dest: 我学会了意志屈服龙吼的第二句力量之语。

String.Source: Find the source of Miraak's power
String.Dest: 找到米拉克的力量之源

String.Source: Do 10% more damage and get 10% better prices from people of the opposite sex.
String.Dest: 对异性伤害提升10%，和异性交易优惠10%。

String.Source: Did anything unusual happen around the time of his disappearance?
String.Dest: 他消失那段时间有异常表现吗？

String.Source: What if you had one extra warrior?
String.Dest: 但要是你多了一名战士呢？
你要违背哈洛斯蒙德的意愿？

String.Source: Very well. Where do I begin?
Can I help with your research?
String.Dest: 我能帮你的研究做什么？

String.Source: That sounds a little too risky.
I think you owe me for that spell.
String.Dest: 看来你要为那个法术赔偿我了。
斯卡尔村奥斯拉夫的家
扎克瑞 都 都瓦克因

String.Source: Your attacks, shouts, and destruction spells do no damage to your followers when in combat.
String.Dest: 在战斗中，你的攻击、龙吼和毁灭系法术不会对随从造成伤害。

String.Source: Wielder receives an increasingly powerful blessing for every 20 animals killed by the bow. <Global=dlc2MerchAnimalsKilled> animals killed.
String.Dest: 持有者每用此弓杀死20只动物，所受祝福就会增强。已杀死 <Global=dlc2MerchAnimalsKilled> 只动物。

String.Source: What if the Skaal refuse to give up their secrets?
String.Dest: 要是斯卡尔人拒绝交出他们的秘密呢？

String.Source: Creates a magic dagger for <dur> seconds. Sheathe it to dispel.
String.Dest: 创造一把魔法匕首，持续<dur>秒。收入鞘中就会消失。

String.Source: I hope you know what you're doing. (Give book)
String.Dest: 希望你清楚自己在做什么。（给书）
我拿到阿兹拉的法杖了。

String.Source: Targets that fail to resist are coated in solidified as for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 抵抗失败的目标将被石化，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Target moves in complete silence for <dur> seconds, with a side effect of shrinking the target.
String.Dest: 目标安静无声地移动，持续<dur>秒，副作用是目标变小。

String.Source: Release the book from the Dwemer contraption
String.Dest: 把书从锻莫装置中取出来

String.Source: I won't serve you, monster. I just want to defeat Miraak.
String.Dest: 我不会侍奉你的，怪物。我只是想打败米拉克罢了。

String.Source: Collect ash from an ash spawn
String.Dest: 从一头灰烬怪身上收集火山灰

String.Source: A gout of fire that does <mag> points per second. Targets on fire take extra damage.
String.Dest: 火焰造成每秒<mag>点伤害。着火目标受到额外伤害。

String.Source: I will talk to the Skaal and bring you their secrets.
String.Dest: 我会和斯卡尔人谈，把他们的秘密带给你。

String.Source: Reading Skill Books gives you an extra Skill Point.
String.Dest: 阅读技能书会给你额外的技能点。

String.Source: How did that bring you to this old farm?
String.Dest: 你为什么会来这老农场？
与内洛斯一起前往尼查达克

String.Source: Can I help with your research?
String.Dest: 我能帮你的研究做什么？

String.Source: Seems like a waste of time to me.
Can I help with your research?
String.Dest: 我能帮你的研究做什么？

String.Source: Take on the form of the bear.
Glass Bow of the Stag Prince
Don't worry, I was just leaving.
What did you learn from the Briarheart?
String.Dest: 你从荆棘之心那儿研究出了什么？

String.Source: You take no falling damage for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 你在<dur> 秒内不受坠落伤害。

String.Source: Power attacks cost no Stamina for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 重击不消耗耐力，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Bilgemuck is an animal of some kind? And you want it back?
String.Dest: “脏脏”是某种野兽吗？你要把他找回来？
从瑟佛林宅邸中找到证据

String.Source: Why haven't you acted on the information?
String.Dest: 你为什么不根据情报采取行动？

String.Source: Adril Arano said you might be able to help me.
String.Dest: 阿德尔·阿拉诺说你可能帮得上我的忙。

String.Source: Discover the identity of the tomb's visitor
Why haven't you told Adril about this?
String.Dest: 你为什么不告诉阿德尔这些？

String.Source: Of course, Master Neloth. As you command.
String.Dest: 当然了，内洛斯大师。就按您的吩咐。

String.Source: Are you saying you want my help?
Cast on a nearby surface, it explodes for and freezes the target in place for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 施放于附近地面，产生爆炸区域并定身目标，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: I have some things to sell.
You feel an attack on the councilor is imminent.
String.Dest: 你觉得议员随时会遭袭击。

String.Source: Bring a daedra heart to Elynea
String.Dest: 将一颗迪德拉之心带给艾琳娜
维勒一个人就这么干了？

String.Source: Are you one of Neloth's apprentices?
String.Dest: 你不是内洛斯的学徒吗？

String.Source: I've decided to help you protect Councilor Morvayn.
String.Dest: 我决定帮你保护莫尔凡议员。

String.Source: Why don't you just make your own tea?
String.Dest: 为什么你不自己泡茶呢？

String.Source: What happened to House Hlaalu as a result?
String.Dest: 哈拉鲁家的下场是什么？

String.Source: Black Book: The Winds of Change
Sprayed on the ground, it creates a wall of frost that does <50> points of frost damage per second.
String.Dest: 在地面上制造一堵冰墙，每秒造成<50>点寒霜伤害。

String.Source: You're lying. You're from House Hlaalu!
String.Dest: 你在说谎，你是哈拉鲁家的人！

String.Source: Can you tell me more about the Severin family?
String.Dest: 能告诉我关于瑟佛林家的事情么？

String.Source: I'll let you get to it then.
Black Book: The Winds of Change
What kind of a person should I look for?
Hunter and Dog in the Wilderness
String.Dest: Hunter and Dog in the Wilderness

String.Source: I presume that was their downfall.
String.Dest: 我猜那就是他们衰落的原因。

String.Source: Tell me why you're really here.
String.Dest: 告诉我你来这里的真实原因。

String.Source: Nothing unusual about them at all?
String.Dest: 他们就没有一点可疑之处吗？
还有其他人住在这儿吗？

String.Source: Bring some void salts to Elynea
I'd prefer not to get involved.
Bring some vampire dust to Elynea
String.Dest: 将吸血鬼灰烬带给艾琳娜

String.Source: I suspect Tilisu Severin is the culprit.
String.Dest: 我怀疑蒂莉苏·瑟佛林就是犯人。

String.Source: Why do Dunmer leave ash yams in their tombs?
String.Dest: 为什么丹莫要在坟墓里放灰烬薯？

String.Source: End the threat to Councilor Morvayn
String.Dest: 终结莫尔凡议员所受的威胁

String.Source: I'm sorry, this is all just too strange for me.
String.Dest: 我很抱歉，但这听起来太奇怪了。

String.Source: How do I get them to do that?
String.Dest: 怎样才能让他们自投罗网？

String.Source: Why did Councilor Morvayn execute an Ulen?
String.Dest: 为什么莫尔凡议员要处决一个乌伦家的人？

String.Source: He ordered the execution. It's on his head... not yours.
String.Dest: 是他下的处决令，要报也是报在他头上……不是你。

String.Source: He's in danger of being killed? How?
String.Dest: 他有被杀的风险？怎么会？

String.Source: You can't just order me around.

String.Dest: 将一颗荆棘之心带给艾琳娜

String.Source: What does it mean to be a member of your house?
String.Dest: 成为你家族的一员意味着什么？

String.Source: Why would the Ulens want him dead?
String.Dest: 为什么乌伦家想杀了他？

String.Source: Summons a Dremora merchant for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 召唤一个持续<dur>秒的魔人商人。

String.Source: I did what had to be done.
How did you learn to talk?
Why don't you ask them to investigate?
String.Dest: 为什么不让他们来调查？

String.Source: What can you tell me about House Hlaalu?
String.Dest: 能跟我说说哈拉鲁家族么？

String.Source: Bring a giant's toe to Elynea
String.Dest: 将一块巨人脚趾带给艾琳娜

String.Source: I saw her in the Ulen tomb.
String.Dest: 我在乌伦祖坟里看到她了。

String.Source: What if they try to stop me?
Bring a hagraven's claw to Elynea
String.Dest: 将一块乌鸦鬼婆爪子带给艾琳娜
（可选）阅读格瑞希安·凯利乌斯的日记

String.Source: You were right all along. (Give journal)
String.Dest: 你一直以来都是对的。（给予日志）

String.Source: Glover wants his Ancient Nordic Pickaxe back.
String.Dest: 葛洛文想把他的古诺德鹤嘴锄要回去。

String.Source: Tosses a Jumping Shock spider on the ground that will launch itself at enemies and explode if it lands near them.
String.Dest: 将一只跳电蜘蛛放在地上，它会向敌人弹射，如果落在附近就会爆炸。
回去找克雷修斯·凯利乌斯
那么他的曾祖父在哪儿？

String.Source: Why are you telling me all of this?
String.Dest: 你为什么要跟我说这些？

String.Source: Perhaps you should return to Morrowind.
What can I do to help the Skaal?
String.Dest: 我有什么能帮上斯卡尔的？

String.Source: A cyclone that does <mag> points of damage per second and may fling victims into the air.
String.Dest: 施放一阵旋风，每秒造成<mag>点伤害，并可能将目标抛向空中。

String.Source: I admit, this does sound suspicious.
String.Dest: 我承认，这听上去很可疑。

String.Source: Slow down here. I don't want to hurt you.
What does it mean if we're both Dragonborn?
String.Dest: 如果我们都是龙裔，意味着什么呢？

String.Source: I'm guessing you don't agree with Crescius's story.
String.Dest: 我猜你不会认同克雷修斯的说法。

String.Source: How long have you been studying the Skaal?
You're right. I want to be the new chief.
String.Dest: 你说得对。我想当新任酋长。

String.Source: Why have such elite soldiers on this island?
String.Dest: 为什么岛上有这些精锐士兵？

String.Source: Is Master Neloth a good teacher?
String.Dest: 内洛斯算是个好老师吗？

String.Source: Power attacks do <25>% more damage, +<mag> damage resistance for <dur> seconds. Ancient Dragonborn are summoned if health falls below <50>%.
String.Dest: 重击伤害增加<25>%，伤害抗性增加<mag>点，持续<dur>秒。生命低于<50>%则召唤古代龙裔。

String.Source: But you said Redoran leads the Council.
String.Dest: 但你们说过瑞多然主导着议会。

String.Source: Have you always served as a ferryman?
String.Dest: 你是一直靠摆渡为生吗？
你和克雷修斯怎么相遇的？

String.Source: Where did you learn your alchemy skills?
String.Dest: 你的炼金术在哪儿学的？

String.Source: A cyclone that does <mag> points of damage per second and may fling victims into the air.
String.Dest: 施放一阵旋风，每秒造成<mag>点伤害，并可能将目标抛向空中。

String.Source: What kinds of game do you hunt?
You're a priest at the Temple?

String.Dest: 龙魂撕裂效果 - 阻止飞翔

String.Source: Why didn't he move somewhere else to find work?
String.Dest: 他为什么没有搬到别的地儿去找工作？

String.Source: Is he somewhere else on Solstheim?
String.Dest: 他在索瑟海姆岛上其他的某个地方吗？

String.Source: Tosses a dead spider on the ground which explodes when an enemy gets too close.
String.Dest: 将一只死蜘蛛扔在地上，当敌人靠近时会爆炸。

String.Source: Council? You mean there's no Jarl?
I'm here about the Stalhrim map.
String.Dest: 我来这里找一张魔冰地图。

String.Source: Miraak has absorbed the dragon soul!
It sounds like quite a sight.
Your inn has an unusual name.
String.Dest: 你这酒吧名字很特别啊。

String.Source: Are sales that bad out here?
What exactly do you sell here?
Tosses a Shock Cloaked spider on the ground that will apply Shock Damage to enemies that get too close.
String.Dest: 将一只闪电斗篷蜘蛛扔在地上，当敌人靠近时会造成闪电伤害。

String.Source: You worry much on your husband's behalf.
String.Dest: 你很担心你的另一半啊。
听起来没什么不寻常啊。

String.Source: Can you train me in Conjuration?
String.Dest: 你能训练我的召唤术吗？
免疫意志屈服龙吼影响

String.Source: That's not enough. I need to stop Miraak now.
String.Dest: 这还不够，我要立即阻止米拉克。

String.Source: What sort of a secret would be hidden here?

String.Dest: 我把你的野兽带回来了。

String.Source: Who or what is the All-Maker?
Creatures and people up to level <mag> won't fight for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: <mag>级以内的生物或人停止战斗<dur>秒。

String.Source: Which is it? Yes or no?
The smith said he'd teach me how to make Stalhrim weapons.
String.Dest: 那个铁匠说他会教我如何制造魔冰武器。

String.Source: Do you know him or not?
What do we need to do now?
The blacksmith won't talk. You're wasting your time (Persuade)
String.Dest: 那个铁匠是不会开口的，你在浪费时间。（说服）

String.Source: How did you end up in Raven Rock?
What did you do in Skyrim, before you came back here?
String.Dest: 你回来以前，在天际是做什么的？

String.Source: Can you tell me anything about him?
String.Dest: 你能告诉我些关于他的事吗？

String.Source: Are there any other Imperials in Raven Rock?
String.Dest: 鸦石镇还有其他帝国人吗？
你们为什么离开莫萨尔？

String.Source: Tosses a Jumping Frost spider on the ground that will launch itself at nearby enemies and explode if it lands near them.
String.Dest: 将一只跳霜蜘蛛放在地上，它会向敌人弹射，如果落在附近就会爆炸。

String.Source: Tell me more about your people, the Skaal.
String.Dest: 告诉我关于你们斯卡尔人的事。

String.Source: Are you friends with Councilor Morvayn?
String.Dest: 你和莫尔凡议员是朋友吗？

String.Source: Tell me more about this book, then.
String.Dest: 那么，告诉我关于这本书的事情。

String.Source: Miraak did claim to be Dragonborn.
String.Dest: 米拉克确实自称是龙裔。

String.Source: Equipped weapon of all allies swing faster for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 所有友方挥舞已装备武器的速度更快，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Ongoing poison damage of <mag> points per second.
String.Dest: 每秒持续受到<mag>点毒素伤害。

String.Source: Can't you just get the guard to find Crescius?
String.Dest: 你就不能让卫兵去找克雷修斯吗？
取回格瑞希安·凯利乌斯的日记

String.Source: You want me to do something else?
Where did you get all these items?
String.Dest: 你从哪儿得的这些东西？

String.Source: You have friends at the East Empire Company?
String.Dest: 你有朋友在东帝国公司工作？

String.Source: I have your Ancient Nordic Pickaxe.
String.Dest: 我拿到你的古诺德鹤嘴锄了。

String.Source: How did you become the leader of the village?
String.Dest: 你是如何成为村子领袖的？

String.Source: I read a book in Miraak's temple, and went somewhere. Miraak was there.
String.Dest: 我在米拉克的神殿里读了一本书，然后就去了某个地方。米拉克就在那里。

String.Source: Why all the fuss over a simple pickaxe?
This is hardly proof of anything.
You're not one of the Skaal?
Tosses a Frost Cloaked spider on the ground that will apply Ice Damage to enemies that get too close.
String.Dest: 将一只寒霜斗篷蜘蛛扔在地上，对靠近的敌人造成寒霜伤害。

String.Source: You must owe him quite a bit.
I need to trade some things with you.
Is he someone here in Raven Rock?

String.Dest: 我把苦痛草给你带来了。

String.Source: Leave this island now, or your life is forfeit. (Intimidate)
String.Dest: 立刻离开这座岛，要不你的命就没了。（恐吓）

String.Source: What's the unusual armor you're wearing?
String.Dest: 这件奇怪盔甲是怎么回事？

String.Source: Any idea of where to start?
String.Dest: 从哪儿开始找有想法吗？

String.Source: Yes, otherwise he'll teach me nothing. You can trust me. (Persuade)
String.Dest: 对，不然他什么都不会教我。你可以信任我。（说服）

String.Source: You want me to kill people?
Tosses a dead spider on the ground which explodes when an enemy gets too close.
String.Dest: 将一只死蜘蛛扔在地上，当敌人靠近时会爆炸。
“与这片土地合一”是什么意思？

String.Source: Return Ancient Nordic Pickaxe to Glover Mallory
String.Dest: 把古诺德鹤嘴锄还给葛洛文·马洛里

String.Source: I'd like you to carry some things.
String.Dest: 我希望你能帮我扛些东西。

String.Source: What else does a First Hunter do?
Can you tell me anything about him?
String.Dest: 你能告诉我些关于他的事吗？

String.Source: Where have you heard his name? Please try and think.
String.Dest: 你是在哪儿听过他的名字的？请试着回想一下？

String.Source: Tell Glover Mallory lie about the Ancient Nordic Pickaxe
String.Dest: 对葛洛文隐瞒古诺德鹤嘴锄的下落

String.Source: So you do need my help.
It looks like an ash spawn attack.
String.Dest: 看起来像一场灰烬怪袭击。

String.Source: You want Stalhrim weapons, and I think I can help you get them.
String.Dest: 你想要魔冰武器，而我觉得能帮到你。

String.Source: Varona is dead. I found her body on the road.
String.Dest: 瓦罗纳死了。我在路上看到她的尸体。

String.Source: Do you rule all of Solstheim?
String.Dest: 你们统治整个索瑟海姆吗？
你和内洛斯一起工作吗？
经历了这些，为什么给我？

String.Source: Power attacks do <25>% more damage, +<mag> damage resistance for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 重击伤害增加<25>%，伤害抗性增加<mag>点，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: What can you tell me about Ildari Sarothril?
String.Dest: 能跟我说说伊达利·萨罗希里么？

String.Source: The key is to the locked section?
String.Dest: 这把钥匙可以通往封锁的矿区？

String.Source: What wisdom can you share about hunting?
String.Dest: 关于狩猎，你可以分享什么经验吗？

String.Source: How has Raven Rock needed your help?
String.Dest: 为什么鸦石镇需要你的帮助？

String.Source: Why are you so suspicious of visitors?
Do you know someone called Miraak?
String.Dest: 你认识一个叫米拉克的人吗？

String.Source: You haven't told him how you feel?
String.Dest: 你没跟他说你的感受吗？

String.Source: Raven Rock the only settlement on the island?
String.Dest: 鸦石镇是岛上唯一的居住地？

String.Source: Is stalhrim a type of ore?
It's dangerous here for an old man.
String.Dest: 对一个老人来说这儿很危险。

String.Source: How do the Dunmer bury their dead?
How long have you been a sea captain?
Summons a Dremora butler for <dur> seconds to carry your excess items.
String.Dest: 召唤一个持续<dur>秒的魔人奴仆帮你携带多余的物品。

String.Source: For <dur> seconds, opponents in melee range take <8> points frost damage and Stamina damage per second.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人每秒受到<8>点寒霜伤害和耐力伤害，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: You need to know the truth. She was rejected by Hrothmund.
String.Dest: 你必须知道真相。她被哈洛斯蒙德给拒绝了。

String.Source: They'll show up eventually I suppose.
String.Dest: 我想他们最终一定会来的。

String.Source: Why can't you use the tomb?
I found the Emberbrand Wine stash.
String.Dest: 我找到了被藏起来的余烬牌葡萄酒。
还收东帝国公司吊坠吗？

String.Source: Let her back in, or you answer to me! (Intimidate)
String.Dest: 让她进门，不然我要你好看！（恐吓）

String.Source: Report the stash of Emberbrand Wine to Captain Veleth
String.Dest: 把余烬牌葡萄酒的情况回报给维黎斯

String.Source: Is there anything you can tell me?
Locate the hidden stash of Emberbrand Wine in Raven Rock
String.Dest: 找到藏在鸦石镇的余烬牌葡萄酒

String.Source: The Black Books have something to do with Hermaeus Mora?
String.Dest: 黑暗经书和赫麦尤斯·莫拉有关？

String.Source: She attacked me and I had to defend myself.
I don't know what happened to her. (Lie)
String.Dest: 我不知道她干啥去了。（撒谎）

String.Source: You're selling quite a few exotic ingredients.
String.Dest: 你卖的这些材料非常稀奇。

String.Source: I'll keep out of your way.
I could gather some for you.
Do you sell any special mining gear?
String.Dest: 你有卖特殊的采矿工具吗？

String.Source: What are these Black Books? Where do they come from?
String.Dest: 这些黑暗经书是什么？它们从哪儿来的？

String.Source: I could track the stash down for you.
I could talk to him for you.
Convince Geldis Sadri to admit Bralsa Drel to the inn
String.Dest: 说服吉迪斯·萨德利让布拉尔萨·德雷尔进客栈

String.Source: It'll turn up sooner or later.
Tell Bralsa Drel she's welcome at the Retching Netch
String.Dest: 告诉布拉尔萨·德雷尔她可以进呕吐气母了

String.Source: I'll sell you some of mine. (Give East Empire Pendants)
String.Dest: 我卖给你一些吧。（交出东帝国公司吊坠）

String.Source: Absorb <mag> health, magicka, and stamina for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 吸收<mag>点生命、魔力和耐力，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Bring the netch jelly to Milore Ienth
String.Dest: 将气母胶质带给米洛尔·艾恩斯
什么是东帝国公司吊坠？

String.Source: You're welcome at the Retching Netch anytime.
String.Dest: 你随时可以光顾呕吐气母了。

String.Source: Is it difficult commanding the Redoran Guard?
String.Dest: 指挥瑞多然卫兵很难吗？

String.Source: I'll cleanse the tomb for you.
Tell Elder Othreloth that the Tomb has been cleansed
String.Dest: 告诉欧斯瑞罗斯长老墓穴已经清理完毕

String.Source: We're going to fight his ghost?
String.Dest: 我们要和他的鬼魂战斗？

String.Source: Maybe this will change your mind. (<BribeCost> gold)
String.Dest: 没准这个能让你回心转意。(<BribeCost> 金币)

String.Source: I have some netch jelly right here. (Give 5 netch jelly)
String.Dest: 我这里有些气母胶质。（给出5块气母胶质）

String.Source: Is he someone you know, or not?
Why did you ban Bralsa Drel from your inn?
String.Dest: 你为什么禁止布拉尔萨进你的酒馆？

String.Source: Tell Geldis Sadri you've distributed his liquor samples
String.Dest: 告诉吉迪斯·萨德利你已经把他的样品酒发完了

String.Source: What's going to happen in there?
The Temple's tomb has been cleansed.
String.Dest: 神殿的祖坟清理干净了。

String.Source: Retrieve netch jelly for Milore Ienth (<Global=DLC2RRF02JellyCount>/<Global=DLC2RRF02JellyTotal>)
String.Dest: 帮米洛尔·艾恩斯收集气母胶质(<Global=DLC2RRF02JellyCount>/<Global=DLC2RRF02JellyTotal>)

String.Source: Locate the East Empire Pendants for Fethis Alor in Raven Rock
String.Dest: 帮鸦石镇的费希斯·阿洛找到东帝国公司吊坠

String.Source: So what's the specialty of the house?
She has a right to do what she pleases. (Persuade)
String.Dest: 她有权做想做的事。（说服）

String.Source: Just tell me where the book is and I'll go get it.
String.Dest: 告诉我书在哪儿，我自己去就行。

String.Source: It was an honor to stand with her.
String.Dest: 担任她的副手是我的荣耀。

String.Source: Have you tried to stop this?
I'm all out of Sadri's Sujamma.
String.Dest: 我把萨德利的苏贾玛都发完了。

String.Source: Geldis Sadri wants you to try his new drink.
String.Dest: 吉迪斯·萨德利希望你尝尝他新酿的酒。

String.Source: Any idea where I can begin?
Raven Rock Elder Othreloth Preaching Scene
String.Dest: Raven Rock Elder Othreloth Preaching Scene

String.Source: I could help spread the word.
I've given out the Sadri's Sujamma as requested.
String.Dest: 我照你说的把萨德利的苏贾玛都发完了。

String.Source: What do the Black Books have to do with Hermaeus Mora?
String.Dest: 赫麦尤斯·莫拉和这些黑暗经书有什么关系？

String.Source: Clear the Temple's tomb of ash spawn
String.Dest: 清除神殿墓穴中的灰烬怪

String.Source: I have that netch jelly for you.
String.Dest: 我找到你要的气母胶质了。

String.Source: Hrothmund said the next Thirsk chief is a long way off.
String.Dest: 哈洛斯蒙德说瑟斯科的下任首领还要等很久才会出现。

String.Source: It's not that simple. Bujold was rejected by Hrothmund.
String.Dest: 这可没那么简单。布约德被哈洛斯蒙德给拒绝了。

String.Source: Why do we need these cubes?
String.Dest: 我们要这些方典干什么？

String.Source: You should pay me what you can. (Persuade)
String.Dest: 你有多少就拿多少吧。（说服）

String.Source: So what's this treasure you were after?
Summons Karstaag to fight for you for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 召唤卡斯塔格为你而战，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Summons Karstaag to fight for you for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 召唤卡斯塔格为你而战，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Cast on the ground, it creates an area of lightning that does <50> points of shock damage per second.
String.Dest: 于地面施放，产生一个闪电区域，每秒造成<50>点闪电伤害。

String.Source: Stalhrim Gauntlets of Eminent Sure Grip
As a matter of fact, I do. (5000 gold)
String.Dest: 事实上，我确实有这笔钱。（5000金币）

String.Source: Bonemold Gauntlets of Minor Deft Hands
Will you ever go back to Hrothmund and try again?
String.Dest: 你要回哈洛斯蒙德那儿重新试试吗？

String.Source: Where were you when the Dragon Broke
Your Unrelenting Force shout does more damage and using all three words may disintegrate enemies.
String.Dest: 你的冷酷之力龙吼造成更多伤害，并且同时使用三段龙语可能会使敌人震碎裂解。

String.Source: Why is he exploring the mine?
Ash Spawn began to appear on Solstheim after the massive eruptions of Red Mountain early in the Fourth Era covered the southern part of the island in ash. Their exact origins are unknown.
String.Dest: 第四纪元早期，红山大规模喷发将索瑟海姆岛南部覆盖在火山灰下，之后灰烬怪开始出现于此。它们的确切起源仍然未知。

String.Source: Increases your Enchanting skill by <mag> points.
Spawns a spider that secretes a flammable oil when it feels threatened.
String.Dest: 生成一只蜘蛛，当它感受到威胁，会分泌易燃火油。

String.Source: When hit, this reanimated creature will explode for <50> frost damage.
String.Dest: 受攻击时，复活的生物会爆炸，造成<50>点寒霜伤害。

String.Source: Chitin Armor of the Eminent Knight
Fenzy Rune - Master of the Mind
You wanted to speak to me, councilor?
String.Dest: 您有要跟我说的吗，议员？

String.Source: I've defeated the Draugr and located the missing miners. They're dead.
String.Dest: 我打败了尸鬼，也找到了失踪的矿工。他们死了。

String.Source: I know that name... I found this near an old shrine. (Give journal.)
String.Dest: 我知道这个名字……这是在某个古老祭坛附近发现的。（交出日志）

String.Source: Tosses a dead spider on the ground which explodes when an enemy gets too close.
String.Dest: 将一只死蜘蛛扔在地上，当敌人靠近时会爆炸。

String.Source: Alright then. Where did you learn these secrets?
String.Dest: 那好吧，你是从哪里得知这些秘密的？

String.Source: Bonemold Gauntlets of Minor Sure Grip

String.Dest: 你能重复一遍那碑文吗？

String.Source: Where do you get your raw materials?
String.Dest: 你的原材料是哪儿来的？
把米拉克传送到玩家身边。

String.Source: Did he say what it was about?
Give the note to Captain Veleth
String.Dest: 将字条交给维黎斯队长

String.Source: Summons Karstaag to fight for you for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 召唤卡斯塔格为你而战，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: How are you getting along here?
For <dur> seconds, opponents in melee range take <15> points frost damage and Stamina damage per second.
String.Dest: 近战敌人每秒受到<15>点寒霜伤害和耐力损耗，持续<dur>秒。
告诉我更多关于瑟斯科的事。

String.Source: Have you known Bujold a while?
String.Dest: 你认识布约德很久了吗？

String.Source: A blast of flame that sets the target on fire, doing <mag> damage per second for <15> seconds.
String.Dest: 施放一股火焰将目标点燃，每秒造成<mag>点伤害，持续<15>秒。

String.Source: Bonemold Gauntlets of Major Deft Hands
Chitin Bracers of Major Sure Grip
Find a way deeper into the Barrow
String.Dest: 找一条通往古坟深处的路

String.Source: Fund the excavation of Kolbjorn Barrow (1000 gold)
String.Dest: 资助寇泊琼古坟的发掘（1000金币）

String.Source: Why not hire some of the miners out of Raven Rock?
String.Dest: 为什么不去鸦石镇雇佣矿工？

String.Source: Confessions of a Dunmer Skooma Eater
String.Dest: 丹莫斯库玛吸食者的自白

String.Source: Chitin Armor of the Major Knight
While charging, releases two Spectral Dragons from the player. Releases an additional Spectral Dragon for every 5 Dragon Souls.
String.Dest: 在施放时，从玩家身上召唤两条幽灵龙。每有5个龙魂就额外召唤一条幽灵龙。

String.Source: Opponents in melee range take <mag> points frost damage per second.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人每秒受到<mag>点的寒霜伤害。
寻找沃弗的兄弟托基尔德

String.Source: I have a letter from your brother. (Give letter)
String.Dest: 我这里有一封你兄弟的信。（交出信件）

String.Source: Stalhrim War Axe of the Vampire
I've got some money. Are you looking for a partner?
String.Dest: 我有些钱，你要和我合伙吗？

String.Source: Spawns a spider that can be used to haul items. Only one can be spawned at once.
String.Dest: 生成一个可以驮东西的蜘蛛。同一时间只能产生一个。

String.Source: Cast on the ground, it creates an area of fire that does <50> points of fire damage per second.
String.Dest: 于地面施放，产生一个火焰区域，每秒造成<50>点火焰伤害。
你能重复一遍那碑文吗？

String.Source: One-handed and two-handed weapon damage is <mag>% lower.
String.Dest: 单手和双手武器伤害降低<mag>%。

String.Source: He lives in a giant mushroom?
String.Dest: 他住在一个巨型蘑菇里？

String.Source: I found a way past the dead end.
String.Dest: 我找到穿过死路的通道了。

String.Source: Fund the next phase of the excavation (3000 gold)
String.Dest: 资助下个发掘阶段（3000金币）

String.Source: Nordic Gauntlets of Extreme Sure Grip
Stalhrim Gauntlets of Peerless Sure Grip
Stalhrim Gauntlets of Extreme Sure Grip
Can you tell me anything about him?
String.Dest: 你能告诉我些关于他的事吗？

String.Source: Black Book: The Winds of Change
Chitin Bracers of Major Deft Hands
Stalhrim Armor of the Eminent Knight
The bandits won't be a problem anymore.
Varieties of Faith in the Empire
Enemies who strike you with a melee attack have a small chance of being paralyzed.
String.Dest: 近战攻击你的敌人有小几率麻痹。

String.Source: A spike of ice that does <mag> points of frost damage to Health and Stamina and slows the target for <15> seconds.
String.Dest: 施放冰锥对目标生命和耐力造成<mag>点寒霜伤害，并减速<15>秒。

String.Source: Slow down there. What are you going on about?
String.Dest: 慢慢来，你到底在说什么？
搜索卡里乌斯将军的尸体

String.Source: Your Frost Breath Shout encases foes in ice for <15> seconds.
String.Dest: 你的寒霜吐息龙吼会将敌人冰封，持续<15>秒。

String.Source: Can you tell me anything about him?
String.Dest: 你能告诉我些关于他的事吗？

String.Source: What were you arguing with Crescius about?
String.Dest: 你在和克雷修斯争论些什么？

String.Source: Clear the Draugr from Kolbjorn Barrow
String.Dest: 清理寇泊琼古坟的尸鬼

String.Source: Lurkers are thought to be native to the murky waters of Hermaeus Mora's realm of Apocrypha.
String.Dest: 深潜者被认为是赫麦尤斯·莫拉的异典领域浊水中的原住民。

String.Source: Chitin Bracers of Eminent Sure Grip
Nordic Armor of the Major Knight
Just tell me if you know him.
String.Dest: 把你知道的关于他的消息都告诉我。

String.Source: Aren't you his apprentice? He must have taught you his secrets...
String.Dest: 你不是他的弟子吗？他肯定告诉过你他的秘密……

String.Source: Stalhrim Gauntlets of Major Sure Grip
I have some information about Fort Frostmoth.
String.Dest: 我有些关于霜蛾堡的情报。

String.Source: Did you need something from me?
Are you the one who makes the mead?
Nordic War Axe of the Blaze
Summons an Ice Wraith for <dur> seconds wherever the caster is pointing.
String.Dest: 在施法者指定的位置召唤一个冰怒灵，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Target takes <mag> points of Fire damage per second to Health.
String.Dest: 目标生命每秒受到<mag>点火焰伤害。

String.Source: Do you have any insights to share about this puzzle?
String.Dest: 你对这个谜题有什么看法？

String.Source: Rieklings may be small in stature, but they attack in swarms and can be fearsome in melee combat. They are even known to tame and ride boars into battle.
String.Dest: 虽然瑞克灵身材矮小，但他们成群结队地发起攻击，在近战中很可怕。他们甚至以驯服和骑乘野猪出战而闻名。

String.Source: I found the missing miners. Both dead.
String.Dest: 我找到那俩失踪的矿工了，都死了。
你拿一半回去怎么样？（威胁）

String.Source: Targets that fail to resist are paralyzed for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 使无法抵抗的目标麻痹，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Stalhrim War Axe of Ultimate Chaos

The Steel Smithing perk allows you to forge Bonemold armor. Elven Smithing allows you to forge Chitin armor. Advanced Armors allows you to forge Nordic armor and weapons. Ebony Smithing allows you to forge Stalhrim armor and weapons.
String.Dest: 钢铁锻造能力可以使你锻造骨模护甲。精灵锻造可以锻造甲壳护甲。高级护甲可以锻造诺德武器和护甲。黑檀锻造可以锻造魔冰武器和护甲。

String.Source: Frost enchantments are more potent when placed on Stalhrim weapons or armor.
String.Dest: 寒霜附魔在魔冰武器护甲上会更加有效。

String.Source: Bonemold armor is a type of Dunmer armor crafted out of bone and resins.
String.Dest: 骨模护甲是一种丹莫护甲，由骨头和树脂制成。

String.Source: Are you sure Gratian's death wasn't an accident?
String.Dest: 你确定格瑞希安的死不是意外吗？

String.Source: Seekers are servants of Hermaeus Mora. They are rarely seen outside his Oblivion realm of Apocrypha.
String.Dest: 探求者是赫麦尤斯·莫拉的仆人。它们极少在异典湮灭领域之外被发现。

String.Source: I can't let you go unpunished.
Clear the Draugr from Kolbjorn Barrow
String.Dest: 清理寇泊琼古坟的尸鬼

String.Source: I just got out of there as fast as I could.
String.Dest: 我以最快的速度离开了那里。

String.Source: Clear the Draugr from Kolbjorn Barrow
String.Dest: 清理寇泊琼古坟的尸鬼

String.Source: Targets take <mag> points of frost damage for <dur> seconds, plus Stamina damage.
String.Dest: 目标受到<mag>点寒霜伤害，持续<dur>秒，附带耐力伤害。

String.Source: Bring the note to a guard in Raven Rock
String.Dest: 将字条交给鸦石镇的卫兵

String.Source: Give the note to Captain Veleth
String.Dest: 将字条交给维黎斯队长

String.Source: How do you feel about Bujold?
String.Dest: 你对布约德有什么看法？

String.Source: Speak to Ralis Sedarys at Kolbjorn Barrow
String.Dest: 和寇泊琼古坟的拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯交谈

String.Source: Bonemold Armor of the Major Squire

String.Dest: 克雷修斯的曾祖父是谁？
你能重复一遍那碑文吗？

String.Source: Where can I find a heart stone?
Nordic Armor of the Eminent Knight
Did I overhear that someone is missing?
Stalhrim Gauntlets of Extreme Sure Grip
Where did you find this Black Book?
String.Dest: 你在哪里找到这本黑暗经书的？

String.Source: I found evidence proving the Severins's guilt.
String.Dest: 我找到了瑟佛林家的罪证。

String.Source: Chitin Armor of the Major Squire
When your Fire Breath Shout kills an enemy, a fire wyrm emerges from their corpse to fight for you for 60 seconds.
String.Dest: 当你用烈焰吐息龙吼杀死一个敌人时，会有一条火蚺龙从其尸体上浮现，为你战斗60秒。

String.Source: Stalhrim Gauntlets of Extreme Deft Hands
Bonemold Gauntlets of Major Sure Grip
Chitin Armor of the Eminent Squire
Are you one of the warriors from Thirsk?
Fund the next phase of the excavation (2000 gold)
String.Dest: 资助下个发掘阶段（2000金币）

String.Source: Do you have any insights to share about this puzzle?
String.Dest: 你对这个谜题有什么看法？

String.Source: Is this the map you're referring to?
Ildari? What can you tell me about her?
String.Dest: 伊达利？能跟我说说她么？

String.Source: What did she do with the prisoners?
People seem pretty tense around here.
String.Dest: 这里的人看起来很紧张。

String.Source: You're Ralis? I found your camp outside Kolbjorn Barrow.
String.Dest: 你是拉里斯？我在寇泊琼古坟旁边看到了你的营地。

String.Source: I can see this is going nowhere. Good luck with all that.
String.Dest: 这样下去没完了。祝你好运吧。

String.Source: Would I be able to collect a bounty?
Is there a bounty on her then?
What are you going to do now?
Nordic Gauntlets of Major Sure Grip
I need the "secrets of the Skaal" in order to defeat Miraak.
String.Dest: 我需要“斯卡尔的秘密”来打败米拉克。

String.Source: Do you plan to stick around here, then?
String.Dest: 那么，你打算留在这里吗？

String.Source: You were able to get the forge working again?
String.Dest: 你能让锻炉恢复运转吗？

String.Source: I heard you were starting an expedition?
String.Dest: 听说你在组织一个探险队？

String.Source: You can tell me. Come on, what's the harm? (Persuade)
String.Dest: 你可以告诉我。来嘛，也不差什么吧？（说服）

String.Source: Cast on the ground, it creates an area of frost that does <50> points of frost damage per second.
String.Dest: 于地面施放，产生一个寒霜区域，每秒造成<50>点寒霜伤害。

String.Source: Here's a little gold for your tale. (<BribeCost> gold)
String.Dest: 故事不错，给你点儿。(<BribeCost> 金币)

String.Source: You're short on gold? Maybe this will help a bit. Now talk. (<BribeCost> gold)
String.Dest: 你缺钱吗？这些或许能有些作用。现在开讲吧。 (<BribeCost> 金币)

String.Source: I suppose I could lend a hand.
I've dealt with the Draugr and found a way past the dead end.
String.Dest: 我把尸鬼都处理了，通过死路的通道也找到了。

String.Source: I can't afford it right now.
Here. This had better be worth it. (3000 gold)
String.Dest: 拿去吧。这笔钱最好花的值。（3000金币）

String.Source: Do you still need my help?
It looks like at least some of the miners survived this time.
String.Dest: 看来至少这次矿工们有活下来的。

String.Source: Chitin Bracers of Eminent Sure Grip
I believe you. Just... don't come back here.
String.Dest: 我相信你。但是……别回这里来了。

String.Source: I don't think they'll give up willingly.
String.Dest: 我不认为他们会投降的。

String.Source: Chitin Bracers of Eminent Deft Hands
Of course, the village to the north.
String.Dest: 当然，就是北边儿那个村子。

String.Source: How long have you been down here?
String.Dest: 你们在这下面待多久了？

String.Source: Opponents in melee range take <mag> points shock damage per second.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人每秒受到<mag>点的闪电伤害。

String.Source: Do you have any insights to share about this puzzle?
String.Dest: 你对这个谜题有什么看法？

String.Source: I think I've solved your ash spawn problems.
String.Dest: 我想我解决了你的灰烬怪难题。

String.Source: A blast of cold that does <mag> points of damage per second to Health and Stamina.
String.Dest: 寒流对生命和耐力造成每秒<mag>点伤害。

String.Source: Bonemold Armor of the Minor Squire
Stalhrim Armor of the Noble Knight
Why would someone want to kidnap Baldor?
String.Dest: 为什么会有人绑架鲍德尔？

String.Source: I understand. I'll talk to Storn.
String.Dest: 知道了，我会和斯托恩谈。

String.Source: Fund the next phase of the excavation (5000 gold)
String.Dest: 资助下个发掘阶段（5000金币）
去看看寇泊琼古坟的发掘

String.Source: Do you have any idea where he might have gone?
String.Dest: 你知道他可能去哪里了吗？

String.Source: Hard to be sure. He put up a strong fight.
String.Dest: 我不确定，他跟我缠斗了一阵子。

String.Source: Why do I need this Word of Power to defeat Miraak?
String.Dest: 我为什么需要这句力量之语来打败米拉克？
文迪尔·乌伦的宝箱钥匙
尼楚纳克的热诚与信仰

String.Source: Nordic Armor of the Noble Knight
Tosses a Jumping Fire spider on the ground that will launch itself at nearby enemies and explode if it lands near them.
String.Dest: 将一只跳焰蜘蛛放在地上，它会向敌人弹射，如果落在附近就会爆炸。

String.Source: Nordic Gauntlets of Eminent Sure Grip
Spawns a glowing spider that will follow you around. Only one can be spawned at a time.
String.Dest: 生产一个跟随你的发光蜘蛛。同一时间只能产生一个。

String.Source: Stalhrim Armor of the Noble Knight
Stalhrim Armor of the Major Squire
Are you going to be able to lead this place, still?
String.Dest: 你有办法领导这些人吗？

String.Source: Tosses a Flame Cloaked spider on the ground that will cause fire damage to enemies that get too close.
String.Dest: 将一只火焰斗篷蜘蛛扔在地上，对靠近的敌人造成火焰伤害。

String.Source: He'll no longer send ash spawn to Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 他不会再派灰烬怪来鸦石镇了。

String.Source: Stalhrim Armor of the Peerless Knight
A cyclone that does <mag> points of damage per second and may fling victims into the air.
String.Dest: 施放一阵旋风，每秒造成<mag>点伤害，并可能将目标抛向空中。

String.Source: Bring the evidence to Adril Arano
String.Dest: 将证据带给阿德尔·阿拉诺

String.Source: Stalhrim War Axe of Extreme Chaos
Sell Stalhrim Armor and Weapons to Ancarion
String.Dest: 把魔冰护甲和武器卖给安卡利昂

String.Source: He's no longer commanding the ash spawn.
String.Dest: 他再也不能指挥那些灰烬怪了。

String.Source: Stalhrim War Axe of High Chaos
Stalhrim Gauntlets of Major Deft Hands
Stalhrim War Axe of the Sorcerer
Chitin Bracers of Major Sure Grip
Spare me the walk. Just tell me. (Persuade)
String.Dest: 别让我白跑一趟嘛。跟我说说吧。（说服）

String.Source: Stalhrim Gauntlets of Eminent Deft Hands
Stalhrim Gauntlets of Eminent Sure Grip
Stalhrim Armor of the Eminent Knight
He's dead, but I at least found the formula.
String.Dest: 他死了，但至少我找到了配方。

String.Source: What do you know about Miraak?
What if she's right and I don't find anything?
String.Dest: 要是她说对了，我怎么在下面什么也找不到呢？

String.Source: What did you make of that stone structure everyone was building?
String.Dest: 关于之前大家建的那个石质建筑，你有什么看法？

String.Source: Summons spectral instruments that play for you for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 召唤一个幽魂乐器，为你演奏<dur>秒。

String.Source: Why sail there at all then?
String.Dest: 那你为什么还要去那儿？

String.Source: Bring the Bonemold Formula to Glover Mallory
String.Dest: 将骨模配方带给葛洛文·马洛里

String.Source: And you've been alone ever since?
String.Dest: 那之后你就独来独往了？

String.Source: Why do I need to learn a Word of Power?
String.Dest: 为什么我需要去学个力量之语？

String.Source: And the Skaal don't mind being studied?
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人不介意被研究吗？

String.Source: Summons a Spectral Dragon for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 召唤一条幽灵龙，持续<dur> 秒。

String.Source: He stole something from you, right?
I'll get that formula back for you.
String.Dest: 我会帮你把配方找回来。

String.Source: How much will it cost me?
Why were you arguing with Aphia?
String.Dest: 你为什么和阿菲娅吵架？

String.Source: What do you mean, 'free your people from control?'
String.Dest: 你说“从奴役中解放你的族人”是什么意思？

String.Source: Recover the Bonemold Formula for Glover Mallory
String.Dest: 帮葛洛文·马洛里找回骨模配方

String.Source: The Thieves Guild has a problem out here?
String.Dest: 盗贼公会在这里有麻烦？

String.Source: I noticed the shadowmark by your door.
String.Dest: 我注意到你门边儿的暗影标记了。

String.Source: Why did your mother leave the village?
String.Dest: 为什么你母亲要离开村子？

String.Source: Tell me about the shrine outside of town.
String.Dest: 跟我说说镇子外祭坛的事吧。

String.Source: You mentioned that you lost something?

String.Dest: 元气满满的阿尔贡女仆对开本版

String.Source: Why do you think this Neloth can help me find Black Books?
String.Dest: 为什么你认为内洛斯可以帮我找到黑暗经书？

String.Source: You caught me. I'll pay off my bounty. (<CrimeGold> gold)
String.Dest: 你抓到我了，我付清罚金。(<CrimeGold>金币)

String.Source: Why aren't you affected like everyone else?
String.Dest: 你为什么不像其他人一样受到影响？

String.Source: Investigate Thirsk Mead Hall and the exiled Nords
String.Dest: 调查瑟斯科蜜酒大厅和被赶走的诺德人

String.Source: Locate Cindiri's Folio from the wreck of the Strident Squall
String.Dest: 在尖啸号的残骸上找到辛迪丽的对开本

String.Source: What do you know about these Black Books?
String.Dest: 关于这些黑暗经书你知道些什么？

String.Source: I'll see if I can find the book for you.
String.Dest: 我看看能不能帮你找到那本书。

String.Source: How do you survive out here?
Nordic War Axe of Extreme Chaos
What'll you give me for these?
What is your role among the Skaal?
String.Dest: 你在斯卡尔村的职责是？

String.Source: She wants this placed at her mother's grave.
String.Dest: 她想把这个放到她母亲的墓旁。

String.Source: Come on, boy, I've got something for you...
50% chance for each element of fire, frost and shock to do <mag> points of damage.
String.Dest: 有50%几率造成<mag>点火焰、寒霜和闪电伤害。

String.Source: Combat dialogue for dragons allied to Miraak
String.Dest: Combat dialogue for dragons allied to Miraak

String.Source: I've cleansed the other four Stones.
String.Dest: 我已经净化了其他四座立石。
鲁尼尔同意了你的请求。

String.Source: Can you train me in Enchanting?
I'd rather die than go to prison!
Nordic War Axe of High Chaos
A sting that does <mag> points of shock damage to Health and half that to Magicka.
String.Dest: 对目标生命造成<mag>点闪电伤害，对魔力造成一半伤害。

String.Source: How long has the farm been abandoned?
String.Dest: 这座农场被遗弃多久了？

String.Source: Why is there a shrine being built by the water?
String.Dest: 为什么要在水边修个祭坛？

String.Source: You can trust me. I saved your life, remember? (Persuade)
String.Dest: 你可以信任我。我救过你的命，还记得吗？（说服）

String.Source: Actually, I already have it. (Give Folio)
String.Dest: 事实上，我已经拿到了。（交出对开本）

String.Source: Come on, boy, I've got something for you...
We make a good team. Why not join me for a while?
String.Dest: 我们配合的还不错，要不暂时和我同行？

String.Source: I'll make it worth your while. (<bribecost> gold)
String.Dest: 我不会让你白走一趟的。(<bribecost> 金币)

String.Source: Any chance I could talk you into overlooking this? (Persuade)
String.Dest: 我能不能劝你别管这事儿？（说服）

String.Source: How about I pay you some gold and you look the other way? (<BribeCost> gold)
String.Dest: 不如我给你点钱，你就权当没看见？(<BribeCost>金币)

String.Source: Return the Folio to Cindiri Arano in Raven Rock
String.Dest: 把对开本还给鸦石镇的辛迪丽·阿拉诺

String.Source: I'm with the Guild. How about you look the other way? (<BribeCost> gold)
String.Dest: 我是公会的。你看能不能睁一只眼闭一只眼？(<BribeCost>金币)

String.Source: What is the city of Blacklight?
Follow me, I need your help.
What happened when I Shouted at the Wind Stone?
String.Dest: 我对风石使用龙吼时发生了什么？

String.Source: What's being built outside of town?
String.Dest: 城外那是在建什么东西？

String.Source: Can you tell me about the shrine outside of town?
String.Dest: 关于镇子外的祭坛能告诉我什么？

String.Source: What do you have for sale?
What do you have for sale?
I submit. Take me to jail.
I don't have time for this. Do you?
Sorry, can't help you with that.
What do you have for sale?

String.Dest: 我找到了你遗失的对开本。

String.Source: Morwen of Skaal Village sent me to ask a favor of you.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔村的莫尔雯让我来请你帮个忙。

String.Source: Meet the Ebony Warrior at the Last Vigil
String.Dest: 到终末守灵处与黑檀战士会面

String.Source: It has? What do you mean?
Summons a High Seeker for <dur> seconds wherever the caster is pointing.
String.Dest: 在施法者指定的位置召唤一个高等探求者，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Enemy power attacks will stagger the attacker.
String.Dest: 敌人的重击会使其失衡。

String.Source: Summons a Seeker for <dur> seconds wherever the caster is pointing.
String.Dest: 在施法者指定的位置召唤一个探求者，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Target takes <mag> points of shock damage per second to Health, and half that to Magicka.
String.Dest: 目标每秒受到<mag>点闪电生命伤害和一半魔力损耗。

String.Source: Targets are frozen between Oblivion and Tamriel for <dur> seconds, and immune to all damage.
String.Dest: 将目标定结于湮灭和泰姆瑞尔之间，持续<dur>秒，且免疫一切伤害。

String.Source: Summons Dragonborn from the past to fight by the caster's side for a limited time. Each additional 5 souls summons another warrior.
String.Dest: 召唤过去的龙裔在有限时间里为施法者战斗。每有五个龙魂就多召唤一名战士。

String.Source: Why do the Ulens have a tomb in Raven Rock?
String.Dest: 为什么乌伦家在鸦石镇有个祖坟？

String.Source: Target takes <mag> points of damage per second to Health and Magicka.
String.Dest: 目标每秒受到<mag>点伤害和魔力损耗。

String.Source: Why do the Dunmer hate the Empire?
Meet up with the Redoran Guard
But you told me House Hlaalu was disliked.
String.Dest: 但你告诉我哈拉鲁家族不受欢迎。

String.Source: Take Bera's Necklace to Runil in Falkreath
String.Dest: 将贝拉的项链带给佛克瑞斯的鲁尼尔

String.Source: How did the Dunmer survive this at all?
String.Dest: 丹莫是如何存活下来的？

String.Source: Return to Morwen in Skaal Village
String.Dest: 回去找斯卡尔村的莫尔雯

String.Source: Learn the Black Book's hidden knowledge
String.Dest: 学习黑暗经书中的隐秘知识。

String.Source: Learn the Black Book's hidden knowledge
String.Dest: 学习黑暗经书中的隐秘知识。

String.Source: Learn the Black Book's hidden knowledge
String.Dest: 学习黑暗经书中的隐秘知识。

String.Source: Black Book: The Winds of Change
Learn the Black Book's hidden knowledge
String.Dest: 学习黑暗经书中的隐秘知识。

String.Source: Crescius lost your Ancient Nordic Pickaxe.
String.Dest: 克雷修斯弄丢了你的古诺德鹤嘴锄。

String.Source: Learn the Black Book's hidden knowledge
String.Dest: 学习黑暗经书中的隐秘知识。

String.Source: You don't like it on Solstheim?
I don't need some bucket of scrap metal following me around...
String.Dest: 我不需要一团废铁跟着我……

String.Source: Does <mag> points of damage to health.
Reading one of Hermaeus Mora's Black Books may transport you into his realm. Read it again to escape.
String.Dest: 读一遍赫麦尤斯·莫拉的黑暗经书可能会将你传送到他的领域，重读一遍来逃离。

String.Source: Apocrypha is the realm of Hermaeus Mora, the Daedric Prince of Fate and Knowledge. Many who come here seeking forbidden knowledge remain forever.
String.Dest: 异典是赫麦尤斯·莫拉，命运与知识之迪德拉君王的领域。许多来此寻求禁忌知识的人永远留在了这里。

String.Source: Why is a shrine being built near town?
String.Dest: 为什么镇子旁边儿在盖一座祭坛？

String.Source: Why build a shrine outside of town?
String.Dest: 你们为何要在镇子外修祭坛？
与克雷修斯·凯利乌斯交谈

String.Source: Why build a shrine outside of town?
String.Dest: 你们为何要在镇子外修祭坛？

String.Source: Why are you building a shrine near town?
String.Dest: 你们为什么在镇子旁边儿修个祭坛？

String.Source: Can you tell me more about the shrine near town?
String.Dest: 能告诉我关于镇子旁边祭坛的事儿吗？

String.Source: Can you tell me more about the shrine near town?
String.Dest: 能告诉我关于镇子旁边祭坛的事儿吗？

String.Source: Can you tell me more about the shrine outside of town?
String.Dest: 能告诉我更多关于镇子外祭坛的事儿吗？

String.Source: Tell me about the shrine outside of town.
String.Dest: 跟我说说镇子外祭坛的事吧。

String.Source: Why build a shrine outside of town?
String.Dest: 你们为何要在镇子外修祭坛？

String.Source: The world is dangerous, and you're not ready for it. (Intimidate)
String.Dest: 世界很危险，而你还没准备好。（恐吓）

String.Source: Find out who sent the Cultists
Your mother tells me that you want to leave the village.
String.Dest: 你母亲告诉我你想离开村子。

String.Source: I have business to discuss with your leader.
String.Dest: 我有事要和你们的领导谈谈。

String.Source: Convince Nikulas to stay in Skaal Village
String.Dest: 说服尼库拉斯留在斯卡尔村

String.Source: Slay the Seeker in Bloodskal Barrow
String.Dest: 击杀血颅古坟中的探求者

String.Source: Why would the Thalmor abduct you?
You will pay for your crimes against the Skaal. Prepare to die!
String.Dest: 你们要为对斯卡尔人犯下的罪行付出代价，准备受死吧！

String.Source: Take this. Just give your mother some more time. (<bribecost> gold)
String.Dest: 拿去吧。就再多给你母亲一些时间。(<bribecost> 金币)

String.Source: I do understand. In fact, I'm willing to help you get started.
String.Dest: 我明白了。实际上，我正要帮你。

String.Source: You'd abandon your mother when she needs you most? (Persuade)
String.Dest: 你要在你母亲最需要你的时候抛弃她吗？（说服）
泰尔·米斯瑞恩厨房钥匙
泰尔·米斯瑞恩药剂室钥匙

String.Source: I helped a man in need, that's all.

String.Dest: 泰尔·米斯瑞恩管家室钥匙

String.Source: Do you think this place has any connection with the Skaal?
String.Dest: 你觉得这地方和斯卡尔有关系吗？

String.Source: What have you learned about this place?
String.Dest: 你对这个地方了解多少？

String.Source: Let me guess, you need me to do something dangerous.
String.Dest: 让我猜下，你要我去做些危险的事情。

String.Source: Why all the traps and puzzles?
String.Dest: 为什么这里全是陷阱和谜题？

String.Source: Where did you hear the name?
String.Dest: 你在哪儿听到这个名字的？。

String.Source: Ash and embers cause <mag> points of damage.
String.Dest: 火山灰余烬造成<mag>点伤害。

String.Source: Wait for a message from Ralis
When close enough, identifies the source of the ash spawn attacks on Tel Mithryn.
String.Dest: 距离足够近是，可识别出袭击泰尔·米斯瑞恩的灰烬怪来源。

String.Source: Wait for a message from Ralis
Wait for a message from Ralis
Wait for a message from Ralis

String.Dest: 将血液交给赛普蒂莫斯
将方典交给赛普蒂莫斯

String.Source: How long have you been First Hunter?
String.Dest: 你担任首席猎人有多久了？
你们的头衔意味着什么？

String.Source: Torkild? Your brother is looking for you.
String.Dest: 托基尔德？你兄弟在找你呢。

String.Source: All spells cost <10>% less magicka. Enchantments are <10>% more powerful.
String.Dest: 所有法术魔力消耗减少<10>%。附魔效果增强<10>%。

String.Source: Combat skills are all <10>% more effective.
String.Dest: 全部战斗技能效果提升<10>%。

String.Source: Summons a field of writhing tentacles that lasts <30> seconds and poisons foes who enter it.
String.Dest: 召唤一片缠绕触手，持续<30>秒，使进入其中的敌人中毒。

String.Source: Embers and heated ash cause <mag> points per second.
String.Dest: 余烬和热灰每秒造成<mag>点伤害。

String.Source: Target is frozen between Oblivion and Tamriel for <dur> seconds, and immune to all damage.
String.Dest: 目标被冻结在湮灭与泰姆瑞尔之间，持续<dur>秒。对所有伤害免疫。

String.Source: Stealth skills are all <10>% more effective.
String.Dest: 全部潜行技能效果提升<10>%。

String.Source: Summons an Ice Wraith for <dur> seconds wherever the caster is pointing.
String.Dest: 在施法者指定的位置召唤一个冰怒灵，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: I don't know what you're talking about.
Where do you get your goods?
String.Dest: 你的货物都是从哪儿来的？

String.Source: The Greybeards seem to think so...
You appear to be in dire straits. What happened?
String.Dest: 你似乎陷入了困境，怎么了？

String.Source: How are things now that the mines are open again?
String.Dest: 矿场重新开张后怎么样了？

String.Source: The Greybeards seem to think so...
It's your mess. You clean it up.
String.Dest: 你惹出来的麻烦，自己解决。

String.Source: How did the Ash Guardian get loose?
String.Dest: 那头灰烬守卫是怎么失控的？

String.Source: Here. Have a gold piece. (1 gold)
Why do you think your brother became a werebear?
String.Dest: 为什么你认为你兄弟变成了熊人？

String.Source: Find Resonance Gems across Solstheim to complete the Kagrumez trials
String.Dest: 在索瑟海姆岛上找到共振宝石来完成卡格鲁梅兹试炼

String.Source: 50% chance for each attribute to absorb <mag> points of Health, Stamina and/or Magicka.
String.Dest: 有50%几率吸收<mag>点生命、耐力和魔力。

String.Source: What do you have to trade?
Have you ever thought about moving to a city?
String.Dest: 你有想过到城市里住吗？

String.Source: Are there other werewolves on Solstheim?
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆岛上还有其他狼人吗？

String.Source: Are you part of this pack, too?
String.Dest: 你也是这个狼群的一份子，对吧？
你要在这儿过一辈子吗？

String.Source: Do you have anything to trade?
While in Beast Form, your attacks do <50>% more damage, but you also take <50>% more damage.
String.Dest: 在野兽形态下，你的攻击造成<50>%额外伤害，但也会受到<50>%额外伤害。

String.Source: Increases the duration of your Howls by <25>%.
String.Dest: 提升<25>%嚎叫效果持续时间。

String.Source: While in Beast Form, your health regenerates.
String.Dest: 在野兽形态下，你的生命会不断恢复。

String.Source: When you enter Beast Form, the world around you seems to slow for <20> seconds.
String.Dest: 当你进入野兽形态后，周遭世界看起来变得缓慢，持续<20>秒。

String.Source: You hunt? What do you hunt?
String.Dest: 你会狩猎？都捕猎些什么？

String.Source: Herma-Mora? Why do you call him that?
String.Dest: 赫玛-莫拉？为什么你们那样叫他？

String.Source: I spoke to Hermaeus Mora. He asked for the "secrets of the Skaal."
String.Dest: 我跟赫麦尤斯·莫拉谈过了。他想要“斯卡尔的秘密”。

String.Source: Are you ready to trade your secrets to Hermaeus Mora?
String.Dest: 你准备好拿你们的秘密和赫麦尤斯·莫拉做交易了吗？

String.Source: I'll restore the remaining Stones if that will help.
String.Dest: 有用的话，我就去恢复其他的圣石。

String.Source: You mean you'll give him what he wants?
String.Dest: 你的意思是要让他得偿所愿？

String.Source: I've dealt with Hermaeus Mora before. I've read the Oghma Infinium.
String.Dest: 我跟赫麦尤斯·莫拉交易过，我读了无限智典。

String.Source: Why would Hermaeus Mora want your secrets?
String.Dest: 为什么赫麦尤斯·莫拉想要你们的秘密？

String.Source: Are you ready to trade your secrets to Hermaeus Mora?
String.Dest: 你准备好拿你们的秘密和赫麦尤斯·莫拉做交易了吗？

String.Source: He said it's the only way he'll teach me the final Word of Miraak's Shout.
String.Dest: 他说只有这么做，他才会教我米拉克的龙吼的最后一句力量之语。
这座塔是你种出来的吗？

String.Source: You must be almost as powerful as Savros Aren of Winterhold.
String.Dest: 你一定和冬堡的萨沃斯·阿冉一样强大。

String.Source: How do I know I can trust you, demon?
String.Dest: 我怎么知道该不该相信你，恶魔。

String.Source: I've heard of the House Telvanni of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 我听说过晨风的泰瓦尼家。
拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的来信4
拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的来信
拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的来信2

String.Source: Take on the form of the wolf.
As the Archmage of Winterhold, you and I should share our secrets.
String.Dest: 身为冬堡学院的大法师，我们应该交换秘密。

String.Source: Search for the treasure of Haknir Death-Brand
String.Dest: 找到“死印”海科尼尔的宝藏

String.Source: Visit the hunters at Frostmoon Crag
String.Dest: 拜访霜月险崖的猎人们

String.Source: What do you do for Master Neloth?
String.Dest: 你都替内洛斯大师做些什么？
拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的来信3

String.Source: You must be a very powerful wizard.
String.Dest: 你肯定是个实力强大的法师。

String.Source: Maybe you should let him go.
Lightning that does <mag> points of shock damage to Health and Magicka per second.
String.Dest: 闪电对生命和魔力造成<mag>点伤害。
尼库拉斯同意留下来了。

String.Source: For <dur> seconds, opponents in melee range take <mag> points fire damage per second. Targets on fire take extra damage.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人受到每秒<mag>点火焰伤害。着火目标受到额外伤害。持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: A blast of cold that does <mag> points of damage per second to Health and Stamina.
String.Dest: 寒流对生命和耐力造成每秒<mag>点伤害。

String.Source: Opponents in melee range take <mag> points shock damage per second.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人每秒受到<mag>点的闪电伤害。

String.Source: Opponents in melee range take <mag> points frost damage per second.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人每秒受到<mag>点的寒霜伤害。

String.Source: A gout of fire that does <mag> points per second. Targets on fire take extra damage.
String.Dest: 火焰造成每秒<mag>点伤害。着火目标受到额外伤害。

String.Source: Opponents in melee range take <mag> points poison damage per second.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人每秒受到<mag>点的毒素伤害。

String.Source: Records memories of your experiences for Neloth.
String.Dest: 帮内洛斯记录你的经历

String.Source: I need you to come with me.
One of the most dangerous Steam Animunculi is the Dwarven Ballista, which fires a bolt that can penetrate even the thickest armor.
String.Dest: 矮人弩炮是最危险的蒸汽机械之一，它发射的弩矢可以穿透最厚的护甲。

String.Source: Your Wards are <25>% less effective, but absorb <50>% of the magicka from incoming spells.
String.Dest: 你的屏障效果降低<25>%，但从抵挡的法术吸收<50>%魔力。

String.Source: Your Conjuration and Rune spells cost <25>% more, but can be cast at greater range.
String.Dest: 你的召唤系法术和符文法术消耗增加<25>%，但施法范围增大。

String.Source: Ongoing poison damage of <mag> points per second.
String.Dest: 每秒持续受到<mag>点毒素伤害。
瑞莱斯·艾德利的卡格鲁梅兹笔记

String.Source: Yes. You may have noticed he's trying to return to Solstheim.
String.Dest: 对。你可能注意到他正试着回归索瑟海姆。

String.Source: Tell me of your people, the Skaal.
String.Dest: 跟我说说你们斯卡尔人吧。

String.Source: What do you know about Miraak?
Well, this is your lucky day. (Give formula)
String.Dest: 嗯，看来今天是你的幸运日。（交出配方）

String.Source: Do you need help with your research?
String.Dest: 你的研究需要我帮忙吗？

String.Source: I hear you know where to find Black Books.
String.Dest: 听说你知道如何找到黑暗经书。

String.Source: Learn more about the buried treasure
String.Dest: 了解更多关于宝藏的秘密

String.Source: Use the Deathbrand Treasure Map to find the treasure
String.Dest: 根据死印藏宝图找到宝藏

String.Source: Storn didn't die for nothing. Miraak will never threaten Solstheim again.
String.Dest: 斯托恩的死没有白费。米拉克再也不能威胁索瑟海姆了。

String.Source: Miraak is behind what's happening to your people.
String.Dest: 你族人的遭遇要归咎于米拉克。

String.Source: Why won't the book you have here help me?
String.Dest: 为什么你这本书帮不了我？

String.Source: Do you know where I can find another Black Book?
String.Dest: 你知道我可以去哪儿找其它的黑暗经书吗？

String.Source: So you know where to find this Black Book? The one connected with Miraak?
String.Dest: 那么你知道上哪儿去找这本与米拉克有关的黑暗经书吗？

String.Source: Hermaeus Mora wouldn't have helped me without Storn's sacrifice.
String.Dest: 没有斯托恩的牺牲，赫麦尤斯·莫拉就不会帮我了。

String.Source: Isn't Miraak your ally? Why help me defeat him?
String.Dest: 米拉克不是你的盟友吗？为什么要帮我打败他？

String.Source: I killed Miraak. But Hermaeus Mora is still out there.
String.Dest: 我杀了米拉克，但赫麦尤斯·莫拉依然存在。

String.Source: Hermaeus Mora killed Storn, remember. Not Miraak.
String.Dest: 记住，是赫麦尤斯·莫拉杀了斯托恩。不是米拉克。

String.Source: I couldn't have defeated Miraak without Storn's help.
String.Dest: 没有斯托恩的协助，我是无法打败米拉克的。
把 <Global=DLC2ThirskHilundSpearCount>根瑞克灵长矛带给希兰德

String.Source: Bring <Global=DLC2ThirskHalbarnStalhrimCount> Stalhrim Ore and <Global=DLC2ThirskHalbarnEbonyCount> Ebony Ingots to Halbarn
String.Dest: 把 <Global=DLC2ThirskHalbarnStalhrimCount>个魔冰矿石和<Global=DLC2ThirskHalbarnEbonyCount>个黑檀锭带给哈尔巴恩

String.Source: Location for things that need a location
String.Dest: Location for things that need a location

String.Source: I've brought the materials you wanted. (Give stalhrim and ebony.)
String.Dest: 我把你要的原料带来了。（交出魔冰和黑檀）

String.Source: Don't you want to know what happened with Miraak?
String.Dest: 你不想知道米拉克的下场吗？

String.Source: I've got a lot of Riekling spears. I hope it's enough. (Give spears.)
String.Dest: 我这里有很多瑞克灵的长矛。希望够数了。（交出长矛）

String.Source: Is there anything that would make being down here more bearable?
String.Dest: 有什么能让你在这下面的日子更好过吗？

String.Source: I found some Ashfire Mead. (Give mead.)
String.Dest: 我拿到了些灰焰蜜酒。（交出蜜酒）

String.Source: I've got some juniper berries. (Give berries.)
String.Dest: 我这里有些刺柏浆果。（交出果子）

String.Source: You don't need to worry about me.
Bring Elmus some Ashfire Mead from Thirsk Mead Hall
String.Dest: 从瑟斯科蜜酒大厅带些灰焰蜜酒给艾穆斯
将刺柏浆果带给艾穆斯

String.Source: It's time for us to part ways.
No, nothing interesting. I just killed Miraak and saved Solstheim.
String.Dest: 没有，没什么特别的。我不过就是杀了米拉克，拯救了索瑟海姆罢了。

String.Source: Are you getting back to work?
I need you to do something.
Walk on the surface of water for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 能在水面上行走，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: I need to trade some things with you.
Raven Rock is purely a Dunmer settlement?
String.Dest: 鸦石镇是个纯丹莫聚落吗？

String.Source: Sounds fun. I'll join your hunt.
String.Dest: 听起来很有趣。我要加入狩猎。

String.Source: I'd like to learn the Ash Guardian spell.
String.Dest: 我想学习召唤灰烬守卫的法术。

String.Source: Sooner or later, death comes for us all.
I'm looking for Miraak. Do you know him?
String.Dest: 我在找米拉克。你认识他吗？

String.Source: How did you end up on Solstheim?
String.Dest: 你怎么流落到索瑟海姆来了？

String.Source: Why did you work for him then?
String.Dest: 那你为什么要给他干活儿？

String.Source: That could still happen, couldn't it?
Are you sure you're ready to be Shaman of the Skaal?
String.Dest: 你准备好担任斯卡尔村的萨满了吗？

String.Source: Then why stay here? Why not live somewhere safer?
String.Dest: 那为什么留在这儿？为什么不住在安全些的地方？

String.Source: I've got it. Don't cast Ash Guardian without a heart stone.
String.Dest: 我知道了，没有心石就不要召唤灰烬守卫。

String.Source: Sprayed on the ground, it creates a wall of lightning that does <50> points of shock damage per second.
String.Dest: 在地面上制造一堵闪电墙，每秒造成<50>点闪电伤害。

String.Source: For a shaman, you fight pretty well. Who trained you?
String.Dest: 就萨满而言，你的战斗技巧不错。谁教你的？

String.Source: Can I dig for ebony in Raven Rock Mine?
String.Dest: 我能在鸦石镇矿场挖黑檀矿吗？

String.Source: I think this belongs to you. (Give Glover's Letter)
String.Dest: 这应该是你的。（给葛洛文的信）

String.Source: You think someone is out to get you?
Target takes <mag> points of shock damage per second to Health, and half that to Magicka.
String.Dest: 目标每秒受到<mag>点闪电生命伤害和一半魔力损耗。

String.Source: Are you the captain of the Northern Maiden?
String.Dest: 你是北方少女号的船长吗？
把米拉克传送到玩家身边。

String.Source: You owe me. Those cultists you brought here tried to kill me. (Persuade)
String.Dest: 这是你欠我的，你带来的那些教徒们想杀了我。（说服）

String.Source: What can you tell me about Morrowind?
Yes, you are. You're taking me to Solstheim.
String.Dest: 你得回去，你得带我回索瑟海姆去。

String.Source: How can you not know how you got here? You sailed here, right?
String.Dest: 你怎么不知道自己怎么来的？你把船开过来的，对吗？

String.Source: What happened? Why won't you go back?
String.Dest: 发生什么事了？你为什么不回去了？

String.Source: I'll pay you double your usual rate. (Give <Global=DLC2CostToSailx2> gold)
String.Dest: 我给你开双倍的价钱。(付<Global=DLC2CostToSailx2> 金币)

String.Source: People are trying to kill me. I'm not taking no for an answer. (Intimidate)
String.Dest: 有人想杀了我，你拒绝可没用。（威吓）

String.Source: I was attacked by some cultists who came here on your ship.
String.Dest: 我被你船上来的几个教徒袭击了。

String.Source: Visit the werewolves at Frostmoon Crag
String.Dest: 拜访霜月险崖的狼人们
东帝国公司的第二封信

String.Source: I found this heart stone with the ring.
String.Dest: 我用指环找到了这颗心石。
东帝国公司的第三封信

String.Source: I'd like passage back to Skyrim.
Each of Solstheim's sacred stones grants a power which can be used only once. Return to the stone to reacquire the power.
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆的每块圣石都能赋予一种一次性的力量，需要回到圣石处来重新获取。
东帝国公司的第一封信

String.Source: He appeared mad. I had to kill him to defend myself.
String.Dest: 他看上去像是疯了，我不得不杀了他来自卫。

String.Source: Sprays writhing tentacles on the ground that stagger and poison foes that enter them.
String.Dest: 从地面喷射扭曲摇晃的触手，毒害被穿刺的敌人。

String.Source: Have the dragons made life more difficult for the Skaal?
String.Dest: 龙的出现有让斯卡尔人的生活恶化吗？

String.Source: Who are you? What are you doing here?
Where did you live before you were here?
String.Dest: 你们来这儿之前住在哪里？

String.Source: Why did you take over Thirsk?
String.Dest: 你们为什么要占领瑟斯科？

String.Source: Skaal Village, near the eastern coast of Solstheim, is home to an ancient offshoot tribe of Nords known as the Skaal.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔村位于索瑟海姆的东海岸附近，是诺德的古老部落分支——斯卡尔人的家园。

String.Source: Once I've got Stalhrim, how do I forge it into something useful?
String.Dest: 我取得魔冰后，怎么把它熔炼成有用的东西？

String.Source: Strange flora native to Morrowind have sprouted up in the ash that blankets the southern reaches of Solstheim.
String.Dest: 来自晨风的奇怪植物已经在索瑟海姆南部的灰烬中生根发芽了。

String.Source: The ashfall from Red Mountain has driven much of Solstheim's native wildlife into the northern half of the island.
String.Dest: 来自红山的火山灰把索瑟海姆的大部分本土野生生物驱赶到了岛的北部。

String.Source: The ancient Nords of Solstheim sealed their tombs with Stalhrim, a form of enchanted ice as hard as stone. The Skaal are the only ones who know the secret of crafting armor and weapons out of Stalhrim.
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆的古诺德人用魔冰，一种附了魔、坚硬如石的冰来封印他们的坟墓。只有斯卡尔人了解用魔冰打造武器和护甲的秘密。

String.Source: Follow me. I need your help.
String.Dest: 跟我来。我需要你的帮助。

String.Source: "...the people of Solstheim, the heirs of the Guardian, must remain wary, lest the dark influence of Herma-Mora, or even the Traitor himself, return someday." --excerpt from "The Guardian and the Traitor"
String.Dest: “……索瑟海姆的人民以及守护者的继承者，要始终保持警惕，以免被赫玛-莫拉的黑暗影响侵蚀，甚至有一天，背叛者自己会卷土重来。”——摘自《守护者与背叛者》

String.Source: Solstheim was part of Skyrim until the High King gave it to Morrowind in 4E 16 to serve as a refuge for the Dunmer after the events of the Red Year.
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆曾经是天际的一部分，直到至高王在4E16年把它作为红色之年事件之后丹莫的避难所划归晨风。

String.Source: The Dunmer of Morrowind construct chitin armor out of the shells of native insects layered with resinous glues.
String.Dest: 晨风丹莫用当地昆虫的外壳和树脂胶打造甲壳护甲。

String.Source: Rieklings have little culture of their own, but scavenge what relics they can from around Solstheim and form strange attachments to what they find.
String.Dest: 瑞克灵没有自己的文化，但他们会从索瑟海姆周围搜罗任何能找到的遗物，并对其产生一种奇怪的依恋。
我在哪儿可以挖到魔冰？

String.Source: Hawala faaaakara. Baaaa rakhee kaloo. Pooja kan faroo kee jaa. Goora! Goora! Goora! --Riekling Godspeak Song
String.Dest: 哈哇啦 法咔啦。吧 啦咔喝 咔啰。泼加 坎 法噜 咳 加。格拉！格拉！格拉！——瑞克灵神谕歌

String.Source: The master wizards of House Telvanni traditionally grow their homes from fungal spores, using secret methods known only to themselves.
String.Dest: 泰瓦尼家的大法师们用自己的秘密方法，培育真菌孢子来种出自己的房子。

String.Source: The island of Solstheim is located to the north-east of Skyrim. The "Northern Maiden" out of Windhelm is known to occasionally take passengers back and forth.
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆岛位于天际的东北方。据说，风舵城的“北方少女”偶尔会载客往返其间。

String.Source: Do Not Delete Me - needed for export to work
String.Dest: Do Not Delete Me - needed for export to work

String.Source: Some tales tell of ancient Nord heroes whose Voices were powerful enough to tame and ride dragons.
String.Dest: 某些传说中叙述的古诺德英雄的声音强大到足以驯服并驾驭巨龙。

String.Source: Thirsk Mead Hall was founded by Hrothmund, who originally left the Skaal in order to live the lifestyle of ancient Nord warriors in the wilderness.
String.Dest: 瑟斯科蜜酒大厅最初有哈洛斯蒙德建立，他离开了斯卡尔希望在荒野中过上远古诺德战士们的生活方式。

String.Source: Raven Rock, Solstheim's main settlement, is firmly under the control of House Redoran, the most powerful of the Great Houses of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 鸦石镇，索瑟海姆的主要定居点，被晨风最强的大家族瑞多然牢牢掌控着。

String.Source: Netch are often domesticated on the Morrowind mainland. Wild netch were first sighted on Solstheim several decades ago, perhaps drawn by the familiar flora that has grown up in the southern ashlands.
String.Dest: 晨风大陆的气母常被驯化。几十年前，人们第一次在索瑟海姆岛上见到野生气母，或许是被南部灰地的熟悉植物群所吸引来的。

String.Source: Although the East Empire Company originally founded Raven Rock, they turned the failing mining colony over to the dark elves at the beginning of the Fourth Era.
String.Dest: 虽然鸦石镇最初是由东帝国公司建立，但他们在第四纪元初时把这衰落的采矿殖民地移交给了暗精灵。

String.Source: Most of Raven Rock's original structures were leveled when the Red Mountain erupted in 4E 5. The Dunmer have largely rebuilt the town over the past two hundred years.
String.Dest: 当红山在4E5年爆发时，鸦石镇的大部分原建筑都被夷为平地。过去200年中，丹莫大力重建了城镇。

String.Source: Draws upon stamina to release a scorching blast of steam that deals <MAG> points of damage per second.
String.Dest: 利用耐力释放灼热的蒸汽冲击波，每秒造成<MAG>点伤害。

String.Source: Raven Rock Mine, once one of the most abundant sources of ebony in Morrowind, was shut down in 4E 170. This lead to a mass exodus from the town, cutting the population in half.
String.Dest: 鸦石矿场曾经是晨风最富的黑檀产地之一，在4E170年关闭。这导致了大量劳力离开小镇，人口减少一半。

String.Source: History of Raven Rock, Vol. III
History of Raven Rock, Vol. II
History of Raven Rock, Vol. I

"Untithed to any thane or hold, and self-governed, with free worship, with no compensation to Skyrim or the Empire except as writ in the Armistice of old wheresoever those might still apply, and henceforth let no Man or Mer say that the Sons and Daughters of Kyne are without mercy or honor." -Skyrim's Offer of Solstheim to Morrowind, 4E 16
String.Dest: “不向任何武卫或领地缴纳赋税，自信自治，不在旧有《停战协议》这一仍适用的条约以外对天际或帝国做出任何赔偿，从今往后，任何人与莫都不能说凯娜的子女是没有怜悯与荣誉的。”——天际向晨风提供索瑟海姆，4E16年

String.Source: Does <mag> damage over <dur> seconds. Additional opponents in melee range have a chance to be infected.
String.Dest: 造成<mag>点伤害，持续<dur>秒。近战范围内的其他敌人有几率被感染。

String.Source: For <dur> seconds, opponents in melee range have a chance to be infected.
String.Dest: 近战范围内的敌人有一定几率感染，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Sacred Stones only confer powers once a day
String.Dest: 圣石每天只能授予一次力量

String.Source: Equipped weapon of all allies swing faster for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 所有友方挥舞已装备武器的速度更快，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Equipped weapon of all allies swing faster for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 所有友方挥舞已装备武器的速度更快，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Equipped weapon of all allies swing faster for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 所有友方挥舞已装备武器的速度更快，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Equipped weapon of all allies swing faster for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 所有友方挥舞已装备武器的速度更快，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: I'd like training in Restoration magic.
Targets take <mag> points of frost damage for <dur> seconds. Single use, then must be reacquired at the Wind Stone.
String.Dest: 目标受到<mag>点寒霜伤害，持续<dur>秒。一次性使用，之后必须回到风石处重新获取。

String.Source: A <mag> point fiery explosion centered on the caster. Does more damage to closer targets.
String.Dest: 在施法者身上聚集一个<mag>点伤害的火焰爆炸。对接近目标造成更多伤害。

String.Source: A cyclone that does <mag> points of damage per second and may fling victims into the air.
String.Dest: 施放一阵旋风，每秒造成<mag>点伤害，并可能将目标抛向空中。

String.Source: Targets take <mag> points of frost damage for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: 目标受到<mag>点寒霜伤害，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Creatures and people up to level <mag> will attack anyone nearby for <dur> seconds.
String.Dest: <mag>级以内的生物和人攻击附近任何目标，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Target takes <mag> points of shock damage per second to Health, and half that to Magicka.
String.Dest: 目标每秒受到<mag>点闪电生命伤害和一半魔力损耗。

String.Source: A <mag> point fiery explosion centered on the caster. Does more damage to closer targets. Single use, then must be reacquired at the Sun Stone.
String.Dest: 以施法者为中心的火焰爆炸，造成<mag>点伤害。近处目标受到的伤害较高。一次性使用，之后必须回到日石处重新获取。

String.Source: Heals everyone close to the caster <mag> points. Single use, then must be reacquired at the Water Stone.
String.Dest: 治疗施法者附近的所有人<mag>点生命。一次性使用，之后必须回到水石处重新获取。

String.Source: Summons an Ash Guardian for <dur> seconds wherever the caster is pointing.
String.Dest: 在施法者指定的位置召唤一个灰烬守卫，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Adds <mag>% to the dragon breath and spell absorption of Miraak's robes.
String.Dest: 为米拉克长袍增加<mag>%的龙息和法术吸收。

String.Source: Absorb <mag>% of the magicka from dragon breath and spells. Chance on hit to spawn a tentacle explosion.
String.Dest: 从龙息和法术中吸收<mag>%点魔力。攻击命中后有几率造成触手爆炸。

String.Source: Burns the target for <mag> points. Targets on fire take extra damage.
String.Dest: 灼烧目标，造成<mag>点伤害。着火目标会受到额外伤害。

String.Source: Your dragon cannot fast travel right now.
String.Dest: 你的龙现在不能快速旅行。

String.Source: You cannot cast that type of spell while riding a dragon.
String.Dest: 在骑龙时不能施放那个法术。

String.Source: Your dragon cannot land at this time.
Your dragon is searching for a place to land.
String.Dest: 你的龙正在找地方降落。
在<Alias=Student>攻击你时用结界防护

String.Source: Find the source of power in <Alias=Dungeon>

String.Dest: 乌弗瑞克不在乎外来者？

String.Source: Can you train me to better use Two-Handed weapons?
String.Dest: 你能训练我使用双手武器吗？

String.Source: Can you train me to better use Heavy Armor?
String.Dest: 你能教我使用重甲的技巧吗？

String.Source: It's time for us to part ways.
Ask Urag about the insane book
String.Dest: 向乌拉格询问疯狂之书

String.Source: I've got better things to do.
String.Dest: 我还有更重要的事要做。
找到赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯

String.Source: What if I took care of these bandits?
String.Dest: 如果我去对付这些强盗呢？

String.Source: Follow me. I need your help.
String.Dest: 跟我来。我需要你的帮助。
