String.Source: What have you got for sale?
I am not your champion, monster.
I need you to do something.

String.Dest: 赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯的孤居

String.Source: A gout of fire that does <mag> points per second. Targets on fire take extra damage.
String.Dest: 火焰造成每秒<mag>点伤害。着火目标受到额外伤害。

String.Source: Attacks with war axes cause even more bleeding damage.
String.Dest: 用战斧攻击造成大量额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Protection spells like Stoneflesh are twice as strong if not wearing armor.
String.Dest: 无甲状态下，岩躯术等保护法术效果是原来的2倍。

String.Source:
Waking Dreams of A Starless Sky by Bilius Felcrex

[pagebreak]

he eyes, once bleached by falling stars of utmost revelation, will forever see the faint insight drawn by the overwhelming question, as only the True Enquiry shapes the edge of thought. The rest is vulgar fiction, attempts to impose order on the consensus mantlings of an uncaring godhead. First,
String.Dest:
无星天空的清醒之梦 比留斯·费尔克雷克斯 著

[pagebreak]

曾为坠星的最宏大启示所漂白的眼睛，将永远看到那压倒性问题所勾勒出的微小洞察力。因为思想的疆界只决定于“探究真相”。其余则都是庸俗的虚构之物，试图将秩序施加于一位冷漠神头的共识性披甲。首先，

String.Source: Protection spells like Stoneflesh are three times as strong if not wearing armor.
String.Dest: 无甲状态下，岩躯术等保护法术效果是原来的三倍。

String.Source:
Epistolary Acumen by the Transparent One

[pagebreak]

ring you forth the lovestruck mute who preys with vigor on his love, and set the sky alight with all who dare to struggle 'gainst our move. For we are they who own the night and all who dwell without us fall; we drink the mind-grapes formed of thought and wail a tumult on the wall. To sweep
String.Dest:
信札巧笔 洞明者 著

[pagebreak]

带你去见那为爱痴狂的哑者，他激情地掠夺着爱。让所有挡路者于天幕下燃烧。因为我等是夜之主宰，逆我者亡；思想之酒为我所饮，将喧嚣哭烙于墙上。为扫除

String.Source: Protection spells like Stoneflesh are 2.5 times as strong if not wearing armor.
String.Dest: 无甲状态下，岩躯术等保护法术效果是原来的2.5倍。

String.Source: Each sacrifice brings you closer to that which you seek.
String.Dest: 每一次牺牲都让你更接近追求。
狂乱符文

String.Source: Control Cube removed. You have <Global=DLC2dunNchardakCubeCount> cubes left.
String.Dest: 控制方典已移除。你还剩<Global=DLC2dunNchardakCubeCount>个控制方典。

String.Source: Control Cube removed. You have 1 cube left.
String.Dest: 控制方典已移除。你还剩1一个控制方典。

String.Source: Control Cube removed. You have no cubes left.
String.Dest: 控制方典已移除。你没有控制方典了。

String.Source: Control Cube acquired. You now have <Global=DLC2dunNchardakCubeCount>.
String.Dest: 控制方典已取得。你现在有 <Global=DLC2dunNchardakCubeCount>个控制方典.

String.Source: Control Cube acquired. You now have 1.
String.Dest: 控制方典已取得。你现在有一个控制方典了。

String.Source:
All men must die.

Often by their own means.
String.Dest:
人皆有一死。

往往自取死路。

String.Source: All spells are more effective against undead.
String.Dest: 所有法术对亡灵都更有效。

String.Source: Wards recharge your magicka when hit with spells.
String.Dest: 当你的结界被法术击中时会恢复魔力。
旋风斗篷

String.Source:
Untold Legends The Other Lives of Ysgramor

[pagebreak]

s the great ships of men crawled the waves to their destinies, there were, after long years, a number of tales lost in the mists of morning. Even after the forgetting, though, wisps of story find ways to receptive ears as even the deepest of secrets never truly dies. When fires burn and the night grows soft in
String.Dest:
未叙传说 伊斯格拉默的其他人生

[pagebreak]

人类的巨轮乘风破浪驶向他们的命运，在漫长的岁月过去，许多故事消失在清晨的迷雾中。即便已被遗忘，可就算其中最深的秘密也永远不会真正消失，缕缕传说还是会找到途径进入人们的耳朵。当火焰燃烧，夜幕降临
灰烬符文

String.Source:
Stay your course.

To idle is to die.
String.Dest:
坚持你的路线。

懒惰即是死亡。

String.Source:
I've only tried a few combinations, but things look promising. Here's what I've discovered so far:

Ruby + Albino Pod =

Jumping Flame Spider

Ruby + Damaged Pod =

Exploding Flame Spider

Ruby + Salt Pile + Damaged Pod =

4 3

Ruby + Salt Pile + Albino Pod =

Flame Cloaked Spider

[pagebreak] Looking at the results, it seems as though the purity of the gem could enhance the imbuing process in some unforeseen way. Perhaps if I could get my hands on a Flawless Ruby... I have also theorized that if one were to mix most any of the ingredients in the previous experiments a new discovery is likely to be made. Upon further inspection of both a diamond and a garnet it seems they don't contain the necessary power required. I know for a fact that a ruby works, as seen in my previous experiments. Next I'll see how the reaction works with an amethyst, emerald, or even a sapphire. There must be other types of spiders out there. Who knows what other kinds of imbuing processes have taken place. We'd best keep our eyes open. The source of the interaction will most likely be nearby, whatever new species we find.
String.Dest:
我尝试了几种组合，应该很有希望。发现如下：

红宝石+白化蜘蛛卵囊=

跳焰蜘蛛

红宝石+受损的白化蜘蛛卵囊=

爆焰蜘蛛

红宝石+盐堆+受损的白化蜘蛛卵囊=

4 3

红宝石+盐堆+白化蜘蛛卵囊=

火焰斗篷蜘蛛

[pagebreak] 从结果看，宝石的纯度似乎能以某种不可预见的方式增强注入过程。也许我该去找颗无瑕红宝石来。 我觉得理论上，如果把先前实验中的大部分材料都混合起来，可能会有新发现。 进一步观察钻石和石榴石发现，它们并不蕴含所需的能量。从之前的实验，我已经确定了红宝石的作用。接下来，我需要看看紫水晶、绿宝石和蓝宝石是如何反应的。 肯定还有其他类型的蜘蛛。还不知道会发生什么其他类型的灌输过程。我们得睁大眼睛好好看着。无论发现了什么新类型，相互作用的源头很可能就要显现了。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> The Journal of Ralis Sedarys, Volume 23
Lord Ahzidal demands more blood, and I give it willingly. The hired men have somewhat pitiful souls, so it sometimes takes several of them to achieve the desired effects.
I won't be writing any more. There is no need. The time has come to awaken the master, and bring him to the fate he deserves.
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷23
阿兹达尔大人要更多的鲜血，我也甘愿效劳。雇佣的人灵魂卑贱，所以有时需要几个人才能达到预期效果。
我不会再写下去了，没必要了。是时候唤醒主人，带他迎接应有的命运了。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> The Journal of Ralis Sedarys, Volume 19
Moving on to Solstheim next, chasing after vague rumors of this Kolbjorn Barrow. My patron seems confident we can find the Relics of Ahzidal out here. I'm a bit skeptical, but so long as he pays well, I'll dig wherever the old coot likes.
Initial prospects look poor, to say the least. I was sure I had my map wrong at first, until it became clear that the place had just been lost to the ash. I'll dig out as much as I can, maybe see if I can recruit some of the local residents to help me out. I haven't seen anyone since I got out of Raven Rock, but I keep hearing conversations and whispers around me, so I just need to track them down.
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷19
接下来是索瑟海姆，追查关于这个寇泊琼古坟的模糊传闻。我的金主好像很有把握能在这儿找到阿兹达尔的遗物。我有些怀疑，但只要这老傻瓜付得起钱，要我去哪儿挖都行。
至少可以确定，最初的前景并不乐观。一开始我以为地图是错的，直到后来发现这地方刚被火山灰埋了。我会尽可能发掘，或许可以看看能不能招些当地居民来帮忙。从鸦石镇出来后就没见过人影，但我一直能听到附近的交谈和低语，只要找到他们就行了。

String.Source: I found Neloth's steward, Varona, dead on the road to Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 我发现内洛斯的管家瓦罗纳死在去鸦石镇的路上。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> The Journal of Ralis Sedarys, Volume 20
This excavation is going to be one of the harder ones, I can tell. Hired some diggers out of Raven Rock. They all said they were experienced miners, but I guess they're not used to running into trouble as they dig. In a place like this, you never know what was buried long ago, and have to be ready for whatever you come across.
In any case, there were some unfortunate losses when the sleeping dead weren't quite sleeping and weren't quite dead. Operation is stalled unless my friendly partner is able to find enough coin for us to hire some replacements. Maybe it's time to take up a collection from the constant spectators who gather to mock me.
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷20
我敢说，这次会是最难挖的一次。从鸦石镇招了些挖掘工人，他们都说自己是经验丰富的矿工，但我猜他们不习惯在挖土时遭遇麻烦。在这种地方，你永远都不知道很久以前埋了些什么，无论遇到什么都必须做好准备。
总之，沉睡的亡灵并没完全入睡也没死透，不幸造成了些损失。除非我那友善的合伙人能有足够的钱让我们另外雇些人，否则项目就会停摆。可能该向那些聚在一堆嘲笑我的看客们募捐了。

String.Source: Your Voice bends the very stones to your will. As it gains power, animals, people and even dragons must do your bidding.
String.Dest: 你的吼声使岩石屈服于你的意志之下。随着力量增长，野兽，人类甚至是龙都必须听命于你。

String.Source: Neloth asked me to locate his steward, Varona Nelas. I found her dead body on the road to Raven Rock. Now Neloth wants me to find someone in Raven Rock willing to be his new steward. I've heard Drovas Relvi might be willing.
String.Dest: 内洛斯请我帮忙找到他的管家，瓦罗纳·内拉斯。我在去鸦石镇的路上发现了她的尸体。现在内洛斯想让我在鸦石镇找个愿意当他新管家的人，听说多瓦斯·雷维可能正有此意。

String.Source: I found Varona's dead body on the road to Raven Rock, apparently killed by ash spawn. Now Neloth wants me to find someone in Raven Rock willing to be his new steward.
String.Dest: 我发现内洛斯的管家瓦罗纳死在去鸦石镇的路上，她显然是被灰烬怪所杀。现在内洛斯想让我在鸦石镇找个愿意当他新管家的人。

String.Source: Neloth has asked me to locate his steward, Varona Nelas. Last time anyone in Tel Mithryn saw her, she was on her way to Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 内洛斯请我帮忙找到他的管家，瓦罗纳·内拉斯。上次泰尔·米斯瑞恩有人见到她时，她正在前往鸦石镇的路上。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> The Journal of Ralis Sedarys, Volume 22
If it weren't for the comfort brought by my invisible friend, I would have fled this place long ago. I wish I had realized earlier that it was not a group, but a master who contains multitudes. He's guided me into a true understanding of the barrow, and I greatly desire to meet with him.
My insight into this place is now so intuitive, so fundamental, that I almost feel as if I built it myself. I explained to the workers how to use the tile set, but they seemed too afraid or uncoordinated to properly step on each tile quickly enough. No problems, nothing that the master cannot solve.
We will be able to converse properly soon enough.
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷22
要不是无形的朋友给的宽慰，我早就逃离这个地方了。我早该意识到这不是一群人，而是一个包含众多群体的主人。他引导我真正理解这座古坟，我非常想见见他。
现在我对这地方的洞察力如此直观而深入，乃至于感觉这里就是我自己建的。我给工人们解释了怎么使用石砖组合，但他们好像很害怕或者不协调，没法足够快地踩上每块砖。没问题，没有什么问题是主人解决不了的。
我们很快就能正常交谈了。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> The Journal of Ralis Sedarys, Volume 21
My invisible "friends" have kept it up, drawing closer. It took me a while to realize they were hiding themselves, but I figure it's out of shame. It takes a certain type of cowardice to spend all your time questioning a man's worth and value. You'd think they'd have the decency to at least let me sleep, but they persist even there.
As for the dig, we continue to stall out with the opposition from within the barrow. I had hoped the hardy people of this island would be able to deal with shuffling bones, but I appear to have overestimated them. I won't make that mistake again.
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯的日记·卷21
我那些无形的“朋友们”一直在坚持，越靠越近。我花了段时间才意识到他们在躲藏，或许是在害羞吧。把所有时间花在质疑一个人的价值上，是懦弱的表现。你可能觉得他们至少会让我睡个觉，但他们一直吵个没完。
关于发掘，我们和古坟里的敌人们保持着对峙。我还寄希望这岛上的壮汉们应付的了笨重的骷髅，看来是我高估了他们，我不会再犯这种错误了。

String.Source: Neloth has asked me to locate his steward, Varona Nelas. She is probably somewhere around Tel Mithryn.
String.Dest: 内洛斯请我帮忙找到他的管家，瓦罗纳·内拉斯。她现在可能在泰尔·米斯瑞恩附近。

String.Source: Neloth asked me to locate his steward, Varona Nelas. I found her body on the road to Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 内洛斯请我帮忙找到他的管家，瓦罗纳·内拉斯。我在去鸦石镇的路上发现了她的尸体。

String.Source: Neloth asked me to locate his steward, Varona Nelas. I found her dead body on the road to Raven Rock. Neloth sent me to Raven Rock to find a new steward. I found Drovas Relvi, who seemed very eager to take the position.
String.Dest: 内洛斯请我帮忙找到他的管家，瓦罗纳·内拉斯。我在去鸦石镇的路上发现了她的尸体。内洛斯派我去鸦石镇找个新管家，我找到了多瓦斯·雷维，他看起来很想要这份工作。

String.Source: Insert gold in to coin slot
How much would you like to enter?

I arrived at the old tomb to find Tharstan waiting for me. He was eager to start exploring the place, and he asked me to lead the way. First, I need to figure out how to open the doors in the main chamber. Once that's done, we can explore the tunnels beyond.
String.Dest: 我到达古墓时发现沙尔斯坦正等着我，他很渴望探索这个地方，并叫我带路。首先，我得找出打开主厅大门的方法。等搞定后，我们就能探索外围隧道了。

String.Source: Helping Drovas has come back to bite me. He owed a money lender named Mogrul 1000 septims. Mogrul expected me to pay Drovas debt. However, I killed him instead.
String.Dest: 帮助多瓦斯反而害了我。他欠一个叫莫古尔的放贷人1000塞普汀。现在莫古尔指望我来还多瓦斯的债，但我杀了他。

String.Source: Helping Drovas has come back to bite me. He owed a money lender named Mogrul 1000 septims. Now Mogrul expects me to pay Drovas' debt. If I don't, he's going to keep sending thugs after me.
String.Dest: 帮助多瓦斯反而害了我。他欠一个叫莫古尔的放贷人1000塞普汀。现在莫古尔指望我来还多瓦斯的债，否则的话，他就要一直派些恶棍来骚扰我。

String.Source: Someone named Mogrul sent a messenger for me. This Mogrul wants to talk.
String.Dest: 有个叫莫古尔的传信给我，说要和我谈谈。

String.Source: Neloth's former apprentice, Ildari Sarothril, was covertly attacking him. Deep under Highpoint Tower I confronted Ildari and killed her.
String.Dest: 内洛斯从前的徒弟伊达利·萨罗希里在暗中袭击他。我与伊达利在制高塔楼的地底深处对峙并杀了她。

String.Source: Part of the Telvanni tower at Tel Mithryn is withered. Elynea needs three taproots soaked in the headwaters of the Harstrad river to repair it.
String.Dest: 泰尔·米斯瑞恩的部分塔楼枯萎了。艾琳娜需要三块浸泡过哈斯垂德河源水的直立根来修复。

String.Source: I met Tharstan, a Nord from the Skaal village who discovered an old Draugr crypt. I agreed to accompany him in exploring the old crypt. Inside, we found the tomb of a Dragon Priest left behind long ago to guard against a traitor from his own order.
String.Dest: 我邂逅了沙尔斯坦，一个来自斯卡尔村的诺德人，他发现了一座尸鬼古墓。我同意陪他探索古墓，并在其中发现了一座被长久遗弃的龙祭司墓穴，其目的是看守教团中的背叛者。

String.Source: I met Tharstan, a Nord from the Skaal village who discovered an old Draugr crypt. I agreed to accompany him in exploring the old crypt. After we discovered a pair of Word Walls, as well as two pieces of an ancient claw, we gained entry into a sealed chamber. Tharstan's translations suggest that we'll find a Dragon Priest's sarcophagus nearby.
String.Dest: 我邂逅了沙尔斯坦，一个来自斯卡尔村的诺德人，他发现了一座尸鬼古墓。我同意陪他探索古墓。在找到一对龙语墙后，我们得到了一个古老龙爪的两半碎片，进入了一个封闭的墓室。沙尔斯坦的译文表明我们会在附近找到一位龙祭司的石棺。

String.Source: I met Tharstan, a historian living in the Skaal village who discovered the recently-unearthed entrance to an old crypt. He offered to hire me as protection while we explored the crypt, and asked me to meet him there if I was interested.
String.Dest: 我邂逅了沙尔斯坦，他是一位住在斯卡尔村的历史学家。他发现了一个最近出土的古墓入口，提出雇用我保护他探索墓穴。并告诉我要是有兴趣，就去那里找他。

String.Source: Part of the Telvanni tower at Tel Mithryn is withered. Elynea needs three taproots soaked in the headwaters of Harstrad river to repair it. Elynea kept two taproots for herself and told me to plant the last one in the withered part of the tower wall.
String.Dest: 泰尔·米斯瑞恩的部分塔楼枯萎了。艾琳娜需要三块浸泡过哈斯垂德河源水的直立根来修复。艾琳娜自己留下了两块直立根，让我把剩下的那块种在枯萎部分的塔墙里。

String.Source: Neloth is being attacked by an unknown assailant. He gave me a ring that will identify the source of the attacks. If I walk around the grounds of Tel Mithryn, I might find a clue.
String.Dest: 内洛斯遭受了不明身份的袭击。他给了我一枚能识别袭击来源的戒指。要是我沿着泰尔米斯瑞恩地界走走，可能就会找到线索。

String.Source: Neloth is being attacked by an unknown assailant. I discovered the source of the attacks was a heart stone hidden in Ildari Sarothril's grave. Neloth has divined that his former apprentice is still alive and seeking vengeance on him. Neloth asked me to track down and kill Ildari.
String.Dest: 内洛斯遭受了不明身份的袭击。他给了我一枚能识别袭击来源的戒指，我用它发现了藏在伊达利·萨罗希里墓中的一颗心石。内洛斯探测到他从前的徒弟还活着，并且在向他复仇，就让我去追踪并杀死伊达利。

String.Source: Helping Drovas has come back to bite me. He owed a money lender named Mogrul 1000 septims. Mogrul expected me to pay Drovas debt, which I've done.
String.Dest: 帮助多瓦斯反而害了我。他欠一个叫莫古尔的放贷人1000塞普汀。现在莫古尔指望我来还多瓦斯的债，我已经还了。

String.Source: I met Tharstan, a historian living in the Skaal village who discovered the recently-unearthed entrance to an old crypt. He offered to hire me as protection while we explored the crypt, and asked me to meet him there if I was interested.
String.Dest: 我邂逅了沙尔斯坦，他是一位住在斯卡尔村的历史学家。他发现了一个最近出土的古墓入口，提出雇用我保护他探索墓穴。并告诉我要是有兴趣，就去那里找他。

String.Source: Neloth is being attacked by an unknown assailant. He gave me a ring that identified the source of the attacks as a heart stone hidden in the grave of Ildari Sarothril.
String.Dest: 内洛斯遭受了不明身份的袭击。他给了我一枚能识别袭击来源的戒指，我用它发现了藏在伊达利·萨罗希里墓中的一颗心石。

String.Source: Conjure Ash Guardian
String.Dest: 召唤灰烬守卫

String.Source: I let Neloth cast an experimental spell on me. If I discover any side effects, I should tell him right away.
String.Dest: 我让内洛斯在我身上试验一种法术。如果我发现了什么副作用，应该马上告诉他。

String.Source: Neloth has located another of Hermaeus Mora's Black Books in <Alias=Dungeon>. He intends to read it as soon as I bring it to him.
String.Dest: 内洛斯已经定位了另一本赫麦尤斯·莫拉在<Alias=Dungeon>的黑暗经书。他想让我尽快带给他看。

String.Source: Neloth has asked me to retrieve one of Azra Nightwielder's staffs. It's hidden in <alias=dungeon>.
String.Dest: 内洛斯让我找回一把“暗夜掌控者”阿兹拉的法杖。它被藏在<alias=dungeon>。

String.Source:
Continue along the path,

and stay the course.
String.Dest:
沿着路继续，

坚持到底。

String.Source: I let Neloth cast an experimental spell on me. I've discovered a potentially dangerous side effect. Normally it boosts my health, but if I am in the rain or swim, it reduces my health.
String.Dest: 我让内洛斯在我身上试验一种法术，发现了一种潜在的危险副作用。通常有益于我的健康，但我要是在雨中或者游泳，就会对我的健康有害。

String.Source: Releases energy blast with power attacks that deals 30 damage.
String.Dest: 重击释放能量波攻击，造成30点伤害。

String.Source: Would you like to increase your Stamina for a Dragon Soul?
String.Dest: 你愿意花费一个龙魂来提升耐力吗？

String.Source: I've stumbled across Captain Modyn Veleth fighting strange beings called "ash spawn" at the Attius Farm outside of Raven Rock. Captain Veleth was outnumbered, so I engaged his attackers and lent him a helping hand.
String.Dest: 我鸦石镇外的阿提乌斯农场遇到了莫迪恩·维黎斯队长，他正和一群名为“灰烬怪”的奇怪生物战斗。维黎斯队长寡不敌众，所以我帮了他一把，与他的敌人们交战。

String.Source:
I knew if we dug deep enough we'd eventually hit some fresh ruins. Markarth, a city built upon a city. From early pieces recovered we've determined the name of the city is Nchuand-Zel, but past that we have very little info. We've been given an escort though and tomorrow we will delve into the city proper.

* * * * *


It's only been a day and I already miss my desk and chair. I thought it would be a little more fun to explore, but so far it's just been fighting spiders and getting to view an occasional rubble pile. Hopefully we get to the main ruin soon so we can set up a camp and I can start cataloguing some of the items I've been able to find.

* * * * *


We found the Armory earlier and Erj has stayed behind to find a way into the main vault. If anyone can open the locks it's him. We've kept going and settled up here for the night since the guards say it will be easy to defend. I've put up a few runes just in case.
String.Dest:
我知道，如果我们挖得够深，最后会挖到新的遗迹。马卡斯是城中之城。从早期发现的碎片里，我们确定了这座城市的名字叫尼楚安德-泽尔，但过去的信息太少了。我们已经被护送到了现场，明天我们将深入城区。

* * * * *


才过了一天，我就开始怀念我的桌椅了。我本以为探索会更有趣，但到现在，我只是在和蜘蛛战斗，偶尔看看碎石头。希望我们能赶紧到主遗迹区，这样我们就能搭个帐篷，我也能开始整理我找到的东西了。

* * * * *


我们之前找到了军械库，厄基留下来想办法进到主保险库去。如果有人能把锁打开，那就是他了。我们继续前进，选择在这儿过夜，因为护卫说这里容易防守。我写了一些符文以防万一。

String.Source: I've slain General Falx Carius in the ruins of Fort Frostmoth and put an end to any further ash spawn attacking Raven Rock. Captain Veleth was very pleased with my results, and awarded me a bounty in gold.
String.Dest: 我杀死了废弃的霜蛾堡的法克斯·卡里乌斯将军，终结了灰烬怪对鸦石镇的袭击。维黎斯队长对我的战果很满意，授予了我一笔赏金。

String.Source: Flawless Emerald + Salt Pile + Albino Spider Pod
String.Dest: 无瑕绿宝石+盐堆+白化蜘蛛卵囊

String.Source: Captain Veleth explained that the ash spawn have been attacking Raven Rock for some time now, and he's been trying to locate their source. His lack of manpower and reluctance to leave the town without a commander are keeping him from finding out more. As a result of our conversation, I've agreed to help him deal with this situation. I need to begin by searching the Attius Farm for clues that might lead me to the ash spawn's source.
String.Dest: 维黎斯队长告诉我，灰烬怪袭击鸦石镇已经有一段时间了，而他在努力找到其来源。因为人手不足，还有不放心离开镇子后指挥空缺，他没法进一步调查。谈话之后，我同意帮他突破这个困境。我应该先从阿提乌斯农场开始，看看是否能找到指向灰烬怪来源的线索。
红宝石+受损的白化蜘蛛卵囊

String.Source: Baldor Iron-Shaper, the smith in Skaal Village, was abducted by the Thalmor. They were trying to get him to reveal the secret of forging Stalhrim. Baldor told me that the Thalmor leader, Ancarion, had a map that showed the location of a new source of Stalhrim, and I retrieved it. Now I need to bring it back to Baldor.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔村的铁匠“塑铁者”鲍德尔被梭默绑架了。他们尝试逼他说出铸造魔冰的秘密。鲍德尔告诉我，梭默的头目安卡利昂有一张地图，上面标记着一处新的魔冰矿源的位置，我已经取回来了。现在我得把它还给鲍德尔。

String.Source: Baldor Iron-Shaper, the smith in Skaal Village, was abducted by the Thalmor. They were trying to get him to reveal the secret of forging Stalhrim. Baldor told me that the Thalmor leader, Ancarion, had a map that showed the location of a new source of Stalhrim, and he asked me to retrieve it.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔村的铁匠“塑铁者”鲍德尔被梭默绑架了。他们尝试逼他说出铸造魔冰的秘密。鲍德尔告诉我，梭默的头目安卡利昂有一张地图，上面标记着一处新的魔冰矿源的位置，并请我去取回来。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

Wind and Sand Afa-Saryat

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

Let the wind blow. Let the sand scour. Let the magic of air and sand be free to roam the Alik'r. From the mystic membranes that stand between the two, absorb and convey unto me and all who may understand the deep essential powers of the desert. [pagebreak] eserts are often considered to be useless wastelands, avoided by the casual traveler and shunned by the softer species as unfit for civilization. But to those who bother to investigate, to dwell, to live, to linger in these spaces, a driving hardiness develops that serves them well in all environs should they ever choose to live. A thoughtfulness born of care -- for who knows best how to best invest their resources than one who has had to walk half a morning and labor for an hour to extract a few drops of water from an unyielding plant? This same sort of requisite thrift applies to all other creatures who wring their living in such a land. The insight that may at first be missed, though, is that the magic of this land is similarly affected. Forgoing the showy lights and sounds of the forest dwelling mages in Summerset, the flamboyant gesticulations of the Bretons, or even the bellowing of the Nords, there is a certain economy to the casting of a true Alik'r wizard. This is not meant as a slight against other magical styles, only noting that such energies might be better focused into reflection and purpose. [pagebreak] On Sand When both foreigners and natives imagine the desert, often their first image is one of orange-hued sand blowing beneath a dark blue sky. Indeed, this is not wholly incorrect, as the shifting sands are one of the key components not only of the desert, but of its natural magics. Consider: sand is nothing but the weathering of rocks, older by far than any of the living inhabitants who claim a land as "theirs." As each rock breaks further, more of its inner space is revealed, until it is practically naught but exposed surface in its aggregate self. This collective then scatters, intermingles, scatters, and repeats, in infinite combinations so long as Nirn continues to exist. If we believe, as I do, that the rocks themselves contain remnants of Magnus's gift, than this exposure and combinatorial explosion results in a breadth and diversity of magic energy as is unknown elsewhere in Tamriel. [pagebreak] On Air Much as the sand learns from every grain around it, so too does the air which conveys it from one combination to the other absorb the sense knowledge of its carried grains. In fact, it is plausible that the air itself is guiding the combinations to novelty and expression. Indeed, consider that in the Nordic tradition, Kyne is the widow of Shor (an aspect of Lorkhan), then her ministrations (via wind) to his physical legacy within Mundus could be seen as a form of celestial mourning, from which we mortals can benefit. It would seem, indeed, that the next level of magical awakening may well be driven by scrying appropriate wind channels to carve novel paths through the vast desert such as to further diversify the land's memory. Reading the knowledge of the sands, though, is an immense task in itself, though, more fit to an army of clerical workers than a wizard of any standing.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

风与沙 阿法-萨亚特

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

让风吹拂吧。让沙冲刷吧。让空气与沙子的魔力自由地漫游在阿里克’尔吧。从介乎于二者的神秘薄膜中，吸收并传达给我和所有可能了解沙漠深层本质力量之人吧。 [pagebreak] 沙漠通常被视为无用的荒地，一般旅行者都会避之不及，就连那些温和的物种也会避开，认为它并不适合文明。但对那些不厌其烦地调查、居住、生活、逗留其间者来说，一旦他们选择了生存，那么就会展现出一种坚毅的动力，在任何环境中都能很好地服务于他们。那是一种自谨慎中诞生的思考力，试问，谁能比一个为了从一株顽强的植物中提取几滴水而不得不走半个上午、劳动一个小时的人更懂得如何最好地投资他们的资源呢? 同样的节俭也适用于其他所有在这样土地上生活的生物。然而，人们一开始可能会忽略的一点是，这片土地的魔力也受到了类似的影响。抛开夏暮岛法师们发出的炫光艳声，也不必理会布莱顿人浮夸的手势，更不用去听闻诺德人的咆哮，一个真正的阿里克’尔巫师是最懂得创造经济价值的。这并不意味着对其他魔法风格的轻视，只是我们更注重把能量更好地集中在反射与目标上。 [pagebreak] 论沙 无论本地人还是异邦人，他们想起沙漠的第一印象往往是湛蓝天空下橙色的沙子。当然，这样想不是没有道理，因为流沙不仅是沙漠的关键组成部分，更是它的自然魔法。 试想，沙子不过是岩石风化的产物，比任何一个活在这片土地且声称自己“拥有”土地者还要古老得多。随着每一块岩石的进一步断裂，其内部的空间会更多地显露出来，直到它消散到只剩一个裸露的表面。只要奈恩继续存在，这种过程就会以无限的组合分散、混合、分散，循环往复。如果我们都能如我一样相信，岩石本身蕴含玛格努斯馈赠的残余，那么这暴露与组合的爆炸会导致泰姆瑞尔其他地方所未知的魔力广度与多样性。 [pagebreak] 论空气 就像沙子会从周围每一粒沙中学习一样，将沙子从一种组合转换成另一种组合的空气也吸收了沙子的感知知识。事实上，空气本身似乎就在引导组合走向新颖与表达。考虑到诺德传统中，凯娜是舒尔的遗孀（洛克汗的另一个法相），那么她（通过风）维护着梦达思中的他的身体遗产也可以视为一种天国的哀悼，而我们凡人则从中受益。 所以看来，通过寻找适合的风道，在广阔的沙漠中开辟新的道路，从而进一步丰富这片土地记忆，很可能会是推动魔法觉醒的下个阶段。然而，阅读沙之知识本身就是一项浩大的任务，比起养尊处优的巫师，或许更适合那些文员小吏。

String.Source: Baldor Iron-Shaper, the smith in Skaal Village, has gone missing. One of the other villagers, Deor, said he saw two elves dragging something through the woods on the day of Baldor's disappearance. They were heading southwest.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔村铁匠“塑铁者”鲍德尔失踪了。村民迪乌尔说他在鲍德尔失踪那天看到两个精灵拖着某种东西穿过森林，朝着西南方去了。

String.Source: I met a historian named Tharstan in Skaal village and he hired me to help him explore an old tomb he'd discovered. It turned out to the tomb of a Dragon Priest named Vahlok, who I fought and defeated.
String.Dest: 我邂逅了沙尔斯坦，他是一位住在斯卡尔村的历史学家。他招募我去帮忙探索一座发现的古墓。结果这座古墓属于一位叫瓦洛克的龙祭司，我们发现并击败了他。

String.Source: Neloth asked me to retrieve one of Azra Nightweilder's staffs from <alias=dungeon>.
String.Dest: 内洛斯让我从<alias=dungeon>找回一把“暗夜掌控者”阿兹拉的法杖。

String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> Raven Rock Stronghold,
My calls for the unconditional surrender of your forces and an immediate cessation of all hostilities has been ignored numerous times. I therefore have no choice but to assume your purpose on Solstheim is hostile, and to treat Raven Rock Stronghold as an enemy of the Empire. I warn you, any attempt to breach Fort Frostmoth will be met with an equal level of aggression. I will do everything in my power to wipe you and your forces off the face of Tamriel. There will be no further communications between us.
General Falx Carius Garrison Commander, Fort Frostmoth </font>
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> 鸦石要塞：
我多次呼吁你们的部队立即停止一切敌对行动，无条件投降，但都被无视了。因此，我别无选择，只能假设你们对索瑟海姆岛心怀不轨，并将鸦石要塞视为帝国之敌。警告如下，任何破坏霜蛾堡的企图均将遭到同等反击。我将尽我所能将你们的军队从泰姆瑞尔地表抹去。此后你我双方不会再有任何交涉。
霜蛾堡驻军指挥官 法克斯·卡里乌斯将军 </font>

String.Source: Baldor Iron-Shaper, the smith in Skaal Village, was abducted by the Thalmor. They were trying to get him to reveal the secret of forging Stalhrim. Baldor told me that the Thalmor leader, Ancarion, had a map that showed the location of a new source of Stalhrim. I returned the map to Baldor and in gratitude, he offered to let me use his forge, where I can craft new items made from Stalhrim.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔村的铁匠“塑铁者”鲍德尔被梭默绑架了。他们尝试逼他说出铸造魔冰的秘密。鲍德尔告诉我，梭默的头目安卡利昂有一张地图，上面标记着一处新的魔冰矿源的位置。我把地图还给鲍德尔后他很感激，允许我使用他的锻炉，我能用它来铸造魔冰制装备。

String.Source:
The Hidden Twilight by Carillius Melfus

[pagebreak]

he City of Inkseeds rose from the desert, shining and decadent. Somehow, it still stood. I crossed through the gate, and the beast knew exactly where to take me: the way worn by beggars and poets. The only place a man of my appetites can find satisfaction. I'm not proud, but then, nobody ever is.

隐匿暮光 卡里琉斯·梅尔福斯 著

墨籽之城于沙漠中拔地而起，耀眼夺目却又颓废不堪，但出于未知原因它依然矗立着。我跨过城门，野兽知道该引我去何处--乞丐与诗人常走的路。只有在这里我的欲望才能得到满足。我并不为此骄傲，也从未有人骄傲。

在艾尔格瑞尔统治期间，我曾注意到民众在陷入困境时思想和行为上的各种模式，并以一个简单的计划来理解，最终影响他们。因为思维清晰，我开始对下层阶级人士进行分类，将他们均分为

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Dear Councilor Saldin,
In a manner of days I believe we'll be ready. Our forces hidden within Ashfallow Citadel have been training night and day, ready to strike when we give the signal. With Captain Veleth distracted by the ash spawn attacks, the timing seems perfect. I've waited nearly a decade to exact my revenge upon Lleril Morvayn for the death of my ancestor and I long for the moment my blade will be drawn across his throat. The next letter you'll receive from me will include his head in a sack. Display it proudly in the halls of House Hlaalu, brother.
Vendil Ulen
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 亲爱的萨尔丁议员：
某种程度上我相信我们会做好准备的。藏在烬休堡垒的部队日夜训练，随时准备在我们发出信号时发动攻击。由于维黎斯队长被灰烬怪的攻击分散了注意力，时机似乎很完美了。我等了近十年来才来为我祖先的死向雷里尔·莫尔凡报仇，渴望一剑刺穿他的喉咙。下一封给你的信会带着装他头颅的麻袋。把它骄傲地陈列在哈拉鲁家族的大厅里吧，兄弟。
文迪尔·乌伦

String.Source: In order to defeat Miraak, I need to find more of Hermaeus Mora's Black Books, the source of his knowledge and power. The Telvanni wizard Neloth found one of these books in the Dwarven ruin of Nchardak, but it is locked inside some kind of protective mechanism. Maybe together we can find a way to get at this Black Book.
String.Dest: 为了打败米拉克，我需要找到更多的黑暗经书，也就是他的知识与力量之源。泰瓦尼法师内洛斯在尼查达克锻莫遗迹找到了其中一本，但它被锁在某种保护装置里了。也许我们一起努力能拿到这本黑暗经书。

String.Source:
30 Rain's Hand 4E10 Received a letter from the East Empire Company today. They say that some of the miners broke through the wall in shaft three of Raven Rock Mine and found some ruins. I hope this isn't another waste of time like that fiasco they sent me to in Cyrodiil. I'll gather my assistant, Millius and sail back to Raven Rock at first light... it'll be nice to see the old house in Solstheim again. 7 Second Seed 4E10 Finally arrived in Raven Rock and was surprised at the number of dark elf refugees living in town. They aren't really from mining stock, but I think they'll make fine workers one day. Millius and I spent a good part of the day clearing the ash off of the roof of my house. The damn volcano is still erupting almost day and night. If it wasn't for the ash covering everything it would almost look beautiful. 8 Second Seed 4E10 Millius and I are headed into Raven Rock Mine to have look at whatever it is the miners uncovered. I think I'll stop by the old Swing and Scoop and pick up a few supplies before we head down. Couldn't hurt to be prepared. 9 Second Seed 4E10 Looks like the miners broke right through the wall of an old Nordic barrow. I've seen this sort of thing in Skyrim before... damn Nords have barrows dotting the landscape and almost none of them are ever marked on any maps. Looks like this barrow belong to something called the "Bloodskal Clan." I'm going to take some rubbings of the inscriptions on the tombs and see if I can't learn some more information from my history books. 10 Second Seed 4E10 It's been a few days and I can't find even a single mention of this clan anywhere. Millius and I decided to proceed ahead. We've come to a dropdown point, but I can see a massive chamber below. Took the better part of a day to lower everything down and climb down the almost sheer drop. 11 Second Seed 4E10 It's been an astonishing day of discovery! After exploring the large chamber beyond the dropoff, I was startled to find the strangest weapon I've ever laid eyes upon sitting on a pedestal of sorts. The blade appears to be flawless, and is emitting a faint chilling glow. Bits of parchment I found about the chamber seem to call this "The Bloodskal Blade." Not certain if I should remove it yet, I think I'll sleep on it.

12 Second Seed 4E10 I've decided against my own better judgment to remove the Bloodskal Blade from its pedestal. Millius seems completely against it, but we need to bring this wondrous artifact with us when we find a way out of the barrow. 13 Second Seed 4E10 I should have listened to Millius. The moment the blade was lifted, we were set upon by draugr. Millius fought bravely, but he fell. I was able to destroy the remaining ones, but I was badly wounded. I can barely stand. My only chance would be finding a way out of this place, but I fear that I'm trapped. 14? Second Seed 4E10 Exploring has been slow. I can only move for maybe a few minutes at a time before I have to rest. My supplies are running low, and I'm feeling weaker by the hour. The only progress I've made is finding a strange door with markings on it that I've never seen. There appears to be something to them I'm missing, as they've confounded my attempts at getting through. I'll have to study this further in order to make any progress... barely can keep awake. I'm fairly certain that the key to the door involves the use of the Bloodskal Blade. When swinging the weapon, I'm noticing a ribbon of mystical energy emanating from it. I think by swinging the sword in different directions, it's possible to manipulate this ribbon and solve whatever puzzle this door presents. I hope to get well enough to put this to the test soon... each swing is a huge effort. Last entry I've lost track of time and my strength is fading. I can't even stand anymore. My wounds refuse to heal. I'm afraid this tomb will become my resting place. If anyone finds this journal, please send these notes to my superiors at the East Empire Company and tell my wife that I love her. May Arkay guide me to my final rest.
String.Dest:
4E 10年，雨手月30日 今天收到了东帝国公司的来信。他们说有些矿工破开了鸦石镇矿场3号井的岩壁，发现了一些遗迹，希望这次别像他们送我去希罗帝尔那次一样成了浪费时间的闹剧。我召回了助手米利乌斯，天一亮就坐上了回鸦石镇的船……又能回索瑟海姆的老家了，真好。 4E 10年，次种月7日 终于到了鸦石镇，没想到镇上居然有这么多暗精灵难民。虽然他们不是矿工出身，但我认为他们总会成为好工人的。米利乌斯和我花了大半天时间清理房顶上的积灰，该死的火山几乎日夜不停地在喷，要不是搞得到处都是灰，那它还有点顺眼。 4E 10年，次种月8日 米利乌斯和我正前往鸦石镇矿场看看矿工们的发现。我认为在出发前应该先去一趟“挥铲挖土”买些补给。万无一失么。 4E 10年，次种月9日 看来矿工们正好挖穿了一座诺德古坟的墙壁，以前我在天际见过这种地方……该死的诺德人到处修坟，而且几乎从未有过任何地图记载。这座古坟似乎属于一个叫“血颅”的氏族。我要带些墓志铭的拓片，看看能不能从历史书上找到更多资料。 4E 10年，次种月10日 几天过去了，找不到这个氏族的任何相关资料，米利乌斯和我决定继续前进。我们来到了一个下落点，但下面有一个巨大的墓室。我们花了大半天放下所有东西，从几乎垂直的岩壁爬了下去。 4E 10年，次种月11日 今天有了大发现！在搜索过岩壁下的大型墓室后，我惊讶地发现了一把从未见过的奇异武器，插在了某种台座上。剑身无瑕，微泛寒光。墓室中的羊皮纸碎片似乎称它为“血颅刃”。我不确定该不该把它拿走，得好好考虑下。

4E 10年，次种月12日 我违心地把血颅刃从台座上取下了。米利乌斯对此强烈反对，但等我们找到古坟出口的时候会用上这把奇异文物的。 4E 10年，次种月13日 我是该听米利乌斯的，刚拔起剑我们就被尸鬼袭击了。米利乌斯勇敢地战斗，但还是倒下了。我消灭了剩下的尸鬼，也受了重伤，几乎站不起来。唯一的办法就是找到出口，但恐怕我是被困住了。 4E 10年，次种月14日？ 探索进展缓慢，每次走动几分钟后我就必须休息。补给即将用完，我感到越发虚弱。唯一的进展是找到了一扇门，上面有些没见过的奇怪印记。 这些印记让我过不去了，好像忽略了什么。还需要进一步研究才能取得进展……很难保持清醒。 我很确信这扇门的钥匙与运用血颅刃有关。挥舞这把武器时，我注意到了它发出的神秘能量波。朝不同方向挥剑，就有可能控制能量波解决这门留下的谜题。希望我的伤势好到能尝试一下……每次挥剑都很费力。 最后的记录 已经分不清时间了，体力逐渐地消退，我再也站不起来了。伤口无法愈合，怕是要葬身于此了。如果有人发现了这本日记，请把这些记录寄给我在东帝国公司的上司，并告诉我妻子我爱她。 愿阿尔凯指引我安息。

String.Source: Miraak has absorbed the dragon soul!
In order to defeat Miraak, I need to find more of the Black Books, the source of his knowledge and power. Storn suggested that the wizard Neloth may know the location of the Black Books that I need.
String.Dest: 为了打败米拉克，我需要找到更多的黑暗经书，也就是他的知识与力量之源。斯托恩提到，那个叫内洛斯的法师可能知道我需要的黑暗经书的下落。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Gratian,
I would appreciate if you could help us with a situation we've encountered in Raven Rock. It seems that the miners there have stumbled across some sort of ruins under the surface near shaft three, and we need your expertise to take a look. I could send someone else if you're busy, but I figured you'd want to go since I seem to recall that you're originally from Solstheim. Let us know if you make any progress.
Rendellus Thandarian East Empire Company Imperial City, Cyrodiil
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 格瑞希安：
恳请你帮我们解决鸦石镇的问题。那里的矿工们似乎无意间在三号井附近的地表下发现了某种遗迹，我们需要你的专业知识来看看。你忙的话我可以另派人去，但我想你会乐意的，因为我记得你是索瑟海姆人。有什么进展了就告诉我们。
伦德鲁斯·萨达瑞安 东帝国公司 帝都，希罗帝尔

String.Source: With Neloth's help, I gained access to the Black Book in Nchardak. Now to read it and learn more of Miraak's knowledge.
String.Dest: 在内洛斯的帮助下，我拿到了尼查达克的黑暗经书。现在要阅读它，了解更多米拉克的知识。

String.Source: With Neloth's help, I gained access to the Black Book in Nchardak. I read it and was transported to Hermaeus Mora's realm of Apocrypha, where I found the book's counterpart. Hermaeus Mora himself appeared and taught me the second Word of Bend Will. He promised to teach me the third Word but only if in return for "the secrets of the Skaal." The Skaal shaman Storn agreed to give Hermaeus Mora what he wanted, but when Storn read the book, Hermaeus Mora killed him while teaching me the promised Word of Power.
String.Dest: 在内洛斯的帮助下，我拿到了尼查达克的黑暗经书。我读了这本书，并被传送到了赫麦尤斯·莫拉的领域：异典，我在那里找到了这本书的翻版。赫麦尤斯·莫拉亲自现身，教会了我“意志屈服”的第二句龙语。他答应教我第三句，前提是我用“斯卡尔的秘密”作交易。斯卡尔萨满斯托恩同意让赫麦尤斯·莫拉如愿，但是当斯托恩阅读这本书时，赫麦尤斯·莫拉在教我许诺的龙语时杀了他。

String.Source: With Neloth's help, I gained access to the Black Book in Nchardak. I read it and was transported to Hermaeus Mora's realm of Apocrypha, where I found the book's counterpart. Hermaeus Mora himself appeared and taught me the second Word of "Bend Will". He has promised to teach me the third Word but only in return for "the secrets of the Skaal."
String.Dest: 在内洛斯的帮助下，我拿到了尼查达克的黑暗经书。我读了这本书，并被传送到了赫麦尤斯·莫拉的领域：异典，我在那里找到了这本书的翻版。赫麦尤斯·莫拉亲自现身，教会了我“意志屈服”的第二句龙语。他答应教我第三句，前提是我用“斯卡尔的秘密”作交易。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Axe Man A surprising way to become proficient with an axe

[pagebreak]

f all the members of the Morag Tong I've spoken with, none disturbed me as much as Minas Torik. A quiet and reserved man who never drank, never visited a brothel or even uttered a curse, he was famous for his ability to make people disappear. Once a person was targeted by the Brotherhood and Torik was sent to them, they would simply cease to be. I asked him once what his weapon of choice was, and was equally startled by his answer. "I only likes to use axes," he said in his typical, quiet voice. The image of this silent, dour fellow attacking anyone with a weapon as inherently bloody and violent as an axe so frightened and intrigued me that I questioned him about it further. This is an inherently dangerous activity, for assassins are not typically keen to give out their stories. Torik did not mind the questions, though it took some time to get the full story out of him, as naturally shy and reserved as he was. It seemed that Torik had been orphaned at a very young age and sent to live with his uncle, a saltrice plantation owner in Sheogorad in northern Vvardenfell. The man promised to show his nephew the business and eventually make him a partner when he was old enough. In the meantime, the boy was put to work as his uncle's house servant. It was a grueling life as the old man was very particular about how things should be done. The boy was first required to give all the floors in the house a thorough scouring, from the attic to the cellar. Whenever the floor was not cleaned to the uncle's satisfaction, which was frequent, Torik was thrashed and forced to begin again. The boy's second duty was to ring the bell that would bring the laborers into the house. This was done at least four times a day, once for each meal, but if his uncle had any news or additional instructions for the laborers - which he frequently did - the bell might need to be sounded a dozen times or more. It was a huge iron bell in the tower and the boy quickly discovered that he had to throw his entire body into the motion of pulling the chain in order to have it sound loud enough to bring everyone in from the field. If he was tired and did not pull the backbreaking chain hard enough, his uncle was soon at his side to beat him until he rang the bell loud and clear. Torik's third task was dusting all the shelves in his uncle's vast library. As deep and old as the shelves were, he was required to work with a long, heavy duster on a rod. The only way that he could reach to the back of the shelves was to hold the duster at his shoulder and then swing it out in a sweeping motion. Again, if the uncle saw any dust left over or felt that the boy was not working as hard as he ought to, the punishment was swift and severe. After several years, Minas Torik grew into a young man, but his job responsibilities were not increased. His uncle promised to teach him the business, once Torik had demonstrated his mastery of his servile assignments. Divorced from any knowledge of any work other than his own, Torik never knew how badly in debt his uncle was and how poorly the farm's yield was. In his eighteenth year, Torik was called into the cellar by his uncle. He thought that he had not done a good enough job scouring the floor down there, and was frightened of the beating to come. What he found, however, was his uncle packing his goods into crates. "I'm leaving Morrowind," he explained. "The business has gone sour, so I thought I'd try my luck running a caravan in Skyrim. I understand there's good money to be made, trading fake Dwemer artifacts to the Nords and Cyrodiils. I wish I could take you with me, my lad, but there won't be much need for scouring, bell pulling, and dusting where I'm going." "But uncle," said Torik. "I can't read, I knows nothing of the business you promised to teach me. What wills I dos on my own?" "I'm certain you can find a job in some domestic capacity," shrugged the uncle. "I've done my best with you." Torik had never stood up to his uncle before, and felt no anger only a sort of coldness that gripped his heart. Among his uncle's possessions being packed away was an old heavy iron axe, allegedly of Dwemer manufacture. He picked it up in his hands and was surprised to find that it was not much heavier than his dusting rod. In fact, it felt very comfortable as he pulled it over his shoulder and swung it out as he had done so many times before. In this instance, however, he swung it into his uncle's right arm. The old man screamed with pain and rage, but for some reason, Torik didn't feel frightened anymore. He propped the axe against his other shoulder, and swung it out again. It cut a swath across the old man's chest and he fell to the floor. Torik hesitated before lifting the axe above his head. It was another natural position for him, like he was ringing a bell. Over and over again, he swung down as if he was calling the laborers in from the field. Except that this time, there was no sound except for a wet thump, and no laborers came in from the field. Of course, his uncle had sent them away hours before. After a time, there was nothing left of his uncle that couldn't be washed down the cellar drain. The process of cleaning up came easily to Torik as well. Blood scrubbed up much quicker than the usual grime and saltrice flour that littered the cellar floor. It was well known that Torik's uncle was planning to leave Morrowind, so his disappearance provoked no suspicion. The house and all the belongings were sold to the debt collectors, but Torik took the axe. It seemed that his uncle had given him some worthwhile business skills after all.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

使斧人 掌握纯熟斧法的奇怪途径

[pagebreak]

在我聊过的所有莫拉格堂成员中，没人比米纳斯·托瑞克更让我不安。他生性安静矜持，滴酒不沾，也不沾花惹草，甚至从不说脏话，却以能让人消失而闻名。一旦有人称为兄弟会的目标，托瑞克就会找到他们，他们就不复存在了。有一次我问他，他用的是什么武器，他的回答同样令我吃惊。 “我只喜欢用斧头。”他带着那一如既往的平静口吻说道。 这样一个安静阴沉的家伙挥舞斧头这样血腥暴力的武器杀人，这形象让我感到恐惧和好奇，于是我进一步询问他。这本身是个危险的行为，因为刺客往往不愿讲自己的事。托瑞克倒是不介意，尽管因为他天性害羞矜持，使他费了一番功夫才把事情的原原本本讲完。 托瑞克似乎很小就成了孤儿，被送去北瓦登费尔的谢尔格拉德，和当盐水田种植园主的叔叔一起居住。叔叔答应带着侄子一同照看生意，等他大一点让他来当合伙人。但与此同时，男孩也被安排在叔叔家里当佣人。 这种生活十分折磨，因为老人对事情非常挑剔。男孩先是被要求把房子从阁楼到地下室，所有楼层都彻底打扫。每当叔叔发现地板擦得不如他意，托瑞克就会遭到打骂，被迫重新打扫，而这样的事时有发生。 男孩的第二项工作是摇铃通知工人们进屋。钟一天至少要敲四次，每顿饭都要敲一次，但如果叔叔有什么消息或者要给工人们什么额外指示（他时常如此），那这钟一天可能要敲十几次甚至更多。男孩很快就发现，塔顶这巨大的铁钟如不用尽全身力气去拉动铁链，根本不足以发出够大的声响把所有人从田间召回。如果他累得拉不动链子，叔叔就会很快来到他身边打他，直到他能够把钟铃摇得响亮清晰。 托瑞克的第三项工作就是打扫叔叔庞大图书馆所有书架上的灰尘。由于架子又深又旧，他要用一根又长又重的掸子工作。想要够到书架深处的唯一办法就是把掸子扛在肩上，然后像扫地一样把它甩出去。同样的，要是叔叔看见灰尘残留，或者觉得男孩没有尽力，那么惩罚就会迅速而严厉地降临。 几年后，米纳斯·托瑞克成长为一个青年，但他的工作并没有改变。他叔叔说，只要托瑞克真的精通了这些卑微的工作，就教他怎么做生意。除了自己的工作，托瑞克对其他工作一无所知，也不知道叔叔欠了多少债，农场的收成有多差。 十八岁那年，托瑞克被叔叔叫到地窖里。他还以为是自己没有好好打扫地板，害怕马上就要挨打。然而，他却发现叔叔正在把货物装进板条箱。 叔叔解释道：“我要离开晨风了。生意不好做，我想去天际经营商队，试试运气。去找诺德人和希罗帝尔人交易假锻莫文物能挣大钱。孩子，我也希望能带你一起去，但是我要去的地方不太需要打扫、摇铃和清灰的人。” “可是叔叔，”托瑞克说，“我还不识字，你答应教我的东西我还都不会。我一个人要做什么？” “我觉得你一定能找份家政的工作，”叔叔耸了耸肩，“我对你已经仁至义尽了。” 托瑞克以前从未反抗过叔叔，他没感到愤怒，只有一股寒意攫住了他的心。在他叔叔打包的物品里，有一把老旧的重铁斧，据说是锻莫制品。他绰斧在手，发现没比自己的掸子重多少。事实上，当他把斧子扛在肩上甩出去时，感觉很不错，就像以前做过很多次一样。而这一次，他把斧子甩到了叔叔的右臂上。 老头痛苦愤怒地尖叫着，但不知为什么，托瑞克不再感到害怕。他把斧子扛在另一个肩膀上，又挥了出去。老头胸前被划出一道口子，随后倒在地上。 托瑞克犹豫了一下，才把斧子举过头顶。这个姿势他还是很熟悉，就像他每天摇铃时一样。他一遍又一遍地荡着身子，好像是在召回田间的工人。只是这次，只有湿哒哒的砰砰响声回荡，没有钟声，也没有工人从地里回来。当然，他叔叔几小时前就把他们打发走了。 过了一段时间，他叔叔已经没什么东西不能被地窖的排水沟冲走了。对于托瑞克来说，清理也容易得很。想擦干净血迹可比寻常污垢和洒在地窖地板上的盐粉快多了。 大家都知道托瑞克的叔叔打算离开晨风，所以他的失踪并未引起怀疑。房屋财产都被典卖给了债主，但托瑞克却留下了那把斧子。看来他叔叔还是教会了他一些有价值的生意技巧。

String.Source: I agreed to fund Ralis Sedarys' expedition to excavate Kolbjorn Barrow, but work on the dig has come to a halt. At his request, I defeated the Draugr and found a way past the dead end.
String.Dest: 我同意了资助拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯对寇泊琼古坟的发掘，但挖掘工程停滞了。照他说的，我击败了那头尸鬼，并找到了绕开死胡同的路。

String.Source: Flawless Sapphire Gem Albino Spider Pod
String.Dest: 无瑕蓝宝石 白化蜘蛛卵囊

String.Source: Ralis Sedarys came to Solstheim hoping to find the Relics of Ahzidal, but fell under the spell of their maker, a powerful Dragon Priest entombed in the barrow. He convinced me to fund its excavation, but was compelled by Ahzidal to use the miners as ritual sacrifices. Ralis had no control over his actions, so I allowed him to live and depart the barrow in peace.
String.Dest: 拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯来索瑟海姆想要找到阿兹达尔的遗物，并把他们的创造者从科布约恩古坟里释放出来。当他发现古坟被火山灰掩埋后，就说服了资助他的发掘，把矿工当作他仪式的血祭。拉里斯无法控制自己所，所以我放了他一条离开古坟的生路。

String.Source:

The afore-mentioned personage has been marked for execution as a member of an unlawful guild of assassins in accordance with the lawful tradition and practice of the Morag Tong Guild. The Bearer of this non-disputable document has official sanctioned license to kill the afore-mentioned personage.
