String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Fethis,
We've received yet another letter from you requesting a buyout. At this time, I'm going to have to insist you cease any communication with the East Empire Company. There will be no further letters from me on this matter.
Vittoria Vici East Empire Company Warehouse, Solitude, Skyrim
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>费希斯：
我们又一次收到你要求收购的来信。现在，我必须要求你停止与东帝国公司的一切联系。我不会再就此事回信了。
天际，独孤城，东帝国公司仓库 维托利亚·维齐

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Fethis,
I felt I was rather clear in my last letter that the East Empire Company doesn't wish to engage in any sort of financial buyout of your business on Solstheim. We appreciate your enthusiasm, but the time just isn't right.
Vittoria Vici East Empire Company Warehouse, Solitude, Skyrim
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>费希斯：
我想我上一封信已经很清楚表达了，东帝国公司不希望以任何形式收购你在索瑟海姆的生意。我们感念你的热情，但现在时机不合适。
天际，独孤城，东帝国公司仓库 维托利亚·维齐

String.Source:
[pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont">
Crushing razors, hollow shells That snap, that twitch, that cinch and rend To hold the subject, bodily, 'Til mind blows soft and life meets end </font>
String.Dest:
[pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont">
破碎的剃刀，中空的外壳， 那断裂、抽动、紧夹、撕扯， 亲身把握那对象， 直至心灵涣散，生命终结。 </font>
海科尼尔的诅咒 已生效

String.Source:
[pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont">
A writhing mass of heaped appendage Slipping grasp the squirming slick Extend the reach to touch the face Burn the mind, reveal the quick </font>
String.Dest:
[pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont">
堆叠扭曲的附生之物， 滑腻难控的浮动之表。 延展着触及面庞， 燃烧了思想，显露出本源。 </font>

String.Source: A band of pirates followed an ancient treasure map to Haknir's Shoal, where they found a chest containing a piece of the armor of Haknir Death-Brand, the legendary pirate king. By following their map, perhaps I can find the rest of the treasure they sought.
String.Dest: 一群海盗参照一张古代藏宝图来到了海科尼尔的浅滩。他们在地图上标记之处发现了一个宝箱，其中装有一件传奇海盗之王，“死印”海科尼尔的护甲。照这张地图的指示，或许我能找齐他们在追寻的其他宝物。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Fethis,
After reviewing your rather lengthy letter in which you've requested that the East Empire Company purchase your business on Solstheim, we must respectfully decline. The East Empire Company has been doing business in Tamriel for over five centuries, and in that time, we've had numerous business ventures. Some of those ventures have proven lucrative and some were highly unprofitable. The colony of Raven Rock belongs to the latter I'm afraid, and therefore we see no financial advantage in re-establishing any sort of business venture on Solstheim at this time.
Vittoria Vici East Empire Company Warehouse, Solitude, Skyrim
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>费希斯：
要求东帝国公司收购你在索瑟海姆业务的长信已览。但恕我们回绝。东帝国公司在泰姆瑞尔做生意长达五个世纪，这期间我们商业投资不计其数。事实证明，并非所有投资都有利可图。鸦石镇的殖民地恐怕并无利润可言，因此我们认为此时在索瑟海姆重新进行任何形式的商业投资都不能取得经济实效。
天际，独孤城，东帝国公司仓库 维托利亚·维齐

String.Source:
[pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont">
Bone extrusions gash and grind In moistened depths of smacking heat While tearing flesh from averse bone The body whole prepares to eat </font>
String.Dest:
[pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont">
在潮湿高温的深渊， 骨挤压、撕裂、磨碎着。 从厌恶的骨头上撕扯血肉之时， 整个身体都准备着进食。 </font>

String.Source: I met Wulf Wild-Blood, who told me about his brother Torkild running off many years ago. Wulf's worst fears of his brother proved true, unfortunately. I found Torkild wandering Solstheim, out of his mind. Before my eyes, he transformed into a werebear, and attacked. I was forced to kill him to defend myself. I should tell Wulf the sad news.
String.Dest: 我邂逅了“野血”沃弗，他告诉我他的兄弟托基尔德很多年前失踪了。不幸的是他对兄弟遭遇的担心成真了。我发现托基尔德在索瑟海姆上失去理智地游荡。他就在我眼前转化为一名熊人，并发动了袭击。为了自卫我不得不杀了他。我应该告诉沃弗这个悲伤的消息。

String.Source: I met Wulf Wild-Blood, who told me about his brother Torkild running off many years ago. Wulf's worst fears of his brother proved true, unfortunately. I found Torkild wandering Solstheim, out of his mind. Before my eyes, he transformed into a werebear, and attacked. I was forced to kill him to defend myself. I told Wulf the sad story of his brother's final chapters, and he taught me how to fight better for setting his mind to rest.
String.Dest: 我邂逅了“野血”沃弗，他告诉我他的兄弟托基尔德很多年前失踪了。不幸的是他对兄弟遭遇的担心成真了。我发现托基尔德在索瑟海姆上失去理智地游荡，他就在我眼前转化为一名熊人，然后发动了袭击。为了自卫我不得不杀了他。我告诉了沃弗他兄弟的结局，他教了我一种更好的让托基尔德安息的战斗方式。

String.Source:
[pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont">
What takes the world in lightened sense Can also seek the outward gleam They rob the all of essence to Report the nothing they have seen </font>
String.Dest:
[pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont">
使世界光明者， 也可寻求外在的光明。 他们掠夺所有精华， 来报告自己所看到的一切。 </font>

String.Source: The pedestal stands empty. What book would you like to place?
String.Dest: 基座是空的。你想放置哪本书？

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>This is a reminder that Emberbrand Wine and other such contraband is off-limits to all of you. Any guardsman caught with items like this in their possession will be disciplined and subject to possible removal from the Redoran Guard.
Captain Veleth
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>提醒大家，余烬牌葡萄酒和其他此类违禁品全员不得擅饮。凡持此类禁品的卫兵一律按律处分，且有可能从瑞多然卫队除名。
维黎斯队长

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Dearest Dinya,
I know that your father doesn't approve of us, but I'm willing to do whatever it takes to make our relationship work. I think the time has come to speak to him in person and stop letting him hear about us through gossip and rumor. I love you, and I don't care if the entire world knows. Please think about it.
Modyn
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>亲爱的德雅拉：
我知道你父亲不赞成咱们在一起，但为了我们的关系，我愿意做任何事。我看是时候亲自和他谈谈了，不能再让他听咱俩的流言蜚语了。我爱你，我不在乎是不是全世界都知道。请一定考虑一下。
莫迪恩

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Councilor Morvayn,
Below are the results of the survey you requested.
The Bulwark needs extensive repair. Ash is beginning to seep through the cracks inside the barracks and weaken the structure.
Repairs to the docks have been completed. We can now accommodate two ships at once if need be.
We've lost a total of twenty-six Redoran Guard in the last two years. We've seen ten replacements in the last five.
There's been no improvement in the condition of the water around the island. While there are fish still present, there are nowhere near enough to sustain us as a fishing town.
As you can see, we are in desperate need of relief. Sorry to be the bearer of such bad news, but I'm only doing as you requested.
Adril
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>莫尔凡议员：
以下是您要的调查结果。
这座堡垒需要大修。灰烬开始渗入营房内部的裂缝，削弱了建筑结构的安全性。
码头的修复工作已经完成。按照现在的规模，我们可以同时容纳两艘船。
过去两年内，我们总共失去了26名瑞多然卫兵。但过去五年，我们只补充了10人。
岛周边水环境没有得到改善。虽然当下还有鱼，但远不足以支撑我们发展为一个渔业城镇。
正如您所见，我们急需救济。抱歉告诉您这么坏的消息，但我是遵照您的要求行事。
阿德尔

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Milore,
I hope the day finds you well. Well, Athras and I have finally mustered the courage to return to Mournhold and pick up the pieces. We haven't been back to the manor in almost fifty years, but things haven't changed much. The city feels a bit empty... Barenziah's palace is still completely unoccupied and most of the Redoran Guard have been reassigned to other parts of Morrowind. They've continued to make improvements to Mournhold Temple, removing the last vestiges of Almalexia's mark and adding a new sanctuary. Plaza Brindisi Dorom has changed as well. House Indoril has erected a large building there to house all of the new pilgrims and priests that seem to have flocked here to pay their respects at the temple.
Athras has returned to work as a jewelcrafter and he's gaining quite a following. He's bringing in a good bit of coin, a little of which I've sent to you as usual. Things are going well, and at this rate, we'll have the manor restored to its former glory by winter. I know you're tired of hearing about it, but I implore you to reconsider my offer. We have plenty of room here, and both of you are always welcome to join us. I know it's tough out there, but suffering in that horrible place just to prove a point isn't necessary anymore. Just a little sisterly advice.
Nilara
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>米洛尔：
希望你一切安好。我和阿特拉斯终于鼓起勇气返回哀伤之城收拾残局了。我们已经有近五十年没回过庄园了，但变化不是很大。城市里感觉有些空……巴兰兹亚的宫殿仍旧空无一人，大部分瑞多然卫队已经被重新分配到晨风的其他地方。他们继续改进哀伤之城神殿，去掉了阿玛莱西亚印记的最后痕迹，还另造了一个新圣所。布林迪西·多罗姆广场也有变化。因多瑞尔家族在那边建了一栋大建筑，来收容新的朝圣者与祭司，他们似乎都是来神殿朝圣的。
阿特拉斯重操旧业当了珠宝匠，他的学徒越来越多。他赚了不少钱，我还是像以往一样给你寄了点。一切进展顺利，照这样下去，我们在冬天前就能让庄园恢复昔日辉煌了。我知道你已经听腻了，但我还是求你重新考虑我的提议。我们这里足够大，随时欢迎你们两口子回来加入我们。我知道外面很艰难，但在那个可怕的地方受苦只是证明自己的观点没必要罢了。只是姐妹的一点忠告，别介意。
妮拉娜

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Councilor Morvayn,
While I appreciate the urgency of the situation on Solstheim, I'm afraid that I can't approve the request for supplies and funds at this time. This is nothing personal, Lleril. Your island is one of seventy-four outlying settlements of Morrowind at this time. House Redoran must rank these outposts in terms of economic and strategic importance. We have limited coin in our coffers to send to these settlements, so we have to decide which ones take precedence. Unfortunately, Solstheim is very low on the list. I'm doing everything I can for you. All I ask is that you hang on a little longer.
Dralis Rorlen Councilmember, House Redoran
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'>莫尔凡议员：
虽然我理解索瑟海姆的严峻情况，但恐怕我现在不能批准你对物资和资金的请求。这并非是针对你，雷里尔。你的岛是目前晨风七十四个边远定居点之一。瑞多然家必须根据经济和战略重要性为这些边远村镇排名。我们能分配给这些定居点的资金有限，所以必须决定哪个优先。不幸的是，索瑟海姆在名单上排名很靠后。我会尽我所能帮助你，希望你再坚持一段时间。
瑞多然家族议员 德拉里斯·洛伦

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The History of Raven Rock Volume II by Lyrin Telleno

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

Forward Raven Rock is one of the more interesting colonies of Morrowind of the last two centuries. So much has happened to this tiny town in such a short amount of time, and so many lives have been affected by it, I felt it necessary to describe its rich history within these volumes. During my research, I lived in Raven Rock for almost three years, and I got to know many of my fellow Dunmer who call Raven Rock their home. I hope that my readers will appreciate the amount of fortitude and perseverance that it must take to endure life in such an inhospitable and untamed land. [pagebreak]

fter a few years, the relentless ash storms from the ever-erupting Red Mountain had transformed Solstheim's southern reaches into pure ash wastes reminiscent of those present on Vvardenfell itself. The storms would leave behind deep dunes of ash that made life exceedingly difficult in Raven Rock. In order to protect the town from these drifts, Brara Morvayn proposed that the East Empire Company construct a large wall of her own design to protect the east end of town. The company quickly agreed and provided the necessary funds. After almost a year, the construction was complete and the huge edifice was named "The Bulwark." The wall proved to be extremely effective and allowed work to continue unabated in the mines. In 4E 16, when Solstheim was passed into the hands of the Dunmer people, the East Empire Company was forced to relinquish Raven Rock's control to House Redoran. The Council quickly named Brara Morvayn as councilor of their new town, and allowed her to rule Solstheim as she saw fit. As a result of this changing of the guard, almost the entire Imperial population left Raven Rock and returned to Cyrodiil. Brara continued to welcome the Dunmer that elected to settle on Solstheim. Some chose to stay in Raven Rock to work in the mines, and other took to more familiar territory and began a nomadic lifestyle in the ash wastes. The next few decades were the golden years for Raven Rock. Brara Morvayn was keeping the peace, the mines were still producing large quantities of ebony and the Dunmer that lived on the island were happy. After almost fifty years of prosperity, in 4E 65, Brara Morvayn finally succumbed to old age and passed away. She was interred in the family's ancestral tomb and her son, Lleril Morvayn, took her place. The people who had lived in Raven Rock during Brara's time as councilor were pleased to discover that Lleril shared his mother's notions of rulership. He was fair and compassionate, which kept the people on the island quite happy for many decades.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

鸦石镇的历史 卷二 莱林·特雷诺 著

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

前言： 鸦石镇是过去两个世纪内晨风最受关注的聚落之一。这个小镇在如此之短时间内发生了那么多的事情，有那么多的人受到了它的影响，我认为有必要把它丰富的历史记录在案。调查期间，我在鸦石镇居住了将近三年，结识了许多以鸦石镇为家的丹莫同伴。希望读者能体会到在这般荒芜之地上忍受生活需要多大的勇气与毅力。 [pagebreak]

几年后，不断喷发的红山吞吐出的火山灰风暴将索瑟海姆南部地区变成了纯粹的火山灰废墟，让人想到了瓦登费尔本岛。火山灰风暴留下了深深的沙丘，使在鸦石镇的生活极其艰难。为了让镇子免受这些吹聚物影响，布拉拉·莫尔凡建议东帝国公司建造一堵她自己设计的巨墙来保护镇子东端。公司很快同意并提供了必要的资金。这座巨型建筑竣工于将近一年后，被命名为“防护堤”。这堵墙非常有效，使得矿场中的工作得以照常进行。 4E16年，当索瑟海姆被移交给丹莫手中后，东帝国公司被迫将鸦石镇的控制权移交给瑞多然家。家族议会很快任命布拉拉·莫尔凡为他们新镇的议员，并允许她在她认为合适时统治索瑟海姆。由于卫兵的更换，几乎所有帝国人都离开了鸦石镇，回到了希罗帝尔。布拉拉继续欢迎着选择定居于索瑟海姆的丹莫。一些人选择留在鸦石镇矿场工作，另一些人则选择了更为熟悉的领域，开始了灰烬荒地中的游牧生活。 接下来的几十年是鸦石镇的黄金时代。布拉拉·莫尔凡维持着安宁，矿场不断产出大量黑檀矿，岛上的丹莫安居乐业。经历了近50年的繁荣后，4E65年，布拉拉·莫尔凡因年老去世。她被安葬于家族祖坟，儿子雷里尔·莫尔凡接替了她的职位。在布拉拉担任议员期间，鸦石镇居民们高兴地发现雷里尔与他母亲有同样的统治理念。他为人公正，富有同情心，岛上居民又幸福地度过了几十年。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The History of Raven Rock Volume III by Lyrin Telleno

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

Forward Raven Rock is one of the more interesting colonies of Morrowind of the last two centuries. So much has happened to this tiny town in such a short amount of time, and so many lives have been affected by it, I felt it necessary to describe its rich history within these volumes. During my research, I lived in Raven Rock for almost three years, and I got to know many of my fellow Dunmer who call Raven Rock their home. I hope that my readers will appreciate the amount of fortitude and perseverance that it must take to endure life in such an inhospitable and untamed land. [pagebreak]

ll was going well in Raven Rock until 4E 95, when an attempt on Lleril's life was made without warning. Fortunately, the attack was unsuccessful thanks to the prowess of the Redoran Guard. Under questioning by Captain Modyn Veleth, the assassin was revealed to be Vilur Ulen of House Hlaalu. House Hlaalu had been at odds with House Redoran for years following their removal from the Council of Great Houses. The Hlaalu believe that House Redoran was instrumental in this reorganization, and have held a grudge ever since. Their attempt on Lleril's life was meant to send a message to the Council that House Redoran was not as mighty as they purported to be and that they were truly vulnerable and weak. The Redoran Guard investigated futhur and discovered that Vilur had been organizing a coup in Raven Rock in an attempt to fully wrest control of the island from Lleril's grasp. Vilur and his conspirators were executed and the coup was quelled. Several recent events have served to solidify the Dunmer people's respect for Lleril Morvayn. In 4E 130, the Bulwark began to show its age and threatened to crumble. The councilor elected to use the bulk of his personal fortune to have it repaired. In 4E 150, a small force of Argonians landed on Solstheim with the intent of wreaking havoc on the island, and Councillor Morvayn led the charge against them personally. And in 4E 170, when the ebony mine finally began to dry up, he drained the remainder of his coffers keeping the people fed. By 4E 181, the mine's ebony veins were completely exhausted. Lleril ordered the mine to be shut down, and Raven Rock turned to hunting and fishing for its trade. A few Dunmer families departed Solstheim and returned to the mainland, but most stayed behind. At present, Lleril Morvayn is still the ruler of Raven Rock. The Redoran Guard continues to maintain order within the town and the surrounding area, keeping Raven Rock's residents safe, and in line. If even so much as a rumor of dissent reaches Lleril's ears, he has it quashed immediately. He's well aware that there may be a few Hlaalu loyalists still present among her population that would like to see him dead. The future may appear bleak for Raven Rock, but the spirit of its inhabitants will never be broken.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

鸦石镇的历史 卷三 莱林·特雷诺 著

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

前言： 鸦石镇是过去两个世纪内晨风最受关注的聚落之一。这个小镇在如此之短时间内发生了那么多的事情，有那么多的人受到了它的影响，我认为有必要把它丰富的历史记录在案。调查期间，我在鸦石镇居住了将近三年，结识了许多以鸦石镇为家的丹莫同伴。希望读者能体会到在这般荒芜之地上忍受生活需要多大的勇气与毅力。 [pagebreak]

鸦石镇的一切直到4E95年为止都很顺利，但有人在毫无征兆的情况下企图刺杀雷里尔。幸运的是，这次袭击在瑞多然卫兵的英勇战斗下没有成功。在莫迪恩·维黎斯队长的审问下，刺客被证实为哈拉鲁家族的维鲁尔·乌伦。哈拉鲁家在被从大家族议会除名后，多年来一直与与瑞多然家不和。哈拉鲁家认定瑞多然家在此次重组中起了重要作用，为此一直怀恨在心。他们刺杀雷里尔是为了向议会传达一个信息：瑞多然家并不像他们所声称的那般强大，而是脆弱无力的。瑞多然卫兵进一步调查后，发现维鲁尔一直在鸦石镇组织政变，试图从雷里尔手中完全夺取索瑟海姆岛的控制权。维鲁尔和他的同谋被处决，政变被平息了。 最近发生的几件事加深了丹莫人民对雷里尔·莫尔凡的尊敬。4E130年，防护堤的使用寿命问题开始显现，有崩塌的威胁。而议员决定用他个人的大部分财产来修复它。4E150年，一小队阿尔贡在索瑟海姆登陆，企图为这个岛带来一场浩劫，莫尔凡议员亲自带队猛攻他们。4E170年，当黑檀矿脉终于枯竭时，他散尽家财来救济人民。 4E181年，矿区的黑檀矿脉已完全枯竭。雷里尔下令关闭矿场，使鸦石镇向渔业和捕猎转型。少数丹莫家族离开了索瑟海姆回到大陆，但多数人都留在了这里。 如今，雷里尔·莫尔凡依然是鸦石镇的统治者。瑞多然卫兵继续在城镇和周边地区维持秩序，保证鸦石镇居民的安全和有序。任何异议哪怕是谣言，只要是传到了雷里尔耳中，他都会将其平息。他很清楚，在他的居民中可能依然有哈拉鲁家的忠实支持者希望看到他死去。鸦石镇的未来或许看上去很黯淡，但它居民的精神却永不会被磨灭。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

Children of the All-Maker by Tharstan of Solitude

[pagebreak]

f the title of this text rings familiar, then perhaps you, like me, have had the great pleasure to become acquainted with a most remarkable people, the Skaal of Solstheim. Upon first meeting these gentle wild-folk, I was immediately impressed with their great hospitality. They welcomed me into their homes, one and all, without the slightest hint of suspicion or uncertainty. Trust, it seems, comes readily to the Skaal. In appearance, the Skaal are clearly of Nord ancestry. However, they are culturally distinct in several significant ways, the most notable of which is their faith. Having never adopted the pantheon of the Empire, the Skaal recognize only a single deity whom they call the All-Maker. For the Skaal, the All-Maker is the source of all life and creation. When a creature dies, its spirit returns to the All-Maker, who shapes it into something new and returns it to Mundus. The concept of death as an ending to life is unknown to the Skaal. Rather, death is seen as simply the beginning of the next stage of an endless journey. This great respect for life is evident in one of the most important Skaal beliefs, a concept the villagers call "one-ness with the land". The Skaal try to live in harmony with their surroundings, making as small an impact on their environment as possible. When a Skaal villager sets out to collect firewood, for example, he or she takes it from fallen, dead trees. When the Skaal hunt, it is only out of necessity, and not for sport. Because they hold all life in great reverence, the Skaal people will resort to violence only as a last resort. This has understandably led to a rather austere lifestyle for these simple, good-natured folk. For the Skaal, the word "luxury" is nearly an alien concept, though I was intrigued to note that one villager, Edla, has taken to trading basic goods with travelers who pass through the village in exchange for small luxury items. Such an enterprising outlook is something of a novelty for the Skaal. Though it saddens me to conclude this account on such a somber note, it is impossible to deny the hard truth that the Skaal people are dwindling. In a century or two, it is possible that their unique way of life will be lost to the world forever, reduced to little more than a footnote in the great epoch of history. This comes as little surprise, given the immense hardships of a life lived in such an extreme environment. For the Skaal, it is a daily struggle to survive the perpetual wintry climate of northern Solstheim, but other challenges have recently appeared. The ashfall from Vvardenfell has taken its toll on the plants and animals upon which the Skaal depend for their survival, and life is now a struggle for all who call Solstheim home. Therefore, I humbly beseech any students of history who might encounter this modest text to travel to Solstheim and learn all that can be learned of this noble people and their ancient customs. The Skaal people might not be long for this world, but let us assure that their proud and noble legacy lasts well into the future.

[pagebreak]

造物主的孩子们 独孤城的沙尔斯坦 著

[pagebreak]

如果这篇文章的标题听起来很耳熟，那么你可能和我一样，曾有幸结识了一个非凡的民族，索瑟海姆的斯卡尔人。 初遇这些温和的荒野居民时，他们的热情好客立刻给我留下了深刻印象，轮番来欢迎我去家里做客，没有丝毫的怀疑或猜忌。看来获得斯卡尔人的信任是很简单的。 从外貌上看，斯卡尔人明显是有诺德血统。然而，他们在几个重要文化方面有所不同，其中最为显著的是信仰。斯卡尔人从未接纳过帝国信仰体系，他们只承认一位叫做“造物主”的神。 对斯卡尔人来说，造物主是一切生命和创造之源。当一个生物死亡时，其灵魂会回归造物主，经造物主再造新生后送回梦达思。斯卡尔人不认为死亡是生命的终结，相反，他们认为死亡只是无尽旅程下个阶段的开始。 这种对生命的高度尊重体现在斯卡尔人一项最为重要的信念中，村民们称其为“与这片大地合一”。斯卡尔人尝试与周围的环境和谐相处，尽量减小对环境的影响。例如，斯卡尔村民外出拾柴，只会从倒下的枯木上取材；斯卡尔人打猎只是出于谋生，而不是为了取乐。正是因为斯卡尔人敬畏一切生命，所以他们只有万不得已才会诉诸暴力。 不难理解，这些实在、善良的人们过着相当简朴的生活。对斯卡尔人来说，“奢侈品”几乎是个陌生概念。尽管我好奇地注意到，一位名叫艾迪拉的村民已经开始与过路旅人交换些小奢侈品。这种进取观对斯卡尔人来说是个新鲜事物。 尽管用如此悲观的论调来总结这篇文章让我很难过，但斯卡尔人正在灭绝，这一残酷现实是无法否认的。他们独特的生活方式可能会在一两个世纪里彻底消失，沦为伟大时代中的一个注脚。 考虑到生活在如此极端环境下的巨大压力，这其实不足为奇。对斯卡尔人来说，要在索瑟海姆北部的永久性冬季气候中生存下来，每天都是一场斗争，但最近还出现了其他的挑战。 来自瓦登费尔的火山灰已经对斯卡尔人赖以为生的动植物造成了伤害，对于所有以索瑟海姆为家的人来说，生存都是一场挣扎。 因此，我诚恳地请求任何读到这篇文章的历史学生们启程去索瑟海姆，了解这高贵民族身上任何能学到的东西，和他们的古老习俗。斯卡尔人可能撑不了多久了，但让我们确保他们骄傲而尊贵的遗产能延续到未来。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The History of Raven Rock Volume I by Lyrin Telleno

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

Forward Raven Rock is one of the more interesting colonies of Morrowind of the last two centuries. So much has happened to this tiny town in such a short amount of time, and so many lives have been affected by it, I felt it necessary to describe its rich history within these volumes. During my research, I lived in Raven Rock for almost three years, and I got to know many of my fellow Dunmer who call Raven Rock their home. I hope that my readers will appreciate the amount of fortitude and perseverance that it must take to endure life in such an inhospitable and untamed land. [pagebreak]

aven Rock was founded in 3E 427 by the East Empire Company in response to the discovery of a rich ebony mine on the southern edge of the island of Solstheim. The construction of the town took several months, and the mine immediately started yielding ebony ore that the miner's shipped to Windhelm in Skyrim. By 3E 432, the town was home to over thirty people, all of whom depended on the mine for their livelihood. At this time, Raven Rock was almost exclusively inhabited by Imperials and a few Nords who were drawn to the mine's wealth. When the Oblivion Crisis arose in 3E 433, Raven Rock remained largely untouched by Mehrunes Dagon's forces and work continued as usual. The bulk of the Imperial Guard that was stationed in Raven Rock was recalled to Cyrodiil to fight the invading forces, but a few soldiers remained behind in order to protect the ebony mine from bandits. It's uncertain whether any Oblivion Gates ever opened on Solstheim, as there appears to be no record of such an event ever occurring there. In the first year of the Fourth Era, after the destruction of Ald'ruhn, many of the Dunmer Great Houses sent out small groups of their own to seek places to reestablish themselves. House Redoran's group was led by Brara Morvayn who immediately struck out for Solstheim. After some quick negotiations with the East Empire Company (and some speculate quite a bit of coin changing hands), Brara's group was allowed to settle in Raven Rock where they quickly became a part of the mining colony's way of life. The Dunmer proved to be both hard-working and reliable when it came to working in the mines, impressing the East Empire Company and solidifying their relationship. All was going quite well until that fateful day in 4E 5 when the Red Mountain suddenly erupted, sending a massive blast across the Sea of Ghosts that struck Solstheim with its full fury. Raven Rock was heavily damaged by this wave of force, which toppled several of its stone structures and obliterated many of the wooden ones. Ironically, the mine once again proved to be the town's saving grace, as most of the population of Raven Rock was working underground at the time, and was completely shielded from the blast. This event wasn't without cost, however. Raven Rock was heavily dependent on nearby Fort Frostmoth for its defense, but the eruption had almost completely wiped it from the face of Solstheim. The few soldiers that survived took residence in Raven Rock itself and attempted to set up a makeshift garrison there, but these scant few were hardly a match for potential threats to their town. With the East Empire Company's permission, Brara brought in some of House Redoran's elite "Redoran Guard" to fill the void. The guard proved to be an ideal replacement for the fallen Imperial soldiers and have been guarding the town ever since.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

鸦石镇的历史 卷一 莱林·特雷诺 著

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

前言： 鸦石镇是过去两个世纪内晨风最受关注的聚落之一。这个小镇在如此之短时间内发生了那么多的事情，有那么多的人受到了它的影响，我认为有必要把它丰富的历史记录在案。调查期间，我在鸦石镇居住了将近三年，结识了许多以鸦石镇为家的丹莫同伴。希望读者能体会到在这般荒芜之地上忍受生活需要多大的勇气与毅力。 [pagebreak]

鸦石镇建立于3E 427年，当时东帝国公司在索瑟海姆岛南部边缘发现了一个满是黑檀的富矿。小镇的建设花了数月，矿山立刻开始产出黑檀矿石，再经矿工船运至天际风舵城。截止3E432年，镇上已有30多人定居，且都以采矿为生。这时鸦石镇住的几乎都是被矿藏财富吸引来的帝国人和少数诺德人。 当3E433年湮灭危机爆发时，鸦石镇基本没被梅鲁涅斯·大衮的部队染指，工作照常进行。驻扎于鸦石镇的帝国卫兵大部分被召回希罗帝尔与入侵者作战，但有少数士兵留下来保护黑檀矿脉免受土匪袭击。目前还不清楚索瑟海姆上是否有湮灭之门开启过，因为这里似乎没有类似记录。 在第四纪元元年，奥德·鲁恩被摧毁后，许多丹莫大家族派出小队去寻找重建家园之地。瑞多然家队伍由布拉拉·莫尔凡带领，她立刻来到了索瑟海姆。在经过了与东帝国公司的短期交涉后（有人猜测有相当数目的资金易手），布拉拉的队伍被允许定居于鸦石镇，他们很快成为了此地采矿聚落生活的一部分。事实证明，丹莫在下矿工作期间勤奋而可靠，给东帝国公司留下了深刻印象，彼此间的关系加深了。 一切都很顺利，直到4E5年那灾难性的一天，红山突然喷发，巨大的冲击波横穿幽灵之海，暴怒地拍打在索瑟海姆岛上。鸦石镇被这股巨浪严重破坏，多座石质建筑和许多木制建筑被掀翻。讽刺的是，黑檀矿场又成了这个镇的救星，因为当时鸦石镇大多数居民都在地下工作，完全没有受到冲击。然而这次事件并非没有损失，鸦石镇非常依靠附近的霜蛾堡来防御，但红山爆发几乎彻底将其从索瑟海姆表面抹去。少数幸存的士兵住在鸦石镇，并试图在那儿建立临时驻军，但这么少的人很难与他们在镇上面临的潜在威胁匹敌。在东帝国公司许可后，布拉拉引入了一些瑞多然家的精英“瑞多然卫兵”来填补空缺。这些卫兵证明了自己是牺牲的帝国士兵的理想替代者，并从那时起就一直守卫着这座城镇。

[pagebreak]

The Guardian and the Traitor by Lucius Gallus Fellow of the Imperial Library Year 376 of the Third Era

[pagebreak]

ne of the more intriguing legends found on the island of Solstheim is the story of a mythical figure whose name is long forgotten, but whom time remembers as "the Traitor." Certain that this myth is rooted in history I set out to learn what I could and perhaps piece together a presumptive account of the events that gave rise to the legend. The tale is remembered best by the shamans of the Skaal, that unique tribe of Nords whose culture evolved along an entirely divergent path than that of their brethren in Skyrim. I spoke at length to the shaman of Skaal Village, a wise and hospitable man named Breigr Winter-Moon. He described an age long ago when dragons ruled over the whole world and were worshipped as gods by men. Presiding over this cult of dragon-worshippers were the Dragon Priests, powerful mages who could speak the dragon language and call upon the power of the thu'um, or Voice. According to the legend, one such Dragon Priest was seduced by a dark spirit named Herma-Mora, an unmistakable analogue for the Daedric prince Hermaeus Mora. Lured by promises of power, this treacherous priest secretly plotted against his dragon master. The Traitor's plot was discovered by one of his contemporaries, another Dragon Priest whom legend named The Guardian. The two fought a mighty battle that lasted for days, each hurling terrible arcane energies and thu'um shouts at the other. So great and terrible were the forces unleashed in this contest that Solstheim was torn apart from the mainland of Skyrim. Here, the myth clearly descends into the realm of pure fantasy. The Guardian, whom the legend presents as a paragon of loyalty and nobility, finally defeats the despicable Traitor, who seems to represent all that is corrupt and evil in men. Their epic duel is clearly representative of a greater struggle between good and evil. Perhaps it is this timeless quality that has kept the tale alive for so long. Unlike many similar myths, the tale of the Guardian and the Traitor does not feature a suitably heroic ending. Herma-Mora snatches the Traitor away just as the Guardian is about to strike the killing blow. The dragons appoint the Guardian ruler of Solstheim, but not before he is compelled to swear an oath of vigilance to watch for the Traitor's return. His reign is, by all accounts, a time of peace and prosperity for the people of the island, and he is remembered as a wise and just leader. No further mention is made of the Traitor, but neither is he thought to be dead. The legend ends on a cautionary note that the people of Solstheim, the heirs of the Guardian, must remain wary, lest the dark influence of Herma-Mora, or even the Traitor himself, return someday. Although no physical clues exist now on Solstheim to suggest the presence of the dragon cult, is it hardly difficult to believe that it might once have flourished here. Perhaps some hidden tomb still waits to be discovered that will tell the truth of the tale. There are other tantalizing clues, though perhaps these connections strain the bonds of credibility. For example, is it possible that the Skaal deity, the All-Maker, is some distant echo of mighty Alduin, the World-Eater of the ancient Nord pantheon? Perhaps not, but one thing is certain: Solstheim's history is riddled with unanswered questions. Perhaps future generations will pull aside the veils of mystery and reveal the truth about the origins of the Skaal and the identities of the Guardian and the Traitor.

[pagebreak]

守护者与背叛者 帝国图书馆成员 路修斯·盖勒斯 著于 第三纪元376年

[pagebreak]

在索瑟海姆岛上发现了一个更为有趣的传说。这是关于一位神秘人物的故事，他的名字早已被遗忘，却被时间铭记为“背叛者”。 我确信这个神话传说是根植于历史的，我出发去尽我所能研究，或许能拼凑出一个发展出这段传说的，事件的推定描述。 这个故事被斯卡尔族的萨满们妥善保存着。这支独特的诺德部族的文化发展道路与他们在天际兄弟们迥乎不同。 我与斯卡尔村的萨满-- “冬月”布莱格尔长谈，他睿智而好客。他描述道，在很久很久以前，龙族统治着整个世界，人们如神般崇拜它们。一群被称为龙祭司的强大法师主持着这个崇拜龙的教团。他们能够说龙语，并且吼出“吐’目”（或者称之为吼声）的力量。 根据这个传说，其中一位龙祭司被一个名为“赫玛-莫拉”的黑暗精魂所蛊惑（显然，这是迪德拉君主赫麦尤斯·莫拉的相似体）。得到赐予力量的承诺，这位阴险的祭司秘密地策划反抗他的龙族主人。 “背叛者”的计划被传说中称为“守护者”的龙祭司所识破。二人爆发了一场持续数日的大战，双方都使用了强大的奥法能量与吐’目吼声来对付对方。 这场对决中所释放的能量过于巨大而可怕，导致索瑟海姆从天际的主大陆被分离出来。至此，传说明显进入了纯粹的幻想境界。 传说中，忠诚与高贵象征的守护者最终击败了象征腐败与邪恶的卑鄙背叛者。他们史诗般的决斗显然代表了善恶之间更大的斗争。 也许正是这种永恒的品质让故事保持了这么长时间。 不同于其他类似的神话，守护者与背叛者的故事并没有迎来一个英雄式的结局。在守护者即将杀死背叛者的时候，赫玛-莫拉将背叛者拉走了。 龙族任命守护者为索瑟海姆的统治者，但在此之前，他不得不宣誓要警惕背叛者的归来。大家都说，他统治的时期岛上人民和平繁荣，他作为领袖因睿智公正而被铭记。 背叛者没有被进一步提及，但是他并没有被认定已死。这个传说以一个警告结尾——索瑟海姆的人民以及守护者的继承者，要始终保持警惕，以免被赫玛-莫拉的黑暗影响侵蚀，甚至有一天，背叛者自己会卷土重来。 虽然索瑟海姆现在没有任何表明存在拜龙教的线索，但不难相信它曾经在这里繁荣过。也许一些隐藏的坟墓仍然等待被发现，将会还原这个故事的真相。 除此之外，还有其他精彩的佐证，尽管这些联系可能会影响到可信度。例如，斯卡尔之神--造物主，是否有可能与古诺德神系中，世界吞噬者奥杜因遥相呼应？ 或许不是，但是一件事是可以确定的：索瑟海姆的历史充满了无法解答的问题，或许将来，后代将会揭开神秘的面纱，揭示斯卡尔起源与守护者和背叛者身份的真相。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Reclamations: The Fall of the Tribunal and the Rise of the New Temple by Thara of Rihad

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

he destruction of Vivec City and the subsequent eruption of Red Mountain in 4E 5 was not just a crisis in terms of the physical destruction it caused - it also cut deeply into the ancient religious beliefs of the Dunmer. The fall of the Ministry of Truth was the last straw in the tottering support for the Temple's worship of Almalexia, Sotha Sil, and Vivec. With all three of the Tribunes now widely believed dead or disappeared, what had been a simmering schism within the ranks of the Temple priesthood burst into the open. While outsiders may never know the full tale of this internal struggle, when the smoke cleared a few years later, the former Dissident Priests were in full control of the Temple hierarchy, with Tribunal loyalists either purged or recanted. The so-called "New Temple" now declared the worship of the Tribunes a result of misguided teaching, blaming the mistakes on the former Tribunal. The Temple now taught that the daedra venerated by the Ashlander tribes (Azura, Mephala and Boethia) were the "true way" and should be revered by the Dunmer people. Fittingly, the daedra were named the "Reclamations," as if they were reclaiming their status from the Tribunal. In an elegant compromise, no doubt intended to reconcile the large majority of the Temple priesthood who were neither Dissidents nor fanatic Tribunal loyalists, Almalexia, Sotha Sil and Vivec were relegated to the status of "saints," a traditional way to venerate the most honored Dunmer ancestors. This apparently satisfied enough of the existing priesthood that the New Temple was able to maintain at least a semblance of outward continuity. The rise of the New Temple almost completely vindicated the previously persecuted Ashlanders, who had continued to worship the three daedra throughout the Tribunal's rule. The Ashlanders are now lauded as the keepers of the old ways and having "true vision." It is now quite common for many of the Dunmer people to make the arduous pilgrimages into the ash wastes to seek the counsel of the Wise Women. These women have supposedly opened the eyes of those who they claim were "blinded by the Tribunal," and directly connect the eruption of the Red Mountain and the Argonian invasion to the anger of the three daedra. House Indoril, whose fortunes were so entwined with the Tribunal Temple, suffered greatly from its fall. While House Indoril still technically exists, the priesthood of the Temple are now considered one and the same with House Indoril - those who become priests are now considered to have "joined Indoril." The political power of the Indoril has thus passed entirely into the hands of the Temple (although members of the old House Indoril are still over-represented in the priesthood). The rise of the New Temple has a number of interesting parallels with the rise of House Redoran - each filled the vacuum of power resulting from the crisis of Red Year. How durable these new arrangements will prove, religious and political, remains to be seen. The span of two centuries is quite brief in the long history of the ancient Dunmer people.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

收复者 审判席的没落与新神殿的兴起 瑞哈德的萨拉 著

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

维威克城被摧毁及之后4E 5年的红山喷发造成的不仅是物质上的危机，还给丹莫古老的宗教信仰带来了深刻影响。真理部的倾覆是压倒神殿对阿玛莱西亚、索萨·希尔和维威克本就摇摇欲坠的信仰的最后一根稻草。随着审判席三神的死亡或失踪被普遍接受，神殿祭司队伍中酝酿已久的分裂公开化了。 尽管外人可能永远不会清楚这场内斗的全部经过，但在硝烟散尽后的几年后，旧异见派祭司完全掌控了神殿等级制度，审判席的忠实信徒们要么被清洗，要么放弃了信仰。所谓“新神殿”宣布审判席信仰是走上歧路的结果，将错误归于旧审判席。神殿现在的教导是：灰地民部落的迪德拉信仰（阿祖拉、梅法拉和波耶西亚）才是丹莫应该尊崇的“真理之道”。这些从审判席处取回地位的迪德拉被恰当地命名为“收复者”。 阿玛莱西亚、索萨·希尔和维威克被降格为“圣人”，这是一种敬仰最受尊重的丹莫先祖们的方式，毫无疑问是为了调和大多既非异见派，也非狂热派的审判席神殿祭司们的手段。它显然满足了现有祭司们的需求，新神殿至少保持了明面上的连续性。 新神殿的兴起几乎完全证明了此前受迫害的灰地民的正统性，他们在审判席统治期间坚持信仰三位迪德拉。灰地民现在被誉为具有“真正远见”的古道守护者。现如今大批丹莫前往灰地朝圣，寻求智妪的建议也成了寻常事。这些智妪让那些宣称“被审判席蒙蔽了双眼”者睁开了眼睛，且将红山喷发与阿尔贡入侵和三位迪德拉的怒火联系起来。 因多瑞尔家的命运和审判席神殿紧密相连，也因其倒台而受重创。尽管名义上因多瑞尔家仍然存在，如今神殿祭司们被认为与因多瑞尔家是一体的，成为祭司的人被视为“加入因多瑞尔”。因多瑞尔家的政治权势因此全盘移交到了神殿手上，但其成员依然在祭司群体中掌握较大权力。 新神殿兴起与瑞多然家崛起有许多相似之处——都填补了红色之年危机后的权力真空。无论是在宗教还是政治上的新安排，其持久性都还有待观察。两百年的时间对有悠久历史的丹莫来说太短暂了。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Red Year Volume I by Melis Ravel

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

Foreword When I originally decided to write this accounting of the Red Year, I elected to travel across Morrowind and speak to the Dunmer people themselves. I sought first-hand accounts and personal views about the cataclysmic event. I felt that if I simply did the research in the library stacks at the College of Winterhold, I wasn't really telling the tale that needed to be told. What struck me as I moved from city to city, town to town, camp to camp is that all of the Dunmer I met shared an incredible bond of sheer courage and unshakable faith. So what began as a chronicle of one of the worst events in the history of Morrowind became something altogether different, the celebration of a people who can never be defeated. [pagebreak]

Drallin Vess Tear "The ground... it just turned into mush. There was almost no warning. I mean, we were what... perhaps a mile from the nearest swamps? It was like the swamp suddenly swallowed up half of the city." I asked him to describe what happened from the beginning. "I owned a farm just outside of Tear at the time. We were planting the next season's crops and getting ready to store what we had harvested. Everything was going well until the Red Mountain exploded. Almost immediately, the ground rumbled and shook. Cracks started forming everywhere and then the water just started seeping through. It was awful. In a matter of hours, I was knee-deep in swamp water running for my life. Where I was running, I had no idea. At first I ran towards the city itself, but it looked like the walls were cracking. All around me, people were desperately trying to save their livestock and their families from the rising water. Just when the ground shaking finally died down, and I had a moment to think, there was a horrible cracking noise. I'll never forget it, because I knew what it was before I looked. The entire southern wall of Tear collapsed sending guards tumbling into the swamp. I heard people screaming as they were covered by the rubble and forced down into the water. Forgetting my own problems, I looked over at my fellow farmers who were all staring at the carnage unfolding before us. Suddenly, we all just forgot our own problems and ran to help. There must have been hundreds of the poorer folks who lived outside the walls helping the richer ones who lived in the city. Never saw anything like that. I think we must have saved hundreds more that day." [pagebreak] Neria Relethyl Gnisis Neria was badly burned by the eruption, and had trouble speaking to me. She is currently convalescing at the Temple of Azura in Blacklight even after all these years. I've tried to record her story to the best of my ability. "It was such a terrible thing... the fire. It burned everything in its path. It flattened trees, turned our huts into splinters and knocked over towers like they were made from parchment. It all happened in an instant. A rumbling sound, then a massive wall of flame... it was so high it blocked out the sun. I thought that the world itself had split apart. It passed over the water and turned it to steam... vaporized everything it touched. When it finally hit us, I was blown off of my feet... didn't even have time to run away or seek shelter. I ended up in the riverbed next to town, which kept some of the flames off of me. All around... could smell the charred stench of death. There were Dunmer that were burned alive and some never even saw it coming. I lay in that riverbed for two days before the healers found me. When I could finally stand, Gnisis was gone. There wasn't a thing left... it's as though it was wiped from the face of Tamriel."
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

红色之年 卷一 梅里斯·拉威尔 著

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

前言 当最初决定写这篇红色之年年鉴时，我选择穿越晨风与本地丹莫交流，搜集关于这一灾难事件的第一手资料与个人观点。我认为如果只是在冬堡学院的书架上研究，那就没法讲述那些本该传播下去的故事。在我穿行于城市、乡镇和野外营地期间，不由得为秉持巨大勇气和坚定信念的全体丹莫人民感到震惊。于是，这让原本算得上晨风历史上最糟糕事件的编年史，在之后成为了完全不同的东西——为一个永远不会被打垮的民族写的颂歌。 [pagebreak]

德拉林·维斯 泪城 “地面……突然下陷成糊状，几乎是毫无预警。我想，我们当时……也许离最近的沼泽地也有一里？那时真的像是沼泽突然吞噬了半座城市。” 我请他从头还原一下当时的情况。 “那会儿我在泪城郊外有个农场，我们正在种下一季的庄稼、储存刚收获的作物。一切似乎都很顺利，直到红山突然喷发。几乎是同时，地面开始震动，隆隆作响。到处都开始产生裂缝，然后水就渗出来了。太可怕了，几小时后我就陷入齐膝深的沼泽水里。当我跑起来时都不知道去哪儿，一开始我向着城市跑去，但城墙似乎是裂开了。周围的人们绝望地想要从上涨洪流中救起他们的牲畜和家人。就在地面震动平息足以让我思考一会儿后，突然传来一阵可怕的破裂声。那一幕我永生难忘，因为在我望去之前就知道怎么回事了——泪城南墙整体坍塌了，墙上守卫纷纷落入沼泽。我听见被碎石掩埋在水下的人们发出的哭号，那时我忘记了自己的麻烦，看着我同伴的农民们，他们也都在盯着眼前展开的大屠杀。突然间我们所有人都忘记了自己的麻烦，跑去帮忙。当时一定有成百上千个城外的穷人去帮助城里的富人，从没见过这种事。我想那天我们至少救了上百条性命。” [pagebreak] 奈瑞亚·瑞里斯 格尼西斯 奈瑞亚因火山喷发而严重烧伤，与我对话十分艰难。即使多年过去了，她也还在黑光城的阿祖拉神殿修养。我只能尽力把她的故事记录下来。 “实在太可怕了……那火。它烧光了所到之处的一切。夷平了森林，撕碎了我们的屋子，连塔楼都像羊皮纸一样被推倒了。一切都在一瞬间，隆隆声响过后是一道巨大火墙……它实在太高了，连太阳都被遮蔽了。我以为世界已经四分五裂了。水面在它拂过的一刻就变成了蒸汽……它蒸发了它所接触到的一切。我们也被击中了，我直接被炸飞了……甚至没有逃跑和躲避的时间。最后我摔在镇外的河床上，结果免于进一步烫伤。而四周……已经能闻到烧焦的死亡气息了。有人被活活烧死，有些甚至都没看见它的到来。我在河床上躺了两天后被医生发现，当我能站立起来后，格尼西斯没了，什么都不剩……就像从泰姆瑞尔表面上被擦去了一样。”

String.Source: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> I finally caved and told Ulyn that I would help him retrieve this "Visage of Mzund" that he has been so obsessed over. Why he wants some dwarven helmet so much is beyond me, but I owe him so whatever. [pagebreak] We've stopped to take a breather after crossing over the gears. This place is amazing but it seems to serve no purpose that I can tell. Why the dwarves would waste so much good metal on gears, pipes and constructs is completely beyond me. We had to fight off several of the metal spiders while spinning around on the gears. Got so dizzy we almost fell off. </font>
String.Dest: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> 我还是屈服了，答应和尤林一起去找他一直心心念念的“姆祖德之容”。我不明白他为什么那么想要这个矮人头盔，但我欠他的，没办法。 [pagebreak] 我们跨过齿轮后停下来休息。这地方很神奇，但我看不出有什么用处。为什么矮人会在齿轮、管道和构造上浪费那么多好金属，简直不能理解。我们不得不一边在齿轮上旋转，一边击退那些金属蜘蛛。晕得我们差点摔下去。 </font>

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Red Year Volume II by Melis Ravel

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

Foreword When I originally decided to write this accounting of the Red Year, I elected to travel across Morrowind and speak to the Dunmer people themselves. I sought first-hand accounts and personal views about the cataclysmic event. I felt that if I simply did the research in the library stacks at the College of Winterhold, I wasn't really telling the tale that needed to be told. What struck me as I moved from city to city, town to town, camp to camp is that all of the Dunmer I met shared an incredible bond of sheer courage and unshakable faith. So what began as a chronicle of one of the worst events in the history of Morrowind became something altogether different, the celebration of a people who can never be defeated. [pagebreak]

Saldus Llervu Vivec City "I was a trader back then. Ran a pack guar from Vivec City clear down to Narsis. I was walking along the south road when the strangest thing happened. All of the noise around me stopped... the normal things one hears as they travel like the sound of the wind blowing through the treetops. It was just deathly quiet. I felt a tingling sensation all over my body and my guar began to stomp around. Whatever it was, it was driving him crazy. As I tried to get him under control, there was a massive explosion from the center of the city. I saw the cantons fall apart before I was knocked off my feet. Then I remember the ground starting to rumble. It lasted for a long time and it receded into the distance as if directed towards the center of Vvardenfell. A few minutes later, the Red Mountain erupted, sending a huge cloud of fire into the sky. My pack guar had long since fled, and I decided I should do the same. I never stopped running until I reached Narsis." I asked him if he knew what had happened to Vivec City. "I didn't hear until much later that the Ministry of Truth had struck the heart of the city. What I do know for certain is that many Dunmer lost their lives that day and that Vivec City is no more." [pagebreak] Deros Dran Mournhold "The Red Year didn't heavily affect Mournhold itself, but it touched many of the people who lived there. A lot of us had relatives somewhere on Vvardenfell, and after the first day that the eruption occurred we started receiving reports of widespread devastation in Vivec City, Sadrith Mora, Balmora and Ald'ruhn. I don't think a single night went by for months where you wouldn't hear someone openly weeping. It was a sad time for all of us." I asked if Mournhold had sustained any damage during the Red Year. "I don't know why, but the destruction seemed to pass us by. A few Dunmer claimed that it was the Tribunal watching over us, but others claimed that the Tribunal was to blame for everything. I actually saw a few of those disagreements come to blows. It was a strange time." I got an interesting response from Deros regarding Mournhold's role during the Red Year. "Relief efforts began almost a month after the mountain erupted. It was actually a directive that came from the House Redoran councilor that was living in Mournhold at the time. I can't remember his name, but he took charge of the situation and sent soldiers, supplies and able-bodied Dunmer to the outlying settlements that had been hit the hardest. I was sent to Balmora. The place was a mess; hardly anything left in town was still standing. I spent maybe two months there, helping to rebuild the town and getting my fellow Dunmer back on their feet. It started out as a burden, but it ended up being the most rewarding thing I'd ever done in my life. I started some friendships there that still last to this day, including my beloved wife."
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

红色之年 卷二 梅里斯·拉威尔 著

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

前言 当最初决定写这篇红色之年年鉴时，我选择穿越晨风与本地丹莫交流，搜集关于这一灾难事件的第一手资料与个人观点。我认为如果只是在冬堡学院的书架上研究，那就没法讲述那些本该传播下去的故事。在我穿行于城市、乡镇和野外营地期间，不由得为秉持巨大勇气和坚定信念的全体丹莫人民感到震惊。于是，这让原本算得上晨风历史上最糟糕事件的编年史，在之后成为了完全不同的东西——为一个永远不会被打垮的民族写的颂歌。 [pagebreak]

萨尔杜斯·勒夫 维威克城 “那时我是个商人，牵着瓜尔驮着货物从维威克城去往纳西斯。我正沿着南边路走着，发生了那件最神奇的事。我周围所有噪音突然消失了……人们在旅行时伴会随着风拂过树梢的声音，但那会儿却是一片死寂。我感到全身刺痛，瓜尔开始四处跺脚。不管发生了什么情况，但它肯定是要被逼疯了。就在我试图安抚住它时，城市中心发生了巨大爆炸。在被掀翻之前，我看到了城中各区支离破碎。还记得地面持续了好一会儿的隆隆作响，接着退往远方，就像是直奔瓦登费尔中央一样。几分钟后，红山喷发了，向空中射出巨大的火云。我只能和早就逃走的行囊瓜尔一样，在到达纳西斯前不停地跑。” 我问他是否了解维威克城发生了什么。 “很久以后我才知道真理部撞上了城市中心，可以确定的是那天许多丹莫死了，而维威克城不复存在了。” [pagebreak] 德洛斯·德兰 哀伤之城 “红色之年对哀伤之城本身没有太大影响，但惊动了很多当地居民。我们中很多人都有住在瓦登费尔的亲戚。火山爆发第一天后我们开始收到报告：维威克城、萨德瑞斯·莫拉、巴尔莫拉和奥德·鲁恩都遭到了大面积破坏。过去的几个月里每晚你都能听到某人放声大哭，这对我们所有人来说都是悲伤时刻。” 我问红色之年里哀伤之城是否受到了任何损害。 “不知为何，但破坏似乎与我们无缘。一些丹莫声称那是审判席的庇护，但其他人认为一切都要归咎于审判席。我的确目睹了一些分歧引发的激烈争论，那段时光太陌生了。” 关于哀伤之城在红色之年中所扮演的角色，我从德洛斯那儿得到了个有趣的回复。 “救援工作是火山喷发约一月后才展开的。这实际上是当时居于哀伤之城的瑞多然议员下的指示。我不记得他的名字了，但他掌控了局势，把士兵、补给和健全丹莫送到了受灾最重的边远定居点。我被派到了巴尔莫拉，那地方简直一团糟，城里几乎啥都不剩了。我在那里呆了两个月以帮助重建城镇，让丹莫同胞们能重新站起来。一开始那只是种负担，后来却成为了我一生中做过的最有价值的事情。我在那里收获了一些直至今日的友谊，也包括我深爱的妻子。”

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

Thirsk, a Revised History

[pagebreak]

n the bank of Lake Fjalding stands Thirsk, a grand mead hall that serves as the home and center of operations for a most valiant clan of Nord warriors. Long ago, a small group of Skaal decided to leave the main village, and free themselves of their brethren's strict adherence to nature worship. They sought to live life as their ancestors had in Skyrim -- free to kill what they wanted when they wanted, free to worship in any manner they chose. The group braved the harsh weather and traveled south toward Lake Fjalding, where they found the perfect location for a new settlement. There they decided to construct a grand mead hall that would serve as their new home and hunting lodge. After several months of building, the companions had completed the task, and named the mead hall Thirsk. The settlers looked upon all they had accomplished, and were truly proud of their accomplishment. But their happiness was short lived, and the settlers soon learned that not everyone celebrated the construction of Thirsk. As the mead hall was being erected, so too was the noise and commotion of construction disturbing an ancient creature that lay dormant under the ice. It was a tragic twist of irony, therefore, that as the last beam of the great hall was nailed in place, the slumbering beast did finally awaken. His ancient name was the Udyrfrykte, though the settlers knew him only as death. The Udyrfrykte came to the newly completed mead hall and wreaked vengeance upon those who had shattered the peace of his long, cold sleep. He killed without warning, without mercy, reducing the Thirsk Nords to half their number. It was the valiant sorcerer Eldrid Ice-Light who finally drove the beast back to his lair beneath the frozen lake, and used his magicka to seal the entrance with a great wall of ice. The horror was over, but the price was great. It took the settlers two months to fix the damage done by the Udyrfrykte, and with so many strong hands now gone, it was slow and tedious work. Finally, Thirsk stood tall and proud once more. But even though the settlers had worked together to construct the mead hall and drive away the threat of the Udyrfrykte, tensions quickly grew over who would serve as their leader. Most of the men considered Hrothmund the Red their de facto chieftain, as he was the strongest and most capable of the lot. But one warrior, Drengr Bronze-Helm, disagreed. He thought himself most capable to rule over Thirsk, and loudly voiced his opposition to Hrothmund. Knowing that conflict and discord would only serve to destroy the new life they had worked so hard to create, Hrothmund the Red exercised his only true option - he swung his great axe and beheaded Drengr Bronze-Helm where he stood. The Nords appreciated more than anything a warrior's prowess in battle, and Drengr's slaying proved to them that Hrothmund was indeed most worthy to be Thirsk's chieftain. So that the other Nords would never forget he had proven his right to lead, Hrothmund placed Drengr's head on a pedestal in the center of Thirsk's main hall, for all to see. And so began Thirsk's most time-honored tradition. Any warrior, regardless of race or sex, could claim leadership of the mead hall by displaying the most impressive battle trophy on the great hall's pedestal. So long as the spirit of Hrothmund the Red consented, that warrior would be named chieftain. [pagebreak] Hrothmund's Bane For twenty-one years Hrothmund the Red ruled over Thirsk and its residents as chieftain. With his soft voice and great axe, Hrothmund brought peace and prosperity to Thirsk. But peace proved to be Hrothmund's undoing, for the mighty Nord grew restless in the warmth and safety of the mead hall. He longed for battle and adventure, to feel the frost in his veins once more, and could ignore the call of valor no longer. When word spread of a giant, bloodthirsty white wolf terrorizing travelers in the Moesring Mountains, Hrothmund took up his great axe and set out to defeat the beast alone. The men of the mountains named him Ondjage, the Fell Wolf. The beast measured as large as an ox, with fur as white as new-fallen snow, and it was said no man or woman alive could bring Ondjage down. The words of the mountain folk proved true, for while Hrothmund did hew one leg from the Fell Wolf, Ondjage devoured the mighty Nord whole, leaving only his great axe as a grim reminder of man's failure against beast. Filled with sorrow and rage, the residents of Thirsk marched to the mountains in search of the wolf, called by them Hrothmund's Bane. Only together did they manage to slay Ondjage, and as family they feasted on his roasted flesh. [pagebreak] The following is a list of Thirsk's chieftains, since Hrothmund first ruled: Hrothmund the Red. Nord male. Slew Drengr Bronze-Helm and presented his head as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for twenty-one years. Slain and devoured by Ondjage, the Fell Wolf. Isgeror White-Wave. Nord female. Slew the necromancer Hildir Worm-Heart and presented his heart as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for four years. Einarr. Nord male. Slew the frost giant Guolog and presented his foot as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for six years. Gisl Round-Gut. Nord male. Slew Einarr and presented his sword as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for two months. Einarr the Younger. Nord male. Slew Gisl Round-Gut and presented his stomach as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for seven years. Grjotgaror. Nord male. Slew the white witch Katla and presented her staff as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for two years. Amelie Bontecou. Breton female. Slew Grjotgaror and presented his head as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for three years. Thorormr Storm-Killer. Nord male. Slew the brothers Ani and Ali and presented their enchanted hammers as battle trophies. Ruled over Thirsk for sixteen years. Aegilief. Nord Female. Slew Oddny the Unfaithful and presented her hand as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for eight years. Caccino Aurelia. Imperial male. Slew the Imperial hero Claudius Anzione and presented his sword as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for three weeks. Fraud. Eldjar Bear-Skinner. Nord male. Slew the Imperial fraud Caccino Aurelia and presented his tongue as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for five years. Falki the Fat. Nord male. Slew a pack of six rabid wolves and presented their claws as battle trophies. Ruled over Thirsk for three months. Succumbed to madness and death as a result of rabies. Svana the Knife. Nord female. Slew Gretta Wolf-Child and presented her sword as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for four years. Beinir White-Beard. Nord male. Slew three Orc raiders and presented their eyes as battle trophies. Ruled over Thirsk for twenty-two years. Skjoldr Wolf-Runner. Nord male. Slew the wizard Griss the Yellow and presented his head as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for three years. Slain in the mead hall. There is, here, a period of unrecorded histories. At some point, the Udyrfrykte was dealt with once and for all, but the leader of Thirsk in this time is unrecorded. There were, apparently, several other chieftains who came and went before the resumption of record. The Thirsk devotion to oral tradition means these names may forever be lost to history. Girgun the Colossus. Nord male. Slew Thjold the Ill-Minded and presented his brains as a battle trophy. Ruled over Thirsk for six years. Vibeke the Stone. Nord female. Slew seven Imperial pirates and presented their helmets as battle trophies. Ruled over Thirsk for three years. Hjarknir Green-Hand. Nord male. Slew an entire grove of Spriggans and presented their taproot hearts as battle trophies. Ruled Thirsk for twenty-seven years. Bujold the Intrepid. Nord female. Slew the great beast of Ilfark and presented its stomach as a battle trophy. Rules Thirsk as of this writing. [pagebreak] Expansion: The Thirsk mead hall is nearly the same today as it was at its founding, a testament to the quality of its construction. But while Thirsk itself did not grow, its inhabitants did, and before long the grand mead hall could not house all who wished to dwell within. So, over the years, many Nords have left Thirsk to establish their own private dwellings out in the wilderness of Solstheim, relying on the island's many caves and natural shelters. But those who left are always welcome back at Thirsk, and many return frequently to enjoy the mead hall's hospitalities. It is also important to note that although much time has passed since the group first left the Skaal village, the Skaal and Thirsk Nords have always remained civil to one another, and even trade resources on occasion. [pagebreak] Relationship with Raven Rock: The Thirsk Nords hold the same relations with Raven Rock that they once held with the Empire when its presence was more known on Solstheim: a deliberate disinterest and lack of complication. Both sides remain happy if they can plausibly believe the other doesn't exist. Which is not to say there is any cause for enmity; rather, there is simply no cause for fellowship among these two very differing cultures. [pagebreak] Law and Order Within Thirsk: Within the Mead Hall, the Chieftain serves as judge, jury and executioner if necessary. The reality is that Thirsk has always been a fairly peaceful place, with camaraderie and goodwill the norm. Solstheim can be a harsh home, and the Nords of Thirsk have long realized that fighting each other isn't nearly as productive as battling the island's bears, wolves, draugr, Rieklings, and whatever other fell creatures may roam the land. Still, there is the occasional disagreement - which more often than naught ends in bloodshed - and every few years someone gets it into his head to challenge the chieftain to a blood duel to try to gain possession of Thirsk. Generally speaking, the Nords of Thirsk are one big, happy barbarian-like family. And, like any family, they have their squabbles. [pagebreak] The Ashtimes: Since the eruption of the Red Mountain, the southern portion of Solstheim has been lost to waste and Dark Elf occupation. Thirsk sits just above the desolated area, though, and happily escaped the destruction that fell over much of the land. In the years since, Thirsk has taken its role as "haven" all the more seriously. They focus on hospitality, and on welcoming outsiders whether they seek respite from the southern ashlands or the northern chill.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

瑟斯科的历史·修订版

[pagebreak]

在法尔丁湖东岸矗立着瑟斯科蜜酒大厅，是最英勇的诺德战士氏族的家园和活动中心。 很久以前，一小队斯卡尔人决定离开主村庄，从他们族人对自然信仰的严格戒律中解脱出来。他们追求如天际祖先一样的生活方式，想杀什么东西就直接杀，想信什么信仰就直接信。 这群人冒着恶劣的天气，向南行至法尔丁湖，在那里找到了完美的新定居地。他们决定建造一个大型蜜酒大厅作为新家和狩猎屋。经过几个月的建造，战友们完成了任务，并把这个蜜酒大厅命名为“瑟斯科”。 移民们看着他们的成果，为之由衷自豪。但他们的快乐转瞬即逝，因为他们发现不是所有人都为瑟斯科的建立而庆祝。在建造蜜酒大厅的时候，施工的噪音和骚动惊扰了沉睡在冰下的古老生物。当大厅最后一根横梁钉牢，沉睡的野兽苏醒了，讽刺的悲剧随之而来。他的古名叫做“乌德弗莱科特”，定居者只知道他象征着死亡。乌德弗莱科特来到新建成的蜜酒大厅，向那些打破它漫长而寒冷的平静沉睡者报仇。他毫无征兆地袭来，毫不留情地杀戮，将瑟斯科的诺德人杀了过半。勇敢的术士“冰之光”埃尔德里德最终将野兽赶回了它冰湖以下的巢穴，并用魔法把一道巨大的冰墙封住了出口。恐怖虽然结束了，但代价是巨大的。移民们花了两个月才最终修复好乌德弗莱科特造成的破坏，由于死了许多壮劳力，这项工作变得缓慢而乏味。 终于，瑟斯科再度昂扬建立。但是尽管定居者们一起建造了蜜酒大厅，赶走了乌德弗莱科特的威胁，但在由谁担任领袖的问题上，局势变得迅速紧张起来。大多数人觉得“红发”赫罗斯蒙德是他们事实上的首领，因为他最为健壮，最有能力。但有个叫“青铜盔”德伦格的战士表示反对。他自认最有能力统治瑟斯科，并大声反对赫罗斯蒙德。赫罗斯蒙德知道冲突与不和只会破坏他们辛苦创造的新生活，他做了唯一的真正选择——挥舞大斧，砍了“青铜盔”德伦格的脑袋。诺德人最欣赏战士的战斗能力，杀死德伦格证明了赫罗斯蒙德确实是最值得领导瑟斯科的人。为了让其他诺德人永远不忘他已经证明了自己的领导能力，赫罗斯蒙德把德伦格的脑袋放在瑟斯科大厅中央的一个基座上，让所有人都能看到。 瑟斯科最悠久的传统就此开始。任何战士，无论种族与性别，都可以通过在大厅的基座上展示最令人印象深刻的战利品，来获得蜜酒大厅的勒断气。只要“红发”赫罗斯蒙德的灵魂同意，那个战士就会被任命为酋长。 [pagebreak] 赫罗斯蒙德之灾 “红发”赫罗斯蒙德作为酋长统治瑟斯科及其居民长达二十一年之久。赫罗斯蒙德用他温和的声音与巨大的斧头（据说是诺德人使用过的同类武器中最大的一把），给瑟斯科带来了和平与繁荣。但和平却带来了赫罗斯蒙德的毁灭，这个强大的诺德人在蜜酒大厅的温暖与安全中变得焦躁不安。他渴望战斗与冒险，再次感受到了血管里的寒意，不能继续忽视勇气的召唤。据说有一只嗜血的白色巨狼出没在默思灵山中恐吓行人，赫罗斯蒙德拿起他的大斧，踏上独自猎杀野兽的旅程。山里的人管它叫“堕落之狼”昂嘉吉。那野兽有公牛大小，皮毛如初落之血一般洁白，据说还没人能活着把它打倒。山民的话不假，因为赫罗斯蒙德砍下狼的一条腿时，昂嘉吉已经把这位强大的诺德人整个吞下，只留下他的巨斧，残酷地提醒着人类在野兽面前的失败。瑟斯科人带着悲伤和愤怒向山里走去，寻找被他们称为“赫罗斯蒙德之灾”的狼。他们合力杀掉了昂嘉吉，一家人一起分享了他的烤肉。 [pagebreak] 以下是自首任领袖赫罗斯蒙德以来的瑟斯科首领的名单： “红发”赫罗斯蒙德，诺德男性。杀死“青铜盔”德伦格，将其头颅作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科二十一年。被“堕落之狼”昂嘉吉杀死吞食。 “白浪”伊思格尔。诺德女性。杀死死灵法师“虫心”希尔迪尔，将其心脏作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科四年。 埃纳尔。诺德男性。杀死霜巨人果洛格，将其脚作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科六年。 “肥肚”吉塞尔。诺德男性。杀死埃纳尔，将其剑作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科两个月。 小埃纳尔。诺德男性。杀死“肥肚”吉塞尔，将其胃作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科七年。 格约加罗尔。诺德男性。杀死白女巫卡特拉，将其法杖作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科两年。 艾米丽·邦特可。布莱顿女性。杀死格约加罗尔，将其头颅作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科三年。 “风暴杀手”托罗米尔。诺德男性，杀死阿尼与阿里兄弟，将其附魔战锤作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科十六年。 艾格利菲尔。诺德女性。杀死“不忠者”奥德妮，将其手作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科两年。 卡克奇诺·奥瑞利安。帝国男性。杀死帝国英雄克劳狄乌斯·安兹奥尼，将其剑作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科三个星期。这是一次欺诈。 “熊皮人”爱尔德嘉。诺德男性，杀死帝国骗子卡克奇诺·奥瑞利安，将其舌头作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科五年。 “胖子”福尔基。诺德男性。杀死六只狂暴的狼，将其爪子作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科三个月。死于狂犬疯病。 “小刀”斯瓦纳。诺德女性。杀死“狼孩”格雷塔，将她的剑作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科四年。 “白胡子”贝尼尔。诺德男性。杀死三名兽人突袭者，将其眼睛作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科二十二年。 “疾驰狼”斯科约尔德。诺德男性。杀死“黄袍巫师”格里斯，将其头颅作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科三年。在蜜酒大厅中被杀。 这里有一段未被记录的历史。乌德弗莱科特被一劳永逸地解决了，但瑟斯科这一时期的首领却没被记录。显然，在恢复记录前，还有几个酋长上上下下。但瑟斯科人对口述传统的忠诚意味着这些名字可能永远消失于历史了。 “巨像”吉尔衮。诺德男性。杀死了“恶毒者”塞约德，将其大脑作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科六年。 “石头”维贝可。诺德女性。杀死七名帝国人海盗，将其头盔作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科三年。 “绿手”夏克尼尔。诺德男性。杀死整个树林的木灵，将其直立根作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科二十七年。 “无畏者”布约德。诺德女性。杀死伊尔法克的巨兽，将其胃作为战利品展示。统治瑟斯科直至此书成。 [pagebreak] 扩张： 瑟斯科蜜酒大厅的规模与一百多年前几乎一样，可见它的建筑质量。虽然瑟斯科本身没有扩建，但居民却变多了，过了不久，宏伟的蜜酒大厅就无法容纳所有想住下的人了。因此，多年来，很多诺德人离开瑟斯科，依靠岛上的洞穴红天然避难所，在索瑟海姆建立自己的私人住处。但那些离开的人回瑟斯科也会受到欢迎，许多人经常回来享受蜜酒大厅的款待。同样重要的是，尽管这些人从第一次离开斯卡尔村已经过去一百多年，但斯卡尔人和瑟斯科人一直保持着友好联系，有时甚至还会交换资源。 [pagebreak] 与鸦石镇的关系： 瑟斯科诺德人与鸦石镇的关系就像他们和帝国还在索瑟海姆时一样：刻意地不感兴趣，缺乏复杂性。双方如果都能觉得对方不存在，那就能保持快乐。但这不是说有结仇的理由，确切点说，是这两种截然不同的文化中根本没有团结的理由。 [pagebreak] 瑟斯科的法律与秩序： 蜜酒大厅中，酋长担任法官、陪审团和必要时的刽子手。现实情况是，瑟斯科一直是个相当和平的地方，友爱和善意才是常态。索瑟海姆可能是个严酷的家园，瑟斯科的诺德人早就意识到，比起岛上的熊、狼、尸鬼、瑞克灵和其他任何可能在这片土地上游荡的堕落生物相比，自相残杀没什么收效。尽管如此，偶尔还是会有分歧出现，最终往往以流血事件告终，每隔几年就会有人突发奇想向酋长发起血战，试图掌控瑟斯科。一般来说，瑟斯科的诺德人就是个野蛮人式的大家庭。和其他家庭一样，也会有争吵。 [pagebreak] 灰烬时代： 自从红山喷发以来，索瑟海姆南部已经被暗精灵占据。瑟斯科坐落的荒凉地区，幸运地躲过了大部分土地破坏。自那以后的几年里，瑟斯科更加认真地扮演“避风港”角色。他们专注于热情好客，欢迎外来者到来，无论他们是向从南方的灰地还是北方的严寒中获得喘息之机。

String.Source: Increases Magic Resistance by <10>%. Gives access to Benthic Scream.
String.Dest: 魔法抗性提高<10>%。使装备者可使用底栖尖啸。

String.Source: Increases your carrying capacity by <10> for each Deathbrand Item you wear.
String.Dest: 每装备一件死印护甲，负重提高<10>点。

String.Source: All spells cost <5>% less to cast, and magicka regenerates <75>% faster. Chance on hit to spawn a tentacle explosion.
String.Dest: 所有法术消耗降低<5>%，魔力恢复速度提升<75>%。命中时有几率产生触手爆炸。

String.Source: Increases Magic Resistance by <10>%. Gives access to Benthic Scream.
String.Dest: 魔法抗性提高<10>%。使装备者可使用底栖尖啸。

String.Source: Increases Magic Resistance by <10>%. Gives access to Benthic Scream.
String.Dest: 魔法抗性提高<10>%。使装备者可使用底栖尖啸。

String.Source: While dual-wielding, your one-handed attacks do <10>% more damage for each Deathbrand item you wear.
String.Dest: 双持武器时，每装备一件死印护甲，单手武器的伤害提高<10>%。

String.Source: Waterbreathing. +<100> Armor while wearing a complete set of Deathbrand Armor.
String.Dest: 水下呼吸。装备整套死印盔甲时护甲值增加<100>点。

String.Source: Increases your Stamina by <15> for each Deathbrand Item you wear.
String.Dest: 每装备一件死印护甲，耐力提高<15>点。

String.Source: Increases Magic Resistance by <10>%. Gives access to Benthic Scream.
String.Dest: 魔法抗性提高<10>%。使装备者可使用底栖尖啸。

String.Dest: 所有法术消耗降低<5>%，魔力恢复速度提升<75>%。命中时有几率产生触手爆炸。

String.Source: All spells cost <5>% less to cast, and magicka regenerates <75>% faster. Chance on hit to spawn a tentacle explosion.
String.Dest: 所有法术消耗降低<5>%，魔力恢复速度提升<75>%。命中时有几率产生触手爆炸。

String.Source: All spells cost <5>% less to cast, and magicka regenerates <75>% faster. Chance on hit to spawn a tentacle explosion.
String.Dest: 所有法术消耗降低<5>%，魔力恢复速度提升<75>%。命中时有几率产生触手爆炸。

String.Dest: 每装备一件死印护甲，耐力提高<15>点。

String.Source: Increases Magic Resistance by <10>%. Gives access to Benthic Scream.
String.Dest: 魔法抗性提高<10>%。使装备者可使用底栖尖啸。
波耶西亚的祝福已添加

String.Source: 10% chance of a critical hit that does extra damage.
Increases your carrying capacity by <10> for each Deathbrand Item you wear.
String.Dest: 每装备一件死印护甲，负重提高<10>点。

String.Source: Waterbreathing. +<100> Armor while wearing a complete set of Deathbrand Armor.
String.Dest: 水下呼吸。装备整套死印盔甲时护甲值增加<100>点。

String.Source: Sacred Stones only confer powers once a day
String.Dest: 圣石每天只能授予一次力量

String.Source: Citizens of Skyrim, they are a tall and fair-haired people. Strong and hardy, Nords are famous for their resistance to cold and their talent as warriors. They can use a Battlecry to make opponents flee.
String.Dest: 诺德人是天际的住民，高大金发的种族。强壮而顽强的他们以耐寒性和身为战士的天赋而闻名。他们可以使用战吼让敌人逃窜。

String.Source:
When riding a dragon, you can lock on to a nearby target and attack it with magic. You can also command the dragon to attack your target. Fast travel while riding the dragon by using your World Map.
For more detailed information, see the Help section of the main menu.
String.Dest:
骑龙时，你可以锁定附近的目标并用魔法攻击它。也可以命令巨龙攻击你的目标。使用世界地图即可在骑龙时快速旅行。
更多详情，请参阅主菜单中的说明。

String.Source: I've been given a book of bizarre ramblings about Elder Scrolls, written by Septimus Signus. He claims to have spent time at the Winterhold Arcanaeum.
String.Dest: 我找到一本关于上古卷轴的奇怪漫谈，作者是赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯。他声称自己曾在冬堡学院秘藏馆待过一段时间。

String.Source: All spells cost <15>% less to cast, and magicka regenerates <100>% faster.
String.Dest: 所有法术减耗<15>%，魔力恢复速度提升<100>%。

String.Source: Neloth asked me to be a test subject for one of his experiments. I refused.
String.Dest: 内洛斯让我做他某个实验的对象，我拒绝了。

String.Source: Helping Drovas has come back to bite me. He owed a money lender named Mogrul 1000 septims. I persuaded him to take half that.
String.Dest: 帮助多瓦斯反而害了我。他欠一个叫莫古尔的放贷人1000塞普汀。现在莫古尔指望我来还多瓦斯的债，我说服他只还一半。

String.Source: For <300> seconds: power attacks do <25>% more damage, +<100> armor, Ancient Dragonborn summoned if health under <50>%, +<25>% resist fire & frost, shout timer -<20>%.
String.Dest: 重击伤害提高<25>%，护甲值提高<100>点，生命值低于<50>%时召唤古代龙裔，火焰、寒霜抗性提高<25>%，龙吼冷却时间减少<20>%。持续<300>秒。

String.Source: All spells cost <5>% less to cast, and magicka regenerates <75>% faster. Chance on hit to spawn a tentacle explosion.
String.Dest: 所有法术消耗降低<5>%，魔力恢复速度提升<75>%。命中时有几率产生触手爆炸。

String.Source: +<25> armor rating, and power attacks do <25>% more damage for <300> seconds.
String.Dest: 重击伤害提高<25>%，护甲值提高<25>点。持续<300>秒。

String.Source: For <300> seconds: power attacks do <25>% more damage, +<75> armor, Ancient Dragonborn summoned if health below <50>%, +<25>% resist fire & frost.
String.Dest: 重击伤害提高<25>%，护甲值提高<75>点，生命值低于<50>%时召唤古代龙裔，火焰、寒霜抗性提高<25>%。持续<300>秒。

String.Source: 15% chance of paralyzing the target for a few seconds.
Can summon atronachs or raise undead three times as far away.
String.Dest: 可以在三倍远的地方召唤侍灵或复活亡灵。

String.Source: Attacks with swords have a 15% chance of doing more critical damage.
Attacks with battle axes cause even more bleeding damage.
String.Dest: 使用巨斧攻击造成大量额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Attacks with warhammers ignore 75% of armor.
Backwards power attack has a 25% chance to paralyze the target.
String.Dest: 后退重击有25%几率使目标瘫痪。

String.Source: Attacks with greatswords have a 20% chance of doing even more critical damage.
String.Dest: 用巨剑攻击有20%几率暴击。

String.Source: Attacks with battle axes cause extra bleeding damage.
String.Dest: 使用巨斧攻击会造成额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Attacks with battle axes cause more bleeding damage.
String.Dest: 使用巨斧攻击造成更多额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Attacks with maces ignore 75% of armor.
String.Dest: 用钉锤攻击无视75%的护甲。

String.Source: Attacks with war axes cause more bleeding damage.
String.Dest: 用战斧攻击造成更多额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Attacks with warhammers ignore 50% of armor.
Attacks with maces ignore 50% of armor.
String.Dest: 用钉锤攻击无视50%的护甲。

String.Source: Attacks with a swords have a 20% chance of doing even more critical damage.
Conjure Ash Spawn
String.Dest: 召唤灰烬怪

String.Source: Attacks with greatswords have a 10% chance of doing critical damage.
String.Dest: 用巨剑攻击有10%几率暴击。

String.Source: I met Septimus Signus and brought him a dwarven lexicon containing the distilled knowledge of an Elder Scroll. With it, he believes he can open the lockbox he's been studying by creating a mixture of blood that will resemble dwarven. I need to collect blood from several different races if I want to help him.
String.Dest: 我遇到了赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯，帮他在方典中刻录了上古卷轴的知识精华。他相信，有了它，就能通过制造一种类似矮人血的血液混合物，打开自己一直在研究的箱子。想帮他的话，需要采集几个不同种族的血液。

String.Source: Attacks with swords have a 10% chance of doing critical damage.
Attacks with maces ignore 25% of armor.
String.Dest: 用钉锤攻击无视25%的护甲。

String.Source: Attacks with greatswords have a 15% chance of doing more critical damage.
String.Dest: 用巨剑攻击有15%几率暴击。

String.Source: I met and killed a strange hermit named Septimus Signus, who needed the knowledge of an Elder Scroll and a collection of blood to open a dwarven lockbox he had studied for years.
String.Dest: 我遇到并杀死了一个名叫赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯的古怪隐士，他需要上古卷轴的知识以及采集来的血液打开研究多年的矮人密锁箱。

String.Source: I met Septimus Signus and brought him a dwarven lexicon containing the distilled knowledge of an Elder Scroll. With it, he believes he can open the lockbox he's been studying. He will contact me when he has the secret.
String.Dest: 我遇到了赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯，帮他在方典中刻录了上古卷轴的知识精华。他相信，有了它，就能打开自己一直在研究的箱子。一旦发现秘密他就会联系我。

String.Source: I met Septimus Signus, a brilliant but mad scholar living in the northern ice fields. He's directed me to a dwarven observatory that supposedly houses an Elder Scroll. He doesn't care about the Scroll itself, but wants me to use some kind of machine there to inscribe a dwarven lexicon with the Scroll's knowledge and bring it to him.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一位生活在北方冰原的学者赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯，他才华横溢却疯疯癫癫。他指引我去一个矮人观测台寻找上古卷轴。他并不关心卷轴本身，但希望我用某种机械把卷轴上的知识刻录在一块矮人方典中带给他。

String.Source: I met a strange hermit named Septimus Signus, who needed the knowledge of an Elder Scroll and a collection of blood to open a dwarven lockbox he had studied for years. I helped him open it. It did not contain what he had expected, but instead a book of great knowledge, the Oghma Infinium.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一个名叫赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯的古怪隐士，他需要上古卷轴的知识以及采集来的血液打开研究多年的矮人密锁箱。我帮他打开了箱子。里面没有他期望的东西，而是一本充满知识的《无限智典》

String.Source: I've learned that Septimus Signus, a preeminent scholar of the Elder Scrolls, is currently living in the far north, studying a dwarven artifact. He might know where I can find an Elder Scroll for Paarthurnax.
String.Dest: 据我了解，一位研究上古卷轴的杰出学者，赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯住在北方遥远的地方，正在研究矮人器物。他可能知道去哪里寻找帕图纳克斯需要的上古卷轴。

String.Source: Sure. Just let me get my things.
On second thought, nevermind. I can get new stuff.
String.Dest: 仔细想想，算了。我会有新行李的。

String.Source: Not recently. Neloth keeps me very busy with spell research.
String.Dest: 最近没有。我正忙着处理内洛斯的法术研究。

String.Source: Any my tea better be hot.
Well, Neloth's just going to have to wait. Varona went to Raven Rock to arrange for supplies.
String.Dest: 看来内洛斯得等会儿，瓦罗纳去鸦石镇采购物资了。

String.Source: I'm sure there's plenty of people in Raven Rock to choose from.
String.Dest: 相信鸦石镇有很多可选之人。

String.Source: Have you found Varona yet? I could really use some tea.
String.Dest: 你找到瓦罗纳了吗？我很想喝杯茶。

String.Source: Sometimes being Master Neloth's apprentice is...painful.
String.Dest: 当内洛斯大师的学徒有时很……痛苦。

String.Source: But, I should be grateful. Here, take this for your efforts.
String.Dest: 不过还是该谢谢你。来，这是你的酬劳。

String.Source: I don't care where she is. Go get her. Now.
String.Dest: 我不管她在哪儿。找到她，就现在。

String.Source: Well find her. Tell her I want apple cabbage stew, with some canis root tea.
String.Dest: 行了，去找她啊。告诉她我想喝碗苹果卷心菜汤了，再配上犬根茶。

String.Source: When you find my new steward, have him report to me. With a cup of canis root tea.
String.Dest: 你找到后新管家后，叫他带上一杯犬根茶向我报到。

String.Source: I like it here at Tel Mithryn. Hardly anyone bothers me. People can be so irritating.
String.Dest: 我喜欢泰尔·米斯瑞恩。这儿很少有人打扰，最讨厌有人来烦我。

String.Source: I suppose he'll do. He makes dreadful canis root tea though.
String.Dest: 还过得去，但他泡的犬根茶难喝死了。

String.Source: She left for Raven Rock hours ago. She promised to bring me back some fresh blisterwort.
String.Dest: 几小时前她出发去鸦石镇了，还答应给我带回新鲜的气泡草来。

String.Source: Have you seen Varona? I'm hungry.
String.Dest: 有看到过瓦罗纳吗？我饿了。

String.Source: Ask Elynea. She and Varona seem to be quite friendly.
String.Dest: 问问艾琳娜吧，她和瓦罗纳好像很要好。

String.Source: Now where did I put...Oh, yeah.
That woman is never around when you need her.
String.Dest: 要她帮忙时那女人总是不在。

String.Source: Don't take too long finding me a steward.
String.Dest: 你找管家可别耽误太久。

String.Source: What! Who's going to make my tea?
Do you need all your toes? I could really use a fresh toe for...nevermind. You aren't moldy enough.
String.Dest: 你真需要全部的脚趾头吗？我正需要一根新鲜的来……还是算了，你身上霉菌不够。

String.Source: It would have to be someone pretty desperate.
String.Dest: 只可能是走投无路的人。

String.Source: Well, my pretties. What shall we do today? Maybe see if you can regenerate your fingers?
String.Dest: 我的漂亮宝贝儿们，今天我们做点啥？或许看看你们能不能长出新指头？

String.Source: Sorry to run, but I'm off to my new job.
String.Dest: 很抱歉得走了，我要去新工作报到了。

String.Source: Well, I've never been one to pass up an opportunity.
String.Dest: 嗯，我从来不会错过每一个机会。

String.Source: Hmm. I might have a few staffs, if you're interested in that sort of thing.
String.Dest: 嗯，如果你有兴趣，我这儿有几把法杖。

String.Source: You might ask my apprentice Drovas. Lately he seems to be hard up for coin.
String.Dest: 你可以问问我的学徒多瓦斯，最近他看起来很缺钱。

String.Source: I don't think you belong here. Does Master Neloth know about you?
String.Dest: 我不认为你属于这儿。内洛斯大师认识你吗？

String.Source: I'd better tell Varona to bring apples and cabbage from Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 我还是告诉瓦罗纳从鸦石镇带些苹果和卷心菜回来吧。

String.Source: Oh dear. Why am I out here? I need to get back and make Master Neloth's tea.
String.Dest: 糟糕了，我怎么还在外面。得赶紧回去给内洛斯大师泡茶。

String.Source: We don't get many visitors. Is there something you need?
String.Dest: 我们这儿不常来客人。有何贵干？

String.Source: Mushrooms and molds of Vvardenfell have adapted to the ash far better than the green plants.
String.Dest: 论适应火山灰，瓦登费尔的真菌和霉菌可比绿色植物强多了。

String.Source: Well, don't just stand there. Go find me another steward.
String.Dest: 行了，别站那儿发呆了，去帮我找个新管家。

String.Source: It's nice to see a friendly face around here. Everyone else can be so grumpy.
String.Dest: 在这儿能看到友善的面孔可真好，其他人脾气都太臭了。

String.Source: Hmmph. Another wanderer. I suppose you'll be wanting potions, just like the others.
String.Dest: 啊，又一位漂泊者，我想你和其他人一样想来点药水？

String.Source: First it's ash spawn attacks. Then my home withers. It's almost like someone is out to get me.
String.Dest: 首先是灰烬怪袭击，接着是我家枯萎了。就好像有人在暗中搞我。

String.Source: Neloth is crazy! I hear he talks to mud crabs.
String.Dest: 内洛斯是个疯子！听说他会和泥沼蟹聊天。

String.Source: There are rumors of dragons on the mainland. I hope they don't show up here.
String.Dest: 谣传大陆上有龙出没，希望它们别出现在这儿。

String.Source: Why do these things always happen to me?
String.Dest: 这些事儿怎么老是发生在我身上？

String.Source: Why am I here? Did Master Neloth do one of his experiments on me again?
String.Dest: 我为什么在这里？内洛斯大师又对我做了什么实验吗？

String.Source: I'm going to have to go to Raven Rock soon. We're running low on some things.
String.Dest: 我马上就得去鸦石镇，有些物资快不够用了。

String.Source: Uh... you mean leave Raven Rock? For good? To go work for a crazed Telvanni wizard?
String.Dest: 呃……你是说离开鸦石镇，永不回来，去侍奉一个发疯的泰瓦尼巫师？

String.Source: I hope you're not expecting a meal. I've barely got enough for them that live here.
String.Dest: 希望你不是来讨饭的，住在这儿的那些我都快喂不饱了。

String.Source: One night a part of my tower mysteriously withered.
String.Dest: 某天晚上我的塔有一部分神秘地枯萎了。

String.Source: We no longer use that name for them. They have reclaimed their identity and no longer represent the patronage of the false Tribunal.
String.Dest: 我们不再那样称呼他们了。他们已经收复了自己的独特之位，不再代表伪审判席的忠实支持者。

String.Source: I don't have time to go traipsing all over Solstheim.
String.Dest: 我可没时间在索瑟海姆上到处闲逛。

String.Source: A fair question, my friend... a fair question.
String.Dest: 好问题，我的朋友……好问题。

String.Source: At some point, you're going to have to choose. No matter the outcome, I'll always respect your decision.
String.Dest: 到了某些时候，每个人都得做出抉择。但是不论结果如何，我都会尊重你的决定。

String.Source: I'd saw off my own leg for a septim, but you couldn't pay me enough to do that.
String.Dest: 我可以为了一枚塞普汀把腿给锯了，但给的再多我都不会去那儿工作。

String.Source: How about I just settle for some mazte and we'll forget I mentioned it.
String.Dest: 还是给我倒杯玛兹酒吧，就当没提过这事儿。

String.Source: Garyn, did we make the right decision coming here?
String.Dest: 盖仁，我们当初来这儿算选对了吗？
你可以问下多瓦斯·雷维。

String.Source: Who did this to us? It isn't another one of Master Neloth's games, is it?
String.Dest: 谁给我们施的法？不会是内洛斯大师的新点子吧？

String.Source: There are too many coincidences. There must be someone behind all of my recent troubles.
String.Dest: 巧合也太多了，最近碰上这么多麻烦的背后肯定有人搞鬼。

String.Source: Fanari says the Nords of Skyrim have many gods, but none are as wise and powerful as the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 法娜丽说天际的诺德人信仰多位神祇，但没有比造物主更睿智、强盛的。

String.Source: If you're in need of anything material, Attendant Hlervu can assist you.
String.Dest: 要是需要什么材料，可以找侍从乐弗帮你。

String.Source: Just wear it. It will light up the source when you get close to it.
String.Dest: 戴上就行了。你靠近源头时它就会发光。

String.Source: Has Captain Veleth discovered anything yet?
String.Dest: 维黎斯队长发现什么线索了吗？

String.Source: People laugh at things they don't believe. It helps them accept the unknown.
String.Dest: 人们会嘲笑所不了解的事物，借此适应未知。

String.Source: He's never going to stop you know. He'll keep sending thugs after you until either you pay him or kill him.
String.Dest: 这家伙不会收手的，他会一直派恶棍流氓来，直到你还钱或者把他宰了为止。

String.Source: This island's nothing but a pile of rubble. What's the point trying to make a life here?
String.Dest: 这座岛只有一堆残垣断壁。在这儿讨生活有什么意义？

String.Source: I'd love to have a closer look, but those old ruins can be dangerous and I'm no adventurer. I'll pay you to watch my back down there.
String.Dest: 我很想走近看个仔细，但那些古老的废墟可能很危险，我又不是冒险家。我可以出钱雇你保护我。

String.Source: My necropsies of Spriggans led me to believe that a heart stone could be implanted in a person's chest, granting them great power.
String.Dest: 解剖木灵让我相信心石可以被植入人体胸部，赐给他们巨大的力量。

String.Source: Don't lose that ring. It was difficult to make.
String.Dest: 戒指别掉了，制作起来很难的。

String.Source: My husband Garyn maintains our farm. Without him, Raven Rock would likely go hungry.
String.Dest: 我丈夫盖仁经营我们的农场。没有他整个鸦石镇可能都得饿肚子。

String.Source: If I could just get my hands on Miraak for what he did to us...
String.Dest: 要是我能碰到他，让他为对我们所为付出代价…

String.Source: I've seen many visitors come and go, but you... there's something about you that I like.
String.Dest: 我见过许多来访者来了又走，但你……你有些地方我很喜欢。

String.Source: Whatever you and Tharstan found in the old tomb, he is very excited about it.
String.Dest: 你和沙尔斯坦在那古墓里的发现让他很兴奋。

String.Source: I know a warrior when I see one, friend of the Skaal. You have the heart of a mighty bear.
String.Dest: 我一眼就能看出你是名战士，斯卡尔之友。你有一颗巨熊之心。

String.Source: I want to be a great hunter like Wulf. I practice stalking prey on the rabbits and the foxes in the woods.
String.Dest: 我想成为像沃弗那样的好猎人。现在正在森林里学习追猎兔子狐狸。

String.Source: I don't even want to think about what those... creatures are doing with my fires.
String.Dest: 我压根儿不敢去想那些……生物会用我的火做什么。

String.Source: I understand, Adril. I know you're both doing your best.
String.Dest: 我知道，阿德尔。我知道你俩都尽力了。

String.Source: You were one of the Ashlanders, Elder?
Oh. It turns out that the spell requires a heart stone to cast properly. I didn't have one with me when I cast it.
String.Dest: 哦，施法时需要一颗心石才能正确地召唤。我那时正好身上没带。

String.Source: Bujold feels so guilty about what happened. Try not to provoke her.
String.Dest: 布约德为之前的事感到非常自责。尽量别惹恼她。

String.Source: Have you found the source of the attacks?
String.Dest: 你找到袭击的源头了吗？

String.Source: Mmm. Always a pleasure to watch when a man like you walks by.
String.Dest: 嗯，看到你这样的人路过总是令人愉悦。

String.Source: I was. I wandered the wastes of Vvardenfell, carrying the message of the Reclamations from tribe to tribe.
String.Dest: 曾经是。我曾漫步于瓦登费尔荒原，带着收复者的启示在部落间往来。

String.Source: I don't know, look for someone else to hop into bed with perhaps!
String.Dest: 我不知道，试着去勾搭别的男人吧！

String.Source: Fethis, I'm quite busy at the moment...
I'm sorry, my love. It's this island... it's never felt the same since we left Vvardenfell. It's as though a part of me is missing.
String.Dest: 很抱歉，亲爱的。我是说这个岛……自从我们离开瓦登费尔后，感觉就不一样了，就仿佛身上缺了什么。

String.Source: Thirsk was respectable. And we let this happen. No, we'll get respect the way it should come.
String.Dest: 瑟斯科就是个好地方，现在却出了这种事。不行，我们必须把面子挣回来。

String.Source: I don't know what you did in those mines, but it put a smile on Crescius's face. I've never seen him so happy.
String.Dest: 不知道你在矿场里做了什么，不过克雷修斯脸上有笑容了。从没见过他这么高兴。

String.Source: If I had the resources at my disposal, I'd build you a wall myself.
String.Dest: 要是有足够的资源任我处置，我会亲自帮您建一堵墙。

String.Source: If you ever need apothecary supplies, talk to my wife Milore.
String.Dest: 要是需要药剂补给，找我妻子米洛尔聊聊。

String.Source: His incompetence made this mess. Let's see how he decides to clean it up.
String.Dest: 他的无能造成了这场混乱，让我们看看他怎么收拾残局。

String.Source: Oh, and you may use my staff enchanter if you want.
String.Dest: 哦，你要的话可以使用我的法杖附魔台。

String.Source: Bralsa, I can barely feed myself...
String.Dest: 布拉尔萨，我自己都快吃不饱了……

String.Source: Don't be ridiculous. Who would run this place?
String.Dest: 别开玩笑了，那谁来开这个店？

String.Source: Nothing for now. But watch your back. I'll be sending collectors to find you. They won't ask so nicely.
String.Dest: 现在是没事儿，但小心点，我会派人来讨债的，他们可没我这么客气。

String.Source: Some consider my methods harsh, but playing the coddling nursemaid has never won a battle.
String.Dest: 有人觉得我的方式太严厉，但当个宠小孩儿的保姆赢不了战争。

String.Source: As a scholar of history, I've always found Solstheim to be most intriguing. I've made many forays into the ancient ruins that cover the island.
String.Dest: 作为历史学家，我一直对索瑟海姆很感兴趣。我也曾探索过这座岛上的几座古老废墟。

String.Source: Understandable considering the differences between us.
String.Dest: 我懂，毕竟我们之间有不同。

String.Source: How about you keep serving the drinks, and I'll decide what's right for her!
String.Dest: 倒你的酒吧，我知道什么是对她好。

String.Source: Are you prepared to deal with Ildari?
String.Dest: 你准备好对付伊达利了吗？

String.Source: As leader of the Skaal, I name you friend to our people. You are welcome here.
String.Dest: 作为斯卡尔村的首领，我称你为我们的朋友，这里欢迎你。

String.Source: I don't know what your playing at, Glover... but something about you just doesn't add up.
String.Dest: 不知道你在耍什么花招，葛洛文……但你就是有些地方不对劲。

String.Source: The security of both Raven Rock and Councilor Morvayn is my primary concern.
String.Dest: 保护鸦石镇和莫尔凡议员是我的主要职责。

String.Source: Yes, yes. As I was saying, heart stones can animate nearby ash.
String.Dest: 对，没错。和我说的一样，心石可以驱使附近的灰烬。

String.Source: Is it done? Is the Ash Guardian gone?
String.Dest: 搞定了吗？干掉灰烬守卫了？

String.Source: Of course, Elder. Please forgive me.
Don't worry. If you die, I'll find some other way to take care of Ildari.
String.Dest: 别担心，要是你死了，我会找到其他方法对付伊达利。

String.Source: Don't pity me. And don't look at me like that. I know what I am.
String.Dest: 别可怜我，也别用那种眼光看我，我有自知之明。

String.Source: Every Dunmer left a piece of themselves behind when they departed our homeland. All we can do is make the most of what we have.
String.Dest: 每个丹莫离开家园时，就都把心留下了，我们能做的就是珍惜当下拥有的一切。

String.Source: I hesitate to ask for anything else. Your family's done so much for us already.
String.Dest: 我实在不想再提什么要求，你们家已经为大家做了那么多。

String.Source: Don't let my posting here fool you. I was once in command of over a hundred troops... my luck simply changed when our homeland was destroyed.
String.Dest: 别看我现在这副样子，我也曾指挥过百多人的军队………但老家被毁后，运气就不咋样了。

String.Source: I understand. I know you're doing everything you can.
String.Dest: 我知道，你已经竭尽所能了。

String.Source: I can't believe Miraak made us build those shrines. To take our free will like that... just horrible.
String.Dest: 不敢相信是米拉克操控我们建造这些祭坛。就这样夺走我们的意志…太恐怖了。

String.Source: I never got a chance to thank you for everything you've done. Ever since your mother died...
String.Dest: 我从没有机会来感谢你所做的一切。自从你母亲死后……
