String.Source: If you're looking for a room, or perhaps some libations, you've come to the right place.
String.Dest: 如果你在找间房住，或者小酌一番，那就来对地方了。

String.Source: I heard from Deor how you went in search of Baldor. That was very brave, and in fact, that's just the kind of courage I'm looking for.
String.Dest: 迪乌尔跟我说了你去找鲍德尔的事儿。你很勇敢，实际上我也正需要这样的勇气。

String.Source: Sometimes I wonder if we're the only Skaal. Could there be more villages like ours?
String.Dest: 有时我也会想我们是仅有的斯卡尔人吗，还是有更多和我们一样的村子？

String.Source: Allow me to apologize for Crescius's behavior, I'm afraid he hasn't been himself lately.
String.Dest: 请允许我为克雷修斯的行为道歉，他最近可能有些失常。

String.Source: Me? No. Highpoint Tower will be filled with monsters and traps.
String.Dest: 我？算了。制高塔楼里一定全是些怪物和陷阱。

String.Source: Tell you what. I'll make sure we have a permanent foot patrol over there. It's the least I can do for you.
String.Dest: 这么说吧，我确保那里会有一队例行巡逻卫兵，这就是我能做的。

String.Source: My apologies for doubting you, serjo.
String.Dest: 抱歉我曾怀疑过你，塞乔。

String.Source: Now why would I want to work for House Telvanni?
String.Dest: 为什么你会觉得我想为泰瓦尼家干活？

String.Source: Maybe not. I hear they've been seen over Skyrim too.
String.Dest: 可能不是。听说天际也有人看到了。

String.Source: As the wife to the Second Councilor of Raven Rock, it would be my pleasure to help you any way that I can.
String.Dest: 身为鸦石镇副议员的夫人，我很乐意尽我所能帮助你。

String.Source: I'm sorry if I was hard on you before.
String.Dest: 对不起，之前对你太严厉了。

String.Source: Unless you're ready to go fight those things, just leave me.
String.Dest: 除非你已经做好准备和那些东西战斗了，否则离我远点。

String.Source: Food, coin, anything you can spare?
String.Dest: 食物，零钱，随便施舍一点吧。

String.Source: But it would have to be very close by. Where exactly did you find this heart stone?
String.Dest: 但必须靠得很近才行，你究竟是在哪里找到这颗心石的？

String.Source: Look, "dearest", what I do on my own time is my business. You stick to your business and we'll both be fine.
String.Dest: 听着，“亲爱的”，我私下里做什么是我的事情。你管好你自己我们就不会出事。

String.Source: Nothing... I... I was just making conversation.
String.Dest: 没什么……我……我就是来闲扯会儿。

String.Source: Anything you can offer, please. I'm starving.
String.Dest: 给点儿什么都行，求你了。我快饿死了。

String.Source: Forbidden knowledge was somewhat of a specialty of the dwarves, eh? You don't think they would just leave it alone, do you?
String.Dest: 禁忌知识正是矮人们的专精领域。你不会认为他们会把它放着不管吧？

String.Source: If you need a ride back to the mainland, Gjalund's the only way off this rock.
String.Dest: 想回内陆去的话，就只能搭加朗德的船了。

String.Source: You've succeeded where I've failed by ending the threat to Councilor Morvayn's life. I shall not forget it.
String.Dest: 你成功地解除了莫尔凡议员的生命威胁，这是我没做到的，我不会忘记你的付出。

String.Source: I don't know what we'd do without him. Send him my thanks.
String.Dest: 离了他不知道会怎样呢。代我向他致谢。

String.Source: Well, I might soon. Neloth does pay well.
String.Dest: 好吧，也许不久后会有的。内洛斯开的薪水确实很高。

String.Source: What if Miraak decides to make us do something else next... like kill someone we love. I can't bear the thought!
String.Dest: 要是米拉克下次逼我们做别的事儿咋办？比如……杀死我们的亲人。简直不敢去想！

String.Source: Could it be? Could Ildari still be alive? Could she be my nemesis?
String.Dest: 这可能吗？难道伊达利还活着？她是来找我复仇的？

String.Source: Skooma! Lovely skooma. But I'd sooner give it up than go work for her.
String.Dest: 斯库玛！甜美的斯库玛。但我宁愿把她戒了，也不想为她去工作。

String.Source: So, Ildari does live after all.
String.Dest: 看来，伊达利真的还活着。

String.Source: I've told young Nikulas that the world beyond our lands is no place for the Skaal, but he won't listen.
String.Dest: 我告诉尼库拉斯，这片土地之外的世界不适合斯卡尔人，但他没听进去。

String.Source: Elder, why have the Reclamations destroyed the Tribunal?
String.Dest: 长老，为什么收复者们要摧毁审判席？

String.Source: What a relief. Master Neloth surely would have punished me had he found out.
String.Dest: 真是松了口气。内洛斯大师要是知道了，我肯定会被他惩罚的。

String.Source: I owed him a thousand septims, but not any more.
String.Dest: 我欠他一千塞普汀，但是不用还了。

String.Source: I wish you could just relax a little...
I can't thank you enough for reopening the ebony mines. You've brought light to the darkness, my friend.
String.Dest: 让黑檀矿场重开真是感激不尽，你为黑暗中带来了光明，我的朋友。

String.Source: Anything you can contribute to Raven Rock will be greatly appreciated... and rewarded appropriately, of course.
String.Dest: 任何为鸦石镇做的贡献都会受人感激，当然，还有适当的奖励。

String.Source: Don't let me catch you spending it at the Netch.
String.Dest: 别让我抓到你在气母那儿买醉。

String.Source: Have you taken leave of your senses? We could be exposed... ruined. Ten years of planning all for nothing!
String.Dest: 你失去理智了吗？我们可能会暴露……会毁灭。十年筹备付之一炬！

String.Source: We'll figure something out. And I'll get better, I promise.
String.Dest: 我们会想到办法的。我也会改，我保证。

String.Source: I fear what would have happened if you hadn't freed us.
String.Dest: 要是没有你来解救我们，后果不堪设想。

String.Source: I think I can teach you a thing or two.
Sorry about the thugs and Mogrul and everything.
String.Dest: 至于那些恶棍和莫古尔的那些事，我很抱歉。

String.Source: Yes. I have enemies. Legions of them back in Morrowind.
String.Dest: 没错，我有敌人。在晨风我有一大堆敌人。

String.Source: Looking for any potions? Ingredients? Alchemical supplies?
String.Dest: 想买些药水吗？或是材料和炼金补给？

String.Source: May I have a word with you, Councilor?
I'd be on the first ship off of this island if I had the coin. What a waste.
String.Dest: 要是有钱我会头一个坐船离开这个岛。什么破地方。

String.Source: Now that is a dangerous path indeed. Hermaeus Mora gives nothing away for free.
String.Dest: 但这确实是条危险的路。赫麦尤斯·莫拉一定会索要某种代价。

String.Source: Fethis! How's that pretty young daughter of yours doing?
String.Dest: 费希斯！你那漂亮女儿怎么样了？

String.Source: One way or the other, I'll get my money.
String.Dest: 无论如何，我都会拿到我的钱。

String.Source: There's nothing beyond the Bulwark except wild Nords and ash wastes.
String.Dest: 防护堤外只有野蛮的诺德人和灰烬荒地。

String.Source: Need to get back to my anvil.
String.Dest: 我必须回我的铁砧那儿去。

String.Source: The mines are open and the ebony has begun to flow because of your discovery. My eternal gratitude and blessings go with you, friend.
String.Dest: 矿场开张后黑檀也开始出产了，这都归功于你的探索。我会永远感激并祝福你，我的朋友。

String.Source: So what do you think, Vendil? You think this town will survive?
String.Dest: 那么你怎么看呢，文德尔？你觉得这镇子还撑得下去吗？

String.Source: I should have another batch of vegetables ready for you soon, Geldis.
String.Dest: 你的下一批蔬菜快准备好了，吉迪斯。

String.Source: Fethis, all of us mourn your wife's passing. Just don't let it affect how you treat your daughter.
String.Dest: 费希斯，我们大家都为你妻子的过世而哀悼，但是不要让它影响到你对待女儿的态度。

String.Source: If you've got any gripes, check in at Morvayn Manor. Second Councilor Arano will sort you out.
String.Dest: 你要是想发牢骚，就去莫尔凡宅邸报到。阿拉诺副议员会帮你解决。

String.Source: Don't make me choose, father... I beg you!
String.Dest: 别逼我做选择，父亲……求你了！

String.Source: Assisting the Redoran Guard with the ash spawn attacks has earned you quite the reputation here. Keep it up.
String.Dest: 协助瑞多然卫兵处理灰烬怪让你在这儿声名鹊起。继续努力。

String.Source: Yes, this camp is small, but it's all we have left.
String.Dest: 对，我知道这营地很小，但我们也没别的了。

String.Source: If you intend to wander Solstheim, you do so at your own risk.
String.Dest: 你要是想在索瑟海姆岛上闲逛，后果可得自负。

String.Source: Elder Othreloth is grooming me to be his eventual replacement. Soon, I'll be running the Temple my way.
String.Dest: 欧斯瑞罗斯长老想把我培养为他的接班人。不久后，我将以自己的方式管理神殿。

String.Source: In fact, it's not likely I'll ever have it. Expenses you know.
String.Dest: 而且我也大概率攒不下钱，你应该明白。

String.Source: There was a time when this town meant something. Now it's all gone.
String.Dest: 这座镇子以前还有些意义，现在什么都没了。

String.Source: If I could only get my hands on Miraak. I'd make him pay for playing with my mind.
String.Dest: 要是我亲手逮到米拉克，我要让他为操控我的意志付出代价。

String.Source: If I don't, he'll find a new mycologist who will.
String.Dest: 我要是不干，他就要找个新的菌类学者。

String.Source: Someone should do something about that damned Ash Guardian.
String.Dest: 快来人干掉那该死的灰烬守卫。

String.Source: If you're a talker, go talk to my wife.
String.Dest: 你要是爱聊天，找我老婆聊去。

String.Source: Have you been by Thirsk? Have you seen... is there any of the mead left?
String.Dest: 你去过瑟斯科吗？有看到……那儿还剩些蜜酒吗？

String.Source: That fetcher told me to fix his house.
String.Dest: 那个费彻让我去修他的房子。

String.Source: If they desire salvation, the citizens of Raven Rock need to open their eyes... and their pockets.
String.Dest: 如果鸦石镇的居民想得到救赎，就必须睁开双眼……还要打开钱包。

String.Source: I'm going to be fine, my love. Captain Veleth would never allow anything to happen to us.
String.Dest: 我不会出事的，亲爱的。维黎斯队长不会让我们出任何事。

String.Source: The way I figure it, it's your fault he can't pay me. So I guess I'm going to have to collect it from you.
String.Dest: 依我看，他不还钱要怪你。所以我认为该找你讨回来。

String.Source: Sounds like you've had a rough day.
String.Dest: 听起来你今天很辛苦啊。

String.Source: Would he give me skooma? I might do it for some skooma.
String.Dest: 他能给我斯库玛吗？要是有我可以考虑。

String.Source: Look around you, Kuvar. If any of us were strong, we wouldn't be on this beach.
String.Dest: 看看大家吧，库瓦尔。我们要是真的够强，就不会在这海滩上了。

String.Source: They're incredible. I don't know how we ever got them to take in this soil, but I'm glad they did.
String.Dest: 它们长得好极了。我都不知道是怎么让它们适应这里土质的，但是幸好成功了。

String.Source: My father needs me. He can't run his market stand alone.
String.Dest: 我老爸需要我。他自己一个人卖不了东西。

String.Source: No, you won't. But I'll love you anyway.
String.Dest: 不，你不会改的。但我还爱你。

String.Source: Are the ash yams growing like you expected this season?
String.Dest: 这一季的灰烬薯长势如你所料吗？

String.Source: Something about the waters attracts them.
String.Dest: 那里的水好像很吸引它们。

String.Source: If you're here about the Rieklings just... tread quietly around my sister.
String.Dest: 你来这儿是为了瑞克灵的话……最好离我妹妹远点儿。

String.Source: Even so, there is more than enough evidence that someone is out to get me.
String.Dest: 尽管如此，我也还有足够的证据，证明有人针对我。

String.Source: I can't believe you found a way to reopen the mines. I don't know how to thank you.
String.Dest: 你居然有法子让矿场重开，真是不知道怎么感谢你。

String.Source: Then my steward was killed. You had to find me a replacement.
String.Dest: 然后是我的管家遇害了，你还得帮我找个新的。

String.Source: But they are for her to use to repair my withered tower.
String.Dest: 但是这些是她用来修复我枯萎的房子的。

String.Source: Traveling beyond The Bulwark will be much safer as the result of your victory at Fort Frostmoth. Many thanks.
String.Dest: 因为你在霜蛾堡的大胜，防护堤外的旅途更安全了。非常感谢。

String.Source: If you cast the spell without a heart stone, it attacks anything in sight.
String.Dest: 你施法时要是缺了心石，那它就会攻击视线内的任何人。

String.Source: Decades of loyal service, and he'd just throw me out like yesterday's breakfast!
String.Dest: 我都伺候了他几十年了，结果他要把我当成隔天的早饭一样扔了！

String.Source: She's jealous. Can't say that I blame her.
String.Dest: 她嫉妒了，但我没法怪她。

String.Source: The Tribunal's destruction was wrought by their own hands. Their actions, or lack of action caused their downfall.
String.Dest: 审判席的毁灭是咎由自取。他们的行为，或无所作为导致了他们的垮台。

String.Source: I hope you enjoy your stay in Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 希望你在鸦石镇过的愉快。

String.Source: My apprentice has overstepped his bounds this time.
String.Dest: 我的学徒这回干得出格了。

String.Source: No need to involve Master Neloth in this. It's just between the two of us.
String.Dest: 没必要把内洛斯大师扯进来，就当是我们俩人的秘密。

String.Source: Dangerous knowledge is still knowledge and therefore useful. Usually turns out to be the most useful, in my experience.
String.Dest: 危险的知识也是知识，自然也是有用的。而且据我的经验，它们通常还是最有用的。

String.Source: Fine! Let it be on your own head then.
This is a decent spot. We're right on the water. This could grow into something respectable.
String.Dest: 这地方不错，靠近水边，也许能发展成令人刮目相看的好地方。

String.Source: I do enjoy sharing stories of my travels in Tamriel with young Nikulas.
String.Dest: 我很乐意和年轻的尼库拉斯分享我在泰姆瑞尔的旅途见闻。

String.Source: Well, at least it's handled now.
My husband Vendil feared visitors would shun Raven Rock. I'm glad to see he was mistaken.
String.Dest: 我丈夫文迪尔怕访客们都要离开鸦石镇，很高兴是他多虑了。

String.Source: Your efforts in Raven Rock have proven most invigorating for my husband. I haven't seen him this pleased in many years.
String.Dest: 你在鸦石镇的作为让我丈夫非常兴奋，好几年没见过他这么开心了。

String.Source: He's twice her age and they barely know each other. You expect me to ignore them?
String.Dest: 他的年纪是她的两倍，而且根本就不了解彼此。你居然还想让我别管？

String.Source: Damn that man! He is being totally unreasonable.
String.Dest: 那个混蛋！完全不可理喻。

String.Source: I need to tell Master Neloth about that Ash Guardian, but I don't dare leave my home.
String.Dest: 我要告诉内洛斯大师灰烬守卫的事情，但我不敢出门。

String.Source: How many did we lose this time?
String.Dest: 这次我们失去了多少人？

String.Source: Have you dealt with the Ash Guardian?
String.Dest: 你处理完灰烬守卫了吗？

String.Source: I'm an old woman. I can't possibly make that trip. It's way too dangerous.
String.Dest: 我老了。走不了那么远。路上太危险了。

String.Source: Modyn Veleth, Captain of the Redoran Guard at your service.
String.Dest: 莫迪恩·维黎斯，鸦石镇卫兵队长，乐意为您效劳。

String.Source: Three taproots soaked in the headwaters of the Harstrad river.
String.Dest: 要三株浸泡过哈斯垂德河水的直立根。

String.Source: I could swing a pickaxe better than any man in the mines. Made thousands of coins. Now it's all gone.
String.Dest: 在矿下挖矿没人比得过我，挣了几大千金币，现在什么都没了。

String.Source: Always nice to speak to someone from the mainland.
String.Dest: 与大陆上的人交流的感觉真好。

String.Source: Not yet. That may come later. First I need to identify the culprit.
String.Dest: 现在算了，以后再说吧。首先我要你去找到是谁干的。

String.Source: You've brought so much hope to our people, we are forever in your debt.
String.Dest: 您为我们带来如此的希望，恩德无以为报。

String.Source: He's the closest thing I've had to a brother, and we all owe him our lives. Am I to suddenly turn my back?
String.Dest: 他是我最亲的兄弟了，我们都欠他一条命。难道要我突然离他而去吗？

String.Source: Misery? I'll give you misery. Try getting assigned to scrape netch scum off the front of the Bulwark.
String.Dest: 悲惨？我告诉你，被派去刮除防护堤前的渣滓才叫悲惨。

String.Source: I am Othreloth, Elder of the Reclamations and keeper of this Temple.
String.Dest: 我是欧斯瑞罗斯，收复者的长老和这座神殿的主持。

String.Source: Don't be put off by my husband's mood... he enjoys having visitors.
String.Dest: 别在意我丈夫的态度……他其实喜欢有访客来。

String.Source: I've tried hitting against a stump by my tent but... iron needs iron, if you want it shaped right.
String.Dest: 我试过在帐篷旁边的树桩上打铁，但是……打铁还得铁砧硬，要不打出来的形状不对。

String.Source: She thought she could hide from me, but she can't!
String.Dest: 她以为自己能不被我发现，想得美！

String.Source: It gets lonely out here you know, on this remote island.
String.Dest: 在这偏远岛屿上很容易感到寂寞。

String.Source: Ha ha ha! Gods, that's rich. Work for Neloth. Ha ha ha!
String.Dest: 哈哈哈！天啊，太好笑了。为内洛斯干活。哈哈哈！
有什么要汇报的吗，维黎斯队长？

String.Source: The Dwemer certainly knew how to build for the ages. These towers have outlasted their creators by millenia.
String.Dest: 锻莫显然很懂得怎么建造跨时代建筑。这些塔楼比它们的建造者多活了几千年了。

String.Source: Though our spirits may be low, and danger lurks beyond the light, I am confident that They will never abandon us again.
String.Dest: 尽管我们情绪低落，且光明之外潜藏着危险，但我相信“它们”不会再次抛弃我们。

String.Source: This Dark Elves of Raven Rock keep to their city, and we Skaal keep to our village.
String.Dest: 鸦石镇的暗精灵守着他们的城市，我们斯卡尔也守着自己的村庄。

String.Source: Your visit here will be tolerated as long as you abide by our laws, otherwise you'll answer to the Redoran Guard.
String.Dest: 只要遵守我们的法律，你就可以待在这儿。不然就等着去找瑞多然卫兵报到吧。

String.Source: They abandoned us long ago, so your contacts are meaningless here. That's it.
String.Dest: 他们老早就抛弃我们了，你的那些关系在这儿没用，懂了吗。

String.Source: Here. Take these. I'll sell you more if you come back later.
String.Dest: 拿着，这些给你。过段时间再来我还能卖给你些。

String.Source: Tired of running? I knew you were weak. Now pay me.
String.Dest: 不想再躲了吗？我知道你是个软骨头，现在还钱吧。

String.Source: There's no reason to bourdon you with my troubles.
String.Dest: 我不该拿我的麻烦来烦你。

String.Source: I suppose you think you should get paid for helping an old woman.
String.Dest: 我猜你是想从老太太我这儿得到些报酬。

String.Source: You don't need to say anything, father. I miss her too.
String.Dest: 什么都不必说了，父亲。我也想念她。

String.Source: Good. Now maybe Neloth will get off my back about it.
String.Dest: 很好，希望内洛斯别再来烦我了。

String.Source: The historian has not stopped speaking your praises.
String.Dest: 那个历史学家一直在称赞你。

String.Source: Ildari? Then it's my own fault. She was my apprentice before Talvas.
String.Dest: 伊达利？那么要怪我了。她是我在收塔瓦斯前的学徒。

String.Source: Are you ready to pay me yet?
She has no idea what she's getting herself into. You may not always be there to take care of her.
String.Dest: 她根本不知道自己会遇到什么。你不可能永远在她身边保护她。

String.Source: I wished to bless the tombs with the monthly invocation, but I couldn't get the door to open.
String.Dest: 我想每月为墓穴祈祷一次，但是打不开门。

String.Source: It seems the dwarves were as interested in the Black Books as we are.
String.Dest: 看来矮人们和我们一样对黑暗经书感兴趣。

String.Source: You think you have it bad? Try walking the Bulwark at night.
String.Dest: 你以为过得够糟了？在晚上巡逻防护堤才叫糟呢。

String.Source: Take that last taproot and plant it into the wall of the withered house.
String.Dest: 拿上剩下的那一株，种植到枯萎的那间房子的墙里。

String.Source: It was her time, father. None of us have any control over that. You mustn't blame yourself.
String.Dest: 那是她的命，父亲。不是我们能掌控的。你不要责怪自己了。

String.Source: An old tomb, I think. It must have been opened by an earthquake that accompanied one of the Red Mountain's eruptions.
String.Dest: 我猜是一座古墓。肯定是被红山喷发引发的某次地震打开的。

String.Source: I've enchanted this ring to find the source of the attacks. Here, take it.
String.Dest: 我附魔了这个指环，可以用来找到袭击的源头。来，拿着。

String.Source: Did you look over next month's expenses? Will we have enough?
String.Dest: 你看过下个月的预算了？我们还付得起吗？

String.Source: Those East Empire people should be ashamed of themselves for abandoning Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 那些东帝国公司的家伙们应该为抛弃鸦石镇而羞耻。

String.Source: Perhaps that's reassuring enough for you, but it's something that still keeps me awake at night.
String.Dest: 可能这就能让你安心了，但还有别的事情让我在晚上无法安睡。

String.Source: It was quite annoying when she died.
String.Dest: 她死的时候我可是很烦的。

String.Source: Welcome to Raven Rock, traveler. Could I interest you in any fine ash-grown foods?
String.Dest: 欢迎来到鸦石镇，旅者。有兴趣品尝上好的灰烬食物吗？

String.Source: I'd be better off with some mead in my belly, but the air in Solstheim is almost as sweet.
String.Dest: 肚子里装点儿蜜酒会好过些，但索瑟海姆的空气一样很甜。

String.Source: A new batch of the Ashfire should be ready for bottling soon, unless the rieklings used it for bathwater.
String.Dest: 一桶新的灰焰蜜酒马上要装瓶了，希望瑞克灵没拿桶来泡澡。

String.Source: I brought down as much as I could when we ran off, but it will only last so long.
String.Dest: 我逃跑的时候能拿的都拿了，可惜撑不了多久。

String.Source: There are bound to be some there, so be careful.
String.Dest: 肯定会一些木灵在那儿出没，所以要小心。

String.Source: Sorry, friend, I can't make anything for you down here. I'll need to get back to my forge.
String.Dest: 抱歉朋友，在这里我没法帮你打造任何东西。我得先回锻炉那儿去。

String.Source: You don't have to live like this now, though.
String.Dest: 但你没必要像现在这样。

String.Source: Squatting isn't tolerated in the abandoned buildings. If you need a place to stay, head to the cornerclub.
String.Dest: 侵占废弃建筑是不被允许的。你要是需要落脚的地方，就去街角酒吧。

String.Source: Prospecting for ebony? You're wasting your time. The mine's as dry as a bone.
String.Dest: 勘探黑檀矿？你是在浪费时间。这矿脉干的像骨头。

String.Source: If you find the time, couldn't hurt to pay your respects at the Temple.
String.Dest: 有时间的话，你可以去神殿表示下敬意，不是什么坏事。

String.Source: I enchanted the ring with a bit of ash from the last ash spawn attack.
String.Dest: 我从上次袭击我的灰烬怪身上取了点灰，附魔在这个指环上。

String.Source: How much do I owe you this time?
Wait a moment while I cast a more specific divination.
I don't really have time for this.
Steel, dwarven, ebony... if it's broken, I can mend it.
String.Dest: 不管是钢的、矮人的还是黑檀的，只要坏了，我都能修。

String.Source: This may be the frontier, but we've still got rules. Break them and you'll wind up in the prisons.
String.Dest: 这里可能算是边疆，但我们还是有规矩的。违反了就等着吃牢饭吧。

String.Source: You honor the Reclamations with your actions. This will not be forgotten.
String.Dest: 你的作为给收复者带来荣耀。应该被铭记。

String.Source: Unless you can help, leave us in peace.
String.Dest: 除非你能帮上忙，要不还是离开吧。

String.Source: Is something amiss, Cindiri? I can sense your concern.
String.Dest: 出了什么事儿，辛迪丽？我感觉你很不安。

String.Source: There have been many strangers in our lands these past few moons.
String.Dest: 几个月来，这片土地上来了好多陌生人。

String.Source: Vendil Severin. A pleasure to meet you, serjo.
String.Dest: 文迪尔·瑟佛林，幸会，塞乔。

String.Source: Come to mock our shame, like the others?
String.Dest: 来嘲笑我们的吗，就跟其他人一样？

String.Source: Geldis, I want you to let me know if you see Dreyla with Captain Veleth. I don't trust him.
String.Dest: 吉迪斯，要是你看到德雅拉和维黎斯队长在一块儿，务必告诉我。我可不信任他。

String.Source: It's been a long time since I walked the ashlands of Vvardenfell. I miss it terribly.
String.Dest: 很久没有踏上瓦登费尔的灰烬之地了，真令人怀念。

String.Source: Don't let the state of Raven Rock fool you. Our desire for Raven Rock's return to its former glory is as strong as The Bulwark itself.
String.Dest: 别被鸦石镇的现状骗了。我们渴望让它恢复昔日的荣光，这意志就如防护堤那般坚定。

String.Source: We call you a friend, but you must still respect our ways.
String.Dest: 你是我们的朋友，但你还是要尊重我们的习俗。

String.Source: I just wanted to make sure you were all right.
String.Dest: 我就是想确认下你没事。

String.Source: I'm worried. I think she knows.
String.Dest: 我有些担心，她应该知道了。

String.Source: It's not your fault. There were too many of them. Nobody could have known...
String.Dest: 这不是你的错。他们数量太多了。没人想得到……

String.Source: Don't you see, though? None of that matters. I'm going to go down as "the Unworthy" because of that rabble.
String.Dest: 还没看出来吗？这些都不重要。因为那群乌合之众，我会被一直叫做“不肖”布约德。

String.Source: That's impossible. Wait... unless she didn't actually die! The heart stone could have kept her right at the edge of life and death.
String.Dest: 不可能，等等……除非她没死！那颗心石可能正好让她的生命得以延续。

String.Source: He's twice your age and only wants to marry into our family to use my contacts at the East Empire Company. No, I won't allow it.
String.Dest: 他的年纪是你的两倍了，而且只想通过结婚入赘我们家，好利用我在东帝国公司的关系。没门儿，我不同意。

String.Source: You must be using quite a bit of your raw materials repairing their weapons and armor. I'm sorry we can't compensate you.
String.Dest: 你肯定是用了大量的原材料来修复他们的武器盔甲吧。抱歉我们补不上这笔钱。
请……离开我们这儿。拜托了。

String.Source: If I don't hear back from you after a while, you're probably dead. Maybe I'll send Talvas out next.
String.Dest: 要是过了一阵子还没听到你的消息，那你可能死了。之后我可能会派塔瓦斯去。

String.Source: Head back to the mainland, wanderer. There's nothing here but misery.
String.Dest: 回大陆去吧，流浪者。这里除了苦难之外什么都没有。

String.Source: Your contributions have earned you citizenship here, friend. I'll always consider you one of us.
String.Dest: 你的贡献为你取得了公民身份，我的朋友。你以后就是自己人了。

String.Source: The Skaal live in harmony with nature and take only what we need from the land.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人与自然和谐相处，我们只从这片大地上取自己需要的。

String.Source: Once the rest of you are done licking your wounds, of course.
String.Dest: 那当然得等到你们全都把伤口舔完了。

String.Source: I wish you'd stop acting like I've grown weak.
String.Dest: 我不希望你别再把我说的多软弱一样。

String.Source: I don't know. There are many who would've already expected us to leave this place.
String.Dest: 我不知道。很多人都觉得我们早该离开这地方了。

String.Source: You don't have to apologize to me. Just pull yourself out of this and let's find a home. Either here or up there, it doesn't matter to me.
String.Dest: 你不必跟我道歉。别再这么做了，我们再安个家吧。无论是安在这儿还是上面，对我来说都无所谓。

String.Source: I'm glad to lend a hand.
You're right, my friend. I just grow weary of the struggle.
String.Dest: 你说得对，朋友。我只是疲于谋生了。

String.Source: Second Councilor Adrano can assist you with anything you might need.
String.Dest: 阿拉诺副议员可以在各方面帮助你。

String.Source: Nchardak, an ancient Dwemer city, on the eastern side of Solstheim. It's largely flooded now, but luckily the main library is still above the water.
String.Dest: 尼查达克，一座位于索瑟海姆东部的古代锻莫城市。现在城市大部分区域都被水淹没了，幸运的是主藏书室还在水面上。

String.Source: Want to buy anything, or just laugh at our misfortunes?
String.Dest: 想买东西吗，还是说来嘲笑我们的不幸的？

String.Source: I fear to think what would have happened if you hadn't saved me from the elves.
String.Dest: 我不敢想要是你没从那群精灵手中把我救出来会怎么样。

String.Source: What am I supposed to do until then?
The link is weak, so you'll have to be within about a hundred feet of the source.
String.Dest: 链接是很脆弱的，所以你必须距源头百尺以内。

String.Source: No, Councilor. I'm afraid we're going to fall short once again.
String.Dest: 不，议员。恐怕我们又要亏空了。

String.Source: Dreyla! I told you I didn't want you seeing him anymore. Must I lock you into the house at night?
String.Dest: 德雅拉！跟你说过别再去见他了。真要逼我晚上把你锁在家里吗？

String.Source: Something troubling you? I'd think you'd welcome a little peace and quiet.
String.Dest: 被什么困扰着吗？我以为你会享受这种安宁的时候。

String.Source: Apologies, Adril. In my experience it's usually the quietest before the storm.
String.Dest: 抱歉，阿德尔。据我的经验，暴风雨到来之前通常都很平静。

String.Source: Why hasn't a Redoran Guard been posted at my shop like I've requested?
String.Dest: 为什么没有像我要求的那样，派一名瑞多然卫兵来我的店？

String.Source: I hear you're the reason Councilor Morvayn's still breathing today. Serves those damn Hlaalu traitors right!
String.Dest: 听说莫尔凡的命也是你救的，那些该死的哈拉鲁叛徒们活该！

String.Source: Besides, I'd never work for Neloth! I heard he cut the heart out of his former apprentice.
String.Dest: 而且，我绝对不会为内洛斯工作！听说他把以前的学徒的心挖了出来。

String.Source: Attendant, why has the door to the lower level been locked?
String.Dest: 侍从，为什么通往下层的门锁上了？

String.Source: You and I both know we can't spare anyone right now. I don't care if you still have friends at the East Empire Company or not.
String.Dest: 你我都清楚我们已经一个人都派不出来了，不管你在东帝国公司还有没有朋友。

String.Source: You refer to the tomes of esoteric knowledge that old Hermaeus Mora has scattered throughout the world?
String.Dest: 你是指赫麦尤斯·莫拉散布在世界各地的那些禁忌知识大部头吗？

String.Source: I tried to talk to you about it, but you just walked away.
String.Dest: 还打算告诉你呢，但你走开了。

String.Source: Good news, Adril. The next shipment from Windhelm should include the building supplies you requested.
String.Dest: 好消息，阿德尔。下一批从风舵城运来的物资里，有你提过的建筑材料。

String.Source: We'll finally be able to begin repairs on The Bulwark. Thank you.
String.Dest: 我们终于可以修复防护堤了，谢了。

String.Source: If there's anything else I can do, just let me know.
String.Dest: 要是我还有什么帮得上的，告诉我就行。

String.Source: Head over to the Retching Netch if the ash has your throat parched.
String.Dest: 要是被火山灰弄得口干舌燥，就去呕吐气母吧。

String.Source: Sure, but then where would you go?
You poor thing. Here you are.
Where do you think? You have to cut it out of a Spriggan.
String.Dest: 你觉得呢？当然是从木灵身上砍下来。

String.Source: Glover Mallory is a wonder with the hammer and anvil. He mended my armor like an old pro.
String.Dest: 葛洛文·马洛里是用锤子和铁砧的奇才。他给我修补盔甲的手艺像个老行家。

String.Source: We'll pull through, I promise. Councilor Morvayn would never let us down.
String.Dest: 我们会挺过去的，我保证。莫尔凡议员从未让我们失望。

String.Source: Do I need to go on?
Is it because of your father? Or is it me?
String.Dest: 是因为你父亲吗？还是我？

String.Source: He's never been the same since my mother died. I don't think he ever wants me to feel the pain he suffers.
String.Dest: 自从母亲过世后他整个人都变了。我认为他不想让我经受他所受的痛苦。

String.Source: Don't judge this place. We can make home wherever we are.
String.Dest: 别看不起这地方。只要在一起，哪儿都是我们的家。

String.Source: I'm sorry. I shouldn't bark at you like that.
String.Dest: 抱歉。我不该那样冲着你吼。

String.Source: You freed us from the dark dream, and for that the Skaal are grateful.
String.Dest: 你让我们从黑暗之梦中清醒过来，斯卡尔人感谢你。

String.Source: You may end up like Miraak, of course. Two power-mad Dragonborn. It could be very interesting.
String.Dest: 你的结局可能会和米拉克一样，当然了。两个痴迷于力量的龙裔，一定会很有趣的。

String.Source: What in the name of the Black Hands is that supposed to mean?!
String.Dest: 黑手啊，你这话什么意思？

String.Source: Next time you feel like having a conversation, talk to someone else.
I want you to stay away from my daughter!
String.Dest: 我要你离我女儿远一点！

String.Source: It seems you've inherited a situation.
Just a brother. Lives in Riften.
How much longer do you intend to serve as his shield, Adril?
String.Dest: 你还打算当多久他的挡箭牌啊，阿德尔？

String.Source: We've got our eyes on you, scale-skin.
String.Dest: 我们盯着你呢，身上长鳞片的家伙。

String.Source: Nah. He... finds things people are looking for. Makes a good bit of coin doing it, too.
String.Dest: 不。他……专门替人找东西。靠那个赚的也不少。

String.Source: Councilor Morvayn is the only reason Raven Rock has survived all these years. You should pay your respects.
String.Dest: 鸦石镇这些年来能挺过来，全归功于莫尔凡议员。你应该对他持有敬意。

String.Source: If you ask me, my father knows how to run things better than the Councilor.
String.Dest: 不瞒你说，我父亲比莫尔凡议员更懂管理事务。

String.Source: Well, I hope you'll come back around. Looks like you might be just the thing we need to wake these idiots.
String.Dest: 好吧，希望你以后再来转转。你看起来像是能够唤醒这些白痴斗志的不二人选。

String.Source: It's much safer for me to risk your life.
String.Dest: 让你去冒险对我来说更安全。

String.Source: They seem to have believed this one to be particularly valuable, as it is secured in a mechanism which I have been unable to open. Yet.
String.Dest: 他们似乎认为这本书特别珍贵，到现在我都没能打开这个保护机关。但我迟早会打开的。

String.Source: You're too good to me, Aphia. I only wish I could remain with you longer.
String.Dest: 你对我太好了，阿菲娅。我只希望和你过的日子长些。

String.Source: I'm sorry, I don't carry coin. Perhaps next time.
String.Dest: 抱歉，我身上没带零钱。下次吧。

String.Source: I don't care if he's a Master Wizard. He can't treat me like this!
String.Dest: 我才不管他是不是高等巫师，他不能这么对我！

String.Source: Anyway, I don't think he'd take on anyone that isn't a dunmer.
String.Dest: 再说了，他应该不会要丹莫以外的人吧。

String.Source: It doesn't matter, my husband. Let's simply cherish the time we have for now.
String.Dest: 这不重要，老公。我们就珍惜现在的时光吧。

String.Source: I'm certain it's only stuck, Elder. I'll speak to Glover Mallory and see if he can take a look at it.
String.Dest: 肯定只是卡住了，长老。等会儿我去找葛洛文·马洛里来看看。

String.Source: Oh fine, fine. Here you go.
It doesn't matter, Adril. I'm responsible for those people and I'll make whatever sacrifices are necessary to keep them alive.
String.Dest: 没关系，阿德尔。我要对居民们负责，让他们活下去。不管要什么样的必要牺牲我都会做。

String.Source: I can't believe I've been stuck here this long.
String.Dest: 不敢相信我被困在这儿这么久了。

String.Source: Found one? Yes, and you read it, too, didn't you? Don't try to deny it, you've got the look. I can see it now.
String.Dest: 找到一本了？嗯，然后你读了对吧？用不着否认，你脸上写着呢。我看出来了。

String.Source: If you witness suspicious activity, report it to Captain Veleth immediately.
String.Dest: 要是看到了可疑的活动，请立刻向维黎斯队长汇报。

String.Source: Load up, and we'll get underway.
String.Dest: 货物装完后，我们就出发了。

String.Source: Milore over at the Ienth Farm should be still mixing potions if you're seeking that sort of thing. Far west end of town.
String.Dest: 在找药水的话，建议去艾恩斯农场找米洛尔。就在镇子最西边。

String.Source: The entire island isn't covered in ash, you know. They have huge ice fields up north and it's freezing up there.
String.Dest: 并非整座岛都被灰沙覆盖，知道吗？北边有巨大的冰原，现在正上冻呢。

String.Source: Captain Veleth's mentioned how valuable you've become to the Redoran Guard. The Councilor and I appreciate your assistance.
String.Dest: 维黎斯队长提到了你对瑞多然卫兵的重要性。议员和我都感谢你的帮助。

String.Source: I've sworn to keep Councilor Morvayn safe, and I intend to take that oath to the grave if need be.
String.Dest: 我曾发誓保护莫尔凡议员的生命安全，如有必要，我将以死明志。

String.Source: At night, the wind picks up from the ocean and... well, I'm just lucky to keep warm.
String.Dest: 到了晚上，风从海面上吹来……好吧，能够保暖算我运气好。

String.Source: Yes, I do. I haven't been able to get it, though. But maybe together we can unlock the secrets the Dwemer left behind.
String.Dest: 是的。我一个人拿不到它，但也许我们两个合作就能解开锻莫留下的秘密。

String.Source: How about a drink for the hero who cleared Fort Frostmoth!
String.Dest: 这杯酒敬扫荡了霜蛾堡的英雄！

String.Source: I'll have food ready soon. You need to eat.
String.Dest: 我快做好饭了，你得吃点。

String.Source: See, that wasn't so hard, now was it.
I'm not holding back. If I knew something I wouldn't wait until you strolled in, I'd come find you.
String.Dest: 我没有瞒报。要是知道什么是不会等你上门的，我会主动来找你。

String.Source: If you're looking for supplies, talk to Fethis. He'll set you up with whatever you need.
String.Dest: 想要物资就去找费希斯。要什么都能在他那儿找到。

String.Source: If you find yourself in the ash wastes, keep your eyes to the ground. Ash spawn like to spring up from nowhere.
String.Dest: 如果你在灰烬荒地里，眼睛要紧盯着地面。灰烬怪可能从任何地方冒出来。

String.Source: Your coffers are running low, Councilor. At this rate, your treasury will be empty by next winter.
String.Dest: 您的资金也快见底了，议员。照这个速度，会在下个冬季耗完。

String.Source: Your contribution to our community will never be forgotten. Azura protect you, serjo.
String.Dest: 你对我们的贡献将被永远铭记。阿祖拉庇佑你，塞乔。

String.Source: He doesn't dare try to collect now that I'm Neloth's steward.
String.Dest: 他还不敢来找内洛斯的管家要钱。

String.Source: You can go where you please, but I'd stay inside the Bulwark if I were you.
String.Dest: 要去哪里随你，但我要是你就会留在防护堤里头。

String.Source: May the All-Maker protect us from whatever dark power took control of the Skaal.
String.Dest: 愿造物主保护我们免受任何黑暗势力的控制。

String.Source: Besides, Neloth is as loony as a skooma addict. He wanted my father to import a white mammoth. Alive!
String.Dest: 另外，内洛斯就跟嗑了斯库玛一样疯癫。他要我老爸进口一头白色猛犸。还要是活的！

String.Source: We tried to start a new life on the mainland, remember? It was too dangerous. Vvardenfell isn't ready.
String.Dest: 还记得我们试着在内陆开始新生活吗？那太危险了。而瓦登费尔还没安定下来。

String.Source: I'm not talking about that. I have a knack for smelling trouble, and for some reason you reek of it.
String.Dest: 不是那意思。我对麻烦的嗅觉很敏锐，而你身上全是这味道。

String.Source: My men have laid down their lives to keep Raven Rock safe. We've fought too hard to leave. We can't just let it all go.
String.Dest: 我的手下已经为保护鸦石镇的安全付出了生命，为生存奋斗了太久。不能眼睁睁看着这一切白费。

String.Source: They just came on so quickly...
Gods. Another mouth to feed? You've picked the wrong town to settle, outlander.
String.Dest: 天啊，又多一张嘴要喂了？你选了个错误的地方安家，外地人。

String.Source: These hands were made for bending steel... not mending bonemold. But, it's certainly better than not working at all.
String.Dest: 我这双手生来是打铁的……不是用来修骨模的。但总比没活儿干要好。

String.Source: Then I'll simply have to fall in love with some other senile, grousing old fool.
String.Dest: 那我就只能再爱上另一个爱发牢骚的老糊涂蛋了。

String.Source: I can't believe Raven Rock Mine is open again. Finally, something worth defending.
String.Dest: 我不敢相信鸦石镇矿场重开了。终于有值得守卫的东西了。

String.Source: Hmm. I've known for decades that heart stones will animate the ash.
String.Dest: 嗯，我几十年前就知道心石会驱使火山灰了。

String.Source: Maybe I won't live as long as the dark elves, but at least I didn't abandon my home.
String.Dest: 也许我活不了暗精灵那么长，但至少没有背弃我的家园。

String.Source: And what will you do when I'm gone?
Please, I'm starving. Any help will do...
String.Dest: 求求你，我快饿死了。多少帮帮我……

String.Source: It's good that our people are now free. We can attempt to restore balance to our home.
String.Dest: 很高兴看到我们的村民现在自由了。我们可以试着恢复家园的平衡了。

String.Source: How about a hundred Dunmer armed to the teeth?
String.Dest: 来一百个全副武装的丹莫怎么样？

String.Source: If you're looking to buy, then I'm looking to sell.
String.Dest: 想买些东西吗，我正在卖呢。

String.Source: The mine's open, people are buying drinks and I'm making money again... just like old times.
String.Dest: 矿场一开，人们买酒喝让我又开始赚钱了……就像以前那样。

String.Source: I was considering replacing my heart with a heart stone. Fortunately Ildari offered to let me operate on her first.
String.Dest: 我原本打算把自己的心脏换成心石，幸好伊达利提出先给她移植。

String.Source: As one Thieves Guild member to another? Try Drovas over in the Retching Netch.
String.Dest: 来问盗贼公会的同行？建议你去找呕吐气母的多瓦斯。

String.Source: At least he did until you set him up with that Telvanni wizard. Now he's untouchable.
String.Dest: 至少在你把他送到那个泰瓦尼巫师之前是这么回事。现在他是碰不得了。

String.Source: Very well, cover the difference from my personal treasury.
String.Dest: 好吧，用我的个人财产补上缺额吧。

String.Source: I have a staff for you, but I would also like to make you a member of my household. A member of House Telvanni.
String.Dest: 这把法杖给你，而且我还想让你加入我的家族，成为泰瓦尼家的一员。

String.Source: That's not fair. We can still take it back.
String.Dest: 这没道理。我们还能夺回来。

String.Source: I'm too busy to deal with this right now. Go take them to her.
String.Dest: 我现在没空处理这些，拿去给她。
多瓦斯·雷维欠我1000塞普汀。

String.Source: Things seem just as bleak here.
String.Dest: 这里的情况看上去一样惨淡。

String.Source: If you would hunt a wolf, then you must know how the wolf thinks and moves. You must become a wolf yourself.
String.Dest: 如果你要猎狼，就必须了解狼的思考和移动方式。你自己得先成为一匹狼。

String.Source: Either you're here to get showered in sparks, or you're looking for something to buy. Out with it.
String.Dest: 你是来这吃火星子儿还是买东西的？说话啊。

String.Source: My wife's quite the alchemist. Thanks to her, my ash yams are growing quicker than ever before.
String.Dest: 我老婆是个了不起的炼金师。多亏了她，我的灰烬薯长得比以往都快。

String.Source: And the Reclamations, they did nothing? Why did they allow the Tribunal to gain our people's favor at all?
String.Dest: 而收复者们，什么都没做吗？它们究竟为何纵容审判席获得我族人民的热爱？

String.Source: I've seen outsiders in our village before, but none were like you.
String.Dest: 我曾见过村子里的外来者，但你很独特。

String.Source: The Skaal value silence over needless talking.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人不喜欢废话，沉默是金。

String.Source: At his age, Tharstan should have known better than to fumble about in dark tombs.
String.Dest: 沙尔斯坦都这岁数了，他应该知道最好不要在昏暗的古墓里摸索。

String.Source: As if we didn't have enough to contend with already.
String.Dest: 好像我们的麻烦还不够多似的。

String.Source: I heard that you and Tharstan explored an ancient crypt. That sounds like an exciting adventure.
String.Dest: 听说你和沙尔斯坦探索了一座古墓。听起来是场刺激的冒险。

String.Source: Fortunately, none. Captain Veleth was able to drive them off almost single-handedly.
String.Dest: 还好，没有。维黎斯队长几乎凭一己之力赶走了它们。

String.Source: Ha, ha, ha! Not on your life!
It's not looking good, is it?
String.Dest: 看起来情况不妙啊，是吧？

String.Source: I'm afraid we're completely out of them at the moment.
The dragons of old have returned! By the All-Maker, I hope they will leave our village alone.
String.Dest: 远古龙族回归了！造物主啊，希望它们会放过我们的村子。

String.Source: It's been tough running the household alone, but Crescius isn't getting any younger.
String.Dest: 独力维持家计很难，而克雷修斯年纪已经大了。

String.Source: There is strength and courage in your eyes. You have the spirit of a great hunter.
String.Dest: 你的眼中折射出力量和勇气，你有当一个好猎人的品质。

String.Source: Dreyla, I have a message for you.
I've met a few Nords from Skyrim. They thought us strange, but in our hearts, I don't think we are so different.
String.Dest: 我见过一些天际来的诺德人。他们认为我们很奇怪，但是我们打心底并不认为彼此有什么不同。

String.Source: Fanari speaks her mind, perhaps more than she should.
String.Dest: 法娜丽一向有话直说，可能说的过多了。

String.Source: Destroying the ash spawn has made it safer to work in the fields. Thank you.
String.Dest: 干掉了灰烬怪后，下田工作安全多了，谢谢你。

String.Source: I feel I owe you my life for thwarting the House Hlaalu plot to have me assassinated. My deepest thanks.
String.Dest: 你成功地挫败了哈拉鲁家族暗杀我的阴谋，我的命是你给的。请收下我最衷心的感谢。

String.Source: It brings me great comfort to know that Nikulas will stay. I thank you, outsider.
String.Dest: 尼库拉斯愿意留下让我很欣慰。谢谢你，外地人。

String.Source: I have goods to offer, if you have need.
String.Dest: 如果你需要的话，我可以提供物资给你。

String.Source: Just thinking that some madman was inside my mind. Gives me shivers just thinking about it.
String.Dest: 只是觉得我脑子里有个疯子，一想到这儿就毛骨悚然。

String.Source: The blood of wolves runs through your veins, Skaal-friend.
String.Dest: 狼血在你体内涌动，斯卡尔之友。

String.Source: It is the will of the All-Maker that we cut firewood only from the dead trees.
String.Dest: 我们只能用枯木做柴火，这是造物主的意愿。

String.Source: Excuse me, but the Temple is for followers of our faith alone. Outsiders aren't welcome here.
String.Dest: 很抱歉，但神殿只为信徒开放，不欢迎外来者。
有瓦登费尔的消息吗，议员？

String.Source: "The road to true belief is strewn with the incredulity of those that failed the journey."
String.Dest: “通往纯正信仰之道，布满了那些失败者的质疑。”

String.Source: I've seen the way you look at her. Do you take me for a fool?
String.Dest: 我见过你看她的样子，你觉得我是个傻子吗？

String.Source: Not too long ago he tried to pawn some stuff off. Seemed kinda desperate for coin.
String.Dest: 他不久前才来典当东西，看起来非常缺钱。

String.Source: It's your choice, "father". Anytime you want to end it, you just give the word.
String.Dest: 你下决定吧，“父亲”。什么时候想了断了，就说一声。

String.Source: Not on your life! I'd sooner try to swim back to Windhelm.
String.Dest: 下辈子吧！我宁愿游回风舵城。

String.Source: Always glad to help, serjo. What can I do for you?
String.Dest: 乐意帮忙，塞乔。我能为您做什么？

String.Source: That's quite a distance from here. What's his trade? He a blacksmith as well?
String.Dest: 那可离这儿很远呢。他干什么买卖？也是铁匠？

String.Source: No, Councilor. He's spoken to everyone in town... twice. If House Hlaalu has a spy in Raven Rock, he's hidden beyond our means to find him.
String.Dest: 没有，议员。它跟镇上每个人都谈过了……谈了两次。要是哈拉鲁家在鸦石镇有间谍，他也藏在了我们找不到的地方。

String.Source: The Dark Elves sometimes visit our village, though it's been awhile since I've seen one.
String.Dest: 暗精灵有时会拜访我们的村子，不过上次来已经是很久以前了。

String.Source: You may have everyone fooled, but I see what you're doing here. The call of gold sends you scurrying like a rat.
String.Dest: 你也许成功地欺骗了其他人，但我看得出你的目的。追求黄金的鼠辈罢了。

String.Source: I know everyone in Raven Rock, and they know me. You want stories? I've got plenty.
String.Dest: 我认识鸦石镇的所有人，他们也都认识我。想听故事吗？我有一大把呢。

String.Source: Thank you! I was hoping you would.
Father, Captain Veleth and I are in love. He means everything to me. Am I to simply ignore my own heart?
String.Dest: 父亲，维黎斯队长和我相爱，他就是我的一切。难道真要我对自己的心说谎么？

String.Source: The Redoran Council tasked me with keeping Lleril alive, which I've done without question for over a hundred years.
String.Dest: 瑞多然议会让我保住雷里尔的命，一百多年来我都不负所托。

String.Source: My primary concern is your safety, Councilor. I give you my word that no harm will befall you while I stand by your side.
String.Dest: 我的首要任务是保护您的安全，议员。我说过只要我在您身旁，您就不会受到任何伤害。

String.Source: So where do you hail from, Glover?
String.Dest: 你是从哪儿来的，葛洛文？

String.Source: That Telvanni wizard is unhinged. I heard he tries to drink the ash.
String.Dest: 那个泰瓦尼巫师是个神经病，听说他想喝火山灰。

String.Source: Looking for something to lend a hand with? We have problems aplenty in Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 想帮一把吗？鸦石镇的困难多了去了。

String.Source: I don't know what you're talking about. I'm here to do a job, and that's it.
String.Dest: 不懂你在说什么，我来这里就是为了干那活儿的，就这样。

String.Source: Not much contact with others around here. Got the Skaal Village to the north, but the Nords there keep to themselves.
String.Dest: 我们这儿不常和别人打交道。北边有斯卡尔村庄，但那里的诺德人不怎么接触外人。

String.Source: This is House Redoran territory. You'd do well to remember that.
String.Dest: 这里是瑞多然家族的领地。你最好记清楚了。

String.Source: Yeah, so. What can I get you? Got everything from potions to pitchforks.
String.Dest: 是啊，那么，想要些什么？从药剂到干草叉，应有尽有。

String.Source: He said he'll meet you where you met for the first time. He said you'd know what it means.
String.Dest: 他说会在你们初遇的地方见你，说这样你就懂了。

String.Source: Aren't you pleased to keeping busy?
She's not a little girl anymore, Fethis. When are you going to let her go?
String.Dest: 她不是小孩子了，费希斯。你什么时候才会放开手呢？

String.Source: Geldis, I need to know if you've heard anything about House Hlaalu setting foot on the island.
String.Dest: 吉迪斯，有听到任何关于哈拉鲁家踏足这座岛的消息吗？

String.Source: You're alive. I hope that bodes ill for Ildari.
String.Dest: 你还活着，希望这代表伊达利死了。

String.Source: With the ash spawn threat taken care of, I can give my men the rest they deserve. Well done, friend.
String.Dest: 解除了灰烬怪的威胁后，我终于可以让卫兵们喘口气。干得好，我的朋友。

String.Source: Raven Rock doesn't offer much in the way of companionship. You should be happy for her.
String.Dest: 鸦石镇在联谊方面的选择不多，你该为她高兴。

String.Source: If it wasn't for my wife, Aphia, I'd have joined my ancestors long ago.
String.Dest: 要不是我老婆阿菲娅，我可能早就去见老祖宗了。

String.Source: You're a coward, Miraak! Why don't you come out and face us yourself instead of controlling our minds!
String.Dest: 米拉克你个懦夫！为什么不敢滚出来面对我们，只敢偷偷操控我们的意志！

String.Source: If you're looking for the East Empire Company, they've been gone for over a hundred years. Try Windhelm.
String.Dest: 在找东帝国公司的话，他们早在百多年前就走了。去风舵城吧。

String.Source: I could never leave Adril behind, and he will never leave Lleril.
String.Dest: 我永远都不会离开阿德尔，他也离不开雷里尔。

String.Source: What Dreyla chooses to do is her concern, not yours.
String.Dest: 德拉雅怎么选是她的自由，与你无关。

String.Source: Tell my father if he wants to speak to me, he should do it in person.
String.Dest: 告诉我父亲，想和我聊聊就当面说。

String.Source: Whether you're simply visiting or staying here, I think you'll find our citizens will welcome you with open arms.
String.Dest: 不管是暂访还是久留，这儿的居民都会张开双臂欢迎你。

String.Source: Why you'd leave your homeland behind to venture here is beyond me, but suit yourself, Nord.
String.Dest: 你远离故土到这儿来冒险的原因我不清楚，但是随你便吧，诺德人。

String.Source: I've tried to interest the villagers in reading and history, but I haven't had much luck.
String.Dest: 我试着让村民们对阅读和历史感兴趣，目前看来没什么进展。

String.Source: I'm afraid not. If we don't do something soon, we may have to think about moving on.
String.Dest: 恐怕是的。我们要是不做些什么，可能就得考虑搬走了。

String.Source: But the important thing is that I don't have it.
Not to worry, Adril. I'll recover my losses in due time.
String.Dest: 别担心我，阿德尔。我迟早能赚回来。

String.Source: You've got to help me! I conjured an Ash Guardian and now it's running amok.
String.Dest: 你得帮帮我！我召唤了一头灰烬守卫，但它现在发疯了。

String.Source: I don't want to get comfortable here. We need to be back up there.
String.Dest: 我不想在这儿安逸地待着。我们得回上面去。

String.Source: It's special to the Spriggans. They seem to like to gather there.
String.Dest: 那里对木灵来说很特别，它们似乎喜欢聚集在那里。

String.Source: They serve the best sujamma I've ever tasted over at the Retching Netch. Worth every coin.
String.Dest: 呕吐气母的苏贾玛是我喝过最好喝的。值得起那个价。

String.Source: Perhaps our town isn't as grand as Mournhold, but it's our home and we must make the most of it.
String.Dest: 也许镇子没有哀伤之城那么宏伟，但它是我们的家园，我们会尽力让它变好。

String.Source: I lost my house, my family, my life... and then I lost my mind. How could it have gotten any worse?
String.Dest: 我失去了我的房子，家庭，生活……现在连脑子都不正常了。还能变得更糟吗？

String.Source: If you're looking for any exotic ingredients, just ask. I might have what you need.
String.Dest: 你要是在找一些稀有材料，找我就对了。也许我有你要的。

String.Source: Oh my goodness, I'm so sorry, Geldis! Please, tell me... what did he say?
String.Dest: 哦天啊，我很抱歉吉迪斯。拜托告诉我……他说了什么？
再说了，内洛斯是个疯子！

String.Source: I mean, I don't have the money.
String.Dest: 我是说，我没有钱来还他。

String.Source: Although sometimes you can buy them from alchemists.
String.Dest: 除非去炼金术士那里碰碰运气。

String.Source: That was quite an adventure we had, wasn't it?
String.Dest: 咱俩那次冒险真刺激啊，对吧？

String.Source: Councilor, I'm afraid there's been another ash spawn attack at The Bulwark.
String.Dest: 议员，恐怕防护堤又遭到灰烬怪袭击了。

String.Source: It's been many winters since my husband returned to the All-Maker, but my heart still aches from the loss.
String.Dest: 我丈夫回到造物主身边已经好几个冬季了，但我依然为失去他而心痛。

String.Source: I'm not leaving this kitchen until that thing is gone!
String.Dest: 那玩意儿消失之前我是不会离开厨房的！

String.Source: Most exiled dark elves call Vvardenfell their home. I call Raven Rock our home... may it last a thousand years.
String.Dest: 大多数流亡的暗精灵还在对瓦登费尔念念不忘，但我早已经把鸦石镇当家了……愿它长寿。

String.Source: The Skaal and the land are one, joined by the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人与这片土地是一体的，造物主将我们联结起来。

String.Source: Oh, hello. You looking for a handout or something?
My wife and I are doing the best we can to keep Raven Rock fed.
String.Dest: 我和我太太在尽力喂饱鸦石镇的居民们。

String.Source: All that the Skaal need can be found in the land and the water.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔需要的一切都能在地里和水里获得。

String.Source: Glover Mallory's the name. If you're looking for a smith, you've found one of the best.
String.Dest: 我叫葛洛文·马洛里。你要是在找铁匠，最好的就在你面前。

String.Source: If it wasn't for the Bulwark, we'd be digging our houses out from beneath the ash by now.
String.Dest: 要不是有防护堤，我们现在就得把房子从灰里挖出来咯。

String.Source: Last time I rode Gjalund's ship, I was heaving my guts for a week. Dunmer weren't meant to ride on water.
String.Dest: 上次我坐加朗德的船，肚子闹了一星期。丹莫真不适合出海。

String.Source: I'm perfectly content with my current position.
String.Dest: 我非常满意现在的职务。

String.Source: I promise you, I have nothing but good intentions towards everyone in this town.
String.Dest: 我跟你保证，我对镇子里的任何人都心存善意。

String.Source: I can't pay you, but I could teach you the Ash Guardian spell... although maybe that doesn't sound like a good idea to you after this.
String.Dest: 我给不了你钱，但我能教你那个灰烬守卫法术……虽然出了这种事后，对你来说可能不像个好主意。
你真该听听莫古尔的话。

String.Source: A lot of folks around here look to strangers for help. I hope you won't disappoint them.
String.Dest: 这里很多人都等着外地人伸出援手，希望你别让他们失望。

String.Source: My father and mother are the richest on the island... and that includes Councilor Morvayn.
String.Dest: 我父母是这岛上最有钱的人……莫尔凡议员也比不上。

String.Source: I've even been attacked by dragons!
This town bores me. How much longer must we stay in this wretched place?
String.Dest: 这镇子太无聊了。我们还要在这鬼地方待多久啊？

String.Source: Your precious "contacts" have yet to conjure up a scrap of food or work for us, father.
String.Dest: 您那些宝贵的“关系”还没给我们变出来一丁点儿食物和工作呢，父亲。

String.Source: I'll just keep two of them for myself. No need for Neloth to know.
String.Dest: 我自己要留两株。别让内洛斯知道了。

String.Source: Well, we had to do something. I'd rather starve than eat another one of those horrid turnips.
String.Dest: 唉，我们得做点什么。我就是饿死也不吃那些讨厌的萝卜了。

String.Source: Patience is for fools. When you are tired of looking over your shoulder, you'll pay me.
String.Dest: 白痴才有耐心。等你厌倦了提心吊胆，就会还钱了。

String.Source: You'd do well to remember that next time, Attendant.
I am called Wulf Wild-Blood. I am First Hunter of the Skaal.
String.Dest: 我叫“野血”沃弗，斯卡尔的首席猎人。

String.Source: He came in here asking my father if he needed any odd jobs done. Seemed kind of desperate.
String.Dest: 他来这里问过我父亲，有没有杂活儿干。看上去有点绝望。

String.Source: I don't know if I can do this anymore, Modyn.
String.Dest: 我不知道还能不能这样下去了，莫迪恩。

String.Source: What's going on here is that we've been kicked out of our home.
String.Dest: 这儿出的事是我们被赶出了自己的家门。

String.Source: Captain Veleth! Good to see you again. What can I get you?
String.Dest: 维黎斯队长！很高兴又见面了。想来点什么？

String.Source: Mother worries when I walk too far from the village. She says a dragon might snatch me up, but I'm not afraid.
String.Dest: 当我离村子太远时，我妈就会很担心，她说我可能会被龙叼走，但我不怕。

String.Source: How are you supposed to live when your only means of trade is yanked out from under you?
String.Dest: 当你亲眼看着赖以谋生的行当被取缔后该靠什么吃饭？

String.Source: My new steward is...acceptable. If only he made better tea.
String.Dest: 我的新管家……还行吧。就是茶泡得难喝了点。

String.Source: Tell you what. If you use them to make your kwama egg stew, you can have them for free.
String.Dest: 这样吧。你拿它们来做卡瓦玛蛋炖肉，我就算你免费。

String.Source: You aren't here with bad news regarding my husband, are you? I couldn't bear it.
String.Dest: 你不是带来我丈夫的坏消息，对吧？我可受不了。

String.Source: It's not from your father. It's from Captain Veleth.
String.Dest: 不是你父亲的。是维黎斯队长。

String.Source: If you're looking to purchase something, speak to my father, Fethis.
String.Dest: 想买东西的话，找我父亲费希斯吧。

String.Source: Excuse me, captain. Do you have any plans for the west end of town? We feel awfully exposed over there.
String.Dest: 打扰下，队长。你对镇子的西侧有何计划？感觉这边暴露无遗。

String.Source: You're doing your job, Adril. No one can fault you for that.
String.Dest: 你是在履行职责，阿德尔。没人会为此怪你。

String.Source: The Reclamations herald the dawn of a new age, and the downfall of the false Tribunal.
String.Dest: 收复者们预示着新时代的曙光，以及伪审判席的衰落。

String.Source: If everything goes well, we won't have to stay here much longer. For now, we wait.
String.Dest: 一切顺利的话就不用多久。现在我们得等下去。

String.Source: As the beasts of the forest provide food and furs, so the trees of the forest provide fire.
String.Dest: 林中的野兽为我们提供了食物和毛皮，而树木提供了柴火。

String.Source: She volunteered for one of my experiments involving heart stones.
String.Dest: 她自愿参与了我的一次实验，跟心石有关。

String.Source: I've come to know those ruins so well, I could draw you a map from memory. That's why I noticed the new passage the moment I laid eyes on it.
String.Dest: 我对那些废墟非常了解，可以凭记忆给你画张地图。这就是为什么我扫一眼就看出那里多了一条通道。

String.Source: I'm asking myself why Miraak was making us build these shrines... and I'm afraid the answer will be far worse than any of us can imagine.
String.Dest: 我问自己为什么米拉克要我们盖那些祭坛……恐怕答案远超乎我们的想象。

String.Source: Headed east? May want to give Tel Mithryn a wide berth. I don't like the looks of that place one bit.
String.Dest: 要往东去吗？最好离泰尔·米斯瑞恩远点。我一点都不喜欢那个地方的样子。

String.Source: What's wrong with you? Do you want to ruin everything?
String.Dest: 你有什么毛病啊？你想毁了一切吗？

String.Source: Had we only left a day earlier... she'd still be with us. It's my fault she's dead.
String.Dest: 要是我们早些离开……她可能还会跟我们一块儿呢。是我把她害死了。

String.Source: If you're looking for work, the mine's been closed for a long time.
String.Dest: 你要是找活儿干，矿场已经关闭很久了。

String.Source: Well, if we keep having harvests like this, you'll never have to eat one again.
String.Dest: 嗯，要是我们接下来这么丰收，你就再也不用吃萝卜了。

String.Source: We meet again, serjo. Speak your mind.
String.Dest: 又见面了，塞乔。有何贵干？

String.Source: I understand. Know that you are welcome here for as long as you wish to be.
String.Dest: 我明白了。记住我们这里永远欢迎你。

String.Source: In order to subdue this chaotic world, to set things right, I must return to this realm in full.
String.Dest: 为了征服这个混沌世界，扶正一切，我必须以完全体回归现世。

String.Source: My dear chieftain, I will bring you back a whole bouquet if you wish.
String.Dest: 我亲爱的族长，你乐意的话我会帮你带一大捧回来。

String.Source: The beasts are driven north in search of food.
String.Dest: 那些野兽是为了觅食迁往北边的。

String.Source: Things have been much calmer since you disposed of Ildari.
String.Dest: 自从你解决掉伊达利后，一切就风平浪静了。

String.Source: Where is that ash sucking steward of mine? Varona!
String.Dest: 我那个吸灰的管家哪儿去啦？瓦罗纳！

String.Source: As you can see, most of the lower levels of the city are flooded. But it isn't hopeless - the old Dwemer pumps still seem to work. Watch.
String.Dest: 你也看到了，城市下层区域都被水给淹了。但我们还有希望——那些老旧的锻莫水泵好像还能运作。你看。

String.Source: Hmm. This place was deserted when I was here last.
String.Dest: 嗯。我上次来的时候这儿空荡荡的。

String.Source: These four boilers provide steam to the room upstairs.
String.Dest: 这四个锅炉为楼上的房间提供蒸汽。

String.Source: May I ask what it is you're doing here?
String.Dest: 介意我问下你在这里做什么吗？

String.Source: Now, hurry. That book might contain the final secrets of Xarxes, for all we know.
String.Dest: 那么，快去吧。那本书可能包含了沙克斯的最终秘密，据我们所知。

String.Source: Shall we get on with it?
Let's be on our way then.
How much longer will you stay in the village, Tharstan?
String.Dest: 你还会在村里待多久呢，沙尔斯坦？

String.Source: To tell the truth, Morwen, I thought it would only be a year or two. However, I have come to be very fond of the village and of all of you.
String.Dest: 说实话，莫尔雯，我原也就打算待一两年。但我真的很喜欢这村子，还有你们大家。

String.Source: Yes... here we are. This device shows the location of four more cubes in this section of the city.
String.Dest: 啊……我们到了。这个设备显示了在城市这个区域里，其他四块方典的位置。

String.Source: I've pried open another of Hermaeus Mora's secrets.
String.Dest: 我又揭开了一个赫麦尤斯·莫拉的秘密。

String.Source: Yes, I remember that you ate one of them all by yourself. Maybe this time, you will leave some for the rest of us!
String.Dest: 嗯，我还记得你独吞了一整块呢。希望你这次记得给别人留点儿！

String.Source: Very well, mother. I will stay for now.
String.Dest: 好吧，母亲。我暂时不走了。

String.Source: Or that the Dwemer's servitors continued to try to preserve the city after their creators' disappearance.
String.Dest: 或者说锻莫的仆人们在他们消失后，仍在保卫这座城市。

String.Source: I'm not taking this trip for pleasure, you know. Let's get to Nchardak.
String.Dest: 这趟不是去度假的，知道吧。我们赶紧去尼查达克吧。

String.Source: Some of the Redoran Guard have taken to calling them "ash spawn."
String.Dest: 有些瑞多然卫兵叫它们“灰烬怪”。

String.Source: Yes. Hermaeus Mora is devious, but then so am I.
String.Dest: 有。赫麦尤斯·莫拉城府很深，但我也不差。

String.Source: Where is that lazy steward of mine? Varona! No, wait. She's dead. Drovas!
String.Dest: 我的懒管家到哪儿去了？瓦罗纳！不对，她死了。多瓦斯！

String.Source: May I keep this one, master?
I'm in your debt, Wulf. That bow you gave me is twice as strong as the last one I had.
String.Dest: 我欠你个人情，沃弗。你给我的那把弓比我原来的要强一倍。

String.Source: Then I should be able to open the book's protective case.
String.Dest: 之后我们应该就能打开书的保护装置了。

String.Source: I've told you before, little cub, you're not old enough yet.
String.Dest: 我已经告诉你了，小崽儿。你还太小了。

String.Source: I have a favor to ask of you, Tharstan.
String.Dest: 我想请你帮我个忙，沙尔斯坦。

String.Source: And you want to put more logs on the fire?
As the small creatures move north, the large ones that prey upon them must follow.
String.Dest: 随着小动物的北迁，那些猎食它们的大型生物势必要跟着走。

String.Source: They're shut down, but they still respond to the control cubes.
String.Dest: 它们被关闭了，但是对控制方典仍有反应。

String.Source: Your enchanting has improved despite your best efforts.
String.Dest: 虽然你尽了全力也不过如此，你的附魔技能还算有些进步。

String.Source: Don't think your false flattery will work on me, Talvas. You're still going to give me that skin sample.
String.Dest: 别以为你那阿谀奉承对我有用，塔瓦斯。你还欠我那个皮肤样本呢。

String.Source: It's hard to explain, but as much as I have come to think of Skaal Village as a second home, I do still miss Skyrim.
String.Dest: 这很难解释，虽然我把斯卡尔村当成我的第二个家，还是会想念天际。

String.Source: Then I will keep practicing my aim every day.
String.Dest: 那我每天都会接着练习瞄准。

String.Source: I thank you, Morwen. It means very much to me to hear you say so.
String.Dest: 谢谢你，莫尔雯。你这么说对我意义重大。

String.Source: Of course, I'm sure you can handle yourself. Of course you can. Of course.
String.Dest: 当然了，就知道你行。的确如此。的确如此啊。

String.Source: I just want to see. I promise not to get in the way of the hunters, and I'm not afraid of the beasts in the forest.
String.Dest: 我只想看看。我保证不会妨碍到猎人们，而且我也不怕林子里的野兽。

String.Source: We'll see. If the power levels aren't too high you may have it.
String.Dest: 再说吧。要是它的能量等级不算太高你就拿去。

String.Source: You there... You don't seem to be in quite the same state as the others here. Very interesting.
String.Dest: 那边儿的……你看起来和这儿的其他人很不一样，真有意思。

String.Source: I have given my answer, little cub. I know you are brave and have the heart of a great she-wolf, but all things have a time and place.
String.Dest: 我已经给你答复了，小崽儿。我知道你很勇敢，也有颗母狼之心，但还不是时候。

String.Source: I wonder sometimes if you are truly happy here, Nikulas.
String.Dest: 有时候我想知道你真的快乐吗，尼库拉斯？

String.Source: I presume you've already seen some of what I've accomplished. There is so, so much more to be done. I'm glad you're here.
String.Dest: 我想你已经见过我的一些成就了。但还有太多霸业未成，很高兴你能来这里。

String.Source: At least the hunting will be easier with the beasts so close.
String.Dest: 至少那些野兽离得这么近，打猎更方便了。

String.Source: I can not return to the village until I have found the source of this evil. Will you come with me, further into this accursed temple?
String.Dest: 除非找到这邪恶之源，不然我不会回村子的。你要和我一起进这该死的神殿吗？

String.Source: I know that Tharstan has filled your head with stories, but those stories don't tell of the dangers and hardships of the world.
String.Dest: 我知道沙尔斯坦跟你讲了很多故事，但那些故事没告诉你外面世界的危险和艰苦。

String.Source: Did you fill those soul gems like I asked you?
String.Dest: 你有照我说的填满那些灵魂石吗？

String.Source: I don't fear hardship and danger. I am Skaal. The only thing that I fear is not to follow my heart, and to die an old man filled with regret.
String.Dest: 我不怕艰苦和危险。我是个斯卡尔人，只怕不能随心而动，带着遗憾年老过世。

String.Source: Just make sure that when the berries ripen, you make more pies than you did last time.
String.Dest: 等果子成熟了，记得要比上次多做点。

String.Source: I have seen more wolves and bears among the trees since the last dark moon. Something is driving them north into our lands.
String.Dest: 从上次暗月以来，我看见林子里多了好多狼和熊。有某种东西在驱使着它们向北，迁移到我们这片地来。

String.Source: Miraak... Miraak... It sounds familiar, and yet I can't quite place...
String.Dest: 米拉克……米拉克……听起来很耳熟，但我没法确定……

String.Source: It won't be easy. The whole lower part of the city is flooded, which has shut down the boilers which supply steam to the reading room.
String.Dest: 这不容易。整座城市的下层区域都被水淹了，原本为阅读室提供蒸汽的锅炉也被迫关闭了。

String.Source: Say, how would you like to help advance the art of magic?
String.Dest: 喂，你愿意为魔法技艺的发展尽一份力吗？

String.Source: If only it could be so.
And here you are, just as I asked. How very kind of you.
String.Dest: 你出现这里，正如我所愿。真是太慷慨了。

String.Source: Then take an axe and find a dead tree to cut. We keep only what we need in the village, you know that.
String.Dest: 那就拿把斧头找棵枯树砍吧。我们村只留必须的东西，知道吧。

String.Source: No, no, that won't do. Can't have you forgo bathing... The ashlands can leave one a bit pungent and it's, eh, obvious you've been through them.
String.Dest: 不行，那样行不通。你也没法不洗澡……灰地民会让人味道变重，而且，呃，显然你和他们打过交道。

String.Source: I suppose... yes, I can see how that would have inverted the tether. Unfortunate. Couldn't you simply avoid water?
String.Dest: 我猜……对了，我知道那会让链接逆转。可惜了。你就不能避开水吗？

String.Source: Yes, master. Although the grand soul gem only has a common soul in it.
String.Dest: 是的，内洛斯大师。尽管特大灵魂石里只有个普通灵魂。

String.Source: Idiot! Those are hard to find. Next time don't fill it at all if you can't do it properly.
String.Dest: 白痴，那是很稀有的。下次再填不满你就别搞了。

String.Source: Master, you promised to teach me a new conjuration spell.
String.Dest: 大师，您说了要教我一个新的召唤法术。

String.Source: When will you make another snowberry pie, Yrsa? It's been a long time.
String.Dest: 你啥时候再做一个雪浆果派呢，依尔莎？都过了这么久了。

String.Source: So, if we can find four more cubes, we can turn these boilers back on and restore steam power to the room upstairs.
String.Dest: 所以，要是我们能再找到四块方典，就能启动这些锅炉，恢复楼上房间的蒸汽供应。

String.Source: Here we are. Nchardak. The book we're after is right inside that dome.
String.Dest: 我们到了，尼查达克。要找的书就在那座穹顶下。

String.Source: Miraak's been dead for thousands of years.
String.Dest: 米拉克已经死了几千年了。

String.Source: There's a group of cutthroats out there right now that Ulfric doesn't lift a finger to bring to justice, as long as they don't threaten Nord land.
String.Dest: 现在就有一群杀人犯逍遥法外，但只要他们不威胁诺德的地盘，乌弗瑞克也懒得动动手指把他们绳之以法。

String.Source: Thank you, master. It's all because of your brilliant teaching.
String.Dest: 谢谢您，内洛斯大师。这全归功于您的出色教导。

String.Source: I'll just make a copy for myself. It's far too dangerous to carry the real book around.
String.Dest: 我还是留一份抄本吧。拿着原本在外走动太危险了。

String.Source: I've prepared the staff maker like you asked.
String.Dest: 我照您说的把法杖附魔器准备好了。

String.Source: Working on those standing stones feels like a bad dream. I'm glad you woke us from it.
String.Dest: 在立石那儿修东西简直像是噩梦。幸好有你来唤醒我们。

String.Source: Good, good. As soon as I'm done here, I'll try it out.
String.Dest: 好，很好。等我这边弄完了就过去试试。

String.Source: You see, I'm a collector. Of staffs. Magical staffs. In particular, those made by Azra Nightwielder.
String.Dest: 你看，我是个收藏家，收藏法杖。尤其是“暗夜掌控者”阿兹拉制作的那些。

String.Source: I'm not setting foot out that door unless it's absolutely necessary. If I do that, I'll be even colder than I am now!
String.Dest: 除非有必要，我是真的不打算出门。真那么做，我会比现在还冷！

String.Source: Every staff of his that I have uncovered has led me to greater understanding.
String.Dest: 我每找到他的一把法杖，都会受益良多。

String.Source: He was the original shadowmage. His advances in magic are legendary.
String.Dest: 他是第一位影法师。是推动魔法发展的传奇人物。

String.Source: Through some divinations, I believe I've located one. If you retrieve it, I'll give you a staff of my own making.
String.Dest: 通过占卜术，我确信已经定位了一把。要是你能取回来，我就给你一把我亲手做的。

String.Source: When you visit the ruins again, will you bring back some blue mountain flowers?
String.Dest: 你下次探索废墟的时候，可以带几朵蓝山花回来吗？

String.Source: I don't need so many, but thank you, Tharstan. You are as sweet as honey from the comb.
String.Dest: 我不需要那么多，但是谢了，沙尔斯坦。你就跟蜂房里的蜂蜜一样甜。

String.Source: Oh. Wait, I recall. But that makes very little sense.
String.Dest: 哦，等下，我想起来了。但这说不通啊。

String.Source: Is it just me, or is it colder than usual today? By the Nine, I feel as if my bones have turned to ice.
String.Dest: 是我的错觉，还是说今天比平常冷？九圣灵啊，我感觉骨头都快结冰了。

String.Source: Less well known is that he was also a pioneer in the field of enchanting staffs.
String.Dest: 但是很少有人知道，他也是法杖附魔领域的先驱。

String.Source: Here, I'll just remove it. Here's a bit of coin. Should help mitigate your inconvenience.
String.Dest: 好吧，我会取消那个法术。这几枚硬币给你。算是补偿你的不适。

String.Source: Our people are lost to the madness that infects this island. Perhaps Storn has been lost as well...
String.Dest: 我们的人都被岛上传染的狂热所影响了。可能斯托恩也疯了……

String.Source: My heart is still wounded from the loss of your father. I cannot lose my only son so soon after.
String.Dest: 失去你爸已经让我很痛苦了，我不能再失去唯一的儿子。

String.Source: The ashfall in the south kills the plants upon which the small creatures feed.
String.Dest: 南边的植物被火山灰给杀光了，小动物没什么可吃了。

String.Source: If they grow hungry enough, they will turn upon us.
String.Dest: 要是它们饿坏了，就会冲我们出手了。

String.Source: That is the way of things. We must be prepared.
String.Dest: 情况正是如此。我们必须做好准备。

String.Source: The snowberries are not yet sweet enough. I tasted one just this morning.
String.Dest: 草莓还不够甜呢。我今早上才尝了一颗。

String.Source: When time has worn away my grief, then you can go with my blessing.
String.Dest: 等时间抚平我的伤痛后，再带着我的祝福上路吧。

String.Source: Not if I can help it!
I thought you were in a hurry to get to Nchardak.
String.Dest: 我还以为你急着去尼查达克呢。

String.Source: But the pumps only operate when a cube is in the pedestal. And unfortunately, I only have one cube.
String.Dest: 但是只有把方典放到基座上水泵才会运作，不幸的是，我只有一块方典。

String.Source: Then you should stay. What does the world beyond our lands have to offer that we do not?
String.Dest: 那你该留下来。外面世界有什么是我们没有的？

String.Source: The Dwemer of Nchardak appear to have been fond of these control pedestals. Luckily I found a cube to operate it inside on my last visit.
String.Dest: 尼查达克的锻莫似乎很喜欢这些控制基座。还好我上次来时找到了一块方典来操作。

String.Source: Who brought me here? They better not have touched my mushrooms. Neloth? Neloth! Is this your doing?
String.Dest: 谁把我带到这儿的？他们最好别碰我的菌类。内洛斯？内洛斯！这是你干的？

String.Source: It looks like most of the cubes were moved to the lower levels, perhaps to try to control the flooding before the city was abandoned.
String.Dest: 看来大多数的方典都转移到下层了，也许他们在放弃这座城市之前试过阻止洪水涌进来。

String.Source: But still, this temple stands. The Tree Stone remains tainted. How can we be sure the Skaal will remain free?
String.Dest: 但是，这个神殿还在。树石依旧被污染着。我们怎么确保斯卡尔不会被再次奴役？

String.Source: That was before you ruined that staff. Fix the staff and I'll teach you the spell.
String.Dest: 那是在你弄坏那把法杖之前。等你修好法杖后我再教你。

String.Source: Seems like nobody is willing to put their life on the line for research any more.
String.Dest: 看来再也没有人愿意将生命奉献给研究了。

String.Source: It's not just the bow, Deor. Your arm has grown strong and your eye sharp. You've spent many days practicing your aim.
String.Dest: 不只是弓的问题，迪乌尔。你的手臂更壮实了，眼睛更锐利了。你已经在练习准度上花了很多时间。

String.Source: That ash eating wizard is always on me about his tower. It's not my damn fault the thing withered overnight.
String.Dest: 那个吃灰的法师还在跟我抱怨他的塔。又不是我害的塔一夜间枯萎的。

String.Source: I sealed the door when I left to keep out ignorant meddlers. Let me unlock it.
String.Dest: 我离开的时候把门封起来了，避免闲杂人等进去。让我来打开吧。

String.Source: At least I think it will. Probably. Almost certainly. Of course, you never can tell.
String.Dest: 至少我是这么认为的，也许，几乎确定是这样。当然了，总有意外。

String.Source: The book is housed inside that dome. I'll need to unlock the door for us. Let's get on with it.
String.Dest: 书就放在那穹顶下面。我得先把门打开，走吧。

String.Source: I do not understand. Why would he send you, an outsider, to find me when he knows why I have come here?
String.Dest: 我不明白。为什么他会派你这样一个外人来找我。他应该知道我此行的目的。

String.Source: The All-Maker favors those who work hard to hone their skills, as you have done.
String.Dest: 造物主会眷顾那些踏实磨炼技艺的人，比如你。

String.Source: Papa, when can I go on my first hunt?
String.Dest: 爸爸，我什么时候能去打第一回猎？

String.Source: Now stand still... it's my first time casting this spell, and I don't need any additional distractions.
String.Dest: 那么站着别动……这是我第一次施放这个法术，不想受任何干扰。

String.Source: Well? What are you waiting for? Go get me that book!
String.Dest: 然后呢？你还在等什么？快给我把书拿回来啊！

String.Source: I'm sure Talvas won't mind being my test subject again.
String.Dest: 我肯定塔瓦斯不介意再当回我的实验品。

String.Source: I know why you're asking, mother. I am happy here, but I want to know more of the world outside our lands.
String.Dest: 我知道你在问什么，母亲。我在这儿很开心，但我想去了解这片土地外的世界。

String.Source: The book is housed in the main dome. I sealed the door the last time I was here, as a precaution against thieves and other meddlers.
String.Dest: 书就放在主穹顶里。我上次离开时把门封住了，用来提防小偷或是其他闲杂人等。

String.Source: Now, it's only a rumor of a whisper of a conjecture. But I think this is the place.
String.Dest: 虽然只是个推测来的谣传，但我认为就是这里了。

String.Source: Interesting. That would suggest that the city must have originally sunk during the first cataclysm of Red Mountain.
String.Dest: 有意思。这说明这座城是在第一次红山大喷发时沉没的。

String.Source: I know you faced great danger to bring this map to me. There are no words to tell how glad my heart is. Thank you, brave one.
String.Dest: 我知道你冒了很大的危险把这地图带给我。言语无法表达我内心的感动。谢谢你，勇士。

String.Source: You ducked out of the middle of a conversation with old Mora himself? Mighty impertinent of you!
String.Dest: 你在和老莫拉谈话的时候跑了？太鲁莽了吧！

String.Source: Ah! That was almost... exhilarating. How are you feeling?
String.Dest: 啊！这实在是……过瘾啊。你觉得怎么样？

String.Source: They are fierce warriors of the Forsworn tribes.
String.Dest: 他们是弃誓者部落的凶猛战士。

String.Source: This is a dangerous thing, then. We should return to my village, and show this to my father.
String.Dest: 那看来这真是危险的东西。我们应该回村里，让我父亲看看。

String.Source: All that he knows he learned from me.
String.Dest: 他所知的一切都学自于我。

String.Source: Unfortunately you don't appear to be suffering from any side effects.
String.Dest: 再说，你也没表现出任何副作用。

String.Source: Among the debris were heart stones. Even two centuries later, they still smolder with the heat of the mountain.
String.Dest: 残骸中就有心石。即使两个世纪后，它们依然在被红山的余温炙烤。

String.Source: All I need is for you to back me up. You don't even need to lie... just don't tell anyone else what you heard here.
String.Dest: 我只需要你的支持。都不需要你去撒谎……不要把在这儿听到的告诉任何人，这就够了。

String.Source: Some new blood should be enough to rouse these layabouts to actually fight again.
String.Dest: 加入新鲜血液应该足以让这些懒汉们振作起来战斗了。

String.Source: You are following in the footsteps of my servant Miraak. Like him, you are Dragonborn, and seek the power that is your birthright.
String.Dest: 你正在走过我仆人米拉克所走的路。你们都是龙裔，你和他一样都在追求那与生俱来的力量。

String.Source: We were searching the farm when the ash spawn ambushed us. Have a look around and see if you can turn up anything useful.
String.Dest: 我们在搜查农场的时候被灰烬怪伏击了。四处看看能不能找到有用的线索。

String.Source: That is my hope as well. I am trusting that you will make this sacrifice worthwhile.
String.Dest: 我也这么想呢。希望你能让我的牺牲有所价值。

String.Source: I'm still waiting for that ash sample from an ash spawn.
String.Dest: 我还等着从灰烬怪身上拿来的火山灰样本呢。

String.Source: I'm going to head back upstairs and see if the reading room has steam. If so, it should be a simple matter to release the book.
String.Dest: 我先回楼上看看阅读室有没有蒸汽。有的话，取出书来应该是轻而易举。

String.Source: And, since you need secrets that only Hermaeus Mora knows, it seems like a rather foolish thing to do. But I'm sure you know best.
String.Dest: 再说了，你需要的知识只有赫麦尤斯·莫拉才知道，那这么做就相当愚蠢了。你自己也清楚吧。

String.Source: You didn't have to speak a word. I could sense it the moment you came in.
String.Dest: 你没必要说出来，我从你进门就感觉到了。

String.Source: What's the worst that could happen? Well, you could have your mind sucked dry by Hermaeus Mora... but that's supposed to be very rare.
String.Dest: 最坏的情况是什么？嗯，也许赫麦尤斯·莫拉会吸干你的意识……但那应该是非常罕见的。

String.Source: No wonder the Dwemer were so interested in that book. It was indeed one that Miraak used to advance his power as Dragonborn.
String.Dest: 难怪锻莫对那本书如此感兴趣，米拉克确实是用了它来强化龙裔的力量。

String.Source: Too much mead. Too many stories. Too few battles.
String.Dest: 喝的多，吹的响，就是经的少。

String.Source: Who are you to dare set foot here?
After what you did for me, you are always welcome here. Just try to stay out of Master Neloth's way.
String.Dest: 你为我做了这么多，这儿永远都欢迎你。只要注意别妨碍到内洛斯大师。

String.Source: If we can restore the steam supply, I'm certain I can open the book's protective case.
String.Dest: 如果能恢复蒸汽供应，那我肯定能打开书的保护装置。

String.Source: And it is only a matter of time before Solstheim is also mine. I already control the minds of its people.
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆为我所控也是指日可待。我已经控制了人们的心智。

String.Source: Did you actually learn what you needed to know by reading that Black Book?
String.Dest: 读了黑暗经书后你学会了需要的知识了吗？

String.Source: I just can't seem to get the hang of making a decent cup of canis root tea.
String.Dest: 好像我就是不懂把犬根茶泡的好喝的窍门。

String.Source: I have some associates and correspondents who find things for me. One of them has a credible rumor on where this book might be.
String.Dest: 我有些合伙人和联络人为我找东西。其中一个可信的传言提到了这本书可能的下落。

String.Source: It makes them forget themselves, and work on these horrible creations that corrupt the Stones, the very land itself.
String.Dest: 他们忘记了自我，来建造这些腐化了圣石和这片大地的恐怖造物。

String.Source: Don't waste your time. Those things are for the weak and foolish.
String.Dest: 别浪费时间了。只有弱者和傻子才会需要那些玩意儿。

String.Source: You are Dragonborn, like Miraak before you. A seeker of knowledge and power.
String.Dest: 和之前的米拉克一样，你也是龙裔，也是知识与力量的探求者。

String.Source: I've been trying to adapt Redguard magic to the ash.
String.Dest: 我在尝试把红卫魔法和火山灰联系起来。

String.Source: Well, I'm hoping to do something similar... if I could connect a living being to the forces of the Red Mountain well... that would be formidable.
String.Dest: 嗯，我希望能做点相似的……如果我能把某个生物与红山之力联系起来……那将是令人生畏的力量。

String.Source: Hey, you lazy milk-drinkers, get over here!
String.Dest: 嘿，你们这些软蛋，给我过来！

String.Source: Ashamed. But I guess that was the point.
String.Dest: 羞愧。但那确实说到重点了。

String.Source: Well let's not waste time talking about it, then!
String.Dest: 那就不要浪费时间了，走吧！

String.Source: Master Neloth was furious when the tower withered. It just seemed to happen overnight.
String.Dest: 塔枯萎那会儿内洛斯大师气疯了。就像是一夜之间发生的。

String.Source: I've done some experiments in this area, but, well, my test subjects are far too fragile.
String.Dest: 我已经在这个领域做了些实验，但是，我的试验对象太脆弱了。

String.Source: Yes, I know. And then Miraak's power will be yours as well.
String.Dest: 很好，我就知道。而后米拉克的力量也会属于你了。

String.Source: Send her back where she came from.
I'm running low on heart stones.
It is Baldor Iron-Shaper. As our only smith, Baldor is very important to the village.
String.Dest: “塑铁者”鲍德尔。作为我们中唯一的铁匠，鲍德尔对村子来说很重要。

String.Source: My second! If we're going to take up residence here again, I need to get the blessing of Hrothmund again.
String.Dest: 我的副手！如果我们要重新在这儿安顿下来，我得再取得一次哈洛斯蒙德的赐福。

String.Source: There are some sealed doors up ahead. Perhaps you can figure out how to get them open.
String.Dest: 前面有几道锁住的门。也许你能找到开门的方法。

String.Source: What happened to you? You read the book and then...
String.Dest: 你出了什么事？读了那本书后就……

String.Source: Where? Where is he? Can we reach him? Can we kill him?
String.Dest: 哪里？他在哪儿？我们到得了吗？能宰了他吗？

String.Source: And when the world shall listen.
I'll be heading back there soon. If you're interested, meet me at the ruins and we'll see what we can find. Now I'm off to pack for the expedition!
String.Dest: 我很快就要出发去那儿了。要是有兴趣，就在废墟那里找我。我们看看能找到什么。现在我先回去整理行李准备考察。

String.Source: Back in the homeland, there are other Telvanni wizards that have them as well.
String.Dest: 在我的家乡，其他的泰瓦尼法师也有这种塔。

String.Source: I am unsure. Something has taken control of most of the people of Solstheim.
String.Dest: 我不确定。总之是控制了索瑟海姆大部分人的某个东西。

String.Source: Don't worry yourself over nothing, Deor. Do you want a head full of gray hairs before you've seen forty winters?
String.Dest: 别太担心了，迪乌尔。你想在度过四十个冬季前就满头华发吗？

String.Source: I'm hoping to learn some of the Briarheart techniques, their methods.
String.Dest: 希望能学到些荆棘之心的技术和方法。

String.Source: Well done. Here are some septims for your troubles.
String.Dest: 干得好。这几枚塞普汀是你的跑路费。

String.Source: My father Storn, our shaman, says Miraak has returned to Solstheim, but that is impossible.
String.Dest: 我父亲斯托恩是我们的萨满，他说米拉克已经重返索瑟海姆了，但那不可能。

String.Source: I am Hermaeus Mora, the Gardener of Men, knower of the unknown, master of fates. You stand in my realm, mortal.
String.Dest: 我是赫麦尤斯·莫拉，凡人的园丁，未知的知者，命运之主。你现在身处我的领域，凡人。

String.Source: Can you? Of course you can. What took you so long to ask?
String.Dest: 你能帮吗？当然可以了。怎么现在才问？

String.Source: You please me, champion. Your loyalty will be richly rewarded.
String.Dest: 你让我很满意，勇士。你的忠诚会得到丰厚的奖赏。

String.Source: Be careful, this General Carius sounds out of his mind.
String.Dest: 小心，这个卡里乌斯将军好像疯了。

String.Source: The Tree Stone is still corrupted... the land is still out of balance. But with the other five restored... it may be enough. It will have to be.
String.Dest: 树石依然处于腐化中……这方水土平衡还未恢复。但是其他五座圣石已经恢复了……这样应该就够了，不够也不行了。

String.Source: Oh yes. You rather rudely walked away. As I was saying then, have you heard of the Briarhearts?
String.Dest: 哦好嘛，你就那么无理地走开了。我刚才问过了，你听说过荆棘之心没有？

String.Source: Thank you for keeping that matter of the Ash Guardian just between us. I shudder to think what would happen if Master Neloth had found out.
String.Dest: 谢谢你替我保密了灰烬守护者的事儿。要是被内洛斯大师知道了简直不堪设想。

String.Source: I saw two elves in the far distance, dragging something behind them. Hunters often visit our lands, so I thought little of it.
String.Dest: 我远远地看见两个精灵背后拖着什么东西。因为这里常有猎人们造访，我就没想太多。

String.Source: Send him back where he came from.
Perhaps later. For now I have a slightly more personal request.
String.Dest: 以后再说吧。现在有件偏私事的请求需要你。

String.Source: Oh. Were you fishing for a compliment? A sign of gratitude?
String.Dest: 哦，你想听我夸你吗？表达感激之情？

String.Source: Then you and I both have reason to see what lies beneath us.
String.Dest: 那你我都有理由去看看下面有什么。

String.Source: Aren't you going to read it? I thought that was the whole reason you dragged me out here.
String.Dest: 你不打算去读？我以为你把我拉到这里来就是为了这事儿呢。

String.Source: I've been having difficulties with my heart stone experiments.
String.Dest: 我的心石实验有个难关。

String.Source: I suppose that was Vahlok. He must have had this entire place built for him so that he could maintain his vigil, even beyond death.
String.Dest: 我猜那是瓦洛克。他一定是为自己建了这整个地方，以便能保持警戒，至死不休。

String.Source: I wonder if a dragon could be captured alive? It would make a fascinating test subject.
String.Dest: 龙有办法被活捉吗？那肯定会是很棒的研究样本。

String.Source: They have a ship. They took me there and showed me the map. You will find it on the northern coast of the island.
String.Dest: 他们有条船，之前还把我带到那边去给我看地图。你会在岛东北海岸上找到那条船。

String.Source: Don't worry, I'll take careful notes of what happens to you.
String.Dest: 别担心，我会仔细记录你的遭遇的。

String.Source: South and west. If your road takes you that way, perhaps you could search for any sign of Baldor. The Skaal would be grateful.
String.Dest: 西南方向。你要是往那边走的话，或许可以帮我们留意下鲍德尔的下落。斯卡尔人会感激你的。

String.Source: Now I think I'll spend some more time studying this word wall. What a book this will make!
String.Dest: 现在我想要花更多的时间研究这面龙语墙。这写出来会是怎样的书啊！

String.Source: Hmm. I think I could talk the councilor into paying you, and I could use an extra pair of hands.
String.Dest: 嗯。我能说服议员付钱给你，而且我也确实需要更多人手。

String.Source: My servant Miraak would have found a way to bring me what I want. So will you, if you wish to surpass him.
String.Dest: 我的仆人米拉克总会找到办法满足我的要求。你要是想超越他，也会的。

String.Source: I am in no mood to talk, outsider. One of the Skaal has gone missing.
String.Dest: 我没心情闲聊，外来者。有个斯卡尔人失踪了。

String.Source: These are the molten rocks that lay next to the Heart of Lorkhan for millennia. Some vestige of its power must have seeped into them.
String.Dest: 这些火山岩在洛克汗之心旁埋了几千年，一定是它的部分残余能量渗透过去了。

String.Source: To Hrothmund's Barrow! I need to get his blessing again before we take up residence here.
String.Dest: 去哈洛斯蒙德的古坟！在我们安顿下来之前，我需要先重新获得他的赐福。

String.Source: That world will cease to be.
I do. It is I, Bujold. You blessed me in the past, and now I've rid the hall of Rieklings and returned it to its rightful owners.
String.Dest: 是的。是我，布约德。你曾赐福于我，如今我赶走了大厅里的瑞克灵，让它得以回归原主。

String.Source: Let us go. There is nothing more I can do here. The Tree Stone and my friends are beyond my help for now.
String.Dest: 我们走吧。在这儿也做不了什么。目前我也帮不了树石和我的朋友。

String.Source: Perhaps Storn can make sense of what is going on.
String.Dest: 也许斯托恩知道发生了什么。

String.Source: My mother put me on a boat to Skyrim. The last time I ever saw her, she was standing on the dock as my ship sailed away.
String.Dest: 我的母亲将我放到一艘开往天际的船上。她站在码头上目送我的船离开的样子，是我看到的最后一眼。

String.Source: All seekers of knowledge come to me, sooner or later.
String.Dest: 所有知识的探求者总会来找我，无非是迟早罢了。

String.Source: How to talk to the wind, how to listen to the earth - these are our secrets. Nothing of power or mastery.
String.Dest: 如何与风对话，如何聆听大地——这就是我们的秘密，与力量或统治都无关。

String.Source: Anyway, he's dead and we're alive. It's time to begin a new tradition for Thirsk. And I'm going to do that.
String.Dest: 无论如何，他已经死了，而我们还活着。现在瑟斯科需要一个新的传统了。而我会为此努力的。

String.Source: He grows ever near to us.
Do not fear for me, my daughter. This is the destiny that the All-Maker has laid out for me.
String.Dest: 别替我担心，女儿。这是造物主为我安排的命运。

String.Source: I'll have to use Talvas again, and he's a bit of a screamer.
String.Dest: 我只好再用一次塔瓦斯了，但他喜欢大呼小叫。

String.Source: I was going to search for clues that might lead me to wherever they're coming from.
String.Dest: 我在寻找一些可能会让我知道它们来源的线索。

String.Source: Hm, I do not remember Baldor acting strangely. Although, now that you ask, I did see something in the woods on the day he disappeared.
String.Dest: 嗯，印象里鲍德尔都很正常。但是，你这么一问，他失踪那天我确实在林子里看到了什么。
