String.Source: You're still acting surprisingly sane, too. What did he have to say? He must have wanted something from you.
String.Dest: 你的神志还出奇的清醒。他说了什么？一定是想从你身上得到什么吧。

String.Source: In the old stories, when the Nords came to conquer it, it's said the Dwemer submerged the entire city beneath the sea until the invaders gave up.
String.Dest: 古老传说中提到过，当诺德人入侵时，据说锻莫将整座城市沉入水中，直至入侵者们撤退。

String.Source: I know you will. And then I will give you the knowledge that you seek.
String.Dest: 我知道你会的，然后我再把你找的知识给你。

String.Source: I know you're all starting to settle in here, and keep up the fat lives you got used to up in the hall.
String.Dest: 我知道你们开始在这儿安顿下来了，然后继续过以前在大厅里的荒唐日子。

String.Source: You have entered my realm. You have sought out the forbidden knowledge that only one other has obtained.
String.Dest: 你已经进入了我的领域。你所追求的禁忌知识，过去只有一人曾获得过。

String.Source: Oh have you? Well, let me just extract those memories and I'll see if you found anything useful.
String.Dest: 哦，是吗？好吧，我来提取那些记忆，看看你是否发现了什么有用的东西。

String.Source: I'll need a witness and, well, you see the kinds of horker-brains I deal with around here. What do you say?
String.Dest: 我需要一名见证者，但是，你看我周围的人都是些海象脑。你觉得呢？

String.Source: But look here. This outsider has more fire than any of you.
String.Dest: 但是你们看看。这个外人比你们所有人都更有斗志。

String.Source: At last. I hope it was worth it. Please... be my guest. You deserve the first look.
String.Dest: 结束了。我希望咱们没白跑……请吧。第一个阅读者理应是你。

String.Source: Come find me if you decide to reconsider my request.
String.Dest: 如果你改变主意了就来找我。

String.Source: I believe that time is now. If I am wrong, may my ancestors forgive me.
String.Dest: 我认为时候到了。如果我错了，希望先祖们宽恕我吧。

String.Source: I will return to the village. When you have the map, please bring it to me there. And thank you. May the All-Maker bless your days.
String.Dest: 我要回村子了。你拿到地图后，请把它带来给我。谢谢你，愿造物主保佑你。

String.Source: I've made this special tool that will extract... well, you don't need to know the details. Just go harvest a sample.
String.Dest: 我做了这个特殊工具来萃取……嗯，你没必要知道细节，只管采集样本就行了。

String.Source: It is good to see you again, my friend. Did you find the elves at their ship?
String.Dest: 很高兴又看见你了，我的朋友。你在船上找到了那些精灵吗？

String.Source: Lead the way, then! I'll follow along behind.
If you have any with you, I'll buy one. Otherwise, I can tell you where you might find one.
String.Dest: 你要是有我就买了。或者我告诉你上哪儿找得到。

String.Source: When Red Mountain erupted almost two hundred years ago, it flung ash and rocks for hundreds of miles.
String.Dest: 大约两百年前，红山喷发时，火山灰和岩石被抛到数百里外。

String.Source: I name you friend of the Skaal, and I will trust you with the knowledge of forging Stalhrim.
String.Dest: 我承认你是斯卡尔的朋友，铸造魔冰的知识也可以传给你了。

String.Source: Until our next meeting, Skaal-friend, may your hunts always bring you game and your crops grow tall and bountiful.
String.Dest: 下次再见，斯卡尔之友。愿你狩猎时不缺猎物，庄稼四季丰收。

String.Source: Outsider! I remember you. You are the one who freed the Skaal from the dark spell.
String.Dest: 外来者！我记得你。就是你把斯卡尔人从那黑暗法术拯救出来。

String.Source: Enchanted ice as hard as iron and cold as death. Stalhrim can be forged into deadly weapons, but the art is known only to smiths of the Skaal.
String.Dest: 是附魔过的冰，铁一般硬，死亡一样冰冷。魔冰可以被铸造成致命武器，但只有斯卡铁匠才知道这种技术。

String.Source: We brought ourselves out here, along with our shame.
String.Dest: 这是我们自找的，耻辱也是咎由自取。

String.Source: I don't want to have my spirit outstripped by some wanderer. So let's get up there and kill us some Rieklings!
String.Dest: 我不希望我们的斗志输给一个漫游者。我们现在就上山杀几个瑞克灵吧！

String.Source: Please, do not let Ancarion make his weapons. Kill him or let him live, but take the map from him. It belongs with the Skaal.
String.Dest: 拜托了，不要让安卡利昂打造他的武器。杀了他或者放了他，但是一定要拿走他的地图。那属于斯卡尔。

String.Source: Deor, you must be calm. I'm sure there's a good reason Baldor left us.
String.Dest: 迪乌尔，你要冷静下来。我敢肯定鲍德尔离开我们是有原因的。

String.Source: Look what's happened to us so far under his watchful eye. He gave his blessing to all the leaders who brought us to this point.
String.Dest: 看看在他的监视下我们至今都遇到了什么吧。每位首领都曾得到过他的赐福，但在他们的带领下我们却走到了这一步。

String.Source: It makes my heart heavy that you don't believe me, Fanari. Baldor could be in danger, and you will do nothing.
String.Dest: 你不相信我可太让我失望了，法娜丽。鲍德尔可能身处险境，而你什么也不做。

String.Source: All I had to do was mention our little infestation, and he volunteered in a second!
String.Dest: 我只是稍微跟他提了下我们的麻烦，他马上就自告奋勇了！

String.Source: Then... the leadership is not mine?
As shaman, it is my duty to guard these secrets, but also to decide when it is necessary to give them up.
String.Dest: 作为萨满，我有职责守护这些秘密，但也要决定什么时候该放弃它们。

String.Source: Well done, my champion. Your journey towards enlightenment has finally led you here, to my realm, as I knew it would.
String.Dest: 干得好，我的勇士。你的启蒙之路最终指引你到了这里，我的领域，正如我所料。
那可真是出乎我意料的情况。

String.Source: I heard you fought a dragon. That must have been terrifying.
String.Dest: 听说你跟一条龙战斗过。那场面肯定很恐怖。

String.Source: Give me the book. I will read it, and speak to old Herma-Mora myself. I will make sure he lives up to his part of the bargain.
String.Dest: 把书给我吧，我来读，然后和老赫玛-莫拉谈谈。我会确保他遵守承诺。

String.Source: No one knows really. Superstitious folk say they're the risen forms of those that died long ago, but I'm not so certain.
String.Dest: 没人知道。迷信的人说他们是很久以前死去之人的一种复生，但我不太确定。

String.Source: Our wedding is soon, under Mara's loving eyes. It'll be perfect.
String.Dest: 我们的婚礼快开始了，在玛拉的深情注视下。太完美了。

String.Source: Thanks... I wasn't sure I'd make it off this farm alive.
String.Dest: 感谢……我不确定能活着走出这个农场。

String.Source: Now through them does he speak.
That seems to have done it. Good. It took longer than I'd hoped, but at least it's finally done.
String.Dest: 看来我们成功了，很好。时间花的有点久，但至少最后搞定了。

String.Source: Now through him do we see.
Give me a moment. I still have flashback from when Master Neloth changed you.
String.Dest: 给我点时间。我还记得内洛斯大师改变你时的情景。

String.Source: Miraak served me well, and was rewarded. I can grant you the same power as he wields, but all knowledge has its price.
String.Dest: 米拉克是个优秀的仆人，也获得了奖赏。我能赐予你他所运用的力量，但知识是有代价的。

String.Source: If you bring Stalhrim here to my forge, you can use my tools to make what you will from it.
String.Dest: 有魔冰就带到我这儿来吧，工具和炉子都随你使用。

String.Source: I was afraid you might say that. Well, looks as though I'll have to prove my mettle against you now.
String.Dest: 就怕你会这么说呢。那么，看来我得向你证明我的勇毅了。

String.Source: You'd think Neloth was still a clan leader in House Telvanni the way he carries on.
String.Dest: 你看内洛斯的作风会以为他还是泰瓦尼家的领袖。

String.Source: No. Not yet. I have watched your progress through my realm with growing interest.
String.Dest: 不，还不是时候。我一直在透过领域观察你的进展，也越来越感兴趣。

String.Source: You should read the book again until you reach what appears to be the "end" - then you will have fully understood the knowledge it contains.
String.Dest: 你应该再把书看一遍，直到你到了它的“终章”——那会儿你才能完全理解里面蕴含的知识。

String.Source: I need to return to Thirsk.
You were in Apocrypha. Or at least your consciousness was - your body remained here of course.
String.Dest: 你去了异典。或者至少你的意识进去了——身体当然还留在这儿。

String.Source: That's a fairly common experience, at least for those who remain coherent enough to report what they've seen.
String.Dest: 这是一种相当普遍的经历，至少对那些还足够清醒，能汇报自己看到了什么的人来说。

String.Source: I hope you've reconsidered lending me a hand. Could really use it right now.
String.Dest: 希望你能重新考虑下，帮我一把。现在真的很需要。

String.Source: But I assume there's some bad news. It would be unlike Hermaeus Mora to allow anyone to gain such knowledge without exacting a price.
String.Dest: 但我想你也带回了些坏消息吧？赫麦尤斯·莫拉可不像是会允许别人不付代价白拿这种知识的主。

String.Source: So I just need to take hold of it...
Hermaeus Mora learns some fascinating new ways to skin a horker, and you become the second most powerful Dragonborn that ever lived.
String.Dest: 赫麦尤斯·莫拉会得到新的海象剥皮法，而你会成为有史以来第二强大的龙裔。

String.Source: Oh good. Be sure to say hello to Hermaeus Mora for me, if you see him.
String.Dest: 好吧。你要是见到赫麦尤斯·莫拉，就替我问个好。

String.Source: Hmph. What secrets could they have worth keeping from old Mora? Sounds like a bargain to me.
String.Dest: 哼。他们的秘密怎么会值得向老莫拉隐瞒呢？听起来很值得换啊。

String.Source: Since you're brimming with self-confidence, maybe you'd care to take over for me?
String.Dest: 既然你充满自信，要不帮我处理这事儿？

String.Source: Master Neloth! What have you done to her?
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师！你对她做了什么？

String.Source: There has to be a clue around here somewhere.
At last, the Skaal yield up their secrets to me.
String.Dest: 结束了，斯卡尔人将他们的秘密献给我了。

String.Source: Dragonborn, you have delivered me the gift I requested.
String.Dest: 龙裔，你把我要的礼物给带来了。

String.Source: I need you to examine one of them. Just investigate as much as you can.
String.Dest: 我需要你去检查一个，不要错过任何细节。

String.Source: Besides, it could be very dangerous. These books are known to drive many people insane.
String.Dest: 再说了，那玩意儿可能非常危险。听说这些书会把人逼疯。

String.Source: In return, I keep my promise, as befits a Prince of Oblivion: I give you the Word of Power that you need to challenge Miraak.
String.Dest: 作为回报，我会遵守我的承诺，以湮灭君王的名义：把你挑战米拉克所需要的力量之语给你。

String.Source: But I see that new leader's coming is yet far off the distant horizon.
String.Dest: 但是我知道，选出新首领的时机还远远未到。

String.Source: I know it sounds crazy, but it's almost like they're becoming more organized and probing it for weaknesses.
String.Dest: 我知道这听起来很蠢，但它们就像是变得更有条理了，而且在试探薄弱之处。

String.Source: If you won't help me, then I'll ask the All-Maker to send someone else who can.
String.Dest: 你要是不帮我，那我就请造物主派别人来。

String.Source: All I had to do was mention our little infestation, and she volunteered in a second!
String.Dest: 我只是稍微跟她提了下我们的麻烦，她马上就自告奋勇了！

String.Source: You will be either a worthy opponent or his successor, as the tides of fate decree.
String.Dest: 你会成为他不可小觑的对手，或是继任者，一切由命运之潮来决定。

String.Source: Go forth and seek your fortunes. Inhabit the hall as you may. In time, a true leader worthy of the Thirsk name may arise.
String.Dest: 去寻找你的出路吧，想住就住在大厅里。瑟斯科迟早会有一个名副其实的首领。

String.Source: You allowed your fellow warriors to grow weak while the dangers around you mounted.
String.Dest: 是你让你的战士们变得软弱，而周遭的危险因素与日俱增。

String.Source: And well it is that this has happened. But I have always watched, and know that it was your softness that lead to your own exile.
String.Dest: 虽然事实如此。但我一直有在观察，就是你的软弱导致了现在的情形。

String.Source: Exactly. Something has to be directing them against us and we need to find out who, or what it is.
String.Dest: 没错。有东西在指使它们来攻击我们。不管是谁还是什么东西，我们都得找出来。

String.Source: Please, go right ahead. I have plenty to occupy me for the moment.
String.Dest: 请吧，去看啊。我还有很多事情要做。

String.Source: No matter what Hrothmund says, we need a leader. And I'm still the best person for that.
String.Dest: 不管哈洛斯蒙德怎么说，我们都需要一位首领。我也还是最佳人选。

String.Source: With tenacity and numbers. Didn't help that we'd grown a little too comfortable up there.
String.Dest: 他们韧性很强且人多势众。而我们也确实在上面过的太安逸了。

String.Source: Oh, come on now. I'm going to need you to perk up if you're going to come with me as my second.
String.Dest: 哦，得了吧。如果你接下来要当我的副手，得打起精神来啊。

String.Source: Good to hear! In fact... that's just the spirit I'll need from my second. Do you want to come with me?
String.Dest: 说得好！实际上……我的副手正需要这样的气魄。想和我一起来吗？

String.Source: Something isn't right, Fanari. I feel it in my bones and I smell it in the air. Baldor wouldn't leave without telling someone.
String.Dest: 事情不对劲，法娜丽。我骨子里能感觉到，空气也闻得出来。鲍德尔不会瞒着大家离开。

String.Source: What happened? What did you see? Different people have very different experiences when reading these books.
String.Dest: 怎么样？你看到了什么？不同的人看了书会有非常不同的体验。

String.Source: However, he seems to run the place well enough.
String.Dest: 不过，他把这儿管的还不错。

String.Source: Excellent. If this works, I'll prepare a version that you can cast yourself, if you ever wish to inflict... er, study silence.
String.Dest: 好极了。有效果的话，我会帮你准备一个能自己用的版本，你可能会想整蛊……呃，研究沉默。

String.Source: No. Nor is there any among you fit to serve. For a band in the wilderness, it is better to have no leader than a poor one.
String.Dest: 不能。你们中也没人能胜任了。对于一伙在野外谋生的人来说，没有首领总比糟糕的首领要好。

String.Source: Your progress since obtaining my Oghma Infinium has been rapid. And now, I find you here, following in my servant Miraak's footsteps.
String.Dest: 自从你得到我的无限智典后，进步飞速。如今，你已经在追随我的仆人米拉克的脚步。

String.Source: Good. See that you do. Now, if you'll excuse me, I have a hall to lead.
String.Dest: 很好。请你遵守承诺。那么，我先走了，大伙儿还等我领导呢。

String.Source: I think the key concept I'm missing is recorded in Afa-Saryat's book, Wind and Sand.
String.Dest: 我想缺少的那个关键素材就记录在阿法-萨亚特的书《风与沙》里。

String.Source: Hmm. I do have a new spell I'm working on. I hope to be able to conjure ash spawn.
String.Dest: 嗯，我在研究一个新的法术。希望可以用来召唤灰烬怪。

String.Source: Yes, yes. I'll write it out, and you can pick up a copy from Talvas in a few days.
String.Dest: 好，好。我要把它写下来，几天后你就可以找塔瓦斯要本抄件。

String.Source: In any case, this is truly amazing. I think I can adapt this into a sort of whirlwind vortex energy.
String.Dest: 无论如何，这可太棒了。我想可以把这个改造成某种旋风涡流能量。

String.Source: I do know that heart stones sometimes raise ash spawn from the bits of bone buried in the nearby ash.
String.Dest: 我可以确定心石有时会用埋在附近灰烬里的碎骨，召唤出灰烬怪。

String.Source: So? Do you have it? Did you get my book?
String.Dest: 怎么样？你拿到了吗？拿到我的书了吗？

String.Source: Nchardak. The 'City of a Hundred Towers'. In its day, it was the largest of the great Dwemer Archives, and perhaps the most advanced.
String.Dest: 尼查达克。意为“百塔之城”。在那个年代，它是最大的锻莫档案馆，或许还是技术最先进的。

String.Source: I have my doubts. But the city was a marvel of Dwemer engineering. Now... reduced to this.
String.Dest: 我对此有些怀疑，但这座城市是锻莫工程的一个奇迹。现在……降到这儿了。

String.Source: Well, I believe I've discovered a new form of silence. Some philosophers postulate seven orders of silence, but I believe there's an eighth.
String.Dest: 嗯，我认为我发现了一种新的沉默形式。一些哲人假定有七种沉默，但我认为有第八种。

String.Source: Me? I don't care what they're called... all I know is they're a danger to Raven Rock and they need to be stopped.
String.Dest: 我吗？我不在乎它们叫什么……我只知道它们对鸦石镇构成威胁，必须被阻止。

String.Source: Here, you deserve a bit of reward for your efforts... that was a lengthy trip for you, I'm sure!
String.Dest: 拿着，你的努力配得上我打点儿赏……肯定是场漫长的旅行吧！

String.Source: Master Neloth! What have you done to him?
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师！你对他做了什么？

String.Source: The spell that is. I think I can fix the spell. It should only take a couple more years.
String.Dest: 这个法术也一样，我想是能修正的。应该只需要几年。

String.Source: It's nothing that can't be fixed.
String.Dest: 没什么是我不能修正的。

String.Source: I suppose I do. It's too bad it wore off so quickly though.
String.Dest: 我想是的。可惜它失效太快了。

String.Source: Together we form House Telvanni, one of the great houses of Morrowind. The great houses rule what is left of our once proud nation.
String.Dest: 我们一起建立了泰瓦尼家这个晨风大家族。大家族们统治着我们那个曾经为之骄傲的国度剩下的一切。

String.Source: You've proven your worth, and I'm as good as my word. Take this staff from my personal collection. I think you'll find it useful.
String.Dest: 你证明了自己的价值，我也会遵守承诺。这把法杖是我的私人收藏，你应该用得上。

String.Source: The connecting soul thread is knotted three times, once for the heart, once for the spirit, and once for the body.
String.Dest: 灵魂连结丝线打了三个结，一次在于心脏，一次在于精神，一次在于身体。

String.Source: It's easy to criticize when you're just a visitor here.
String.Dest: 当个过客说风凉话当然简单了。

String.Source: Yes. That was a lifetime ago.
String.Dest: 对啊。就像上辈子的事情了。

String.Source: If I could get a sample of ash from an ash spawn, that would be quite useful.
String.Dest: 要是我有灰烬怪身上的火山灰样本就好了，那东西应该很有用。

String.Source: In the mean time, take this for helping me.
String.Dest: 还有，这是你帮我的酬劳。

String.Source: If you come back in a day or two I should have the spell worked out. You can buy it from Talvas.
String.Dest: 你过个一两天回来，我应该就把法术完成了。你可以在塔瓦斯那儿买。

String.Source: Ancient lore, handed down from shaman to shaman since the All-Maker first gave Solstheim to the Skaal.
String.Dest: 啊，是祖传的知识，当造物主最初将索瑟海姆交给斯卡尔人时，就由萨满们代代相传了。

String.Source: You also are Dragonborn. You also seek to learn how to bend the world to your will.
String.Dest: 你也是个龙裔，也在寻求如何让世界屈服于你的意志之下。

String.Source: Well, Carius was the Imperial garrison commander at Fort Frostmoth, but he died over 200 years ago when the Red Mountain leveled the place.
String.Dest: 嗯，卡里乌斯曾经是霜蛾堡的帝国要塞指挥官，但他在两百年前红山喷发掩埋这里的时候就死了。

String.Source: Besides, I don't feel comfortable leaving Raven Rock behind, and I'd hate to lose any more Redoran Guard.
String.Dest: 另外，我没法放心丢下鸦石镇不管，也不想再损失更多瑞多然卫兵了。

String.Source: Remarkable, isn't it? This tomb has been hidden for... well, who knows how long. Many centuries, I would think.
String.Dest: 很惊人，对吧？这座墓穴被埋藏了……嗯，天晓得有多久。几百年吧，我猜。

String.Source: From there, you're on your own. I'm given to understand that they are not difficult to find, if you gather my inference.
String.Dest: 到了那边就靠你自己了。要是根据我的推断来，就不难找到他们。

String.Source: Well that gives me a lot to think about. I need to get back to Tel Mithryn. I have some ideas about how to locate more of these Black Books...
String.Dest: 嗯，这次启发不小，得回泰尔·米斯瑞恩了。我大概知道怎么定位其它的黑暗经书了……

String.Source: All right, then. I'll be waiting there whenever your honor wakes you.
String.Dest: 好吧，那么。我就在那儿等你的荣誉感驱使你过来了。

String.Source: Good, I can use all the help I can get.
String.Dest: 很好，所有帮助我都用得上。

String.Source: Everything that can go wrong is going wrong. Ash spawn attacks, my house, and even my steward is assassinated.
String.Dest: 凡是可能出岔子的事儿都出了。灰烬怪袭击、我的房子，就连我的管家都被暗杀了。

String.Source: I had to clean out the riff-raff last time I was here, too. Where do they come from?
String.Dest: 上次来的时候我也清理了这么一批乌合之众。他们到底是哪儿冒出来的？

String.Source: I was just a young girl when Red Mountain erupted. Master Neloth was already old.
String.Dest: 红山喷发时我还只是个小女孩。而内洛斯大师已经很老了。

String.Source: The man makes a dreadful cup of canis root tea.
String.Dest: 那家伙泡的犬根茶难喝的要死。

String.Source: I am Frea of the Skaal. I am here to either save my people, or avenge them.
String.Dest: 我是斯卡尔村的芙瑞雅，来这儿是要解救我的族人，或是为他们报仇。

String.Source: No, no, my wounds are not serious. I don't think the elves were trying to harm me. Perhaps they intended to frighten me.
String.Dest: 没，不用，我的伤都不严重。我不认为那些精灵是要伤害我。可能他们只想吓唬我。

String.Source: Don't just stand there. Go get my book!
String.Dest: 别光站在那儿啊，去把我的书拿来！

String.Source: They started attacking the Bulwark a few weeks ago. My men were able to kill them, but they keep coming back.
String.Dest: 它们从几周前开始袭击防护堤。我的手下有能力杀了它们，但还是不断地来。

String.Source: The only thing I can do.
Well, look who's back. You ready to finally help us take out those Rieklings?
String.Dest: 哦，看是谁回来了。你准备好帮我们赶走那些瑞克灵了吗？

String.Source: You could spend a hundred lifetimes searching my library, and you will never find what you seek.
String.Dest: 你可以花上几百辈子在我的图书馆里查找，但是永远也找不到你要的。

String.Source: This is a Telvanni tower. It's my citadel, grown from the spores of the giant fungus trees found in Morrowind.
String.Dest: 这是一座泰瓦尼塔。我这座城堡，是由在晨风发现的巨型真菌树的孢子长出来的。

String.Source: Indeed. I knew that the Dragon Priests were thought to have been powerful men of great will, but I had no idea.
String.Dest: 确实。我知道龙祭司们被认为是力量强大，意志坚定的人，但没想到是这样。

String.Source: Maybe now we can finally begin what we came here for.
String.Dest: 也许我们现在终于可以开始此行的目的了。

String.Source: You should read it. I'd really like to see what happens.
String.Dest: 你该读这本书。我很期待会发生什么。

String.Source: Have you heard of the Briarhearts?
You will serve me, willing or not. All who seek after the secrets of the world are my servants.
String.Dest: 你会侍奉我的，无关意愿。世上所有探求秘密之人都是我的仆从。

String.Source: How amazing! A real Dragon Priest! In all my years as a historian, I never thought I'd see anything like that.
String.Dest: 太了不起了！一位真正的龙祭司！当了这么多年的历史学者，从没想过能看到那样的东西。

String.Source: It's as if Tel Mithryn is cursed. Spoiled food, ash spawn attacks, my servants constantly getting sick. What's next?
String.Dest: 泰尔·米斯瑞恩就像被诅咒了。食物腐坏、灰烬怪袭击，连仆人们都不断地生病。还会有什么呢？

String.Source: You seek my blessing for the leadership of Thirsk Hall?
String.Dest: 你想要我给瑟斯科大厅首领的赐福吗？

String.Source: By Malacath's toenails, where did that come from?
String.Dest: 玛拉凯斯的脚趾头啊，那玩意儿从哪儿冒出来的？

String.Source: Yes, it worked! The steam is flowing. Now it should be as simple as...
String.Dest: 很好，成功了！蒸汽开始流动了。接下来应该很简单……

String.Source: Well, I suppose I've seen everything I came for, and you kept up your end of the bargain. I promised payment, and here it is.
String.Dest: 嗯，我已经看完了此行的目的，你也履行了承诺。这是我答应你的报酬。

String.Source: There are dark magics at work here. Ready yourself.
String.Dest: 这里有黑暗魔法的影响。做好准备。

String.Source: It seemed as though you were not really here. I could see you, but also see through you!
String.Dest: 像是不在这里真实存在了。我看得到你，但视线也可以透过你！

String.Source: You need to either help us or stop coming around here.
String.Dest: 要么帮我们的忙，要么别过来了。

String.Source: No. Look around you. You have done nothing here on your own.
String.Dest: 错，看看周围吧。你在这儿什么都做不了。

String.Source: We've had two other assaults on the Bulwark at different spots on the wall.
String.Dest: 之前防护堤已经被袭击过两次了，是在城墙上不同的位置。

String.Source: And when the world shall see.
The Forsworn live in the hills on the western edge of Skyrim.
String.Dest: 弃誓者部落就在天际西部丘陵上活动。

String.Source: The mead hall, up there on the hill. We were... some Rieklings have taken it over.
String.Dest: 就是山上的那个蜜酒厅，我们被……一些瑞克灵把那地方抢走了。

String.Source: The knot gives the connection a strength that may be the key that I've been looking for.
String.Dest: 这种结点给了连结一种力量，可能是我一直在找的关键。

String.Source: I presume you are blind, given the state of your eyes.
String.Dest: 我猜你是瞎了吧，从你眼睛的情况来看。

String.Source: This book... It seems wrong, somehow. Here, yet... not. It may be what we seek.
String.Dest: 这本书……感觉不对劲。但是……可能就是我在找的。

String.Source: They actually remove their own hearts, and replace them with large briar seeds. It puts their lifesparks in direct connection to the natural forces.
String.Dest: 摘除了自己的心脏，换成了荆棘种子。这样就把生命之源和自然之力直接联系起来了。

String.Source: I've already learned more than I would have in twice the time at the College of Winterhold.
String.Dest: 我在这边学到的东西是在冬堡学院的两倍多。

String.Source: I'm simply honoring a fellow departed Dunmer.
String.Dest: 我只是来祭奠一位逝去的丹莫同胞。

String.Source: He underestimated the Redoran Guard. They were organized and brought a swift end to the coup.
String.Dest: 他低估了瑞多然卫兵。他们训练有素，迅速平息了这场政变。

String.Source: I maintain a few contacts in other Dunmer settlements across Tamriel.
String.Dest: 我和全泰姆瑞尔的一些丹莫聚落都有联系。

String.Source: I do. I've received some information from my sources that there could be elements of Ulen's house, House Hlaalu, already in Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 是的。我从线人那里得到了些消息，鸦石镇可能已经有一伙乌伦家或者哈拉鲁家的人了。

String.Source: Oh, and they need to know how to brew tea. Ulves always waters it down.
String.Dest: 哦，还必须要知道如何泡茶。乌尔维斯总是加太多水。

String.Source: Finally. Someone who recognizes my importance around here.
String.Dest: 这里总算是有人意识到我的重要性了。

String.Source: Nasty bitches, aren't they? Here's your fee.
String.Dest: 难搞的狗东西，对吧？这是你的钱。

String.Source: They've contributed coin, food, supplies... even helped repair a few of the buildings in town with their own hands.
String.Dest: 他们捐了钱、食物和物资……甚至还亲手帮助修复了镇上的几座建筑。

String.Source: You may have heard of him. He's a famous Telvanni wizard.
String.Dest: 你可能听说过他，一位很著名的泰瓦尼法师。

String.Source: Nice to see a fellow Dunmer following the traditional customs.
String.Dest: 很高兴看到一个遵循传统习俗的丹莫同胞。

String.Source: Oh, no bother. We all have a right to be here.
String.Dest: 哦，没关系。我们都有来这里的权利。

String.Source: You have many things I wish to buy.
String.Dest: 你这儿有很多我想买的东西。

String.Source: Haggling with you can be so...entertaining.
String.Dest: 跟你讨价还价还真是……有意思。

String.Source: Well, well. You have proven to be a more valuable ally than I anticipated.
String.Dest: 好啊。你证明了自己，是个比我原来认为还有用的盟友。

String.Source: Maybe two hundred years ago they were.
If you were to wait inside for whomever that is, I'm betting they'll have some of the answers you're looking for.
String.Dest: 你要是在里面等那个人，我赌他们会有你要找的答案。

String.Source: Hail, thuri. Your thu'um has the mastery. Climb aboard and I will carry you to Miraak.
String.Dest: 向您致敬，图瑞。您的吐'目征服了我。骑上来吧，我会带您去找米拉克的。

String.Source: People have mentioned it's a bit odd about how close in age Mirri appears to be to her father, but that's hardly a cause for alarm.
String.Dest: 有人说过，米莉看上去和她父亲的年纪太相近了，但这并不值得大惊小怪。

String.Source: No, I just think he's going about this the wrong way.
String.Dest: 不，我只是认为他的方法错了。

String.Source: It's a good thing you've always lived here on Solstheim.
String.Dest: 你能一辈子待在索瑟海姆是好事。

String.Source: What makes you think I haven't?
Their collaboration with the Empire may have given them unrivaled political and economic strength, but their hearts weren't with the Dunmer people.
String.Dest: 他们在与帝国的合作中可能赢得了无与伦比的政治和经济力量，但是却不把心放在丹莫人民上。

String.Source: I'm afraid that one day I'll awaken and discover him dead, and I don't want it to come to that.
String.Dest: 我就怕某天醒来发现他死了，我不希望事态发展到那种地步。

String.Source: Let me get you the rest of the list tomorrow. I'm just too busy to think about this right now.
String.Dest: 我明天再跟你说其他的，现在太忙了，没空想这个。

String.Source: How about some vampire dust? Bring me some of that and I'll pay handsomely.
String.Dest: 有吸血鬼灰烬吗？带些给我，我会给个好价钱。

String.Source: Bilgemuck prize beast. You find, he follow.
I heard you paid my debt to Mogrul. I don't know how I can every repay you.
String.Dest: 听说你帮我还了莫古尔的债，真不知道怎么感谢你。

String.Source: Since there aren't any Ulens left on this island, I've taken it upon myself to leave the traditional offering in their stead.
String.Dest: 因为岛上已经没有乌伦家的人了，所以我自愿为他们送上传统供品。

String.Source: Vvardenfell is covered in ash. Red Mountain makes sure of that.
String.Dest: 瓦登费尔都被火山灰埋了，有红山当然就是这样。

String.Source: Now they say those green lands are ash covered too.
String.Dest: 他们说绿地现在也被火山灰埋了。

String.Source: Forgive my surprise, it's just that I wouldn't expect that sort of behavior from someone who isn't Dunmer.
String.Dest: 请原谅我的惊诧，我只是没想到这种行为会发生在外族人身上。

String.Source: You got a briarheart? That's what I really need. Neloth keeps taking all of mine.
String.Dest: 有荆棘之心吗？我真的需要那玩意儿。内洛斯老是把我的拿走。

String.Source: Well, I could use a daedra heart. Can't grow that in my garden.
String.Dest: 嗯，我需要一颗迪德拉之心。我自己种不出来。

String.Source: Who brought me here? I demand to know who did this!
String.Dest: 谁带我来这儿的？我要知道是谁干的！

String.Source: That chamber has been withered for too long.
String.Dest: 那个房间已经枯萎很久了。

String.Source: Taproot? That's all? Add it to the Raven Rock list.
String.Dest: 直立根？没了？那就加到去鸦石镇的清单上。

String.Source: I'm simply honoring a fellow departed Dunmer, and you hurl baseless accusations at me?
String.Dest: 我不过是在祭奠一位逝去的丹莫同胞，你就无缘无故地污蔑我？

String.Source: Bah! Patience is for the young. An old dunmer like me can't afford it.
String.Dest: 呸！只有年轻人才有耐心，我这个老丹莫等不起。

String.Source: Oh, excuse me! I didn't realize there was anyone else here.
String.Dest: 哦，抱歉！我不知道这里有人。

String.Source: Tilisu is wife to the family patriarch, Vendil. They have a single child, a daughter named Mirri.
String.Dest: 蒂莉苏是这户人家的家长文德尔的妻子。他们育有一女叫米莉。

String.Source: Well, well. Adril's got himself a spy, does he?
String.Dest: 嘿嘿。阿德尔都有密探了，是吧？

String.Source: He arrived alone, but spread enough coin around to start changing people's minds.
String.Dest: 他来时是一个人，但是在这儿花了很多钱来改变人们的想法。

String.Source: Azura knows he needs all the help he can get. He's been chasing the Ulens for years now.
String.Dest: 连阿祖拉都知道他需要任何能得到的帮助，他追逐乌伦家已经好些年了。

String.Source: If you want to catch those slippery slaughterfish, you need to let them come to you.
String.Dest: 如果想抓到那些滑溜溜的食人鱼，就得让它们主动来找你。

String.Source: Come on, let's get up there.
You can thank me if it works. Until then, I'd head to the tomb and wait until your visitor shows up.
String.Dest: 有用的话再谢吧。在那之前，我要是你就会去坟里等着客人现身呢。

String.Source: Where is your list of things you need from Raven Rock?
String.Dest: 你的鸦石镇采购清单呢？

String.Source: Master Neloth is going to be casting some rather loud spells in the next day or two.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师会在接下来一两天施放一些噪音很大的法术。

String.Source: For now, not much. But in a few decades when I return to Vvardenfell, you would be seen as Morrowind nobility.
String.Dest: 目前来说没什么。但到我几十年后回瓦登费尔去时，你会被人们视为晨风贵族。

String.Source: Back in 95, Vilur Ulen came to Raven Rock with a plan to take over our town.
String.Dest: 在95年，维勒·乌伦带着一个接管鸦石镇的计划来到了这里。

String.Source: Since the ash yam is born of the very same soil, it represents rebirth and renewal... the fact that life ends and begins anew.
String.Dest: 因为灰烬薯是相同土壤上长出来的，也就象征着重生和更新……即生命周而复始的真相。

String.Source: You could have cleaned it. It's still bloody. Here's your money.
String.Dest: 你该洗一下的，上面还有血迹呢。这是你的钱。

String.Source: Hlaalu deserved every bit of the hatred they received once the Empire released its grasp on Morrowind.
String.Dest: 在帝国放松了对晨风的控制后，哈拉鲁所受的憎恶都是活该。

String.Source: Elynea is waiting for fresh taproot before she can regrow that chamber.
String.Dest: 艾琳娜需要新鲜的直立根才能重新培植房间。

String.Source: Oh, and remind Elynea that she needs to fix my tower.
String.Dest: 哦，提醒艾琳娜记得给我修塔。

String.Source: I supposed you want to be asked nicely. Very well.
String.Dest: 我猜你要我礼貌地向你问好，好吧。

String.Source: Well, somebody needs to get me a new steward. It might as well be you.
String.Dest: 嗯，可总要有人帮我找个新管家啊，你可能就合适。

String.Source: Raven Rock is a small settlement, so it's hard to accomplish anything in secret.
String.Dest: 鸦石镇是个小聚落，在这里很难进行秘密行动。

String.Source: Obviously not, or you would have a cup of tea in your hands.
String.Dest: 当然不是，不然你手上就该端一杯茶。

String.Source: Ah, a fresh mortal who seeks to bargain with me.
String.Dest: 啊，有个想和我谈生意的活人。

String.Source: Once word gets out, there will be a lot of people to choose from.
String.Dest: 消息一旦传开，肯定会有一大堆人来报名。

String.Source: Most hail from House Redoran, but there are a few from other houses.
String.Dest: 大多数是瑞多然家的，但也有少部分别家的。

String.Source: I am a master wizard of the House Telvanni. Other people make tea for me.
String.Dest: 我可是泰瓦尼的高等巫师，我的茶都是别人帮我泡的。

String.Source: At least you don't have to taste every time to see if it's brewed right.
String.Dest: 至少你不像我一样，每次泡完还得试喝。

String.Source: In the mean time, we would keep a bed and chest here for you.
String.Dest: 现在的话，我们会在这儿给你留个床和箱子。

String.Source: They're quite wealthy and they've been quite generous by sharing their fortune with the community.
String.Dest: 他们很富有，也非常慷慨地与社区分享他们的财富。

String.Source: We family. We strong, you stronger.
String.Dest: 我们家人。我们壮，你更壮。

String.Source: I don't know how he drinks that stuff.
String.Dest: 不懂为什么他要喝那玩意儿。

String.Source: Just make sure that you find solid evidence. If I accuse them without it, I'll be the laughingstock of the colony.
String.Dest: 务必要找到确凿的证据。要是没有证据就指控他们，我会成为整个聚落的笑柄。

String.Source: Zu'u fent aam. I am at your command.
String.Dest: 祖'乌 芬特 阿姆。我听命于您。

String.Source: Hail, thuri. Shall we fly together?
String.Dest: 向您致敬，图瑞。我们一起飞翔吧？

String.Source: Climb on and we will smite our enemies.
String.Dest: 爬上来，我们一起击溃敌人。

String.Source: Ah, sweet Oblivion. Soon I shall return.
String.Dest: 啊，甜美的湮灭。我很快就会回来的。

String.Source: Tel Mithryn. It's the home of Master Neloth.
String.Dest: 泰尔·米斯瑞恩。内洛斯大师的居所。

String.Source: Vilur tried to run, but he was caught by Captain Veleth himself.
String.Dest: 维勒试图逃跑，但被维黎斯队长亲自逮到。

String.Source: When a Dunmer is laid to rest, the body is burned and returned to the ashen soil.
String.Dest: 当丹莫去世后，遗体会被火化，然后回归灰质土壤。

String.Source: No. Talvas is his apprentice. I'm his steward. I manage the day to day affairs of Tel Mithryn.
String.Dest: 不。塔瓦斯才是他的学徒。我是他的管家，负责处理泰尔·米斯瑞恩的日常事务。

String.Source: It's a bit dried up, but it will do. Here.
String.Dest: 有点干燥了，但还能用。拿着。

String.Source: Elynea is our alchemist. She specializes in mushrooms and other types of fungus.
String.Dest: 艾琳娜是我们的炼金术师。她的专业领域是菌类研究。

String.Source: Talvas is Master Neloth's apprentice. If you are interested in spells, he might be willing to sell you some.
String.Dest: 塔瓦斯是内洛斯大师的学徒。如果你对法术感兴趣，他可能会卖给你一些。

String.Source: I heard Mogrul is dead. That is a relief!
String.Dest: 我听说莫古尔死了，终于解脱了！

String.Source: Are you going to Raven Rock soon? I need some thing.
String.Dest: 你要去鸦石镇吗？我需要一些东西。

String.Source: What with all the ash spawn on the road these days, I'm not leaving until the trip is worth it.
String.Dest: 现在路上都是灰烬怪，要是没必要我也不想去。

String.Source: No strange. Strong. You strong, make us stronger. Help tribe-kin.
String.Dest: 不怪。壮实。你壮，让我们更壮。帮助部落血亲。

String.Source: Soon. Be patient. Ulves is still making his list. And of course Master Neloth keeps adding to his.
String.Dest: 快了，你要耐心点。乌尔维斯还在开他的单子，内洛斯大师当然还要加些东西。

String.Source: If you have the evidence and it places your life in peril, I would expect you to do whatever you must to keep yourself alive.
String.Dest: 如果你拿到了证据，且因此受到生命威胁，希望你采取一切必要手段保证人身安全。

String.Source: I do so love dealing with mortals.
String.Dest: 我真喜欢和凡人做交易。

String.Source: I'm sick of all this ash. I know dunmer aren't supposed to mind the ash, but I hate it.
String.Dest: 真受够这些火山灰了。我知道丹莫应该习惯了，但就是非常讨厌。

String.Source: So you've said a hundred times. But didn't you also tell me the Telvanni lands were green and lush?
String.Dest: 你都说过上百次了。但不也说过泰瓦尼的领地绿茵茵的吗？

String.Source: Now, if you'll excuse me, I'd like to meditate a bit.
String.Dest: 嗯，请让我静一静，我要冥想一下。

String.Source: The best place to start would be Geldis Sadri over at the Retching Netch Cornerclub.
String.Dest: 最先找的应该是呕吐气母街角吧的吉迪斯·萨德利。

String.Source: Well I can't wait forever. Master Neloth keeps asking if I have his soul gems yet.
String.Dest: 我不能一直等啊，内洛斯大师不停问我买到灵魂石了没。

String.Source: I would have had it ready, but Master Neloth wanted his meal early.
String.Dest: 原本是该写完了的，但是内洛斯大师今天想提早进餐。

String.Source: If you're here about the canis root tea, it's almost ready.
String.Dest: 你要是来拿犬根茶的话，马上就好了。

String.Source: Hopefully the frost lessons are over.
I have your list of soul gems, but nothing else.
String.Dest: 我清单上只有您的灵魂石，别的没了。

String.Source: Master Neloth, I'm preparing for a trip to Raven Rock to pick up supplies.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师，我准备去鸦石镇买些物资。

String.Source: Maybe some daedra heart. Elynea never seems to stock it.
String.Dest: 可能还要些迪德拉心脏，艾琳娜从来不多留些。

String.Source: I really can't put this trip off for much longer.
String.Dest: 我真的不能再拖下去了。

String.Source: The fetcher thought he could stir up the locals and use them against the Redoran Guard and then murder Councilor Morvayn when we weren't looking.
String.Dest: 那个费彻以为他能煽动本地人，让他们对付瑞多然卫兵，然后在我们没注意到的时候刺杀莫尔凡议员。

String.Source: There's an Ulen Ancestral Tomb near the Temple. Someone's been leaving ash yam offerings on the altar inside.
String.Dest: 神殿附近有一座乌伦家的祖坟，有人在里面的祭坛上放了灰烬薯。

String.Source: Varona, get me some canis root tea.
String.Dest: 瓦罗纳，帮我倒杯犬根茶。

String.Source: That man is going to kill himself one day, and take the rest of us with him.
String.Dest: 那家伙迟早会害死自己，然后拉大伙儿陪葬。

String.Source: Chief smart. Most Riekling dumb but chief smart.
String.Dest: 酋长聪明。大多数瑞克灵笨，但酋长聪明。

String.Source: Hmm. Better than average quality. I'll take it.
If he provides you any leads, check them out before bringing them to my attention. I can't afford to make any mistakes.
String.Dest: 要是他给了你什么线索，最好确认一下再来找我。我没有犯错的余地。

String.Source: Wonderful, simply wonderful! Councilor Morvayn will be quite pleased when he hears about this.
String.Dest: 太好了，真是太好了！莫尔凡议员听到这消息肯定很高兴。

String.Source: Summoning you here was part of my plan. I was hoping you'd be interested in investigating for me.
String.Dest: 把你找来是我的计划之一，我希望你有兴趣帮我调查一下。

String.Source: How are your lessons coming, Talvas?
String.Dest: 你的课程怎么样了，塔瓦斯？

String.Source: The pain has subsided. Thank you for asking.
String.Dest: 痛感减轻了，感谢您的关心。

String.Source: It may be justified, but it certainly isn't appreciated. Councilor Morvayn simply feels that I'm being paranoid.
String.Dest: 可能合理，但肯定不被重视。莫尔凡议员就觉得我有些多疑。
受的苦也是两倍于以往。

String.Source: Someone with a brilliant mind and robust physique that is blindly obedient would be ideal.
String.Dest: 理想的人选要有聪明的大脑、结实的体魄，还要能无条件服从。

String.Source: I already did, but it won't do any good. They haven't had any for months.
String.Dest: 已经加了，但是没用。那边几个月来都缺货。

String.Source: You have some tea, but I'll get you a fresh cup.
String.Dest: 您先喝点茶，我过会儿再帮您倒一杯。

String.Source: Oh, could you get me an extra blanket. I think I might need it.
String.Dest: 哦，能帮我再拿条毯子吗，我可能用得着。

String.Source: I don't want to see any of you get hurt.
String.Dest: 我不想看到你们有人受伤。

String.Source: Well you'll just have to wait. Last time I brought his meal up late he asked if I wanted to be a part of one of his experiments.
String.Dest: 你还是等着吧，上次给他送饭送完了，他就问我要不要当他的试验品。

String.Source: If Tilisu's involved in any sort of plot to harm Councilor Morvayn, I'm going to need hard evidence to prove it.
String.Dest: 如果蒂莉苏参与了某种危害莫尔凡议员的阴谋，我就需要确凿的证据来揭露它。

String.Source: Hmm. I'm running out of giant toes. I'll pay extra for one.
String.Dest: 嗯，我的巨人脚趾快用完了。给我一根，我多付你些钱。

String.Source: Oh, and if the tower door suddenly gets icy cold, don't come in.
String.Dest: 哦，要是塔门突然开始结冰，就别进来了。

String.Source: Neloth is a master wizard of the House Telvanni.
String.Dest: 内洛斯是泰瓦尼家族的高等巫师。

String.Source: However, any information we can glean in times like this I consider vital to House Redoran's survival.
String.Dest: 但是，我认为在这种时候收到的任何消息，对瑞多然家的存亡都是关键的。

String.Source: Without Councilor Morvayn, Raven Rock has no future. Keep that in mind next time you decide to help or not.
String.Dest: 少了莫尔凡议员，鸦石镇就没有未来可言了。下次你决定是否要帮忙时，要记住这点。

String.Source: Before you dismiss this entirely, I was hoping you might be able to lend a hand by investigating on the councilor's behalf.
String.Dest: 在你拒绝之前，我还是希望你能为了议员帮忙调查一下。

String.Source: Sending the occasional message back and forth is all we can manage, and sometimes takes months or more to arrive.
String.Dest: 顶多就是偶尔互通消息，有时候得等上数月或者更久。

String.Source: Most of my contacts live leagues away from Solstheim.
String.Dest: 我的联络人都离索瑟海姆很远。

String.Source: I presume the same thing you're doing... leaving an offering for the departed.
String.Dest: 可能和你做的是同一件事……给死者送祭品。

String.Source: So Geldis's plan worked, eh? Everytime we tried it, no one would ever show up.
String.Dest: 所以吉迪斯的计划起作用了？我们每次尝试，从没人出现过。

String.Source: Half the bloody town joined his side. Can you believe that?
String.Dest: 结果半数刁民都站到他那边儿去了，你敢信吗？

String.Source: So soon? You must be hungry for a deal.
String.Dest: 这么快又见面了？你肯定急着做买卖吧。

String.Source: What kind of nonsense is that!?
I'm sure we can strike a bargain.
It's a private matter. Let's just say they seek revenge for the execution of one of their own... ordered by Councilor Morvayn himself.
String.Dest: 某种私人恩怨。简单来说就是想为他们被处决的某人报仇……命令是莫尔凡议员亲自下的。

String.Source: How can I serve you, thuri?
But if you don't want to help a master wizard of House Telvanni, possibly earning his favor, you're a fool.
String.Dest: 但你要是不愿意帮泰瓦尼高等巫师的忙，让自己有机会赢得好感，那就是个傻子。

String.Source: They arrived here ten years ago, and have been nothing but a benefit to Raven Rock ever since.
String.Dest: 他们大约在十年前来到这里，从那以后就一直在为鸦石镇做贡献。

String.Source: Please, oh hero of Skyrim. Please find Varona. I shall be ever so grateful.
String.Dest: 拜托了，天际来的英雄。请你去找瓦罗纳吧。我会很感激的。

String.Source: If any of them is from House Hlaalu, I wouldn't be able to make a move without them knowing.
String.Dest: 要是我们当中有哈拉鲁家的人，不管做什么他们都会知道。

String.Source: Not bad for an amateur? Take this.
String.Dest: 对新手来说还行。拿去吧。

String.Source: A bit ripe, isn't it? Here. Take this.
I hope Elynea has something to help me sleep at night.
String.Dest: 希望艾琳娜能给我些安眠药。

String.Source: When everything was said and done, they were no longer recognized as a Great House and were dismissed from the Council.
String.Dest: 当尘埃落定后，他们不再被视为大家族，并从议会中除名了。

String.Source: If you get some taproots, I'll pay you to dip them in the headwaters and bring them to me.
String.Dest: 你要是有直立根，就去河源浸泡后再带给我，我会付钱的。

String.Source: Any time Adril and the Redoran Guard made a move, the Ulens must have been one step ahead and didn't show up.
String.Dest: 每次阿德尔和瑞多然卫兵采取行动时，乌伦家的人都先他们一步，从来没出现过。

String.Source: They had welcomed the Empire with open arms, and benefited from it.
String.Dest: 他们张开双手迎接了帝国，也因而从中获利。

String.Source: You find some void salts and you bring them to me. I'll beat anyone else's price.
String.Dest: 你找些虚无盐带来给我。我出的价比别人都高。

String.Source: Talvas says Master Neloth is asking for me.
String.Dest: 塔瓦斯说内洛斯大师在找我。

String.Source: As a matter of fact, I need a hagraven claw. I'll pay extra if you find one.
String.Dest: 其实，我需要一块乌鸦鬼婆之爪。你找到了我会多付你些钱。

String.Source: What do you mean? I thought I was clear.
String.Dest: 你在说什么？我已经说得很清楚了。

String.Source: I presume the same thing you're doing... leaving an offering for the departed.
String.Dest: 可能和你做的是同一件事……给死者送祭品。

String.Source: Of course this was before your briarheart expedition. Now I know that I did the surgery all wrong.
String.Dest: 当然这些发生在你探险荆棘之心之前，现在我知道手术完全搞错了。

String.Source: Nikulas is restless. He's like an eagle, always seeking to fly somewhere new.
String.Dest: 尼库拉斯很好动。他就像只鹰，总是想飞到新的地方去。

String.Source: More cups and plates for me to carry?
String.Dest: 还要我背更多的杯子和盘子吗？

String.Source: So it is. You have proven yourself an ally to the Skaal, and so the Skaal shall be allies to you.
String.Dest: 确实如此。你证明了自己是斯卡尔人的盟友，斯卡尔人也会如此待你。

String.Source: The Raven Rock road is dangerous. I hope nothing happened to Varona.
String.Dest: 去鸦石镇的路很危险。但愿瓦罗纳没出什么事。

String.Source: The question you should be asking is "what don't I sell here" because I have pretty much any supplies you might need.
String.Dest: 你这问题该换成“有什么东西是你不卖的”，因为你需要的我这儿几乎都有。

String.Source: The Dunmer have been growing food in the ashlands for thousands of years.
String.Dest: 丹莫已经在灰地耕耘了几千年。

String.Source: A fine question, and the one that I hear most often from visitors to our town.
String.Dest: 好问题，也是镇上访客最常问我的。

String.Source: Yes, I imagine it would to someone not of our people.
String.Dest: 是的，我想对外地人来说就是这样。

String.Source: It's working, I'm flying! I'm really flying! Hahahaha!
String.Dest: 成功了，我在飞了！我真的在飞！哈哈哈哈！

String.Source: Tell you what. Since you went through all the trouble of finding it for me and all, you keep it.
String.Dest: 这样吧。既然你费了这么大劲儿帮我和大家找到它，你就拿着吧。

String.Source: We live as one with the land, for the land provides all that we need.
String.Dest: 我们与这片提供了一切生活所需的土地合为一体。

String.Source: It's so strange. I feel like it's from a dream. Something about the Earth Stone, and a shrine... That's it. That's all I can think of.
String.Dest: 太奇怪了。我感觉是在梦里见过。关于地石，还有座祭坛的某个东西……对了，这就是我能想起来的。

String.Source: I've spent quite a few years honing their skills and I can assure you they're not just your average city guard.
String.Dest: 我花了好几年来磨练他们的技巧，可以向你保证他们不是什么普通的城市守卫。

String.Source: I think so, but I can't remember how I know him. Or maybe I'm wrong. I'm not sure.
String.Dest: 应该有吧，但我想不起来怎么认识的了。可能我记错了，不太确定。

String.Source: Tribe-kin stronger. You stay, help more.
String.Dest: 部落血亲变壮。你留，再帮忙。

String.Source: I might know someone. Or maybe not. I can't remember...
String.Dest: 我可能认识这人。但又可能不认识。想不起来了……

String.Source: Ah, but you see this particular Dunmer was as naked as the day he was born and singing badly at the top of his lungs.
String.Dest: 啊，但你要知道那丹莫跟刚出生一样啥都没穿，扯着嗓子唱得难听的要死。

String.Source: They speak also of something worse than dragons buried within. Difficult to imagine, but if true...
String.Dest: 他们说里面还埋藏着比龙族更可怕的东西。难以想象，但如果是真的……

String.Source: But now that they've been destroyed, the light can finally shine upon the House of Reclamations.
String.Dest: 但是如今他们已经被摧毁了，光明终于在收复者之家重新亮起。

String.Source: The last cube is somewhere through the northern door. We won't be able to open it until the water level is lower.
String.Dest: 最后一个方典就在北侧的门附近。但是要先降低水位才能开门。

String.Source: You dare threaten me? For that insolence, I will flay the flesh from your bones!
String.Dest: 你敢威胁我？这么狂妄我要把你的皮给扒了！

String.Source: Very well, I'll ask Edla to trade for some coal.
String.Dest: 好吧，我会找艾迪拉买些煤炭。

String.Source: I never met her. Master Neloth took me on because she died.
String.Dest: 我从没见过她，内洛斯大师收我也是因为她死了。

String.Source: When I fall asleep at night, all I can do is hope he'll still be there when I awaken.
String.Dest: 我每晚入睡时，唯一能做的就是祈祷醒来后他还在身边。

String.Source: Have you put those thieving bandits to the sword?
String.Dest: 你已经手刃那些偷东西的强盗了吗？

String.Source: Look, if you see Crescius, tell him to give me that pickaxe back and I'll pay you for the trouble.
String.Dest: 听着，要是你看到克雷修斯，跟他说把鹤嘴锄还给我，我会付你跑路费的。

String.Source: Oh, Glover Mallory gets me a few things once in a while. He usually has the most amazing deals that I can't pass up.
String.Dest: 哦，葛洛文·马洛里偶尔会给我一些东西。他的货一般都很棒，我每次都照单全收。

String.Source: According to Councilor Morvayn, my husband's been Raven Rock's most important food source for decades.
String.Dest: 根据莫尔凡议员的说法，我的丈夫是鸦石镇几十年来最重要的粮食供给人。

String.Source: The one Crescius "borrowed" came from the Skaal Village up north. I, uh, traded them some goods for it.
String.Dest: 克雷修斯“借走”的那把是从北边儿斯卡尔村来的。我，呃，用些货物从他们那儿换来的。

String.Source: Leave at once! Do not test me, or I promise that you will regret it.
String.Dest: 立刻离开！别挑战我，不然我保证你会后悔。

String.Source: Sure, ignore the ravings of a "crazy old man." I get it.
String.Dest: 当然了，别理会一个“疯老头”的疯话。我懂。

String.Source: This dragon's soul belongs to me.
I definitely missed the forge. I wonder if it missed me.
String.Dest: 真想念我的锻炉啊，不知道它想不想我。

String.Source: In the city's days of glory, it was reputed to be able to assemble a complete automaton in a single day.
String.Dest: 在这座城市的光辉岁月里，号称是一天就能组装一台完整的百夫长。

String.Source: Try Raven Rock. They are in awe of me there. I'm sure almost anyone would be willing to serve me.
String.Dest: 去鸦石镇看看，那边的人都敬畏我。我确信几乎每个人都愿意服侍我。

String.Source: Tell the blacksmith whatever lie you will. We have no further need of him.
String.Dest: 随便跟那个铁匠撒个谎。我们再也用不着他了。

String.Source: It looks like we'll need to lower the water level to make any more progress.
String.Dest: 看来我们得降低水位才能继续了。

String.Source: When word arrived in Blacklight that the Councilor's father had passed, I was asked to sail to Raven Rock with him as his second.
String.Dest: 当议员的父亲过世的消息传到黑光城后，我被邀请作为副手和他一起去鸦石镇。

String.Source: I hope the rest of the cubes are this easy to find. Although knowing the Dwemer, I rather doubt it.
String.Dest: 希望剩下的方典也这么好找。但就我对锻莫的了解，应该没这种好事。

String.Source: A new master. It's been centuries.
String.Dest: 有新的主人了啊。上一个还是几百年前呢。

String.Source: As much as I enjoy this place, I'm ready to see if we can actually open the book's protective case. You do still remember why we're here?
String.Dest: 虽然我很喜欢这个地方，但我也想知道到底能不能打开书的保护装置。你还没忘我们来的目的吧？

String.Source: I might not trust you, but I will trust your greed. Very well, take the map.
String.Dest: 我可能不信任你，但我相信你的贪婪。好吧，把地图拿去吧。

String.Source: There's actually a funny story behind the name, friend.
String.Dest: 背后其实有个有趣的故事，朋友。

String.Source: And I'm telling you that I'll do whatever it takes to find my great-grandfather's remains. He's down here, I can feel it.
String.Dest: 我告诉你，我会不惜一切代价找到曾祖父的遗体。他就在下面，我都感觉得到。

String.Source: It takes a strong will to command a dragon's soul. Perhaps you aren't as powerful as you think.
String.Dest: 掌控龙魂需要强大的意志。也许你没有想象中那么强大。

String.Source: There was a great brown bear on the slopes the other day. I could swear by the All-Maker that it was watching the village.
String.Dest: 有一天坡上出现了头大棕熊。我敢对造物主发誓，它那会儿在观察我们的村子。

String.Source: Finally, it stopped and began to quiver. A few moments later, the foulest liquid to ever assail your nostrils spewed from its maw.
String.Dest: 最后，气母停下来开始颤抖。过了会儿，它嘴里喷出来了最难闻刺鼻的液体。

String.Source: I found an unsent letter he'd written to the East Empire Company, and a key.
String.Dest: 我发现了一封他写完还没发给东帝国公司的信，还有一把钥匙。

String.Source: The time for talking is long past.
After he moved on to greener pastures, I decided to pack up, move out here and put those lessons to the test. Been here ever since.
String.Dest: 他后来找到了更好的发展，我就打包行李，搬到这儿实际应用所学知识，一直到现在。

String.Source: Well, the bottle broke on the netch, and it must have swallowed its contents because it started floating sort of tilted.
String.Dest: 嗯，那个酒瓶在气母身上裂开了，它肯定喝了里面的东西，因为它飘起来的时候歪歪扭扭的。

String.Source: You have no idea how good it is to be back here. Thanks for your help, friend.
String.Dest: 回到这儿的感觉太好了。感谢你的帮助，朋友。

String.Source: Look out for that Steam Centurion! Get to higher ground!
String.Dest: 小心那台蒸汽百夫长！到高处去！

String.Source: It's tradition that the son of the smith take his father's place, but you have no son. Who will become smith of the Skaal after you?
String.Dest: 让铁匠的儿子子承父业是传统了，但你没儿子。之后谁来当斯卡尔的铁匠呢？

String.Source: You have made a grave miscalculation, and now you will pay the price!
String.Dest: 你的算盘打错了，现在付出代价吧！

String.Source: I suppose I've always spoken my mind and tried to do what's best for the Skaal. That's why the others call me Fanari Strong-Voice.
String.Dest: 我想是因为我总是心直口快，做对斯卡尔最有利的决定，所以他们才会叫我“强音”法娜丽。

String.Source: Her name is forge. Now be silent before she hears you and becomes angry.
String.Dest: 她叫锻炉。现在安静点儿，免得她听到后发火。

String.Source: Here, give this map to the blacksmith. I have no further need of it.
String.Dest: 拿着，把这张地图给那个铁匠。我不需要了。

String.Source: By the time Crescius came of age, the ebony mine in Raven Rock was shut down. He took that quite hard.
String.Dest: 当克雷修斯成年后，鸦石镇黑檀矿场关了。他受到了很大的打击。

String.Source: Good redgrass. Later, we burn. Now, final task.
String.Dest: 上好的红草。过会儿，我们点燃。现在，最后的任务。

String.Source: We've fought quite a few battles together, and saved each other's lives on more than one occasion.
String.Dest: 我们多次一同上战场，互相不止一次救过对方的命。

String.Source: Her lust for power was her undoing.
String.Dest: 对力量的贪欲让她走向了灭亡。

String.Source: Do you have the cube? Good, good! Then I'll take this cube and we can be on our way.
String.Dest: 你拿到方典了吗？好，很好！我再拿回这块就能继续上路了。

String.Source: Adril Arano, Second Councilor of Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 阿德尔·阿拉诺，鸦石镇的副议员。

String.Source: I tried to court her, but she had no interest in me.
String.Dest: 我追求过她，但她对我不感兴趣。

String.Source: Be patient, my husband. The crop doesn't grow faster because it hears your growling stomach.
String.Dest: 耐心点，老公。作物不会因为你肚子饿就长得更快。

String.Source: Also, like the Nords of old, we embrace the All-Maker. We do not worship the nine gods of the Empire.
String.Dest: 我们与古早诺德人一样，信奉造物主，从不拜帝国的那九个神。

String.Source: When word reached us that a settlement of Dunmer was forming on Solstheim, we were thrilled.
String.Dest: 当我们听说有个丹莫聚落正在索瑟海姆形成时，感到非常兴奋。

String.Source: The less we disturb the land and the beasts within it, the more we respect the wishes of the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 我们越少干扰这片土地和其中的野兽，就越尊重造物主的意愿。

String.Source: It is a dark thing, unnatural. I would have nothing to do with it. But the Dark Elf Wizard, Neloth...
String.Dest: 这是非自然的黑暗造物，我不想和它有任何接触。但那个暗精灵法师，内洛斯……

String.Source: I wish I had a more romantic tale to tell, but I was simply seeking my fortune and chose Raven Rock to ply my trade.
String.Dest: 真想有个浪漫故事讲讲，但我只是想找个出路，然后选中了鸦石镇来做生意而已。

String.Source: I've known the councilor since we were both quite young. We rose the ranks in House Redoran together.
String.Dest: 我跟莫尔凡自幼相识，一起在瑞多然家内向上攀升。

String.Source: Maybe... I can't help but think of some sort of temple here on the island. Why would that be?
String.Dest: 也许吧……我总会想到这座岛上的某个神殿。为什么会这样？

String.Source: I can't believe Varona is dead.
String.Dest: 我不敢相信瓦罗纳死了。

String.Source: If you could go to this place and see him... Are you like Miraak? Are you Dragonborn?
String.Dest: 如果你能前往那里见他……你跟米拉克一样？你是龙裔吗？

String.Source: We have the cubes that we need to start the boilers. Let's not waste any more time.
String.Dest: 我们拿到了启动锅炉需要的方典。就别再浪费时间了。

String.Source: That was easier than I expected. I'm glad you were here to do all the hard work.
String.Dest: 比我想的要简单。很高兴麻烦的活儿你都包了。

String.Source: Crescius, you're an obstinate old fool and you're going to get yourself killed.
String.Dest: 克雷修斯，你这顽固傻老头子迟早把自己害死。

String.Source: You risked your life to save Baldor. Your name will be honored in our village.
String.Dest: 你冒着生命危险救了鲍德尔，村子里会称颂你的大名。

String.Source: Yes, master. Thank you, master. I'll fix it right away.
String.Dest: 好的，大师。谢谢您，大师。我这就把它修好。

String.Source: The moment the ebony mine dried up, they pulled up stakes. Ridiculous!
String.Dest: 当黑檀矿枯竭后，他们跑得比谁都快，太可笑了！

String.Source: But mark my words, these mines hold a secret that could put Raven Rock back on the map.
String.Dest: 记住我说的，这矿里藏着一个足以让鸦石镇重新闻名的秘密。

String.Source: You should be able to unseal this door with the control cube I gave you.
String.Dest: 你该用我给你的方典来开这道门。

String.Source: He's in grave danger, and yet he continues to place himself in harm's way.
String.Dest: 他的处境已经很危险了，但他还是继续将自己置于危险之中。

String.Source: As you can imagine, the eruption of the Red Mountain took an awful toll on Solstheim.
String.Dest: 你应该想得到，红山喷发对索瑟海姆造成了很严重的破坏。

String.Source: They embody a council made up of five Great Houses: Telvanni, Dres, Indoril, Sadras and Redoran.
String.Dest: 五个大家族组成了议会：泰瓦尼、德莱斯、因多瑞尔、萨德拉斯和瑞多然。

String.Source: Crescius is a third-generation miner... all his life, he's lived and breathed nothing else.
String.Dest: 克雷修斯出身矿工家庭，他是第三代了……他这一生就知道采矿。

String.Source: I've been sailing the Northern Maiden across the Sea of Ghosts for nearly twenty years now.
String.Dest: 我在幽灵之海上开北方少女号快二十年了。

String.Source: We lived in a settlement perhaps a league from the border of Black Marsh, the homeland of the Argonians.
String.Dest: 我们住在距离黑沼泽边境几里外的地方，那边是阿尔贡的家园。

String.Source: We are Nords, much like those you'll find in Skyrim. Long ago our path diverged from that of our cousins on the mainland.
String.Dest: 我们是诺德人，跟你在天际看到的那些一样。很久以前，我们和内陆的远亲们渐行渐远。

String.Source: I just can't be sure. I... I don't think I like talking about this.
String.Dest: 我真的不确定。我……我不想讨论这个。

String.Source: As I said, we need to restore the steam supply to the reading room if we want to get the book.
String.Dest: 我说过了，需要先恢复阅读室的蒸汽供应，才拿得到书。

String.Source: All four boilers need to be working if you want to release the book. I thought I was clear about that.
String.Dest: 想把书取出来就得让四个锅炉运转。我认为已经说的够清楚了。

String.Source: Then get back to it, you lazy horker! The day is wasting.
String.Dest: 那就快回去干啊，你个懒海象！已经浪费一整天了。

String.Source: Hmph, maybe. Been difficult trusting people lately, they think I'm crazy.
String.Dest: 哼，也许吧。但我很难再信任何人了，大家都觉得我疯了。

String.Source: He came to us some time ago, asking about Black Books. I believe he knows a great deal about them. Perhaps too much.
String.Dest: 不久前他来找过我们，询问关于黑暗经书的事情。我相信他对于它们的了解非常丰富。可能丰富的过头了。

String.Source: Look, my wife nags that I'm too old to go traipsing around these mines chasing my story.
String.Dest: 听着，我老婆唠叨我太老了，不能在这矿里磨蹭着找我妄想出来的东西。

String.Source: I'm sure he's down there somewhere, buried under a mountain of rubble like the East Empire Company claims.
String.Dest: 我确定就在下面某处，埋在一座碎石山堆下面了，就跟东帝国公司说的那样。

String.Source: Frea! What news do you bring? Is there a way to free our people?
String.Dest: 芙瑞雅！情况怎么样？有办法解放我们的族人吗？

String.Source: It should now be as simple as using the cubes to turn on the four boilers.
String.Dest: 现在应该可以用方典轻松打开四个锅炉。

String.Source: Very well, you have convinced me. We will depart the island shortly and seek our weapons elsewhere.
String.Dest: 好吧，你说服我了。我们很快会离开这座岛，去别的地方找我们的武器。

String.Source: You speak the truth, Baldor. It makes my heart glad to see her keeping busy after Heifnir's death.
String.Dest: 你说得对，鲍德尔。海福尼尔过世后，能看到她忙着干活儿让我很安心。

String.Source: If you're interested in pursuing the subject, help yourself to any of the historical volumes in my library.
String.Dest: 如果对这个议题有兴趣，欢迎你来我的图书馆随意阅读历史书卷。

String.Source: These must be the "Great Workshops of Nchardak". Impressive even in ruins.
String.Dest: 这里一定是“尼查达克大工坊”了。即使成了废墟也很壮观。

String.Source: The Dunmer don't believe that death is the end, we believe that it's the beginning.
String.Dest: 丹莫并不认为死亡即是终结，我们认为那是开始。

String.Source: It's the only tool tough enough to crack stalhrim, is what it is.
String.Dest: 那是唯一可以敲碎魔冰的强韧工具。

String.Source: I hear that name, and I see a temple, here on Solstheim. What could that mean?
String.Dest: 我听说过这个名字，见过那个神殿，就在这索瑟海姆。这意味着什么呢？

String.Source: Imagine the power of being able to command entire villages to do your bidding.
String.Dest: 想象一下能够控制整个村庄为你所用的力量。

String.Source: You must have left a cube in one of the pump control pedestals. If you remove it, the pumps will stop and we'll be able to swim up there.
String.Dest: 你肯定忘了一个水泵控制基座上的方典。要是拿下来，水泵就会停止工作，我们就能浮上去了。

String.Source: I doubt that an outsider could truly understand, but I hope my words have helped to answer your question.
String.Dest: 我想作为外来者你可能无法完全理解，但希望我的回答能为你解惑。

String.Source: Three of the cubes are through here. This seems like a sensible place to start.
String.Dest: 穿过这里可以拿到三块方典。从这里开始似乎很明智。

String.Source: We fight. You strong. You help. No more bad Nords.
String.Dest: 我们打，你壮。你帮忙。没有坏诺德人了。

String.Source: Thanks for having my back, friend.
You know how happy it makes her to play the village peddler
String.Dest: 你也知道她有多喜欢扮做村里的小贩。

String.Source: Instead, he stayed on Solstheim and spent most of his life prospecting for a new ebony source. Sadly, it never surfaced.
String.Dest: 所以正相反，他留在索瑟海姆，花了半辈子来勘测新的黑檀矿源。可惜他一直没找到。

String.Source: They don't exactly grow on trees, you know.
String.Dest: 他们不是寻常可见的，知道吗。

String.Source: I was fascinated by her work, and over a period of a few years she taught me quite a bit.
String.Dest: 她的工作把我们迷住了，往后的几年里她教了我很多。

String.Source: Oh? And what is her name, this secret wife of yours?
String.Dest: 哦？那她叫什么，你那个秘密老婆？

String.Source: Why have you never taken a wife, Baldor?
String.Dest: 你怎么不找个老婆呢，鲍德尔？

String.Source: Poor Crescius is aging and I believe it's addled his mind.
String.Dest: 可怜的克雷修斯老了，恐怕他的脑子也糊涂了。

String.Source: I was a soldier for a time, and then a mercenary, but I was never truly happy until I came here.
String.Dest: 我以前参过军，也当过佣兵，但来这儿后才找到了幸福。

String.Source: Go on ahead. I'll stand guard.
I've seen plenty of drunks in my day, and I'll tell you right now that netch was sick.
String.Dest: 我这辈子见过很多醉鬼，但那气母实在是醉翻天了。

String.Source: The first piece of wisdom I teach to any hunter of the Skaal is to ask the simple question, should I truly kill this beast?
String.Dest: 我教给所有斯卡尔猎人的第一课，就是问自己一个简单的问题：我真的应该杀死这头野兽吗？
真实的故事哦，朋友。全是真的。

String.Source: With the water level this high, we can swim across the collapsed part of the passage and reach the other side.
String.Dest: 水位这么高，我们可以直接游过崩塌的路段，到另一边去。

String.Source: Ask most of the folks around here and they'd agree with you.
String.Dest: 这附近的大伙儿谁不是这么说呢。

String.Source: He was one of my patrons, and liked to drink heavily, so I wasn't exactly surprised.
String.Dest: 他是我的常客，酒喝得很凶，所以我并不在意。

String.Source: They are off working on their pillar. Happens every night.
String.Dest: 他们去建石柱了，每晚都这样。

String.Source: Unfortunately, each cube we retrieve shuts down the corresponding pumps, raising the water level. We'll have to be careful.
String.Dest: 不幸的是，每拿回来一块方典就会关闭对应的水泵，水位就会升高，我们得小心行事。

String.Source: It's been difficult, but I'm not regretting it one bit. In fact, I'm glad we've been able to stay and help.
String.Dest: 这是段苦日子，但是我一点都不后悔。实际上我很高兴能在这儿留下来帮忙。

String.Source: I think so, but I'm not sure where I heard the name.
String.Dest: 应该认识，但我不确定在哪儿听到了的。

String.Source: I'm the wife of a Second Councilor and certain things are expected of me.
String.Dest: 作为副议员的妻子，我要负责一些特定事务。

String.Source: It's fashioned from actual bone that's been reinforced with a resin-like material and then shaped to form the armored plating.
String.Dest: 它是由真的骨头以树脂状材料加固后，塑性形成装甲板。

String.Source: This is Master Neloth's tower. He's a Telvanni Wizard.
String.Dest: 这里是内洛斯大师的塔楼。他是个泰瓦尼法师。

String.Source: I suppose you'll have to find me a new steward.
String.Dest: 看起来你要帮我找个新管家了。

String.Source: Then this will be over soon for you.
We're nearly out of coal again.
String.Dest: 我们的煤炭又要用完了。

String.Source: Not this time, Dragonborn. This one's mine.
String.Dest: 这次不行，龙裔。这条是我的。

String.Source: Solsthiem is still rich in ebony ore. I know there's more down there... I can smell it.
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆的黑檀矿依然很丰富，我知道那下面还有更多……我闻得出来。

String.Source: Deer, bear and horker provide most of what we need for skins and meat.
String.Dest: 鹿、熊还有海象提供了我们需要的大部分皮和肉。

String.Source: The Reclamations are the True Tribunal... the daedra that consecrate the Dunmer people: Azura, Mephala and Boethia.
String.Dest: 收复者即为真审判席……丹莫百姓所崇拜的迪德拉：阿祖拉、梅法拉和波耶西亚。

String.Source: Now we can finally see about getting those boilers started.
String.Dest: 现在我们终于可以启动那些锅炉了。

String.Source: That's right, walk away while I'm still inclined to let you.
String.Dest: 这就对了，趁我还同意你离开前走吧。

String.Source: To understand how we met one another, you have to appreciate what he's going through.
String.Dest: 想知道我们怎么相遇的，就得先了解他的过往。

String.Source: Make them stop? Oh no, certainly not. At least not yet.
String.Dest: 阻止他们？不，当然不能了。还不是时候。

String.Source: Some folks say it's "enchanted ice," but I think there's more to it than that.
String.Dest: 有些人说它是“附魔过的冰”，但我不认为就那么简单。

String.Source: I have an idea. I'll wait here and retrieve this cube once you find the last one we need. Good luck!
String.Dest: 我有个点子。我就在这儿等着，等你找到最后一个方典我就取下这个。祝你好运！

String.Source: Do I? I was going to say no, but somehow I feel like I do. Does that make any sense?
String.Dest: 我认识吗？原本我要说不，但是不知怎的好像该说是。这合理吗？

String.Source: The damn fool doesn't even deserve to have it! The pickaxe was made for mining, not selling.
String.Dest: 那个混账傻子根本不配拥有它！这把鹤嘴锄是拿来采矿，不是拿来卖的。

String.Source: My greatest fear is that my stubborn mule of a husband will end up suffering the same fate.
String.Dest: 我最怕的是我那犟得跟头驴一样的丈夫最后也落得这种下场。

String.Source: That's not someone who lives in Raven Rock, I don't think... but it sounds so familiar.
String.Dest: 他不是鸦石镇住户吧，我想……但是听起来很熟悉。

String.Source: You are an outsider, and I don't know if I can make you understand. I will try.
String.Dest: 你是外来者，我不确定是否能够让你理解，试试看吧。

String.Source: Mark my words... the East Empire Company will return to Raven Rock, and when they do, I'll be at the top of their list.
String.Dest: 听着，东帝国公司迟早会回鸦石镇，到时候我就飞黄腾达了。

String.Source: It killed my great-grandfather, and left Raven Rock with a worthless and tainted mine.
String.Dest: 它害死了我的曾祖父，让鸦石镇只剩下一个没价值还被污染了的矿。

String.Source: I... I'm not sure. I don't want to talk about this.
String.Dest: 我……我不太确定。我不想谈这些。

String.Source: We believe that all creatures have a right to live as they will, and when we take what we need from them, we thank the beast for its gifts.
String.Dest: 我们认为所有生物都有以自己想要的方式生活的权利。当我们从野兽身上获得所需之物后，会感谢它们的赠予。

String.Source: We wandered around a bit and ended up in Morthal where we took temporary residence with Lami, the town's alchemist.
String.Dest: 先是到处流浪一阵子，然后暂时住在莫萨尔的炼金术师拉米那儿。

String.Source: Husband, do you know why there's a pouch of spiced tea leaves under the bed?
String.Dest: 老公，为什么床下有包香料茶叶？

String.Source: Why do I recognize that name? It sounds so familiar... Did I have a dream about someone named Miraak?
String.Dest: 为什么我对这名字有印象？好耳熟啊……是不是梦到过一个叫米拉克的？

String.Source: Hmph. Well, beauty's in the eye of the beholder, I suppose.
String.Dest: 哼，好吧，我想每个人审美不同。

String.Source: House Redoran has improved Blacklight substantially over the last thousand years... its grandeur rivals that of Mournhold itself.
String.Dest: 瑞多然家千年来大力建设着黑光城……它的雄伟不亚于哀伤之城。

String.Source: Sotha Sil, Almalexia and Vivec represent what was... beings who won the Dunmer people's hearts with their actions, but blinded them just the same.
String.Dest: 是索萨·希尔、阿玛莱西亚和维威克过去所代表的……他们以行动赢得了丹莫的心，但又以同样的方式蒙蔽了我们。

String.Source: Ah, good. Now we can see if we can find a way to get that next cube.
String.Dest: 啊，很好。我们现在来看看怎么拿到下一个方典。

String.Source: Hm, perhaps I'll make an offering to the All-Maker. He can make our potatoes ripen as surely as he makes the snow fall from the sky.
String.Dest: 嗯，也许我该去祭拜造物主。求他让我们的土豆成熟，就像能让天下雪一样。

String.Source: Many hunters pass through our village, and sometimes the Dark Elves of Raven Rock visit us.
String.Dest: 很多猎人会路过我们的村子，有时鸦石镇的暗精灵也会来拜访。

String.Source: I suppose it's been nearly a year now. My goodness, how the time has flown!
String.Dest: 我想快一年了，天啊，时间过得好快！

String.Source: I think so, but from where? I can't recall.
String.Dest: 应该认识吧，但是在哪儿认识的？想不起来了。

String.Source: She's dead? Oh my. Master Neloth is not going to be happy to hear that.
String.Dest: 她死了？哦天哪，内洛斯大师听到后肯定不高兴。

String.Source: After all we've been through together, I refuse to let Councilor Morvayn down.
String.Dest: 但我们一同经历了这么多，我不会让莫尔凡议员失望的。

String.Source: Hmm. Pity that one of our own people doesn't fully grasp our ways.
String.Dest: 嗯，很遗憾我们的镇民之一没有完全领会我们的做法。

String.Source: I always dreamt of being a pack mule.
Why you're leading Crescius on, I'll never understand.
String.Dest: 你为什么要教唆克雷修斯，我永远理解不了。

String.Source: I'm not sure. Perhaps I'm just remembering something wrong.
String.Dest: 我不确定，可能只是我记错了。

String.Source: She let Master Neloth do some ritual thing to her. We buried her out back.
String.Dest: 她让内洛斯大师对她进行某种仪式，我们把她埋在后面了。

String.Source: Um, I prefer to handle these things on my own.
String.Dest: 嗯，这些事情我宁愿自己来。

String.Source: Our home has been in his family for over two hundred years. Leaving would have been like abandoning precious memories.
String.Dest: 我们住的是他的祖宅，有两百多年了。离开这里等于是抛弃那些珍贵的回忆。

String.Source: You need to start the four boilers. Then we should be able to open the book's protective case upstairs.
String.Dest: 你必须先启动四个锅炉。之后我们就应该能打开楼上书的保护装置了。

String.Source: Here are the cubes you left behind.
As all rivers must return to the sea, so all life returns in time to the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 就像所有河流终汇成海，所有生命最终也会回归造物主。

String.Source: Now you're finally talking some sense. A mining tool belongs in a mining family.
String.Dest: 这才叫讲道理嘛。采矿工具就该属于矿工家庭。

String.Source: We take only what we need, and so we preserve the oneness with the land.
String.Dest: 我们只拿自己需要的，这样才能与这片土地合一。

String.Source: Our bond is our strength. We've always been at each other's side and nothing will ever change that.
String.Dest: 我们的纽带就是我们的力量，总是在彼此身边，没什么可以把我们拆开。

String.Source: I don't suppose you'll carry some of this for a while.
String.Dest: 看来你自己暂时不会背这些东西了。

String.Source: I don't think I've come across more than a chunk or two in my lifetime, and smithing's my trade.
String.Dest: 我想我这辈子最多也就见过一两块吧，锻造可是我吃饭的本事。

String.Source: I'm telling you... there's something big down there, something that the East Empire Company wanted to hide from everyone.
String.Dest: 我跟你说……下面的东西很重要，重要到东帝国公司不想任何人知道。

String.Source: Perhaps one of them will want to learn the ways of iron-shaping.
String.Dest: 或许其中某个愿意学习打铁呢。

String.Source: Why does that sound so familiar? There's no one here by that name, and yet I swear I've heard it.
String.Dest: 为什么这名字听起来这么熟悉？这儿没有叫这个名字的，但我发誓有听到过。

String.Source: You know. We know. Come fight. We wait, but you, come fight.
String.Dest: 你清楚。我们清楚。来打。我们等，但你，来打。

String.Source: The man looks straight up at the netch... yells "have a drink" and tosses the bottle... and it never hit the ground.
String.Dest: 他就直直地盯着气母看，吼了句“干一杯！”接着把瓶子甩出去了……瓶子甚至没掉在地上。

String.Source: I cannot help with that. None here can. You will need the knowledge Miraak himself learned. You will need to learn more about this Black Book.
String.Dest: 这我帮不了你，这里没人能帮你。你需要米拉克学过的那些知识。还得更透彻地了解这本黑暗经书。

String.Source: All-Maker willing, young Nikulas will take an interest. I would be happy to teach him.
String.Dest: 造物主同意的话，年轻的尼库拉斯会有兴趣的。我会很乐意教导他。

String.Source: She died in some experiment Master Neloth did on her. He claimed she wanted him to.
String.Dest: 她死于内洛斯大师某次在她身上做的实验，内洛斯大师坚称她是自愿的。

String.Source: You'll need a cube to unlock this door. I hope you remembered to pick up the cube I placed in the pedestal.
String.Dest: 你需要一块方典来解锁这道门。希望你没忘把我放在基座上的方典带上。

String.Source: We had better do something about it, then.
Yes, but don't tell Master Neloth. I'd have to give him your payment.
String.Dest: 是的，但别告诉内洛斯大师。不然我得把你付的钱给他了。

String.Source: Sometimes, when the wolves grow too bold and threaten the village, we must hunt them to cull their numbers.
String.Dest: 有时，狼群会莽撞到成了村子的威胁，我们必须猎杀它们，减少它们的数量。

String.Source: Master Neloth's old apprentice? The one before me?
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师以前的学徒？在我之前的那个？

String.Source: Not so much with, as for.
You stuck in Raven Rock too? Horrible isn't it.
String.Dest: 你也被困在鸦石镇了？很可怕，是吧。

String.Source: Mogrul isn't someone you can ignore.
String.Dest: 莫古尔不是你能放着不管的人。

String.Source: Gratian Caerellius. He spent his entire life exploring ancient ruins across Tamriel and he died in these very mines almost 200 years ago.
String.Dest: 格瑞希安·凯利乌斯。他一生都在勘探全泰姆瑞尔的古代遗迹，大约200年前死在了这矿里。

String.Source: In all honesty, it came down to a disagreement between what I believe and what Elder Othreloth believes.
String.Dest: 说实话，这归根结底是我和欧斯瑞罗斯长老之间的信仰对立。

String.Source: Very good. By my count, we've found a total of four cubes. Assuming you haven't dropped any anywhere.
String.Dest: 很好。算了下我们一共找到了四个方典。前提是你没在哪儿搞丢了。

String.Source: I was a Temple priest at the time, and they had me use my healing arts to restore strength to his ailing body.
String.Dest: 我那时候是神殿祭司，他们让我用治疗法术给他那副弱身子骨恢复体力。

String.Source: Gratian kept a journal of notes about his discoveries. If you can find his... remains, I'm hoping it will help.
String.Dest: 格瑞希安把他的记载写在一本日志里。你要是能找到他的……遗体，我猜就用得上了。

String.Source: With the cube I retrieved from the pumping pedestal, we should now have five cubes - exactly what we need.
String.Dest: 算上我从水泵控制台拿来的方典，我们现在应该有五块——刚好凑够了。

String.Source: Here to make me an offer, then? Very well, what do you have in mind?
String.Dest: 来和我做交易的？好啊，你怎么考虑的？

String.Source: One of our chairs is about to break. It will need to be mended with a new leg.
String.Dest: 我们有张椅子要断了。需要条新的椅脚。

String.Source: Not at all. I used to fish the waters around Solstheim. Made a damn fine living at it, too.
String.Dest: 不是，我以前在索瑟海姆附近捕鱼，过得也还挺快活。

String.Source: I can see that is no idle threat. Very well, we will depart the island once we have loaded the ship.
String.Dest: 看得出来你不是在虚张声势。好吧，我们会把货物装上就走。

String.Source: I don't think so, though it sounds like a name I've heard before...
String.Dest: 应该没有，但听起来像我以前听说过的名字。

String.Source: So you know my purpose here, then? I suppose you must have found that dullard of a blacksmith.
String.Dest: 看来你知道我的目的了，对吧？我猜你找到那个笨铁匠了。

String.Source: A butler's work is never done.
String.Dest: 仆人的活儿是干不完的。

String.Source: I had a friend over there, a dark elf named Vanryth... a very talented armorsmith.
String.Dest: 我在那边有个朋友，是个叫凡瑞斯的暗精灵……他是个很有才华的护甲匠人。

String.Source: Thank you for your help. We will meet again soon.
String.Dest: 感谢你的协助。我们后会有期。

String.Source: Ah, this is bonemold armor... quite impressive, wouldn't you say?
String.Dest: 啊，这是骨模盔甲……看了就忘不掉，对吧？

String.Source: Then perhaps you are connected with him. The old tales say that he, too, was Dragonborn.
String.Dest: 也许你和他有某种关联。古老的传说中记载他也是龙裔。

String.Source: There's no time for that now, I have work to do.
String.Dest: 现在可没时间，我有活儿要干。

String.Source: Now that the boilers are working, it should be simple to release the book from it's protective case.
String.Dest: 既然锅炉都在运转了，把书从保护装置里取出来应该很简单。

String.Source: Go tell Master Neloth. When I'm done here, I'll prepare her grave.
String.Dest: 去告诉内洛斯大师吧。等我忙完了就去打理她的坟墓。

String.Source: Bilgemuck follow you. Bilgemuck know strength.
Your kindness warms my heart as sunlight warms the skin on a cold day. The Skaal are once again in your debt, outsider.
String.Dest: 你的好意让我暖心，就像冷天照在皮肤上的日光。斯卡尔又欠你一个人情了，外来者。

String.Source: I'm afraid I can't give you any answers. But there are ruins of an ancient temple of Miraak's toward the center of the island.
String.Dest: 恐怕我给不了你什么答案，不过岛的中央有一座米拉克的古代神殿遗址。

String.Source: You may be able to break the hold on our people there, and free them from control.
String.Dest: 也许你能破除我们在那里的族人所受的束缚，将他们从奴役中解救出来。

String.Source: Really? When this is over, you'll have to tell me all about it.
String.Dest: 是吗？等这边的事情完了，你要详细跟我说说。

String.Source: You'll need to lower the water level before we can proceed any further.
String.Dest: 你得先降低水位我们才能继续前进。

String.Source: Varona goes to Raven Rock all the time. I'm sure she's fine.
String.Dest: 瓦罗纳总往鸦石镇跑，她肯定不会出事。

String.Source: No, I'm sure of that. And yet... I think I had a dream of a temple, and he was there.
String.Dest: 不，我很确定。但是……我好像梦到了一座神殿，他就在那儿。

String.Source: I was able to salvage most of the latest batch of mead. The rest was... fouled.
String.Dest: 我抢救出了大部分新酿的蜜酒，剩下的都……脏了。

String.Source: I'd prefer not to get into the details, but let's just say our opinions about the current status of the Tribunal vary widely.
String.Dest: 我不想说的太复杂，简单讲就是对于审判席的看法大相径庭。

String.Source: Return here with Stalhrim weapons and armor, and I will pay you a fair price for them.
String.Dest: 带着魔冰武器和盔甲回来，事成必有重赏。
抱歉，克雷修斯总是胡言乱语。

String.Source: I'm not sure, but it is fascinating, isn't it?
String.Dest: 我不确定，但是很值得探究，不是吗？

String.Source: After we left Morrowind, we found ourselves in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 我们离开晨风后，来到了天际。

String.Source: Good. Now let me get back to what I was doing.
The Skaal hunt not for sport, but to survive.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人狩猎不为娱乐，只为谋生。

String.Source: I do not think he has the patience to work the forge.
String.Dest: 我不认为他有耐心干锻炉的活儿。

String.Source: It was. After refusing to allow anyone to bring him food, Councilor Morvayn ordered his door to be knocked down before Crescius starved to death.
String.Dest: 是啊，那会儿他拒绝任何人给他带食物。莫尔凡议员下令撞开他的家门，免得他把自己饿死。

String.Source: I don't know. I keep thinking of the Earth Stone... Something to do with that.
String.Dest: 我不知道，我在想地石……应该和那个有些关系。

String.Source: Gjalund over at the docks brings me most of my supplies, and the rest comes from bartering with the people in town.
String.Dest: 我的补给大多是码头那儿的加朗德带来的，其他的是通过和镇民交易来的。

String.Source: We call them the True Tribunal because they have reclaimed their place in our hearts from the false Tribunal that came before.
String.Dest: 我们称真审判席为收复者，是因为他们从伪审判席手中夺回了以往在我们心中的地位。

String.Source: Here, like this. Go, bring two hands of redgrass. Be friend of tribe-kin.
String.Dest: 这儿，像这种。去，拿两手红草。当部落血亲朋友。

String.Source: As I'm watching this spectacle, a netch floats over the Bulwark towards him.
String.Dest: 我看这个奇景的时候，刚好一只气母飘过防护堤到他旁边儿。

String.Source: How I hate that title... damn fool's going to get himself killed over it someday.
String.Dest: 我恨这个头衔……那个傻子迟早会为它丧命。

String.Source: Just tell him I lost it or something.
String.Dest: 你告诉他我弄丢了就行。

String.Source: What?! That was supposed to be a gift! I was hoping to surprise you.
String.Dest: 什么？那是我要给你的礼物！本来想给你个惊喜的。

String.Source: For all I know, I might be the last Imperial left on Solstheim.
String.Dest: 就我所知，我可能是索瑟海姆最后的帝国人了。

String.Source: The Dunmer race doesn't bury their dead, or leave them to rot inside a stone sarcophagus.
String.Dest: 丹莫并不埋葬死者，也不会让遗体在石棺中腐烂。

String.Source: Aren't you going to read the book? I didn't go to all this trouble just to stand around admiring it.
String.Dest: 你不打算读这本书吗？我这么大费周章不只是为了站在它面前欣赏封面。

String.Source: I have some cubes I'm sure you're going to need.
String.Dest: 我这儿有些方典，你肯定用得上。

String.Source: Because I already have a wife, and I wouldn't want to make her jealous.
String.Dest: 因为我已经有老婆了，我不想让她嫉妒。
哦看啊。这不是我的新主人么。

String.Source: I don't have any gold to pay you with, but I can give you this staff.
String.Dest: 我给不了你钱，但我可以给你这把法杖。

String.Source: A few years ago, I was walking down by the docks and I noticed a Dunmer staggering along with a bottle of sujamma in hand.
String.Dest: 几年前，我沿着码头走路，看到个手拿一瓶苏贾玛的丹莫，走得跌跌撞撞。

String.Source: Make sure that you save some wood from the pile.
String.Dest: 记得在木材堆里留几根木头。

String.Source: There's a passage up there. We could reach it if the water level was higher.
String.Dest: 这上面有通路。要是水位够高，我们就能过去。

String.Source: I admit, we are not making the progress I'd hoped. Perhaps you are right, this venture might be more trouble than it's worth.
String.Dest: 我承认，我们没能达到预期进展。也许你说得对，这趟冒险的麻烦可能比收益大得多。

String.Source: You are interfering with official Thalmor business. You will leave immediately if you value your well-being.
String.Dest: 你在干涉梭默官方事务。想活命最好马上走开。

String.Source: Bad Nords. Say Thirsk theirs. Live by water, bother tribe-kin.
String.Dest: 坏诺德人。说瑟斯科他们的。住水边，骚扰部落血亲。

String.Source: It describes a discovery that was made in the mine by some of the diggers. They wanted Gratian to take a closer look.
String.Dest: 信里描述了挖掘工人们在矿里发现的东西。他们想让格瑞希安去瞧个仔细。

String.Source: Bah, you're just like the rest of the folks around here.
String.Dest: 啧，你就跟这儿其他人一个样儿。

String.Source: It is. Well, I assume it is. I haven't been able to find the entrance.
String.Dest: 是啊。嗯，我猜的。我到现在还没找到入口。

String.Source: There are more and more of those things showing up around here lately.
String.Dest: 那玩意儿最近越来越常冒出来了。

String.Source: Here, I picked up this cube for you.
String.Dest: 来，我帮你拿回了这块方典。

String.Source: Much of the Dwemer army at the Battle of Red Mountain must have come from here.
String.Dest: 红山之战的锻莫军队应该大多都来自于此。

String.Source: Strong always fight strong. Old chief strong, me stronger.
String.Dest: 壮的总打壮的。老酋长很壮，我更壮。

String.Source: No. Only the Telvanni have the ability to weave living growth from the ash.
String.Dest: 没有，只有泰瓦尼才有法子从灰烬中种出活的作物。

String.Source: This island was never meant for us. There's too much death here.
String.Dest: 我们不该来这座岛的，这里随时笼罩于死亡之下。

String.Source: Hunting for game has been scarce, and the waters are apparently too tainted for fishing.
String.Dest: 打猎获得的猎物变得稀少，水域污染严重，不再适合捕鱼了。

String.Source: The All-Maker is the maker of all things, and it is from the All-Maker that life flows like a great river.
String.Dest: 造物主创造了一切，生命就是从它而来，像江河那般滔滔流淌。

String.Source: Oh no, most certainly not. I'm a historian. I'm here to learn about the history of Solstheim.
String.Dest: 哦，不是，当然不是。我是个历史学家。来这儿研究索瑟海姆的历史。

String.Source: They bring us things from their homeland that we can't find on the island, such as spices, fine cloth and ores that we cannot mine here.
String.Dest: 他们从自己家乡带来了很多这个岛上找不到的东西，比如香料、上等布料和我们这儿挖不到的矿石。

String.Source: I know our ways must seem strange to you, but the nine gods of the Empire are equally strange to us.
String.Dest: 我知道我们的传统对你来说很奇怪，但是帝国那九个神在我们眼中也很奇怪。

String.Source: If I were you, I'd look there.
String.Dest: 我要是你就会去那边看看。

String.Source: You know, the lady who runs the East Empire Company Warehouse in Solitude... the biggest warehouse they have in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 你认识她吗，那个独孤城东帝国公司仓库的管理人，那是他们在天际最大的仓库。

String.Source: It's true that my heart has always been restless, and fighting was the only way I could find peace.
String.Dest: 而我也确实静不下来，打架成了唯一能让我静下来的事儿。

String.Source: Well, my mother used to say that I was born an angry child.
String.Dest: 嗯，我妈常说我生来爱发火。

String.Source: Get out of here, before I lose my patience.
String.Dest: 给我滚开，别等我不耐烦了。

String.Source: But our time here is running out. The few of us left free of control cannot protect ourselves for much longer.
String.Dest: 但时间不多了，我们这些剩下来的人没法长时间保护自己。

String.Source: I feared that it would be so.
No weapon is worth dying for, not even a weapon forged from Stalhrim.
String.Dest: 为武器而死可不值得，即使是魔冰铸造的也不划算。

String.Source: Make it quick. I won't be here much longer.
String.Dest: 快说啊，我马上就离开这里了。

String.Source: I recognize the name, but... I don't know how I know it. It sounds so familiar.
String.Dest: 我知道这名字，但是……不清楚怎么知道的了。听起来很耳熟。

String.Source: That is what the stories say. You are Dragonborn as well, then. Perhaps you are connected.
String.Dest: 这也是传说中记载的。你也是龙裔，也许你们有所联系。

String.Source: Good. Then let us see who truly has the soul of the Dov.
String.Dest: 很好。那么我们来看看谁才有真的都瓦之魂。

String.Source: I was hoping you'd say that.
You expect me to just hand you the map, so you can deliver it to the blacksmith and laugh at the foolish Thalmor you so easily outwitted?
String.Dest: 你要我把地图给你，好让你给那个铁匠？然后你们俩就能嘲笑被你轻松骗到的梭默？

String.Source: Ildari? She was a beauty, she was.
String.Dest: 伊达利？她以前很漂亮，真的。

String.Source: This isn't exactly the city of Blacklight. We're on the frontier out here, and we've had more than a fair share of troubles.
String.Dest: 这儿显然与黑光城不同。我们现在身处边疆，遇到了不少的麻烦。

String.Source: Oh, absolutely. In fact, I've corresponded with Vittoria Vici herself more than once.
String.Dest: 当然有了。实际上我还和维多利亚·薇齐通过信呢，不止一次。

String.Source: They're the largest trading company in Tamriel, originally chartered by the Emperor of Cyrodiil himself.
String.Dest: 全泰姆瑞尔最大的贸易公司，原先是希罗帝尔皇帝特许经营的。

String.Source: Once Halbarn's done sharpening my blade, those Rieklings are going to pay...
String.Dest: 等哈尔巴恩把我的刀磨锋利，那些瑞克灵就得付出代价了……

String.Source: Regardless, I hope to return there someday... which doesn't seem likely given my husband's commitment to Councilor Morvayn.
String.Dest: 无论如何，我希望某天能回到那里……虽然看起来违背了我丈夫向莫尔凡议员作出的承诺。

String.Source: The East Empire Company must have felt it was of great value, as they locked that section of the mine off from everyone else.
String.Dest: 东帝国公司一定是觉得那玩意儿很珍贵，所以把那片矿区封锁起来不让别人进去了。

String.Source: All of the soldiers in this town are Redoran Guard... some of the best warriors that House Redoran has to offer.
