The legends speak of that place. Terrible battles fought at the temple. The dragons burning it to the ground in rage.
String.Dest: 传说中曾提到过那个地方。那座神殿曾有过一场大战。龙族盛怒之下将其夷为平地。

String.Source: The bear might find food elsewhere. We will leave it alone.
String.Dest: 那头熊可能会去别的地儿找食物。我们别碰它吧。

String.Source: Father! I have returned! There is yet hope!
String.Dest: 父亲！我回来了！还有希望！

String.Source: I hate most of the travelers that come through here, but you've shown yourself as one of the better ones.
String.Dest: 来这儿的大多数旅行者我都讨厌，但你已经证明自己是个好人了。

String.Source: I'm relieved that you were able to save Baldor. I admit, I wasn't ready to become smith of the Skaal.
String.Dest: 你救了鲍德尔让我松了口气。我得承认，还没准备好成为斯卡尔的铁匠。

String.Source: They were aberrations, false prophets. They used their status as heroes to shield the True Tribunal from our minds.
String.Dest: 他们是异端、虚伪的先知，以自己英雄的身份阻止我们去了解真审判席。

String.Source: Seek him out to the south. Be cautious, Dragonborn. There is something else at work here.
String.Dest: 去南边找他吧。但是当心啊龙裔。除此之外还有他物。

String.Source: Time's my enemy... it's caught up with me before I could find the answers that I'm looking for.
String.Dest: 时间在和我作对……在我还没找到答案前就追上我了。

String.Source: Can't talk too much, I'm afraid.
I'll bet he stole it from the Skaal in the first place.
String.Dest: 我敢赌他一开始是从斯卡尔村偷出来的。

String.Source: Finally, I can get some sleep at night.
Now you're starting to sound like everyone else.
String.Dest: 那你和其他人没什么两样。

String.Source: If I'd known that I was married to a fox who digs under beds to look for treats, then perhaps I would have.
String.Dest: 我要是知道娶了条会到床底下挖洞找礼物的狐狸，就会藏的更好了。

String.Source: You planning on sticking around for a while? Think about ways to make yourself useful.
String.Dest: 打算在这儿多呆一会儿吗？先证明自己的价值吧。

String.Source: When we stalk large game, I lead our hunters in tracking the beast. It is also a way of saying that I am the most skilled hunter in the village.
String.Dest: 当我们要追踪大型猎物时，我会带着其他猎人盯紧那野兽。这也代表我是村里最有经验的猎人。

String.Source: It might appear brittle, but I'd wager it could stop the blow of a weapon better than iron or steel.
String.Dest: 可能看起来很脆，但我打包票它比钢铁更能抵抗武器击打。

String.Source: It's true we Skaal prefer a simpler life than some, but we do still enjoy a luxury from time to time.
String.Dest: 我们斯卡尔人确实更喜欢简单的生活，但偶尔也会享受一些奢侈玩意儿。

String.Source: East Empire Company called it "a terrible accident," claiming that he was lost in a rockfall, but I know better.
String.Dest: 东帝国公司称那是“一场糟糕的意外”，说他死于塌方，但我清楚得很。

String.Source: I was chosen by the people of the village when our last leader, Skaf the Giant, departed the cold world to join the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 当上一位首领，“巨人”斯卡夫离开这寒冷世界去陪伴造物主后，村里的族人就推举我为领袖。

String.Source: Miraak... I'm sure I've heard that name before. Haven't I? Was it in a dream?
String.Dest: 米拉克……我确定以前听过这名字。有吗？还是在梦里？

String.Source: Very well, I'll take a look at it later.
I do. I want to know what happened to Gratian, and what the East Empire Company is keeping from all of us.
String.Dest: 我需要。我想知道格瑞希安出什么事儿，还有东帝国公司在隐瞒什么。

String.Source: A secret the East Empire Company swept under the rug two centuries ago.
String.Dest: 一个东帝国公司藏了两百年的秘密。

String.Source: I hope Elynea has something for headaches.
String.Dest: 希望艾琳娜有治头痛的药。

String.Source: That was some twenty years ago now.
String.Dest: 那是二十年前的事情了。

String.Source: She was only interested in magic and power.
Who in the blazes are you?! Can't you see I'm busy?
String.Dest: 你他妈又是谁？！没看到我很忙吗？

String.Source: My wife and I were cleaning out our home, and we came across some of my great-grandfather's things locked in an old chest.
String.Dest: 我和爱人在打扫屋子的时候，偶然发现了一些我曾祖父的遗物，被锁在一个旧箱子里。

String.Source: No, no, no. This isn't just your run-of-the-mill pickaxe... I'm talking about an Ancient Nordic Pickaxe.
String.Dest: 不不不。这把不是一般的鹤嘴锄……我说的是一把古诺德鹤嘴锄。

String.Source: You must go to Saering's Watch. Learn there the word that Miraak learned long ago, and use that knowledge on the Wind Stone.
String.Dest: 你得前往瑟林看台，学会很久以前米拉克在那儿学的龙语，运用那些知识来解放风石。

String.Source: Wouldn't it be easier just to turn off the trap? Like so?
String.Dest: 把陷阱关了不就简单了？像这样。

String.Source: Why should I tell you? I don't even know who you are.
String.Dest: 为什么要跟你说？我甚至都不认识你。

String.Source: Well, that's progress of a sort. But we'll need all three down at once to get to the pump control.
String.Dest: 嗯，这也算某种进展吧。但我们需要把三座桥同时降下来才能去水泵控制器那边。

String.Source: Besides, knowing how to repair bonemold armor wasn't very useful in Riften.
String.Dest: 另外，修补骨模的知识在裂谷城没什么用。

String.Source: That's it! Don't touch anything else. Quickly now.
String.Dest: 就是这样！现在什么都别碰。快走吧。

String.Source: And now, with the constant eruptions of the Red Mountain, it's more important than ever.
String.Dest: 而现在，随着红山的不断喷发，它比以往时期都重要。

String.Source: Be careful down there, the mine can be treacherous.
String.Dest: 在那下面小心点，矿里是有潜在危险的。

String.Source: Oh, Varona. She didn't deserve this. This is a dark day for Tel Mithryn.
String.Dest: 哦，瓦罗纳。她死的真不值。这是泰尔·米斯瑞恩的黑暗时光。

String.Source: Ah, good! Another cube. We're finally making some progress.
String.Dest: 啊，很好！又一个方典。终于有些进展了。

String.Source: There's a terrible ache in my back today.
Yes, I know the one you saw. It watches us each night, always moving closer.
String.Dest: 对，我知道你看到的那一头。它每天晚上都在观察我们，而且靠得越来越近。

String.Source: They just didn't want to spend the coin trying to find it.
String.Dest: 他们只是不想花钱去找而已。

String.Source: I am unsure. It may mean that you could save us, or it may mean that you could bring about our destruction.
String.Dest: 我不确定。可能意味着你能救我们，也可能是指你会带来我们的灭亡。

String.Source: Bad? What if I told you that you're the first person that's even considered looking at my wares today.
String.Dest: 不好？跟你说，今天除了你来，就还没开张呢。

String.Source: He never sleeps. I don't know how he does it, but he never rests for even a moment.
String.Dest: 他从来不睡觉。我不清楚是怎么做到的，但是他从来不休息。

String.Source: Do you ever wonder if it hurts? To have one's soul ripped out like that?
String.Dest: 你有想过那会痛吗？像那样把灵魂硬生生扯出来？

String.Source: At least hear me out before you walk away.
String.Dest: 在走开前至少听我说完。

String.Source: What a relief. Master Neloth surely would have punished me had he found out.
String.Dest: 真是松了口气。内洛斯大师要是知道了，我肯定会被他惩罚的。

String.Source: How am I supposed to get anything done with part of the tower withered like this?
String.Dest: 塔的某处枯萎了，我怎么有工作的心情呢？

String.Source: Ugh! The heart stone protects me!
I am Master Neloth's apprentice. He's teaching me the art of sorcery.
String.Dest: 我是内洛斯大师的学徒。他教我法术之道。

String.Source: I could travel to Raven Rock and purchase some more.
String.Dest: 我可以去趟鸦石镇买些回来。

String.Source: So, you have seen things, yes? My magic grows weak, and so does the barrier around our village. Time is short. Tell me what you know.
String.Dest: 那么，你看到了什么，对吧？我的魔法在逐渐变弱，围绕村子的屏障也是如此。时间不多了，把你知道的都告诉我吧。

String.Source: If it's not a weapon, potion or armor, then it's likely that I have it.
String.Dest: 除了武器，药水还有护甲之外，我应该都有。

String.Source: Damn it, woman! I said to leave me be!
String.Dest: 混账娘们儿！我叫你别管我！

String.Source: Then may the All-Maker give you the strength of a great bear and make your will as firm as stone.
String.Dest: 愿造物主赐你巨熊之力，让你的意志坚如磐石。

String.Source: Exploring, huh? Most folks think this place isn't worth the effort.
String.Dest: 探查，哈？大多数人都觉得没必要费这个力。

String.Source: That was almost two centuries ago. There may be nothing left to find.
String.Dest: 那差不多是两百年前的事了。下面可能找不到什么东西了。

String.Source: Crescius, last time you explored the mine you almost fell to your death. I'm not spending the rest of my days as a widow!
String.Dest: 克雷修斯，你上次探查矿坑的时候就差点摔死了。我可不打算下半辈子守活寡！

String.Source: No, but I have brought someone who has seen things...
String.Dest: 不，但是我带来一个人，他看到了某些东西……

String.Source: I just wanted to remind that codger you can't just go around taking things from other people.
String.Dest: 我就只是想提醒那老头儿，不能就这样随便拿走别人的东西。

String.Source: Besides, that pickaxe hasn't done me any good in years. Maybe you can put it to good use.
String.Dest: 另外，这把鹤嘴锄这些年都没帮上我的忙。可能它们对你有用。

String.Source: Now that you've delivered the message, I'm satisfied.
String.Dest: 既然你已经替我转达了，就够了。

String.Source: So you finally tracked down old Crescius, eh? Quite a character, isn't he.
String.Dest: 所以你真去找老克雷修斯了？他挺有个性吧。

String.Source: Oh, very well. Here. Tell him I hope he drops the thing on his foot.
String.Dest: 哦，好吧。拿去。跟他说希望这东西会砸到他的脚。

String.Source: Sooner or later they all pay.
If you're looking to learn more, you should head over to the Skaal Village. Someone there's bound to know more about it than I do.
String.Dest: 你要是想了解更多，就该去斯卡尔村。那儿肯定有人比我懂得多。

String.Source: The book in my dream showed me...
Very good. By my count, we've found a total of four cubes. I have one that you forgot to pick up. I hope you didn't leave any others lying around.
String.Dest: 很好。算了下我们一共找到了四个方典。我这里有一个你忘了拿的。希望你没有遗漏其他的了。

String.Source: One step closer to my return.
That is sweet of you, Deor, but you should find a better hiding place next time.
String.Dest: 你太好了，迪乌尔，但下次该藏在更隐蔽的地方。

String.Source: I haven't seen the city in over fifty years. Even for a Dunmer, that seems like an eternity.
String.Dest: 我已经五十多年没见过这座城了，即使是丹莫也感觉是一辈子那么久。

String.Source: Those cowards left decades ago. Every single damned one of them.
String.Dest: 那些懦夫几十年前就走啦，没一个混蛋留下来。

String.Source: Not many of those beauties left in the world... forging them is a lost art.
String.Dest: 这种好东西在世上不剩几把了……它们的锻造方法已经是门失传的技术。

String.Source: You dare to question me? That insult will be your last!
String.Dest: 你竟敢质疑我？没有下次机会了！

String.Source: Maybe you should be the one to tell him.
I have to be. As Second Councilor, the security of Raven Rock is my primary concern.
String.Dest: 我没得选。作为副议员，鸦石镇的安危是我最关心的问题。

String.Source: Sigh. I don't care what you, or anyone else thinks about me.
String.Dest: 唉。我不在乎你，还是其他人怎么看我。

String.Source: As the years have passed, it's gotten worse. He's become obsessed with his theories of conspiracy.
String.Dest: 随着时间推移，情况更糟糕了。他深陷于自己那些阴谋论。

String.Source: With the cubes I retrieved, we should now have a total of five. I hope you haven't left more scattered about.
String.Dest: 算上我拿来的方典，我们现在应该总共有五块。希望你没有遗漏其他的。

String.Source: There's nothing to worry about, nothing to worry about at all...
String.Dest: 没什么好担心的，完全不用担心……

String.Source: To touch the sky like a dragon...
It makes my heart heavy, to think of killing a beast when we have no need of its hide or its meat. That is not our way.
String.Dest: 一想到我们不需要它的皮肉，就感到心痛。那不是我们的作风。

String.Source: Are the potatoes ready for eating? I want to roast them with some onions for the night's meal.
String.Dest: 土豆可以吃了吗？我想加些洋葱烤来当晚饭。

String.Source: What a mess. I'm getting tired of wading around in this muck.
String.Dest: 真是令人作呕。在这脏水池里跋涉真让我受不了。

String.Source: Best tell Neloth. I'm sure he'll mourn for all of two seconds.
String.Dest: 最好跟内洛斯说一声。他最多就会哀悼两秒钟。

String.Source: I believe these pillars will activate the pumps for this room, assuming they still work.
String.Dest: 我相信这些石柱能启动房间里的水泵，希望它们还能运转。

String.Source: I'm quite sure the boilers will not work while they're under water.
String.Dest: 我很确定那些锅炉没法在水下运作。

String.Source: However, in this case I have reason to believe it is someone in Solstheim.
String.Dest: 但是，从这次来看我有理由相信，是索瑟海姆的人。

String.Source: When a Dunmer passes, his body is given to fire, so he might return to the ash from whence he came.
String.Dest: 当一个丹莫过世后，尸体会被火化，以回归来处，即灰烬中。

String.Source: I was foolish to expect compassion from an outsider.
String.Dest: 我居然蠢到跟一个外来者诉苦。

String.Source: So Neloth is afraid to face me himself!
String.Dest: 看来内洛斯害怕直面我！

String.Source: No, I... Wait. Maybe. I don't know how I know that name...
String.Dest: 不，我……等下，可能。我不记得怎么听说的了。

String.Source: That blasted wizard couldn't be bothered to give her some protection for those trips. This is all his fault.
String.Dest: 那个混蛋法师根本就没想过为她的路途提供保护，全是他的错。

String.Source: I'm not sure. I think so, but the only thing that comes to mind is a shrine near the Earth Stone.
String.Dest: 我不确定，应该吧，但是我唯一想的起来的，是地石附近的一座祭坛。

String.Source: Calling stalhrim an ore is like calling my forge a campfire.
String.Dest: 把魔冰叫作矿石的话，那我的锻炉就是营火了。

String.Source: True, but I think that Edla would be hurt if you didn't give her the chance to trade for it first.
String.Dest: 是啊，但我想艾迪拉要是知道你没先找她买，会很失望的。

String.Source: The Rootspire where the Council of Great Houses meet is something to behold.
String.Dest: 大家族议会所在的“根塔”值得一观。

String.Source: I assure you, if I could convince Adril to do that, I'd be on the next ship back to Blacklight.
String.Dest: 我可以保证，要是真能说服阿德尔这么做，我立马就搭船回黑光城了。

String.Source: Adril and I lived in Blacklight, the capital city of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 阿德尔和我原本住在晨风的首都黑光城。

String.Source: You strong! All tribe-kin stronger with you.
String.Dest: 你壮！部落血亲都跟着你变壮。

String.Source: You'll need the cube I picked up to start all the boilers.
String.Dest: 你得拿回我拿来的这块方典，才能开启所有锅炉。

String.Source: Complaining to me won't make your pain go away, Oslaf. Go and see Edla, perhaps she has a remedy.
String.Dest: 跟我抱怨也不会减轻你的背痛，奥斯拉夫。去找艾迪拉，她可能有药水。

String.Source: He has confirmed that Miraak is indeed behind the suffering of our people.
String.Dest: 他确认了米拉克确实是我们族人受难的幕后指使者。

String.Source: A decade ago, this drove him into a deep depression. He shut himself inside his home and refused to come out.
String.Dest: 十年前，这件事儿让他陷入重度抑郁。他把自己锁在家里不愿出门。

String.Source: The most important is that I stand by Adril, no matter how I feel. And I intend to do that until we get off this miserable rock.
String.Dest: 重要的是不管感受如何，都要支持阿德尔。在我们离开这座可悲的小岛前，我都会这么做。

String.Source: I thought you understood how this worked by now. The water level needs to be lower for the boilers to work at all.
String.Dest: 我还以为你已经明白流程了。只有先降低水位，才能让锅炉运转。

String.Source: We're the mightiest of the Great Houses and we lead the Council, the ruling body of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 我们是最强盛的丹莫大家族，我们主导着晨风的统治机构————议会。

String.Source: Now, give me one good reason that I should not kill you where you stand.
String.Dest: 现在，给我个理由，说服我不用当场杀了你。

String.Source: Unfortunately for you, my mission here is also a secret. To protect it, I have no choice but to silence you.
String.Dest: 你运气不好，我这是趟秘密行动。为了保住秘密我别无选择，只能杀你灭口。

String.Source: Perhaps it has some relation to what's going on here. Quite unexpected.
String.Dest: 可能和这儿发生的事情有所联系呢，真是意想不到。

String.Source: Try walking around the grounds with the ring on.
String.Dest: 戴上这个指环到处走走。

String.Source: Miraak? The name sounds familiar... Or does it? I can't remember.
String.Dest: 米拉克？这名字听起来很耳熟……还是错觉？我记不得了。

String.Source: They said it couldn't be done. They said it. They said it. But they were wrong!
String.Dest: 他们说过是不可能的，说过的。但他们都错啦！

String.Source: Do I? What a strange thing. It sounds so familiar, and yet I cannot place the name.
String.Dest: 我知道吗？真奇怪。听起来很耳熟，但是和人对不上了。

String.Source: As the ashfall worsens, the land and water are poisoned. The animals have less to eat and become desperate.
String.Dest: 火山灰下的越来越多，土壤和水质都被污染了。野兽的食物变少，就会铤而走险。

String.Source: I've half a mind to contact my friends at the East Empire Company and see if they need an extra hand in Windhelm.
String.Dest: 我已经想联系我在东帝国公司的朋友，没准儿他们在风舵城需要帮手。

String.Source: Just warming up for a bit here, before I head out and take some revenge on those Rieklings.
String.Dest: 还在热身，等我好了就去找那些瑞克灵报仇。

String.Source: Just one more mug of mead, and then I'm off!
String.Dest: 再来一杯蜜酒，然后就上！

String.Source: Imagine what I could do with that power.
String.Dest: 试想要是我有那种力量会做什么。
哈比查拉卡瓦拉麻了克。

String.Source: Not until I've figured out what is going on.
String.Dest: 我得先知道发生了什么。

String.Source: She was a headstrong one. Always pushing Master Neloth to teach her more.
String.Dest: 她是个固执的人，总是催着内洛斯大师多教教她。

String.Source: And you will sell them to me. I suppose I'll have to give you the map first?
String.Dest: 然后你会拿来卖给我。看来我该先把地图给你对吧？

String.Source: The place still has some of the Riekling stink on it, but that'll wash out in time.
String.Dest: 这地方还有瑞克灵的臭味呢，但我会马上洗干净。

String.Source: I stayed for a while and cared for him, then... I suppose we fell in love.
String.Dest: 我留下来照顾他，之后……我想我们就爱上彼此了。

String.Source: She has confirmed that Miraak is the one behind the suffering of our people.
String.Dest: 她确认了米拉克确实是我们族人受难的幕后指使者。

String.Source: Find a new steward for us quickly. Master Neloth is making me do all her work.
String.Dest: 快点帮我们找个新管家，内洛斯大师把工作全丢给我了。

String.Source: Well, Deor and Yrsa are still young. In time, I'm sure that they will have many children.
String.Dest: 嗯，迪乌尔和依尔莎还很年轻。我敢说他们迟早会有很多孩子。

String.Source: I'd guess that must be the pump activator up there.
String.Dest: 我想上面那就是水泵启动器。

String.Source: It's difficult... Something about it doesn't feel right. A... A temple, here on the island. That's all I can recall.
String.Dest: 太难了……感觉有些地方不太对劲。一座……一座神殿，就在这岛上。我只能想起这些了。

String.Source: You haven't seen Crescius Caerellius have you? That foolish old man's taken my pickaxe again!
String.Dest: 你有看到克雷修斯·凯利乌斯了吗？那个傻老头又把我的鹤嘴锄拿走了！

String.Source: But over the years, the ash from Red Mountain poisoned the sea up there and the fishing became difficult.
String.Dest: 但是过了几年，红山的火山灰污染了那里的水域，很难捕到鱼了。

String.Source: Unfortunately, Adril and Councilor Morvayn are very close friends, and they will never abandon one another... despite my feelings.
String.Dest: 可惜阿德尔和莫尔凡议员是非常要好的朋友，他们永远不会抛弃彼此……不论我的感受如何。

String.Source: Bad people. They come, fight us. We fight back now.
String.Dest: 坏人。他们来，打我们。我们现在打回去。

String.Source: This simply takes the right ingredients, the right tools and a lot of patience.
String.Dest: 我只需要对的材料，合适的工具和大把耐心就够了。

String.Source: It was born out of the necessity to survive in the harsh climate of our homeland.
String.Dest: 我们家园的恶劣气候促成了它的诞生。

String.Source: Tribe-kin missing redgrass. Need for godspeak dance.
String.Dest: 部落血亲们想要红草。用在敬神舞。

String.Source: Far from it. In fact, I'm no longer welcome there.
String.Dest: 远非如此，事实上我已经不被那儿欢迎了。

String.Source: I come from three generations of miners, and I'm telling you that the East Empire Company was wrong.
String.Dest: 我是矿工家庭第三代人，我可以告诉你，东帝国公司搞错了。

String.Source: Watch out, the water's rising even higher with both pumps shut down.
String.Dest: 小心，两个水泵都关闭后，水位变得更高了。

String.Source: Spent a lot of time with the guy swapping smithing techniques. Learned a heck of a lot, including how to repair bonemold.
String.Dest: 我花了很长时间跟他交流锻造技术，学到了很多，包括修补骨模。

String.Source: Solstheim is a fascinating place, but we know so little about its past. There are many mysteries that remain unsolved.
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆是个迷人的地方，但我们对这儿的历史几乎一无所知。还有很多谜团尚未解开。

String.Source: I'm sure the All-Maker has more important concerns than your potatoes, Oslaf.
String.Dest: 造物主肯定有比你的土豆更重要的事情要办，奥斯拉夫。

String.Source: If it weren't for my supply runs to Raven Rock, I'd have likely sold my ship by now and moved back to Riften.
String.Dest: 要不是现在还能给鸦石镇运物资，我可能早就把船卖掉回裂谷城去了。

String.Source: Please, tell me what you found.
String.Dest: 拜托了，告诉我你找到了什么。

String.Source: I... I'm unsure. I swear I know the name, but cannot place it.
String.Dest: 我……我不确定。我肯定听过这名字，但是对不上号。

String.Source: Decided to give me a listen, eh? Good.
String.Dest: 终于想听我说了吗？很好。

String.Source: Welcome to the Retching Netch Cornerclub, home of the finest sujamma that will ever grace your lips.
String.Dest: 欢迎来到呕吐气母街角酒吧，这儿有极品的苏贾玛，绝对顺口。

String.Source: Tell her she'll welcome back anytime.
You're having us do neither, and I can't stomach it.
String.Dest: 但是你两个都不选，我受不了了。

String.Source: What consequences did we suffer from this fallacy?
String.Dest: 这种谬论让我们承受了什么后果？

String.Source: Glad to have a warm place to sleep, myself, but I would have left the rest of these idiots to toughen up a little longer.
String.Dest: 很高兴有个暖窝儿睡觉，但我宁可让那些蠢货变得坚强一点儿。

String.Source: There's nothing finer than dark elf sujamma... like nectar it is.
String.Dest: 没什么比得上暗精灵的苏贾玛了……就跟蜜一样甘醇。

String.Source: I can't be sure. I know I've heard that name, but it... it doesn't feel real. Does that make any sense?
String.Dest: 我不能肯定。我知道听过这名字，但它……感觉不太真实。这又能说明什么呢？

String.Source: I'm proud of you, Hilund. You've held up well.
String.Dest: 我为你骄傲，希兰德。你表现得很好。

String.Source: Yes, I remember how I felt being there with her the first time, before we were wed. I hope to see you more around the hall, friend.
String.Dest: 没错，我还记得第一次与她相伴的感受。我希望你以后常来大厅转转，朋友。

String.Source: I'm trying to apologize. Do you want to listen?
String.Dest: 我在跟你道歉呢。想听听吗？

String.Source: How remarkable to think these passages have gone undisturbed for so long.
String.Dest: 这些通道这么长时间都没受干扰，真了不起。

String.Source: I suppose you're right. If she wants to spend her life at the bottom of an ale mug, it's her right.
String.Dest: 你说得对。要是她乐意饮酒度日，那也是她的自由。

String.Source: I don't know... I feel strange just thinking about it. A temple, maybe? Here on the island? Something about a temple...
String.Dest: 我不知道……一想起来就觉得很奇怪。可能是一座神殿？就在这岛上？反正是和一座神殿有关的……

String.Source: It's rough out here. But I'm getting by.
String.Dest: 在这儿过日子很艰辛。但我还撑得住。

String.Source: One, the riddle is most likely referring to these flat square stones.
String.Dest: 一，这道谜语看起来像在说这些扁方石头。

String.Source: I'm not afraid of you. She's not coming in here, and that's that.
String.Dest: 我可不怕你。这里就是不欢迎她，就这样。

String.Source: Oh, wonderful. Anything to keep the spirits up.
String.Dest: 哦，太好了。只要是能提神的都行。

String.Source: I wonder if this fire pit has anything to do with the riddle.
String.Dest: 你说这个火坑与谜语有关系吗？

String.Source: Why are you so hard on Elmus?
String.Dest: 你为什么对艾穆斯那么严厉？
不，对不起。那么做就是错的。

String.Source: Don't tell me you believe that rot! Well, as soon as Jorn gets back, you'll see. You'll see.
String.Dest: 别跟我说你相信那些鬼话！约恩回来你就知道了，等着看吧。

String.Source: Really, all you need to do is watch.
String.Dest: 真的，你只需要看着就行了。

String.Source: Maybe if we can find out...
If you need any supplies, you know where to find me.
String.Dest: 如果需要任何补给的话，你知道在哪儿找我。

String.Source: Not everything is as happy as you do.
String.Dest: 不是每个人都像你这么乐观。

String.Source: It's going to be a long time before things ever get back to the way they were... if ever.
String.Dest: 要恢复到以前的样子还有的等了……可能的话。

String.Source: So... what do you plan on doing?
Most of the old brew is still good, but I had to get rid of some of the newer batches.
String.Dest: 之前酿的大多还能喝，但是新酿的几批我必须处理掉。

String.Source: We don't even know what's inside. And besides, there's... the curse.
String.Dest: 我们根本不知道里面有什么。况且，这儿……被诅咒了。

String.Source: They also have glowing stones of some kind at the top. They look vaguely similar to drawings I've seen of objects called Impact Stones.
String.Dest: 它们顶部也有那种发光的石头。看起来有点像我见过的，某种叫“冲击石”的东西。

String.Source: Bujold says you served well. Before we were married, I was her second on the first trip to the barrow.
String.Dest: 布约德说你干得很好。在我们结婚前她第一次去古坟那儿，是我担任她的副手。

String.Source: Let's find these cubes and get out of here.
String.Dest: 快找到那些方典然后出去吧。

String.Source: I used to be a miner, a good one too. I made more gold digging up ore in a month than some people earn in a lifetime.
String.Dest: 我从前是个矿工，很能干的那种。我挖一个月矿挣的钱比有些人一辈子挣得还多。

String.Source: A lot of work to do around this place...
This is all I can offer in return for this. I hope it's enough.
String.Dest: 我只能给你这些来报答了。希望你满意。

String.Source: Ah, splendid! I had no doubt you'd make it across. Let's see what awaits us ahead.
String.Dest: 啊，太好了！我从不怀疑你能过去。让我们看看有什么在前头等着。

String.Source: Alright, lets see what we have next.
String.Dest: 好吧，看看接下来有什么。

String.Source: Our faith is being judged every day, captain. We can't ignore it.
String.Dest: 我们的信仰每天都受到考验，队长。我们不能忽视这点。

String.Source: Hm, I wonder if I should have brought more torches.
String.Dest: 嗯，我该带几只火把来的。

String.Source: Here's another riddle. "Stay your course. To idle is to die." Well, at least it's straightforward.
String.Dest: 又一道谜语。“勇往直前，发呆者死。”好吧，至少说的很直白。

String.Source: I'm not going to lead them to their deaths if they aren't ready.
String.Dest: 他们还没准备好，我不打算带他们去送死。

String.Source: I was afraid the earthquakes might have done serious damage here, but the tomb seems to be in fine condition.
String.Dest: 原本我还担心地震会对这里造成严重破坏，但这墓穴看来情况良好。

String.Source: If you can get that stubborn mule to let me into the Netch, I'll make sure you get what's coming to you.
String.Dest: 要是能说服那犟驴让我进气母，我一定会报答你。

String.Source: Maybe I'm just confused. I can't be sure.
String.Dest: 也许我就是记错了。我不确定。

String.Source: Well, I have these other ingredients for sale for now. It'll have to do.
String.Dest: 嗯，现在我还有这些别的原料可以卖。就这样吧。

String.Source: I know what you want: to use your power as Dragonborn to bend the world to your will.
String.Dest: 我知道你想要什么：运用你作为龙裔的力量，让世界臣服于你。

String.Source: Get out of here. Run to the wilds.
The last time I was here, I only explored a small part of the ruins.
String.Dest: 我上次来的时候，只搜索了这废墟的一小部分。

String.Source: Don't worry, my love. I'll find a way.
String.Dest: 不用担心，亲爱的。我会有法子的。

String.Source: Oh, how kind. Thank Geldis for me, won't you?
String.Dest: 哦，太有心了。帮我跟吉迪斯说声谢谢，对吧？

String.Source: It seems the ancient Dwemer discovered this book and took it to study.
String.Dest: 看来古代锻莫找到了这本书，然后仔细研读。

String.Source: Now, lets see if we can find the other half of that claw.
String.Dest: 现在，看看能不能找到另一半龙爪。

String.Source: No, no, nothing like that. He doesn't need to battle us to know us. He's always watched over Thirsk, and sees us from beyond.
String.Dest: 不，完全不是那样。他用不着和我们交手就摸清我们了。他一直在远方注视着瑟斯科和我们。

String.Source: Miraak... It sounds very familiar. Not someone here, but... I'm not sure I can recall.
String.Dest: 米拉克……听起来很耳熟。不是这儿的人，但是……我不确定能不能想起来。

String.Source: Perfect! I was just thinking about heading over for a drink. Thanks for saving me the trip.
String.Dest: 太棒了！我正想着过去喝一杯呢。谢谢你让我少跑一趟。

String.Source: What brings you to Raven Rock?
Here, take these samples of the sujamma and spread the word. If you get rid of all of them, there's something extra in it for you.
String.Dest: 拿着，带上这些苏贾玛样品帮我宣传。要是全部发完了，我还会给你额外的奖励。

String.Source: I... uh, I hadn't planned on it. Do you need my help?
String.Dest: 我……呃，我没打算过。需要我帮忙吗？

String.Source: Let's try not to disturb anything.
String.Dest: 我们最好不要打扰任何东西。

String.Source: This place was quite a find!
I appreciate your problems, Adril, but I can't be expected to run a temple with those... things running around in there.
String.Dest: 我理解你的难处，阿德尔，但这里面有那些……东西存在，我就没法主持神殿了。

String.Source: Spare some coin for a lost soul?
String.Dest: 施舍我这可怜人点儿钱吧？

String.Source: Well done! It looks like we can head in either direction. Since you seem to know what you're doing, why don't you lead the way?
String.Dest: 干得好！看来我们能选一个方向前进了。既然你看来很有把握，为什么不让你来带路呢。

String.Source: We have nothing to say to each other.
Are you here to rescue me?
Well then, I suppose I'm off to do what I do best.
String.Dest: 那么，我想去做最擅长的事情了。

String.Source: Keep yourself safe... Solstheim's still a dangerous place.
String.Dest: 顾好自己的安全……索瑟海姆还是危险的地方。

String.Source: Damn. I'm still low on netch jelly. He might have to wait until next month until I can gather some more.
String.Dest: 该死。我的气母胶还是不够。他可能得等到下个月我再采一些的时候了。

String.Source: By the nine! I've never seen anything like this. They appear to be platforms made entirely of magical force. Absolutely remarkable!
String.Dest: 九圣灵啊！我没见过这种东西。它们像是魔法能量形成的平台。太神奇了！

String.Source: Don't want to talk to the likes of you.
String.Dest: 我不想和你这种人说话。

String.Source: The burial place of Hrothmund, who founded Thirsk.
String.Dest: 瑟斯科的建立者，哈洛斯蒙德的葬身之处。

String.Source: Hermaeus Mora has always tried to seduce mortals into his service with the lure of forbidden knowledge.
String.Dest: 赫麦尤斯·莫拉一直在用禁忌知识来引诱凡人为他效劳。

String.Source: Are you going to join us on the next hunt?
String.Dest: 我们下次打猎时你会加入么？

String.Source: This is home, now, boy. Start living it.
String.Dest: 现在这儿就是家了，小子。接受现实吧。

String.Source: Mark my words. Raven Rock isn't finished yet.
String.Dest: 听好了，鸦石镇还有未来。

String.Source: I'm hoping you didn't suffer much at the hands of those foul beings. Please, accept this as a token of my thanks.
String.Dest: 希望那些肮脏生物没给你带来大麻烦。请收下这个吧，聊表我的感激。

String.Source: Don't stay away for too long.
Get that vile liquid away from me!
String.Dest: 把那毒液从我这儿拿开！

String.Source: On behalf of House Redoran and as Councilor of Raven Rock, I bid you welcome.
String.Dest: 我以鸦石镇议员的身份，代表瑞多然家族欢迎你。

String.Source: "All men must die, often by their own means." Sounds rather grim, if you ask me.
String.Dest: “人皆必死，方法各异。”听起来有点可怕啊。

String.Source: We're not going to be lounging around in a hall anymore, so you'll have to be a little more useful. Can't make mead down here.
String.Dest: 我们没法儿再在大厅里闲逛了，所以你得多帮些忙。这下面酿不了酒。

String.Source: Hmm. Still no steam. You didn't remove any of the cubes downstairs, did you?
String.Dest: 嗯。还是没有蒸汽。你没移除下面的方典，对吧？

String.Source: Gjalund said our customer in Windhelm wants more of that balm.
String.Dest: 加朗德说我们在风舵城的客人还想要更多的香油。

String.Source: At least my father will let me drink whatever I want without complaining. Tell Geldis I appreciate it.
String.Dest: 至少父亲不会对我喝什么酒产生抱怨。跟吉迪斯说声谢了。

String.Source: Yes, I suppose they might. Ah well.
All four boilers need to be working to open the casing. Are you sure you didn't remove a cube from one of the boilers?
String.Dest: 四个锅炉都必须运转才能打开装置。你确定没有移开某个锅炉的方典吗？

String.Source: If you removed any cubes downstairs, you'd better go put them back.
String.Dest: 要是你移除了下面的方典，最好赶紧放回去。

String.Source: Good, this will help me keep things running without having to worry about a bunch of soldiers falling asleep on duty.
String.Dest: 很好，这样我就不必担心卫兵们在值勤时打瞌睡了。
为什么在这事情上这么敏感？

String.Source: Trust me, I've seen my share of hardcases, and she's doing this to herself for no reason.
String.Dest: 相信我，比她麻烦的人我见多了，她还不至于走到这个地步。

String.Source: Just... leave her be. She'll find her way.
String.Dest: 反正……别去烦她。她自己会想明白的。

String.Source: As much as I love making coin, I can't watch her do that anymore. I won't.
String.Dest: 就算我喜欢挣钱，也实在看不下去了。我办不到。

String.Source: I remember a temple on Solstheim, and working to build something. It... it was not a pleasant dream.
String.Dest: 我能记起来索瑟海姆岛上的一座神殿，还有建造什么东西。这……是场噩梦。

String.Source: But perhaps the two of us together will be able to get at the book.
String.Dest: 要是我们合作或许就能拿到那本书。

String.Source: They are where we inter our dead. They are sacred places, meant to honor their passing.
String.Dest: 它们是我们埋葬逝者的地方。是神圣的，供我们缅怀他们的离去。

String.Source: I'll just stand over here while you flip that switch.
String.Dest: 你按开关的时候我就站这里好了。

String.Source: Here's a bit more. Hope you're not drinking this stuff yourself.
String.Dest: 这里还有些。你可不要都自己喝了。

String.Source: I never said it would be. But either way, we have to try. Whether we succeed or not, it'll stir up some of the old blood in this crowd.
String.Dest: 我从没说过会成功。但是无论如何我们都得试试。不管成功与否，都能稍微唤醒这些家伙的热血。

String.Source: Remember, I have plenty of potions and ingredients if you're ever in the market.
String.Dest: 记着，想买许多药剂和材料的话，可以来我这儿。

String.Source: Well, see what you can figure out. I'm going to inspect these pillars further to see if I've missed something.
String.Dest: 嗯，你看看能发现什么。我来仔细观察下这些石柱，也许我错过了什么。

String.Source: I don't think you know how dangerous it is to say what you've just said.
String.Dest: 我想你不清楚刚才发言的严重性。

String.Source: There's more, yet. Don't get too comfortable.
String.Dest: 要学的还多的是呢。别太安逸了啊。

String.Source: That would be splendid! I'd be more than happy to give you something for the effort.
String.Dest: 那可太好了！我很乐意回报你的辛劳。

String.Source: Your words carry some wisdom. But if you truly believed in the spirit of Thirsk, you would have spoken them honestly.
String.Dest: 你说的不无道理。但要是你真的相信瑟斯科的精神，就会实话实说。

String.Source: I don't want your apologies. I want Thirsk to live up to its name.
String.Dest: 我要的不是你的道歉，而是让瑟斯科不负它的威名。

String.Source: Doesn't everyone pity the hopeless? Look at me... I'm no better than a beggar.
String.Dest: 大家不都同情无望之人吗？你看我……跟乞丐没什么两样了。

String.Source: I should mix some of this into my next potion... who knows what would happen!
String.Dest: 我应该加些这个到我的下批药剂里……天晓得会发生什么！

String.Source: Now, look... I understand you were just defending yourself. And because you helped us retake the hall, I'll look past it this once.
String.Dest: 现在，听着……我知道你是在自卫。再加上你帮我们夺回了大厅，这次就算了。

String.Source: What did they... do to it?
Perfect! All that's left now is to go ahead and wait for the patrons to come in.
String.Dest: 完美！接下来就等客人们上门了。

String.Source: Well, I'm pretty sure about two things.
Fethis, they doesn't care about us. If they did, we wouldn't be standing ankle-deep in ash trying to sell a few meager trinkets to survive.
String.Dest: 费希斯，他们根本不关心我们。不然的话，怎么会让我们深陷灰烬中，靠着卖些小首饰来谋生。

String.Source: I know that... sounds a little silly. It's just the way it's written in the books, and that phrase has always stuck with me.
String.Dest: 我知道这……听起来有点傻。但书上就是这么写的，那些字句一直困扰着我。

String.Source: Sadly, we've been unable to use the Ancestral Tomb beneath the Temple as of late, and have resorted to other locations to scatter the remains.
String.Dest: 遗憾的是，我们最近没法用神殿底下的祖坟，只能在其他地方洒下他们的骨灰。

String.Source: I'm afraid it isn't that simple. If it was, I would have the book already.
String.Dest: 恐怕没那么简单。不然，我早就拿到手了。

String.Source: I thought I made myself clear the first time.
I only wish I had a better source for netch jelly. Those creatures are difficult to track down since it's so dangerous beyond the Bulwark.
String.Dest: 只希望我能有更好的气母胶质货源。那些生物很难去追踪，因为防护堤外太危险了。

String.Source: Kuvar, listen to me. You said yourself that this place had lost sight of its past. We need a new tradition, to move us forward.
String.Dest: 库瓦尔，你听我说。你自己也说过这里不复从前了。我们需要一个新的传统来引领我们前进。

String.Source: Sorry, I'm always on duty and I don't wish to have my brain addled by Geldis's strange concoctions.
String.Dest: 抱歉，我一直都在值勤，也不希望被吉迪斯调的怪酒整晕了。

String.Source: I'm sorry about before. You're not wrong, it's just...
String.Dest: 之前的事我很抱歉。你没有错，只是……

String.Source: Keep moving, and don't look down! Well...other than to see where you're going, of course.
String.Dest: 继续走，别往下看！嗯……除非你是要看路，当然了。

String.Source: That's what I'm trying to do...
They usually didn't amount to much, but they make my job that much harder.
String.Dest: 一般都没什么大不了，但还是会给我的工作带来麻烦。

String.Source: I think we should focus on how to get up to the door on the north side of the Workshop.
String.Dest: 我认为应该把重点放在如何到达工坊北侧的门。

String.Source: Well, you'd better say something. And soon.
String.Dest: 你最好说点什么，快点啊。

String.Source: Okay, okay. There's no need to get violent.
It's pretty simple. Hrothmund's axe is in there with him. Anyone who attempts to take hold of it has their spirit judged by Hrothmund himself.
String.Dest: 很简单。哈洛斯蒙德的斧头随他下葬了。任何人只要握紧斧头，他们的意志就会受到哈洛斯蒙德本人的评判。

String.Source: Your stomach isn't my problem. We'll act when I say we do and not before.
String.Dest: 你忍不了不关我的事。等我下令才能行动。

String.Source: Bujold. Your second claims that Hrothmund did not yield a blessing to you. Is that true?
String.Dest: 布约德。你的副手宣称哈洛斯蒙德并没有给你赐福。这是真的？

String.Source: Bring your weapons and armor to me. I'll fix it up right.
String.Dest: 带着你的武器和护甲来找我，能帮你修好。

String.Source: Always a pleasure to taste anything Geldis comes up with.
String.Dest: 喝吉迪斯酿的酒总是一种享受。

String.Source: It was very strange. Was I... building something? A shrine, down on the beach near the Earth Stone? I'm not sure.
String.Dest: 很奇怪。我是在……建什么东西？一座祭坛，在地石旁边的沙滩上？我不确定。

String.Source: Galdrus, it's time for your lesson.
All I need to do is get the word out that it's ready and they'll flock here for it.
String.Dest: 我要做的就是把大功告成的消息传出去，大家就会蜂拥而至了。

String.Source: There appears to be a switch of some kind here.
String.Dest: 这里有个类似开关的东西。

String.Source: My goodness, you're quite resourceful aren't you?
String.Dest: 天啊，你可真有办法啊，不是吗？

String.Source: Were you able to salvage any of the mead?
String.Dest: 你有抢救出任何蜜酒吗？

String.Source: That would be helpful. I just don't have time to do it myself right now.
String.Dest: 帮上大忙了。这会儿我实在是没时间去找。

String.Source: Ah. I see. I hope she... fought well.
String.Dest: 啊，我知道了。希望她……死的英勇。

String.Source: Mind your step. There seem to be some corpses strewn about on the floor here.
String.Dest: 注意你的脚步。地板上好像有几具尸体。

String.Source: She used to be richer than Councilor Morvayn and she's spending it all drowning her sorrow.
String.Dest: 以前她比莫尔凡议员还有钱，但她却全花在借酒浇愁上了。

String.Source: I'm very interested to find out what happens when they finish.
String.Dest: 我很想知道他们盖完以后会发生什么。

String.Source: I'm feeling motivated. That's enough for now.
String.Dest: 我感到被鼓舞了，现在这就够了。

String.Source: Not everything is as dire as you make it out to be.
String.Dest: 不是每件事都像你说的那么糟糕。

String.Source: What? Oh. No thank you. I need to keep my head clear.
String.Dest: 什么？哦，算了，谢谢你。我要保持头脑清醒。

String.Source: With all due respect, those "things" aren't the only problem we have right now.
String.Dest: 恕我直言，那些“东西”并不是我们现在唯一的麻烦。

String.Source: Well that sounds lovely. Thank you.
Looks like we'll need those bridges down in order to get the pumps in here working.
String.Dest: 看来我们要先把这些桥降下来，才能让水泵抽水。

String.Source: Milore, I've finally gotten that letter back from the East Empire Company.
String.Dest: 米洛尔，我终于收到东帝国公司的回信了。

String.Source: It can be. Even the most experienced warriors can fall prey to petty distractions.
String.Dest: 是的。即使是最老练的战士也会因为次要的消遣而分心。

String.Source: My second would do well to keep her mouth shut.
String.Dest: 我的副手她最好是闭上嘴巴。

String.Source: Hmph. Very well. I'll just have to find someone else to assist us then.
String.Dest: 哼。好吧，我只能找别人来帮我们了。
这儿不欢迎非宗教信徒。

String.Source: Are we off on the hunt again, soon?
String.Dest: 我们很快又要去打猎了吗？

String.Source: Some of my own men have become quite accustomed to a spirit they called "Emberbrand Wine."
String.Dest: 我的一些手下很喜欢喝一种酒，叫“余烬牌葡萄酒”。

String.Source: I'm sure everything will be fine.
You will find the elf ship at anchor along the northern coast of the island. The one named Ancarion will have the map.
String.Dest: 你会在北部海岸上找到那条精灵的船。地图在一个叫安卡利昂的人手中。

String.Source: They're too smart to have left it in the Bulwark. I'd search one of the abandoned houses on the outskirts of town.
String.Dest: 他们不会傻到把它藏在防护堤内。是我的话，会从镇外那几间被遗弃的屋子开始找。

String.Source: Now, I'm not sure if you can read the dragon language, but this seems to be a riddle of some sort.
String.Dest: 嗯，我不清楚你能不能读懂龙语，但这看来是某种谜语。

String.Source: Where the Black Books actually came from... no one really knows. Some appear to have been written far in the past, others might be from the future.
String.Dest: 黑暗经书实际上从哪儿来的……是没人知道的。有些可能来自于久远的过去，有些似乎来自未来。

String.Source: Three pillars surrounding a central one. Perhaps they are connected somehow?
String.Dest: 三根石柱围绕着中心的一条。没准它们有某种联系？

String.Source: Thank you, stranger. Thanks for everything.
String.Dest: 谢谢你，陌生人。谢谢你做的一切。

String.Source: The day I refuse sujamma from Geldis is the day I sprout wings and fly off of this rock.
String.Dest: 要我拒绝吉迪斯的苏贾玛，除非是我长出翅膀从这石镇飞走了。

String.Source: But this is not enough. Miraak knows the final Word of Power. Without that, you cannot hope to surpass him.
String.Dest: 但这还不够。米拉克还知道最后一句力量之语。少了它，你就不能指望胜过他。

String.Source: Elder, we barely have enough men to keep the town safe as it is. I can't pull them off watch.
String.Dest: 长老，我们的人手快不够保护镇子的安全了。我不能把他们调离岗位。

String.Source: Just trust me, you don't want to drink it.
I don't know why, but I'm thinking about a temple, here on the island. Maybe it was just a bad dream.
String.Dest: 我不晓得原因，但是能想起来一座神殿，就在这岛上。可能就是场噩梦罢了。

String.Source: And in my case, since he's already deemed me worthy, it will just be a matter of him remembering why he blessed me before.
String.Dest: 对我来说，既然之前他就认为我够格，那么只要让他想起来曾经为什么赐福于我就行了。

String.Source: When it's time, we will seek you out. Until then, go and attempt to earn your honor in the old ways.
String.Dest: 等时机到了，我们会去找你的。到那时候，试着遵循古法去赢得你的荣耀吧。

String.Source: It will be dangerous, but if you'll deal with these thieves, we would be most grateful.
String.Dest: 肯定有危险，但要是你能处理这些小贼，我们都会感激你。

String.Source: This is a serious accusation. I'm sure Bujold can straighten it out for us.
String.Dest: 这是一个严重的指控。我相信布约德会给我们厘清真相。

String.Source: If you can keep up with the platforms, you should be able to get across the chasm.
String.Dest: 要是你能跟上平台的速度，应该就能穿过这段深渊。

String.Source: Here, take these. They should help you during your journeys.
String.Dest: 拿着，这些拿去吧。它们能在你的旅途中派上用场。

String.Source: Hrothmund knows strength, in this world and the next.
String.Dest: 哈洛斯蒙德不管是生前还是死后，都对人的意志了若指掌。

String.Source: By the All-Maker, I hope you are here to release me.
String.Dest: 造物主啊，希望你是来救我的。

String.Source: Calm yourself, Hilund. There's plenty of time for that. Solstheim isn't going anywhere.
String.Dest: 冷静点，希兰德。打猎随时都能去。索瑟海姆又跑不掉。

String.Source: I don't want you hunting them again. You almost got killed last time.
String.Dest: 别再去猎杀它们了。上次你差点送了命。

String.Source: Hmm. Sounds like something from a dream, and yet it might be more. Strange.
String.Dest: 嗯。听起来像梦里的什么东西，但好像不止这样。奇怪。

String.Source: I'm sorry. The mead... it is good.
I think maybe I had a dream about someone with that name...
String.Dest: 我可能在梦见过这个名字……

String.Source: Do you know how tired I get of watching the softer ones here grow softer?
String.Dest: 你知道我有多看不惯这些软蛋们越来越软吗？

String.Source: May Azura, Mephala and Boethia guide you.
String.Dest: 愿阿祖拉、梅法拉和波耶西亚指引你。

String.Source: Did I know someone by that name? Someone... Someone that wanted something...
String.Dest: 我认识这个人吗？这人……这人想要某种东西……

String.Source: The second Word of Power. Use it to bend the wills of mortals to your purpose.
String.Dest: 第二句力量之语。用它来使凡人的意志为你的目的所用。

String.Source: Bit of a chill in the air down here.
Kuvar, I'm your wife. You can't...
String.Dest: 库瓦尔，我是你的妻子。你不能……

String.Source: Here, this key should open the door to the tomb.
String.Dest: 拿着，这把钥匙可以打通往祖坟的门。

String.Source: Are you being serious? How... how did she take it?
String.Dest: 你是认真的？她……她有什么反应？

String.Source: I am truly in your debt, my friend. I did not think the elves would keep me alive for much longer.
String.Dest: 我真的欠你一个人情，朋友。那些精灵不会让我活太久。

String.Source: Take that swill and pour it down a well.
Well, then. I'll do my best to keep the hall together until that day comes.
String.Dest: 那么，我会尽力让大厅团结一致，直到那天到来。

String.Source: I'm going to stay here and check on the mead.
Faith's just going to have to wait, Elder. I'm sorry.
String.Dest: 信仰的事儿得以后再说，长老。我很抱歉。

String.Source: Are you ready to go inside?
Sure, got nothing better to do.
String.Dest: 好啊，反正也没别的事可做。

String.Source: Let's not waste any time, then.
String.Dest: 那我们就别浪费时间了。

String.Source: Not today, too many things on my mind.
String.Dest: 今天算了，我要考虑的事情很多。

String.Source: We'll clean up here. You go with Bujold.
String.Dest: 我们会收拾这里。你跟布约德走吧。

String.Source: And so I feel your shame all the more deeply.
String.Dest: 如今我更能深切地感受你的耻辱。

String.Source: Forget it. I'll make things better in my own way.
String.Dest: 算了吧。我会自己来改善这个局面。

String.Source: They just send you those promises to keep you off their backs... you must know this.
String.Dest: 他们只是在用这些许诺来应付你，让你别烦他们了……你肯定也知道啊。

String.Source: Those foul vermin... the abominations we call ash spawn have risen from the ashes of our own ancestors.
String.Dest: 因为那些肮脏的寄生虫……被我们称为灰烬怪的可憎之物会从祖先的骨灰中重生。

String.Source: We need to find enough control cubes to keep the pumps running and to turn on all four boilers.
String.Dest: 我们需要足够的控制方典来让水泵运作，以启动四个锅炉。

String.Source: Good old Geldis is always managing to keep our spirits up... and our eyesight hazy. Thank you.
String.Dest: 吉迪斯那个老好人总是想让我们精神振作……以及眼睛发花。谢了。

String.Source: The boilers won't work if they're flooded, you know.
String.Dest: 锅炉要是被水淹了就没法启动，你也懂的。

String.Source: The Reclaimations are Azura, Mephala and Boethia. They mean to reclaim what was lost from the Tribunal's falsehoods and lies.
String.Dest: 收复者们是阿祖拉、梅法拉和波耶西亚。它们收复了因审判席的虚伪和谎言而失去的东西。

String.Source: I was kind of hoping you'd say that.
Sotha Sil, Almalexia and Vivec. Saints who were never meant to be the cornerstones of our faith.
String.Dest: 索萨·希尔、阿玛莱西亚还有维威克。这些圣人们从来不该是我们信仰中的基石。

String.Source: Have you tried any of the mead I brought out of storage? It still tastes all right to me, but...
String.Dest: 尝过我从储藏库里拿出来的蜜酒吗？我觉得味道还可以，但是……

String.Source: I've had a look around and the only interesting thing I've found is this inscription here, and a switch below it.
String.Dest: 我四处看了看，只有这个碑文和它下面的开关有点意思。

String.Source: "A sacrifice will bring you closer to that which you seek." I wonder what it means.
String.Dest: “牺牲会让你离目标更近。”我想知道这意味着什么。

String.Source: I'm sorry, Elder. I'm doing the best I can.
String.Dest: 对不起，长老。我已经尽力了。

String.Source: Hm... three pillars. Other than that plaque, there doesn't seem to be anything else worthy of note. Let's see what the inscription says.
String.Dest: 嗯……三根石柱。好像除了那座石碑外，没什么值得注意的了。来看看碑文写了什么。

String.Source: The inscription must be a reference to these pillars.
String.Dest: 碑文一定是在说这些石柱了。

String.Source: We still have cubes to find.
String.Dest: 我们还要找更多的方典。

String.Source: There you go! Now let's see what mysteries await us in the next room.
String.Dest: 成功了！现在来看看下个房间有什么谜题等着我们。

String.Source: I expect there's another riddle in here, along with a puzzle.
String.Dest: 我觉得这里该有另一道谜语，还有一道难题。

String.Source: "Continue along the path, don't tread where you've been.." Interesting...
Don't worry about Kuvar. Just be patient, and enjoy the between times, like this one.
String.Dest: 别管库瓦尔怎么说。有时候要有耐心，享受这种时光。

String.Source: May the wind be at your back, friend.
My second would do well to keep his mouth shut.
String.Dest: 我的副手他最好是闭上嘴巴。

String.Source: I don't want you harassing Hilund anymore.
String.Dest: 我不会再放你去骚扰希兰德了。

String.Source: Only five more to go! Now let's just hope something good happens when you hit the last one.
String.Dest: 只剩下五个了！只希望当你踏上最后一块时发生的是好事。

String.Source: Ah! So, that's where that goes!
Alright, now just unlock the other one.
String.Dest: 好了，现在去解开另一边。

String.Source: Don't waste your life like I did.
Next time you're hungry, stop by... I always have plenty of food for sale.
String.Dest: 肚子饿了再来看看……吃的在我这儿随时能买到。

String.Source: Oh, it's you again. Still looking for Miraak? I haven't learned anything useful since we last spoke, I'm afraid.
String.Dest: 哦，又是你。还在找米拉克？上次谈完后我恐怕还没得到任何有用的消息。

String.Source: The boilers in the Great Hall provide steam to the reading room upstairs, which we need in order to open the book's protective case.
String.Dest: 大厅里的锅炉为楼上的阅读室提供蒸汽，这样我们才能打开书的保护装置。

String.Source: Well, tell Geldis that Mirri says she really appreciates it.
String.Dest: 好吧，告诉吉迪斯，米莉说她真的很爱喝。

String.Source: If I want to spend my last bag of coins getting drunk, that's my business. What does he care?
String.Dest: 我要是想把钱花来买醉，那也是我的选择。关他什么事啊？

String.Source: Captain Veleth, I haven't seen you or your men visiting the Temple.
String.Dest: 维黎斯队长，我很久没见你和手下们来神殿参拜了。

String.Source: And two, I'm not going anywhere near them.
String.Dest: 二，我可不打算靠近它们。

String.Source: Thank you, wanderer. That would be most kind.
String.Dest: 感谢你，漂泊者。那就太好了。

String.Source: I am glad to be free of those elves. I have never seen such greed and treachery in a creature before.
String.Dest: 很高兴摆脱那些精灵了。我从没见过那么贪婪而邪恶的东西。

String.Source: Lowering the water level is the next logical step here.
String.Dest: 下一步合理的做法是降低水位。

String.Source: Yes, I'm proud to say that I grow or harvest most of it myself.
String.Dest: 对啊，我能自豪地说这是我亲手种出来或者收割的。

String.Source: No. But you need to come on the hunt more than we need you on the hunt.
String.Dest: 不。比起我们的需要，是你自己更应该去打猎。

String.Source: If Bralsa wants to come back, she's welcome here... I swear.
String.Dest: 要是布拉尔萨想回来，这儿是欢迎的……我发誓。

String.Source: Here. This was something I carried around in happier times. Maybe you can find a use for it.
String.Dest: 拿着。这是我以前那段快乐时光里带着的。也许你用得上。

String.Source: Tell Bralsa she's welcome here anytime.
String.Dest: 告诉布拉尔萨她随时可以回来。

String.Source: When the mine dried up, I was lost. I have no other trade, so I spend my time drinking my fortune away at the Retching Netch... or I used to anyway.
String.Dest: 但是当矿脉枯竭后，我就迷失了。我没别的门路，就把时光消磨在呕吐气母，把财富喝得一干二净……反正以前就那样。

String.Source: Goodness, it must have been quite difficult tracking those creatures down out there.
String.Dest: 天啊，要在外头找到这些生物肯定很难吧？

String.Source: Bandits sometimes come at night to steal our food. They think that stealing from us is easier than hunting for themselves.
String.Dest: 夜间有时会有强盗来偷我们的食物，他们认为从我们这里偷比自己打猎来的简单。

String.Source: Well, let's hope she makes it back soon. This lot doesn't have much patience with me.
String.Dest: 嗯，希望她早点回来。这群人可不怎么服我。

String.Source: We need a total of five cubes - one to operate the pumps in the Great Hall, the other four to activate the boilers.
String.Dest: 我们总共需要五块方典——一个用来操控大厅的水泵，其他四个用来启动锅炉。

String.Source: Not everyone was built for this kind of life. There's no shame in that.
String.Dest: 不是人人都能适应这儿的生活。这没什么丢脸的。

String.Source: We might well be the first to set foot in here since this tomb was sealed.
String.Dest: 我们可能是这座墓穴封闭后第一次进来的人。
但你却隐瞒了自己的耻辱。

String.Source: Sorry, Geldis won't allow me to drink while I'm working at the Netch.
String.Dest: 抱歉，吉迪斯不准我在呕吐气母上班时喝酒。

String.Source: This tomb is a discovery of great significance. We'll be remembered for this.
String.Dest: 发现这个地方意义重大，我们会被史书记录的。

String.Source: This tomb is remarkably well-preserved. Fortune has truly smiled on us.
String.Dest: 这个墓穴保存的相当完好。我们真的很走运。

String.Source: I'd really just rather get to the barrow, if that's all right with you.
String.Dest: 不介意的话，我们还是赶紧去古坟吧。

String.Source: May your path be free from danger.
Despise the stuff myself. It's powerful and tremendously addicting... I've seen men fail to finish even a single flask.
String.Dest: 但我不喜欢。它劲儿大而且很容易上瘾……我见过有人甚至一瓶都喝不了。

String.Source: Then train them. What are we doing here? We should either get used to staying here, or be preparing to retake the hall.
String.Dest: 那就训练他们啊。我们现在在这儿干嘛呢？要么就安顿下来，要么就做好准备，夺回大厅。

String.Source: See? I told you. Just where the map said it would be.
String.Dest: 看吧？我都说了。就跟地图上画的一样。

String.Source: Geldis needs to bottle this up and send it to the mainland instead of wasting his time out here... his drinks are outstanding. Thanks.
String.Dest: 吉迪斯该把这个包装起来送到内陆去卖，而不是在这儿浪费他的时间……他调的酒好喝极了，多谢。

String.Source: I'm not harassing her. She just needs to decide what kind of person she wants to be.
String.Dest: 我没骚扰她。她需要自己决定成为一个什么样的人。

String.Source: You didn't know? Hmm, I thought it was obvious.
String.Dest: 你不知道？嗯，我以为这显而易见。
注意！又一台蒸汽百夫长！

String.Source: They're befouling the memories of our forefathers by defiling their remains.
String.Dest: 它们亵渎了我们祖辈的遗骸，玷污了对他们的回忆。

String.Source: Instead of listening to a ghost in a tomb, we should steer our own destinies.
String.Dest: 与其听从坟墓里的鬼魂，我们应该掌控自己的命运。

String.Source: No! I can't! It may be poison!
String.Dest: 别！我不喝！这可能是毒药！

String.Source: The finest sujamma to cross your lips, friend. My own personal formula that I call "Sadri's Sujamma."
String.Dest: 你能喝到最上等的苏贾玛，朋友。是由我的独家秘方调制成的，我称它为“萨德利的苏贾玛”。

String.Source: No. Wait... I recognize the name, but I'm not sure why.
String.Dest: 不。等下……我想起来了，但是不晓得怎么回事。

String.Source: As promised, here's a little something for yourself.
String.Dest: 我说好的，这小玩意儿是给你的。

String.Source: Building something, clearly. And yet they don't seem to have much to say about it.
String.Dest: 显然是在建造什么东西，但是他们好像没法多说什么。

String.Source: I'll have to come back to this place later and take detailed notes.
String.Dest: 我之后一定要回来，做些详细记录。

String.Source: Why do we rejoice that The Tribunal has fallen and their false promises are but a memory?
String.Dest: 审判席倒台了，他们的虚伪预示也不过是回忆罢了。为什么我们要对此感到欣喜？

String.Source: It's going to take more than that to change my mind.
String.Dest: 就这点钱不够让我回心转意。

String.Source: Perhaps a different form of attack will yield better results.
String.Dest: 也许换种攻击方式会有更好的结果。

String.Source: Here, take this for your trouble.
I found their "reading room" in the ruins of Nchardak. The book is there, but it's sealed in a protective case which I wasn't able to open.
String.Dest: 我找到了他们在尼查达克的“阅读室”书就在那里，但是被锁在一个我打不开的保护装置里。

String.Source: Don't you think we should focus on finding the rest of the control cubes?
String.Dest: 你不觉得应该专心去找剩下的控制方典吗？

String.Source: Apparently time is more malleable if you're the Daedric Prince of fate and destiny.
String.Dest: 对于命运之迪德拉君王而言，时间显然是更具有延展性的。

String.Source: How did things go out there? Where is Bujold?
String.Dest: 事情进展如何？布约德人呢？

String.Source: I am a prisoner here. Please, you must help me.
String.Dest: 我被关在这里。拜托了，你得帮帮我。

String.Source: I can't wait to get back to the village and start writing about this place.
String.Dest: 等不及回到村里去记载这地方了。

String.Source: You go ahead and see what you can figure out. I'll look around and see if I can find anything of use.
String.Dest: 你先去看看能发现什么。我会到处看看，也许能找到有用的东西。

String.Source: He brought a group of true warriors away from the soft life of the Skaal, to know the wilderness, to feel the sting of cold and of steel.
String.Dest: 他带着一群真正的战士们离开了斯卡尔的舒适生活，去领悟荒野，去感受严寒与兵刃的威胁。

String.Source: Come on, now, no time for chatter.
That fetcher Geldis won't even allow me inside. Said I was bad for business.
String.Dest: 那个费彻吉迪斯甚至不让我进门了。说我影响了他做生意。

String.Source: She could be someone again if she was given the chance.
String.Dest: 如果给她机会，还是能重新做人的。

String.Source: Sure, I bet you are. Everyone's always sorry.
String.Dest: 是啊，我猜也是。大家都说很遗憾。

String.Source: Don't worry about me. You and Bujold should get up to the barrow.
String.Dest: 别担心我。你跟布约德应该去古坟那儿。

String.Source: It won't be that easy to get rid of the Rieklings, Kuvar.
String.Dest: 把瑞克灵赶走可不简单，库瓦尔。

String.Source: If I remember correctly, there's another cube somewhere to the south of the main Workshop.
String.Dest: 我要是没记错，主工坊南边儿某个地方还有一块方典。

String.Source: Because he's not hard on himself.
String.Dest: 因为他对自己太宽松了。

String.Source: I wonder how long it took the ancient Nords to build this tomb.
String.Dest: 真不知道古诺德人花了多久建造这个墓穴。

String.Source: Have faith. Things will change for the better.
String.Dest: 要有信心。事情会好转的。

String.Source: This is clearly in the same tradition as the draugr tombs of Skyrim.
String.Dest: 这里面的传统显然和天际的尸鬼墓一样。

String.Source: Certainly not! Doing so would interfere with whatever is going on, and I would be unable to see how this all turns out.
String.Dest: 当然没有！这么做会干预一切后续发展，那我就看不到结果如何了。

String.Source: In fact, I've just added some new ingredients to the mixture that I think makes it taste better than ever.
String.Dest: 实际上，我刚才加了些新的配料进去，觉得比以往的更很好喝了。

String.Source: Thank you for your assistance, it's raised my men's spirits quite a bit.
String.Dest: 感谢你的协助，让我的手下士气上升了。

String.Source: I can't help but wonder if this place has some connection to the history of the Skaal.
String.Dest: 真想知道这地方和斯卡尔的历史有没有关系。

String.Source: I'm pleased I was mistaken about you, serjo.
String.Dest: 很高兴我把你看走眼了，塞乔。

String.Source: Send the Skaal shaman to me. He holds the secrets that will be mine.
String.Dest: 把斯卡尔萨满带来见我，我会得到他守护的秘密。

String.Source: Have you seen the poor girl? She's a mess.
String.Dest: 你见过那个可怜的女孩吗？她简直是糟透了。

String.Source: Just... I can't even look at you right now.
String.Dest: 算了吧……我现在根本无法面对你。

String.Source: Hmmm... No, that's probably not of any use.
It's an amulet that was made exclusively for the East Empire Company.
String.Dest: 那是专为东帝国公司制作的护符。

String.Source: I can handle it. Just wish there was more mead, is all.
String.Dest: 我还能过得去。只是希望这儿有更多的蜜酒，别的没了。

String.Source: Come back anytime, my doors are always open.
String.Dest: 随时回来，我这门永远开着的。

String.Source: What exactly happened at the barrow?
We can talk after I've gotten the blessing.
String.Dest: 等我得到赐福后再聊吧。

String.Source: Well, there's morals, and then there's money. In this case, money wins.
String.Dest: 嗯，一边是道德，一边是钱财。这次是钱财胜出了。

String.Source: Thanks to you. You've taught me a lot.
I know... I just... I wanted...
There are more important things than mead, Elmus.
String.Dest: 比蜜酒重要的事情还多的是呢，艾穆斯。

String.Source: Was it... did Hrothmund recognize anyone else? Was it you? Is that why...
String.Dest: 是因为……哈洛斯蒙德选择了其他人吗？是你吗？所以才会……

String.Source: But I wouldn't show my face in here again, if I were you. Do we understand each other?
String.Dest: 但我要是你的话，就不会再出现在这儿了。明白我的意思了吗？

String.Source: And I don't think she needs any help from you to do that.
String.Dest: 我不认为她需要你来教她。

String.Source: I... I hadn't really thought of it. I'm still hoping we can go home.
String.Dest: 我……没认真考虑过这事儿。我还以为能回家呢。

String.Source: You wanted to speak to me, Elder?
We are if I have anything to say about it.
String.Dest: 要是我有发言权的话，快了。

String.Source: If only these walls could speak, I would love to hear the stories they could tell.
String.Dest: 要是这些墙壁能说话就好了。我真想听它们的故事。

String.Source: That's between me and the spirits, Kuvar. You know that.
String.Dest: 这是我和亡魂之间的秘密，库瓦尔。你也知道。

String.Source: Hmph, he's begging for patrons again, eh? Well, I suppose I could have just a bit.
String.Dest: 嗯，他又在揽客了吗？好吧，我想能稍微喝点儿。

String.Source: Here then is the knowledge you need, although you did not know you needed it.
String.Dest: 这就是你需要的知识，尽管你不知道自己需要。

String.Source: Are you ready to help me now? We should not delay.
String.Dest: 准备好帮我了吗？我们不能耽搁了。

String.Source: I welcome you, friend of the Skaal.
Am I supposed to be frightened?
You'll remember the name Ancarion after this.
String.Dest: 以后你最好记住安卡利昂这个名字。

String.Source: I make it. I drink it. I share it with friends. Ha!
Now, take this for your efforts, and we'll call the matter closed.
String.Dest: 那么，这是你的报酬，这件事就告一段落了。

String.Source: If you allow me, I'd like to envelop you in the eighth form, to study the mental effects.
String.Dest: 你愿意的话，我会把你笼罩在第八种沉默中，来研究对你的精神影响。

String.Source: Look, I know I don't have much to go on. I have that unsent letter, and that's really it.
String.Dest: 听着，我知道没什么线索。我有一封没送出去的信，就这样了。

String.Source: For many years now I have attended to Storn, learning his ways.
String.Dest: 我追随斯托恩有好些年了，学习他的处世之道。

String.Source: I'll see you hanged from the ramparts!
String.Dest: 我要把你吊死在城墙上！

String.Source: Some sort of trickery is at work here.
If someone wanted to make such weapons, they would have to get that knowledge from Baldor.
String.Dest: 要是有人想制造这种武器，他们就得从鲍德尔那里得到那些知识。

String.Source: We still buy what we have to, but I make as much as I can.
String.Dest: 我们仍会买些必需品，但酒我尽量自己酿。

String.Source: I don't suppose you have the gold yet?
Now where did I leave that book on dragon language translation?
String.Dest: 我那本龙语翻译书放哪儿啦？

String.Source: Look! Here's another wall with dragon language inscriptions on it!
String.Dest: 你看！这里有另一面龙语碑！

String.Source: Good, I could use a pair of extra hands.
String.Dest: 很好，我正需要更多帮手。

String.Source: Heroes. They get greedier every century.
String.Dest: 英雄们啊，怎么隔个世纪越变越贪婪了。

String.Source: They were never even able to go down there and recover the body... the East Empire Company sealed that section off to prevent any more tragedies.
String.Dest: 他们甚至没能下去找回他的遗体……东帝国公司封锁了这一区域，以防再出事故。

String.Source: But because I'd rather drink a mug of mead at night instead of training until I drop, Kuvar calls me a layabout.
String.Dest: 但是就因为我晚上喝几杯小酒，而不是训练到抽筋，库瓦尔就叫我窝囊废。

String.Source: ...captain promised me a life o' adventure on the high seas...instead I'm stuck on this cesspit of an island...
String.Dest: ……船长答应我这辈子都在海上冒险……现在却困在这粪坑一样的岛上……

String.Source: By Malacath's hairy knuckles, you'll pay for that!
String.Dest: 玛拉凯斯的毛指头啊，你要付出代价！

String.Source: Thank you for setting my mind to rest. Now I can hope the All-Maker will show mercy to him in the beyond.
String.Dest: 感谢你让我的心灵回归平静。现在我希望造物主在他往生的日子里赐予他仁爱。

String.Source: In the end, she was one of the better leaders we've had, but if she didn't deserve it anymore, I guess that's that.
String.Dest: 最后来看，她比之前的首领们都做得好，但要是她失格了，我也只好接受。

String.Source: Oh, gods... what happened? What have I done?
String.Dest: 天啊……发生了什么？我做了什么？

String.Source: You are no match for me, dragon!
I can't believe Kuvar would do that. To his own wife!
String.Dest: 我不相信库瓦尔会那么做，那是他老婆啊！

String.Source: I don't think so. I'm not... The name has something to do with the Earth Stone, I think. But I'm not sure what.
String.Dest: 我不确定。我不……我觉得这个名字和地石没什么关系吧。但我说不明白。

String.Source: I... I can't. I just can't be sure. I think maybe he had something to do with a temple. A temple here on the island. Does that help?
String.Dest: 我……说不上来。没法确定。我想可能他和一座神殿有关系。就在岛上的一座神殿。这对你有帮助吗？

String.Source: We are only safe so long as we concentrate...
String.Dest: 只要保持专注就安全了。

String.Source: You will die on this island, interloper.
String.Dest: 你要死在这岛上了，入侵者。

String.Source: Get away from here, before I get angry.
String.Dest: 在我发火之前，给我滚开。

String.Source: You'd best show us the proper respect, if that's even possible for someone like you.
String.Dest: 最好放尊重点儿，不过你这种人看来也不懂什么叫尊重。

String.Source: You have kept up your end of the bargain nicely. I admit, I wasn't sure that you would.
String.Dest: 你遵守了你的诺言。我得承认，这是我不确定的。

String.Source: More of the dragon-tongue. The runes have faded a bit, but I believe I can translate the inscription.
String.Dest: 又有龙语了。这些符文有些褪色了，但我一定能翻译出碑文。

String.Source: Do you know how many men I've killed?
...I suppose you're right. What can it hurt?
String.Dest: ……我想你说得对。反正也不差什么。

String.Source: Well, unless you want to deal with the draugr, this whole little venture of ours is over.
String.Dest: 嗯，除非你解决那些尸鬼，不然我们这次探险就结束了。

String.Source: Of course, the creature will have to be dead first, but I trust that's something you can... bring about.
String.Dest: 当然了，得先宰了那种生物才行，但我相信对你来说……不成问题。

String.Source: Good. Although I do not think he will help you. These secrets are sacred to us.
String.Dest: 很好。虽然我觉得他不会帮你。那些知识对我们来说无比神圣。

String.Source: I'd have to be truly desperate to do that.
What of the Redoran Guard I sent to assist you?
String.Dest: 我派去协助你的瑞多然卫兵呢？

String.Source: They would hunt, they would fight, and the mightiest among them would rise up as leader.
String.Dest: 他们会打猎，战斗，其中最强之人会担任首领。

String.Source: I have no doubt that lever turns these blades off. I shall wait here for now.
String.Dest: 那个控制杆肯定能让这些刀刃停下来，我先在这儿等你吧。

String.Source: You should bring this information to Captain Veleth as soon as possible.
String.Dest: 你该尽快把这个情报送给维黎斯队长。

String.Source: I feel like we've done this before, but that just means we're getting good at it.
String.Dest: 这情况我们已经见识过了，但或许意味着我们越来越有经验了。

String.Source: I was hoping you'd have more.
String.Dest: 我还以为你不止这点呢。

String.Source: Good, good. This time, I'll spring for some more experienced muscle. That should do the trick.
String.Dest: 很好，很好。这次我会雇佣一些更有经验的佣兵。应该没问题了。

String.Source: It should provide an additional spectral tether from your own lifespark to the aedric realm.
String.Dest: 这应该会让你的生命之源，多一条通往伊德拉位面的光谱链接。

String.Source: Warriors in the wild, living like the Nords of old.
String.Dest: 以古代诺德人的方式，成为在野外求生的战士。

String.Source: Dug out a pile of the stuff taller than me just to find the barrow. Who knows how much to reach the door.
String.Dest: 我挖出来的堆起来比我还高，但也就是能找到古坟了。挖到入口不知道要多久。

String.Source: Did you really think you could interfere with us and not suffer the consequences?
String.Dest: 真觉得干涉我们后你能全身而退啊？

String.Source: I don't think we need that old ghost anymore.
String.Dest: 我认为再也不需要那个鬼魂了。

String.Source: Keep your prying hands away from my secrets.
String.Dest: 别用你的脏手碰我的秘密。

String.Source: Here's everything I have. The letter, the key. Please, do this for me so I can finally regain the respect that I've lost.
String.Dest: 这些是我的全部的了。信，钥匙。拜托了，帮我做这件事，让我最后能挽回失去的尊严。

String.Source: I'm sorry, I've already said too much. Talk to Second Councilor Arano if you're willing to help us.
String.Dest: 很抱歉，我说的已经够多了。要是有意帮我们就和副议员阿拉诺谈吧。

String.Source: I... I don't know. It almost feels like a dream. Something about a temple on the island...
String.Dest: 我……我不知道。就好像是一场梦。和岛上某座神殿有关系的什么东西。

String.Source: It can follow the magical link back to its summoner.
String.Dest: 它能根据魔法链接追踪到召唤者。

String.Source: I am ready for whatever the foul master of this book has in store for me.
String.Dest: 无论这本书的邪恶主人在里面藏了什么，我都准备好了。

String.Source: ...he he he... callin' my bluff when he rolls dragon eyes... the fool...
String.Dest: ……嘿嘿嘿……敢在玩牌的时候说我诈和……傻子……

String.Source: There are few of us left unaffected by this curse.
String.Dest: 我们中只有几人没有受这诅咒的影响。

String.Source: If you find her, don't make her end quick.
String.Dest: 你要是找到了她，别让她死的太痛快了。

String.Source: Having past ties to the Empire immediately turned them into the scapegoat for the Dunmer people's suffering.
String.Dest: 由于过去和帝国的关系，他们立马被指为丹莫人民遭受苦难的替罪羊。

String.Source: Someone there might be crazy enough, or drunk enough, to do it.
String.Dest: 那里可能会有疯子或者酒蒙子愿意来接这活儿。

String.Source: Do you not see that we are Thalmor, fool? Begone!
String.Dest: 看不出来我们是梭默吗，傻子？滚开！

String.Source: One at a time, they're pests, but with this many...
String.Dest: 一次一只还好对付，但数量太多了就……

String.Source: This will all be over soon!
No matter. I have found a new Dragonborn to serve me.
String.Dest: 不重要了。我已经找到了一个新的龙裔为我服务了。

String.Source: I'll have you drawn and quartered!
Adril... I haven't seen a smile on your face like that in a long time.
String.Dest: 阿德尔……很久没见过你脸上有这种笑容了。

String.Source: Only Storn can reveal the secrets you asked about.
String.Dest: 只有斯托恩才能解开你所求的秘密。

String.Source: All you had to do was keep away. What a pity.
String.Dest: 你原本走开就没事了。可惜啊。

String.Source: You should ask around at The Retching Netch.
String.Dest: 你应该去呕吐气母问问。

String.Source: I hope Councilor Morvayn will still be alive when you decide to return.
String.Dest: 希望你回来时莫尔凡议员还活着。

String.Source: You will not stop my plans!
You would experience it as a sort of... increased vigor. You would fight longer, feel stronger, that sort of thing.
String.Dest: 你会感觉到那就像……活力增幅。你能战斗地更久，感觉更壮之类的。

String.Source: Go and speak to him if you like, but do not be surprised if you end up in a wild fox chase. It would not be the first time.
String.Dest: 你有兴趣可以跟他谈谈，但要是觉得他在捕风捉影也别惊讶。已经不是第一次了。

String.Source: I'd say you've more than earned it.
You may need to pick away at it to pry the heart stone itself loose, but you look... strong.
String.Dest: 你可能要把岩石撬开才能得到心石，但你看上去……够壮。

String.Source: The ash from the Red Mountain has made the land sick.
String.Dest: 红山的火山灰污染了这片土地。

String.Source: Excavating isn't exactly my specialty. Even if it was, the ash storms fill it in faster than you can dig.
String.Dest: 挖掘一向不是我的强项。就算是，火山灰风暴的掩埋速度远比你挖得快。

String.Source: I could almost admire these Dwemer machines if they weren't so annoying.
String.Dest: 我确实欣赏这些锻莫机械，但它们太烦人了。

String.Source: Let me impart some of the wisdom of the Skaal to you. You've done me a service; I will do you one in kind.
String.Dest: 让我传授些斯卡尔人的智慧给你。你帮了我的大忙，我必须报答你。

String.Source: You can't have them! Stay away!
Do you know of the Skaal?
My thuri Miraak is the only true Dovahkiin.
String.Dest: 我的图瑞米拉克是唯一的真都瓦克因。

String.Source: Look, this can be a slow business. Digging takes time. Come around later, and I'll have something more interesting to show.
String.Dest: 听着，这桩生意可能进展缓慢，挖掘需要时间。你之后再来，可能我就有些更有趣的玩意儿给你看看。

String.Source: Think we've got to get back to our ship now.
String.Dest: 我想我们现在得回船上去了。

String.Source: No need to thank me. I know you are overwhelmed with gratitude.
String.Dest: 用不着感谢我，我知道你已经感激得说不出话了。

String.Source: Now. I'm certain Adril was prepared to reward you appropriately for everything you've done.
String.Dest: 嗯，我相信阿德尔已经准备好给予你适当的奖赏，作为你所做的一切的报酬。

String.Source: Don't fight back, and I promise I'll kill you quickly.
String.Dest: 别挣扎了，我保证让你死个痛快。

String.Source: What you've done for me... for all of Raven Rock... goes far beyond what I would have expected from a traveler to our town.
String.Dest: 你为了我……为了整个鸦石镇所做的……远远超乎我对一个访客的期望。

String.Source: Watch out! My equipment is fragile.
That looks like quite a drop! Is there something moving down there?
String.Dest: 看起来好深啊！下面有活物吗？

String.Source: These are dark times. How will we get through them without Storn to guide us?
String.Dest: 现在正是黑暗时代。而没有斯托恩的指引，我们要怎么度过呢。

String.Source: Be sure to bring back an amusing story of how Ildari died.
String.Dest: 回来时记得把伊达利怎么死的编成个有趣的故事。

String.Source: The wise man knows when to retreat!
String.Dest: 聪明人知道什么时候该跑！

String.Source: Today we would consider his techniques rudimentary, but the genius is still evident.
String.Dest: 从今天来看，他的技术尚不成熟，但是他的天才是显而易见的。

String.Source: With the mines shut down, there's no telling how much longer Raven Rock's going to last. Hopefully, Councilor Morvayn has a plan.
String.Dest: 矿场关闭后，不知道鸦石镇还能撑多久。希望莫尔凡议员有个计划。

String.Source: If you're wrong about Tilisu, things would quickly go downhill around here and the real culprits might slip away. I can't afford for that to happen.
String.Dest: 要是你错怪了蒂莉苏，事态会迅速恶化，真凶也可能会溜走。我负不起这种责任。

String.Source: Ah, yes, here's something. The first one has to do with a breeze, or maybe it's wind.
String.Dest: 啊，是的，有了。第一个跟微风有关，可能就是风。

String.Source: You are no match for my magic!
You must talk to Storn, then. As shaman, he is the keeper of such lore.
String.Dest: 那么你必须和斯托恩谈。作为萨满，他负责守护这些知识。

String.Source: They've only gotten louder since I've stayed. Pounding, driving. A couple of times I blacked out. It was...
String.Dest: 我呆在这儿后声音变得更大了。它们猛烈敲打着我的耳膜，有好几次我都晕过去了。那是……

String.Source: By the fires of Red Mountain!
Let's have a closer look at these runes.
In fact, if I'm reading this correctly, it says that Miraak was a traitor. Most interesting.
String.Dest: 这么说吧，要是我没搞错的话，写的是米拉克是个叛徒。太有趣了。

String.Source: Takes money to make money, all that rot. There's a lot of it at the other end, but I can't get there without a little kick to start it off.
String.Dest: 需要钱来滚钱啊，这都是废话了。在另一头儿有很多财宝，但是没启动资金就根本到不了那儿。

String.Source: Take your time. I shall follow when you are ready.
String.Dest: 慢慢来，等你准备好了我会跟上。

String.Source: For returning my mother's necklace, you have my gratitude. It means more to me than you can know.
String.Dest: 感谢你找回我母亲的项链。这对我来说意义重大。

String.Source: Who knows what dangers await us in this place.
String.Dest: 谁知道这里有什么危险等着我们呢。

String.Source: You cross the Thalmor, you pay the price.
String.Dest: 敢忤逆梭默，就得付出代价。

String.Source: It's no secret to me that Frea hesitates. Her path is not clear.
String.Dest: 芙瑞雅会犹豫在我意料之中。她的未来还不明朗。

String.Source: Ah, so you aren't just another wandering vagrant with a pocket full of stories. Apologies. That changes things.
String.Dest: 啊，所以你不是个带着满口袋故事闲逛的流浪汉了。抱歉，我搞错了。
莫尔凡会为此付出代价！

String.Source: What? No! You can't... I have his will on my side! He will command all of us!
String.Dest: 什么？不！你不能……我只是被他控制了！他会控制我们所有人！

String.Source: I'm the last one. The others are all dead now.
String.Dest: 我是最后一个了，其他人都死完了。

String.Source: I may sound like a crazy old man to you, but I'm telling you, the tunnels here are solid... they would never collapse like that.
String.Dest: 可能我听上去像个疯老头，但是我告诉你，这里的隧道很坚固……绝对不会像那样坍塌。

String.Source: I've been trained by the Tong, fool!
String.Dest: 我受过莫拉格堂的训练，白痴！

String.Source: So gaining the favor of a Telvanni wizard isn't enough?
String.Dest: 光是取得泰瓦尼法师的好感还不够？

String.Source: What do you think you're doing?
Miraak was a formidable opponent. I wonder what he would have been like as my apprentice.
String.Dest: 米拉克是个令人敬畏的对手。他要是来当我的学徒不知道会怎样。

String.Source: This fire seems significant. I'm sure it's important for some reason.
String.Dest: 这火看起来有某种意义，我确信它必有原因。

String.Source: Dwemer mechanisms have no sense of self preservation.
String.Dest: 锻莫机械都没有自我保护意识。

String.Source: Thirsk didn't always make its own mead. No, we used to get by on shipments from Skyrim.
String.Dest: 瑟斯科本来没有酿蜜酒。以前我们都是靠着天际来的物资过活的。

String.Source: Miraak has commanded your death. So it shall be.
String.Dest: 米拉克下令要你死，那就必当如此。

String.Source: You'll stay away from this cabin if you know what's good for you.
String.Dest: 你要是识时务就离屋子远点儿。

String.Source: I promise that any unrelated memories I run across will be kept in the strictest of confidences.
String.Dest: 我保证会严格保密看到的任何不相关记忆。

String.Source: Enemies of the Empire will fall!
No, please! I don't want to die!
What? Are you... are you serious? Well, I think I could make that work..
String.Dest: 什么？你是……认真的？好吧，我想应该可行。

String.Source: These runes have faded a bit, but I believe I can translate the inscription.
String.Dest: 这些符文已经有些褪色了，但我一定能翻译出碑文。

String.Source: I think we're almost to the bottom of the Barrow, but... it's going to be everything I can do to find more miners.
String.Dest: 我们就快挖到古坟底部了，但……我得找到更多的矿工才能接着挖下去。

String.Source: ...I've almost got enough... just need one good haul...
String.Dest: ……我快挣够了……只要再干一票大的……

String.Source: I'll head out looking for her eventually. We'll wander the wilderness together. Just have to get some things in order here, first.
String.Dest: 我迟早会去外头找她，我们将一同在野外谋生。但首先要让这里恢复秩序。

String.Source: He has returned to the All-Maker. He is at peace now, no matter what that evil thing may have done to his body.
String.Dest: 他回归造物主了。无论那恶魔曾对他的身躯做了什么，他都安息了。

String.Source: She was hurt so bad. We took pity on her and nursed her back to health.
String.Dest: 她受了重伤，出于同情，我们帮她把伤治好了。

String.Source: What a waste of a good specimen.
String.Dest: 多好的样本就这样浪费了。

String.Source: ..."he's got your eyes," she says... lyin' tramp...
String.Dest: ……她说“他眼睛很像你”……谎话连篇……

String.Source: I'd better check on Ulves. The kitchen supplies were getting low.
String.Dest: 我最好去找下乌尔维斯。厨房的物资快不够了。

String.Source: These platforms are definitely moving more quickly. Can you keep up with them?
String.Dest: 这些平台的移动速度真的变快了，你跟得上它们吗？

String.Source: Leave, or I'll be forced to show you the true power of a Telvanni wizard.
String.Dest: 滚吧，不然就让你见识下泰瓦尼法师真正的力量。

String.Source: Where are you going? You would leave, now, when we have yet to find what is at the heart of this?
String.Dest: 你要去哪儿？要是现在走了，我们什么时候才能找到这里的核心？

String.Source: The writing describes a guardian who defeated someone named Miraak.
String.Dest: 这段文字描述了一位守护者，他击败了一个叫“米拉克”的人。

String.Source: As Councilor, I hereby award you Severin Manor and everything contained within.
String.Dest: 作为议员，我在此将瑟佛林宅邸奖给你，包括其中的所有物品。

String.Source: Should have known better than to challenge a master wizard of the House Telvanni.
String.Dest: 你早该知道泰瓦尼的高等巫师不容挑战。

String.Source: Oh... I was hoping I wouldn't see you quite so soon.
String.Dest: 哦……没想到这么快又见面了。

String.Source: You will die. And with the power of your soul, I will return to Solstheim and be master of my own fate once again.
String.Dest: 你会死，有了你的灵魂之力，我会回归索瑟海姆，再次成为自己命运的主人。

String.Source: They would hunt, they would fight, and the mightiest among them would rise up as leader.
String.Dest: 他们会打猎，战斗，其中最强之人会担任首领。

String.Source: His best work was buried with him, though. A set that my patron calls "the Relics" are supposed to be down in his tomb.
String.Dest: 但是他的杰作随他一起下葬了。听我的赞助人说，他的墓穴里有一套“圣物”。

String.Source: This writing refers to a guardian who inspired both men and dragons.
String.Dest: 这段文字说的是一位激励着人类与龙族的守护者。

String.Source: Move along. There's nothing for you here.
Unless you're looking for a fight, you'd best walk away.
String.Dest: 除非你皮痒了，不然最好走开些。

String.Source: You are alive only at my pleasure. Do not forget that.
String.Dest: 你还活着是因为我乐意。给我记住了。

String.Source: You can only hide so long.
Please, leave us. We must concentrate.
String.Dest: 拜托，离开这里。我们要集中精神。

String.Source: I'm going to put this memory trace spell on you, so you won't have to worry about taking notes. I doubt you could know what was important anyway.
String.Dest: 我要给你放个记忆追踪法术，这样你就不需要做笔记了。反正你也抓不到重点。

String.Source: Fascinating. I hope one of you dies.
String.Dest: 太棒了。希望你们当中死一个吧。

String.Source: Sahrotaar, are you so easily swayed?
String.Dest: 萨洛塔尔，你这么轻易就换主子了吗？

String.Source: ...told him to just hand it over, but did he listen? Oh, no... he had to fight back...
String.Dest: ……都告诉他交出来了，他听了吗？没有……非要抵抗……
那么，去尼查达克吧。跟我来。

String.Source: Have you tried to walk on the plates without stepping on the same one twice?
String.Dest: 你走过石板的时候，试过每块只踏一次吗？

String.Source: Crescius is convinced it's a story cooked up by the company to cover up something else, but I don't know.
String.Dest: 克雷修斯坚信那只是东帝国公司编造的，为了掩盖其它事情的谎言，但我不清楚。

String.Source: Please, I don't wish to be disturbed while I'm meditating.
String.Dest: 拜托，请不要在我想事情的时候打扰我。

String.Source: I'm not even sure... I can picture a temple, here on Solstheim. Must've been a bad dream.
String.Dest: 我真的不太清楚……我还想的起来一座神殿，就在这索瑟海姆。一定是做噩梦了。

String.Source: (Failed) Don't insult me. You don't have nearly enough for this to be worth my time, or yours.
String.Dest: 别侮辱我了。你那点钱根本不值得咱们浪费彼此时间。

String.Source: I suspected there would be something down here. Do you know those spells already?
String.Dest: 我怀疑过下面会有些东西，你已经会用这些法术了吗？

String.Source: Damnable ash! No matter how much I wash the food, it still gets in it.
String.Dest: 该死的灰烬！粘在食物上不管我怎么洗都洗不掉。

String.Source: The secrets. They're in my head. Can't get them out.
String.Dest: 那些秘密。它们在我脑袋里。我拿不出来。

String.Source: If that fire has remained lit for all this time, there must be magic at work in it.
String.Dest: 要是火一直没熄灭，里面一定有魔法的作用。

String.Source: When the tide goes, we'll go with it.
String.Dest: 等退潮了我们就跟着离开。

String.Source: Rieklings. You must have passed by the hall on your way down here? Well, it's been overrun.
String.Dest: 瑞克灵。你下来之前经过了一栋建筑吧？那儿的害虫泛滥了。

String.Source: I make it. I drink it. I share it with friends. Ha!
They did it to gain our confidence, councilor. They had us all fooled.
String.Dest: 那是为了取得我们的信任，议员。他们骗过了所有人。

String.Source: My father Storn, the shaman, protects them in the village.
String.Dest: 我的父亲斯托恩，作为萨满，负责在村里保护他们。

String.Source: Good idea. They might leak out. Don't want them crawling into your head, too. Like me. They're in my head. Right now. Saying things.
String.Dest: 好主意，它们可能会溢出去。别让它们爬到你脑子里去。就像我这样，它们就在我脑子里，就现在，正在说话。

String.Source: Geldis put you up to this? Another adventurer without a coin to his name? Damnit, I told him not to waste any more of my time.
String.Dest: 是吉迪斯叫你来的吗？又一个身无分文的投机者？混账，都告诉他不要浪费我的时间了。

String.Source: You're treading on Imperial soil! Prepare to defend yourself!
String.Dest: 你踩在帝国领土上了！准备好自卫吧！

String.Source: I had my suspicions that he was undead. How else could he have survived for over 200 years?
String.Dest: 之前我就怀疑过他是亡灵，不然怎么会过了两百多年还活着。

String.Source: So the dragons have returned. Well, the Skaal have survived worse.
String.Dest: 看来龙族是回归了。嗯，不过斯卡尔还遭过更大的难，不过都挺过来了。

String.Source: You come out to the northern ashlands, you don't expect things to go easy, you know? But this was something outside my particular expertise.
String.Dest: 在这北方的灰烬之地，任何事情都不会顺利，知道吗？但是这件事完全不在我的专业范围内。

String.Source: Although... maybe this could solve two problems...
String.Dest: 或者……也许我能一箭双雕。

String.Source: I never get tired of that sound. It'll take me a few days to dig up some more laborers, but swing back when you get a chance. See how we're doing.
String.Dest: 钱的声音永远听不腻。我要花几天找新的劳力，有空就回来看看我们的进度。

String.Source: Go. My father sacrificed himself so that you could destroy Miraak and lift his master's shadow from the land.
String.Dest: 去吧。我的父亲牺牲了自己，来让你去打败米拉克，把他主人的阴影赶出这片土地吧。

String.Source: I'll go to Raven Rock and you... you won't mention this to anyone. If you see me there, just... give a nod and I'll lend a hand if you need it.
String.Dest: 我要回鸦石镇去，但你……别跟任何人提起这事儿。你要是需要我的帮助，就在那儿找我，点个头就行。

String.Source: But we let that sweet life get the better of us. We grew soft, and...
String.Dest: 但我们过于沉浸在甜蜜的生活当中了，变得软弱了，还有……

String.Source: The weapons of the Skaal will never be dull as long as Baldor Iron-Shaper tends the forge.
String.Dest: 只要“塑铁者”鲍德尔还在照看锻炉，斯卡尔的武器就决不会变钝。

String.Source: Councilor Morvayn told me to give this to you if you made it back in one piece... and you got rid of General Carius.
String.Dest: 莫尔凡议员让我把这个给你，要是你能活着回来……何况你还把卡里乌斯将军解决了。

String.Source: The stairs are knocked out. I have no doubt you can find a way up. You never know, you may find something of value up there.
String.Dest: 阶梯被打掉了，但你一定找得到上去的路。不知道会在上面找到有多珍贵的玩意儿。

String.Source: The Skaal will one day look to Frea. I hope she will be there for them.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人会有把目光投向芙瑞雅的那天。希望她那时能担起责任。

String.Source: I would venture out myself, but long voyages and dangerous risks are precisely what people like you are for.
String.Dest: 我很乐意自己跑一趟，但还是你这种人适合去跑长途冒险。

String.Source: Your armor will look good on me.
String.Dest: 我以后穿你这身护甲会很好看。

String.Source: Kuvar. He thinks we've all gotten a little too soft. I can see what he means looking at Elmus, but the rest of us still have our edge.
String.Dest: 库瓦尔。他认为我们过得太安逸了。在艾穆斯身上确实能看出来这点，但我们其他人还是有底线的。

String.Source: Perhaps something is meant to go into the fire. But what could it be? Something that's already nearby, perhaps?
String.Dest: 也许该在火里加些什么。但加什么呢？或许是附近的什么东西？

String.Source: Those of us that didn't die were made prisoners.
String.Dest: 我们剩下的人都成了她的囚犯。

String.Source: That foolish old man thinks he's thirty years younger than he is. He's going to get himself killed traipsing around the mine.
String.Dest: 那个傻老头还以为他在三十年前呢。在矿场里闲逛迟早会害死自己。
