String.Source: I'm glad these platforms appear once you finish them. I don't want to find out what's down in that water.
String.Dest: 幸好你过了平台后所有的平台重新出现了，我可不想知道下面水里有什么。

String.Source: Poor man... can you imagine doing all that dangerous work just to end up dying at your own doorstep?
String.Dest: 可怜的家伙……你敢信他干那么危险的活儿，最后却死在自己家门口吗？

String.Source: These statues are clearly the focus of this area. There must be some way to interact with them.
String.Dest: 这些石柱显然是这个区域的重点，一定有办法和它们互动。

String.Source: It took courage to rescue me from the elves, and I thank you for that.
String.Dest: 要把我从那些精灵手中救出来需要勇气，我很感激你。

String.Source: ...just one more bottle... maybe a second one to get to sleep...
String.Dest: ……再来一瓶儿……也许得两瓶儿才睡得着……

String.Source: Get out of here before I toss you out.
String.Dest: 在被我扔出去前自己滚出去。

String.Source: You think I've got that kind of money? No, I only get paid on delivery. Can't afford to go out of pocket for a thousand septims on this.
String.Dest: 你觉得我很有钱吗？错了，我是一手交钱一手交货的。没法一次性拿出一千塞普汀来。

String.Source: Perhaps I'll be the first Skaal to slay a dragon. That would be worthy of a tale!
String.Dest: 也许我会是第一个屠龙的斯卡尔人。那可就是货真价实的传说了！

String.Source: By the All-Maker, yes! That is the very one! I can only assume you took this from Ancarion's corpse.
String.Dest: 造物主啊，没错！就是这张！我只能猜你是从安卡利昂的尸体上搜出来的。

String.Source: Go rip that thrice cursed heart stone from her chest.
String.Dest: 去把那颗该死的心石从她胸口挖出来。

String.Source: "... but I can get it." Sure, sure. Listen, I've heard this song before and I'm already tired of it. Come back when you're not a waste of my time.
String.Dest: “但我有办法弄到”好啦，听着，这些话我都听腻了。等你不会浪费时间的时候再回来找我。

String.Source: I have learned some of what he knows, but it is not my place to divulge anything to an outsider.
String.Dest: 我大概了解了他所知道的，但是无权透露给外来者。

String.Source: We must look to the All-Maker for guidance in these dark times.
String.Dest: 在这段黑暗时期里，我们必须依循造物主的指引。

String.Source: What do you have for me?
I admire the Dwemer skill but it can get tiresome.
String.Dest: 我确实欣赏锻莫技艺，但也审美疲劳了。

String.Source: Off you go. If you discover any side effects, come back and tell me straight away.
String.Dest: 好了。要是发现了任何副作用，就马上回来找我。

String.Source: Unless you have more Stalhrim weapons and armor for me, we have nothing to talk about.
String.Dest: 除非你带来更多的魔冰武器和护甲，不然我们就没生意可做。

String.Source: They aren't very clever, are they?
I do my best to counsel my people, but I cannot allay their fears.
String.Dest: 我尽我所能去开导族人们，但无法减轻他们的恐惧。

String.Source: Did you find any evidence at Severin Manor yet?
String.Dest: 你在瑟佛林宅邸找到什么证据了吗？

String.Source: I shall look around. We can proceed when you are ready.
String.Dest: 我去周围看看，你准备好后我们就继续前进。

String.Source: I'll crush the life from you!
Yes, yes. You're Dragonborn. We're all very impressed.
String.Dest: 对，对。你是龙裔。真了不得。

String.Source: Baldor is the keeper of an ancient tradition, the forging of Stalhrim. It is an art we Skaal hold sacred.
String.Dest: 鲍德尔守护着一项古老传统，魔冰的铸造技艺。那对我们斯卡尔人来说是神圣的。

String.Source: Stay out of our way, or I promise you'll regret it.
String.Dest: 别挡我们的道，不然让你后悔莫及。

String.Source: A long time ago, a man named Hrothmund left the Skaal to form his own tradition.
String.Dest: 很久以前，一个叫哈洛斯蒙德的人离开了斯卡尔村，开创了自己的传统。

String.Source: Let's have a closer look at these runes.
It's too dangerous out here. We can't waste time worrying about having a liar in our midst. Lying is the first step to cowardice, after all.
String.Dest: 这里已经够危险了。我们不能浪费时间抱怨自己人中有骗子。毕竟，谎言是迈向懦弱的第一步。

String.Source: I command powers you can only dream of!
String.Dest: 我的力量超乎你的想象！

String.Source: Curse my lack of organization... I know that book is here.
String.Dest: 我怎么老是乱放东西……书肯定在这里。

String.Source: I'll kill whoever I must, but I will see my plans fulfilled!
String.Dest: 无论要杀多少人，我都要实现我的计划！

String.Source: I do not wish to imagine the kinds of things that happened in this chamber. Who were the poor souls trapped in these cages?
String.Dest: 真不愿去想这间大厅里发生过什么，被关在笼子里的可怜虫又是谁？

String.Source: Does stealing make you feel less impotent?
String.Dest: 偷东西让你觉得自己能干是吧？

String.Source: But those days are behind us, now.
String.Dest: 但是那些日子离我们很遥远了。

String.Source: Hmm. I expected you to die. Oh, well.
String.Dest: 嗯。还以为死的是你呢。算了。

String.Source: May he be rewarded for his service as I am!
String.Dest: 愿他为自己的侍奉得到与我一样的奖赏！

String.Source: I hope you gave him a swift end.
But those days are behind us, now.
String.Dest: 但是那些日子离我们很遥远了。

String.Source: You won't feel a thing. But if you do, try not to scream too loudly. My ears are sensitive.
String.Dest: 你什么都感觉不到的。但要是真感觉到了，尽量别叫的太大声。我耳朵很敏感。

String.Source: Aha! Here's another of those dragon language inscriptions! I wonder what it says.
String.Dest: 啊哈！这里有另一条龙语碑文！看看说了些什么？

String.Source: If there's anything at all I can do to help, please let me know.
String.Dest: 要是有任何我能帮得上的忙，请务必告诉我。

String.Source: There's a lot of work to do, still, getting this place back up and running.
String.Dest: 还有很多事情要做，要让这个地方重回正轨。

String.Source: In days past, my brother Torkild and I would share the hunt, but that was... long ago.
String.Dest: 从以前我兄弟托基尔德跟我一起打猎的时候开始，但那是……很久以前了。

String.Source: Hmm...looks like it needs some sort of key. Maybe those half claws you found would fit in here if you put them together?
String.Dest: 嗯……看来需要某种钥匙。也许你找来的半只爪子合起来能放进去？

String.Source: Hey! We got a deader over here!
She's always been quick to shame.
String.Dest: 她在丢脸这方面很敏感。

String.Source: He was an explorer for the East Empire Company. They'd send him all over Tamriel when they had difficulties in a mining operation.
String.Dest: 他是个东帝国公司的探矿人员，被派到了全泰姆瑞尔任何采矿作业出问题的地方。

String.Source: ...damn wizards... not good enough for yer precious college, eh?
String.Dest: ……该死的法师……我不配进你们高贵的学院，对吧？

String.Source: I do not know what it is Miraak learned that gave him reason to turn on his masters.
String.Dest: 不晓得米拉克得知了什么导致他背叛了主人们。

String.Source: It cannot be much farther now. I feel it in my bones.
I think he knew what would happen. He saw his death in that book.
String.Dest: 我想他预料到了会发生什么。他在那本书里看到了自己的死亡。

String.Source: Do you have a death wish?
There are other stones around Solstheim. I fear for what has happened to them...
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆上还有其它的圣石。我担心它们也遭遇不测了……

String.Source: What...? Whoever did this is dead. You hear me? Dead!
String.Dest: 什么……？无论是谁干的都得死，听到了吗？你死定了！

String.Source: Leave me to mourn my father. I have no more words for you now.
String.Dest: 留我在这儿为父亲哀悼吧。我的话都说完了。

String.Source: Another one for the scrap heap of history.
String.Dest: 又一个扫入历史的垃圾堆。

String.Source: You have the heart of a great bear, as well as a wolf's cunning.
String.Dest: 你有巨熊之心和狼的狡猾。

String.Source: I do not blame you. I know he chose this. I just wish he had seen another way.
String.Dest: 我不怪你。这是他自己的抉择。多希望他能找到其他的办法。

String.Source: Don't worry, most people can't tell we're related.
String.Dest: 别担心，大部分人看不出我和她有血缘关系。

String.Source: All he wanted me to do is track you down and send you to him.
String.Dest: 他只让我找到你，然后把你送到他那儿。

String.Source: Do not speak. Focus is essential, or else the barrier may fall.
String.Dest: 别说话。我得保持专注，否则屏障可能会崩塌。

String.Source: Let's see... I ought to bring a few torches, and certainly my journal so that I can write down my observations.
String.Dest: 我想想，我应该带些火把，还有日记来记录我的观察。

String.Source: Impossible. There must be something more! Look around.
String.Dest: 不可能，这儿肯定有机关！四处看看。

String.Source: This visitor has single-handedly dealt with a threat that could have ended your life.
String.Dest: 这位访客单枪匹马解决了一个你的生命威胁。

String.Source: He was the first great Nord enchanter, maybe even the first human to master elven methods.
String.Dest: 他是第一个诺德大附魔师，甚至可能是第一个掌握精灵之术的人类。

String.Source: Uh... yeah. That sounds good. Half. I think that will work.
String.Dest: 呃……好吧，听起来不错。就一半吧，我应该出得起。

String.Source: You've proven devastating to their plans and they'd stop at nothing to hunt you down.
String.Dest: 你已经毁了他们的计划，他们会不顾一切地追杀你。

String.Source: And the tea. The thrice damned tea! I don't think I'll ever learn to make it properly.
String.Dest: 还有茶。那该死的茶！我想永远也没法泡好了。

String.Source: Enough for now. But I'll either need to get some more barrels or start importing more if we're going to make it through next winter.
String.Dest: 暂时还够，但要度过下个冬季的话，我还得再酿几桶，或者买些回来。

String.Source: I have friends in Raven Rock, and a few among the Skaal. There's not much metal on the island itself, but we can find what we need, when we need it.
String.Dest: 我在鸦石镇和斯卡尔都有朋友。岛上的金属不多了，但我们需要的时候还是能找到。

String.Source: It's a shame. There are quite a few tales of General Carius's exploits, including the founding of Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 太遗憾了。这里流传着有卡里乌斯将军的很多功绩，包括鸦石镇的建立。

String.Source: It's a lot of nonsense to me, but they seem to get by.
String.Dest: 听起来都是胡说八道，但是他们似乎过得还不错。
没什么是我解决不了的！

String.Source: Of course! I don't even want to hear the word "barrow" again. Ever.
String.Dest: 当然！我再也不想听到“古坟”这词儿了。永远也不想了。

String.Source: Interesting. This may be worth exploring.
It's going to hit three thousand this time, I'm afraid. Have you got that on you?
String.Dest: 这回恐怕得花三千金币。你身上带够钱了吗？

String.Source: I'll head back to Raven Rock and round up some diggers. Once we've got something worth looking at, I'll send word to you.
String.Dest: 我要回鸦石镇去找些挖掘工人。等我们发现了些有意思的东西，就派人送信给你。

String.Source: So you chose to day to die...
He's convinced himself that there's some sort of conspiracy involving the East Empire Company and the mine's closure.
String.Dest: 他认为矿场关门和东帝国公司的某种阴谋有关。

String.Source: There's really nothing remarkable in the letters. I don't know what he's so excited about.
String.Dest: 其实信里没有提到什么特别的东西。我不明白为什么他那么兴奋。

String.Source: Crescius's great-grandfather worked for the East Empire Company. The letters mention some sort of discovery he was sent to investigate.
String.Dest: 克雷修斯的曾祖父曾受雇于东帝国公司。这些信提到了他被派去调查的某种发现。

String.Source: If you happen to cross his path, be wary. He was a fierce warrior as a man. If he fell prey to his more bestial side, he could be deadly.
String.Dest: 你要是遇见他了，要小心。他还是人的时候就已经是个强悍的战士了，如果被自己的野性一面所控制，那就更加危险了。

String.Source: ...should have known she wouldn't wait for me... I'll gut that filthy farmer when I see him...
String.Dest: ……早就知道她不会等我了……等我看见那该死的农民就宰了他……

String.Source: What news do you bring from Fort Frostmoth?
String.Dest: 你从霜蛾堡带回来什么消息？

String.Source: I need you to head out to Fort Frostmoth and check it out. I'm going to head back to Raven Rock and prepare the men for further assaults.
String.Dest: 我需要你前往霜蛾堡去查一下。我要回鸦石镇组织人手为接下来的袭击做准备。

String.Source: There was a horrible accident, and he was killed when one of the tunnels collapsed.
String.Dest: 发生了一场恐怖的意外，他死于一处隧道坍塌。

String.Source: I love him dearly, and I support everything he does, but I can't let him chase this silly idea or he may end up joining Gratian in a rocky grave.
String.Dest: 我真的很爱他，会支持他的任何作为，但我不能让他追求这个愚蠢的念头，否则他迟早会步格瑞希安的后尘，葬身石窟。

String.Source: My beloved is almost eighty years old and I think the shock of finding one of his ancestor's things has left his mind a bit... confused.
String.Dest: 我的爱人已经快八十岁了，可能找到他祖先遗物的惊诧让他脑子有些……困惑。

String.Source: But I also have a miner's instinct that's run in my family from before Gratian was even born.
String.Dest: 但我还有一种矿工的直觉，这种直觉在格瑞希安出生前就流传于我的家族中了。

String.Source: I have been taken against my will! I am in need of rescue!
String.Dest: 我被人绑架了！我需要人来救我！

String.Source: I suppose I'll have to pay you.
Unless you have more Stalhrim weapons and armor for me, we have nothing to talk about.
String.Dest: 除非你带来更多的魔冰武器和护甲，不然我们就没生意可做。

String.Source: Back with more Stalhrim items, I trust?
String.Dest: 我相信你带回来了更多的魔冰装备，是吧？

String.Source: I'll be here when you have more Stalhrim weapons and armor.
String.Dest: 等你有了更多的魔冰武器和护甲，就来这里找我。

String.Source: You have kept up your end of the bargain nicely. I admit, I wasn't sure that you would.
String.Dest: 你遵守了你的诺言。我得承认，这是我不确定的。

String.Source: There is more coin if you wish to claim it. You know what I want.
String.Dest: 你还能从我这里赚到更多钱，你知道我想要什么。

String.Source: No. Not yet. We should greet our guest first.
String.Dest: 不，等会儿。我们应该先招呼客人。
克鲁契克瑞尔！雷隆尼基夫！上！

String.Source: This is most exciting, wouldn't you agree?
String.Dest: 这真令人兴奋，你不觉得吗？

String.Source: Beware. Miraak is strong. He knew you would come here.
String.Dest: 小心，米拉克很强。他知道你会来这里。

String.Source: Did you think to escape me, Miraak? You can hide nothing from me here.
String.Dest: 你以为逃得出我的掌控吗，米拉克？你在我面前没有秘密可言。

String.Source: Miraak harbored fantasies of rebellion against me. Learn from his example. Serve me faithfully, and you will continue to be richly rewarded.
String.Dest: 米拉克幻想着背叛我，从他那儿吸取教训吧，忠诚地服侍我，你将有拿不完的奖励。

String.Source: Yes, of course. It said "A sacrifice will bring you closer to that which you seek."
String.Dest: 当然可以，写的是“牺牲会让你离目标更近。”

String.Source: Hmm... it's all here. Well, then... looks like I have a good bit of work to start on.
String.Dest: 嗯……钱够了，那么……看来我还有一堆活儿要干。

String.Source: Certainly. The translation was "All men must die, often by their own means."
String.Dest: 当然，翻译过来是“人皆必死，方法各异。”

String.Source: Every time the Red Mountain belches, more of them land here. Look around for impact craters, exposed rock, that sort of thing.
String.Dest: 每次红山喷发后，就会有更多的心石落在这里。去找找周围有没有陨石坑，裸露的岩石之类的东西。

String.Source: Did you really think our threats were idle?
String.Dest: 当真以为我们是在虚张声势吗？

String.Source: Please! You've got to get me out of here before she comes back.
String.Dest: 求你了！在她回来之前把我放出去！

String.Source: Better than a soldier's pay, so you should be thankful.
String.Dest: 这比从军粮饷要高，你该心存感激。

String.Source: No one can take them away. No one!
String.Dest: 没人可以把他们带走。没人！

String.Source: Maybe I can find more of them. More spiders!
String.Dest: 也许我还找得到更多，更多的蜘蛛！

String.Source: Their mine. The spiders are mine to control!
String.Dest: 它们是我的。只有我能控制那些蜘蛛！

String.Source: Why did he have to call me insane?
Who are you? Have you come to take them away?
String.Dest: 你是谁？来把它们带走的？

String.Source: No doubt just as Hermaeus Mora intended. He is a fickle master, you know.
String.Dest: 这毫无疑问是赫麦尤斯·莫拉想要的，他可真是个善变的主人，是吧。

String.Source: And so the First Dragonborn meets the Last Dragonborn at the summit of Apocrypha.
String.Dest: 那么，第一个与最后一个龙裔在异典之巅相见了。

String.Source: But now I will be free of him. My time in Apocrypha is over. You are here in your full power, and thus subject to my full power.
String.Dest: 但现在我会挣脱它的束缚。我在异典的日子结束了，你带着全部的力量站在这里，也会面对我全部的力量。

String.Source: I'm sorry to bother you, but Second Councilor Arano asked me to come find you. He said it's quite urgent.
String.Dest: 抱歉打扰你，但副议员阿拉诺让我来找你。他说是件急事。

String.Source: I've just the spell for you!
String.Dest: 这法术就是给你准备的！

String.Source: Look, this is important... even more important than wiping out the ash spawn.
String.Dest: 听着，这件事很重要……甚至比扫除灰烬怪还重要。

String.Source: After everything you've already done for Raven Rock, I hate to ask for more but I can't risk Councilor Morvayn being killed.
String.Dest: 你为鸦石镇做的已经够多了，我实在无颜再提什么请求。但我不能冒着让莫尔凡议员遇刺的风险。

String.Source: Don't worry, you can trust Geldis. He's been with us for a long time.
String.Dest: 别担心，你可以信任吉迪斯。他很早就站在我们这边了。

String.Source: Be careful, if the Severin's have betrayed us, then they'll be well-armed.
String.Dest: 小心，要是瑟佛林家背叛了我们，那他们就会全副武装。

String.Source: Ashfallow Citadel's been abandoned for a long time. Be ready for anything.
String.Dest: 灰落堡垒已经被遗弃了很久。做好一切准备吧。

String.Source: Please, tell Storn what has happened.
String.Dest: 拜托了，告诉斯托恩发生了什么。

String.Source: This is what I hired you for!
I must, Frea. It is the only way to free Solstheim forever from Miraak's shadow.
String.Dest: 我必须这么做，芙瑞雅。只有这样才能将索瑟海姆从米拉克的阴影下永远解放出来。

String.Source: Oh, I doubt it. Deor has always been quick to worry.
String.Dest: 哦，我不这么看。迪乌尔总是这么大惊小怪。
别在这里晃悠。马上走开。

String.Source: This is Thalmor business, now get out of here!
Twisted beasts, a curse of Hircine. True bears are noble and great creatures of the wild.
String.Dest: 一种被扭曲的野兽，是海尔辛的诅咒。真正的熊是大自然高贵而强大的生物。

String.Source: Those boots'll look mighty fine on me.
String.Dest: 你那双鞋子留给我穿很合适。

String.Source: I hope Geldis proved useful. Have you made any progress?
String.Dest: 我希望吉迪斯能帮上忙，有什么进展了吗？

String.Source: I'm glad to see you're well. I don't like sending people off to battle.
String.Dest: 很高兴看到你没事，我不喜欢把人送去战斗。

String.Source: I believe Councilor Morvayn wants to speak to you.
String.Dest: 莫尔凡议员肯定有话和你说。

String.Source: For Vilur Ulen! Long live House Hlaalu!
String.Dest: 为了维勒·乌伦！哈拉鲁家万岁！

String.Source: Well, what happened? Were you able to track down Vendil? Out with it!
String.Dest: 哦，怎么样了？你找到文德尔了吗？快说啊！

String.Source: Councilor Morvayn was offering quite a bounty for assistance with this matter.
String.Dest: 莫尔凡议员开过一大笔赏金给解决这个麻烦的人。

String.Source: All that remains now is chasing them down, and bringing them to justice.
String.Dest: 剩下的就是追捕他们，将其绳之以法。

String.Source: I'll go hire a new crew, and some brawny types to keep them safe. Come back and check in on us. Nothing can stop us this time.
String.Dest: 我去雇佣新的人手，再招些壮实的来保护他们。记得回来看看我们的进度，这次没什么能让我们停工了。

String.Source: And so here we are, out of our home.
String.Dest: 然后我们就来这儿了，被赶出了家门。

String.Source: If even one of these House Hlaalu s'wits escapes, they won't just be after Councilor Morvayn.
String.Dest: 这些哈拉鲁家的斯'威特但凡有一个漏网，它们接下来的目标可就不只是莫尔凡议员了。

String.Source: To think that Vendil would stoop so low as to hire those fetchers... I'm glad you killed him.
String.Dest: 没想到文德尔如此下作，居然雇佣那些费彻……我很高兴你把他杀了。

String.Source: Excuse me, Councilor Morvayn? I have some wonderful news.
String.Dest: 恕我打扰下，莫尔凡议员？我有些好消息。

String.Source: Are we done? I thought so.
Ash and ice! Who did this? Come out and face me like a man!
String.Dest: 灰和冰啊！谁干的？有种滚出来见我！

String.Source: I should have been more vigilant. I'm sorry.
String.Dest: 我应该更警惕些的，很抱歉。

String.Source: Don't say that. It's not your fault, old friend.
String.Dest: 别那么说，这不是你的错，老朋友。

String.Source: However, since a bit of coin hardly seems like enough... I've decided to provide something more substantial.
String.Dest: 但是，几枚金币明显是不足以作为报酬的……我决定奖给你一些更实际的东西。

String.Source: You've earned your citizenship here, and I hope you'll consider staying with us as a member of our community.
String.Dest: 你获得了这里的公民身份，希望你会考虑留下来，成为我们社区的一员。

String.Source: I am not going down there. It would be foolish to attempt it.
String.Dest: 我不会下去的，傻子才这样硬闯。

String.Source: You have a much better chance than I to make it through these traps.
String.Dest: 你想必比我更有机会通过这些陷阱。

String.Source: This is by his hand, for certain.
String.Dest: 这是他的笔迹，毫无疑问。

String.Source: I wonder if we will find some answers to what happened so long ago.
String.Dest: 希望我们能弄明白这儿很久以前发生过的事儿。

String.Source: How much deeper can this be? I had been told that Miraak's power was great, but to have built so large a temple...
String.Dest: 这还有多深啊？我是听说过米拉克力量很大，但他居然建了这么大的神殿……

String.Source: This must be it. Let us move quickly.
String.Dest: 一定是这儿了，咱们快走。

String.Source: I cannot leave this unfinished. I must remain.
String.Dest: 我不能半途而废，必须坚持下去。

String.Source: No dovah would stoop to such vile tahrovin.
String.Dest: 没有都瓦会俯首于如此卑鄙的塔罗文。

String.Source: Bein Rotmulaagge! What foul Words are these?
String.Dest: 贝因 洛特姆拉各！这是什么粗鄙之语？

String.Source: You are strong, Dovahkiin. Rinik mul. But not strong enough.
String.Dest: 你很强，都瓦克因。瑞尼克 穆尔。但还不够。

String.Source: Now we will see whose thu'um is the stronger!
String.Dest: 现在来看看谁的吐'目更强！

String.Source: When Miraak returns, all will bow before him.
String.Dest: 等米拉克回归，众生都将臣服。

String.Source: Soon Miraak will return to resume his rightful junaar over Solstheim.
String.Dest: 米拉克很快就会回归，恢复他在索瑟海姆琼那的统治。

String.Source: I'll allow you to leave in peace... this time.
String.Dest: 我还不打算动你……至少这次。

String.Source: And... don't tell Elmus I said that.
String.Dest: 然后……别跟艾穆斯说我这么说他。

String.Source: But the daedra have no skill for creation, so they befile the All-Maker's workings.
String.Dest: 但是迪德拉可没有创造之力，他们只能改造造物主的作品。

String.Source: Krin mey. You are a fool to challenge Miraak. His thu'um is supreme.
String.Dest: 克因 梅。妄想挑战米拉克实在愚蠢，他的吐'目是最强的。

String.Source: Nature is out of balance. The very air feels wrong. Solstheim is in great danger.
String.Dest: 自然平衡被打破了。就连空气也不对劲。索瑟海姆面临重大危机。

String.Source: Oh... so terrible. When will these dark times be over?
String.Dest: 哦……太可怕了。这黑暗的时刻什么时候才能结束？

String.Source: Return to the All-Maker, old one. The Skaal will never forget your sacrifice.
String.Dest: 回到造物主身边吧，老头子。斯卡尔人不会忘记你的牺牲。

String.Source: By the gods... I've never seen anything like it... I, uh... I don't think this will go in my book.
String.Dest: 诸神啊……我从来没见过这种事……我，呃……不打算把这写进我的书里。

String.Source: You always protected us. I hope you find peace in the next life. Goodbye, old one.
String.Dest: 你总是在保护我们。希望你来生能找到安宁。再见了，老头子。

String.Source: Frea... what happened? What was that thing? I thought the village was safe now.
String.Dest: 芙瑞雅……发生了什么？那是什么东西？我还以为村子已经安全了。

String.Source: I think they may be rebuilding themselves while we're not looking.
String.Dest: 我猜它们大概会趁我们不注意时自我修复。

String.Source: I don't really understand what you did, but I trust you did it for the good of the village. So... thank you.
String.Dest: 我不懂你做了什么，但我相信你是为了村子。那么……谢谢你。

String.Source: May the All-Maker guide your soul to the next life.
String.Dest: 愿造物主指引你的灵魂开始下一段生命。

String.Source: Goodbye, old friend. We will miss you, but do not worry. Frea will guide us well, thanks to you.
String.Dest: 再见了，老朋友。我们会想你的，但别担心。多亏了你，芙瑞雅会好好指引我们的。

String.Source: I... uh... you'll be missed, old man.
String.Dest: 我……呃……我们会怀念你的，老头子。

String.Source: It can't be... please, All-Maker, send him back to us...
String.Dest: 不可能……拜托了，造物主，把他还给我们……

String.Source: This is Thalmor business and no concern of yours.
Oh... so terrible. When will these dark times be over?
String.Dest: 哦……太可怕了。这黑暗的时刻什么时候才能结束？

String.Source: I wouldn't be at Thirsk if I wasn't.
String.Dest: 我要不是就不会待在瑟斯科了。

String.Source: A manifestation of Hermaeus Mora... that book Storn was reading, I've read vague hints of them, but never thought to actually see...
String.Dest: 赫麦尤斯·莫拉又一次现世了……斯托恩读过的那本书，我曾读出了一些隐晦的暗示，但从没想过会真的看到……

String.Source: You brought this thing into our village. I do not know why Storn trusted you, but he did. Make sure he did not die for nothing.
String.Dest: 是你把这东西带到我们村来的，不知道斯托恩为什么会相信你，但他就这么做了。就不要让他的牺牲白费。

String.Source: I don't understand. I thought the village was safe. What are we going to do now?
String.Dest: 我无法理解，还以为村子是安全的呢。我们现在该怎么办？

String.Source: Whatever that was... I trust you will make it pay for what it did to Storn.
String.Dest: 无论那是什么……我相信你会为斯托恩讨回公道。

String.Source: Storn was like a father to me. To all of us. I do not know what we will do without him.
String.Dest: 斯托恩像是我的父亲，我们大家的父亲。不知道没有了他我们该怎么办。

String.Source: Frea will grieve, but she will prove a good shaman. Storn taught her well. He knew she was ready to guide us in his place.
String.Dest: 芙瑞雅会为此哀悼，但她会成为一个好萨满的。斯托恩教导有方。他知道她能接班来指引我们。

String.Source: I already told you, Mogrul can't touch me now.
String.Dest: 我跟你说了，莫古尔现在动不了我。

String.Source: You will stop... whatever that was - so that that evil does not swallow the Skaal like it did Storn?
String.Dest: 你要阻止那玩意儿……不管那是什么，那种邪恶力量不会像吞噬斯托恩一样吞噬整个斯卡尔吧？

String.Source: He was a good man. The strong center of the Skaal. If you know how to stop whatever that was, go and stop it.
String.Dest: 他是个好人，是斯卡尔的中流砥柱。你要是知道怎么去阻止这种事情发生，就去吧。

String.Source: What does it mean? What was that? What happened to him?
String.Dest: 这是怎么了？那是啥玩意儿？他怎么回事？

String.Source: I feel, different somehow. More myself.
String.Dest: 我感觉，有些不一样了。感觉又变回我自己了。

String.Source: We were searching the farm when the ash spawn ambushed us. Have a look around and see if you can turn up anything useful.
String.Dest: 我们在搜查农场的时候被灰烬怪伏击了。四处看看能不能找到有用的线索。

String.Source: How dare you invade my fort!
I'll see you hanged for this!
First I'll deal with you, then the soldiers in Raven Rock!
String.Dest: 先解决掉你，之后就是鸦石镇的卫兵！

String.Source: But those gold-grubbers at the East Empire Company started charging more than their share for bringing it over.
String.Dest: 但是后来那些东帝国公司的强盗们开始漫天要价。

String.Source: And leave my farm? No thank you.
String.Dest: 然后离开我的农场？不用了谢谢。

String.Source: All troops, repel the invaders! Show no mercy!
String.Dest: 所有部队，驱逐入侵者！不要手下留情！

String.Source: The last cube is somewhere in here. I hope it won't require more swimming around in this filth.
String.Dest: 最后一块方典就在里面。希望不需要蹚这脏水。

String.Source: You don't believe me. No one does. They don't want to. I don't want to either. But I can't help it. They're in my head!
String.Dest: 你不相信我，没人相信我。他们不愿意相信我，我也不想。但我没办法，它们就在我脑子里！

String.Source: Look up there. I think I see something.
String.Dest: 往上看，我好像看到了什么。

String.Source: Impressive! Was it worth the effort?
You are a blessing from the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 你是造物主的赐福之一。

String.Source: Do not abandon me to these elves, I beg you.
String.Dest: 求你了，别把我丢给这些精灵。

String.Source: You would leave me here? As a prisoner?
String.Dest: 你要把我留在这儿？当成囚犯？

String.Source: I am done with you. Go on, get out of my sight.
String.Dest: 我跟你无话可说。走啊，别让我看见你。

String.Source: Now you'll learn the folly of your mistake!
String.Dest: 现在你要为犯的错付出代价了！

String.Source: Do not think we are now friends. I have tolerated you, nothing more.
String.Dest: 别觉得我们是朋友了。我是在忍受你，没了。

String.Source: Who sent you to stop us? It hardly matters, you're dead anyway.
String.Dest: 谁派你来阻止我们的？不管了，你已经是个死人了。

String.Source: We will have that Stalhrim, and there's nothing you can do to stop us!
String.Dest: 我们迟早会得到魔冰，你阻止不了！

String.Source: You should have heeded our warnings.
String.Dest: 你该听听我们的警告的。

String.Source: Haven't heard anything lately, but check back with me... you never know.
String.Dest: 最近没什么消息，但有空就来看看吧……谁知道会出什么事儿。

String.Source: I must take this back to Skaal Village right away.
String.Dest: 我必须马上把这个带回斯卡尔村去。

String.Source: It's almost time to feed the mushrooms. They like a drop of blood every now and then you know.
String.Dest: 差不多到喂真菌的时候了。时不时滴几滴血会让他们喜欢的。

String.Source: We should check these rooms for supplies before going any further.
String.Dest: 我们在继续深入前应该检查这些房间里的物资。

String.Source: Draugr again. I mean... we should have expected it, right? What else do you find in these damn crypts, but waves and waves of draugr?
String.Dest: 尸鬼又来了。我是说……也在预料之中，对吧？在这些天杀的地穴里除了一波波的尸鬼还能找到啥？

String.Source: We must be careful in these ruins. Traps can be anywhere, and there will likely be many.
String.Dest: 在这些废墟里我们必须多加小心，随处都可能有陷阱。

String.Source: It's a long way back to Windhelm from here.
String.Dest: 从这儿回风舵城还远得很。

String.Source: That witch was going to kill me soon, I just know it.
String.Dest: 那个女巫就快把我杀了，我感觉得到。

String.Source: She repaid our kindness by attacking us in the middle of the night.
String.Dest: 她却在午夜袭击了我们，来回报我们的善意。

String.Source: We were digging in these mines when she found us.
String.Dest: 她找到我们的时候，我们在挖这些矿坑。

String.Source: Go, then. Kill Miraak. Do not fail.
String.Dest: 走啊。杀了米拉克。不准失败。
恐怖的事情。实验……还有更糟的。

String.Source: Then I'm going to get on the first boat to the mainland.
String.Dest: 之后我要马上搭船去内陆。

String.Source: First I'm going to leave this place, as fast as I can.
String.Dest: 首先是离开这里，越快越好。

String.Source: The others call you a friend, but I still see an outsider.
String.Dest: 其他人当你是朋友，但我看你依旧是个外人。

String.Source: Well, there is one reason that comes to mind.
String.Dest: 嗯，我只能想到一个原因。

String.Source: Can anyone hear me? I am a prisoner of the Thalmor. help!
String.Dest: 有人听到吗？我被梭默囚禁了，救命啊！

String.Source: I'll be here when you have more Stalhrim weapons and armor.
String.Dest: 等你有了更多的魔冰武器和护甲，就来这里找我。

String.Source: Just make sure not to tell anyone what you saw here.
String.Dest: 记得别跟任何人提过在这儿看到了什么。

String.Source: I know things. Hidden things. Things you aren't supposed to know.
String.Dest: 我知道些隐秘知识，你不该知道的知识。

String.Source: No! That's what I'm trying to say. The secrets. They're in there. In there deep. Can't get them out. They're in my head!
String.Dest: 有！我不是说了吗！那些秘密，就在这里，我没法取出来。它们就在我脑子里！

String.Source: Luck won't help. I need something to pry these things out of my head.
String.Dest: 好运没用啊。我需要能把这些东西赶出脑子的东西。

String.Source: The Black Book. It shoved them in there. With black slick fingers.
String.Dest: 从黑暗经书。书把它们塞进来了，用黑而滑的手指。

String.Source: Oh, no. I didn't find it. It found me. Here. I'll show you. See. Right there.
String.Dest: 哦不，不是我找它，是它来找我的。拿着，我给你看看，就在这里。

String.Source: Why won't anyone listen to me?!
I'm going to hire some mercenaries this time, too. Having some people around who know how to fight should...
String.Dest: 这次我还打算招些佣兵。在周围留些战斗好手……

String.Source: It's good to see you again, Skaal-friend. By saving Baldor, you helped to preserve our sacred traditions.
String.Dest: 很高兴又见到你，斯卡尔之友。你救了鲍德尔，让我们得以维持神圣的传统。

String.Source: If you find something, then we can talk about bounties and rewards.
String.Dest: 要是找到了什么，我们再来讨论赏金和奖励。

String.Source: Don't get ahead of yourself. All you are going to do is wear this ring and walk around Tel Mithryn.
String.Dest: 先别太激动。你要做的只是戴上这个指环，在泰尔·米斯瑞恩附近走走。

String.Source: She's holed up in Highpoint Tower.
Yes, yes. I'll find something around here to pay you with.
String.Dest: 好吧好吧。我会找些东西付给你。

String.Source: I call upon the powers of the sun, moons and stars. Ildari Sarothril, reveal yourself!
String.Dest: 我召唤日、月和星辰的力量。伊达利·萨罗希里，现身吧！

String.Source: I knew it! A secret passage in the dining area just opened up.
String.Dest: 我就知道！食堂里打开了一条秘密通道！

String.Source: At least, that's my hope. We've all learned lessons at the expense of this recent unpleasantness.
String.Dest: 至少，这是我的期望。最近发生的不愉快肯定让大家都学到了教训。

String.Source: (Failed) You've wasted enough of my time already. Just... just let me be.
String.Dest: 你已经浪费了我太多时间。还是……走开吧。

String.Source: We're going to rebuild. The hall, and ourselves. In some form or another.
String.Dest: 我们要重建。以某种形式重建大厅还有我们自己。

String.Source: Trifle with us at your peril.
Whoever leads us next can go plead with him if they want to, but I'd rather make a tradition of my own.
String.Dest: 下一位首领可以去寻求他的支持，但我宁愿开创自己的传统。

String.Source: A long time ago, a man named Hrothmund left the Skaal to form his own tradition.
String.Dest: 很久以前，一个叫哈洛斯蒙德的人离开了斯卡尔村，开创了自己的传统。

String.Source: Not so tough now, are you?
It's got to be in here somewhere...
I hope she finds what she needs out there.
String.Dest: 希望她在外面能找到她所求之物。

String.Source: I'll lead those who will follow. And most of these are the following sort. So yes, I think we'll be all right.
String.Dest: 我会领导那些愿意追随我的人，而大多数人都会追随。所以是的，我想我们不会有事的。

String.Source: Here is the foul book that killed Storn. Take it away from here. Throw it into the sea. It is evil.
String.Dest: 这是杀了斯托恩的那本臭书。把它带走，扔到海里去吧。太邪恶了。

String.Source: Bah. Don't even mention that place to me. This whole trip has been a disaster.
String.Dest: 啊。别再提那地方了。整个过程都是一场灾难。

String.Source: The name's Ralis. Ralis Sedarys, out of Mournhold.
String.Dest: 我叫拉里斯。拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯，来自哀伤之城。

String.Source: Every winter, the ash from the angry mountains creeps closer.
String.Dest: 每到冬天，喷发的火山灰烬就会紧逼过来。

String.Source: We're colder than the snow and harder than steel. We wrap ourselves in both to remind us of the world we face.
String.Dest: 我们比雪更冷，比钢更硬。我们置身于两者之间，提醒自己所面对的世界是什么模样。

String.Source: Now, they're old, and they're powerful. A combination like that makes them pretty valuable to certain people, and I happen to know certain people.
String.Dest: 现在来看都是些古物，而且力量强大。那种系列组合让它们在特定人士眼中价值连城，而我刚好认识某些人士。

String.Source: Pleasure doing business with you, partner. I'll see you soon.
String.Dest: 很高兴和你做生意，伙计。到时候见。

String.Source: Steer clear of this cabin, or you'll regret it.
String.Dest: 离这间屋子远点儿，否则你就要后悔了。

String.Source: When I first got to Kolbjorn, you couldn't even see it. Buried in the ash, like most other things on this blasted island.
String.Dest: 我刚来寇泊琼那会儿，什么都看不出来。全被灰给埋住了，跟这混账岛上其他地方一样。

String.Source: Before I could blink, all the miners were dead and I was next in line. Don't think anyone else made it out alive.
String.Dest: 就一眨眼的工夫，所有挖掘工人都死了，连我都差点儿。恐怕没有其他幸存者。

String.Source: Just let me study these runes for a moment...
String.Dest: 让我研究一会儿这些符文……

String.Source: This isn't good. We only got a little ways in when something managed to wake up the draugr.
String.Dest: 情况不妙。我们才刚进去几步就把尸鬼弄醒了。

String.Source: Might be over either way. It looked like a dead end before the place started crawling. We could have missed something, though. I don't know.
String.Dest: 但也许本来就没希望了。好像在它们爬起来前我们就挖到了死路。但我们可能漏看了什么。

String.Source: We'll have to sweeten the pot a bit, this time. I think I'll need... say, two thousand septims to hire replacements.
String.Dest: 我们这次得把甜头给大点。我想有必要……花两千塞普汀来补充人手。

String.Source: Now, I'll have to go recruit some more miners... it won't be easy, seeing as none of their friends came back from the first attempt.
String.Dest: 现在，我得招募些新的挖掘工人……可是谈何容易呢，毕竟其他工人也知道他们的朋友上次死了。

String.Source: Isn't that something. But I'm not heading down there, and there's no way anyone else will, until the draugr are gone. Keep at it.
String.Dest: 真厉害，但我还不打算下去。其他人也是一样，你得先把尸鬼处理完才行。加油干吧。

String.Source: May she be rewarded for her service as I am!
String.Dest: 愿她为自己的侍奉得到与我一样的奖赏！

String.Source: Just finish the job. If you aren't back in a couple of hours, I'll start packing up.
String.Dest: 快去干活儿吧。要是几小时后你还没回来，我就要打包走人了。

String.Source: Ah, the Hall of Stories. These are found in many ancient Nord tombs.
String.Dest: 啊，故事大厅，很多诺德墓穴里都有。

String.Source: And now you're back. Great, just great.
String.Dest: 你也回来了。太好了，真是太好了。

String.Source: The ash spawn attacks on the Bulwark are getting worse. Captain Veleth is trying his best, but I think the Redoran Guard are overwhelmed.
String.Dest: 灰烬怪对防护堤的袭击愈加猛烈，维黎斯队长已经尽力了，但是我认为瑞多然卫兵们快被累垮了。

String.Source: We should check these rooms for supplies before heading further into the temple.
String.Dest: 在继续深入神殿前应该看看这些房间里有没有补给。

String.Source: Well, at least we can get back to work. But hazard pay keeps piling up, and this won't be getting any cheaper.
String.Dest: 嗯，至少我们可以复工了。但是危险工资一直在上涨，这次得花更多的钱了。

String.Source: The Skaal is a group of Nords who live up to the north of here. They're always talking about their connection to the natural world.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人是一群住在北边的诺德人。他们总是谈论着自己和自然世界的纽带。

String.Source: Then why are you still talking to me?
String.Dest: 那你怎么还在和我闲扯？

String.Source: I'm going to send two of the best Redoran Guard we have to take them down. I want you to assist them any way you can.
String.Dest: 我会派两位最强的瑞多然卫兵去干掉他们，希望你尽可能地协助他们。

String.Source: Yes, well, the mercenaries did their jobs. Worth every septim. Of course, they might disagree... the dead ones, anyway. Gods, what a disaster.
String.Dest: 是啊，那些佣兵们没白干，这笔钱花的值了。当然他们可能不这么想了……我是说那些死了的。天啊，真是场灾难。

String.Source: We've... developed quite the reputation. But for enough gold... I can do it. Just barely.
String.Dest: 我们已经……声名狼藉了。但要是给够钱……我还是能勉强招够人。

String.Source: Good. I'm glad I can count on you, at least.
String.Dest: 很好。很高兴至少你还靠得住。

String.Source: I know, you could almost buy a house for that much, but like I said... we've got quite the reputation out here.
String.Dest: 我知道这笔钱差不多可以买栋房子了，但刚才说了……我们的名声已经烂到谷底了。

String.Source: Aww, don't start holding out on me now. We're so close.
String.Dest: 唉啊，别那么小气嘛。我们就要成功了。

String.Source: I... I don't remember. Ever since I got here... to Kolbjorn... I've heard whispers. Voices. Thoughts. Imaginings.
String.Dest: 我……我不记得了。自从我来了寇泊琼……就一直能听到那些低语，冒出那些想法，还见到那些幻象。

String.Source: I don't know! I hope I didn't. But... maybe I... please, you have to believe me?
String.Dest: 我不知道！我希望不是我。但是……可能我……拜托了，你必须相信我。

String.Source: I don't know. I... maybe? It's what... it's what he wanted. He just needed their energy.
String.Dest: 我不清楚。我……也许吧？那就是……那就是他要我做的。他要他们的能量。

String.Source: Interesting that these statues are different. If they represent archery, magic and swordsmanship, then what does that tell us?
String.Dest: 这些石柱互不相同，有意思。要是它们各自代表箭术、魔法和剑术，那么其中的含义是什么？

String.Source: We've got a crew on it. They're not sharp, but they're working hard. Come back soon and see how they're doing.
String.Dest: 我们有一队人马在忙活了。他们不太聪明，但是工作认真。过段时间再来看看他们的进度吧。

String.Source: You... liar... gah! ... I won't... not... for you...
Storn will protect us. We will be safe.
String.Dest: 斯托恩会保护我们。我们不会有事的。

String.Source: Do not disturb us, I beg you. We must focus on Storn's magic.
String.Dest: 别打扰我们，求你了。我们必须注意斯托恩的魔法。

String.Source: Do not distract me. I must dedicate myself to maintaining the barrier.
String.Dest: 别分我的心。我必须把精力放在维持屏障上。

String.Source: Please, do not distract us. This barrier must be maintained at all costs.
String.Dest: 拜托，别干扰我们。这道屏障无论如何得撑住。

String.Source: What's happening? You must stop it!
Father, you must not do this. That book is... wrong. Evil. Against everything that you have taught me my whole life.
String.Dest: 父亲，你不能这么做。那本书……不正常，很邪恶。这与你教我一辈子的所有东西背道而驰。

String.Source: I stand beside you, father, as always.
String.Dest: 我与您同在，父亲，永远如此。

String.Source: Aam uv dir. Those that will not serve Miraak must die.
String.Dest: 阿姆 乌维 迪尔。不臣服于米拉克的都得死。

String.Source: How about I don't. You don't scare me.
And I'd like you to find the truth of the matter.
String.Dest: 我希望你能帮我查个水落石出。

String.Source: Master Neloth grew one here to be his home. Don't ask me how.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师在这儿种了一棵自己的家。别问我怎么做到的。

String.Source: When you return to the village, come and meet me at my forge. I will reward you for this great deed you have done.
String.Dest: 等你回村子后，来我的锻炉找我。我会好好奖励你的功劳。

String.Source: If I cannot find a way to save them, there is no hope for our people.
String.Dest: 要是我找不到救他们的办法，族人们就没希望了。

String.Source: It is an ancient stone of power, a connection to the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 一种古代的力量之石，它连结着造物主。

String.Source: Walking in these chambers is like walking in the past.
String.Dest: 走过这些墓室就像是走过历史。

String.Source: At times like this, history truly comes alive for me.
String.Dest: 在这种时候，历史变得鲜活了起来。

String.Source: This place was a remarkable find!
String.Dest: 这地方真是个大发现啊！

String.Source: Neloth is a real task master.
In Morrowind, the Telvanni grow buildings from special fungus spores.
String.Dest: 在晨风，泰瓦尼家会用特殊真菌孢子种植建筑。

String.Source: We're just out here temporarily, to regroup.
String.Dest: 我们只是暂时在这儿重整旗鼓。

String.Source: Whatever is between you and Mogrul is your problem.
String.Dest: 你跟莫古尔之间的事情与我无关。

String.Source: I've got a financier waiting for me back on the mainland. Sent me here in the interests of obtaining some rare antiquities. The "Relics of Ahzidal."
String.Dest: 内陆有个赞助人在等我回去。他派我来取一些稀有文物。“阿兹达尔的遗物”。

String.Source: Longer than I would have liked.
You don't know the half of it.
Invaders have breached the fort! Attack!
String.Dest: 入侵者已经攻进了堡垒！进攻！

String.Source: But... she's always trying to be the one in charge, and feeling terrible when something goes wrong.
String.Dest: 但是……她总是想成为领导者，要是事情出了问题心情就很差。

String.Source: I have much to learn yet from Storn, if I am to one day become the shaman.
String.Dest: 如果我把日后成为萨满当做目标，就还有很多要跟斯托恩学的。

String.Source: All my life. She's my big sister.
Fanari shows what it means to be a leader to the Skaal. In time, perhaps I could lead as well.
String.Dest: 法娜丽展现了作为斯卡尔首领的意义。有朝一日，也许我也能学会领导大家。

String.Source: That depends on who you ask.
We still buy what we have to, but I make as much as I can.
String.Dest: 我们仍会买些必需品，但酒我尽量自己酿。
你的入侵计划必定失败！

String.Source: It drives Kuvar mad, but someone has to do it or the place would be a little... cold.
String.Dest: 这让库瓦尔很生气，但总得有人做这些，不然这地方就太……冰冷了。

String.Source: Do I look like the sort who suffers fools lightly?
String.Dest: 我看起来很喜欢和白痴扯皮吗？

String.Source: These days I focus a little more on the creature comforts of the hall, though. The food, the drink, the stories.
String.Dest: 但是这些天里，我专注于安抚大伙儿的情绪。准备食物，饮料还有故事。

String.Source: Well, there's a warrior, an archer and a mage. Perhaps each statue is meant to represent a different method of combat.
String.Dest: 嗯，有战士、弓箭手和法师。也许每个石柱都代表着不同的战斗方式。

String.Source: Hope our shipments are still good. How long has it been?
String.Dest: 希望我们的货没坏，都过了多久了？

String.Source: Hm, I wonder if I should find something warmer to wear...
String.Dest: 嗯，我应该带些保暖的衣服来……

String.Source: The very elements are at my command!
I am a master wizard of House Telvanni!
String.Dest: 我是泰瓦尼家的高等巫师！

String.Source: Dagon's eyeballs, but you're an ugly one, aren't you?
String.Dest: 大衮的眼珠子啊，你真他妈丑啊，是吧？

String.Source: I should kill you anyway, but that would be boring.
String.Dest: 我是该杀了你，但那太无聊了。

String.Source: There seems to be an inexhaustible supply of these Dwemer contraptions.
String.Dest: 这些锻莫机关好像无穷无尽。

String.Source: I see you have little in the way of morals.
String.Dest: 看来你没什么道德可言。

String.Source: Does it bother you to be trespassing right now?
String.Dest: 现在后悔擅闯进来了吧？

String.Source: So you think you can steal from me?
String.Dest: 你觉得能从我这儿偷东西？

String.Source: Get your hand out of my pocket!
I'll make you pay for that!
Learn the power of the Telvanni!
So you want to play hide and seek, eh?
You can't hide from a Telvanni wizard!
We came across some old letters that belonged to his great-grandfather in our house and he believes every word written in them.
String.Dest: 我们在家里找到了几封他曾祖父的信，他对其中的内容深信不疑。

String.Source: Damn it, what am I going to do?
We're already late. Not sure why we decided to take such an extended shore time.
String.Dest: 我们已经迟到了。不知道为什么要在岸上停留这么久。

String.Source: Try putting yourself back together now.
Is it just me, or are these platforms moving a little faster?
String.Dest: 是我的错觉，还是这些平台的移动速度变快了？

String.Source: I'm guessing this one will be even faster. Just remember to stay focused, and most importantly, run!
String.Dest: 我猜这次可能会更快，记得保持专注，跑就完了！
你会后悔与我为敌的，外地人。

String.Source: There must be hundreds of years of history etched in these walls. Too bad they seem to be too damaged to read.
String.Dest: 这些墙上应该刻有数百年的历史，可惜破损太多难以阅读。

String.Source: Those filthy vermin... they came in numbers. Waves of the things.
String.Dest: 那些肮脏的害虫……他们数量太多了，成群结队的来。

String.Source: It's good to have trustworthy souls in this place.
String.Dest: 很高兴这里有人值得信赖。

String.Source: It seems these rings can be moved.
String.Dest: 这些圆环应该可以转动。

String.Source: Perhaps there's enough undamaged text in these etchings to tell us the combination.
String.Dest: 可能这里还没损坏的文本雕刻能告诉我们怎么组合。

String.Source: And the third has something to do with fire. It also seems to mention scales.
String.Dest: 第三个是与火有关的什么东西。好像也提到了鳞片。

String.Source: That's all I can make out from this etching. I'll check the rest and see if there's anything else. You keep trying out the combinations.
String.Dest: 从蚀刻碑上就只能看出这些。我去看看其他还有什么。你试试各种组合吧。

String.Source: Do not let his death be for nothing. Go and stop Miraak.
String.Dest: 别让他的牺牲白费了。去阻止米拉克吧。

String.Source: Those things had filled it up with slop for their beasts. Elmus helped me wash it out, but the fire still smells terrible.
String.Dest: 那些家伙在里面放了泔水来喂他们的牲口。艾穆斯帮我洗干净了，但火闻起来还是很臭。

String.Source: You can't hide from a Telvanni wizard!
Down here to catch our breath, and then we'll be back in the hall once I get the rest of these up to move.
String.Dest: 我们在这下面喘口气，等其他人爬得起来，我们就会打回大厅去。

String.Source: I wouldn't call it that. We've just got a bit of an infestation, is all.
String.Dest: 倒不是这个意思。我们只是遇到了一些麻烦，仅此而已。

String.Source: In my darkest times, I fear he fell in among the werebears of the glacier.
String.Dest: 在我最不幸的时候，我怕他加入了冰川熊人的行列。

String.Source: He had a wild gleam in his eye, more than most.
String.Dest: 他眼睛里闪烁着狂野的光芒，比大多数人都强烈。

String.Source: I wish I could tell you.
This... this is my brother's handwriting. This was his.
String.Dest: 这……这是我兄弟的笔迹，这是他的。

String.Source: That's a shame. I'll make sure to let their families know. In the meantime, finish off those draugr so it'll be safe when I bring in a fresh crew.
String.Dest: 真是遗憾。我会通知他们的家属。同时你去干掉那些尸鬼，确保我带新队伍进去是安全的。

String.Source: He set off from here so long ago, it's hard to say. Could be in Hammerfell for all I know.
String.Dest: 他很早以前就离开了，很难说得清。在落锤都有可能。

String.Source: Thank you. Miraak took great pains to make it difficult to reach him, it seems.
String.Dest: 谢了，看来米拉克费了一番功夫不让人找到他。

String.Source: It looks like I was right. He was taken in by that...
String.Dest: 看来我猜对了，他被那东西给……

String.Source: You are trespassing here. I strongly suggest you move along.
String.Dest: 你这是非法入侵。我强烈建议你离开。

String.Source: The elders talk of great cities much bigger than our village, but why would anyone need so many buildings?
String.Dest: 大人们在聊那些比我们村子大得多的城市，但是谁需要那么多建筑呢？

String.Source: Well, the truth is my brother really died long ago.
String.Dest: 嗯，其实我兄弟很久以前就死了。

String.Source: Even dragons submit to Miraak's Voice. Without that power, you cannot face him. So say I, Hermaeus Mora, master of the tides of Fate.
String.Dest: 就连龙也会屈服于米拉克的吼声。没有那种力量，你是无法面对他的。这是我，赫麦尤斯·莫拉，命运潮汐之主的裁定。

String.Source: But those gold-grubbers at the East Empire Company started charging more than their share for bringing it over.
String.Dest: 但是后来那些东帝国公司的强盗们开始漫天要价。

String.Source: ...knew a girl with hair of gold, I called her fair, she called me bold...
String.Dest: ……认识个金发女孩儿，我叫她美女，她叫我莽夫……

String.Source: ...I should go back to pickin' pockets in Windhelm... easy money, less chance of an axe in your skull...
String.Dest: ……我该回风舵城去当小偷儿……来钱快，也没那么容易被砍头……

String.Source: ...I'd kill for a decent bottle of mead... not fair that they always take the good stuff...
String.Dest: ……一瓶上好的蜜酒能让我去杀人……好东西全给他们拿走了，不公平……

String.Source: ...she was real surprised when I pulled that knife from my boot...
String.Dest: ……我从鞋子里抽出刀来给她吓傻了……

String.Source: Please, go speak to the second councilor as soon as possible.
String.Dest: 拜托了，尽快去找副议员谈谈。

String.Source: Hmm. I'll have to get someone to bring this to my lab.
String.Dest: 嗯。我得找人把这个带回实验室。

String.Source: We're going to be making this back fifty-fold, partner. Trust me on this.
String.Dest: 我们会赚回五十倍的，伙计。这你可以相信我。

String.Source: All of my people have left to work on that sacred stone. It's quite fascinating. Annoying, but fascinating.
String.Dest: 我的人都跑去建那个圣石了。太奇妙了。烦人，但也奇妙。

String.Source: I came here to study the history of Solstheim, but it's the Skaal who intrigue me the most.
String.Dest: 我来这儿研究索瑟海姆的历史，但最吸引我的是斯卡尔人。

String.Source: So, you are smart enough to surrender to a master wizard of the House Telvanni.
String.Dest: 看来，你也知道该向泰瓦尼高等巫师投降。

String.Source: Wish he would just lighten up.
I hope your luck changes soon, friend. I'll do what I can to keep the ash from burying your investment, but we'll need more to keep going.
String.Dest: 我希望你早日转运，朋友。我会努力不让你的投资被灰烬掩埋，但是我们需要更多钱才能挖下去。

String.Source: We'll need to get all three of these bridges down in order to reach the pump control.
String.Dest: 我们得把这三座桥都降下来才到得了水泵控制器那儿。

String.Source: I wonder if the guardian was himself a man or a dragon?
String.Dest: 也不知道这位守护者是人还是龙。

String.Source: Let's find out what's written here.
There you go. I didn't doubt you for a second. Let's see what's up ahead.
String.Dest: 成功了，我从来没怀疑过你。继续看看前面有什么吧。

String.Source: Excuse me? How can you be so certain?
String.Dest: 你说什么？你怎么能如此肯定？

String.Source: Perhaps I'll need some rope. Oh, who am I trying to fool? At my age, I'll be lucky if I can climb a steep set of stairs.
String.Dest: 也许我需要些绳索。啊，想什么呢。在我这年纪，还能上几个台阶就算走运的了。

String.Source: For this, you have my deepest gratitude.
I wouldn't if I were you. A wizard's pockets can be more dangerous than a dragon's mouth.
String.Dest: 我要是你就不这么干。法师的口袋可比龙嘴还危险。

String.Source: Meddle in our affairs and your end will be swift and painful.
String.Dest: 要是干涉了我们的事务，你马上会死的很惨。

String.Source: Bujold's just embarrassed, I think. Doesn't help that her husband is one of the loudest complainers.
String.Dest: 布约德的丈夫抱怨的很大声，我想她很尴尬吧。

String.Source: Vendil? But he's done so much for Raven Rock... how could this be possible?
String.Dest: 文德尔？但他为鸦石镇做了这么多贡献……怎么会这样？

String.Source: Well... I... Oh, fine. Here. This is all I have.
String.Dest: 嗯……我……啊，好吧。拿着，我就这么多了。

String.Source: Kuvar isn't enough to frighten me off. He makes a lot of noise, but at the end of the day, he wants what we all want.
String.Dest: 库瓦尔吓不到我，他吵了半天，但最终，他想要的和我们没什么区别。

String.Source: I don't see why. He's your problem now.
String.Dest: 凭什么。他现在要找的人是你。

String.Source: Sad to see her go, of course. But Bujold wouldn't have gotten as far as she did if she wasn't strong. She'll... she'll be ok.
String.Dest: 我当然不想看到她离开，但若是布约德不够坚强，她也不会有今天的成就。她……会没事的。

String.Source: Tharstan hasn't stopped talking about the crypt you explored with him.
String.Dest: 沙尔斯坦一直谈论着你和他一起探索的那个地穴。

String.Source: The second one mentions the the night sky, and the moon.
String.Dest: 第二个提到了夜空，还有月亮。

String.Source: Thirsk didn't always make its own mead. No, we used to get by on shipments from Skyrim.
String.Dest: 瑟斯科本来没有酿蜜酒。以前我们都是靠着天际来的物资过活的。

String.Source: See that you do. We can't afford to let these traitors slip away.
String.Dest: 务必要成功。我们负担不起让这些叛徒们逃走的后果。

String.Source: It says that he was loyal, and his reward was an honorable death. Quite fascinating.
String.Dest: 这里提到他很忠诚，荣耀的死即是对他的奖励。很有趣。

String.Source: Why is it always about money?
We won't forget what you did for us, Storn Crag-Strider. Walk with the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 我们不会忘记你的付出，“跨崖者”斯托恩。追随造物主的脚步吧。

String.Source: Hmm... Perhaps something is meant to go into the fire?
String.Dest: 嗯……可能该把某个东西丢进火里？

String.Source: Warriors in the wild, living like the Nords of old.
String.Dest: 以古代诺德人的方式，成为在野外求生的战士。

String.Source: ...retire some day... get my self a place on the mainland...
String.Dest: ……等哪天退休了……给自己在大陆上找块地儿……

String.Source: But don't go there. You don't want these things in your head. You don't.
String.Dest: 但是别过去，你不会想让这些东西到你脑子里去的。不会的。

String.Source: ...might pay off my bounty this time... walk into Raven Rock a free man...
String.Dest: ……这次应该够付我的赏金了……作为自由人走进鸦石镇……

String.Source: No doubt there's some connection between these pressure plates and opening the next chamber.
String.Dest: 毫无疑问，这些压力板和打开下个房间有关。

String.Source: Look, I appreciate your company, but that's not why you're here. You're the money in this operation. And I guess some of the muscle.
String.Dest: 听着，你留在这儿我很感激，但你还有正事要办。你是这桩生意的金主，虽然偶尔也要出些力。

String.Source: That's good. But until we can account for all the miners, I won't be able to recruit more. Keep searching. It should be safe now.
String.Dest: 很好。不过我们得先清点完所有矿工，才能招募更多人手。你继续找吧，里面应该安全了。

String.Source: I fight. I protect the hall. I bring in meat. And I think I could take on most of the tree lovers up in the Skaal Village.
String.Dest: 我会战斗、守护大厅还有打猎。而且我觉得斯卡尔那群自然守护者里没几个是我对手。

String.Source: Hrothmund was a great man, but he wasn't a god or a paragon. We're alive, he's not, and we'll look to ourselves for strength.
String.Dest: 哈洛斯蒙德是个伟人，但他既非神，也不完美。我们是活人，而他死了，我们必须从自己身上获得力量。

String.Source: ...ain't goin' back to prison... rather die in the ash...
String.Dest: ……才不回监狱里去……宁可死在灰里……

String.Source: Now that we're back where we belong, I'm hoping we can get ourselves back to what Thirsk deserves.
String.Dest: 既然我们回家了，我希望能回到瑟斯科该有的状态。

String.Source: Dragons. Master Neloth says they are no match for a Telvanni wizard. But what about a mere apprentice?
String.Dest: 龙族。内洛斯大师说它们不是泰瓦尼法师的对手。但是对一个小小的学徒来说呢？

String.Source: Vendil, Tilisu and Mirri Severin weren't who they appeared to be. I'm afraid they were here to avenge Vilur Ulen's death.
String.Dest: 文德尔，蒂莉苏还有米莉·瑟佛林表里不一。他们恐怕是来为维勒·乌伦之死复仇的。
抱歉，我从不碰那种东西。

String.Source: I didn't think you were going to survive that fall, let alone those things that were down there.
String.Dest: 我以为你掉下去就回不来了，何况下面还有那些东西等着你。

String.Source: You will not convince me to betray Storn's trust. Talk to him. He will decide the matter.
String.Dest: 别想说服我背叛斯托恩的信任。自己跟他谈，由他来决定。

String.Source: Let's find out what's written here.
Finally. I can get back to work.
String.Dest: 我终于可以回去工作了。

String.Source: You've had some luck with these things before. Do you think you could... go back in? See if anyone's still alive?
String.Dest: 你在应付这种情况上运气不错。考虑一下能不能……进去看看？找找有没有活着的？

String.Source: But I'm afraid this is not over. I shall return and take what is mine.
String.Dest: 但是恐怕事情还没完。我将回归来取得我应得的。

String.Source: There's an intruder in the fort! Repel him immediately!
String.Dest: 有人闯入了堡垒！立刻将他驱逐！

String.Source: Most certainly. The translation was "Continue along the path, don't tread where you've been."
String.Dest: 没问题，翻译过来是“顺应道路，永不回头。”

String.Source: I'm not kicking down anyone's door until I have solid evidence in hand.
String.Dest: 除非已有确切的证据，不然我不会去踹任何人的家门。

String.Source: Well, that's a start. Unless there's some way past that dead end, though, we're still stuck here.
String.Dest: 至少开了头了。不过我们得找到穿过那条死路的办法，不然就得卡在这儿。

String.Source: I hope you've reconsidered helping us. Councilor Morvayn's life may be depending on it.
String.Dest: 希望你能重新考虑下帮帮我们。莫尔凡议员的生命可能就取决于此。

String.Source: Last thing you want is the mead to run out just as the fire dies!
String.Dest: 最糟糕的就是火熄灭时，蜜酒也喝完了。

String.Source: I didn't take you for a coward. But until we know the limits of our courage, we don't really know ourselves.
String.Dest: 没想到你是个懦夫。但只有知晓了勇气的极限在哪儿，才算是真正的了解自己。

String.Source: ...ale and mead, ale and mead, 'tis the only advice a sailor heeds...
String.Dest: ……啤酒和蜜酒，啤酒和蜜酒，水手喝了就得救……

String.Source: Well, perhaps there's some hope for us yet.
String.Dest: 好吧，或许我们还有些希望。

String.Source: ... bah. It probably can't hurt to tell you. You look mostly honest.
String.Dest: ……啊。可能告诉你也没关系，看起来还算老实。

String.Source: Look! Here's another wall with dragon language inscriptions on it!
String.Dest: 你看！这里有另一面龙语碑！

String.Source: I'm the leader of the Skaal, but it's the All-Maker who truly protects and provides.
String.Dest: 我是斯卡尔的首领，但造物主才是我们真正的保护者与施予者。

String.Source: Nightwielder's creations don't really hold up in comparison to what can be made today, but they have a sentimental value for me. You understand.
String.Dest: 暗夜掌控者的作品和现在的法杖相比已经过时了，但是它们对我来说有情感价值，知道吧。

String.Source: Well, don't just stand there! Go deal with the Draugr while I try to hold the survivors together.
String.Dest: 喂，别光站在那儿啊！去搞定那些尸鬼，我去把幸存者召集起来。

String.Source: It's time to take the fight to them, and finish this.
String.Dest: 是该和他们正面对决做个了断了。

String.Source: Hmm, here's another mention of the guardian. I can only assume that this is the guardian's tomb we are standing in now.
String.Dest: 嗯，这里又提到了那个守护者。我只能假设我们正在那位守护者的墓里。

String.Source: My fingers are too short. I can't get them out!
String.Dest: 我的手指太短了，够不到他们！

String.Source: I'd wager that the statues are the key to opening the chamber beyond.
String.Dest: 我敢赌这些石柱是打开下个房间的关键。

String.Source: Damn it. I was hoping to protect our people by sending them, not end up with casualties.
String.Dest: 可恶。我派他们去是要保护我们的居民，不是让他们去送死。

String.Source: We used to be proud warriors of Thirsk Mead Hall. There, up on the hill.
String.Dest: 我们曾是瑟斯科蜜酒大厅的骄傲战士。那儿，就在山上。

String.Source: Nothing specific, but I'm hearing rumblings of assassins living among us. I think they intend to target Councilor Morvayn, but I can't be certain.
String.Dest: 虽然没什么根据，但我感觉到我们中有刺客。他们的目标可能是莫尔凡议员，但我不确定。

String.Source: It's not as good as it used to be, but I still am, at least.
String.Dest: 没有以前那么好用了，但至少我的实力还在。

String.Source: The Skaal have withheld their secrets from me for many long years. The time has come for this knowledge to be added to my library.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人多年来一直向我隐瞒他们的秘密。已经到了把那知识收入我的馆藏的时候了。

String.Source: Since the Severin family... or whoever they were...turned out to be criminals, their property is now forfeit.
String.Dest: 既然瑟佛林家……他们到底是谁都不重要了……他们的罪行已被揭露，财产现已充公。

String.Source: It's an honor to serve the Skaal as shaman, but I still miss my father.
String.Dest: 以萨满的身份为斯卡尔服务是种荣耀，但我还是想念我父亲。

String.Source: Perhaps this particular source was worth more than I thought he was. Pity.
String.Dest: 可能这个线人比我想的有价值。可惜了。

String.Source: Frea, my daughter, went to seek out the source of these dark magics. She traveled to the old temple at the center of the island.
String.Dest: 芙瑞雅，我的女儿，试着找出这些黑暗魔法的源头。她去了岛中央的古代神殿。

String.Source: Be patient, keep the door locked, and we'll get there when we can.
String.Dest: 请保持耐心，把门锁好，等我们空出手来就会去的。

String.Source: I realize she cares about me, but she has to understand that I can't rest until I find out what happened to Gratian.
String.Dest: 我知道她关心我，但她得明白我非得知道格瑞希安出了什么事儿才能安心。

String.Source: The air is different. We are safe, which means you have succeeded.
String.Dest: 空气有所不同了，我们安全了，这代表着你成功了。
萨洛塔尔，兹尔 洛斯 迪 都！

String.Source: Geldis may be a tough boss, but I can put up with it. Keeps a roof over my head.
String.Dest: 吉迪斯或许是个严厉的老板，但我还能接受，至少有个地方可住。

String.Source: They wanted to use me to deal with Alduin - Hakon and the rest. I chose otherwise.
String.Dest: 他们想利用我对付奥杜因——哈肯和其他人。但我选了别的路。

String.Source: Miraak has forced me to serve him for too long. Nahkriin saraan lingrah. Let us destroy him together.
String.Dest: 米拉克强迫我侍奉他太久了。纳克林 萨兰 灵嘎。让我们一起毁灭他。

String.Source: Here, I want you to take this key. Head inside my house and unlock the door in the basement.
String.Dest: 来，这把钥匙给你。去我家里面打开地下室的门。

String.Source: I did not wish her to risk herself, and I worry for her safety. If you could find her and see that she is safe, I would be grateful.
String.Dest: 我不想让她一个人冒险，同时也担心她的安危。要是你能找到她，确保她的安全，我将不胜感激。

String.Source: I'd bet a fat purse of coin that he's either dead or hiding out up there.
String.Dest: 我赌一大包金币，他不是死了就是藏在那儿。

String.Source: You are strong. Stronger than I believed possible.
String.Dest: 你很强大，超乎我的想象。

String.Source: Miraak is behind what is happening to our village, and so the knowledge he has gained as Dragonborn is at the heart of it.
String.Dest: 我们村子里发生的事情的幕后是米拉克，他身为龙裔取得的知识也是关键。

String.Source: If you're dealing with me, there's only one thing to remember. Pay your debts or end up hurt.
String.Dest: 跟我打交道只需记住一件事，要么还钱，要么等着挨打。

String.Source: I did indeed. When are you going to do something about our central Ancestral Tomb? I can't even go down there any longer. It's getting intolerable!
String.Dest: 没错。你打算什么时候处理核心先祖墓穴的事情？我现在根本下不去了。实在让人难以忍受！

String.Source: Your thu'um is stronger than Miraak's. Vobalaan in. I serve you now.
String.Dest: 你的吐'目比米拉克更强大。沃巴兰 因。我愿侍奉于您。

String.Source: Some of the more powerful among them can exert their influence within our world, and when they do, men inevitably suffer.
String.Dest: 强大的迪德拉可以对我们的世界造成影响，他们得手了，凡人就有难了。

String.Source: Damn layabout never even bothers to send his own flesh and blood a letter saying how he's doing. Can you imagine?
String.Dest: 那个懒蛋连给骨肉兄弟送封平安信都不肯。你敢信？

String.Source: I have served you for long enough. Tiidi do ahmik oblaan.
String.Dest: 我听命于你已经够久了。提蒂 都 阿米克 欧伯兰。

String.Source: I cannot say for certain which is currently protecting me, but it bears further investigation at some point.
String.Dest: 我不能确定目前是什么在保护我，但我可能会在什么时候研究一下。

String.Source: She thinks that old age has addled my mind... that I'm seeing things when there's nothing to be seen.
String.Dest: 他觉得我老了就糊涂了……比如看到了一些其实不存在的东西。

String.Source: I have gone to some pains to ensure that I am immune to many forms of control.
String.Dest: 我可是花了一番功夫才能确保自己不受任何形式的控制。

String.Source: Welcome to the Retching Netch Cornerclub, milord. If you need anything, Master Geldis will be happy to help you.
String.Dest: 欢迎来到呕吐气母街角吧，先生。需要什么找吉迪斯老板就行了。

String.Source: Powerful and malevolent entities who make their home on the plane of Oblivion.
String.Dest: 它们是住在湮灭位面的强大而邪恶的实体。

String.Source: Damn it. I wish you would have told me sooner.
String.Dest: 该死。你该早点跟我说这事儿。

String.Source: We have all sorts of authentic dark elf food and drink here. Geldis spares no expense.
String.Dest: 我们这儿提供各种正宗暗精灵食物和饮料，吉迪斯从不偷工减料。

String.Source: So tell me... how's my brother Delvin? Still spending his nights at the Ragged Flagon trying to win Vex's heart?
String.Dest: 那么告诉我吧……我兄弟戴尔文怎么样了？每天晚上还是在漏壶追求威克斯吗？

String.Source: After Gratian died, he left behind a wife and a son... my grandfather, Rellicus.
String.Dest: 格瑞希安死后留下了他老婆和儿子……我祖父，瑞里库斯。

String.Source: Well, not so far. They think I'm a bit strange, but they seem to tolerate me.
String.Dest: 目前还好。他们觉得我有点奇怪，但似乎还容得下我。

String.Source: You are Dragonborn as well. You too can wield this power, perhaps to a better end.
String.Dest: 你也是龙裔，也能掌握那种力量，或许能将其用于正道。

String.Source: Don't look at me like that. I'm all alone out here, with no one to watch my back.
String.Dest: 别那么看着我，这里就我一个，没人帮忙。

String.Source: Well, here we are. This is Raven Rock. Can't say I'm all that glad to see it again.
String.Dest: 嗯，我们到了。这就是鸦石镇，又看到它，实在叫人高兴不起来。

String.Source: My back still hurts from all that stone work. Why were we at that standing stone anyway?
String.Dest: 造那个石质建筑让我背痛到现在。我们到底为什么会去那里？

String.Source: I know things that the Greybeards will never teach you.
String.Dest: 我还知道灰胡子决不会教你的东西。

String.Source: I am done being Hermaeus Mora's pawn.
String.Dest: 终于不用再当赫麦尤斯·莫拉的走狗了。

String.Source: Our home has stood in Raven Rock since the colony was founded. Gratian helped build it with his own two hands.
String.Dest: 我家安在这儿是鸦石镇聚落刚建立那会儿的事，格瑞希安也帮上了忙。

String.Source: I just hope both of you don't mistake my enthusiasm for insanity.
String.Dest: 就是希望你们俩别把我的热心误解成发疯了。

String.Source: I'll tell you what. The Guild's got a problem out here that I've been trying to deal with for years, but haven't been able to handle.
String.Dest: 告诉你吧，公会在这里有个麻烦，我已经花了几年来处理了，但是一直没办成。

String.Source: This cannot be. I am master of my own fate!
Suit yourself. I'll be here if you change your mind.
String.Dest: 随你便，要是改变主意后来这儿找我。

String.Source: When I was old enough, I began working in the mine hoping to make my fortune and eventually move to the Imperial City.
String.Dest: 当我到了岁数后，就开始在矿场里干活儿，希望挣大钱后搬回帝都去。

String.Source: Join the Last Dragonborn in her destruction.
String.Dest: 和末代龙裔一起毁灭吧。

String.Source: I am grateful for your interest in my goods.
String.Dest: 感谢你对我货物的热心。

String.Source: Sorry, boss. The ash comes in faster than I can clean it up.
String.Dest: 抱歉，大人。灰尘飞进来的速度比我打扫的还快。

String.Source: Rellicus lived there for quite a long time, working in the other sections of the mine until he was slain by reavers.
String.Dest: 瑞里库斯在这儿住了很久，也在矿场的其他地方干活儿，后来他被抢匪杀了。

String.Source: Join the Last Dragonborn in his destruction.
String.Dest: 和末代龙裔一起毁灭吧。

String.Source: So, you use my own Shout against me. You learn quickly.
String.Dest: 看来，你在用我的龙吼对付我，学得很快啊。

String.Source: If you're looking for passage to Solstheim, you won't find a finer vessel than the Northern Maiden.
String.Dest: 你在找去索瑟海姆的船吗？没有比北方少女号更合适的了。

String.Source: Drovas, I thought I told you I needed the jazbay crushed for my Emberbrand Wine. Where is it?
String.Dest: 多瓦斯，我告诉过你要把贾兹贝榨汁来做余烬牌葡萄酒。在哪儿呢？

String.Source: Bilgemuck love meat. Give meat, he follow. You go.
You bring, he follow you. Yes?

String.Dest: 雷隆尼基夫，兹尔 洛斯 迪 都！

String.Source: Beware. Hermaeus Mora will betray you as he has me.
String.Dest: 当心。赫麦尤斯·莫拉会像背叛我这样背叛你。

String.Source: That whole thing with the standing stone was very odd. I'd just as soon forget about it.
String.Dest: 跟立石有关的事儿都很奇怪。我该尽快把它们忘了。

String.Source: You have prevailed. I can feel it.
Help yourself to whatever you like inside. I won't be using it anymore.
String.Dest: 里面的东西喜欢都拿去，我都用不到了。
克鲁契克瑞尔，兹尔 洛斯 迪 都！

String.Source: In fact, they've been very accommodating. Hospitable, even. They seem happy to talk about their traditions and history.
String.Dest: 实际上，他们很随和，甚至相当好客。看上去他们很乐意讨论传统与历史。

String.Source: You fight valiantly against fate, but I am stronger here.
String.Dest: 你勇敢地和命运抗争，但在这里我更强大。

String.Source: How can I serve you, thuri?
And there is the one who has freed us.
This is the only way, Dragonborn. The only way I can be free.
String.Dest: 这是唯一的办法，龙裔。我唯一能重获自由的办法。

String.Source: Yes, that was a most disturbing experience. But to answer your question, the architecture was strange, almost otherworldly.
String.Dest: 是的，那是一次非常令人不安的经历。言归正传，那建筑很奇怪，几乎像是其他位面的。

String.Source: Felling Alduin was a mighty deed, and I thank you for it. He would have proved troublesome to me.
String.Dest: 讨伐奥杜因确实很了不起，我为此而感谢你。他可能会给我带来麻烦。

String.Source: Well you know it as well as I do. Raven Rock Mine wasn't empty at all... it's still rich in ebony ore.
String.Dest: 你我都知道，鸦石镇矿场还没挖完……里面还有大量的黑檀矿。

String.Source: Fool tribe-kin, chase away. Bilgemuck fear.
String.Dest: 愚蠢的部落血亲，赶跑了。“脏脏”害怕了。

String.Source: Then I'll settle down peacefully and never set foot in this mine again.
String.Dest: 那我就定下心来安稳过日子，再也不踏进这矿场了。

String.Source: Drovas! I need you to clean the rooms again. I went through there, and there's ash everywhere.
String.Dest: 多瓦斯！你必须再把房间打扫一遍。我刚从这儿过到处都是灰尘。

String.Source: Until I met my darling Aphia, yes.
String.Dest: 对，直到遇见我爱人阿菲娅。

String.Source: I can tell you don't like me. Well guess what. I don't give a damn.
String.Dest: 看得出来你讨厌我。但你猜怎么着？我不在乎。

String.Source: I wanted her to see her homeland before she died.
String.Dest: 希望她走之前能看看故乡。

String.Source: Some dark influence wields power over them, forces them to forget themselves and act against their nature.
String.Dest: 某种黑暗力量在控制他们，强迫他们迷失自我，违背天性。

String.Source: My strength falters. We do not have much time.
String.Dest: 我的力量正在衰减，时间不多了。

String.Source: Either that, or perhaps a daedra. If so, then may the nine protect us.
String.Dest: 除此之外，也可能是迪德拉。如果真是的话，愿九圣灵保护我们。

String.Source: It is good to see you again.
I don't know you, and the last thing I want is a stranger with her nose in my business. Go away.
String.Dest: 我不认识你，也不喜欢有人打扰我工作，走开。

String.Source: Surprised you've never heard of it.
He noticed the shadowmarks like you did, and I thought he was one of us.
String.Dest: 他跟你一样注意到了暗影标记，我就以为他是自己人。

String.Source: A fellow Breton who went by the name Esmond Tyne showed up on my doorstep about a fortnight ago.
String.Dest: 大概两周前，一个叫埃斯蒙·提尼的布莱顿小伙子到我的店门口来了。

String.Source: It would seem so. And you are to thank for it.
String.Dest: 看来是这样。我们都会为此感激你。

String.Source: I don't know you, and the last thing I want is a stranger with his nose in my business. Go away.
String.Dest: 我不认识你，也不喜欢有人打扰我工作，走开。

String.Source: You could have been mighty, if fate had decreed otherwise.
String.Dest: 如果命运另有安排，你可能会更加强大。

String.Source: I always knew you were weak-minded, Sahrotaar.
String.Dest: 我早就知道你是个软骨头，萨洛塔尔。

String.Source: Ahmik oblaan. My service to you is over.
String.Dest: 阿米克 欧伯兰。我不再侍奉你了。

String.Source: Where beast? See you, no see Bilgemuck. Go, go!
String.Dest: 野兽呢？看到你，没看到“脏脏”。去，去！

String.Source: I can't thank you enough for setting me up as steward of Tel Mithryn.
String.Dest: 真不知道怎么感谢你，帮我安排泰尔·米斯瑞恩管家的职位。

String.Source: I told him not to head up there. Sounds like the bloody fool got what he deserved.
String.Dest: 早叫他别去了，看来那白痴活该。

String.Source: I thought you were stronger than this, Kruziikrel.
String.Dest: 我以为你还更强些呢，克鲁契克瑞尔。

String.Source: I don't mind working at the Retching Netch, but I was hoping for a bit more when I moved to Solstheim. Ah well.
String.Dest: 我是不介意在呕吐气母工作，但我当初迁来索瑟海姆时以为能找到更好的。

String.Source: Zu'u ni zaamiil. You cannot command me forever.
String.Dest: 祖'乌 尼 扎米尔。你无法永远控制我。

String.Source: I suppose you could have called me a bitter old hermit... now I'm just old.
String.Dest: 原本我就是个尖酸老头……现在我就是老了点儿。

String.Source: There's got to be more to life than sweeping and cleaning all day.
String.Dest: 人生除了终日打扫，应该还有别的事可做。

String.Source: Good luck. Maybe you can figure out what's going on around here.
String.Dest: 祝你好运。也许你能搞清楚这里到底出了什么事儿。

String.Source: That he did. Right out from under my nose. Can you believe it?
String.Dest: 没错，就在我眼鼻子下面。你敢信？

String.Source: I've been waiting for this moment for a long time... even before I discovered Gratian's old things.
String.Dest: 我已经等这天很久了……甚至在找到格瑞希安的遗物前就在等了。

String.Source: If anyone can help us now, it is you.
String.Dest: 如果说有人能帮我们，那只能是你了。

String.Source: It's my own formula for improved bonemold. Took me years to perfect.
String.Dest: 那是我的骨模改良配方，花了我好几年来完善。

String.Source: I told him he was crazy to even think about talking to those vicious little buggers, but he wouldn't listen.
String.Dest: 我告诉他，想跟那些凶狠的小畜生交流实在是疯了，但他没听进去。

String.Source: You've gone far enough. Neloth is a fool to think he could send some low life to finish me off.
String.Dest: 你走的够远了。内洛斯那傻子居然觉得派些渣子来就能解决我。

String.Source: Anyway, I suppose you're looking for work. Well, I've got bad news. This place is dryer than a damn bone.
String.Dest: 算了，我猜你是来找活儿干的。嗯，跟你说个坏消息。这个地方捞不到半点油水。

String.Source: Look, we've been over this. I paid you off, I don't owe you a thing.
String.Dest: 听着，我们已经两清了。钱也还你了，我不欠你任何东西。

String.Source: We ran out of jazbay berries almost two weeks ago.
String.Dest: 我们的贾兹贝差不多两周前就用完了。

String.Source: Mogrul, I thought I told you I didn't want you hanging around here.
String.Dest: 莫古尔，我不是告诉过你别在这儿闲逛吗？

String.Source: If you ask me, I can't blame them. Things aren't what they used to be out there.
String.Dest: 我个人认为，这很正常。那边儿的情况跟以前比差的太远了。

String.Source: I might lend coin to people that need it, but I never lend to strangers. So shove off.
String.Dest: 我只会借钱给需要的人，但不借陌生人，滚开吧。

String.Source: Yeah, I heard you before. I just don't care. You won't kick me out of here, and we both know it.
String.Dest: 对啊，是听到了。但我不管。反正你又赶不走我，我们心里都清楚。

String.Source: I'm not asking you if I can stay, I'm telling you. Now that's the end of it.
String.Dest: 这不是询问，而是告知。我要留在这儿。就这样。

String.Source: Eager to make some coin, eh? That's the spirit.
String.Dest: 急着赚钱，是吗？精神可嘉。

String.Source: People don't usually sail over there unless they have a particular reason. It can be a pretty rough place.
String.Dest: 除非有特殊原因没人会去那儿，那地方条件很差。

String.Source: It's an island northeast of here. Has a small dark elf town called Raven Rock and a handful of Nords living in Skaal Village.
String.Dest: 那是座岛，在这儿的东北方。岛上有个叫鸦石镇的暗精灵镇子，还有一群诺德人住在斯卡尔村。

String.Source: And besides, it's really my problem anyway. I caused it.
String.Dest: 另外，那其实是我的麻烦，我自找的，

String.Source: Fate decreed that you had to die so that I could win my freedom.
String.Dest: 命运裁决了你的死亡，而我会赢得我的自由。

String.Source: Stab and run! The tribe-kin way.
String.Dest: 打带跑！部落血亲的方式。

String.Source: Well, well. It's been a long time since someone from the Guild's bothered to make their way out here.
String.Dest: 嗯，好久没有公会的人到这边来了。

String.Source: All-Maker bless you, friend of the Skaal.
String.Dest: 愿造物主祝福你，斯卡尔之友。

String.Source: At first it was only during the night, but now every moment is spent building some strange shrine around the Wind Stone.
String.Dest: 最初只在夜间才会这样，但现在他们每时每刻都在围绕着风石建造某种奇怪祭坛。

String.Source: So easily you betray me, after all these years.
String.Dest: 过了这么些年了，你们就这么简单地背叛我了吗。

String.Source: Much of what was known has been lost to the ages. He was Dragonborn, and yet he served the Dragons.
String.Dest: 大部分事情都随时间流逝而消失了。他虽然是龙裔，却为龙族效力。

String.Source: We must tell Storn what we have seen.
String.Dest: 得告诉斯托恩我们看到了什么。

String.Source: Well, then you'll just have to clean them twice a day. Whatever it takes.
String.Dest: 嗯，那你得一天打扫两次了。不管有多麻烦。

String.Source: I'll give you a fair price. Not many people headed over there these days.
String.Dest: 我开的价绝对合理，这年头没几个人想去那儿了。

String.Source: Welcome to the Retching Netch Cornerclub, milady. If you need anything, Master Geldis will be happy to help you.
String.Dest: 欢迎来到呕吐气母街角吧，女士。需要什么找吉迪斯老板就行了。

String.Source: A strange thing, to lose control of oneself. We are lucky to be free.
String.Dest: 意识被控制是件怪事。我们能重获自由是幸运的。

String.Source: Hermaeus Mora is laughing at us, you know.
String.Dest: 赫麦尤斯·莫拉在嘲笑我们，知道吧。

String.Source: I cannot maintain the barrier for much longer.
String.Dest: 我的屏障没法支撑太久了。

String.Source: Given that, and the considerable power it must have taken to affect our minds so completely, it would suggest the work of a powerful mage.
String.Dest: 再加上，其中蕴藏了足以完全控制我们心智的巨大力量，意味着它可能是某个强大法师的手笔。

String.Source: Put an end to this evil magic before it consumes us all.
String.Dest: 在我们被这黑暗魔法完全吞噬之前终结它。

String.Source: I only had enough coin saved to send one of us back to the Imperial City, so I sent my mother alone.
String.Dest: 我存的钱只够让一个人回帝都，所以就把老妈一个人送回去了。

String.Source: I came from three generations of miners, and I couldn't get anyone to believe me.
String.Dest: 我是矿工家庭的第三代人了，却没法取信任何人。

String.Source: You do that, and I'll make sure you're set up right. You won't be disappointed.
String.Dest: 等你办到了，我就帮你在这儿安顿下来。你不会失望的。

String.Source: We already owe you much, but I must ask you for one more thing.
String.Dest: 我们欠你的太多了，但是我还有最后一个请求。

String.Source: Still can't figure out why I was working on that damned pillar.
String.Dest: 还是不知道为什么我会在那该死的柱子上忙活。

String.Source: There comes a time when everything must change. Nothing that lives remains the same forever.
String.Dest: 万物终有更迭之时，需知生命也属无常。

String.Source: I believe if the shrine can be destroyed, the Skaal will be free once more.
String.Dest: 我认为要是能摧毁祭坛，斯卡尔人就会重获自由。

String.Source: Then he turned against them, becoming something they feared. He was defeated long ago, but it seems he was never destroyed.
String.Dest: 后来他转而与拜龙教为敌，令他们畏惧。很久以前他就被打败了，但似乎并未被彻底摧毁。

String.Source: I'll give you this warning only once. Stay out of my way, and we'll do just fine.
String.Dest: 只警告你一次，别妨碍我，我们就相安无事。

String.Source: Still interested in heading over there?
Well we showed them, didn't we!
String.Dest: 已经向他们展示过了，不是么！

String.Source: Well, before he ran off, he was talking some nonsense about trying to fence goods to the rieklings at Castle Karstaag.
String.Dest: 嗯，他跑路前跟我胡扯什么要把货物卖给卡斯塔格城堡的瑞克灵。

String.Source: You've got yourself a ship. We'll cast off immediately.
String.Dest: 准备上船吧，我们马上起航。

String.Source: They still pay me for supplies and passage and I can always use the coin.
String.Dest: 他们还是会付我物资和载客的钱，这笔钱我用的上。

String.Source: And I'm supposed to run my operation outside in a pile of ash? I don't think so.
String.Dest: 然后我就得在外面的灰尘堆里待着是吧？想得美。

String.Source: If that is what you wish.

String.Dest: 翁都 欧伯兰。我们到了。

String.Source: We're the victims of some evil magic, but why?
String.Dest: 我们成了某种邪恶法术的受害者，但是为什么呢？

String.Source: We get by trading odds and ends with the locals. I've decided to stay here and make sure she passes in peace. It's the least I can do for her.
String.Dest: 我们跟当地居民们做些小生意。我已经决定了留在这里，确保她能安心离世。这是我唯一能为她做的了。

String.Source: A fever must have taken me. What else could explain this?
String.Dest: 我一定是发烧昏头了，不然怎么解释？

String.Source: The blacksmith up at Skaal Village seems to have gone missing and they've asked us to keep an eye out.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔村的铁匠好像失踪了，他们请我们帮忙注意一下。

String.Source: I pray to the All-Maker that whatever this was, it doesn't happen again.
String.Dest: 我只祈求造物主永远别再让这事儿重演，不管那究竟是什么。

String.Source: I don't know who sent you here, but you've given us something to build on here. I hope someday we can repay you for your kindness.
String.Dest: 我不知道谁派你来的，但你给了我们一个在这儿发展的机会。希望有朝一日我们能回报这份善意。

String.Source: Yes, thuri. Wah golt. I will land at once.
String.Dest: 是，图瑞。瓦 戈特。我马上降落。

String.Source: Your actions here have been a blessing to us all, serjo.
String.Dest: 你的作为救了我们所有人，塞乔。

String.Source: We are here. Wundun oblaan. How else can I serve you?
String.Dest: 我们到了。翁都 欧伯兰。还有什么可以效劳的？

String.Source: It's a shrine to... I don't remember. Isn't that strange?
String.Dest: 是个用来……记不起来了，奇怪了。

String.Source: What would you ask of me?
My son's heart was restless. He wanted to see the world beyond our lands, and nothing I said could change his mind.
String.Dest: 我儿子之前一直想着离开这里。他想去看看这片土地之外的世界，无论我怎么劝他都改变不了他的心意。

String.Source: Vobalaam in! Dovahkiin los nu thuri!
String.Dest: 瓦巴拉姆 因！都瓦克因 洛斯 努 图瑞！

String.Source: And the book's power comes from the same dark source as that which corrupted the Wind Stone.
String.Dest: 这书的力量与腐化风石的力量可以追溯到同一源头。

String.Source: We rejoice as the New Temple rises. We rejoice because we embrace the Reclamations as our saviors.
String.Dest: 我们是为新神殿的崛起而欣喜。我们是为拥抱收复者们为我们的救世主而欣喜。

String.Source: But while the Tree Stone remains under Miraak's influence, the natural order remains out of balance.
String.Dest: 但树石还在米拉克的控制下，自然秩序还没取得平衡。

String.Source: I don't have much to give in reward, but return to me when the task is done and I'll do what I can. Thank you, Skaal-friend.
String.Dest: 我没什么能报答你的，但是完成任务后请回来找我，我一定尽我所能。谢谢你，斯卡尔之友。

String.Source: And all can be undone if Miraak exerts his will again. You must continue on your path, and gather the knowledge you need to defeat him.
String.Dest: 如果米拉克再次施加他的意志，一切都将毁灭。你必须继续前行，收集打败他所需要的知识。

String.Source: The Dovahkiin has freed me! Now you will pay for my years of slavery!
String.Dest: 都瓦克因解放了我！现在你要为这些年的奴役而付出代价！

String.Source: You're right. I suppose the others can get by without me for awhile.
String.Dest: 你说得对。离开大家一段时间大概也没什么问题。

String.Source: Report back to me if you discover anything unusual.
String.Dest: 要是发现了什么异常现象，就向我汇报。

String.Source: I don't. All I know is that the ash spawn are coming from this direction, so this is as good a place to start as anywhere else.
String.Dest: 我不这么认为。我只知道灰烬怪都从这个方向来，从这边开始找好过别的地方。

String.Source: I... I don't know how I got here.
String.Dest: 我……不知道怎么来这儿的。

String.Source: One of the sailors survived. Poor thing crawled all the way to Raven Rock on his hands and knees.
String.Dest: 其中一个水手活下来了。那可怜虫一路爬到鸦石镇。

String.Source: I believe she would want it placed upon her tombstone in Falkreath, as a symbol of her undying love and the great sacrifice she made for it.
String.Dest: 她肯定也想把项链放在她佛克瑞斯的墓碑上，作为她永恒的爱和为此作出的巨大牺牲的象征。

String.Source: There was no other way it could end.
You're lucky the bounty on you is so low, otherwise I'd be hauling you to the Bulwark myself. Get out of my sight.
String.Dest: 庆幸你的赏金不高吧，不然我就亲自把你拖到防护堤去了。现在别让我看见你。

String.Source: The only mistake here belongs to you. You're a wanted man and there's no way I'm letting you walk away.
String.Dest: 唯一的错误在于你自己。你是个通缉犯，我不会放过你的。

String.Source: Solstheim has no use for your kind!
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆不需要你这种人！

String.Source: I need to get back to the village. My father will have need of me.
String.Dest: 我得回村子了，父亲还需要我。

String.Source: I know it isn't the best place to start, but we know they've been coming from this direction.
String.Dest: 我知道这里并不是最好下手的地方，但它们是从这个方向来的。

String.Source: All sorts of useful things. Feel free to browse.
String.Dest: 各种有用的东西，随便看吧。

String.Source: Yes, I... I'm not sure what to say. Did we build that? I really don't remember.
String.Dest: 嗯，我……我不知道该怎么讲。那是我们建的吗？真记不起来了。

String.Source: Thank you, my friend. You have set us free.
String.Dest: 谢谢你，我的朋友。你救了我们。

String.Source: I have no time to speak now, outsider. I'm on my way home.
String.Dest: 我现在没空聊天，外来者。我要赶回家。

String.Source: I don't mean to be rude outsider, but I must get back to the village.
String.Dest: 请原谅我的无理，外来者，但我必须回村子。

String.Source: They sent it back to me recently, but it never arrived.
String.Dest: 他们最近给我寄回来了，但是一直没有送达。

String.Source: My mother fell in love with one of the sailors - my father - and eventually returned with him to Skyrim.
String.Dest: 我的母亲爱上了其中一个水手，也就是我父亲。最终和他一起回天际了。

String.Source: A trade ship from Skyrim struck ice off the coast near the village, and the Skaal took in the surviving sailors.
String.Dest: 一艘天际来的商船在村子附近撞上了冰山，幸存的水手们被斯卡尔人收留了。

String.Source: Good thing the farm's been abandoned for a long time. I'd hate to see what they would do to an unarmed farmer and his family.
String.Dest: 幸好农场早就被遗弃了。我可不想看到他们会对手无寸铁的农夫家庭们做什么。

String.Source: By the All-Maker, please let my wife and daughter be safe.
String.Dest: 造物主在上，请保佑我的妻女平安无事。

String.Source: Good. I've been itching for a fight.
If you've got something to sell, I'm willing to buy. Why don't we see what kind of a deal we can make.
String.Dest: 你有卖的我就买。买卖不成仁义在。

String.Source: Drem. There is no prey here.
I'm sure you have more important things to do. Farewell, then.
String.Dest: 我想你有更重要的事儿要做。那就再见了。

String.Source: Offer to help and then change your mind because I mentioned the reavers? Hmph, some sellsword you are.
String.Dest: 你说要帮我，结果听到我说有抢匪就改变主意了？呵，你这佣兵不过如此啊。

String.Source: Zu'u ni zaamiil, Miraak! I am free from your service!
String.Dest: 祖'乌 尼 扎米尔，米拉克！我不再为你效力了！

String.Source: If you find yourself in Falkreath, please give this amulet to the priest Runil and tell him that I sent you. He will understand.
String.Dest: 哪天你要是到了佛克瑞斯，请把这个护符交给鲁尼尔祭司，告诉他是我让你去的。他就懂了。

String.Source: I came across a few of my mother's old things not long ago. Among them was a necklace that my father gave to her when they were married.
String.Dest: 我不久前翻到了一些母亲的遗物。其中有一条父亲在结婚时送给她的项链。

String.Source: Zu'u nis krif tol. It cannot be done.
String.Dest: 祖'乌 尼斯 克里夫 吐尔。我办不到。

String.Source: Finna? Aeta? Where are my wife and daughter?!
String.Dest: 芬娜？爱耶塔？我妻子和女儿呢？

String.Source: Thank you, you have no idea how much it hurts losing such a precious heirloom!
String.Dest: 谢谢你，你是不知道丢了那么贵重的传家宝有多心痛！

String.Source: In House Redoran's name, I order you to stop!
String.Dest: 以瑞多然家之名，我命令你停下！

String.Source: You have no idea what this means to me... to my family. Reclamations bless you!
