String.Dest: 你不知道这对我……我的家族来说意味着什么。愿收复者们保佑你！

String.Source: Morwen, you say? Now there's a name I haven't heard in a long time. Left to join her mother's people on Solstheim, as I recall.
String.Dest: 你说莫尔雯？很久没听到过这个名字了。没记错的话，她离开这里去加入她母亲在索瑟海姆的族人了。
我看着你呢，斯卡尔之友。

String.Source: Tell Morwen I'll be happy to grant her request. I am sure it will bring joy to her mother and father as they walk in Aetherius.
String.Dest: 告诉莫尔雯，我很乐意代劳。相信她在光界的父母会很高兴的。

String.Source: I'll be glad to oblige. What a touching gesture, to display the symbol of her devotion in such a way.
String.Dest: 我很乐意效劳。多么感人的做法啊，以这种方式展现她的奉献。

String.Source: It's busier now that things are starting to look up. I guess I might stay a bit longer after all.
String.Dest: 局面好转后这边也忙起来了。我想这下可能会多待会儿。

String.Source: Ah yes, Bera's silver necklace. It was a wedding gift and she rarely took it off.
String.Dest: 啊是的，贝拉的银项链。这是她几乎从不取下的结婚礼物。

String.Source: I return you to the ash.
A shrine for... Well, it's... I think it's important.
String.Dest: 一个为谁建的祭坛……好吧，它……它可能很重要。

String.Source: Our defenses have been breached! I need reinforcements!
String.Dest: 我们的防线被突破了！需要增援！

String.Source: Did we build that, or did I imagine that?
String.Dest: 是我们修的吗？还是我的幻想？

String.Source: The mines are open and the shop is busy again. Thank you!
String.Dest: 矿场开张后，生意也变好了。感谢你！

String.Source: I must get back to the village. As leader of the Skaal, I'm needed there.
String.Dest: 我必须回村子，身为斯卡尔的首领，人们需要我。

String.Source: Just got some of my merchandise off the latest supply ship. See if anything strikes your fancy.
String.Dest: 刚到了一批运来的新货。看看有没有你喜欢的。

String.Source: Before he died, he told the Redoran Guard about the wreck and warned us that it was going to be crawling with reavers.
String.Dest: 他死之前，把船难告诉了瑞多然卫兵，警告我们那边以后会爬满一堆抢匪。

String.Source: Mother used to get so worried when I walked too far from the village.
String.Dest: 以前我一离村子太远，我妈就会很紧张。
马上。祖'乌 芬 阿尔。

String.Source: Abide by our laws, and we'll get along well.
String.Dest: 遵守这里的法律，我们就相安无事。
纳克林 法 扎姆斯！

String.Source: But you may be able to cleanse the other Stones. Even if this does not stop Miraak, it surely will delay his return.
String.Dest: 但也许你可以去净化其他圣石。就算这样做没法阻止米拉克，也能延缓他的回归。
注意！又一台蒸汽百夫长！

String.Source: If the quality's right, I'll take those off your hands. Let me take a look.
String.Dest: 质量过关我就跟你买了。让我看看。

String.Source: This is both fascinating and terrifying.
No need to be worried, I suppose.
Show me you are the hero they say you are!
String.Dest: 让我见识下他们口中的英雄！

String.Source: Not certain who lived there... it was already a pile of rubble when I arrived in Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 不确定原主人是谁……我来鸦石镇的时候这儿就已经是一堆瓦砾了。

String.Source: I also remind the Skaal to live as one with nature and to honor the will of the All-Maker, so that we'll be worthy to join him in death.
String.Dest: 还要提醒斯卡尔人与自然和平共处，尊重造物主的意愿，这样死后才能与它合一。

String.Source: Who are you? What am I doing here?
Remember to hunt only when you have need.
String.Dest: 记住只在有需要的时候去狩猎。

String.Source: Got the best merchandise on the island. Have a look for yourself.
String.Dest: 岛上最好的货物。自己来看看吧。

String.Source: As shaman of Skaal Village, I serve as both a guide and a healer, as well as a keeper of traditions.
String.Dest: 作为斯卡尔村的萨满，我既是向导又是医师，也是习俗的传承者。

String.Source: I can feel it. The balance of the living land has nearly been restored.
String.Dest: 我感觉得到。这片土地已经快要恢复平衡了。

String.Source: Every once in a while a local makes it out here. Although, they usually just want to catch a glimpse of Dusty. Silt Striders are pretty rare now.
String.Dest: 居民们偶尔会过来看看。但他们通常是为了看一眼小灰的。泥沙漫步者现在很稀有了。
强兵利器会护你周全，朋友。

String.Source: Our traditions do not speak of them. But they and Miraak are connected. You read a Black Book, and saw him.
String.Dest: 按我们的传统不会探讨它们。但它们与米拉克有联系。你读了一本黑暗经书后，就看到了他。

String.Source: The land provides all that I need. I have no use for your coins.
String.Dest: 这片土地提供了我需要的一切，你的钱对我没用处。

String.Source: We Skaal are not like you. We do not seek adventure, we wish only to live in peace and to honor our traditions. I hope you understand.
String.Dest: 我们斯卡尔与你不同。我们并不追求冒险，只想尊重传统安宁地过日子。希望你能理解。

String.Source: The blast from the volcano wiped most of them out.
String.Dest: 火山喷发几乎把它们灭种了。

String.Source: What would you like to know?
You will never enslave me again, Miraak.
String.Dest: 你再也奴役不了我了，米拉克。

String.Source: We were searching the farm when the ash spawn ambushed us. Have a look around and see if you can turn up anything useful.
String.Dest: 我们在搜查农场的时候被灰烬怪伏击了。四处看看能不能找到有用的线索。

String.Source: That? It's... Well, it's a shrine for... something. I'm not sure what.
String.Dest: 那个？那是……一座祭坛……给谁的来着，记不清了。

String.Source: You are a true hero. I thank you, friend.
String.Dest: 你是个真正的英雄，感谢你，朋友。

String.Source: My road takes me home, outsider. Hunt well.
String.Dest: 我要回家了，外来者。愿你打猎丰收。

String.Source: A Silt Strider carapace is so strong it can withstand the harshest of weather.
String.Dest: 泥沙漫步者的外壳非常坚固，可以抵御最恶劣的天气。

String.Source: Mostly for transporting goods and people. They were pretty commonplace in Morrowind, but that was ages ago.
String.Dest: 通常是运货和载人。以前在晨风很常见，但那是几百年前了。

String.Source: I must not fail my people.
Very well, you're free to go. Next time you might not be so lucky.
String.Dest: 行吧，你可以走了，下次可就没这么幸运了。

String.Source: I will look for a spot to land.
From that look on your face I'm guessing you've never seen a Silt Strider before?
String.Dest: 从你的表情看来，我猜你以前没见过泥沙漫步者吧？

String.Source: She hasn't been in traveling condition for quite a while now. I've tried to let her go off on her own but she insists on staying here.
String.Dest: 她的身体状况早就不适合旅行了。我试过把她放生，但她坚持待在这儿。

String.Source: You've got a good thing going here now that you've reopened the mines. Don't let it go to waste.
String.Dest: 矿场重新开张后，你在这儿就混得很好啊。可别浪费了。

String.Source: This is Dusty. I personally trained her from a larva. Feels like a lifetime ago now.
String.Dest: 这是小灰。在它还是幼虫时我就开始训练她，感觉有一辈子那么久了。

String.Source: Good enough. I'll just remove any stolen goods on you, and then you're free to go.
String.Dest: 好吧，我会带走你身上偷来的赃物，然后你可以走了。

String.Source: Freeing the other Stones will diminish whatever dark influence is spreading across Solstheim.
String.Dest: 解放其他的圣石可以减弱遍布索瑟海姆的黑暗控制力量。

String.Source: I have to get back home.
The destruction of our homeland, the exile of our people and the rebuilding of our civilization.
String.Dest: 我们家园的毁灭，我们族人的流亡还有文明的重建。

String.Source: Of course, when you reach my age, you'll find that the word "young" is a very relative term.
String.Dest: 当然，等你到了我这个年纪，就知道“小”这个词是相对的。

String.Source: Stop right there... where have I seen you before?
String.Dest: 站住……我在哪儿见过你来着？
等会儿……你看上去很眼熟……

String.Source: Sorry friend, but I'm on the road home. Find me there and perhaps we can talk.
String.Dest: 抱歉，朋友，但我在回家的路上。等我到那边儿再聊吧。

String.Source: Very well, if you need my help, seek me out here in the village.
String.Dest: 好吧，需要帮忙就来村子里找我吧。

String.Source: I am sorry, but I must refuse. I am grateful for your help, but my place is here, with my people.
String.Dest: 抱歉，但是我得拒绝。我很感激你的帮助，但是我必须留在这儿，和族人在一起。

String.Source: There's no mistake. You've committed crimes against the Dunmer people of Solstheim, and in the name of House Redoran it's time to face justice.
String.Dest: 我没弄错任何事情。你对索瑟海姆的丹莫人民犯下罪行，是时候以瑞多然家的名义审判你了。

String.Source: You've committed crimes against the Dunmer people of Solstheim. What say you in your defense?
String.Dest: 你对索瑟海姆的丹莫人民犯下了罪行，还有什么要辩解的？

String.Source: I fashioned an amulet to guard me against whatever has taken hold of the Skaal, but it is the only one of its kind.
String.Dest: 我制作了这个护符来保护我不像其他斯卡尔人那样被控制，但这也仅有一个。

String.Source: We must find out what is at work here.
String.Dest: 我们必须找出是什么在这儿作怪。

String.Source: What in the name of Azura...?
I heard crazy old Crescius has been sneaking into Raven Rock Mine again. At his age, he's going to get himself killed in there.
String.Dest: 听说疯老头儿克雷修斯又偷摸溜进鸦石镇矿场了。他这年纪，迟早会死在里面。

String.Source: Now, what can I do for young Morwen?
String.Dest: 那么，我能为小莫尔雯做什么？

String.Source: Ah, well, I suppose she'll always be that fiesty little girl I used to know.
String.Dest: 啊，好吧，我还总觉得她是我认识的那个暴躁小女孩呢。

String.Source: I suppose I can overlook it for now, but you better keep your hands clean or I'll come after you again... you got that?
String.Dest: 我想现在可以不计较这事儿，但你最好把手放干净点儿，不然还来找你……明白吗？

String.Source: It's the capital of Morrowind... been that way ever since Mournhold was sacked by the Argonians.
String.Dest: 那是晨风的首都，自从哀伤之城被阿尔贡洗劫后就是了。

String.Source: Your Shout broke whatever evil will controlled the Stone, and restored its true nature as a conduit of the All-Maker's gifts.
String.Dest: 你的龙吼摧毁了控制圣石的不明邪恶力量，恢复了它真正的本质，即传递造物主赠予的媒介。

String.Source: As you command. Mu daal wah golt.
String.Dest: 谨遵号令。姆 达尔 瓦 戈特。

String.Source: Right then! Off to the Bulwark with you.
String.Dest: 选对了，我会跟你一起去防护堤监狱。

String.Source: I suppose I could dig up a staff or two for you.
String.Dest: 我想可以找两根法杖给你。

String.Source: Then in House Redoran's name, you'll get your wish!
String.Dest: 那么，以瑞多然家的名义，满足你的愿望！

String.Source: If death is what you seek... I'll be happy to oblige!
String.Dest: 如果你在求死……乐意效劳！

String.Source: All right, just keep it quiet. I warn you though, there's still a price on your head. Next guard you run into might not be so... agreeable.
String.Dest: 好吧，那就别声张。但我警告你，你人头上还是有赏金。下次撞见卫兵可能就没那么……通融了。

String.Source: Forgive my impatience, but I must get back to the village right away.
String.Dest: 原谅我的不耐烦，但我真得立马回村子里去。

String.Source: A few months ago, I had sent an important folio to the First Edition Bookshop in the Imperial City to be rebound.
String.Dest: 几个月前，我寄了一本重要的对开本给帝都的“初版书店”，请他们帮我重新装订。

String.Source: You saved us! But from what? Is it truly over?
String.Dest: 你救了我们！但是谁干的？真的结束了吗？

String.Source: Even the legendary sandstorms of Vvardenfell's Molag Amur Region were said to barely make a dent in them. Of course, that's all ash now.
String.Dest: 就连瓦登费尔的莫拉格·阿穆尔地区的著名沙尘暴，几乎都不能对它们造成伤害。当然，现在那里是一片灰烬了。

String.Source: I don't know what spell you freed us from, outsider, but I thank you.
String.Dest: 不晓得你替我们解除了什么法术，外来者，但我感谢你。

String.Source: You out here for a reason?
What in Mundus am I doing out here at this hour?
String.Dest: 我他妈这会儿究竟在这外面干啥呢？

String.Source: I'm on my way to Skaal Village. Perhaps I'll see you there.
String.Dest: 我正在回斯卡尔村。也许我们在那边儿见？

String.Source: Found Dusty here in a small cave on Vvardenfell. Silt Strider cocoons are pretty tough.
String.Dest: 我在瓦登费尔的一个小洞穴里找到了小灰。泥沙漫步者的茧硬的很。

String.Source: You have a companion already. You don't need my help.
String.Dest: 你已经有位同伴了，不需要我的帮助。

String.Source: Thu'um se Dovahkiin inhus, Miraak. Hin suleyksejun oblaan.
String.Dest: 吐'目 瑟 都瓦克因 因乎斯，米拉克。辛 苏雷克西昂 欧伯兰。

String.Source: Please accept this as a token of gratitude. Once again, you've proven yourself an ally to the Skaal.
String.Dest: 请收下这个聊表我的感激吧。你再次证明了自己是斯卡尔人的盟友。

String.Source: The whole village is here! What sorcery is this?
String.Dest: 全村儿的人都在这儿！这是什么巫术？

String.Source: Men, an invader has entered the fort! Prepare yourselves for an ambush!
String.Dest: 手下们，一个入侵者闯入了堡垒！准备好伏击！

String.Source: All-Maker bless you! You have saved us!
String.Dest: 造物主祝福你！你救了我们！

String.Source: If you've got gold on your hands, you might talk to Ralis, up at Kolbjorn Barrow. I've heard he wants to excavate the place.
String.Dest: 要是你有钱的话，可以去寇泊琼古坟找拉里斯。听说他想挖掘这个地方。

String.Source: I can't speak now, friend. I must return home.
String.Dest: 现在不是说话的时候，朋友。我得先回家。

String.Source: Because of you, my life has meaning again. Thank you!
String.Dest: 你重新赋予了我人生的意义。感谢你！

String.Source: The evil in this place must be rooted out.
String.Dest: 这里的邪恶必须被根除。

String.Source: Is this a dream? No, it is a nightmare, surely.
String.Dest: 这是一场梦吗？不，这肯定是场噩梦。

String.Source: I can't talk now. I must get back to the village.
String.Dest: 先不聊了。我得赶紧回村子里去。

String.Source: Your ignorance of our homeland doesn't surprise me.
String.Dest: 你对我们家园的无知并不令我惊讶。

String.Source: I don't visit there often anymore, but we still get the occasional supply ship and visitors from there.
String.Dest: 我不常回去了，但偶尔会有物资船和访客从那儿来。

String.Source: I was here alone then, and I find an assistant is absolutely essential for this kind of dirty, dangerous work.
String.Dest: 原本我是一个人来的，但我发现还必须有一名助手来帮我干这些危险的脏活儿。

String.Source: May the sun light your path.
Who were the perpetrators of those falsehoods?
String.Dest: 那些谎言的编织者是谁？

String.Source: Very good, Galdrus. Your lessons are going well. You may carry on.
String.Dest: 很好，加德鲁斯。你的课上的很顺利，继续吧。

String.Source: Come, there looks to be a way out through here.
Why was I building a temple?
String.Dest: 我为什么在建一座祭坛？

String.Source: He also is searching for them. In fact, he has already found one. He showed it to me when he came here.
String.Dest: 因为他也在找它们，实际上已经找到一本了。他来这儿的时候给我看过。

String.Source: The power of the Stone had been corrupted. It was the source of the influence that had taken control of the Skaal.
String.Dest: 圣石的力量被腐化了。就是那股力量的影响控制了斯卡尔。
主要是法杖。这是我的专长。

String.Source: It was very like the one you found in Miraak's temple. A thing of dark magic, not of the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 那本和你在米拉克神殿里找到的很像。属于黑暗魔法之物，而非源自造物主。

String.Source: Frea saw that the Tree Stone now stands imprisoned in Miraak's new temple. I doubt you can free it until his power is broken.
String.Dest: 芙瑞雅看到树石被困于米拉克的新神殿中。也不知你能不能在他的力量枯竭前解放它。

String.Source: The Redoran Guard have spotted a pack of werewolves in the mountains. The hunters up at Frostmoon Crag might know more.
String.Dest: 瑞多然卫兵在山里看到一群狼人，霜月险崖的猎人也许还知道更多情况。

String.Source: Yes. There are six sacred Stones - Wind, Water, Earth, Beast, Sun, and Tree. Through them the Oneness of the land is maintained.
String.Dest: 没错。共有六座圣石——风、水、地、兽、日和树。这片土地的一体性正是通过它们而维持的。

String.Source: You there. What brings you to this place? Why are you here?
String.Dest: 那边的。你在这儿做什么？为什么来这里？

String.Source: But beware. You are now walking the same road as Miraak.
String.Dest: 但要小心。你已经在步米拉克的后尘了。

String.Source: I'm not sure. Did we build it? I can't remember...
String.Dest: 我不确信，是我们建的？记不得了。

String.Source: Coast has been dangerous lately... lot of Reavers about. I've heard they're searching for the treasure of Haknir Death-Brand, the pirate king.
String.Dest: 海岸最近很危险……到处都是抢匪。听说他们在找海贼王海科尼尔的宝藏。
科洛西斯，图瑞。那不可能。

String.Source: The Earth Stone is there, and the rest... It's a shrine, but I... Did we build that? I'm not sure.
String.Dest: 地石在那边，剩下的……是个祭坛，但是……是我们建的吗？我不确定。

String.Source: This... this is some dark magic. It has to be.
String.Dest: 这……这是某种黑暗魔法，错不了。

String.Source: I must be going mad. But then, so must everyone else.
String.Dest: 我肯定是疯了，其他人也是。

String.Source: I will follow you, Skaal-friend, but I must return to the village afterward.
String.Dest: 我愿意跟随你，斯卡尔之友。但我之后就得返回村子。

String.Source: Mephala bless you! You found it!
String.Dest: 梅法拉保佑你！你找到了！

String.Source: May your hunts always bring you game.
Krosis, the land below us is empty of prey.
String.Dest: 科洛西斯，下面没有猎物。

String.Source: I wish I could have said the same for my man here.
String.Dest: 要是我的手下也能这么说就好了。

String.Source: You've brought warmth to my heart, outsider, and I'm in your debt.
String.Dest: 你让我感到暖心，外来者。我欠你一份人情。

String.Source: Join you? You mean leave the village to journey with you and fight at your side?
String.Dest: 和你同行？你是指让我离开村子和你并肩作战？

String.Source: I knew her parents quite well, you know. Bera and Ulfarr were good people, very much in love.
String.Dest: 我跟她的父母很熟，知道吧。贝拉和乌尔法都是好人，恩爱得很。

String.Source: Not sure. I was told it's an old Imperial farm that was wiped out by the eruption of the Red Mountain.
String.Dest: 不清楚。我听说这原来是个帝国农场，在红山喷发后就被毁了。

String.Source: Well, I suppose I could forget that I saw you this time.
String.Dest: 好吧，这次就当我没看到。

String.Source: Well, you've certainly proven your worth around here to me. Please, accept this gift as a token of my appreciation!
String.Dest: 好吧，你已经向我证明了自己的价值。请收下这份礼物，聊表我的感激吧。

String.Source: Is there still something you need of me?
Well, take a look at what I have and maybe we can make a deal.
String.Dest: 嗯，看看我有什么吧，没准能做成一笔买卖呢。

String.Source: I'm... I'm not really sure. I think it's important, but I can't say why...
String.Dest: 我……真不太能肯定。我知道那个很重要，但说不出个所以然来。

String.Source: I'm flattered, but the village is my home. It's very rare for one of the Skaal to leave, and I have responsibilities here.
String.Dest: 我很荣幸，但斯卡尔村是我的家。很少有斯卡尔人会离开，何况我在这里有应尽的义务。

String.Source: Fort Frostmoth will never fall! Long live the Empire!
String.Dest: 霜蛾堡永不沦陷！帝国万岁！
我就知道我听到了什么！

String.Source: Zu'u nis. I cannot do that.
String.Dest: 祖'乌 尼斯。我做不到。

String.Source: Look at me, I'm a different person. And I have you to thank for it.
String.Dest: 你看我，就好像重生了一样，这都是你的功劳。

String.Source: As I've already told you, I have no need of money.
String.Dest: 已经说过了，我不需要钱。

String.Source: The damn thing sunk right off the coast of Solstheim. Can you imagine?
String.Dest: 那该死的船就在索瑟海姆海岸上搁浅了，你敢信？

String.Source: Yes, the "Strident Squall" or something like that.
String.Dest: 是的，叫做“尖啸号”或者类似的名字。

String.Source: How can you have Dunmer blood in your veins and have no knowledge of Blacklight?
String.Dest: 你怎么流着丹莫的血却对黑光城一无所知？
我感觉不到这附近有东西。

String.Source: Well, you've certainly proven your worth around here to me. Please, accept this gift as a token of my appreciation!
String.Dest: 好吧，你已经向我证明了自己的价值。请收下这份礼物，聊表我的感激吧。

String.Source: Strength and courage be always with you.
String.Dest: 愿力量与勇气永远伴随着你。

String.Source: You've brought Raven Rock back from the brink, traveler. I don't know how to thank you.
String.Dest: 你把鸦石镇从悬崖边上救了回来，旅客。不知道该怎么感谢你。

String.Source: The only mistake here belongs to you. You're a wanted woman and there's no way I'm letting you walk away.
String.Dest: 唯一的错误在于你自己。你是个通缉犯，我不会放过你的。

String.Source: Wise choice. Now come along with us. After we confiscate any stolen goods, you'll be free to go. After you pay the fine, of course.
String.Dest: 明智的选择，现在跟我们走，没收赃物后你就可以走了。当然，是在你交了罚款后。

String.Source: When next we meet, it will be at my last vigil.
String.Dest: 我们下次见面，会是在我的终末守灵处。

String.Source: Don't be ridiculous. Of course I can.
Except for you. You are my last challenge. Only you can send me to Sovngarde with honor.
String.Dest: 除了你，你就是我最后的挑战。只有你才能把我荣耀地送进松加德。

String.Source: No quests to be undertaken. No villains to be slain. No challenges to face.
String.Dest: 没有任务可接。没有恶棍可杀。没有挑战可以面对。

String.Source: The question is, should I? I suppose if it's going to be done right, I'll have to do it.
String.Dest: 问题是，我该教你吗？我想要让事态变好的话，是得教你。

String.Source: Make your preparations. When you are ready, come find me at my last vigil.
String.Dest: 做好准备吧。好了以后去我的终末守灵处找我。

String.Source: I have done all that can be done. There is nothing left.
String.Dest: 能做的事情我都做了。我失去目标了。

String.Source: It wouldn't do to have you become better than me after all.
String.Dest: 让你超越我可没什么好处。

String.Source: It's Dunmer tradition for the ashes of the deceased to be placed in an ancestral tomb.
String.Dest: 丹莫的传统就是让逝者的骨灰安放于祖坟中。

String.Source: As second councilor, it's my responsibility to protect Councilor Morvayn from harm.
String.Dest: 作为副议员，我有责任保护莫尔凡议员不受伤害。

String.Source: This realm is beyond you. You have no power here.
String.Dest: 这个位面超乎你的控制，你在这里是没有力量的。

String.Source: I won't allow you to ruin years of planning!
String.Dest: 我不会让你毁了多年来的准备！

String.Source: Vilur Ulen was executed a short time later and his remains placed in the Ulen Ancestral Tomb.
String.Dest: 不久后维勒·乌伦就被处决，骨灰安放在乌伦家祖坟里。

String.Source: I need you to start out by being my eyes and ears... search Raven Rock and see if you can root out these traitors.
String.Dest: 我需要你来做我的耳目……搜查一下鸦石镇，看看能不能抓到这些叛徒。

String.Source: The Ulen Family of House Hlaalu, a rival Great House, has placed a deathmark on the councilor's head.
String.Dest: 作为竞争对手的大家族，哈拉鲁家族中的乌伦家给议员发了一个死亡标记。

String.Source: It would be fair to say that House Redoran literally saved the Dunmer people from destruction.
String.Dest: 可以说，瑞多然家确实拯救了丹莫，免于灭族。

String.Source: Watch it Tilisu, I think we might have a visitor!
String.Dest: 小心点蒂莉苏，看来我们有客人了！
把这半人半兽的东西弄下来！

String.Source: During the Oblivion Crisis, gates to the plane of Oblivion opened all over Morrowind.
String.Dest: 在湮灭危机期间，晨风遍地都开启了湮灭之门。

String.Source: The Empire pulled most of its forces out of Morrowind to deal with the gates in their own homeland, leaving us virtually defenseless.
String.Dest: 帝国撤回了绝大部分的晨风驻军，去应对自己国土上的湮灭之门，几乎让我们毫无防御能力。

String.Source: The problem is I don't have any solid proof that anyone from House Hlaalu is hidden among us... only my suspicions.
String.Dest: 问题是我没有哈拉鲁家在我们当中安插奸细的确切证据……只是有些猜测。

String.Source: Valin Ulen and his son's remains were both laid to rest there because that's what he'd requested.
String.Dest: 瓦林·乌伦请求把他和儿子的骨灰合葬在这儿。

String.Source: For House Hlaalu! For Vilur Ulen!
String.Dest: 为了哈拉鲁家！为了维勒·乌伦！

String.Source: Stop hiding, coward. I'll make it quick, I promise.
String.Dest: 别藏了，懦夫。会让你死个痛快的，我保证。

String.Source: When Valin died, his family provided the funds to construct the tomb.
String.Dest: 瓦林死后，他家里出钱修了这个祖坟。
波 普鲁赞。马上起飞。

String.Source: As second councilor, it's my responsibility to explore the possibility of any threat, no matter how paranoid it might seem.
String.Dest: 作为副议员，深入考虑各种威胁是我的责任，无论看上去有多偏执。

String.Source: I had a feeling you'd be willing to listen to me.
We had no standing army at the time, just uncoordinated pockets of resistance.
String.Dest: 当时我们没有正规军，只有缺少协调的小股抵抗军。

String.Source: House Hlaalu will... have its revenge...
When the Argonians invaded years later, House Redoran's army was able to prevent them from sweeping across all of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 当数年后阿尔贡入侵，正是瑞多然家的军队阻止了他们横扫整个晨风。

String.Source: House Redoran took charge and was slowly able to build an army. It took years, but it became a force to be reckoned with.
String.Dest: 瑞多然家接管了局面，慢慢组建起一支军队。花费了数年时间，使之成为了一股不容忽视的力量。

String.Source: I grieve that you must meet your end this way, but necessity demands it.
String.Dest: 很遗憾你命中的结局如此，但这是必要的。

String.Source: Come on, I know you're in here.
String.Dest: 出来啊，我知道你在这里。

String.Source: I join you in death, father...
Vilur Ulen wasn't the first Ulen to live in Raven Rock. His father, Valin Ulen, was one of the first Dunmer to settle here.
String.Dest: 维勒·乌伦不是乌伦家在鸦石镇的第一代。他的父亲，是第一批在这里安家的丹莫。

String.Source: The Ulen family being a part of House Hlaalu didn't matter.
String.Dest: 乌伦家是不是哈拉鲁家的并不重要。

String.Source: Careful Mirri... someone's in here with us!
String.Dest: 小心了，米莉……这儿还有人呢！

String.Source: Here, this key should open the front door of the manor in case they've locked it. Good luck.
String.Dest: 拿着，为防他们上锁，这把钥匙应该能打开宅邸的正门。祝你好运。

String.Source: Follow me and I'll take you to the councilor so you can speak to him yourself.
String.Dest: 跟我去见议员，你亲口跟他说。

String.Source: Unlike his son Vilur, Valin was a good man. He contributed to the community and was quite respected.
String.Dest: 但是瓦林和他儿子不一样，他是个好人，为社区做了贡献，很受人尊敬。

String.Source: Sorry, Cindiri, I fear we'll be feasting on ash yams a bit more often this year.
String.Dest: 对不起，辛迪丽。恐怕今年我们还得多吃几顿灰烬薯了。

String.Source: Well, thanks for trying anyway. Here you go... for your trouble.
String.Dest: 好吧，至少感谢你试过了。拿着吧……你的跑路费。

String.Source: You're a fool to test me, outsider.
String.Dest: 挑战我是愚蠢的行为，外来者。

String.Source: Look, the East Empire Company didn't give me a choice. They've raised their prices again, and there's nothing I can do about it.
String.Dest: 听着，是东帝国公司逼我的。他们又涨价了，我实在是没办法。

String.Source: If you're looking for passage to Vvardenfell, you're out of luck. No ships are heading that way anymore.
String.Dest: 想前往瓦登费尔的话，算你运气不好。没有开往那边的船了。

String.Source: I was concerned about our food stores. Gjalund can only carry so much on each journey, and I'm afraid we might run out.
String.Dest: 我在担心我们的食物储存。加朗德每趟也就能带那么多，恐怕我们的不够了。

String.Source: Other than that, I'm not at liberty to discuss it.
Remember that you chose this path.
He has quite a few friends on the Council back in Morrowind and they wanted to ensure his safety while he was here.
String.Dest: 他在晨风的议会有不少朋友，他们希望确保他在这里安然无恙。

String.Source: Mining gear? No. However, I used to sell East Empire Pendants until I ran out of them. Popular little item.
String.Dest: 采矿工具？没有。以前我倒是有卖东帝国公司的吊坠，直到卖光。那小玩意儿销路很好。

String.Source: You would steal from those who have so little?
I hate to break it to you, but there isn't a scrap of ebony left in the mines. You might want to just move on.
String.Dest: 很抱歉打击你，但是矿场里一块黑檀都不剩了。你还是走人吧。

String.Source: You go make the draugr dead again, and I'll keep the rest of these n'wahs from running off.
String.Dest: 你再去杀光那些尸鬼，我来阻止剩下的恩'瓦们跑光。

String.Source: If you tire of the search, read your book again to return to your mortal life. For a time. The lure of Apocrypha will call you back. It is your fate.
String.Dest: 如果你疲于搜寻，就把书再读一遍，回到凡俗生活。过段时间后，异典的诱惑力会将你召回，这就是你的命运。

String.Source: The All-Maker sees you, even if I cannot.
String.Dest: 造物主看得见你，就算我不能。

String.Source: Serve House Redoran, or serve no one.
String.Dest: 要么效忠瑞多然家，要么谁也别效忠。

String.Source: But this whole thing became a disaster right quick, let me tell you.
String.Dest: 但是整件事儿很快变成了一场灾难，听我说。

String.Source: Why do you steal from us?
String.Dest: 你为什么要偷我们的东西？

String.Source: Come out and face justice, coward.
Oh, believe me... I'd be on the first ship off of this miserable island if I could.
String.Dest: 哦，相信我，要是可以离开这可悲的岛那我立马就上船了。

String.Source: We, uh... we were delayed by bad weather.
String.Dest: 我们，呃……被坏天气给耽搁了。

String.Source: Life should never be taken without reason.
Every day it's the same thing. We open the shop, we hardly sell a thing, we close the shop and go to sleep.
String.Dest: 这儿每天都一成不变，开店、一分不挣、关店、睡觉。

String.Source: So, another seeker after knowledge enters my realm.
String.Dest: 所以，又一个知识追求者来到我的领域。

String.Source: Violence is not our way, outsider.
String.Dest: 暴力不是我们的方式，外来者。

String.Source: To protect Councilor Morvayn, of course.
String.Dest: 当然是为了保护莫尔凡议员。

String.Source: If I knew where they were stashing the bottles, I'd put an end to it myself.
String.Dest: 要是知道他们把酒藏在哪儿，我就自己去解决了。

String.Source: I am Hermaeus Mora, Prince of Fate and Lord of Secrets. This is Apocrypha, where all knowledge is hoarded.
String.Dest: 我乃赫麦尤斯·莫拉，命运与隐秘之主。这里是异典，一切知识的贮藏之地。

String.Source: The All-Maker frowns upon such needless violence.
String.Dest: 造物主反对这种无谓的暴力。

String.Source: This is Apocrypha, where all knowledge is hoarded.
String.Dest: 这里是异典，一切知识的贮藏之地。

String.Source: By the All-Maker, no! It cannot be!
You skulk and sneak like a riekling.
String.Dest: 你就像瑞克灵那样到处躲藏。

String.Source: Let me talk to Lleril. I'll see what we can do.
String.Dest: 我去跟雷里尔说，看看怎么处理。

String.Source: I'm sorry, but you must leave now.
String.Dest: 很抱歉，但你现在就得离开。

String.Source: You're no better than those thieving reavers.
String.Dest: 你比那些抢匪好不了哪去。

String.Source: Help me out, milord. I haven't eaten in days.
String.Dest: 行行好吧，先生。我好几天没吃东西了。

String.Source: They gave them to their workers as an incentive at one point... a kind of reward for extra effort.
String.Dest: 以前是当做奖励机制发给工人的……用来鼓励额外工作。

String.Source: Soon I will be one... with nature...
String.Dest: 马上我就要……与自然合一了……

String.Source: We've already lost my mother, I don't want to leave him alone.
String.Dest: 我已经失去了母亲，不想让他一个人孤零零的。

String.Source: Damn it, Gjalund. You know we don't have that much coin.
String.Dest: 混账，加朗德。你知道我们没那么多钱。

String.Source: Sate your thirst for knowledge in the endless stacks of my library.
String.Dest: 在我永无穷尽的书库里满足对知识的渴望吧。

String.Source: If I must die to protect my people, so be it!
String.Dest: 如果我必须以死保护族人，那就来吧！

String.Source: I know you, champion. The Oghma Infinium was only the beginning.
String.Dest: 我认识你，勇士，无限智典不过是起点罢了。

String.Source: You will not break me, outsider.
Perhaps you will prove clever enough to uncover the secrets hidden here. If so, welcome.
String.Dest: 也许你够聪明，可以揭开这里隐藏的秘密。如果是这样，我欢迎你。

String.Source: My steel will be your death!
Perhaps you are a fool or a coward. If so, you are in peril. Read your book again and escape before Apocrypha claims you forever.
String.Dest: 也许你是个傻子或者懦夫，那你就有危险了。把书重新读一遍，在异典彻底控制你前逃出去吧。

String.Source: So that is how you treat others?
String.Dest: 你就是这样对待别人的？

String.Source: Gjalund. I was starting to wonder what happened to you.
String.Dest: 加朗德。我才在想你出了什么事儿呢。

String.Source: Before you even ask... yes, I have the supplies you requested.
String.Dest: 不用问了……你要的物资我都带来了。

String.Source: All-Maker, I am prepared to return...
String.Dest: 造物主，我准备好回来了……

String.Source: This load cost me double what we had agreed on. Nothing I can do about it.
String.Dest: 这批货比我们讲好的价钱要贵一倍。我也没办法。

String.Source: What... never seen a Redoran Guard before?
String.Dest: 怎么了……以前没见过瑞多然卫兵吗？

String.Source: All right, Adril. Don't worry about rushing it. Just pay me when you can.
String.Dest: 好吧，阿德尔。别担心慢慢来。钱够了再付不迟。

String.Source: Help me out, milady. I haven't eaten in days.
String.Dest: 行行好吧，女士。我好几天没吃东西了。

String.Source: Even though the Argonian Invasion ended a long time ago, there are still a few scale-skin clans that live within our borders.
String.Dest: 尽管阿尔贡入侵很久以前就结束了，但还有一些鳞皮族住在边境附近。

String.Source: I don't recognize you, so I'll assume this is your first visit to Raven Rock, outlander. State your intentions.
String.Dest: 我不认识你，我猜这应该是你第一次来鸦石镇吧，外地人。跟我说明你的来意。

String.Source: What kind of a life is that?
At least six of the diggers are dead. The rest of them ran off, and I don't blame them.
String.Dest: 已经死了至少六个挖掘工人。剩下的都跑了，但我一点都不怪他们。

String.Source: Don't like it? I hate it!
But I'm not sure I could do that to my father. I think it would break his heart.
String.Dest: 但我不能那样对我父亲，他会伤心的。

String.Source: Are you truly ready to die?
I thought I saw... no, surely not.
String.Dest: 我以为看到了……不，不可能。

String.Source: Your actions show a lack of respect.
We can sort out the details of our little arrangement later, but for now, I'll manage the dig if you can manage the coin.
String.Dest: 我们以后再把协议里的细节定下来，现在的话，我负责动土，你负责出钱。

String.Source: It is a shame that was necessary.
Another soul returns to the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 又一个回归造物主的灵魂。

String.Source: Did you think I would run?
What are you gawking at, outlander?
Well, it'll set the miners at ease. And hopefully keep them alive. But they won't be cheap either.
String.Dest: 这样矿工们就安心了。希望能让他们活下来。但那也要花大笔钱。

String.Source: Obey our laws, or suffer the consequences.
String.Dest: 遵守我们的法律，否则后果自负。

String.Source: Plenty of work in the mine, if you're looking.
String.Dest: 你要是找活儿干，矿场里有一大堆呢。

String.Source: It wasn't long before we became homesick... we were the only Dunmer in Morthal.
String.Dest: 我们不久后就开始想家了……毕竟整个莫萨尔就只有我们是丹莫。

String.Source: Of course, Cindiri. What troubles you?
String.Dest: 当然了，辛迪丽。出了什么事？

String.Source: What gives you the right to do that?
It is time for you to go, outsider.
String.Dest: 你是时候离开了，外来者。

String.Source: We've got our eyes on you.
It was just before the draugr woke up.
You cannot stay here any longer.
I don't want to kill you, but I will.
I have slain more dangerous creatures than you!
String.Dest: 我杀过比你还危险的东西！

String.Source: Well of course. With four other houses on the Council, someone has to keep the rabble organized.
String.Dest: 当然了，议会也包括其他四个大家族，总得有人把这群乌合之众组织起来。

String.Source: And coin is the only counterweight for a bad reputation.
String.Dest: 只有钱才能弥补烂掉的名声。

String.Source: Your heart is as cold as winter.
Sorry, I've just had a lot of hork-faced cowards coming by to mock my efforts.
String.Dest: 抱歉，之前实在有太多的胆小鬼来嘲笑我的努力了。

String.Source: Is a single coin too much to ask for?
String.Dest: 就连一个子儿都不给我吗？

String.Source: Just remember who's in charge around here.
String.Dest: 最好记住谁在这里管事儿。

String.Source: If death is what you want, you'll have it!
I know things are tough, but at least you have a roof over your head. Please, help me.
String.Dest: 我知道生活不易，但至少你房子上还有个顶。拜托了，帮帮我。

String.Source: Welcome to the Retching Netch, outlander. What can I get you?
String.Dest: 欢迎来到呕吐气母，外地人。想要些什么？

String.Source: I'll speak with Garyn and see if we can't increase the crop production this season.
String.Dest: 我会跟盖仁说的，看看这一季的收成能增加多少。

String.Source: I thank you for your protection, All-Maker.

String.Dest: 你找到我的鹤嘴锄了吗？

String.Source: Miserable... just miserable. I hate this place.
String.Dest: 惨啊……实在是太惨了。我讨厌这个地方。

String.Source: To put it simply, they attacked our settlement and slaughtered almost everyone. It was horrible.
String.Dest: 简单地说，他们袭击了我们的聚落，几乎没留下任何活口，太恐怖了。
太棒了，又多了一张嘴要喂了。

String.Source: I am sorry, but you left me with no choice.
You anger one, you anger us all!
String.Dest: 惹怒一个，你可就惹怒了我们所有人！

String.Source: With me? What's the matter with you?
After all these years, they're gouging us for every last drake we have.
String.Dest: 这些年来，他们一直在骗我们的钱。

String.Source: You've never heard of House Redoran?
You tell Crescius he better give that pickaxe back to me, or else.
String.Dest: 你跟克雷修斯说，他最好把那鹤嘴锄还给我，否则要他好看。

String.Source: But for now, I need you to be the money. So come back when you can do your job.
String.Dest: 但是现在，我需要你出钱。所以等钱够了再回来吧。
今天，你就要回归造物主了！

String.Source: This is what I get for skimping on labor.
String.Dest: 这就是我节省劳力费用的下场。

String.Source: The wind plays a trick on my ears, surely.
It's... it's the least I can do. Just... keep this quiet.
String.Dest: 我……也只能做这些了。只是……别把这事儿说出去了。

String.Source: Who told you that? Was it Geldis? I told that idiot not to send me any more...
String.Dest: 谁跟你说的？吉迪斯？我都告诉那白痴不要再派来更多的……

String.Source: A coward hides. A true warrior does not.
String.Dest: 懦夫才会躲起来，而真正的战士不会。

String.Source: I work for Mogrul. You got a problem, you talk to him.
String.Dest: 我给莫古尔打工，有问题找他聊。
提哩 弗克 塔尔 阿布拉克。

String.Source: It looks like a secret entrance opened up along the wall. You lead the way.
String.Dest: 看来是条沿墙壁的秘密入口。你带路吧。
布拉 瓦拉各 法尼格。
尤查 吞伽尔 查 提维克。

String.Source: There's probably an exit through one of these sarcophagi. Let's get moving.
String.Dest: 可能某个这些石棺能通往出口，继续走吧。

String.Source: Haven't you got something better to do?
You looking for trouble? Stay out of my way.
Mogrul doesn't lend coin to outlanders. Look somewhere else.
String.Dest: 莫古尔不会借钱给外地人的。去别地儿看看。

String.Source: It's a shrine, for... Err, I don't remember.
There's a shrine at the Earth Stone, but... well, I can't seem to recall what it's for.
String.Dest: 地石旁边有座祭坛，不过……好吧，看来我想不起来那是用来干啥的。

String.Source: I thought I remembered, but now I'm not sure. Is it important, or did I imagine that?
String.Dest: 感觉明明记得，但现在又不确定了。也不知道它是真重要，还是我想多了？

String.Source: Then Raven Rock will no longer be attacked by those creatures.
String.Dest: 那么鸦石镇就再也不会被那些生物袭击了。
贝尔提弗里克 呃 股如哇啦。

String.Source: I can't really remember... I think I knew at one time, but now I'm not sure.
String.Dest: 我想不起来……以前好像知道，但现在不确定了。

String.Source: Why can't I remember? I was sure it was important.
String.Dest: 为什么我想不起来了？我很确定那很重要。

String.Source: There's a shrine there, but I'm not sure what it means...
String.Dest: 这儿有座祭坛，但我不确定那意味着什么……
赫拉 翁格 啊吧。

String.Source: I think it's important, but... I couldn't really say.
String.Dest: 我觉得那玩意儿很有必要但是……说不上来。

String.Source: I don't know... Did we build that?
String.Dest: 不太清楚……真是我们建的吗？

String.Source: There's a shrine at the Earth Stone. It's... I'm not really sure what it's for. I thought I knew at one point.
String.Dest: 那儿有座祭坛。它是……我不一定想的起来是干啥用的，以前应该知道吧。

String.Source: Well, I... You know, I can't remember. It's important, I think, but it's hard for me to think about.
String.Dest: 嗯，我……我真记不起来了，那很重要，但回想起来很不容易。

String.Source: There's a shrine at the Earth Stone, I think.
Are we building it? I had a dream about that...
String.Dest: 我们盖的？梦里好像梦到过……

String.Source: The Earth Stone is there. There's also a shrine...
String.Dest: 地石在那儿，还有座祭坛……

String.Source: Do you mean by the Earth Stone? There's a shrine there, but I don't remember what it's for...
String.Dest: 你说地石旁边的？是有个祭坛，但我想不起来那是干啥的……

String.Source: The Earth Stone, and... It's a shrine that... Hmm. I can't recall.
String.Dest: 那是地石跟……一座祭坛……额，想不起来了。
提卡 特瓦法拉 弗里克。
威贝尔克 提克富拉尔。

String.Source: What turned him into one of the undead appears to remain a mystery for now.
String.Dest: 至于他被什么东西变成亡灵现在还不清楚。

String.Source: I don't know, it's hard to remember...
It's a shrine, I think. But I don't remember where it came from.
String.Dest: 是个祭坛吧，这样。但我记不得是从哪儿来的了。

String.Source: Judging from these writings, General Carius was under the impression that the fort was still active as it was 200 years ago.
String.Dest: 从这些文字来看，卡里乌斯将军还认为那座堡垒跟200年前一样活跃。

String.Source: I don't know. I feel like I knew something about it, but now I can't remember.
String.Dest: 不清楚，我感觉我应该知道些什么，但想不起来了。

String.Source: I am weary of living in this village. I want to do something with my life other than farm, fish and hunt deer.
String.Dest: 我厌倦了住在这个村子里。这辈子除了干农活，打鱼和捕鹿我还想干点别的。

String.Source: I've tried to tell him that the world beyond our lands is dangerous and cruel, but he won't listen.
String.Dest: 我已经告诉他这方水土之外的世界是危险而残酷的，但他听不进去。

String.Source: That's right. I want to go out into the world and earn great glory. I want to hunt the deadliest creatures and claim vast riches.
String.Dest: 没错。我想去外面的世界赢得荣耀，去猎杀最危险的猎物，夺取巨大的财富。

String.Source: His name is Nikulas. He's a good lad, strong and loyal. I only wish he wasn't so eager to leave the village.
String.Dest: 他叫尼库拉斯，是个好小伙子，强壮而实诚。我只希望他别那么急着离开村子。

String.Source: I can see that in my eagerness for adventure, I have forgotten my duties as a son and as a Skaal.
String.Dest: 我明白了，对冒险的渴望让我忘记了作为一个儿子和斯卡尔人的责任。

String.Source: I am grateful for your offer, outsider, but I am Skaal. All that I need, I was born with.
String.Dest: 感谢你的给予，外来者。但我是个斯卡尔人，天生就有需要的一切。

String.Source: There is no fear in my heart. My father's blood flows in my veins, and he was a mighty warrior. I will face any danger.
String.Dest: 我心里没有恐惧。父亲的血在我体内流淌，他可是个强大的战士。我会直面任何危险。

String.Source: I know it must be hard for an adventurer such as you to understand this, but we Skaal live very boring lives.
String.Dest: 我知道你这个冒险家很难理解这点，但我们斯卡尔人的生活很无趣。

String.Source: Yes, perhaps you can convince him. I would be grateful if you would do this thing, outsider.
String.Dest: 对，也许你能说服他。我会很感激的，外来者。

String.Source: I hope that Nikulas will hear your words. He no longer seems to hear mine.
String.Dest: 希望尼库拉斯会听你的话，他好像已经不听我说的了。

String.Source: Here... it's not much, but it's the best an old, retired miner can do.
String.Dest: 拿着……虽然不多，但我这个年老退休的矿工就只有这些了。

String.Source: Now that I have his journal in hand, I can get some closure from the East Empire Company. Make them pay for lying to everyone.
String.Dest: 既然我拿到了他的日志，也就可以和东帝国公司做个了断了。让他们为向大家撒谎付出代价。

String.Source: Well, I know there is some danger, of course, but I didn't think it would be that bad.
String.Dest: 嗯，我明白会有危险，这是当然的，但没想到会那么糟。

String.Source: Thank the All-Maker that you have come. These accursed elves have taken me from my home.
String.Dest: 感谢造物主送你来了。那些该死的精灵把我从家里绑走了。

String.Source: You will find him on the deck. Any hint of treachery, and your life is forfeit.
String.Dest: 他就在甲板上。要是让我发现你耍花招，你的命就没了。

String.Source: Their leader, an elf named Ancarion, has a map. He says that it shows the location of a hidden source of Stalhrim.
String.Dest: 他们的领导是一个叫安卡利昂的精灵。他手中有张地图，说上面记载着一处魔冰的隐藏矿源。

String.Source: If Nikulas leaves me now, I will be truly alone.
String.Dest: 如果尼库拉斯现在离开我，那我就真的独自一人了。

String.Source: I hope that you can make my son see wisdom.
String.Dest: 希望你能让我儿子想清楚。

String.Source: I do not know this word Thalmor, but if you mean the elves, they were trying to learn the secrets of forging Stalhrim.
String.Dest: 我没听说过梭默，但如果你说的是那些精灵，他们是为了得到铸造魔冰的秘密。

String.Source: If Nikulas leaves, I fear he will never return.
String.Dest: 要是尼库拉斯走了，恐怕他就回不来了。

String.Source: You have helped me to see wisdom, and I thank you for that, Skaal-friend.
String.Dest: 你让我有了新的领悟，谢谢你，斯卡尔之友。

String.Source: Thalmor, to arms! Kill the intruder!
String.Dest: 梭默，准备战斗！杀死入侵者！

String.Source: At worst, I have a few bruises to show for my ordeal.
String.Dest: 顶多就是几处瘀伤罢了。

String.Source: Now, I believe I owe you a little more than a debt of gratitude for all that work you did.
String.Dest: 啊，我想欠你的可不只是感激就报答得了的，毕竟你做了这么多。

String.Source: Ha, I knew it! Gratian's death wasn't because of a rockfall, it was just a story to keep people away from the tombs.
String.Dest: 哈，我就知道！格瑞希安绝不是死于塌方，那只是让人远离墓穴的托词。

String.Source: You would do that? I know he would listen to you. You've been out there in the wide world. You know its perils.
String.Dest: 你会吗？我知道他会听你的话。你见过世面，知道有多凶险。

String.Source: Try the lower sections of the mine. I've never been able to get that far.
String.Dest: 试着探查下矿井的下部。我从来去不了那么远。

String.Source: There is truth in your words. She has not been herself since my father's death.
String.Dest: 你说的有道理。父亲过世后她就变了。

String.Source: You have my oath that I will not leave the village until my mother is ready to let me go.
String.Dest: 我答应你，在我妈没准备好放我走前不会离开村子。

String.Source: Yes, you're right. She still mourns for my father, and having me near brings her comfort.
String.Dest: 嗯，你说得对。她还在哀悼我爸，我在身边能安慰她。

String.Source: I know that it would be difficult for her, at least for a time, but I am a man now. I have the right to choose what life I will.
String.Dest: 我知道这对她而言会很困难，至少暂时如此，但我已经成年了。我有权决定自己的生活。

String.Source: If the risk is truly so great, I will train with Wulf Wild-Blood and hone my skills. Perhaps in three or four winters, I will truly be ready.
String.Dest: 要是真的那么危险，我会跟着“野血”沃弗磨练我的技巧。也许再过三四个冬季我就真的准备好了。

String.Source: I admit, I was not expecting to hear that.
String.Dest: 我得承认，没料到你会这么说。

String.Source: Very well then, back to work.
There are some sealed doors up ahead. Perhaps you can figure out how to get them open.
String.Dest: 前面有几道锁住的门。也许你能找到开门的方法。

String.Source: I believe it was the ancient ancestors of the Skaal who built this tomb for their master, the Dragon Priest they called the guardian.
String.Dest: 我认为是斯卡尔人的古代祖先为他们的主人建造了这座墓穴，也就是被称为守护者的龙祭司。

String.Source: You've quite a keen mind to go with those steel nerves.
History truly comes alive here, don't you think?
String.Dest: 历史在这里变得鲜活了起来，不觉得吗？

String.Source: Quite right! Quite right! This, however, is paying work. Allow me to explain.
String.Dest: 没错，没错！这个，无论如何，我都会付钱的。请听我解释。

String.Source: A good question. Partly to keep unwanted intruders away, I suppose.
String.Dest: 问得好。部分原因是为了赶走不速之客吧，我猜。

String.Source: Now that was a proper adventure!
String.Dest: 这真是一场真正意义上的冒险！

String.Source: Of course this is all just theory and conjecture. It is likely we will never know the truth.
String.Dest: 当然，这些都只是理论和猜想。我们可能永远不会知道真相。

String.Source: After his defeat, Miraak was banished to Solstheim and the guardian was made his jailer.
String.Dest: 在被击败后，米拉克被放逐到索瑟海姆，而这位守护者成了他的狱卒。

String.Source: Perhaps Miraak was also a Dragon Priest, probably a contemporary of this guardian. He must have turned against his own order.
String.Dest: 也许米拉克也曾是位龙祭司，和这个守护者是同一时代的人。他肯定是背叛了自己的教义。

String.Source: Remarkable, isn't it? This tomb has been hidden for... well, who knows how long. Many centuries, I would think.
String.Dest: 很惊人，对吧？这座墓穴被埋藏了……嗯，天晓得有多久。几百年吧，我猜。

String.Source: It seems he was held in high regard by both men and dragons, because he defeated a traitor named Miraak.
String.Dest: 看来人和龙都很尊敬他，因为他击败了一个叫米拉克的叛徒。

String.Source: This is clearly a tomb, if a rather elaborate one. I would guess it was built for a Dragon Priest who achieved great fame in his time.
String.Dest: 这显然是座墓穴，而且还相当宏伟。我猜是为一位享誉盛名的龙祭司而建的。

String.Source: Yes, I think you're just the adventurous sort I need. I have a job offer for you.
String.Dest: 嗯，我认为你就是我需要的冒险家，有份工作给你。

String.Source: They might also have been meant as tests, to ensure that only the truly worthy can reach the main burial chamber.
String.Dest: 或许也是某种试炼，为确保能进主墓室的人都不是等闲之辈。

String.Source: Who can say, really? The motives of the Dragon Priests are as inscrutable as those of the Dragons they worshipped.
String.Dest: 但谁敢肯定呢？龙祭司们的意图和他们崇拜的龙一样难以理解。

String.Source: I've been thinking about that, and I believe it does.
String.Dest: 我想过这个问题，我觉得有。

String.Source: You can leave if you like. I think I'll be safe now.
String.Dest: 你想走可以走了。我觉得这里安全了。

String.Source: I admit, it was quite a thrill to watch you vanquish that Dragon Priest.
String.Dest: 我承认，看你击败那个龙祭司很刺激。

String.Source: This place is all I'd hoped, and much more.
String.Dest: 这个地方和我想的一样，可能还更好。

String.Source: Modest as well as brave. Most admirable! I can see why the Skaal think highly of you.
String.Dest: 谦逊而勇敢。太令人敬佩了！我明白为什么斯卡尔人对你评价很高了。

String.Source: In all likelihood, these people were ancient Nords who came with the Dragon Priest to live here on Solstheim.
String.Dest: 这些人很可能是跟随龙祭司来索瑟海姆定居的古诺德人。

String.Source: Separated from their people on the mainland, they developed a distinct culture that became the Skaal we know today.
String.Dest: 他们与内陆的族人分离后，逐渐发展起了独特的文化，最终演变成我们今天所知的斯卡尔。

String.Source: You should have listened. Guards! Help! Trespasser!
String.Dest: 你应该听我的才对。卫兵！帮忙！有非法入侵者！

String.Source: Filth. Run to the horizon before I hunt you down.
String.Dest: 脏东西，在我发作之前给我消失。

String.Source: I saw you do that, you know.
You better... kill me... while you have the chance.
String.Dest: 你最好…宰了我…在你还有机会的时候…
阿祖拉的智慧与你同在，朋友。
愿波耶西亚指引你的刀刃。

String.Source: I should cut off your hands for that!
You'll have to do better than that!
Comfort is given, justice is taken
String.Dest: 安慰是给出去的，正义是抢来的。

String.Source: What are you doing that for?
Sheogorath take fools like you, put that down.
String.Dest: 谢尔格拉专门收你这种傻子，把那放下。

String.Source: I know you can hear me!
The Telvanni are the master wizards of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 泰瓦尼是晨风的法师大族。

String.Source: Boethiah devour you. Get out of here!
String.Dest: 波耶西亚吞噬你，滚出去！

String.Source: I'll let you stay. This time.
String.Dest: 你就留下吧。但就这一次。

String.Source: The note says it's from General Falx Carius, but that's impossible.
String.Dest: 这个纸条自称出自法克斯·卡里乌斯将军之手，但不可能啊。
愿阿祖拉照亮你的前路。

String.Source: Let the ghosts consider their new brethren.
String.Dest: 就让鬼魂们见见新朋友。

String.Source: We're one of the same kind, you and I. I'm glad to have met you.
String.Dest: 我们是同类人啊，咱们俩。很高兴能认识你。

String.Source: I'm not going to warn you again.
Want me to prove it? I bet a hundred gold I can take you, bare-handed.
String.Dest: 想让我证明吗？我赌一百金币，赤手空拳拿下你。

String.Source: You'll give that back if you know what's good for you.
String.Dest: 识相点就把那东西还回来。

String.Source: I'll have your hands for that!
This is the last time I'll say it. Get out.
String.Dest: 这是我最后一次提醒。出去。

String.Source: There's no way he could still be alive.
You'll need to be luckier than that!
We need to find a way into the temple below.
String.Dest: 我们得找到一条进入下面神殿的路。

String.Source: Better to suffer a wrong than to do one.
I can see Boethiah smiles in your heart.
Well, worry not over what can't be undone.
String.Dest: 别再担心无可挽回的事了。

String.Source: You're not supposed to be in here.
What do you think you're doing?
That's certainly one way to get attention.
I was sure I heard something.
You, of all people. Get out!
There are so many delightful ways I've pictured you dead.
String.Dest: 我想象过你死后的场景有多美好。

String.Source: By Dagon's eyes, you'll pay for that!
String.Dest: 大衮的眼珠子啊，你要付出代价！

String.Source: The greatest of us grow magical towers like this one from the mighty fungus trees.
String.Dest: 我们中最伟大的法师会将巨型真菌树栽培为这种魔法塔。

String.Source: If you value your hands, keep them off that.
String.Dest: 还想要手的话，就把那玩意儿放下。

String.Source: I'm not going to warn you again. Get out, or I'll call the guards!
String.Dest: 我不会再警告你了。赶紧出去，不然我喊卫兵了！

String.Source: You can stay, but you're not supposed to be here.
String.Dest: 你可以留下，但确实不该在这里。

String.Source: It's time for you to leave, my friend.
If you find any while you're exploring Solstheim, bring them here and I'll pay you for them.
String.Dest: 在你探索索瑟海姆期间，只要找到了都可以拿来卖给我。

String.Source: It looks like it's beginning to wear off.
Are you here to pray, or perhaps pay your respects at our Ancestral Tomb?
String.Dest: 你是来祈祷，还是想对我们的祖坟献上敬意呢？

String.Source: Is it over yet? Does she have eyes again?
String.Dest: 结束了吗？她的眼睛回来了吗？

String.Source: Just get them to taste my sujamma... once they take a sip, it'll sell itself.
String.Dest: 让他们尝尝我的苏贾玛……只要一小口就足以推销出去了。

String.Source: As long as you keep bringing them, I'll keep buying them.
String.Dest: 只要你还有货，都拿来卖我。

String.Source: Whatever the case may be, thousands of Dunmer needlessly lost their lives and many more were exiled from their homeland.
String.Dest: 无论原因是什么，成千上万的丹莫牺牲了生命，更多的人被迫逃离家园。

String.Source: He can await my arrival with the rest of Tamriel.
String.Dest: 他可以和全泰姆瑞尔一起等待我的回归。

String.Source: What are those things growing out of her eyes?
String.Dest: 从她眼睛里长出来的是什么？

String.Source: It meant passing on better opportunities at home, but I didn't want to leave his side.
String.Dest: 那意味着放弃了家乡更好的机会，但我不想离开他的身边。

String.Source: This isn't Skyrim, outlander. A group of powerful and influential Dunmer families have been ruling Morrowind for millennia.
String.Dest: 这里不是天际，外地人。强大且具有影响力的丹莫家族们已经统治了晨风几千年了。

String.Source: They could be anywhere on the island. The mines might be a good place to start.
String.Dest: 它们可能出现在岛上的任何地方。或许你该从各个矿场找起。

String.Source: Careful with those netches... they may look tame, but they can seriously hurt you when threatened.
String.Dest: 小心那些气母……它们看起来很温顺，但在感到威胁时会让人受重伤。

String.Source: You have no idea of the true power a Dragonborn can wield!
String.Dest: 你完全不了解龙裔真正掌握的力量！

String.Source: Ahh... You are Dragonborn. I can feel it. And yet...
String.Dest: 啊……你是龙裔。我感觉得到。但是……

String.Source: Nobody seems certain why it happened... an attempt at expansion, revenge for the enslavement of their people or perhaps both.
String.Dest: 没人知道他们为啥那样做……扩张领土，或是为人民遭奴役而报复，也许两个都对。

String.Source: I'm beginning to like this partnership. Here you go.
String.Dest: 我开始喜欢这段合作了。拿去吧。

String.Source: You're making my buyer happy. Keep them coming.
String.Dest: 你让我的买主很高兴。以后也卖我吧。

String.Source: You look able enough to venture outside of town. Perhaps you could help me recover something precious that was lost?
String.Dest: 你看上去有实力去野外冒险。也许能帮我找回一样珍贵的东西？

String.Source: But first, I need some data. Try wiggling them.
String.Dest: 但首先，我需要一些数据，试着摆动它们。

String.Source: Is it over yet? Does he have eyes again?
String.Dest: 结束了吗？他的眼睛回来了吗？

String.Source: Solstheim is theoretically under my rule, but without revenue from the mine, I lack the resources to actually govern anything but Raven Rock itself.
String.Dest: 理论上整个索瑟海姆都归我管，但是少了矿场的盈余后，我就没有统治鸦石镇以外地方的资源了。

String.Source: You have done little beyond killing a few dragons.
String.Dest: 你也就是宰了几条龙罢了。

String.Source: And I see now that your tongue is also...well, it's probably best if I don't say. Don't bother trying to scream though.
String.Dest: 而且你的舌头也……嗯，我还是不说好了。别试着喊了。

String.Source: You have defeated dragons, yes, but still...
String.Dest: 你打败过一些龙，没错，但是……

String.Source: They can't talk the wave signs!
Be cautious, friend. The ash spawn are soulless beings with no regard for compassion.
String.Dest: 小心点，朋友。灰烬怪是些没有灵魂的东西，它们不会留情。

String.Source: Well, well. Seems you're proving fairly useful for an outlander.
String.Dest: 嗯。看来你这个外地人还挺有本事的。

String.Source: I've heard tell of men who, by curse or by heart's desire, become transformed into one of those vile things.
String.Dest: 我听说有些被诅咒，或是自愿的人就会变成那种邪恶的东西。

String.Source: I... I understand. That's not an existence I would wish on anyone.
String.Dest: 我……我明白了。我不希望有人这样活着。

String.Source: I will let you know if I find anything in the dining area.
String.Dest: 我在食堂里找到什么会跟你说。

String.Source: They're no longer being made, so they've become collectible. I'd love to get my hands on a few of them.
String.Dest: 现在已经绝版了，所以就成了收藏品。我很想弄到一些。

String.Source: It might take more than a simple request to change Geldis's mind. He can be quite stubborn.
String.Dest: 让吉迪斯改变主意可没那么简单。他这人很顽固。

String.Source: It is a pitiable fate. And one that I fear has fallen to my brother.
String.Dest: 多可悲的命运，恐怕我兄弟也是其中一员了。

String.Source: Who... thirst for sky... All-Maker craves the night of sun.
String.Dest: 谁在……渴望天穹……造物主也在追求夜晚的日光。

String.Source: She can await my arrival with the rest of Tamriel.
String.Dest: 她可以和全泰姆瑞尔一起等待我的回归。

String.Source: What are those things growing out of his eyes?
String.Dest: 从他眼睛里长出来的是什么？

String.Source: Here's your coin. Keep bringing me more, and I'll keep paying you for them.
String.Dest: 这是你的钱。再拿更多些来，我都会付钱的。

String.Source: He hears the underslake of blood dust!
Bralsa's may be welcome here again, but I still expect her to pay her way like everyone else.
String.Dest: 这里会重新对布拉尔萨开放，但我希望她像别人一样付钱。

String.Source: My husband is second councilor, so I certainly have the means to reward you if you find my folio.
String.Dest: 我丈夫是副议员，所以如果你找到我的对开本，我一定不吝奖励你。

String.Source: Councilor Morvayn is House Redoran's representative on Solstheim.
String.Dest: 莫尔凡议员是瑞多然家在索瑟海姆的代表。

String.Source: The East Empire Pendants are scattered all over, so leave no stone unturned.
String.Dest: 东帝国公司吊坠到处都有，所以不遗余力的去找吧。

String.Source: No, don't shake your fist. Wiggle the tentacle things where your eyes used to be.
String.Dest: 不，不是让你晃拳头。扭动你眼睛原处的触手。

String.Source: Find me that stash of wine... I'm itching to be rid of it.
String.Dest: 去帮我找到那些酒……我等不及把它们处理掉了。

String.Source: Our house leads the Council by virtue of our preeminence in battle, wisdom, and ancestral glory.
String.Dest: 我们家族领导议会凭的是战场上的卓越表现、智慧以及自古以来的荣耀。

String.Source: You have slain a great many dragons, I see. And yet...
String.Dest: 你已经屠了相当数目的龙了，我看得出来。但是……

String.Source: I...I think I'm going to pretend that never happened.
Hmm. From the way they are waving about, I'm assuming they aren't under your control.
String.Dest: 嗯，看眨动的样子，我猜它们不受你控制了。

String.Source: I think I'm going to be sick.
As second councilor, it's my job to support him and make certain his rule is enforced.
String.Dest: 作为副议员，我的职责是协助他，并确保他的命令执行下去。

String.Source: Quite a while ago, yes. They cut a bloody swath across most of the southern region of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 很久以前的事儿了，晨风南部遭到他们大肆屠杀。

String.Source: I said to put it on my account and that's the end of it. Understand?
String.Dest: 叫你先记到账上就是了。懂了吗？

String.Source: About your account... it's been a few months...
String.Dest: 说到你的账……已经有几个月了……

String.Source: See that they stay that way, or else I'll send you back to Skyrim in a crate. You understand me?
String.Dest: 给我接着放干净了，要不我就把你装在箱子里运回天际。听懂了吗？

String.Source: Anyway, take this for your time.
String.Dest: 不管怎样，这是你的酬劳。

String.Source: You can't get blood from a stone, Mogrul. As it is, we can barely make ends meet.
String.Dest: 石头是挤不出来血的，莫古尔。事实上，我们已经快入不敷出了。

String.Source: That isn't my problem. I was clear when I loaned Garyn the money that I wanted it back by the first harvest.
String.Dest: 这又不是我的问题。我当初借钱给盖仁的时候就说好了，要在下次收成的时候拿回来。

String.Source: Why don't you say that louder so the entire town can hear you, idiot.
String.Dest: 你咋不说得再大声点给全镇人听到呢，蠢货。

String.Source: If you want that beautiful wife of yours to stay that way, you'd better.
String.Dest: 要是你还想让你老婆那张漂亮脸蛋保持下去，最好是这样。

String.Source: Just give them to me and put it on my account.
String.Dest: 快点给我然后记在我账上。

String.Source: Oh... Mogrul. Care for anything from my stand today?
String.Dest: 哦……莫古尔。今天来我的摊子买什么？

String.Source: I'll see what I can do...
Milore, you need to talk some sense into your husband.
String.Dest: 米洛尔，你得说服你的丈夫才行。

String.Source: Ash yams? Disgusting. I'd rather eat cheese that's been sitting in the sun for a week.
String.Dest: 灰烬薯？恶心。我宁愿吃在太阳下放了一周的奶酪。

String.Source: I've gotten a report that you've been harassing some of the townsfolk. Is this true?
String.Dest: 我听说你在骚扰镇民。有这回事吗？

String.Source: Oh, come on. You know me, Captain Veleth. My hands are clean.
String.Dest: 哦，得了吧。你是了解我的，维黎斯队长。我手是干净的。

String.Source: Mogrul... I got those special poisons you asked for.
String.Dest: 莫古尔……我有你要的特制毒药了。

String.Source: Look, I know why you're here. I'll get the coin, I promise.
String.Dest: 听着，我知道你来干什么。会把钱凑够的，我保证。
所有人都将臣服于米拉克！

String.Source: While you are taking care of the creature, I'll try to figure out what went wrong.
String.Dest: 你去处理那东西，我去看看是哪里出了问题。

String.Source: Then it is too late. The lie has already taken root in the hearts of men.
String.Dest: 那就太迟了，这谎言已经在人们心中扎根了。

String.Source: Come back if you're feeling thirsty. I'll set you up right.
String.Dest: 口渴了就回来吧，立马给你满上。

String.Source: Oh, how the Deceiver wags his clever tongue.
String.Dest: 嚯，欺诈者可真是口齿伶俐啊。

String.Source: However, I've seen the smile on people's faces and there's hope around here once again... something we've been lacking for a long time.
String.Dest: 但是，我看到了人们脸上的笑容，这里又有希望了……这是我们长久以来缺乏的东西……

String.Source: With the mines open, Raven Rock has become a significant colony of the Dunmer people again.
String.Dest: 矿场开张后，鸦石镇再次成为了丹莫人民的一个重要聚落。

String.Source: Why did you touch the Stone?
That world will cease to be.
Hurry. I'll keep Master Neloth distracted.
String.Dest: 快去吧，我去引开内洛斯大师的注意力。

String.Source: I will purify the world for Miraak's return!
String.Dest: 我要为米拉克回归净化这个世界！

String.Source: I was one of the Redoran Guard under Captain Veleth's command.
String.Dest: 以前我是维黎斯队长手下的瑞多然卫兵。

String.Source: As you'll see, that's easier said than done. This way to the boilers.
String.Dest: 马上你就知道了，这没那么简单。走这边去锅炉那儿。

String.Source: When Lord Miraak appears all shall bear witness. None will stand to oppose him!
String.Dest: 当米拉克大人现世，所有人皆须见证，无人能违抗他。

String.Source: I've always had a steady stream of work thanks to the Redoran Guard, so it hasn't affected me much.
String.Dest: 多亏了瑞多然卫兵，我一直都有源源不断的活儿干，所以对我来说变化不大。

String.Source: The true Dragonborn will judge you!
Old Crescius has a nose for exactly where to dig. If they'd only listened to him years ago, the town wouldn't have been in such dire straits.
String.Dest: 克雷修斯老头对于在哪儿开挖的嗅觉特别灵。要是大家几年前就听他的，镇上就不会陷入这种危急困境了。

String.Source: At this rate, I'll be able to put a roof over my head in just a few months.
String.Dest: 照这个速度，我再过几个月就能把屋顶盖上了。

String.Source: Unlike most of my fellow miners, I was too foolish to save enough coin for that day. The rest I spent on sujamma to drown my sorrows.
String.Dest: 和其他矿工不一样，我没有存够钱。只能把剩下的拿去买酒消愁。

String.Source: So we shall expose to them the falseness in their hearts by tearing out yours, Deceiver!
String.Dest: 那就先把你的心脏挖出来，让他们看清真相！

String.Source: The unworthy flee before the Master's power.
String.Dest: 废物还是从主人的力量前滚开吧。

String.Source: Couldn't be better. The sections that are being opened up have revealed some huge deposits of ebony.
String.Dest: 再好不过了。已经开放的区域能看到一些巨型黑檀矿脉。

String.Source: I've been able to convince my superiors at House Redoran to send me the resources they've been denying now that we're deemed more important.
String.Dest: 我已经说服了瑞多然家的高层们把物资送来，之前他们一直拒绝，但现在我们受到重视了。

String.Source: And when the world shall see.
You cannot escape the Dragonborn's justice!
There is no telling what he would do to me.
String.Dest: 谁知道他会怎么处置我。
躲藏可不符你的名头啊，龙裔。

String.Source: It's good to get the old nose working again. I missed sniffing out the ebony deposits and getting my hands dirty.
String.Dest: 我的嗅觉能再次派上用场还不赖，好怀念边闻着矿脉边抬矿的感觉。

String.Source: Master Neloth refused to teach me the Ash Guardian spell. So I read his spell book on my own and learned it.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师拒绝教我召唤灰烬守卫的法术，所以我偷看了他的法术书来学习。

String.Source: Your blood will flow in Miraak's name!
String.Dest: 你的血将为米拉克而流！

String.Source: Watch yourself out there... looks like an ash storm might be brewing.
String.Dest: 外出时小心点儿……看来有场风暴正在酝酿。

String.Source: I find them, clean them up and resell them.
String.Dest: 我捡到再清理干净，就拿来卖。

String.Source: No! Do not touch the Stone while Miraak controls it!
String.Dest: 不！别在米拉克控制圣石的时候碰它！

String.Source: We shall clear the way for the coming of the true Dragonborn!
String.Dest: 我们来为真正龙裔的到来开路！

String.Source: Then it is too late. The lie has already taken root in the hearts of men.
String.Dest: 那就太迟了，这谎言已经在人们心中扎根了。

String.Source: You there! You're the one they call Dragonborn?
String.Dest: 那边儿的！你就是人们口中的龙裔吗？

String.Source: They've laughed at me, Aphia. They thought I was a crazy old fool. But I proved them wrong.
String.Dest: 他们嘲笑我，阿菲娅。他们以为是个疯老头子。但我证明了他们错了。

String.Source: Unfortunately, I'd left the other guardsman behind and he never made it. Captain Veleth discharged me from service.
String.Dest: 不幸的是，另一个被我丢下的卫兵没能活下来。维黎斯队长就把我开除了。

String.Source: You cannot escape the truth. You cannot escape the True Dragonborn!
String.Dest: 你无法逃避真相，你无法逃避真正的龙裔！

String.Source: Things are picking up... for now.
String.Dest: 情况正在好转……至少现在如此。

String.Source: Master Neloth is going to kill me. Assuming he doesn't make me into a test subject again.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师会杀了我的，前提是他不再拿我当实验品了。

String.Source: My doors are open if you wish to discuss matters involving Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 如果想讨论鸦石镇的相关事务，请随时过来坐坐。

String.Source: But you shall not evade us with guile and deceit. No. You shall pay for your blasphemy!
String.Dest: 但你的诡诈与欺骗无法蒙蔽我们！不，你将为你的亵渎之举付出代价！

String.Source: When Lord Miraak appears all shall bear witness. None shall stand to oppose him!
String.Dest: 当米拉克大人现世，所有人皆须见证，无人能违抗他。

String.Source: A few years ago, I was out on patrol with two other men when we were attacked by some ash spawn.
String.Dest: 几年前我和几个同袍巡逻时，遭到灰烬怪袭击。

String.Source: You shall not stand in the way of the true Dragonborn's return. He comes soon, and we shall offer him your heart!
String.Dest: 你不该阻挡真正龙裔的回归。他即将到来，而我们会把你的心脏献给他！

String.Source: Your lies fall on deaf ears, Deceiver! We know you are the False Dragonborn!
String.Dest: 你那谎言对我们无效，欺诈者! 我们知道你是假龙裔!

String.Source: Ah, now we can finish this.
And when the world shall listen.
Something went wrong when I cast it. The creature is attacking everything in sight.
String.Dest: 在召唤的时候出了某些问题，那玩意儿在攻击视野里的一切。

String.Source: You can see the book right here.
String.Dest: 你从这里可以清楚地看到书。

String.Source: So tantalizingly close... But trust me, no magic will open that. I'd have had the book already if it could.
String.Dest: 近在咫尺了……但相信我，没有魔法打得开它。有用的话我早就拿到书了。

String.Source: You might think it's all perfume and roses now that the mine's open, but all I see is a new security problem on our hands.
String.Dest: 可能你觉得矿场开张后美好纷呈，但我却看到了一个新的安全隐患。

String.Source: No, we'll have to do this the hard way. If we can restore the steam supply to this room, I'm certain I can open it.
String.Dest: 不行的，我们只能选复杂的方法。如果我们能恢复这房间的蒸汽供应，就肯定能把它打开。

String.Source: You are in my power here.
String.Dest: 你在我的力量掌控之中。

String.Source: There's no escape from this place.
Councilor Morvayn was kind enough to allow Rirns and I to live in one of the abandoned buildings. At least it keeps the ash out of our eyes.
String.Dest: 莫尔凡议员好心让我和瑞恩斯住在一间废弃房屋里，至少眼睛不会吃灰了。

String.Source: It's too late for regrets, Dragonborn.
Did you think to escape me?
Now through them do I speak.
Bralsa's been nice enough to show me how to swing a pickaxe. She's an old hat when it comes to digging up ebony.
String.Dest: 布拉尔萨在使用鹤嘴锄上教了我很多，她可是个挖黑檀矿的老手。

String.Source: Sometimes things fall off the back of a cart.
String.Dest: 偶尔从运货马车上掉下来的。

String.Source: You should not have come here!
I may not be an expert at it yet, but it's good to be back to work and have some coin in my pockets.
String.Dest: 虽然我还不是个采矿行家，但能回到工作岗位，包里有钱总是件好事。

String.Source: How do you think? It's a blessing.
String.Dest: 你觉得呢？当然是好事儿啊。

String.Source: I was one of the wealthiest miners in town... I could haul up almost three or four times what the average digger could.
String.Dest: 我以前是镇子里最有钱的矿工……我挖的矿比别人多三到四倍。

String.Source: They sprung from the ground with no warning and killed one of my companions instantly. I was so frightened, I ran all the way back to Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 它们毫无预警地从地下跳出来，瞬间杀了我的一个同伴。我吓坏了，就一路跑回鸦石镇。

String.Source: I never saw the end coming like it did... the mine running out of ebony.
String.Dest: 从没想过事情会那样发展……黑檀矿脉居然枯竭了。

String.Source: I've been made the foreman of the mine thanks to everything you did down there.
String.Dest: 多亏了你在矿井下做的一切，我当上工头了。

String.Source: Well, I put up with you, don't I?
String.Dest: 嗯，我这不还忍受着你，不是吗？
你逃不出米拉克的视野！

String.Source: You're too kind to people, always giving them the benefit of the doubt. Don't know how you put up with it.
String.Dest: 你对人太好了，总是把人往好处想。都不知道你怎么受得了。

String.Source: I've had to muster some more men to protect the mine, but I don't really have a problem with that.
String.Dest: 我不得不召集更多人手来保护矿场，但我真的不介意。

String.Source: Your lies fall on deaf ears, Deceiver. The True Dragonborn comes... You are but his shadow.
String.Dest: 你那谎言对我们无效，欺诈者！真正的龙裔即将到来……你不过是他的影子罢了。

String.Source: Miraak has you, just like the others!
String.Dest: 你被米拉克控制了，就和其他人一样！

String.Source: I am embarrassed to admit that it was my fault.
Now through me do you see.
I appreciate the help you've been giving us.
String.Dest: 感谢你为我们做的一切。

String.Source: You would dare call yourself the true Dragonborn?
String.Dest: 你敢称自己是真的龙裔？

String.Source: All I'm wondering is how long it'll take for House Redoran to begin ignoring us again if the mine runs out of ore for a second time.
String.Dest: 我纳闷的是，要是矿场又枯竭了，瑞多然家是不是又会无视我们。

String.Source: I need to keep Master Neloth distracted so he doesn't find out what I did.
String.Dest: 我要转移内洛斯大师的注意力，这样他就不知道我干了什么。

String.Source: Well of course, now that they're under House Redoran's protection, why would they want to go back to Mournhold?
String.Dest: 当然了，既然他们处在瑞多然家的保护下，怎么会想回哀伤之城去呢。

String.Source: When Lord Miraak appears all shall bear witness. None will there be who oppose him.
String.Dest: 当米拉克大人现世，所有人皆须见证，无人能违抗他。

String.Source: There isn't a single night that passes where I don't regret what I did, but it's too late for that now.
String.Dest: 我每天都为所作所为后悔不已，但是已经太迟了。

String.Source: So we shall rip the falsehood from their breasts by tearing the false heart from yours!
String.Dest: 那就先把你的心脏挖出来，让他们看清真相！

String.Source: You will be an offering to the Master!
The usual. Piles of armor to repair for the Redoran Guard.
String.Dest: 老样子。帮瑞多然卫兵们修复一大堆护甲。

String.Source: Making sure those shipments of ebony make it safely from the mine to the shipping docks is my new order of the day.
String.Dest: 确保那些黑檀矿从矿场安全运到码头是我新的日常任务。

String.Source: I've got regular paying customers again, thirsty workers at the end of the day, and more coin than I can count.
String.Dest: 我又有了稳定的回头客了，他们是辛苦一天后饥渴难耐的工人们，我的钱都数不过来了。

String.Source: I say let them try. My men are ready for them.
String.Dest: 我说让他们放马过来。我的手下准备好迎接了。

String.Source: I'm hearing that the Council will be staying in Blacklight permanently.
String.Dest: 我听说议会打算永久驻留黑光城。

String.Source: And with Solstheim crawling with reavers and Azura-knows what else, I can't risk any attacks on Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 而且索瑟海姆到处爬满了抢匪，鬼晓得还有什么东西，我不能让鸦石镇冒着被袭击的风险。

String.Source: Best of all, Aphia isn't so cross when I go down there any more!
String.Dest: 最安逸的是，现在我下矿阿菲娅再也不那么发火儿了！

String.Source: The true Dragonborn returns to this world soon, and all will be judged!
String.Dest: 真正的龙裔即将回到这个世界，众生都将迎来审判！

String.Source: Second Councilor Arano is concerned that once word reaches the reavers that the mine has reopened, they might think about paying us a visit.
String.Dest: 副议员阿拉诺担心一旦矿场重新开张的消息传到抢匪耳朵里，他们可能会上门拜访。

String.Source: I grow ever nearer to you.
Soon, we'll have a steady supply of workers and materials to keep things going for years to come.
String.Dest: 很快，我们就有稳定的工人和材料供应，以维持未来几年的运转。

String.Source: Master Neloth knows what I'm doing.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师知道我在干什么。

String.Source: Why aren't you doing this in the lab, where it would be safer for all of us?
String.Dest: 你为什么不在实验室里练习呢，那里对我们来说更安全吧？
我感觉有些不对劲，打起精神来！

String.Source: I heard... a voice in my head. It told me to bring the cultists to Windhelm. I didn't want to do it, but I did it anyway. I couldn't control myself.
String.Dest: 我听到……脑子里有个声音。要我把教徒带到风舵城去，我不想那么做，但我控制不了自己。

String.Source: That was you? You're the Dragonborn?
Master Neloth has tasked Elynea with repairing the tower.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师已经吩咐艾琳娜去修复塔楼了。

String.Source: I hope you will give me word if you find anything about my brother.
String.Dest: 如果你找到了关于我兄弟的任何消息，请跟我说一声。

String.Source: It's not a fate I would wish on anyone. And not what I wanted for my brother.
String.Dest: 我不希望任何人落得如此下场，更不希望我兄弟如此。

String.Source: It looks like there is only one way to proceed.
We seek to live in peace with the land, but he had an eye for dominance and strength.
String.Dest: 我们追求与这方水土和平共处，但是他的眼中只有征服和蛮力。

String.Source: I'm just having trouble deciphering Master Neloth's handwriting.
String.Dest: 我没法辨认内洛斯大师的笔迹。

String.Source: I had heard Miraak had turned against the Dragon Cult, but to display the remains in such a manner as this...
String.Dest: 我曾听说过米拉克背叛了拜龙教，但像这样把尸骨展出在大厅里……

String.Source: Two fingers pronated...what's pronated? Oh. Rotated. That might work.
String.Dest: 两根手指外翻……啥是外翻？哦，旋转。应该有用了。
弗鲁 哈 卡瓦西 哟 啦。

String.Source: But how is that possible? After all this time...
String.Dest: 但怎么可能呢？过了这么久了……

String.Source: I don't know. I can't remember everything clearly.
String.Dest: 我不知道，想起来很模糊。

String.Source: For unnatural strength, you need look no further than the beasts of this island, mangled by the daedra.
String.Dest: 想了解那些非自然的力量的话，你只消看看这岛上的被迪德拉腐化的野兽。

String.Source: It is eerily quiet. I do not suspect that will be the case the further we go. Be on your guard.
String.Dest: 安静的令人发毛，我想要找的东西应该没多远了，保持戒备。

String.Source: Please, you have to believe me. I did everything against my will, I had no choice!
String.Dest: 拜托，你相信我，我是被逼的，我没得选！

String.Source: Tart bones? That doesn't even make sense. I'll just ignore that part.
String.Dest: 酸骨头？完全看不懂啊。我直接忽略这段吧。

String.Source: I do not like this place. It almost looks as if these statues will come to life at any moment.
String.Dest: 不喜欢这个地方，这些雕像就像随时会活过来一样。

String.Source: I do not recognize this statuary. We passed by a few of them earlier, but they are becoming more frequent as we get further in.
String.Dest: 我认不出来这些雕像是啥，我们之前路过了几个，但是越往里走它们出现的越频繁。

String.Source: I leave the honor of pulling that handle to you. I do not want to put my hand anywhere near the mouth of that statue.
String.Dest: 拉那个把手的荣耀给你了，我一点儿都不想摸那雕像的嘴巴附近。

String.Source: It is no wonder the dragons razed his temple to the ground. Seeing the remains hung up like trophies must have enraged them to no end.
String.Dest: 难怪龙族会把他的神殿夷为平地，看到这些尸骸像战利品一样吊起来肯定让它们怒不可遏。

String.Source: I fear there is too much we do not yet know.
String.Dest: 恐怕我们不知道的还多着呢。

String.Source: I wonder if there is something here that tells the story of Miraak...
String.Dest: 我想知道这儿有没有讲米拉克传说的东西……

String.Source: Not... exactly. Look, it's difficult to explain.
String.Dest: 不对……听着，很难解释的清。

String.Source: It's on your head if something goes wrong.
String.Dest: 要是出了什么问题可都是你的责任。

String.Source: He never felt the call of the All-Maker as I do. As we all should.
String.Dest: 他从没像我们大家那样，感受到造物主的召唤。
费基尔 帕瓦 图瓦尼 巴尔吉。

String.Source: Why are you out here? Aren't you supposed to be in the tower assisting Master Neloth?
String.Dest: 你怎么在外面？你应该在塔里帮内洛斯大师的忙啊？

String.Source: I don't mean to be rude, but I need to concentrate.
String.Dest: 无意冒犯，但我现在需要专心。

String.Source: Yes. I'm trying to summon an Ash Guardian.
String.Dest: 对。我在尝试召唤灰烬守卫。

String.Source: Another border...no, aetheric order. I think that's right.
String.Dest: 另一种界限……不，光界秩序。这样应该没错。
咔如 塔瑞 培福瑞克？

String.Source: It means what I feared has come to pass. Miraak was never truly gone, and now has returned.
String.Dest: 这代表我所畏惧的事情已经发生了。米拉克从未真正灭亡，现在他回归了。

String.Source: Just let me get back inside first.
No need to bother him about it though. He's quite busy at the moment.
String.Dest: 没必要告诉他这个，他现在太忙了。

String.Source: Besides, shouldn't you be worrying about the damage to the tower?
String.Dest: 另外，难道你不关心下塔的损害情况吗？

String.Source: The, uh... the lab is too small. Also, I need the ashy soil.
String.Dest: 呃……实验室太小了，而且，我需要灰质土。

String.Source: If you must know, I'm trying to get this Ash Guardian spell to work.
String.Dest: 你一定要知道的话，我正在尝试灰烬守卫法术。

String.Source: I am Majni, Alpha of the Frostmoon Pack. You are welcome here, so long as you respect our law.
String.Dest: 我是马吉尼，霜月狼群的首领。我们欢迎你留下来，只要遵守这儿的规矩。

String.Source: Hold, traveler. You have no business here. Be on your way.
String.Dest: 站住，旅行者。这儿没你的事，快走。

String.Source: You know it well. The speed and strength of the beast. The thrill of the hunt. The triumph of the kill. This is our purpose, our way of life.
String.Dest: 你自己也清楚吧，野兽的速度与力量，狩猎的快感，杀戮的成就感。这就是我们的追求和生活方式。

String.Source: I don't trust you, whelp. Keep that in mind.
String.Dest: 给我记住，小狗，我信不过你。
鹿、刀猫、瑞克灵、野猪还有熊。

String.Source: You might find a few others. Strays. Lone hunters. But ours is the last true pack that remains.
String.Dest: 你可能找得到其他流浪的孤独猎人。但我们是真正仅剩的狼群了。

String.Source: ...Wait. You... you're one of us, aren't you? A werewolf?
String.Dest: ……等等，你……是我们的同类，对吧？你也是狼人？

String.Source: Since I was born. My parents were members of the pack, back when Majni's father was Alpha.
String.Dest: 自我出生以来，我父母就是这个狼群的一份子，那会儿头狼还是马吉尼的父亲。

String.Source: Then perhaps you do have business here... Forgive me. I'm Rakel, of the Frostmoon Pack. Welcome, brother.
String.Dest: 那么你在这儿确实不是外人……原谅我。我是霜月狼群的拉克尔。欢迎你，兄弟。

String.Source: I hunt soon. Go bother Majni.
String.Dest: 我要去打猎了，找马吉尼去吧。

String.Source: Majni offered to help me reclaim my territory. I hunt with him until then. After that... we'll see.
String.Dest: 马吉尼答应帮我夺回领地，那之后我就先跟着他一起狩猎。至于以后……走着瞧吧。

String.Source: I sense his favor on you. For you... I will part with them, if you can pay my price.
String.Dest: 我感觉到他对你的眷顾。是你的话……只要价钱到位，我就愿意割爱。

String.Source: For now. My pack lived in the mountains northeast of here, 'till they were wiped out. Damn werebears.
String.Dest: 现在是的。我原本属于东北边儿那个山上的狼群，后来他们被干掉了。该死的熊人。

String.Source: Welcome, brother. It's been too long since we met another who shares our blood.
String.Dest: 欢迎你，兄弟。我们很久没见过流着相同血液的人了。

String.Source: No, I'd rather be here. Free to hunt, free to live my life as I choose.
String.Dest: 不，我宁可留在这儿。自由地打猎，自由地生活。

String.Source: I hunt. He talks. Go talk to him.
String.Dest: 我负责打猎，他负责沟通。你找他谈。

String.Source: Now that's good work. Everyone will be a lot safer with them gone, Dark Elf and Nord alike.
String.Dest: 干得很好。没了他们，大家就安全多了，对暗精灵和诺德都一样。

String.Source: There is one more thing... Since the days of the Great Hunt, our pack has kept a set of rings, blessed by Lord Hircine himself.
String.Dest: 但是有一样东西……自从大狩猎以来，我们留下了一套戒指，是由海尔辛大人亲自赐福过的。

String.Source: Then perhaps you do have business here... Forgive me. I'm Rakel, of the Frostmoon Pack. Welcome, sister.
String.Dest: 那么你在这儿确实不是外人……原谅我。我是霜月狼群的拉克尔。欢迎你，姐妹。

String.Source: So it was for my father, and his father before him. And I welcome any who walk that path.
String.Dest: 我们的父辈都选择了这样的生活，也欢迎任何选择这条路的人。

String.Source: Meat. Furs. Bone. Trophies of the hunt. But those are of little use to you.
String.Dest: 肉、毛皮、骨头，都是我们狩猎的战利品。对你没什么用。

String.Source: Why? Have you seen how they live? They cower behind their walls, afraid of every ash hopper, every netch!
String.Dest: 为什么？你见过他们怎么过日子的吗？躲在墙后，无论是灰烬跳虫还是气母都能吓着他们！

String.Source: Welcome, sister. It's been too long since we met another who shares our blood.
String.Dest: 欢迎你，姐妹。我们很久没见过流着相同血液的人了。

String.Source: After they died, Majni and Akar took care of me, taught me to hunt. I'm not as good as they are, but... I do my best.
String.Dest: 他们去世后，是马吉尼和阿喀尔照顾我，教我怎么狩猎。我不像他们那么厉害，但……已经尽力了。

String.Source: Aye. The blood still runs true among some on Solstheim, as it has for centuries. We have chosen to embrace Lord Hircine's blessing.
String.Dest: 没错。几百年来这种血液依然在索瑟海姆岛上流传。我们选择拥抱海尔辛大人的赐福。

String.Source: What next? When will it stop?
String.Dest: 接下来呢？什么时候才会结束呢？

String.Source: No... I am still too weak to face him. It will take all my strength if I am to force him to hold to his bargain.
String.Dest: 不……要面对他我还太弱小了。我得耗尽我的力气才能迫使他履行承诺。

String.Source: Go. Let us mourn him in our own way.
String.Dest: 走吧。让我们以自己的方式哀悼他。

String.Source: With Miraak's corruption of the Stones... the Oneness of the land is disrupted, and our connection to the All-Maker is broken.
String.Dest: 米拉克腐化了圣石……这片土地的完整性被破坏了，连带着我们和造物主之间的纽带。

String.Source: Go and do what you must.
There is nothing else to say. I am in the All-Maker's hands now.
String.Dest: 什么都不必说了。现在是造物主掌控着我的命运。

String.Source: The Tree Stone is still corrupted... the land is still out of balance. But with the other five restored... it may be enough. It will have to be.
String.Dest: 树石依然处于腐化中……这方水土平衡还未恢复。但是其他五座圣石已经恢复了……这样应该就够了，不够也不行了。

String.Source: And now he comes again for what we have long kept from him.
String.Dest: 他现在又卷土重来了，想得到我们一直拒绝交出去的东西。

String.Source: I will strike like a hawk!
It may. It should. And I will think on what you ask of me, to decide if it is necessary, or just another of Herma-Mora's tricks.
String.Dest: 应该有用。我也会认真考虑你要我做的到底是势在必行，还是赫玛-莫拉的另一个诡计。

String.Source: Like all Daedric Princes, he's not to be trifled with. But he is subtler than most of his ilk, appropriate for the prince of knowledge and fate.
String.Dest: 他跟所有迪德拉君王一样不容小觑。但比起大多数同类们，他更狡猾诡秘，正合知识与命运之主这个头衔。

String.Source: This is all too much for me.
Come now, there is no need to hide.
There is no honor in this.
String.Dest: 这可不是什么高尚的事儿。

String.Source: I am not so old that I cannot fight!
I don't sail for free. Come back when you can actually pay me.
String.Dest: 开船要花钱的，等你出得起再来。

String.Source: Poor Storn. I can't believe it.
String.Dest: 可怜的斯托恩。我无法相信。

String.Source: The land is out of balance. Miraak's power still corrupts the sacred Stones.
String.Dest: 这片土地失去了平衡。米拉克的力量依旧腐化着圣石。

String.Source: I come home to you, All-Maker...
Hermaeus Mora... old Herma-Mora himself. So he is the source of Miraak's power. Of course.
String.Dest: 赫麦尤斯·莫拉……老赫玛-莫拉本人。原来是他赐予米拉克力量。难怪。

String.Source: So it falls to me to be the one to give up the secrets to our ancient enemy. I do not know if I have the strength to face him.
String.Dest: 看来，我就是那个向宿敌交出秘密的人。不知道我的力量是否足以面对他。

String.Source: That is our name for him - the Demon of Knowledge. He has always been our enemy.
String.Dest: 那就是我们给他的名字——知识的恶魔。他一直都是我们的敌人。

String.Source: All-Maker, guide my eyes and ears.
String.Dest: 造物主，请指引我的耳目。

String.Source: Many scholars and loremasters have been ensnared by the lure of learning the secrets that only Hermaeus Mora possesses.
String.Dest: 很多学者和博学家们都被赫麦尤斯·莫拉所引诱，去学习只有他才知晓的秘密。

String.Source: The All-Maker frowns upon such violence.
String.Dest: 造物主不赞成使用这种暴力。

String.Source: But he is subtler than most of the other Daedric Princes, as you would expect of the prince of knowledge and fate.
String.Dest: 但是他比其他的迪德拉君王更狡猾，正合你对知识与命运之主的期待。

String.Source: So it falls to me to be the one to give up the secrets to our ancient enemy. I do not know if I have the strength to face him.
String.Dest: 看来，我就是那个向宿敌交出秘密的人。不知道我的力量是否足以面对他。

String.Source: How long do you think you can hide?
Why would you do such a thing?
You seem to have escaped the fate of many who find themselves ensnared forever by the lure of his secrets. Or... perhaps not.
String.Dest: 看来你逃脱了那个命运，很多人被他的秘密所诱惑而永远地掉入了陷阱。或者……你还没有逃脱。

String.Source: I doubt that was truly necessary.
But don't worry. I have no intention of joining them in their endless search through the infinite halls of Apocrypha.
String.Dest: 但别担心。我没想过要加入他们的行列，一直在异典无尽的大厅里获取知识。

String.Source: Have you? The actual Oghma Infinium? That's... I've searched for it myself for many years without success...
String.Dest: 是吗？真正的无限智典？那是……我花了很多年来找它，却一筹莫展……

String.Source: The very fact that the Skaal have kept knowledge from him has merely increased his desire to have it.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人决不对他公开秘密，这只会加深他的掠夺欲望。

String.Source: We know him as Herma-Mora, the Demon of Knowledge. It is in his nature to hoard secrets to himself. Their value to him is of no consequence.
String.Dest: 我们称他为赫玛-莫拉，知识的恶魔。他的天性就是聚藏秘密，秘密的价值对他来说无关紧要。

String.Source: What have you brought into our village?
String.Dest: 你把什么带到我们村来了？

String.Source: We have many tales of Herma-Mora trying to trick us into giving up our secrets to him.
String.Dest: 我们中流传着很多关于传说，述说着赫玛-莫拉如何欺骗我们放弃坚守秘密。

String.Source: Back to where you came from!
Yes. The Skaal also tell of the day when we must finally give up our secrets. When Herma-Mora finally wins.
String.Dest: 对，斯卡尔人也曾提及我们终有放弃保守秘密的一天，也就是赫麦尤斯·莫拉获胜的那天。

String.Source: You must cleanse the other Stones so that I can draw power from the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 你得先净化其他的圣石，这样我才能得到造物主的力量。

String.Source: If you have to ask that, you'd probably be best leaving his books to wiser heads than yours.
String.Dest: 如果这都要问我，你可能最好还是把他的书留给其他更聪明的人。

String.Source: Come back when you actually have the gold.
I was a fool to trust you!
You have left me no choice.
By the gods... I can't believe...
Hold, traveler. You have no business here.
String.Dest: 站住，旅行者。这儿没你的事。
