String.Source: I've learned so much since then.
String.Dest: 从那以后我学到了很多。

String.Source: I've got another letter from Ralis, but this is the last thing I'm delivering for him. That place is just too much for me.
String.Dest: 我这里又有拉里斯的信，这是我最后一次送他的信了，那地方太恐怖了。

String.Source: Amazing to think that they built this so long ago, and it still survives.
String.Dest: 一想到他们建了如此之久的地方竟然还能运作，就觉得太神奇了。

String.Source: If you have released the Wind Stone and broken the hold on my people, perhaps you can do the same for the rest of Solstheim.
String.Dest: 如果你能解放风石，打破我族人所受的束缚，那么也许同样能为索瑟海姆岛上其它圣石这么做。

String.Source: A priest in their order, highly esteemed and very powerful.
String.Dest: 他是拜龙教里的祭司，备受尊敬且实力强大。

String.Source: That's correct. I'm glad to see someone else has been paying attention.
String.Dest: 没错。很高兴终于有人专心听我讲了。

String.Source: Who else do you think could create a staff enchanter?
String.Dest: 除了我之外还有谁能发明法杖附魔台？

String.Source: It's Telvanni magic at its best. He brought the cuttings with him from Morrowind and used sorcery to grow them.
String.Dest: 这是泰瓦尼家最高阶的法术。他带着晨风的插枝来这儿，用法术把它们种上了。

String.Source: Well, what are you waiting for? Go ahead and open it.
String.Dest: 所以呢，你在等什么？去打开啊？

String.Source: I am his mycologist. He may have grown Tel Mithryn by himself, but I nurture it.
String.Dest: 我是他的真菌学者。虽然是他种植了泰尔·米斯瑞恩，但养育陪护的人是我。

String.Source: Miraak had this? This does not look like something of the Dragon cult.
String.Dest: 米拉克的东西？这看来不像是拜龙教的。

String.Source: Winterhold? That small college that is falling into the Sea of Ghosts?
String.Dest: 冬堡？那快要掉进幽灵之海的小学院？

String.Source: Everyone has heard of the master wizards of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 晨风法师大族名加海内。

String.Source: Another letter from Ralis. He's starting to scare me a little.
String.Dest: 又是拉里斯的信，他开始让我觉得害怕了。

String.Source: The Skaal have always avoided ruins such as these. Nothing of the All-Maker is to be found within.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人一直以来都会避开这种废墟。里面完全找不到造物主的创造。

String.Source: Of course he does have a knack for wards that would be handy to learn.
String.Dest: 当然，他确实摸到了个简单易学的结界术窍门。

String.Source: I am likely the greatest wizard you will ever meet.
String.Dest: 我应该是你见过的最强的法师。

String.Source: Got this from a pretty excited looking dark elf around Raven Rock. He said it was important I got it to you as soon as I could.
String.Dest: 鸦石镇有个很兴奋的暗精灵给了我这封信，说很重要，让我赶紧拿给你。

String.Source: Talvas should finish his apprenticeship in a couple of decades. Come see me then. I think I could teach you a trick or two.
String.Dest: 塔瓦斯应该还有几十年就学完了。那时候再来找我，可能会教你几招。

String.Source: I don't recall inviting you into my tower. I do hope you make this worth my while.
String.Dest: 我不记得邀请过你来我的塔。希望别浪费我的时间。

String.Source: You have no business with our pack. Begone.
String.Dest: 我们狼群不欢迎你。滚开。

String.Source: No, no, I couldn't. ...You open it.
String.Dest: 不，不行。我不去……你打开吧。

String.Source: I doubt it will fully stop whatever Miraak is doing, but it may slow his progress.
String.Dest: 可能我们不能完全阻止米拉克的行动，但至少能拖延他的进程。

String.Source: Savros? Ha! He wouldn't be fit to be my apprentice.
String.Dest: 萨沃斯？哈！他连当我的学徒都不配。

String.Source: We mean you no harm, but... be on your way.
String.Dest: 我们无意伤害你，但是……快走吧。

String.Source: Me? No. That's Master Neloth's doing. I wasn't even born then.
String.Dest: 我？不是。这是内洛斯大师种的。我那会儿都还没出生呢。

String.Source: It would be madness to go through there.
I can't believe it. We... we actually found it!
String.Dest: 不敢相信。我们……我们真的找到了！

String.Source: We are one of the great houses that rule Morrowind.
String.Dest: 我们是统治晨风的大家族之一。

String.Source: My word is as true as fate, as inevitable as destiny. Bring me what I want, and I will give you what you seek.
String.Dest: 我所言就如命运一般真实，如天数一样必然。把我要的带来，我就给你在寻找的东西。

String.Source: Now we will see if he knows what he is talking about.
String.Dest: 现在来看看他是不是真的知道自己在说什么。

String.Source: Maybe... we should think about this some more.
String.Dest: 可能……我们得再考虑一下。

String.Source: The dwarves must have feared this book to lock it away like this.
String.Dest: 矮人们一定很惧怕这本书，就把它这样封起来了。

String.Source: You should leave slogging around in the muck to us youngsters.
String.Dest: 在脏水里的活儿交给我们年轻人吧。

String.Source: You're the one that recovered the Staff of Magnus. Impressive.
String.Dest: 原来玛格努斯之杖是你找回来的，干得漂亮。

String.Source: So, we only need one more of these... cubes?
String.Dest: 那么，我们现在只差……一个方典了？

String.Source: Finally. We will not have to listen to his complaining.
String.Dest: 结束了。我们不用再听他抱怨了。

String.Source: If you make yourself useful around here, I might just let you use it.
String.Dest: 你要是能在这儿帮忙，也许我会让你使用它。

String.Source: Mushrooms and fungi are my life's work. When I saw Tel Mithryn I knew I had to be here.
String.Dest: 研究菌类是我一生的志向。当看到泰尔·米斯瑞恩时，我就知道要留下来。

String.Source: Another note from your friend Ralis. I hope everything is all right.
String.Dest: 又是你的朋友拉里斯的信，希望没出什么事。

String.Source: If you see him, let him know that I might be willing to take him on as my apprentice. For a price of course.
String.Dest: 你要是看见他，告诉他我也许会同意收他为徒。当然是有代价的。

String.Source: You again. Didn't I see you in Raven Rock?
String.Dest: 又是你。我们不是在鸦石镇见过了吗？

String.Source: Have you taken leave of your senses?
Perhaps these will prove useful to you. These herbs are unique to the island, and their like cannot be found elsewhere.
String.Dest: 也许这些会对你有用。这些草药是岛上的特产，其他任何地方都找不到类似的。

String.Source: I'll scatter your ashes to the wind!
Another victory for the Redoran Guard.
String.Dest: 瑞多然卫兵的又一次胜利。

String.Source: Ugh, I can't believe I was forced to do manual labor at those shrines. It was horrifying...
String.Dest: 呃，不敢相信我被迫成了修这些祭坛的苦力。太恐怖了……

String.Source: Defeating Miraak was an impressive feat. I'm curious to see if Hermaeus Mora seeks you out because of it.
String.Dest: 击败米拉克是个令人敬佩的功绩。我好奇赫麦尤斯·莫拉会不会因此找上你。

String.Source: I probably have some potions around here that might interest you.
String.Dest: 我还有几瓶药水，你可能会感兴趣。

String.Source: I can't believe that I was building that shrine at night... I never knew.
String.Dest: 难以置信我会在夜里去盖那座祭坛……从来不知道这回事。

String.Source: That fetcher... making us build his shrines. If I could only get my hands on him...
String.Dest: 那个费彻……居然让我们修他的祭坛。要是让我逮到了……

String.Source: You'll regret raising a weapon against me!
Time to teach this whelp a lesson!

String.Dest: 为了瑞多然家！为了荣耀！

String.Source: I bring the might of House Redoran upon your head!
String.Dest: 以瑞多然家的力量给你压扁！
为了瑞多然家！为了荣耀！

String.Source: One day I'll inherit his power. It will all be mine. Mark my words.
String.Dest: 有朝一日我会继承他的力量。全部都会是我的，记住我的话。

String.Source: Mostly things from the village or the land around it. Have a look.
String.Dest: 大都是村子或者周边土地出产的，看一看吧。

String.Source: Nikulas is all that I have left in this world. I know it is selfish of me to say so, but I cannot lose him. Not while I still grieve.
String.Dest: 我在这世上只有尼库拉斯了。我知道这么说很自私，但是我不能没有他。至少在这悲痛时刻。

String.Source: I've heard of stealing things from people, but never thought you could steal someone's mind.
String.Dest: 只听过偷东西的，没想过你还能偷别人的心智。

String.Source: Hail, sister! I am Rakel, of the Frostmoon Pack.
String.Dest: 你好啊，姐妹。我是霜月狼群的拉克尔。

String.Source: May the All-Maker bless you with many sons and daughters, outsider. Once again you have shown that you are a true friend of the Skaal.
String.Dest: 愿造物主保佑你儿孙满堂，外来者。你再一次证明了自己是斯卡尔真正的朋友。

String.Source: It's good to have everyone not running off to that damn sacred stone every night. I suppose I have you to thank for that.
String.Dest: 大家每晚上不用去那该死的圣石真是太好了。我想是该感谢你。

String.Source: Perhaps someday I will have to, but for now I need Nikulas here. You see, his father, my husband, was recently lost to us.
String.Dest: 可能将来某天我必须放手，但是现在我需要尼库拉斯留在这儿。你看，他父亲，也就是我丈夫最近才离我们而去了。

String.Source: I'd been waking every morning with my hands scrapped and raw and now I know why. I appreciate what you've done for me.
String.Dest: 现在我终于知道，为什么以前每个早上起来手上茧子都磨破了。感谢你为我做的一切。

String.Source: I may not be able to see you, but I can hear you.
String.Dest: 我可能没看见，但听到动静了。

String.Source: I've got the best selection of mushroom and fungi.
String.Dest: 我这儿有上好的伞菌和真菌。

String.Source: Not very sporting of you to do that.
How dare you invade our territory!
String.Dest: 你竟敢入侵我们的领地！

String.Source: Mogrul says pay up. We figure we can just take it off your corpse.
String.Dest: 莫古尔叫你还钱。我们寻思还是从你尸体上拿吧。

String.Source: Among other things, I have some fresh bread I baked this morning and vegetables from Finna's garden.
String.Dest: 除此之外，我还有今早刚出炉的面包和芬娜花园里的蔬菜。

String.Source: You'll pay dearly for what you've done.
Also, I know his heart. Nikulas is reckless and foolish, like most young men. He cannot understand what awaits him in the wide world.
String.Dest: 而且，我懂他的心性。尼库拉斯跟所有年轻人一样莽撞而愚笨。他不知道外面的世界有什么在等着他。

String.Source: You are welcome among us, so long as you mean no harm.
String.Dest: 欢迎加入我们，只要别伤人就行。

String.Source: No Ash Guardian. Maybe the book has something.
String.Dest: 灰烬守卫没出来。可能这本书有问题。

String.Source: Well, then, I'm going to head back and get myself a drink. Maybe I'll see you soon.
String.Dest: 好吧，那我先回去喝一杯了。下次再见。

String.Source: I'll stain the ash with your blood!
That noise... I'm not alone here.
I join you in death, father...
I'll cut you in two, fetcher!
String.Dest: 我会把你切成两半儿，费彻！

String.Source: I wish that I could give you a reward that is equal to the joy in my heart, but I don't have much to offer one who has so much already.
String.Dest: 我希望能给你与我心中快乐同等的回报，但你已有太多，我没什么好东西给你了。

String.Source: I'll not fall to the likes of you!
I'll stay my weapon... for now.
You'll regret what you've done, murderer!
The voices in my head are gone now thanks to you. Now I can finally get some rest.
String.Dest: 多亏了你，脑子里的声音终于没了。现在终于能放松下。

String.Source: Being freed from building the shrine... I don't even know how to begin to thank you.
String.Dest: 你解救了我，让我免于建造那个祭坛……不知道该怎么感谢你。

String.Source: You can play this game as long as you like... I will find you.
String.Dest: 你想玩捉迷藏就继续…我会找到你的。

String.Source: Just let me know what needs doing.
String.Dest: 需要什么跟我说就是了。

String.Source: Just thinking that some madman was inside my mind. Gives me shivers just thinking about it.
String.Dest: 只是觉得我脑子里有个疯子，一想到这儿就毛骨悚然。

String.Source: Hail, brother! I am Rakel, of the Frostmoon Pack.
String.Dest: 你好啊，兄弟。我是霜月狼群的拉克尔。

String.Source: What was it you needed, again?
String.Dest: 你刚才说要什么，再说下？

String.Source: Every type of fungus in Solstheim or Skyrim. Oh, and a few other ingredients and potions.
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆和天际的菌类我这儿都有。哦，还有一些其它的材料和药水。

String.Source: My son and I gather items to trade with travelers who visit the village.
String.Dest: 我跟我儿子采集东西来和村里的访客做交易。

String.Source: I gathered some plants that are useful for making potions, but I have other goods as well.
String.Dest: 我采集了一些用来制作药水的植物，但我也有些其他商品。

String.Source: Your remains will be hung from the Bulwark!
String.Dest: 你的尸体会挂在防护堤上！

String.Source: Enough hiding. Come out and face me.
Maybe we should come back with more men. We don't know how many of those things will come out.
String.Dest: 也许我们该多带些人回来。谁知道这些玩意儿会跑出来多少。

String.Source: Miraak? The one all the townsfolk are always chanting about?
String.Dest: 米拉克？就是那个村民们一直在聊的人？

String.Source: Well, I knew something connected with Hermaeus Mora was spreading its influence across the island.
String.Dest: 嗯，我了解到与赫麦尤斯·莫拉有关的某物正在这岛上扩展其影响力。

String.Source: The stories say he sought to claim Solstheim for himself, and the dragons destroyed him for it.
String.Dest: 传说中他谋划过夺取索瑟海姆，而龙族为此摧毁了他。

String.Source: Now I just have to figure how to get this thing started...
String.Dest: 我现在只需要想办法启动这东西……

String.Source: But his path seems to have been a cruel one.
String.Dest: 但看起来他选了一条残酷的路。

String.Source: He served the dragons before their fall from power, as most did. A priest in their order.
String.Dest: 和大多数人一样，在龙族失势之前他也服务它们。他曾是拜龙教的祭司。

String.Source: That would be a shame. You were an interesting exception to the otherwise universal phenomenon.
String.Dest: 那就太可惜了，你原本是这种普遍现象中的特例。

String.Source: Talk to Captain Gjalund if you're looking to book passage.
String.Dest: 想搭船就找加朗德船长聊聊。

String.Source: I would not advise touching the stone again. The effects of repeated contact could be...
String.Dest: 我建议你别再去碰那石头了，跟它连续接触会造成……

String.Source: You've never heard of the great houses of Morrowind?
String.Dest: 你没听说过晨风的大家族吗？

String.Source: We try to serve the All-Maker, to live in balance with nature, instead of exploiting it as others would.
String.Dest: 我们努力侍奉着造物主，与自然和谐相处，而不是像其他人那样压榨自然。

String.Source: Well, I'll be. That's the one.
House Telvanni is the house of the master wizard, one of the ruling houses of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 泰瓦尼家是个法师大族，也是晨风的统治家族之一。

String.Source: Hmm. It appears that you were not as unusual after all.
String.Dest: 嗯。看来你并没有那么特别。

String.Source: Captain Gjalund does the business around here... I'm just a ship's mate.
String.Dest: 生意归加朗德船长谈……我就是个船夫。

String.Source: What tortures did they suffer at Miraak's hands? Was it in service to the dragons, or for his own purposes?
String.Dest: 米拉克为何要折磨他们？为了侍奉龙族，还是他自己的某些目的？

String.Source: Fascinating. By touching the stone, you appear to have fallen under whatever influence is affecting the others.
String.Dest: 太神奇了。摸了那石头后，你好像和其他人一样陷入了某种影响之下。

String.Source: Well, at least if the other Nord returns, they'll take care of him.
String.Dest: 好吧，至少另一个诺德人要是回来了，也会被灰烬怪解决的。

String.Source: Bring that cube. We'll need it.
String.Dest: 把方典带上。我们还用得着。

String.Source: What could you know of them?
Is this somehow connected to your search for Miraak?
String.Dest: 这本和你要找的米拉克有什么关系吗？

String.Source: Do you think he's the one we left in the tunnel?
String.Dest: 你觉得他就是我们丢在地道里的人吗？

String.Source: The Northern Maiden is ship-shape and ready to go.
String.Dest: 北方少女号准备起航了。

String.Source: Ah, so you appear able to resist the effect by exerting your will. Fascinating!
String.Dest: 啊，看来你能够运用意志来抵抗这种影响。有意思！

String.Source: But unlike most, he turned against them. He made his own path, and his actions cost him dearly.
String.Dest: 但与众不同的是，他转而与龙族为敌，选了一条自己的路，这个选择让他付出了沉重的代价。

String.Source: Ha ha ha! No more! What a fool.
String.Dest: 哈哈哈！我快不行了！真是个傻子！

String.Source: We have lived on Solstheim for many generations. Our people are tied to the land itself.
String.Dest: 我们在索瑟海姆上生活了很多代了。族人们和这方水土紧密相连。

String.Source: Let us hope that is the last of these traps.
String.Dest: 希望后面没有这种陷阱了

String.Source: Nonsense. A few Dwemer Spiders will pop out, we kill them, and the Treasure of Kagrumez will be ours!
String.Dest: 胡说八道。最多跳出来几只锻莫蜘蛛，干掉它们后，卡格鲁梅兹的财宝就是我们的了！

String.Source: His story is as old as Solstheim itself.
String.Dest: 他的故事和索瑟海姆一样古老。

String.Source: Listen to this one! "My nights have been impossible to bear without you."
String.Dest: 听听这个！“没有你，我无法忍受夜晚。”

String.Source: I wasn't sure that it was in fact the same entity as this legendary namesake of the central temple. Although the villagers seem quite convinced.
String.Dest: 但我不确定那个实体是否就是与这中央神殿同名的传说人物。虽然那些村民们对此深信不疑。

String.Source: If you're looking for passage, talk to Captain Gjalund.
String.Dest: 你要搭船的话，找加朗德船长吧。

String.Source: Master Neloth is one of the oldest and most respected members of House Telvanni.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师是泰瓦尼家族最德高望重的长者之一。

String.Source: Unless of course you'd like to contribute to my investigation. It could be very enlightening to observe you.
String.Dest: 除非你愿意协助我调查，观察你应该能得到很多灵感。

String.Source: But if you draw on me, the guards will put the bounty on your head, not mine.
String.Dest: 但你要是敢冲我拔刀，卫兵们悬赏的人会是你，不是我。

String.Source: It represents one of the aspects of nature, a part of the All-Maker's creation.
String.Dest: 它代表着自然的一个方面，造物主创造的一部分。

String.Source: Who cares? Nords all look the same to me.
String.Dest: 谁管他啊？我看诺德人都一个样儿。

String.Source: Can you hear me? Do you have any free will left, or are you completely under this outside influence like the others?
String.Dest: 听得到吗？你还有自我意识吗，还是和别人一样完全被这种外来影响控制了？

String.Source: I suppose that depends. Are you willing to be an experimental subject?
String.Dest: 看情况吧。你准备好当我的实验品了吗？

String.Source: Miraak was trying to take power here, and protect himself in the process.
String.Dest: 米拉克尝试在这里获得力量，以及保护自己。

String.Source: I wonder how long this effect will last. Perhaps it is permanent as with the others.
String.Dest: 我好奇这种影响会持续多久。可能和别人一样是永久的。

String.Source: If you say so. That old crackpot made the trials sound a lot harder than that.
String.Dest: 你说了算。照那个老疯子说的，这试炼应该没这么简单。

String.Source: I saw the Fadrin brothers bobbing around in there this morning, so that makes three.
String.Dest: 我看到法德林兄弟早上在这儿，所以有三个了。

String.Source: Come on. Let's see what you've got.
String.Dest: 来啊，让我看看你有啥本事。

String.Source: Yes. I haven't been idle while this fascinating madness engulfed Solstheim.
String.Dest: 对啊。当索瑟海姆陷入这神奇的狂热时，我可没闲着。
谢尔格拉的疯狂要弄死你！

String.Source: It may be time to replace him with a more loyal servant. One who still appreciates the gifts that I have to offer.
String.Dest: 可能已经该用一个更忠诚的仆人来取代他了，一个懂得感恩我的赐予的人。

String.Source: I know. The Skaal will not forget this. Storn's death will become another of the many tales of Herma-Mora's treachery.
String.Dest: 我知道。斯卡尔人不会忘记这点。斯托恩的死将成为众多与赫麦尤斯·莫拉诡计相关的传说之一。

String.Source: It's a death pit, I tell you.
As I told you when I gave you the Oghma Infinium, your free will is an illusion. Why else would you be here?
String.Dest: 赐予你无限智典时我就说过，你的自由意志不过是虚妄，要不然为什么你会在这里？

String.Source: The best swordsman in all Morrowind is at your service... for the right price.
String.Dest: 晨风最强的剑客，愿为你效劳……只要钱到位了。

String.Source: Then... it was the All-Maker's will, as he said. I know I should not doubt it. But it is good to hear, all the same. Thank you.
String.Dest: 那么……那就是造物主的旨意，和他说过的一样。我明白不该对此产生怀疑。但还是很高兴听到你这么说。谢谢你。

String.Source: And now we're stuck out here listening to it all day and night.
String.Dest: 我们现在被困在这儿夜以继日地听着。
他们……他们不停地冲过来。

String.Source: I was enjoying our travels together before we parted company. I'd be happy to rejoin you for no charge... if you're interested.
String.Dest: 我还挺享受我们分道扬镳前的旅途。我很乐意免费加入你的队伍……如果你有兴趣的话。

String.Source: You're going to pay for this.
Yes, his "help" which did not require him to kill my father. Such is the way of Herma-Mora, the eternal enemy of the Skaal.
String.Dest: 是啊，他的“帮助”并没有规定要杀了我的父亲。这就是赫麦尤斯·莫拉的本性，斯卡尔人的宿敌。

String.Source: That the barrier is still there is a good sign.
String.Dest: 屏障还在，这是个好迹象。

String.Source: You see that green light? That comes from the Wind Stone, where my people work against their will.
String.Dest: 看见那道绿光了吗？是从风石来的，我的族人们被迫在那里做苦工。

String.Source: No, what you're looking for is a specific book. Presumably because Miraak's power derives from it.
String.Dest: 不，你要找的是其中特定的一本，大概是因为米拉克的力量源于此书。

String.Source: Oh yes. They're not hard to locate once you know how to look for them. I have one here that I've been using to locate more.
String.Dest: 不错。当你知道怎么确定它们的位置后，就不难找了。我这儿就有一本，一直用来定位其它的书。

String.Source: Herma-Mora forced you to serve him in order to defeat Miraak. Do not let him lure you further down that path.
String.Dest: 赫玛-莫拉迫使你为他服务，来击败米拉克。不要被他诱惑到歧路了。

String.Source: You can't make me go back in there.
String.Dest: 你不能逼我回那里面去。

String.Source: Bradyn and Mireli... I hope they're all right.
String.Dest: 布莱汀和米瑞莉……希望他们没事。

String.Source: Unless you have enough coin on you, I'm not going anywhere.
String.Dest: 除非你钱带够了，不然我哪儿也不去。

String.Source: But I do know where to find a Black Book that can help you.
String.Dest: 不过我知道你要找的黑暗经书在哪儿。

String.Source: Don't waste your time with me.
An Amulet of Mara? I haven't seen such a thing in a very long time.
String.Dest: 玛拉护符？我已经很久没见过这东西了。

String.Source: I can't take this much longer.
Oh, it clearly is not associated with the same power that has overtaken the island.
String.Dest: 哦，因为它和控制了这座岛的力量一点关系都没有。

String.Source: Teldryn Sero, blade for hire. If you have the coin, I'm at your service.
String.Dest: 我叫泰卓因·赛罗，是个佣兵。只要你有钱，我就为你效劳。

String.Source: Looks like you've already have someone with you. If you want me to come along, you'll have to ask them to leave.
String.Dest: 看来你已经有同伴了。如果要我同行的话，你得先请他们离开。

String.Source: Thank you. Whatever your other reasons for acting, you have done the Skaal a great service. We will not forget what you've done.
String.Dest: 谢谢你。无论你还出于什么原因，都帮了斯卡尔人一个大忙。我们永远不会忘记你的功绩。

String.Source: You thought to reject me, and yet here you are. Your journey towards enlightenment has led you to my realm, as I knew it would.
String.Dest: 你本想拒绝我，然而却来到这里。你的启蒙之路把你带到了我的领域，我早知会如此。

String.Source: My son's heart is restless. He wants to see the world beyond our lands, and nothing I say will change his mind.
String.Dest: 我儿子一直想着离开这里。他想去看看这片土地之外的世界，无论我怎么劝他都改变不了他的心意。

String.Source: I'll send your soul as a gift to Boethiah.
String.Dest: 我会把你的灵魂献给波耶西亚。

String.Source: The village is just ahead. Storn has used his magic to raise a barrier around it, protecting the few of us left.
String.Dest: 村子就在前面了。斯托恩用他的魔法围绕它构筑了一道屏障，保护我们剩下的几个人。

String.Source: His desire to return to your world will spread my influence more widely. But it will also set him free from my direct control.
String.Dest: 让他返回你们的世界的确会让我的影响变得更广，但也会让我失去对他的直接控制。

String.Source: My mother was Skaal, but she left the village and I was born in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 我母亲曾是个斯卡尔人，但她离开了村子，在天际生下了我。

String.Source: But my book isn't what you're looking for. I'm quite sure it is unconnected with this Miraak.
String.Dest: 但我这本不是你要找的。我很确信它和米拉克一点关系都没有。

String.Source: It looks like you already have someone with you. If you want me to join, you'll have to part ways with them first.
String.Dest: 看来你已经有同伴了。要我加入的话，你得先和他们分开。

String.Source: Did you hear that? Sounds like those Ash Spawn are back.
String.Dest: 听到了吗？好像灰烬怪又回来了。

String.Source: Soon they will finish building my temple, and I can return home.
String.Dest: 他们很快会建完我的神殿，那时我就能回去了。

String.Source: Frea! I had worried I would not see you again.
String.Dest: 芙瑞雅！我都怕再也见不到你了。

String.Source: I'd rather be stuck out here than floating in there.
String.Dest: 我宁可困在这儿，也不想在里面当漂尸。

String.Source: Does that mean... is it over? Is Miraak defeated?
String.Dest: 这意味着……结束了吗？米拉克被击败了？
就让拉里斯伤脑筋去吧。

String.Source: And I'm not talking about Hermaeus Mora. These Black Books are all his, of course.
String.Dest: 我说的不是赫麦尤斯·莫拉啊。当然。黑暗经书全是他的。

String.Source: It's been a while, outlander. Looking to unleash some havoc across Tamriel again?
String.Dest: 好久不见了，外地人。想在泰姆瑞尔大闹一番了吗？

String.Source: I think you may have wasted your money, friend.
String.Dest: 你的钱可能都被浪费了，朋友。
让我去就是了，你这娘们儿！

String.Source: "I beg of you: Please depart that blasted isle and return to Solitude at once!"
String.Dest: “我求你了，赶快离开那该死的小岛，赶快回独孤城来！”

String.Source: If they couldn't hold off the draugr, who can?
String.Dest: 如果他们都抵挡不了尸鬼，谁还可以？

String.Source: Then my father's sacrifice... it was not in vain. He died to free us.
String.Dest: 那么我父亲的牺牲……并没有白费。他是为了解放我们而死。

String.Source: Talk to Ralis about this mess.
String.Dest: 去跟拉里斯谈谈这一团糟。

String.Source: If General Carius is still alive, there must be something keeping him that way.
String.Dest: 要是卡里乌斯将军还活着，一定有什么东西维持了他的这种状态。

String.Source: I've got swords, spells and a few other tricks up my sleeve. You'll find I'm full of surprises.
String.Dest: 我会剑术，法术还有些其他的把戏。你会发现我是个充满惊喜的人。

String.Source: Sheogorath's beard, you're an ugly one.
String.Dest: 谢尔格拉的胡子啊，你真他妈丑。

String.Source: It was Miraak who threatened Solstheim. With him gone, Herma-Mora has been foiled once again.
String.Dest: 威胁索瑟海姆的人是米拉克。少了他，赫麦尤斯·莫拉的诡计就再一次被挫败了。

String.Source: Tell me, though... my father's death... was it necessary? Was there no other way to destroy Miraak?
String.Dest: 告诉我……我父亲的死……是必要的吗？要击败米拉克就没有别的方法了吗？

String.Source: I'm going to put you down.
I cannot deny it. You remind me of all the things I miss about Skyrim, and my heart beats a little quicker when you are near. Do you feel the same?
String.Dest: 我得承认，你让我想起来天际的好，我靠近你的时候连心跳都会加速。你也一样吗？

String.Source: He has served me long and well. But he grows restless under my guidance.
String.Dest: 他尽心侍奉我很久了。但在我的指导下他逐渐变得焦躁不安。

String.Source: Tell me... was it the only way? Did he need to die?
String.Dest: 告诉我……那是唯一的方法吗？他必须去死吗？

String.Source: Don't pass up on this opportunity, outlander. I'm worth every coin.
String.Dest: 别错过这次机会啊，外地人。一分钱一分货。

String.Source: I can feel it. The Tree Stone is free again. The Oneness of the land is restored.
String.Dest: 我感觉得到，树石重获自由了。这片土地的整体性恢复了。

String.Source: Hold still. Let me get a good look at you.
The Pale reminds me of the northern part of Solstheim... rife with freezing cold weather and full of unfriendly creatures.
String.Dest: 苍原让我想到了索瑟海姆的北部……天气寒冷且到处都是有敌意的生物。

String.Source: I never fancied becoming a miner... didn't want to spend the rest of my days cracking rocks.
String.Dest: 我从没想过当个矿工……我不想把一辈子花在敲打石头上。

String.Source: If you could... somehow... get up there and grab a bottle, I'd be a long way towards forgetting how miserable it is down here.
String.Dest: 如果你能……不管怎样……上去拿一瓶下来，我很快就会忘记这下面有多惨。

String.Source: I'm glad that I'm finally traveling with someone who seems competent. My last patron was killed trying to tackle an entire fort of bandits alone.
String.Dest: 很高兴终于能和一个过得去的人旅行，上个雇主死于坚持要单挑一整座堡垒的强盗。

String.Source: Well, that is what you hero types do, isn't it? I wasn't expecting anything less.
String.Dest: 嗯，那不正是你们这种英雄的活儿吗？都在我意料之中。

String.Source: Damn bandits are worse than the vermin that infest the ash wastes back home.
String.Dest: 该死的强盗简直比老家那些灰烬里肆虐的害虫还可恶。

String.Source: You may want to be careful down here... the Thieves Guild makes the Ratway it's home.
String.Dest: 你在这下面最好小心点儿……盗贼公会的大本营就在鼠道里。

String.Source: There are restless dead about... I suggest we proceed with caution.
String.Dest: 附近有未安息的亡灵……我建议谨慎行事。

String.Source: Vampires are wretched beings. Feeding off of others the way they do... it's disgusting.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼都该死。他们以别人的血液为生……太恶心了。

String.Source: Incipient madness. Loss of self-awareness. Black spots in the whites of the eyes.
String.Dest: 初步的精神失常，自我意识流失。眼白上出现了黑斑。

String.Source: If there's one thing I can't stand, it's shoddy construction. Glad to not be working on that... thing any more.
String.Dest: 我最忍受不了的就是破烂的建筑。总算不用再建造那……东西了。

String.Source: You like my chitin armor? It was specially crafted for me by Grendis Rolovo... one of the finest master armorsmiths in Morrowind.
String.Dest: 你喜欢我的甲壳护甲吗？是格兰蒂斯·若洛夫专门帮我打造的……他是晨风最好的护甲锻造师之一。

String.Source: This was a foolish mistake, outsider.
String.Dest: 这是个愚蠢的错误，外来者。

String.Source: While you are not of the Skaal, you are Skaal-friend, and so I give you this warning.
String.Dest: 虽然你不是斯卡尔人，但也是斯卡尔之友，所以我还是要劝告你一二。

String.Source: Can you imagine what Markarth must have looked like when the dwarves were living here? I can't even begin to imagine.
String.Dest: 你能想象矮人们还在时的马卡斯是什么样吗？我是想不出来。
追随造物主吧，斯卡尔之友。

String.Source: Although... from all indications he could have proved a serious nuisance. So, yes, I am grateful that you dealt with him.
String.Dest: 但是……据种种线索来看，他可能会是个严重的麻烦。那么，好吧，我感激你除掉了他。

String.Source: I still cannot believe that Storn is gone.
String.Dest: 我还是不敢相信斯托恩去世了。

String.Source: I lived in the Gray Quarter of Windhelm for years... it's a wretched place full of bitter Dunmer. Let's be done here quickly.
String.Dest: 我在风舵城的灰民区住过一段时间……那里有很多愤恨不平的丹莫，是个可悲之地。我们完事儿了就赶紧走吧。

String.Source: All this walking... I wish there was a silt strider around here.
String.Dest: 走了这么久……真希望这附近有泥沙漫步者。

String.Source: Cleaning out the forge was the easy part. But those blasted rieklings made off with most of my materials.
String.Dest: 清理锻炉是最容易的部分，但是那些该死的瑞克灵把我大多数的材料都顺走了。

String.Source: I hope we don't bump into any Forsworn around here. I heard they're as wild as a pack of beasts.
String.Dest: 希望我们不会在这儿遇到弃誓者。听说他们和野兽没什么两样。

String.Source: I understand. Walk with the All-Maker, Dragonborn.
String.Dest: 我明白。愿你追随造物主之道，龙裔。

String.Source: Dawnstar is full of struggling miners. Sounds a lot like a certain town in Solstheim, eh?
String.Dest: 晨星城满是些在生死线上挣扎的矿工。听上去就像索瑟海姆的某个镇子，是吧？

String.Source: What would possess someone to give their allegiance to Hircine, only to see their free will taken from them like this?
String.Dest: 是什么让一个人效忠海尔辛，只为了看着自由意志像这样被剥夺？

String.Source: Careful, it looks like something's lived here recently.
String.Dest: 注意，这儿最近好像有什么生物住过。

String.Source: Oh, perfect. Just the right ripeness, too. Good work, friend.
String.Dest: 哦，太好了。熟度也恰到好处。干得好，朋友。

String.Source: Despite the foul beings that infest this place, I'm certain we'll find plenty of wealth to make it worth our time.
String.Dest: 尽管这地方被些恶心玩意儿污染了，我很确定能找到大笔财富，绝不会浪费我们的时间。

String.Source: I was briefly in the employ of an orc warrior once. I had to quit because he refused to bathe. Disgusting.
String.Dest: 我曾有小段时间给一个兽人战士干活。因为他不洗澡，我就辞职了。真恶心。

String.Source: Oh, that's the stuff all right. You're a good friend to Thirsk, and to me. I thank you.
String.Dest: 哦，就是这个。你是瑟斯科还有我的好朋友。谢了。

String.Source: Miraak's influence has vanished from Solstheim. So I assumed you had handled things. Why, did something interesting happen?
String.Dest: 米拉克的影响已经从索瑟海姆消失了，想必是你处理的吧。发生了什么有趣的事情？

String.Source: Oh, I'm sure it will be. Give them here, and I'll get to work soon!
String.Dest: 哦，肯定够了。放这儿吧，我要开工了！

String.Source: Well, the easy answer, of course. Mead!
String.Dest: 嗯，很简单，当然是蜜酒了！

String.Source: You tend to wander around, don't you? If you come across any stalhrim or ebony in your travels, bring them back to old Halbarn. Help each other out.
String.Dest: 你正要去周围转转，是吧？要是你在旅途中遇到了魔冰或者黑檀，就把他们带给老哈尔巴恩。就当是助人为乐吧。

String.Source: You ever tried hunting with no sleep under you? It wasn't pretty. Now I can rest properly, it should all be going better.
String.Dest: 试过在失眠时打猎吗？那可不太好过。现在我可以睡个好觉了。一切也会好转。

String.Source: You come back if you ever want some fancier armor yourself, now.
String.Dest: 如果你想要更漂亮的护甲，随时来找我。

String.Source: Just in time, too. Kuvar was starting to give me some grief about his new armor. This will do the trick nicely.
String.Dest: 正是时候。库瓦尔才跟我抱怨他的新护甲呢。这样就没问题了。

String.Source: And I'm not even mentioning the fact that now we'll never know what would have happened when Miraak returned.
String.Dest: 我甚至都没提到那个已经永远不得而知的情况，要是米拉克真的回归了会怎样。

String.Source: The only problem is, I'm going to need a lot of spears. A lot. So, if you could find a bunch of them for me, that would make it easier on me.
String.Dest: 唯一的问题是，我需要很多根长矛，非常多。所以，你要是能帮我找来一大堆，我就省了很多麻烦。

String.Source: I want to ring the whole hall with their little spears. Mocking us, from the past. Making us work harder. Fight better.
String.Dest: 我要用它们那些小长矛来警醒整个大厅。用过往来嘲讽我们。使我们干活更努力，战斗更拼命。

String.Source: I want to make a reminder. So we never forget what happened the last time we got soft.
String.Dest: 我想做个提示物，这样我们就永远不会忘记上次变软弱后发生了什么。

String.Source: Actually, now that I think of it, I have been missing the Ashfire. It's a special brew that we make at Thirsk.
String.Dest: 其实，说到这个，我真的很怀念灰焰蜜酒。那是我们以前在瑟斯科酿的特殊口味。

String.Source: To tell you the truth, I've been a little distracted. I've got this... idea.
String.Dest: 说实话，我有点烦了。我想到了一个……主意。

String.Source: Spriggan are loathsome creatures. They summon some of the most benign beings of the forest and bend them to their will.
String.Dest: 木灵真是令人生恶，它们会召唤森林中最温顺的动物，让它们屈服于自己的意志。

String.Source: Solitude... home to the East Empire Company, the heartless bastards.
String.Dest: 独孤城……东帝国公司的老巢，那些心狠手辣的混蛋。

String.Source: Good to finally be getting some sleep at night. Things are bad enough without everyone around here looking death-eyed, too.
String.Dest: 晚上终于能睡好觉了。就算大家没黑眼圈，情况也够糟糕了。

String.Source: The dwarves were a clever race. I wonder what happened to them?
String.Dest: 矮人以前是个很聪明的种族。我好奇他们到底遇到了什么事？

String.Source: Ugh, what a wretched place. Who would build a town in the middle of a swamp?
String.Dest: 啊，这地方太糟糕了。谁会把镇子建在沼泽中央啊？

String.Source: You can't find them on Solstheim, but if you find yourself back in Skyrim, I wouldn't mind you bringing some juniper berries.
String.Dest: 调料在索瑟海姆岛上找不到，但可以回天际去找找。希望你能帮我带些刺柏浆果回来。

String.Source: Whiterun... the pride of Skyrim. Doesn't look like much to me. Now Blacklight on the other hand, that's a proper city.
String.Dest: 白漫城……天际的骄傲。在我看来不太像啊。不过另一方面，说明黑光城才是大城市。

String.Source: I am Hermaeus Mora. I have been watching you since you defeated Miraak. Your progress is most impressive.
String.Dest: 我乃赫麦尤斯·莫拉。你击败米拉克后，我就在观察你。你的成果令人惊叹。

String.Source: They add a different kind of sweetness. Tart. Makes the flavor more round.
String.Dest: 它们能添加一种不一样的甜酸味。能让口感变得更润。

String.Source: One is just ready to take its turn, though, and it's about time to add some of the flavorings.
String.Dest: 但有一桶快好了，是时候加些调料了。

String.Source: We lost most of the batches we had brewing when... before those things were here.
String.Dest: 我们失去了大部分快酿好的酒……在那些东西来之前。

String.Source: I wonder what became of Saint Jiub? I met him once, you know.
String.Dest: 我想知道圣鸠步怎么样了？我见过他一面，知道吧。

String.Source: So this is the fabled College of Winterhold. Amazing.
String.Dest: 看来这就是传说中的冬堡学院了，太神奇了。

String.Source: To think the Falmer are loosely related to the Dunmer sends shivers down my spine.
String.Dest: 想到伐莫是丹莫的远亲真让我全身发毛。

String.Source: I don't recall asking you to kill Miraak. That was your own project.
String.Dest: 我可没叫你去杀了米拉克。那是你自己的任务。

String.Source: Hmm, no, you look fine. Well, at least no different than when I first saw you.
String.Dest: 嗯，没有，你看上去没事。至少跟我初次看到的你没两样。

String.Source: One more thing, Dragonborn, if you will.
String.Dest: 还有件事，龙裔，如果你不介意的话。

String.Source: My hands weren't made for building things. Thanks for getting us off that project up there.
String.Dest: 我的双手不是为建造而生，感谢你让我们从那工程中脱身。

String.Source: Make it quick, I don't like this waiting game.
String.Dest: 快点儿。我不喜欢这种耐性训练。

String.Source: I never knew my father... my mother and I always lived alone.
String.Dest: 我没见过我爸……一直以来都跟老妈住一块儿。

String.Source: Well then, you should know better than anyone that Hermaeus Mora is not to be trifled with.
String.Dest: 好吧，那你应该比任何人都清楚赫麦尤斯·莫拉是不容小觑的。

String.Source: Any of the documented indications of Hermaeus Mora's permanent influence.
String.Dest: 这些是文献记载中的赫麦尤斯带来的永久性影响。

String.Source: Riverwood looks peaceful. If I had to settle in Skyrim, this might be the place I'd choose.
String.Dest: 河木镇看起来很安宁。如果我要在天际安家，可能会选在这儿。

String.Source: Not much of a farm. How do they expect to grow anything in this ash-free soil?
String.Dest: 这农场真不像样。他们怎么在无灰土里种出作物来？

String.Source: The All-Maker made you Dragonborn for a higher purpose. Do not forget that.
String.Dest: 造物主让你成为龙裔是为了更崇高的目标，不要忘记这点。

String.Source: I wonder how many souls were lost when this ship met its fate.
String.Dest: 不知道这艘船沉的时候有多少冤魂丧生了。

String.Source: So this is Riften. Glover Mallory told me a good deal about the place. It looks exactly as I'd pictured.
String.Dest: 原来这就是裂谷城。葛洛文·马洛里跟我说过这儿的很多事情。和我想象的一模一样。

String.Source: Our journey's been quite rewarding so far. Hopefully you won't mind sharing the spoils.
String.Dest: 这趟旅途收获颇丰，希望你不介意分享一些战利品。

String.Source: You better not be gone long.
I don't know why I decided to make my way to Solstheim to seek my fortune. I should have stayed home.
String.Dest: 不知道为什么我要来索瑟海姆讨生活，真该待在家里。

String.Source: If it'll help us get moving quicker, sure.
String.Dest: 要是可以让我们脚步快些，没问题啊。

String.Source: I can't believe how carelessly the dead are buried here. I can't imagine my body just rotting away like that.
String.Dest: 不敢相信死者就这样敷衍地埋在这儿了，我的尸体要是那样腐烂下去简直不敢想。

String.Source: I grew up in the city of Blacklight in Morrowind. If you ever get the chance, you should visit there... it's spectacular.
String.Dest: 我在晨风的黑光城长大，你要是有机会该去看看……非常壮观。

String.Source: Nice place you have here. I never knew you were so wealthy.
String.Dest: 你这边还不赖嘛，我都没想到你这么有钱。

String.Source: Becoming a hagraven requires a sacrifice to their foul deity. Show them no mercy before we become one of the victims.
String.Dest: 成为乌鸦鬼婆需要向他们的邪神献祭。面对他们不要手软，不然我们就成牺牲品了。

String.Source: The Forsworn are little more than beasts. They won't listen to reason, so prepare for the worst.
String.Dest: 弃誓者不过是野兽罢了。他们蛮不讲理，所以做好最坏的打算吧。

String.Source: Ugh, the stench. We must be nearing a giant's home.
String.Dest: 呃啊，这股臭味。我们肯定离巨人的窝不远了。

String.Source: I am Hermaeus Mora. I have been watching you since we last spoke, and I am pleased with your progress.
String.Dest: 我乃赫麦尤斯·莫拉。上次交流后我就在观察你，我为你的成果感到欣慰。

String.Source: I know it is not my place, but... may I offer a word of advice... of warning?
String.Dest: 我知道没有这个资格，但是……我能给个建议……或者劝告吗？

String.Source: Speaking of which... I think I've located another book, if you're interested. Here, let me show you.
String.Dest: 说到这个……我想起来又找到了另一本书，你有兴趣吗？这里，我指给你看。

String.Source: Who? Oh him. Well, I assume you killed him. Or Hermaeus Mora turned on him when you looked like the winning bet. Or a bit of both.
String.Dest: 谁？哦他啊。嗯，我猜被你杀了吧。或者当你胜券在握时，赫麦尤斯·莫拉背刺了他。不然就是两者皆有。

String.Source: I asked her about him many times, but she seemed angry and refused to speak about him, so eventually I let it go.
String.Dest: 我倒是问过很多次，但老妈总会发火儿，一个字儿都不说，后来就没提过了。

String.Source: What do you have in mind?
Now all that's left are these Black Books. It's a shame I haven't located any more. So much more to be learned.
String.Dest: 现在剩下的就是这些黑暗经书了。很遗憾我再也没找到其他的了。还有很多可以学的。

String.Source: As shaman of the Skaal, I am charged with the spiritual well-being of my people.
String.Dest: 作为斯卡尔萨满，我要守护族人们的心灵。

String.Source: Your master cannot help you now!
String.Dest: 现在你的主人也帮不了你了！

String.Source: You've no right to be here, monster!
I wasn't worried. Just interested. I don't get to observe first-hand many people who've spoken to Hermaeus Mora.
String.Dest: 我不担心，只是好奇。我很少有机会直接观察与赫麦尤斯·莫拉交流过的人。

String.Source: It's colder down here. I don't like the cold.
The food is better up here, too.
Warlocks practice all sorts of foul sorcery. We should proceed with caution.
String.Dest: 这些术士啥邪术都会。我们推进时务必小心。

String.Source: We just keep waiting for Bujold to say the word...
String.Dest: 我们都等着布约德开口……

String.Source: We have enough problems around here without having to build that blasted thing outside. Thanks for helping us wake up and move off it.
String.Dest: 我们这儿的问题已经够多了，还要去建造外面那破玩意儿。谢谢你让我们醒来离开那里。

String.Source: Did you still want me to help you or not?
Now all that's left are these Black Books, waiting for another ambitious fool to be lured into Hermaeus Mora's clutches.
String.Dest: 现在剩下的就是这些黑暗经书了，等着下一个有野心的笨蛋落入赫麦尤斯·莫拉的魔爪。

String.Source: One more thing, Skaal-friend, if you will.
String.Dest: 还有件事，斯卡尔之友，如果你不介意的话。

String.Source: Dragons, eh? Good, I was looking for a challenge.
String.Dest: 龙，是吧？很好，我正在找些挑战呢。

String.Source: Oh fine, go on... leave me here. When you decide to return to your senses, you know where to find me.
String.Dest: 哦好吧，你走啊……把我丢在这儿。等你恢复理智了，再来找我吧。

String.Source: I don't care how much you're paying me, there's no way I'm doing that.
String.Dest: 不管你开价多少，我都不会这么干。

String.Source: They left the town a shambles... but when House Redoran took over, we turned it around and it became ours.
String.Dest: 他们遗留的镇子简直是废墟，瑞多然家接管后，大肆翻修后就成了我们的。

String.Source: Raven Rock started out as an Imperial settlement, but the Empire decided to abandon it just as my people were first setting foot here.
String.Dest: 鸦石镇一开始是个帝国人聚落，但后来帝国决定放弃这里，就在我族人民刚踏足时。

String.Source: And even if it's been a struggle to make this island livable, we're proud to call it home.
String.Dest: 尽管在岛上讨生活很难，我们仍然可以骄傲说这里是我们的家。

String.Source: You're going ahead without me? Suit yourself...
String.Dest: 你想一个人先走？随便你吧……

String.Source: I know you risked a lot freeing me from Miraak's control. Thank you!
String.Dest: 我知道你冒了很大风险将我从米拉克掌控中救出来。感谢你！

String.Source: My father was a noble man, and a true Skaal.
String.Dest: 我父亲是个高尚的人，一个真正的斯卡尔人。

String.Source: Is that so? Well, you'll never get that treasure now!
String.Dest: 是吗？好啊，你们永远也别想得到财宝了！

String.Source: Then there's Tel Mithryn to the east. The Telvanni live over there... sort of a strange lot, but since we're both from Morrowind, we get along.
String.Dest: 然后东边儿是泰尔·米斯瑞恩。泰瓦尼家住那儿……他们有点奇怪，但既然我们都来自晨风，相处得也还行。

String.Source: You sure showed Miraak who's in charge around here!
String.Dest: 你让米拉克知道了这儿谁是老大！

String.Source: You cannot hope to defeat me here.
String.Dest: 在这里打败我想都别想。

String.Source: Your death will not be that painless.
You won't catch me doing that.
String.Dest: 你不会发现我那么干的。

String.Source: Must go back and get it.
At that moment, I knew I'd never see him again. No amount of money would ever be worth that kind of death.
String.Dest: 那会儿我就知道再也见不到他了。给再多的钱也不值得那样送死。

String.Source: Um. Well, he is a very great wizard. It's a great honor for him to have taken me as his apprentice.
String.Dest: 嗯。其实，他是个很伟大的法师，收我当学徒是我的荣幸。

String.Source: That's definitely safer. I'm not sure I'll risk summoning an Ash Guardian again myself. Too easy to forget about the heart stone!
String.Dest: 那确实更安全。我不确定还会不会冒风险召唤灰烬守卫了。一不小心就会把心石忘了！

String.Source: Long story, but I don't see the harm in sharing it with you.
String.Dest: 说来话长，不过分享给你也没什么坏处。

String.Source: Do not let Herma-Mora tempt you further.
String.Dest: 别再受赫玛-莫拉的诱惑了。

String.Source: It used to be one of the richest ebony mines in Morrowind, but it dried out years ago.
String.Dest: 那以前是晨风最富有的黑檀矿，但几年前被挖空了。

String.Source: It is not right that I should say this, because I must honor my father's wishes, but this is a path I never chose.
String.Dest: 或许我不该这么说，因为我得遵从父亲的遗愿，但是这条路从来就不是我自己选的。

String.Source: Until we ended up tracking him to one of the largest bandit encampments I'd ever seen.
String.Dest: 直到我们追踪到了一个强盗营地，是我这辈子见过的最大之一。

String.Source: Boss says you're to come back with me.
I can't tell you how relieved I am that Miraak's gone from my mind. I appreciate what you've done.
String.Dest: 米拉克不再控制我的思想让我如释重负，感谢你做的一切。

String.Source: I do not think that is wise.
String.Dest: 我不认为那是明智之举。

String.Source: He was a great man and a good leader. I miss him dearly.
String.Dest: 他是个很好的人，也是个好首领。我很想他。

String.Source: Boss said to bring you back or bring back your corpse.
String.Dest: 老大说要么带活人，要么带尸体回去。
我自由了！感谢你，外地人。

String.Source: Stealing a man's mind... it just isn't right. Thanks for saving me from that madman.
String.Dest: 窃取他人的心智……太离谱了。谢谢你把我从那疯子手里救出来。

String.Source: The giant air-floaters from the dark elf lands. Only the brave dare to hunt them, only the strong survive them.
String.Dest: 这是暗精灵土地上的巨型浮空生物。只有勇士才敢猎杀他们，只有强者才能活下来。

String.Source: My patron took one look at me, and made the most menacing grin I'd ever seen.
String.Dest: 我的雇主看了我一眼，脸上露出最凶狠的狞笑。

String.Source: If our aim and our hearts are true, the All-Maker will grant us strength.
String.Dest: 如果我们的目标和心境并不虚假，造物主就会赐我们力量。

String.Source: Well, my boss wasn't about to let him get away, so we pursued... on foot, for three days.
String.Dest: 我老板不打算放过他，所以我们就追上去了……徒步追了整整三天。

String.Source: That's right. Don't be like me and have to learn the hard way. Here's the spell tome, and a heart stone so you can try it safely.
String.Dest: 没错。别像我这样学教训。这本法术书给你，还有一颗心石，这样你可以放心试一试。

String.Source: All right. But remember, don't cast this without a heart stone! Otherwise the guardian will attack everyone, including you.
String.Dest: 好吧。但是记住，不要在没有心石的时候召唤！否则灰烬守卫会攻击任何人，包括你。
都死完了！除我以外的所有人……

String.Source: She was caught in a terrible snowstorm while returning home from gathering firewood.
String.Dest: 在收集柴火回来的路上，她被一场可怕的暴风雪吞噬了。

String.Source: That can't be good for you.
Miraak... I... I'm not sure that I do.
Now, we're barely holding on out here. Without the mine, Raven Rock doesn't feel like it can last much longer.
String.Dest: 现在我们只是在苦苦撑着，少了矿脉，鸦石镇应该撑不了多久了。

String.Source: Have you destroyed the Ash Guardian yet? Master Neloth will kill me... or worse... if he finds out!
String.Dest: 你摧毁灰烬守卫了吗？内洛斯大师会杀了我……或者更糟糕……要是让他知道了！

String.Source: Anyway, we'd just cleared a ruined fort somewhere outside of Whiterun and when we got outside, we saw one of them galloping away on horseback.
String.Dest: 总之，我们刚清理完白漫城外的一个废弃堡垒。出来时看见其中一个人骑马飞奔而去。

String.Source: I do have a staff I could give you instead, if you think the Ash Guardian spell is too risky.
String.Dest: 我也可以给你一把法杖，要是你觉得召唤灰烬守卫法术太冒险的话。

String.Source: Are you sure this is a good idea?
Heart stones are only found on Solstheim, as far as I know.
String.Dest: 据我所知，只有索瑟海姆岛上才有心石。

String.Source: They attacked us. Those bastards at Frossel. Stole our treasure - wait! Forget I said that. That's my treasure. You can't have it!
String.Dest: 他们袭击了我们。佛罗塞尔的那群混蛋，偷走了我们的财宝。等等，当我没说，财宝属于我，不是你的！

String.Source: Your fearlessness never ceases to impress me.
Remember Majni's pack, at Frostmoon Crag. Now, I must be off. The blood calls.
String.Dest: 记住马吉尼狼群，在霜月险崖。那么，我得走了。鲜血在召唤我。

String.Source: My thoughts are always with my people.
Other than that, Solstheim is crawling with bandits and Reiklings, but that's to be expected living on the frontier like this.
String.Dest: 除此之外，索瑟海姆到处都是强盗和瑞克灵，但毕竟是在边疆地区，也可以理解。

String.Source: You've picked one of the worst places in Morrowind to do that, but suit yourself.
String.Dest: 你选了全晨风最差的地方来找工作，只能说人各有志了。

String.Source: The beast was not the only one to fall this day. May the All-Maker welcome our brethren with open arms.
String.Dest: 今天死的不止这头野兽。愿造物主张开双手欢迎我们的弟兄们。

String.Source: Our victory will bring meat and bones to our people and glory to our families.
String.Dest: 我们的胜利会给族人带来肉和骨头，给家族带来荣耀。

String.Source: When it comes to being chieftain, she is like a wolf with her jaws clamped tight upon a fresh kill.
String.Dest: 谈到首领的位子时，她就像匹紧咬着猎物不放的狼。

String.Source: My heart is still heavy with the loss of my father.
String.Dest: 父亲逝世仍使我感到心情沉重。

String.Source: The beast was strong, but we were stronger.
String.Dest: 这野兽很强大，但我们更强。

String.Source: They will sing stories of this day.
String.Dest: 他们会歌颂今天的故事。

String.Source: We will test ourselves. May the All-Maker not find us wanting.
String.Dest: 我们要试试自己的实力。愿造物主不要对我们不满。

String.Source: I have been preparing for it all my life. There is no question that I'm ready, but...
String.Dest: 我已经为这天准备了一辈子。当然准备好了，但是……

String.Source: We have come south to test our worth against the mighty Netch. Will you join us?
String.Dest: 我们来南边是为了打败强大的气母以证明自己的实力的。你要加入我们吗？

String.Source: Come. Test yourself against the beast with us. We all will share in the glory of the hunt!
String.Dest: 来吧。和我们一起检验你的实力。我们将一同分享狩猎的荣耀！

String.Source: She died when I was very young.
Either way, they will sing songs of our bravery around the campfires for many years.
String.Dest: 无论如何，人们会在以后很多年里，围着营火歌颂我们的勇气。

String.Source: If not, today is as good a day to die as any other.
String.Dest: 不然，今天死或者以后死也没什么区别。

String.Source: A warrior expects nothing, and therefore is ready for anything.
String.Dest: 一个战士别无所求，所以做好了一切准备。

String.Source: Well met, friend. May we all fight or die well.
String.Dest: 欢迎，朋友。希望我们打的精彩，或是死的壮烈。

String.Source: I can call you back to my tower as often as I like.
String.Dest: 我随时可以把你传回我的塔。
要么奋力一搏，要么壮烈赴死。

String.Source: Well, now... a fellow beast-blood. Well met, friend. Not many of our kind still hunt these lands.
String.Dest: 嗯……你也流着野兽之血。欢迎你，朋友。在这片土地上狩猎的同胞们不多了。

String.Source: Hmm. Your eyes appear to be completely back to normal. Interesting.
String.Dest: 嗯，你的眼睛看上去完全恢复正常了，有意思。

String.Source: It was Skaf the Giant, our former chieftan, who taught me the ways of battle.
String.Dest: 是“巨人”斯卡夫，我们的上任首领，他教导我战斗的方式。

String.Source: I'm never going to get used to that.
I wish you would stop doing that.
I can't believe you do that on purpose.
Did you truly think to be rid of me so easily?
String.Dest: 你真以为打败我那么容易吗？

String.Source: Simple... he paid well. Very well.
String.Dest: 很简单……他开价很高，非常之高。

String.Source: No matter where the road takes us, my thoughts are of home.
String.Dest: 不管路通往何方，我的心总是向着家。

String.Source: Even now, the All-Maker watches over us.
String.Dest: 即使现在，造物主也看着我们。

String.Source: You should leave those books alone.
We are bound to this land, like a great pine with roots that run as deep as the tree is tall.
String.Dest: 我们和这片土地紧密相连，就像一颗巨松那样根深蒂固。

String.Source: We will honor and sing praises for the fallen.
String.Dest: 我们会尊敬死者，并为他们歌颂。

String.Source: He had an insatiable bloodlust and was extremely stubborn... one of the toughest employers I've ever had.
String.Dest: 他嗜血成性，而且顽固到了极点……是我遇到的最难相处的雇主之一。

String.Source: Life never truly ends. Death is just a passage from one form to the next.
String.Dest: 生命永远不会真正的结束。死亡只是从一段到另一段的过程。

String.Source: Well, there's a small enclave of Nords to the north at Skaal Village. They pretty much keep to themselves, and we both like it that way.
String.Dest: 呃，北面有块很小的诺德飞地叫做斯卡尔村。他们几乎与世隔绝，这也正合我们的意。

String.Source: But that's alright. The Skaal need a shaman and I know that is my place.
String.Dest: 但是没关系。斯卡尔人需要一个萨满，我知道这是我的职责。

String.Source: The mighty beast will fall and we will rise.
String.Dest: 那强大的野兽将陨落，而我们会崛起。

String.Source: That's the kind of attitude that's going to land you in prison, but I'll let it go for now.
String.Dest: 这种态度迟早会让你进监狱，这次我就放过你了。

String.Source: I'm not chasing that map. It's a fool's errand. I'm done. Leave me alone.
String.Dest: 我不会去找那张地图。傻子才去找。我不干了，离我远点。

String.Source: Luck? Luck will play no part today. We will earn our victory or return to the All-Maker.
String.Dest: 好运？好运今天派不上用场。我们要么取胜，要么回归造物主。

String.Source: He was a great bear of a man, and a fearsome warrior. I used to be terrified of him when I was a little girl.
String.Dest: 他是个巨熊般的男人，一个令人心生恐惧的战士。小时候我很怕他。

String.Source: Is it good to see more of the world, for wisdom is the child of experience.
String.Dest: 多看看这个世界也好，毕竟智慧来源于经验。

String.Source: I always thought that I would be a great hunter, or even the village chieftain.
String.Dest: 我一直认为我会是个好猎人，甚至成为村子首领。

String.Source: Please, you have to help me. Master Neloth is not patient or understanding. At all.
String.Dest: 求你了，你一定得帮我。内洛斯大师既没有耐心也没有同理心。完全没有。

String.Source: We Skaal do not fear death. We know we will return to the All-Maker and be born anew.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人不惧死亡。我们知道我们会回归造物主的怀抱然后重获新生。

String.Source: Not that there's much beyond the confines of our town anyway.
String.Dest: 但其实除了我们的镇子，这儿也没什么了。

String.Source: Between the wolves, the weather and the threats in the south, even a simple task like gathering wood for the fire can turn deadly in an instant.
String.Dest: 除了狼群、天气还有南边儿来的威胁，即使是像收集柴火这样的小事儿也可能让人突然离世。

String.Source: Just remember, Raven Rock is sovereign territory of House Redoran. This is Morrowind, not Skyrim. While you're here you will be expected to abide by our laws.
String.Dest: 记住了，鸦石镇是瑞多然家的主权领土。这里是晨风，不是天际。在这里必须遵从我们的法律。

String.Source: Hah! Not if Fanari has anything to say about it.
To be honest, it's horrible. He's very unpleasant and hardly teaches me anything. Sometimes he uses me in his experiments.
String.Dest: 但是老实说，糟透了。他很难相处，几乎没教我什么。有时还拿我做实验。

String.Source: I was a restless and angry child, and Skaf taught me swordplay so that I could, as he used to say, "put that fire to good use."
String.Dest: 以前我是个好动且脾气暴躁的小孩儿，所以斯卡夫就教我剑术，他说这是“物尽其用”。

String.Source: My last patron was a true Nord. He was dressed in animal skins, had tattoos on his face... a real traditional type, if you know what I mean.
String.Dest: 我的上一个雇主是个真正的诺德人。身披兽皮，脸上刺青……非常的传统，这么说你应该懂吧。

String.Source: You must understand that, for the Skaal, life is a constant hardship. We take nothing for granted. We cannot afford to.
String.Dest: 你得理解这点，对斯卡尔人来说，生命面临着不断的挑战。我们不会认为任何事情是理所当然的，我们付不起这样的代价。

String.Source: Master Neloth believes they may be fragments from inside Red Mountain that were flung here during the huge eruption two hundred years ago.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师认为心石可能是两百年前，红山喷发时，从火山内部抛到这里的碎块。

String.Source: I've been out of the business so long, I almost forgot how to swing a pickaxe.
String.Dest: 我不干这行太久了，都快忘记怎么挥舞鹤嘴锄了。

String.Source: Help yourself to as much ore as you like... you've earned it.
String.Dest: 你想挖多少都随便……这是你应得的。

String.Source: I haven't set foot in these mines for ages. It's strange being back after so long.
String.Dest: 我好久没踏进矿场了。过了这么久回来还真奇怪。

String.Source: We're all in agreement that you're entitled to as much as you can carry.
String.Dest: 我们都同意让你挖到背不动。

String.Source: This mine's amazing! Have you ever seen so much ebony in your life?
String.Dest: 这个矿太惊人了！你这辈子看到过那么多黑檀矿吗？

String.Source: There's nothing quite like the sound of metal striking rock.
String.Dest: 没什么比金属敲打岩石的声音更悦耳的了。

String.Source: In fact, Councilor Morvayn has given you the full run of the place. Help yourself to whatever you like.
String.Dest: 实际上，莫尔凡议员让你全权管理这个地方。你想挖多少就挖多少。

String.Source: Welcome to Raven Rock Mine, outlander.
String.Dest: 欢迎来到鸦石镇矿场，外地人。

String.Source: Thanks to House Redoran getting these mines reopened, I can provide for my family again.
String.Dest: 感谢瑞多然家让矿场重开了，我又能养家糊口了。

String.Source: Good to know that the mine's safe again. I heard a lot of strange things happened here.
String.Dest: 很高兴知道矿井里又安全了。听说这儿发生了很多怪事。

String.Source: It's good to get back to mining after all these years.
String.Dest: 过了这么些年，能回来采矿真好啊。

String.Source: Ah, yes, the lure of the Black Book.
String.Dest: 啊，对的，黑暗经书的诱惑。

String.Source: I know it must seem strange to you, but for us, the thought of leaving our village is equally strange.
String.Dest: 我知道这对你看来很奇怪，但是对我们来说，离开村子的念头也很奇怪。

String.Source: Say hello to Hermaeus Mora for me.
String.Dest: 代我向赫麦尤斯·莫拉问好。

String.Source: The land and the Skaal are one. There is no other way to say it.
String.Dest: 斯卡尔与这片土地一体同心。没有别的说法了。

String.Source: Nice to be making some coin again.
String.Dest: 又能赚钱的感觉真不赖。

String.Source: It's hard to explain... I remember those people with the masks coming on board, then...
String.Dest: 很难解释，我只记得带着这些戴面具的漂洋过海，然后……

String.Source: It's an island northeast of here. Has a small dark elf town called Raven Rock and a handful of Nords living in Skaal Village.
String.Dest: 那是座岛，在这儿的东北方。岛上有个叫鸦石镇的暗精灵镇子，还有一群诺德人住在斯卡尔村。

String.Source: Now that my tower is healed, I can finish some of my more delicate experiments.
String.Dest: 既然我的塔已经治好，我可以做些精细的实验了。

String.Source: When the city of Vivec was destroyed, it took decades for us to rebuild.
String.Dest: 维威克城被摧毁后，我们花了几十年来重建。

String.Source: I don't know. But I mean to find out.
String.Dest: 我不知道。但我会查出来的。

String.Source: I've got to get back. Tel Mithryn is probably falling apart.
String.Dest: 我得回去了。泰尔·米斯瑞恩可能都塌了。

String.Source: House Telvanni has it's properties on Vvardenfell. I've never been to the mainland myself.
String.Dest: 泰瓦尼家族的势力范围在瓦登费尔。我自己则从未去过内陆。

String.Source: Those poor spriggans. Ever since you healed the tower, Master Neloth has been experimenting on them.
String.Dest: 可怜的木灵们。自从你治疗了塔后，内洛斯大师就开始拿他们做实验。

String.Source: Be careful out there. Solstheim is full of dangers.
String.Dest: 在外面小心点，索瑟海姆充满了危险。

String.Source: We are still but a shadow of our glorious past, but some day we will rise again.
String.Dest: 比起过去的辉煌，我们现在不过是阴影，但终有复兴的一日。

String.Source: But I'm not going back there. There's something wrong about that place.
String.Dest: 但我不打算回去了，那地方有些古怪。

String.Source: It's the homeland of the dunmer. The lesser races call us dark elves.
String.Dest: 那里是丹莫家乡。那些低等种族称我们为暗精灵。

String.Source: Look, I'm sorry about your troubles, but I've got to look out for myself. I'm not going to risk it.
String.Dest: 听着，对于你遇到的事儿我很抱歉，但我必须得考虑自己，我不想冒这个险。

String.Source: If the All-Maker favors us, we will eat well for many days.
String.Dest: 要是造物主眷顾，我们很长时间内都不愁吃。

String.Source: Hold on, now. I'm just a simple sailor. I never wanted to get mixed up in any of this. Alright, I'll take you. But we leave immediately.
String.Dest: 等等，好吧，我就是个船夫，不想卷入这一切。我答应带你去，我们得立刻出发。

String.Source: We built great works there, like Vivec and Ald'ruhn. Many of them are destroyed now, either by Red Mountain or the argonian invasion.
String.Dest: 我们在那里建造了几座大城市，比如维威克城和奥德·鲁恩。现在大多被摧毁了，要么是红山，要么是阿尔贡入侵。

String.Source: If you've come here to hunt, there is plenty of game to be found.
String.Dest: 你要是来这儿打猎，能发现很多猎物。

String.Source: Yeah, well, and I don't want them trying to kill me. So the answer is still no.
String.Dest: 嗯，是啊，我也不想被他们给宰了。所以我还是得拒绝你。

String.Source: It was fascinating to watch those tentacles grow out of your eyes.
String.Dest: 看着那些触手从你眼睛里长出来真是太奇妙了。

String.Source: There is the big island of Vvardenfell, and the coastal mainland.
String.Dest: 晨风主要由瓦登费尔这座大岛，和沿岸的内陆组成。

String.Source: The ash from Red Mountain holds secrets. Secrets I mean to uncover.
String.Dest: 红山的灰烬中埋藏着诸多秘密。而我将一一揭开。

String.Source: May your eyes be sharp and your aim true.
String.Dest: 愿你的双眼永远锐利，箭术永远精准。

String.Source: I still have some research to do before I'll know anything for certain.
String.Dest: 我还要调查一番才能确定。

String.Source: I... I can't believe it. All those years on the farm, and my mother never told me about any of this.
String.Dest: 我……不敢相信。在农场上的那些年里，我妈从来没告诉我这些。

String.Source: Well... a man's got to make a living, after all. Fine. We'll cast off immediately.
String.Dest: 嗯……人总要吃饭的嘛。好吧，我们立刻起航。

String.Source: Have you been listening to me? I'm not going back there.
String.Dest: 你没听我说的吗？我没想过回去了。

String.Source: Although I managed to transplant a few here when I arrived.
String.Dest: 我来这儿后试着引进过几只。

String.Source: How do you like my new laboratory? I use it to dissect spriggans. I've learned so much from them.
String.Dest: 喜欢我的新实验室吗？是我拿来解剖木灵的。我从它们身上学到了很多。

String.Source: Even so, I pick up a lot from just watching him.
String.Dest: 尽管如此，我单看着他还是学到了很多。

String.Source: If you're looking for passage to Solstheim, too bad. I'm not going back there anymore.
String.Dest: 你在找去索瑟海姆的船吗？抱歉，我再也不回去了。

String.Source: It had rolling green plains and swamps and verdant hills too.
String.Dest: 过去那里有起伏的绿色平原、沼泽和青翠的山丘。

String.Source: This just isn't right. Why was I working on that stone?
String.Dest: 不对劲。我为啥要在这石头上修东西？

String.Source: Alright, you have a point. Taking you back to find out who sent them is the least I can do.
String.Dest: 好吧，你说的有道理，我有义务带你去查清楚是谁派来的。

String.Source: The wise hunter is cautious, always.
String.Dest: 聪明的猎人总会保持谨慎。

String.Source: Now hold on! That wasn't my fault... I didn't know they were going to attack anybody. I don't even know how I got here.
String.Dest: 听我说！那不是我的错……我完全不知道他们要袭击某人，我连自己怎么来的都不清楚。

String.Source: There's been something strange going on there for a while, but after this... I'm done. I'm not going back to Solstheim.
String.Dest: 那儿已经出了一阵子的怪事儿了，但这次……我受够了，我再也不回索瑟海姆了。

String.Source: Peace and bountiful harvests to you.
Most of the game has been driven north by the ashfall.
String.Dest: 火山灰把大部分猎物往北边儿赶了。

String.Source: That's a tempting offer... when you actually have the gold, I might be willing to consider it.
String.Dest: 这个提议很不错……等你有这笔钱了，我也许会改变主意。

String.Source: Red Mountain dominates the island. Every now and then ash and debris from an eruption land on our shores.
String.Dest: 红山俯瞰着这个岛。时不时会有火山灰和岩石被喷出来坠落到我们的海岸上。

String.Source: Words can't even begin to describe how much I appreciate you bringing this to me.
String.Dest: 多亏你把它带来，我也不知道该怎么表达感谢。

String.Source: The ignorant think it is only a place of ash and lava.
String.Dest: 无知者觉得那儿只有灰烬和岩浆。

String.Source: There must be a way. I'll find it if I have to vivisect every spriggan on this island.
String.Dest: 一定有法子的。即使要我解剖岛上的每只木灵也要找到。

String.Source: You are too young to remember the Nerevarine. He defeated Dagoth Ur and saved us all from the blight.
String.Dest: 你太年轻，可能不知道尼瑞瓦因。他打败了达格斯·乌尔，把我们从枯萎病中拯救出来。

String.Source: I hope Master Neloth can explain this.
String.Dest: 希望内洛斯大师能解释一下。

String.Source: It is the only place where silt striders can be found.
String.Dest: 泥沙漫步者是当地特有生物。

String.Source: Here, take this. I used to carry it for good luck, but I think you deserve it more than I do.
String.Dest: 给，拿着这个吧。以前我都随身带着以求好运，现在你比我更需要这个了。

String.Source: Surprised you've never heard of it.
Thank you for rescuing us from that awful stone pillar.
String.Dest: 感谢你把我们从那可怕的石柱那儿救出来。

String.Source: Next thing I remember, I was here and they were gone. That's not right, losing whole days like that.
String.Dest: 接着我只记得我在这儿，他们不见了。但这不对劲，一整天就这么没了。

String.Source: I already told you, I'm not going back to Solstheim.
String.Dest: 已经告诉过你了，我没想过回那边儿去。

String.Source: I... I must have been drugged. That's it. Someone drugged me. Maybe one of Mogrul's cronies.
String.Dest: 我……我一定是被下药了。肯定的，有人给我下药，也许是莫古尔的狐朋狗友。

String.Source: Besides, maybe you can put a stop to whatever's going on over there. I owe them a bit of payback myself.
String.Dest: 除此之外，你或许能解决那边发生的怪事儿。毕竟我还欠他们人情。

String.Source: There's been something strange happening on Solstheim for a while, but this... this is something else. I hope you get to the bottom of it.
String.Dest: 索瑟海姆这阵儿本来就常发生一些怪事，但这次……这事儿可不一样，我希望你能查个水落石出。

String.Source: Be wary! The reavers have camps all over the island.
String.Dest: 小心！岛上全是抢匪的营地。

String.Source: Whatever you want. The answer isn't going to be any different later though.
String.Dest: 随你的便，我的答复是不会变的。

String.Source: We hunt not only to eat, but also to test our skill.
String.Dest: 我们打猎不光是为了填饱肚子，也是为了检验技巧。

String.Source: Somehow Master Neloth found out about the Ash Guardian. I'm terrified of what he's going to do.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师不知怎的知道了灰烬守护者的事儿。很怕他接下来要做什么。

String.Source: Talvas, I think I'll start with the burnt spriggan. They don't squirm as much.
String.Dest: 塔瓦斯，就从烈焰树精开始吧。它们不怎么来回扭动。

String.Source: Just... be careful here. Things aren't what they used to be.
String.Dest: 但是……小心点吧。这里的情况和以前大不相同了。

String.Source: Well, here we are. Welcome to Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 嗯，我们到了。欢迎来到鸦石镇。

String.Source: Sure. Yeah. That's me. Why? Who sent you?
String.Dest: 对啊，就是我。咋了，谁派你来的？

String.Source: What have I gotten myself into.
Do you have enough coin for the journey?
String.Dest: 你为这次旅行带够钱了吗？

String.Source: I don't have to know what you are to kill you.
String.Dest: 要宰了你没必要知道你是什么东西。

String.Source: Neloth may be crazy, but it's better than staying in Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 内洛斯可能疯了，但总比待在鸦石镇要好。

String.Source: Do you ever get lonely out here in the middle of nowhere?
String.Dest: 你在这人烟稀少的地方不会寂寞吗？

String.Source: She lives. Seek her in Highpoint Tower.
String.Dest: 她还活着，去制高塔楼找到她。

String.Source: No need to tell him about it when he gets back. He knows all about this.
String.Dest: 没必要在他回来后告诉他，他全都知道的。

String.Source: If you're going to be up here, stay out of my way.
String.Dest: 你要是想留在上面，就别妨碍到我。

String.Source: So you have slain Alduin... Well done. I could have slain him myself, back when I walked the earth, but I chose a different path.
String.Dest: 看来你宰了奥杜因……干得好。我还在现世的时候，本来可以亲手宰了它的，但我选了另一条路。

String.Source: Sometimes I feel sorry for them. Master Neloth's experiments tend to be fatal.
String.Dest: 有时我会为他们难过。内洛斯大师的实验通常都会致命。

String.Source: You may have heard of him. He's a famous Telvanni wizard.
String.Dest: 你可能听说过他，一位很著名的泰瓦尼法师。

String.Source: If you ever need aid, seek out Majni's pack, up at Frostmoon Crag. They've long welcomed outsiders.
String.Dest: 你要是需要帮助，就去马吉尼的狼群，就在霜月险崖上面。他们总是欢迎外来的。

String.Source: I'll go fetch some, Master Neloth. Canis root, right?
String.Dest: 我马上去泡，内洛斯大师。犬根茶，对吧？

String.Source: Varona was never able to do the repair work that you do.
String.Dest: 瓦罗纳可没你那么会修东西。

String.Source: Thank you. I didn't mean to be so defensive.
String.Dest: 谢谢你，我不该这么敏感。

String.Source: Master Neloth is the most powerful wizard of House Telvanni. Maybe the most powerful in all of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师是泰瓦尼家最强大的法师，可能还是全晨风最强的。

String.Source: He told me all about it, but I can't seem to recall the details right now.
String.Dest: 他跟我说过，但我不太记得住细节了。

String.Source: What did they bring? Books? Soul gems?
String.Dest: 他们带来些什么？书？灵魂石？

String.Source: It's not your fault, Drovas. You do other things well.
String.Dest: 这不是你的错，多瓦斯。你其他的事情做得很好。

String.Source: I still have nightmares about what Ildari did to my friends.
String.Dest: 伊达利给我朋友们做的实验，到现在还会让我做噩梦。

String.Source: Not now. Wait until we are back at Tel Mithryn.
String.Dest: 现在不行，等我们回泰尔·米斯瑞恩再说。

String.Source: He's off doing research in Raven Rock. I think.
String.Dest: 我猜的话，他去鸦石镇做些调查了。

String.Source: I'm off to take up my new position with Master Neloth.
String.Dest: 我要为新工作去找内洛斯大师报到了。

String.Source: With the ash from Red Mountain covering half the island, it's astonishing how much Solstheim reminds me of home.
String.Dest: 红山的火山灰都盖住半个岛了，真没想到索瑟海姆让我想起了故乡。

String.Source: Can't say I'd mind heading out of here. I still need to get paid, of course.
String.Dest: 我也想离开这儿，但你当然也得付钱。

String.Source: I suppose you're right. At least here I'm safe from Mogrul.
String.Dest: 你说得对，至少我在这里不用担心莫古尔。

String.Source: That's a nice trick, but it won't save your skin.
String.Dest: 有趣的把戏，但那可救不了你。

String.Source: Heard that Reiklings got hold of Thirsk Mead Hall. Forced the Nords who lived there to move to a camp nearby.
String.Dest: 听说瑞克灵抢了瑟斯科蜜酒大厅，原本住在那儿的诺德人被赶到附近的营地去了。

String.Source: I don't plan on being killed by the likes of you.
I hate this ash. It gets into everything.
String.Dest: 我恨这灰烬，简直是无孔不入。

String.Source: I'm not sure why House Redoran is so insistent on maintaining Solstheim. Seems like more trouble than it's worth.
String.Dest: 我不确定为什么瑞多然家这么坚持要控制索瑟海姆，这里的麻烦看来比利益要大。

String.Source: However, if you hear unearthly screams, I would advise you to not come up.
String.Dest: 总之，要是你听到什么不寻常的尖叫，我建议你别上来。

String.Source: Master Neloth, the silt strider traders just dropped off some supplies.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师，那些泥沙漫步者商队刚卸下一批物资。

String.Source: I know Varona was your friend. It's okay to miss her.
String.Dest: 我知道瓦罗纳是你朋友，想她很正常。

String.Source: Someday I will inherit all of this. It's worth a little pain.
String.Dest: 我总有一天会继承这一切，受点苦是值得的。

String.Source: I came a long way to kill you.
So the stories are true... the dragons have returned. But why?
String.Dest: 所以传说是真的……龙族回归了。但原因呢？

String.Source: I hope you gave him a swift end.
I... I understand. That's not an existence I would wish on anyone.
String.Dest: 我……我明白了。我不希望有人这样活着。

String.Source: Seems like things are looking up in Raven Rock now that the mine's open. It's a nice change.
String.Dest: 看来矿场开张后事态有所好转，是个不错的转变。

String.Source: So this is Raven Rock, eh? Not all that much to look at.
String.Dest: 那么，这儿就是鸦石镇，对吧？看起来没什么大不了的。

String.Source: She fights well enough, for a Skaal.
String.Dest: 作为一个斯卡尔人，她的战斗技巧够好了。

String.Source: Mostly books. There were a couple of soul gems, some ingredients for Elynea, and some strange wood.
String.Dest: 大多是书。有一些灵魂石，艾琳娜要的材料，还有些奇怪的木材。

String.Source: Ah! The wood is for the staffs. Put them away when you get a chance. But don't get in my way.
String.Dest: 啊！那些木材是用来做法杖的。你有空就收走，但别妨碍到我。

String.Source: Master Neloth is preparing to... well, it's better if you don't know.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师正准备要……你还是别知道好了。

String.Source: You better get used to this, Drovas. This isn't that unusual for Tel Mithryn.
String.Dest: 最好习惯这点，多瓦斯。这在泰尔·米斯瑞恩是很正常的。

String.Source: So, unearthly screams, don't come up. Got it.
String.Dest: 那么，听到诡异的尖叫，就别上去。懂了。

String.Source: Sadly, no. She died in Falkreath, where I was born.
String.Dest: 很遗憾，没有。她死在佛克瑞斯了，我出生的地方。

String.Source: But have they forced us to change the way we live our lives? No, not at all.
String.Dest: 不过要说我们有因为龙而被迫改变生活方式吗？不，完全没有。

String.Source: Master Neloth certainly keeps me busy. Taking care of this estate is a lot of work.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师肯定会让我忙个不停。打理这个庄园很费事。

String.Source: Might be time to find a new home port, though, the way things are going around here.
String.Dest: 但照这儿的情况来看，也许是时候找个新的母港了。

String.Source: Shh! Master Neloth is concentrating. At least I think he is. He might be sleeping with his eyes open again.
String.Dest: 嘘！内洛斯大师正在集中精神，至少我想是这样。也可能是他又睁眼睡着了。

String.Source: They're back to regular size. It didn't hurt nearly as much this time.
String.Dest: 已经恢复到正常大小了。这次没那么痛。

String.Source: I don't understand why you let him do these things to you.
String.Dest: 我不明白为什么你让他这么对待你。

String.Source: I miss Varona. She used to help me with the gardening.
String.Dest: 我想瓦罗纳了，她过去常帮我管理花园。

String.Source: I can't help it if I have a black thumb. It's like the mushrooms hate me.
String.Dest: 手指弄脏我也没办法，就像蘑菇恨我一样。

String.Source: Tel Mithryn. It's the home of Master Neloth.
String.Dest: 泰尔·米斯瑞恩。内洛斯大师的居所。
你耳朵怎么样了，塔瓦斯？

String.Source: Dragons... even on Solstheim. I can't believe it.
String.Dest: 龙……甚至索瑟海姆都有。难以置信。

String.Source: He's not here right now. I think he's in Raven Rock.
String.Dest: 他现在不在这儿。我想应该在鸦石镇。

String.Source: My ship's ready to sail if you've brought enough gold.
If you've got the gold, I'm your captain.
The Telvanni are amazing. Look what they've grown from the ash... have you ever seen anything like it?
String.Dest: 泰瓦尼很神奇，看看他们从灰烬里种出了什么……你见过这种东西吗？

String.Source: They're saying that the dragons have returned. As if we didn't have enough to worry about already.
String.Dest: 有人说龙族回归了。我们的麻烦还不够多吗？

String.Source: I, uh... I'm going to be reading the spell book. Maybe it can tell me how to banish the Ash Guardian.
String.Dest: 我，呃……我要去看看法术书，可能写了怎么驱逐那头灰烬守卫。

String.Source: I've been sailing the Northern Maiden across the Sea of Ghosts for nearly twenty years now.
String.Dest: 我在幽灵之海上开北方少女号快二十年了。
你个吃肉的跳猫子，还有什么招？

String.Source: I've heard tales of the mushroom towers of Morrowind. Never thought I'd see one.
String.Dest: 我以前听说过晨风的蘑菇塔，但从没想过能亲眼看见。

String.Source: Words reached us that the dragons have returned. I wonder if we'll see them on Solstheim?
String.Dest: 听说龙族回归了，不晓得我们在索瑟海姆看不看得到。

String.Source: The Maiden doesn't move until I've been paid.
String.Dest: 你得付钱，不然北方少女号开不了。

String.Source: Well... I guess nothing bad happened the last time. Fine, we'll sail as soon as I get paid.
String.Dest: 嗯……上次还算没出什么意外。好吧，你付钱我就准备起航。

String.Source: The, uh... the lab is too small. Also, I need the ashy soil.
String.Dest: 呃……实验室太小了，而且，我需要灰质土。

String.Source: Thank you for rescuing me from High Point tower.
String.Dest: 谢谢你把我从制高塔救出来。

String.Source: I don't know whether to kill it or pet it.
String.Dest: 我不知道是把你宰了还是圈养起来好了。

String.Source: We sail as soon as I'm paid.
Hmm. Reminds me of the standing stones back home.
String.Dest: 嗯。这让我想起了故乡的立石。

String.Source: Why are you out here? Master Neloth is away. Aren't you supposed to stay in the tower?
String.Dest: 你怎么在外面？内洛斯大师出门了，你不该待在塔里吗？

String.Source: Anytime you want to head for Skyrim, I'm right with you. I've spent enough time on Solstheim to last a lifetime.
String.Dest: 等你想回天际了，我也陪你。我在索瑟海姆都快过一辈子了。

String.Source: Yes, yes. Canis root tea. And don't let Ulves water it down.
String.Dest: 对，对。犬根茶。还有别让乌尔维斯加太多水。

String.Source: I've called Raven Rock my home for a number of years. Azura knows why... it's a mess.
String.Dest: 我已经把鸦石镇当自己的家很多年了，天晓得为什么……太糟了。

String.Source: They are but one more hardship added to the many we already endure.
String.Dest: 它们不过是我们经受了的苦难中新添的一个罢了。

String.Source: I've heard that dragons have been seen in the skies over Morrowind. I'll believe it when I see it for myself.
String.Dest: 听说晨风有人看到天上有龙，等我亲眼看见才会相信。

String.Source: Master Neloth told me to practice this spell while he's away.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师要我在他走了后练习这个法术。

String.Source: Hope we don't run into too many ash spawn out here.
String.Dest: 但愿我们在这儿别碰上太多灰烬怪。

String.Source: Tel Mithryn is the safest place in Solstheim. Only a fool would challenge Master Neloth.
String.Dest: 泰尔·米斯瑞恩是索瑟海姆岛上最安全的地方。

String.Source: Now... my prey awaits. Good hunting to you.
String.Dest: 现在……猎物还等着我呢，祝你捕猎愉快。

String.Source: Well, the dragons are a constant danger, but so far they have taken little interest in our village. Thank the All-Maker for that!
String.Dest: 嗯，龙是个长久的危险因素。但是目前为止它们对我们村子还不感兴趣。感谢造物主！

String.Source: How can the Skaal stand it up here? It's freezing!
String.Dest: 斯卡尔人怎么能忍受这个地方？冷死了！

String.Source: It's true that I normally prefer to stay home and conduct my research in peace. Everything's so much more convenient there.
String.Dest: 的确，我一般更喜欢待在家里安静地做我的研究。那里一切都方便多了。

String.Source: But, given that something seems to be taking control of the minds of all the inhabitants, I thought it worth investigating.
String.Dest: 但是这里似乎有什么东西在控制居民们的心智，我想这值得调查一番。

String.Source: Tribe-kin live all places. All of world within great water.
String.Dest: 部落血亲到处住。全世界在大海里。

String.Source: Why are we up here? The smell is just... ugh.
String.Dest: 我们为什么在这上面？这气味太……呃啊。

String.Source: Thanks for taking that thing down. We're supposed to be warriors, not crafters.
String.Dest: 谢谢你毁了那玩意儿。我们是战士，不是工匠。

String.Source: Hot fire. Cold dizzydrink. Happy tribe.
String.Dest: 热乎乎的火，凉冰冰的酒，高高兴兴的部落。

String.Source: Were we... did you help us?
String.Dest: 我们被……是你帮了我们吗？

String.Source: Glad to not be working on that ugly thing anymore. Finally getting some sleep.
String.Dest: 很高兴不用建那个丑东西了，我们终于能睡好觉了。

String.Source: I'd rather make mead than ugly shrines. You did good getting us away from there.
String.Dest: 我宁可酿蜜酒也不想去建那难看的祭坛。感谢你把我们从那儿救出来。

String.Source: I am sorry, but my duty is to my people right now.
String.Dest: 抱歉，但我有对族人的义务。

String.Source: Just be sure to bring an ancient Nord pickaxe with you. It's the only pickaxe that can mine the Stalhrim properly without breaking it.
String.Dest: 记得带上一把古诺德鹤嘴锄就是了。只有它才能开采魔冰。

String.Source: With skill and patience. It's very much like working ebony.
String.Dest: 要有技巧和耐心。就跟处理黑檀一样。

String.Source: It is not safe here! We must go back to the village!
String.Dest: 这里不安全！我们得回村里！

String.Source: Well, first you'll need to obtain some Stalhrim, of course, and then you'll need to work it.
String.Dest: 好吧，首先你当然得弄来一些魔冰，然后接着就开始加工。

String.Source: I suppose Master Neloth won't mind. He's always telling me to get out of his way.
String.Dest: 内洛斯大师应该不介意吧。他总是要我别碍着他。

String.Source: You must fight against what is controlling you!
String.Dest: 你们必须抵抗控制你们的东西！

String.Source: Yes... I'd say if you know how to forge ebony, then you know everything you need to know in order to forge Stalhrim.
String.Dest: 没错……如果你知道怎么熔炼黑檀，那你就知道怎么熔炼魔冰了。

String.Source: You can find some in Raven Rock Mine, as well as that new source of Stalhrim on the map you recovered from the elves.
String.Dest: 鸦石镇矿场能挖到一些，另外，从精灵手里拿回来的地图上也有新的魔冰矿源。

String.Source: Ysra, I'm here to help you!
It has been an honor, Skaal-friend.
String.Dest: 这是我的荣幸，斯卡尔之友。

String.Source: Come back when you have the coin.
An Amulet of Mara? You're not married? Surprising.
String.Dest: 玛拉护符？你还没结婚吗？令人惊讶啊。

String.Source: You go ahead and arrange the wedding ceremony when you're ready.
String.Dest: 准备好的话就去安排婚礼吧。

String.Source: It's all in the swing. Let me show you.
String.Dest: 一切尽在挥舞中。我来教你。

String.Source: I'll gladly share my knowledge with you.
String.Dest: 我很乐意与你分享知识。

String.Source: I'll show you what I can about protecting yourself.
String.Dest: 我会教你如何保护自己的。

String.Source: I'm the best warrior in Morthal, and that's no boast.
String.Dest: 我是莫萨尔最强的战士，这可不是自夸。

String.Source: I am Hermaeus Mora. I am the guardian of the unseen, and knower of the unknown. I have been watching you, mortal.
String.Dest: 我乃赫麦尤斯·莫拉。我乃未见之物的守护者，未知之物的了解者。我注视你很久了，凡人。

String.Source: Your free will is an illusion. Whether you acknowledge me or not is your own business. But I will be in your mind.
String.Dest: 你的自由意志不过是幻觉。认不认我是你的事，但我会深刻在你的脑海里。

String.Source: Have you spoken to the Temple of Mara, yet? I'm so excited.
String.Dest: 你跟玛拉神庙谈过了？我真兴奋啊。

String.Source: You should tell the priest we're getting married. They'll take things from there.
String.Dest: 你应该去和祭司谈谈咱们结婚的事。他们会帮忙的。

String.Source: That amulet. I've seen the Nords wear these when they're looking to marry. With your strength, you should have no trouble.
String.Dest: 那个护符。我看见诺德人求偶的时候会带着。凭你的力量应该不难吧。

String.Source: Never thought I'd get married under a Nord god. But with you, it feels right.
String.Dest: 从没想过我会在一个诺德神灵的注视下结婚。但只要是你，就没关系。

String.Source: We have our wedding soon, don't we? That's right, we do!
String.Dest: 我们的婚礼就要开始了，对吧？没错，就要开始了！

String.Source: Hey, shouldn't you tell the Temple of Mara that we're getting married? Be hard to have a wedding without a priest.
String.Dest: 嘿，你难道不该去和玛拉神庙知会一声咱们要结婚了吗？没有祭司可办不成婚礼啊。

String.Source: You should arrange the ceremony at the Temple of Mara right away. I can't wait.
String.Dest: 你应该赶快到玛拉神庙安排婚礼。我都等不及了。

String.Source: Our wedding is soon. I'll see you then!
String.Dest: 我们的婚礼要开始了。一会儿见！

String.Source: Won't lie, I am. And you?
I used to be an adventurer in my day, then I settled down. Got married.
String.Dest: 我以前是个冒险家，后来安定下来就结婚了。

String.Source: An Amulet of Mara, you're looking for marriage, then?
String.Dest: 玛拉护符，你是在求婚吗？

String.Source: You deal with them, I'll make sure you get paid. Maybe this old soldier will throw in some lessons as well.
String.Dest: 你去搞定他们，我来付你钱。也许我这个老兵还能给你上一课。

String.Source: Show those marauders what Windhelm justice tastes like.
String.Dest: 让那些劫掠者尝尝风舵城正义的味道。

String.Source: But a group of Dark Elf refugees gets ambushed? A group of Argonians, or a Khajiit caravan? No troops. No investigation. Nothing.
String.Dest: 但如果是群暗精灵难民被袭击？一群阿尔贡，或者卡吉特车队？没有军队，没有调查。什么都没有。

String.Source: What do you need to take?
I'm heading home if you need me.
String.Dest: 我先回家了，有需要请叫我。

String.Source: I'd best get back to Master Neloth then. No telling what's happened since I've been gone.
String.Dest: 那我最好回内洛斯大师那里去。不知道我走后出了什么事。

String.Source: The wedding is soon. It'll be a good day.
String.Dest: 婚礼快开始了。真是美好的一天。

String.Source: Fine! I'll take care of it, just please leave me alone!
String.Dest: 好！我会处理的，别再烦我了！

String.Source: Look at you. Wearing an Amulet of Mara. Are you saying you're available?
String.Dest: 看看你。居然带着玛拉护符。你是说你还单身吗？

String.Source: That's a brave offer. I'd be happy to throw in my coin behind that.
String.Dest: 真是个勇敢的提议。我很乐意出钱。

String.Source: Now shouldn't you be off arranging our wedding day? Don't keep me waiting.
String.Dest: 你不是该去安排我们的婚礼了吗？别让我等太久了。

String.Source: Whenever a group of marauders attack a Nord village, Ulfric is the first to sound the horn and send the men.
String.Dest: 每当劫掠者袭击诺德人的村庄，乌弗瑞克总是第一个吹响号角并派人过去。

String.Source: You've embarrassed the temple and spat in the face of love. What do you want?
String.Dest: 你让神庙蒙羞，还侮辱了爱情。你还想干什么？

String.Source: Is that an Amulet of Mara? I'm surprised someone like you isn't spoken for.
String.Dest: 那是玛拉护符吗？你这样的人居然还没对象，太令人惊讶了。

String.Source: Here, some gold as promised, and let me show you a bit about wearing heavy armor. Save you some aches on a long march.
String.Dest: 给。这是我承诺过的金币，让我来展示一下该怎么穿重甲吧。省得你在长途跋涉之后感觉浑身酸痛。

String.Source: You're wearing Mara's amulet? You? I'd marry you. I'd marry you twice.
String.Dest: 你居然带着玛拉护符？你吗？我来和你结，两次都可以。

String.Source: You should speak to the priest in the Temple of Mara to arrange the ceremony. No sense waiting.
String.Dest: 你应该赶快和玛拉神庙的祭司去商量安排婚礼。别傻等着了。

String.Source: I'll see you at our wedding!
I'm looking forward to our wedding. You and me....
String.Dest: 我期待着咱们的婚礼。你和我……

String.Source: Is that Lady Mara's amulet? I'm shocked a fine person like you isn't married already.
String.Dest: 那不是玛拉女神的护符吗？你这样的好人居然还没有结婚吗。

String.Source: Come on. Let's see what you're made of.
String.Dest: 来吧。看看你有什么能耐。

String.Source: Who do you think brought Septimus here? Who do you think protected you on your journey to open the box and loose my knowledge on this world?
String.Dest: 你以为是谁引导赛普蒂莫斯至此？你以为是谁在你打开盒子、把我之知识泄露于世的旅途中庇护了你？

String.Source: Ugh. You mangy piece of pit-bait.
You already appear to have someone with you.
String.Dest: 你这不是有人跟着了吗。

String.Source: I'm sorry, that can't be done.
I'm sorry, but I'm not going to do something like that. Even for you.
String.Dest: 抱歉，但我不会做这种事。即使是你要求我。
